dhārmikasyāpyaśaktasyatīvrāgnitvādupoṣaṇe
idaṃ vratamaśeṣāṇāṃ vratānām adhikaṃ yataḥ
kathayiṣyativiśvātmāvāsudevo jagad guruḥ
aśeṣayajṣaphaladamaśeṣāghavināśanam
aśeṣaduṣṭaśamanamaśeṣasurapūjitam
pavitrāṇāṃ pavitraṃ yanmagalānāṃ camaṅgalam
bhaviṣyaṃ cabhaviṣyāṇāṃ purāṇānāṃ purātanam
vāsudeva uvāca
yadyaṣṭamīcaturddaśyordvādaśīṣucabhārata
tatas tvagryāmimāṃ bhīmatithiṃ pāpapraṇāśinīm
upoṣyavidhinānenagacchaviṣṇoḥ paraṃ padaṃ
māghamāsasyadaśamīyadāśuklābhavettadā
ghṛtenābhyaṃ janaṅkṛtvātilaiḥ snānaṃ samācaret
tathaivaviṣṇumabhyarcennamonārāyaṇāya ca
kṛṣṇāyapādau sampūjyaśiraḥ kṛṣṇātmanetica
vaikuṃ ṭhāyetivaikaṃ ṭhamuraḥ śrīvatsadhāriṇe
savaṃ nārāyaṇantvevaṃ sampūjyāvāhanakramāt
dāmodarāyetyudaraṅkaṭiṃ paṣcajanāyavai
ūrūsaubhāgyanāthāyajānunībhūtadhāriṇe
namonīlāyavaijaṅghepādauviśvabhujepunaḥ
namodevyai namaḥ śāṃ tyainamolakṣmyai namaḥ śriyai
namastuṣṭyai namaḥ puṣṭyaidhṛtyaivyuṣṭyainamo namaḥ
namovihaṅganāthāyavāyuvegāyapakṣiṇe
viṣapramathanāyetigaruḍaṃ cābhipūjayet
gavyenapayasāsiktāṅkṛsarāmathapāyasam
sarpiṣāsahabhuktvātu gatvā sthānāṃ taraṃ punaḥ
naiyagrodhaṃ daṃ takāṣṭhamathavākhādiraṃ budhaḥ
gṛhītvādhāvayeddaṃ tānācāṃ taḥ prāgudaṅmukhaḥ
brūyātsāyaṃ tanīṅkṛtvāsaṃ dhyāmastamiteravau
namonārāyaṇāyetitvāmahaṃ śaraṇaṅgataḥ
ekādaśyāṃ nirāhāraḥ samabhyarcya ca keśavam
tāṃ rātriṃ sakalāṃ sthitvāśeṣaparyaṅkaśāyinam
sarpiṣāviśvadahanaṃ hutvābrāhmaṇapuṅgavaiḥ
sahaivapuṇḍarīkākṣaṃ dvādaśyāṅkṣīrabhojanam
evamuktvāsvapedbhūmāvitihāsakathāṃ punaḥ
śrutvā prabhātesaṃjātenadīṅ gatvā viśāṃ pate
snānaṅkṛtvāmudātadvatpāṣaṇḍānabhivarjayet
upāsyasandhyāṃ vidhivatkṛtvācapitṛtarpaṇam
praṇamyacahṛṣīkeśaṃ śeṣaparyaṅkaśāyinam
gṛhasyapuratobhaktyāmaṇḍapaṅkārayedbudhaḥ
caturhastāṃ śubhāṅkuryādvedīmariniṣūdana
madhyecakalaśaṃ tatra māṣamātreṇasaṃ yutam
chidreṇajala sampūrṇamadhaḥ kṛṣṇājinesthitaḥ
tasyadhārāṃ caśirasādhārayetsakalāṃ niśām
yasmāt tasmāt kuruśreṣṭhakārayetprayatodvijaḥ
dakṣiṇecārdhacandraṃ tupaścimevartulaṃ tathā
aśvatthapatrākāraṃ cauttareṇatukārayet
madhyetupadmākāraṃ cakārayedvaiṣṇavodbijaḥ
pānīyadhārāṃ śirasidhārayedviṣṇutatparaḥ
hastamātraṃ catatkuṇḍaṅkṛtvā tatra trimekhalam
kṛtvātuvaiṣṇavaṃ samyagyāgaṃ tatra prakalpayet
ājyadhārāmadhyametukuṇḍedadyāttuyatnataḥ
kṣīradhārāṃ devadevevāridhārātmanopari
niṣpāvārdhapramāṇāṃ vaidhārāmājyasyapātayet
svecchayākṣīrajalayoravicchinnāṃ caśarvarīṃ
jalakuṃ bhānmahāvīryasthāpayitvātrayodaśa
pratānauduṃ baraiḥ pātraiḥ paṣcaratnasamanvitaiḥ
vaiṣṇavāni casāmāni caturbhiḥ sāmavedibhiḥ
evaṃ dvādaśavaiviprānvastramālyānulepanaiḥ
pūjayedaṅgulīyaiś ca kaṭakair hemasūtrakaiḥ
vāsobhiḥ śayanīyaiś ca vittaśāṭhyavivarjitaḥ
evaṅkṣapātivāhyāvaigītamaṅgalaniḥsvanaiḥ
gāvodeyāḥ kuruśreṣṭhasauvarṇaśṛṅgasaṃ vṛtāḥ
payasvinyaḥ śīlavatyaḥ kāṃ syadohasamanvitāḥ
raupyakhurāḥ savatsāś ca caṃ danenābhibhūṣitāḥ
tāstuteṣāṃ tatodatvābhakṣyabhojyenatarpitān
kṛtvāvaibrāhmaṇānsarvānchatrair nānāvidhaistathā
bhuktvācākṣāralavaṇamātmānācavisarjayet
anugamyapadānyaṣṭauputrabhāryāsamanvitaḥ
prīyatāmatradeveśaḥ keśavaḥ kleśanāśanaḥ
evaṅgurvājṣayākuṃ bhāngāś caiva śayanāni ca
vāsāṃ si caiva sarveṣāṅgṛhāṇiprāpayedbudhaḥ
abhāvebahuśayyānām ekāmapisusaṃ skṛtām
śayyāṃ dadyādgṛhībhīmasarvopaskarasaṃ yutām
itihāsapurāṇāni vācayitvātuvāhayet
taddinaṅkuruśārdūlayaicchedvipulāṃ śriyam
tvayākṛtam idaṃ vīratvannāmnācabhaviṣyati
sābhīmadvādaśīhyeṣāsarvapāpaharāśubhā
yātukalyāṇinīnām apurākalpeṣu paṭhyate
yasyāḥ smṛteḥ kīrtanatopyaśeṣaṃ pāpaṃ praṇaṣṭaṃ tridaśādhipasya
dṛṣṭvā catāmapsarasāmabhīṣṭāṃ veśyākṛtāmanyabhavāṃ tareṣu
jātāthasāvaiśyakulodbhavāpipulomakanyāpuruhūtapatnī
tatrāpitasyāḥ paricārikeyaṃ mamapriyā sampratisatyabhāmā
kṛtaṃ purāmaṅgalametadevadvijātmajāvedavatī babhūva
asyāṃ cakalyāṇatithauvivasvānsahasradhāreṇasahasraraśmiḥ
kalikaluṣavidāriṇīmanaṃ tāmapi kathayiṣyatiyādavendrasūnuḥ
kalyāṇinīnām apurāvisargeyādvādaśīmāghasitebhipūjyā
sāpāṇḍuputreṇakṛtābhaviṣyatyaṃ natapuṇyānaghabhīmapūrvā
varṇāśramāṇāṃ prabhavaḥ purāṇeṣu mayāśrutaḥ
sadācāraś ca bhagavāndharmaśāstrāṅgavistaraiḥ
paṇyastrīṇāṃ samācāraṃ śrotumicchāmitatvataḥ
īśvara uvāca
vāsudevasyanārīṇāṃ bhaviṣyaṃ tyaṃ bujodbhava
nirbharaṃ sahapatnīmiḥ praśastābhir alaṅkṛtaḥ
ramayiṣyativiśvātmākṛṣṇoyadukulodvahaḥ
kuraṅganayanaḥ śrīmānmālatīkṛtaśekharaḥ
gacchansamīpamārgeṇasāṃ bojāṃ bavatīsutaḥ
sākṣātkandarparūpeṇa sarvābharaṇabhūṣitaḥ
anaṅgaśarataptābhiḥ sābhilāṣamavekṣitaḥ
tadavekṣyajagannāthaḥ sarvajṣodhyānacakṣuṣā
tataḥ prasāditodevaidaṃ vakṣyatiśārṅgabhṛt
tābhiḥ śāpābhitaptābhir bhagavānbhūtabhāvanaḥ
uttarāśritadāśānām uddhartābrāhmaṇapriyaḥ
upadekṣyatyanaṃ tātmābhāvikalyāṇakārakam
bhavatīnām ṛṣirdālbhyo yadvrataṃ kathayiṣyati
ityuktvātāḥ parityajyagatontardhānamīśvaraḥ
tataḥ kālenamahatābhārāvataraṇekṛte
hṛtāsukṛṣṇapatnīṣudāśabhogyāsucārbude
tiṣṭhaṃ tīṣuyacadaurgatyasaṃ taptāsucaturmukha
āgamiṣyatiyogātmādālbhyo nāmamahātapāḥ
lālapyamānābahuśovāṣpaparyākulekṣaṇāḥ
bharttāraṃ jagatāmīśamanantamaparājitam
divyānubhāvāṃ capurīṃ nānāratnagṛhāṇica
dvārakāvāsinaḥ sarvāndevarūpānkumārakān
svadharmaścyāvitosmākamasminnaḥ śaraṇaṃ bhavān
ādiṣṭosipurābrahmankeśavenacadhīmatā
kasmād īśenasaṃ yogaṃ prāpyaveśyātvam āgatāḥ
kathayiṣyevadattāsāṃ yaddālbhyaś ca ikitāyanaḥ
dālbhya uvāca
jalakrīḍāvihāreṣu purāsarasimānase
bhavatīnāṃ sagarvāṇāṃ nāradobhyāśamāgataḥ
hutāśanasutāḥ sarvābhavatyopsarasaḥ purā
apraṇamyāvalepenaparipṛṣṭaḥ sayogavit
kathaṃ nārāyaṇosmākaṃ bharttāsyādityupādiśa
tasmād varapradānaṃ caśāpaścāyamabhūtpurā
śayyādvayapradānenamadhumādhavamāsayoḥ
suvarṇopaskarotsaṅgaṃ dvādaśyāṃ śuklapakṣataḥ
bhartānārāyaṇonūnaṃ bhaviṣyatyanyajanmani
yadakṛtvāpraṇāmaṃ merūpasaubhāgyamatsarāt
paripṛṣṭosmitenāśuviyogovobhaviṣyati
corair apahṛtāḥ sarvāveśyātvaṃ samavāpsyatha
evaṃ nāradaśāpenakeśavasyacaśāpataḥ
veśyātvam āgatāḥ sarvābhavatyaḥ kāmamohitāḥ
idānīmapiyadvakṣyetacchraṇudhvaṃ varāṅganāḥ
purādaivāsureyuddhehateṣu śataśaḥ suraiḥ
dānavāsuradaityeṣu rākṣaseṣu tatas tataḥ
teṣāṃ dārasahasrāṇiśataśothasahasraśaḥ
pariṇītāni yāni syurvalādbhuktāni yāni vai
tāni sarvāṇideveśaḥ provācavadatāṃ varaḥ
veśyādharmeṇavartadhvamadhunā nṛpamaṃ dire
rājataḥ svāminaścāpijīvikāṃ capralapsyatha
bhaviṣyaticasaubhāgyaṃ sarvāsāmapiśaktitaḥ
yaḥ kaścicchulkamādāyagṛhameṣyativaḥ sadā
niśchadmanaivopacaryaḥ prītibhāvair adāṃ bhikaiḥ
devatānāṃ pitṝṇāṃ capuṇyehnisamupasthite
gobhūhiraṇyadhānyāni pradeyāni caśaktitaḥ
saṃsārottāraṇāyālametadvedavidoviduḥ
yadāsūryadinehastaḥ puṣyovāthapunarvasuḥ
tadāpaṣcaśarātmātuhariḥ sannidhimeṣyati
arcayetpuṇḍarīkākṣamanaṅgasyānukīrtanaiḥ
kāmāyapādau sampūjyajaṅghevaimohakāriṇe
hṛdayaṃ hṛdayeśāyastanāvāhlādakāriṇe
utkaṃ ṭhāyetivaikaṃ ṭhamāsyamānaṃ dakāriṇe
vāmāṃ sampuṣpacāpāyapuṣpabāṇāyadakṣiṇam
mānasāyetivaimāliṃ vilolāyetimūrddhajam
namaḥ śivāyaśāṃ tāyapāśāṅkuśadharāya ca
namonārāyaṇāyetikāmadevātmane namaḥ
namaḥ śāṃ tyai namaḥ prītyainamāretyai namaḥ śriyai
namaḥ puṣṭyainamastuṣṭyai namaḥ sarvārtha sampade
evaṃ sampūjyagoviṃ damanaṅgātmakamīśvaram
tata āhūyadharmajṣaṃ brāhmaṇaṃ vedapāragam
śāleyataṇḍulaprasthaṅghṛtapātreṇasaṃ yutam
sarvabhāvenacātmānamarpayeitsmatabhāṣiṇī
taṇḍulaprasthadānaṃ cayāvanmāsāstrayodaśa
tatas trayodaśemāsi samprāptecāsyabhāminī
viprasyopaskarair yuktāṃ śayyāṃ dadyādvicakṣaṇā
sopadhānāṃ savinyāsāṃ svāstarāvaraṇāṃ śubhām
dīpikopānahacchatrapādukāsanasaṃ yutām
sapatnīkamalaṅkṛtyahemasūtrāṅgulīyakaiḥ
sūkṣmavastraiḥ sakaṭakair dhūpamālyānulepanaiḥ
kāmadevaṃ sapatnīkaṅguḍakuṃ bhoparisthitam
tāmrapātrāsanagataṃ hemanetrapaṭāvṛtam
sukāṃ syabhājanopetamikṣudaṇḍasamanvitam
dadyādanenamantreṇatathaikāṅgāṃ payasvinīm
yathāṃ taraṃ napaśyāmikāmakeśavayoḥ sadā
tathācakāṣcanaṃ devaṃ pratigṛhyadvijottamaḥ
tataḥ pradakṣiṇīkṛtyavisṛjyadvijapuṅgavam
śayyāsanādikaṃ sarvaṃ brāhmaṇasyagṛhaṃ nayet
sammānyasūryavāreṇasa sampūjyobhavetsadā
evaṃ trayodaśaṃ yāvanmāsam ekaṃ dvijottamam
tadanujṣayārūpavaṃ taṃ yāvadasyāgamobhavet
daivaṃ vāmānuṣaṃ vāsyāduparāgeṇavātataḥ
sāvārānaṣṭapaJcāśadyathāśaktisamarpayet
etaddhikathitaṃ samyagbhavatīnāṃ viśeṣataḥ
svadharmoyaṃ yatobhāvyoveśyānām ihasarvadā
śayyāmamāpyaśūnyeyaṃ tathāstumadhusūdana
etadvaḥ kathitaṃ sarvaṃ veśyādharmamaśeṣataḥ
puruhūtenayatproktaṃ dānavīṣupurāmayā
kalyāṇinīnāṅkathitaṃ tadetadduś ca raṃ vratam
karotiyāśeṣamudagrametatkalyāṇinīmādhavalokasaṃ sthā
sāpūjitādevagaṇair aśeṣair ānaṃ dakṛtsthānamupaitiviṣṇoḥ
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe prathame sṛṣṭikhaṇḍe veśyāvrata kathanaṃ nāmatrayoviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
caturviṃśatitamo'dhyāyaḥ
śaṅkara uvāca
śrāvaṇasyadvitīyāyāṅkṛṣṇāyāṃ madhusūdanaḥ
kṣīrārṇavesapatnīkaḥ sadāvasatikeśavaḥ
tasyāṃ sampūjyagoviṃ daṃ sarvānkāmānavāpnuyāt
gobhūhiraṇyadānādisaptakalpaśatānugam
āvāhanādikāṃ pūjāṃ pūrvavatparikalpayet
aśūnyaśayanānām advitīyāsauprakīrtitā
tasyāṃ sampūjayedviṣṇumebhir mantrair vidhānataḥ
śrīvatsadhārinśrīkāṃ taśrīpateśrīdharāvyaya
gārhasthyaṃ māpraṇāśaṃ meyātudharmārthakāmadaṃ
agnayomāpraṇaśyaṃ tudevatāḥ puruṣottama
pitaromāpraṇaśyaṃ tumamadāṃ patyabhedataḥ
lakṣmyānaśūnyaṃ varadayathāteśayanaṃ sadā
śayyāmamāpyaśūnyāstutathaivamadhusūdana
ghaṃ ṭābhavedaśaktasyasarvavādyamayoyataḥ
evaṃ sampūjyagoviṃ damaśnīyāttailavarjitam
naktamakṣāralavaṇaṃ yāvattusyāccatuṣṭayaṃ
tataḥ prabhātesaṃjātelakṣmīpatisamanvitām
dīpānnabhājanair yuktāṃ śayyāṃ dadyādvilakṣaṇām
pādukopānahacchatracāmarāsanasaṃ yutām
abhīṣṭopaskarair yuktāṃ śuklapuṣpāṃ barāvṛtām
avyaṅgāya caviprāyavaiṣṇavāyakuṭuṃ bine
tatropaveśyadāṃ patyamalaṅkṛtyavidhānataḥ
brāhmaṇasyāpisauvarṇīmupaskarasamanvitām
evaṃ yastupumānkuryādaśūnyaśayanaṃ hareḥ
vittaśāṭhyenarahitonārāyaṇaparāyaṇaḥ
nārīvāvidhavābrahmanyāvaccandrārkatārakaṃ
navirūpaunaśokārtaudaṃ patībhavataḥ kvacit
naputrapaśuratnāni kṣayaṃ yānti pitāmaha
kurvannaśūnyaśayanaṃ viṣṇuloke mahīyate
īśvara uvāca
sādhubrahmaṃ stvayāpṛṣṭamidānīṃ kathayāmite
virocanasyasaṃvādaṃ bhārgavasyacadhīmataḥ
prahlādasyasutaṃ dṛṣṭvā dviraṣṭaparivatsaram
sādhusādhumahābāhovirocanaśivaṃ tava
tamevaṃ vādinaṃ yuktam uvācavadatāṃ varaḥ
vismayādvatamāhātmyāddhāsyametatkṛtaṃ mayā
purādakṣavināśāyakupitasyatriśūlinaḥ
bhitvāsasaptapātālānadahatsaptasāgarān
vīrabhadraitikhyātaḥ karapādāyutair yutaḥ
tri jagad dahanādbhūyaḥ śivenavinivāritaḥ
kṛtaṃ tvayāvīrabhadradakṣayajṣavināśanaṃ
idānīmalametenalokadāhenakarmaṇā
śāṃ tipradānātsarveṣāṅgrahaṇāṃ prathamobhava
prahṛṣṭābhijanāḥ pūjāṅkariṣyanti kṛtātmanaḥ
aṅgārakaitikhyātiṅgamiṣyasidhārātmaja
yecatvāṃ pūjayiṣyanti caturthyāṃ tudinenarāḥ
rūpamārogyamaiśvaryaṃ teṣv anantaṃ bhaviṣyati
evamuktastataḥ śāṃ timagamatkāmarūpadhṛt
sakadācidbhavāṃ stasyapūjārghādikamuttamaṃ
dṛṣṭavānkriyamāṇaṃ caśūdreṇatvaṃ vyavasthitaḥ
tenatvaṃ rūpavānjātosuraḥ śatrukulāśaniḥ
vividhācarucirjātāyasmāt tavavidūragā
virocanaitiprāhustasmāt vāṃ devadānavāḥ
śūdreṇakriyamāṇasyavratasyatavadarśanāt
īdṛśīrūpa sampattiritivismitavānaham
ālokitaṃ tenasurārigarbhe sambhūtireṣātavadaityajātā
dīyamānaṃ tuyaddānaṃ mayādṛṣṭaṃ bhavāṃ tare
ititadvacanaṃ śrutvā vipraḥ provācasādaraṃ
mṛdāsnānantadākuryātpadmarāgavibhūṣitaḥ
śūdrastūṣṇīṃ smaranbhaumamāstāṃ bhogavivarjitaḥ
prāṅgaṇaṃ puṣpamālābhir akṣatādbhiḥ samaṃ tataḥ
catvāraḥ karakāḥ kāryāḥ bhakṣyabhojyasamanvitāḥ
taṇḍulair aktaśāleyaiḥ padmarāgaiś ca saṃ yutāḥ
catuḥ koṇeṣu tānkṛtvāphalāni vividhāni ca
suvarṇaśṛṅgāṅkapilāmathārcyaraupyaiḥ khuraiḥ kāṃ syadohāṃ savastrām
dhuraṃ dharaṃ raktakhuraṃ casaumyaṃ dhānyāni saptāṃ barasaṃ yutāni
aṅguṣṭamātraṃ puruṣaṃ tathaivasauvarṇamapyāyatabāhudaṇḍam
sāmasvarajṣāyajitendriyāyavāgrūpaśīlānvayasaṃ yutāya
rūpārthītvāṃ prapannohaṅgṛhāṇārdhyaṃ namostute
mantreṇānenadatvārghyaṃ raktacaṃ danavāriṇā
śayyāṃ caśaktimāndadyātsarvopaskarasaṃ yutām
yadyadiṣṭatamaṃ lokeyaccāsyadayitaṅgṛhe
tataḥ pradakṣiṇaṅkṛtvāvisṛjyadvijasattamam
naktaṅkṣīrāśanaṅkuryādevaṃ cāṅgārakāṣṭakam
viṣṇauvāthaśivebhaktaḥ saptadvīpādhipobhavet
iti śrīpadmapurāṇeprathame sṛṣṭikhaṇḍe aṅgārakacaturthīvrataṃ nāmacaturviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
paṃ ṣcaviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
bhīṣma uvāca
anabhyāsenarogādvākimiṣṭaṃ vratamucyatām
upavāseṣv aśaktānāṃ naktaṃ bhojanamiṣyate
ādityaśayanaṃ nāmayathāvacchaṅkarārcanam
yeṣu nakṣatrayogeṣu purāṇajṣāḥ pracakṣate
sūryasyacāpisaṅkrāṃ tistithiḥ sāsārvakāmikī
umāmaheśvarasyārcāmarcayetsūryanāmabhiḥ
sūryārcāṃ śivaliṅgaṃ caubhayaṃ pūjayedyataḥ
yasmāt tasmān nṛpaśreṣṭhagṛhebhānuṃ samarcayet
hastenasūryāyanamostupādāvarkāyacitrāsucagulphadeśaṃ
svātīṣujaṅghepuruṣottamāyadhātreviśākhāsucajānudeśam
jyeṣṭhāsvanaṅgāyanamostuguhyamindrāyabhīmāyakaṭiṃ camūle
pūrvottarāṣāḍhayugecanābhiṃ tvaṣṭre namaḥ saptaturaṅgamāya
tīkṣṇāṃ śaveśravaṇecāthakukṣiṃ pṛṣṭhaṃ dhaniṣṭhāsuvikartanāya
vakṣasthalaṃ dhvāṃ tavināśanāyajalādhiparkṣepratipūjanīyam
pūrvottarābhādrapadadvayecabāhūttamaś ca ṇḍakarāyapūjyau
samnāmadhīśāyakaradvayaṃ ca sampūjanīyaṃ nṛparevatīṣu
nakhāni pūjyāni tathāśvinīṣunamostusaptāśvadhuraṃ dharāya
kaṭhoradhāmnebharaṇīṣukaṃ ṭhaṃ divākarāyetyabhipūjanīyam
grīvāgniparkṣedhara sampuṭetu sampūjayedbhāratarohiṇīṣu
lalāṭamaṃ bhoruhavallabhāyapuṣyelakānvedaśarīradhāriṇe
sārpecamauliṃ vibudhapriyāyamaghāsukarṇāvitipūjanīyau
pūrvāsugobrāhmaṇanaṃ danāyanetrāṇi sampūjyatamāni śaṃ bhoḥ
namostupāśāṅkuśapadmaśūlakapālasarpendudhanurdharāya
gayāsurānaṅgapurāṃ dhakādivināśamūlāya namaḥ śivāya
ityādikāṅgāni capūjayitvāviśveśvarāyetiśirobhipūjyam
ityevaṃ nṛpanaktāni kṛtvādadyātpunarvasau
caturdaśetu samprāptepāraṇebhāratādike
brāhmaṇaṃ bhojayedbhaktyāguḍakṣīraghṛtādibhiḥ
kṛtvācakāṣcanaṃ padmamaṣṭapatraṃ sakarṇikam
śuddhamaṣṭāṅgulaṃ taccapadmarāgadalānvitam
śayyāṃ sulakṣaṇāṅkṛtvāviruddhagraṃ thivarjitām
sopadhānavitānāṃ casvāstarāvaraṇāśrayām
pādukopānahacchatracāmarāsanadarpaṇaiḥ
bhūpaṇair apisaṃ yuktāṃ phalavastrānulepanaiḥ
tasyāṃ vidhāyatatpadmamalaṅkṛtyaguṇānvitām
kapilāṃ vastrasaṃ yuktāmatiśīlāṃ payasvinīm
raupyakhurāṃ hemaśṛṅgīṃ savatsāṅkāṃ syadohanām
dadyānmantreṇatāṃ dhenuṃ pūrvāhṇaṃ nātilaṅghayet
yathaivādityaśayanamaśūnyaṃ tavasarvadā
kāṃ tyādhṛtyāśriyāpuṣṭyātathāmesaṃ tuvṛddhayaḥ
yathānadevāḥ śreyāṃ saṃ tvadanyamanaghaṃ viduḥ
tathāmāmuddharāśeṣaduḥkhasaṃsārasāgarāt
tataḥ pradakṣiṇīkṛtyapraṇamyacavisarjayet
naitadviśīlāyanadāṃ bhikāyaprakāśanīyaṃ vratamiṃ dumauleḥ
govipradevarṣivikarmayogināṃ yaścāpiniṃ dāmadhikāṃ vidhatte
bhaktāyadāṃ tāya caguhyametadākhyeyamānaṃ dakaraṃ śivaṃ ca
idaṃ mahāpātakināṃ narāṇāṃ aghakṣayaṃ vedavidovadanti
nabandhuputrair nadhanair viyuktaḥ patnībhir ānaṃ dakaraḥ surāṇāṃ
nābhyetirogaṃ nacaduḥkhamohaṃ yācāpinārīkurutethabhaktyā
idaṃ vasiṣṭhenapurārjunenakṛtaṅkubereṇapuraṃ dareṇa
yatkīrtanādapyakhilāni nāśamāyānti pāpāni nasaṃśayotra
itipaṭhatiśṛṇotivāyaitthaṃ raviśayanaṃ puruhūtavallabhaḥ syāt
apinarakagatānpitṝnaśeṣānapidivamānayatīhayaḥ karoti
aśvatthaṃ cavaṭaṃ caivoduṃ baraṃ vṛkṣameva ca
naṃ dīśaṃ jaṃ buvṛkṣaṃ cabilvaṃ prāhurmaharṣayaḥ
mārgaśīrṣādimāsābhyāṃ dvābhyāṃ dvābhyāmathakramāt
ekaikaṃ daṃ tadhavanaṃ vṛkṣeṣveteṣu kārayet
dvijānām udakuṃ bhāṃ ś ca paṣcaratnasamanvitān
navittaśāṭhyaṅkurvītakurvandoṣānavāpnuyāt
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe prathame sṛṣṭikhaṇḍe ādityaśayanavrataṃ nāmapaṣcaviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
ṣaḍviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
bhīṣma uvāca
dīrghāyurārogyakulātivṛddhibhir yuktaḥ pumānrūpakulānvitaḥ syāt
tvayāpṛṣṭam idaṃ samyagakṣayasvargakārakam
rahasyaṃ tupravakṣyāmi yatpurāṇavidoviduḥ
tasminnārāyaṇasyārcāmarcayediṃ dunāmabhiḥ
yadāsomadineśuklābhavetpaṣcadaśīkvacit
athavābrahmanakṣatraṃ paurṇamāsyāṃ prajāyate
tadāsnānaṃ naraḥ kuryātpaṣcagavyenasarṣapaiḥ
āpyāyasveticajapedvidvānaṣṭaśataṃ punaḥ
śūdropiparayābhaktyāpāṣaṇḍālāpavarjitaḥ
somāyaśāṃ tāyanamostupādāvanantadhāmneticajānujaṅghe
ūrudvayaṃ cāpijalodarāya sampūjayenmeḍhramanaṅgadhāmne
namo namaḥ kāmasukhapradāyakaṭiḥ śaśāṅkasyasadārcanīyaḥ
tathodaraṃ cāpyamṛtodarāyanābhiḥ śaśāṅkāyanamobhipūjyā
namostucandrāyamukhaṃ canityaṃ daṃ tādvijānām adhipāyapūjyāḥ
nāsācanāthāyavarauṣadhīnām ānaṃ dabījāyapunarbhruvauca
netradvayaṃ padmanibhaṃ tatheṃ doriṃ dīvaravyāsakarāyaśaureḥ
namaḥ samastādhvarapūjitāyakarṇadvayaṃ daityaniṣūdanāya
lalāṭamiṃ dorudadhipriyāyakeśāḥ suṣumnādhipateḥ prapūjyāḥ
śiraḥ śaśāṅkāyanamomurārerviśveśvarāyātha namaḥ kirīṭaṃ
padmapriyerohiṇīnām alaikṣmasaubhāgyasaukhyāmṛtasāgarāya
deyaḥ prabhātesahiraṇyavārikuṃ bho namaḥ pāpavināśanāya
samprāśyagomūtramamāṃ samannamakṣāramaṣṭāvathaviṃśatiṃ ca
grāsāṃ ś ca trīnsarpiyutānupoṣyabhuktvetihāsaṃ śṛṇuyānmuhūrtaṃ kadaṃ banīlotpalaketakāni jātiḥ sarojaṃ śatapatrikāca
amlānapuṣpāṇyathasiṃ duvāraṃ puṣpaṃ punarbhāratamallikāyāḥ
śuklaṃ capuṣpaṅkaravīrapuṣpaṃ śrīcaṃ pakaṃ candramasepradeyam
śrāvaṇādiṣumāseṣu kramādetāni sarvadā
evaṃ saṃ vatsaraṃ yāvadupoṣyavidhivannaraḥ
rohiṇīcandramithunaṅkārayitvātukāṣcanam
candraḥ ṣaḍaṅgulaḥ kāryorohiṇīcaturaṅgulā
muktāphalāṣṭakayutāṃ sitanetrasamanvitām
kṣīrakuṃ bhoparipunaḥ kāṃ syapātrākṣatānvitām
dadyānmantreṇapūrvāhṇeśālīkṣuphalasaṃ yutām
śvetāmathasuvarṇāsyāṃ raupyakhurasamanvitām
savastrabhājanāṃ dhenuṃ tathāśaṅkhaṃ cabhājanam
bhūṣaṇair dvijadāmpatyam alaṅkṛtya guṇānvitaṃ
yathāterohiṇīkṛṣṇaśayanaṃ natyajedapi
yathātvamevasarveṣāṃ paramānaṃ damuktidaḥ
rūpārogyāyuṣāmetadvidhāyakamanuttamam
idamevapitṝṇāṃ casarvadāvallabhaṃ nṛpa
nārīvārohiṇīcandraśayanaṃ yāsamācaret
itipaṭhatiśṛṇotivāyaitthaṃ madhumathanārcanamiṃ dukīrtanaina
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe prathame sṛṣṭikhaṇḍe rohiṇīcandraśayanavrataṃ nāmaṣaḍviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
saptaviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
bhīṣma uvāca
taṭākārāmakūpeṣu vāpīṣunalinīṣuca
ke tatra ṛtvijoviprāvedīvākīdṛśībhavet
dakṣiṇābalayaḥ kālaḥ sthānamācārya eva ca
dravyāṇikāni śastāni sarvamācakṣvasuvrata
śṛṇurājanmahābāhotaṭākādiṣuyovidhiḥ
purāṇeṣvitihāsoyaṃ paṭhyaterājasattama
prāpyapakṣaṃ śubhaṃ śuklaṃ samprāptecottarāyaṇe
puṇyehnivipraiḥ kathitekṛtvābrāhmaṇavācanam
aśubhair varjitedeśetaṭākasyasamīpataḥ
caturhastāṃ samāṃ vedīṃ caturaśrāṃ caturmukhīm
tathāpoḍaśahastaḥ syānmaṇḍapaś ca caturmukhaḥ
navasaptāthavāpaṣcaṛjuvaktrānṛpātmaja
vitastimātrāyoniḥsyātṣaṭsaptāṅgulivistṛtā
sarvatastusavarṇāsyuḥ patākādhvajasaṃ yutāḥ
aśvatthoduṃ baraplakṣavaṭaśākhākṛtāni tu
maṇḍapasyapratidiśaṃ dvārāṇyetāni kārayet
śubhāstatrāṣṭahotārodvārapālāstathāṣṭavai
aṣṭautujāpakāḥ kāryābrāhmaṇāvedapāragāḥ
sarvalakṣaṇa sampūrṇānmantrajṣānvijitendriyān
pratigarteṣu kalaśāyajṣopakaraṇāni ca
vyajanecāsanaṃ śubhraṃ tāmrapātraṃ suvistaram
ācāryaḥ prakṣipedbhūmāvanumantryavicakṣaṇaḥ
aratnimātroyūpaḥ syātkṣīravṛkṣavinirmitaḥ
yajamānapramāṇovāsaṃ sthāpyobhūtimicchatā
hemālaṅkāriṇaḥ kāryāḥ paṣcaviṃśatiṛtvijaḥ
kuṇḍalāni cahaimāni keyūrakaṭakāni ca
tathāṅgulipavitrāṇivāsāṃ sivividhāni ca
dadyātsamāni sarveṣāmācāryedviguṇaṃ smṛtam
tāmraukuṃ bhīramaṇḍūkāvāyasaḥ śiṃ śmārakaḥ
evamāsādyatatsarvamādāvevaviśāṃ pate
śuklamālyāmbaradharaḥ śuklaṅgandhānulepanaḥ
paścimadvāramāsādyapraviśedyāgamaṇḍapam
tatomaṅgalaśabdenabherīṇāṃ niḥsvanenaca
rajasāmaṇḍalaṅkuryātpaṣcavarṇenatattvavit
ṣoḍaśāraṃ tataś ca kraṃ padmagarbhaṃ caturmukham
vedyāścoparitaḥ kṛtvāgrahānlokapatīṃ stataḥ
saṃ nyasenmantrataḥ sarvānpratidikṣuvicakṣaṇaḥ
kalaśaṃ sthāpayenmadhyevāruṇaṃ mantramāśritam
brahmāṇaṃ caśivaṃ viṣṇuṃ tatra ivasthāpayedbudhaḥ
vināyakaṃ cavinyasyakamalāmaṃ bikāṃ tathā
śāṃ tyarthaṃsarvalokānāṃ bhūtagrāmaṃ nyasettataḥ
kuṃ bhāṃ ś ca ratnagarbhāṃ stānvāsobhiḥ pariveṣṭayet
puṣpagandhair alaṅkṛtyadvārapālānsamaṃ tataḥ
yajaddhvamititānbrūyādācāryamabhipūjayet
sāmagaupaścimesthāpyāvuttareṇaatharvaṇau
udaṅmukhodakṣiṇatoyajamānaupāviśet
yajadhvamititānbrūyādyājakānpunarevatān
utkṛṣṭamantrajāpyenatiṣṭhadhvamitijāpakān
evamādiśyatānsarvānsaṃ dhukṣyāgniṃ samantravit
śāntisūktaṃ caraudraṃ capāvamānaṃ camaṅgalam
japeccapauruṣaṃ sūktaṃ pūrvatobahvṛcaḥ pṛthak
śākraṃ raudraṃ casaumyaṃ cakauśmāṇḍaṃ jātavedasam
sauraṃ sūktaṃ japeyustedakṣiṇenayajurvidaḥ
vair ājaṃ pauruṣaṃ sūktaṃ sauparṇaṃ rudrasaṃ hitam
śaiśavaṃ paṣcanidhanaṅgā yatra ṃ jyeṣṭhasāmaca
vāmadevyaṃ bṛhatsāmarauravaṃ carathaṃ taram
gavāṃ vrataṃ vikīrṇaṃ carakṣoghnaṃ cayamaṃ tathā
gāyeyuḥ sāmagārājanpaścimadvāramāśritāḥ
ātharvaṇāścottarataḥ śāṃ tikaṃ pauṣṭikaṃ tathā
japeyurmanasādevamāśritāvaruṇaṃ prabhum
pūrvedyurabhitorātrāvevaṅkṛtvādhivāsanam
gajāśvarathavalmīkasaṅgamādvrajagokulāt
mṛdamādāyakuṃ bheṣu prakṣipedoṣadhīstathā
pūrvaṅkarturmahāmantrair evaṅkṛtvāvidhānataḥ
ativāhyakṣapāmevaṃ vidhiyuktenakarmaṇā
tataḥ prabhātevimalesaṃjātetuśataṅgavāṃ
brāhmaṇebhyaḥ pradātavyamaṣṭaṣaṣṭyathavāpunaḥ
paJcāśadvāthaṣaṭtriṃśatpaṣcaviṃśativāpunaḥ
kanakālaṅkṛtāṅkṛtvājalegāmavatārayet
sāmagāya casādeyābrāhmaṇāyaviśāṃ pate
pātrīmādāyasauvarṇīpaṣcaratnasamanvitām
tatonikṣipyamakarānmatsyādīṃ ś caiva sarvaśaḥ
dhṛtāṃ caturbhir vipraiś ca vedavedāṅgapāragaiḥ
mahānadījalopetāṃ dadhyakṣatavibhūṣitām
ātharvaṇenasusnātāṃ punarmāyāṃ tathaiva ca
āpohiṣṭhetimantreṇakṣiptvāgatyacamaṇḍapaṃ
pūjayitvāsadasyānvaibaliṃ dadyātsamaṃ tataḥ
kṛtvātuyajṣapātrāṇiyajṣopakaraṇāni ca
ṛtvigabhyastusamaṃ dadyānmaṇḍapaṃ vibhajetpunaḥ
hemapātrīṃ caśayyāṃ caviprāya canivedayet
tataḥ sahasraṃ viprāṇām athavā'ṣṭaśataṃ tathā
bhojanīyaṃ yathāśaktipaJcāśadvāthaviṃśatiḥ
evameṣapurāṇeṣu taṭākavidhirucyate
kūpavāpīṣusarvāsutathāpuṣkariṇīṣuca
eṣa evavidhirdṛṣṭaḥ pratiṣṭhāsutathaiva ca
mantratastuviśeṣaḥ syātprāsādodyānabhūmiṣu
ayaṃ tvaśaktāvardhenavidhirdṛṣṭaḥ svayaṃ bhuvā
svalpeṣvekāgnivatkāryovittaśāṭhyavivarjitaiḥ
prāvṛṭkālesthitanto yamagniṣṭomasamaṃ smṛtam
vājapeyātirātrābhyāṃ hemaṃ teśiśiresthitam
grīṣmepiyatsthitanto yaṃ rājasūyādviśiṣyate
etānmahārājaviśeṣadharmānkaroticorvyāmatiśuddhabuddhiḥ
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe prathame sṛṣṭikhaṇḍe taṭākapratiṣṭhāvidhirnāmasaptaviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
aṣṭāviṃśatitamo'dhyāyaḥ
bhīṣma uvāca
pādapānāṃ vidhiṃ brahmanyathāvadvistarād vada
vidhināyenakarttavyaṃ pādapāropaṇaṃ budhaiḥ
yecalokāḥ smṛtāyeṣāṃ tāni dānīṃ vadasvame
pādapānāṃ vidhiṃ vakṣyetathaivodyānabhūmiṣu
taṭākavidhivatsarvaṃ samāpyajagatīśvara
ṛtviṅmaṇḍapa sambhāramācāryaṃ cāpitadvidhaṃ
pūjayedbrāhmaṇāṃ stadvaddhemavastrānulepanaiḥ
sarvauṣadhyudakaiḥ siktāndadhyakṣatavibhūṣitān
vṛkṣānmālyair alaṅkṛtyavāsobhir abhiveṣṭayet
sūcyāsauvarṇayākāryaṃ sarveṣāṅkarṇavedhanaṃ
aṃ janaṃ cāpidātavyaṃ tadvaddhemaśalākayā
phalāni saptacāṣṭauvākāladhautāni kārayet
pratyekaṃ sarvavṛkṣāṇāṃ vedyāṃ tānyadhivāsayet
dhūpotragugguluḥ śreṣṭhastāmrapātreṣv adhiṣṭhitān
kuṃ bhānsarveṣu vṛkṣeṣu sthāpayitvāvanīśvara
pūjayitvādināṃ tecakṛtvābalinivedanam
yathāvallokapālānām indrādīnāṃ vidhānataḥ
tataḥ śuklāṃ baradharānsauvarṇakṛtamekhalān
sakāṃ syadohāṃ sauvarṇaśṛṅgābhyāmatiśālinīṃ
payasvinīṃ vṛkṣamadhyādutsṛjedgāmudaṅmukhīm
tatobhiṣekamantreṇavādyamaṅgalagītakaiḥ
ṛgyajuḥ sāmamantraiś ca vāruṇair abhitastadā
tair evakumbhaiḥ snapanaṅkuryurbrāhmaṇapuṅgavāḥ
snātaḥ śuklāṃ baradharoyajamānobhipūjayet
gobhir vibhavataḥ sarvānṛtvijaḥ sasamāhitān
hemasūtraiḥ sakaṭakair aṅgulīyaiḥ pavitrakaiḥ
vāsobhiḥ śayanīyaiś ca tathopaskarapādukaiḥ
kṣīrābhiṣecanaṅkuryādyāvaddinacatuṣṭayam
homaś ca sarpiṣākāryoyavaiḥ kṛṣṇatilair api
palāśasamidhaḥ śastāś ca turthe'hnitathotsavaḥ
dakṣiṇācapunastadvaddeyātatrāpiśaktitaḥ
ācāryedviguṇaṃ dattvāpraṇipatyakṣamāpayet
anenavidhināyastukuryādvṛkṣotsavaṃ budhaḥ
sarvānkāmānavāpnotipadaṃ cānantamaśnute
yaś caiva mapirājendravṛkṣaṃ saṃ sthāpayedbudhaḥ
bhūtānbhavyāṃ ś ca manujāṃ stārayedromasaṃ mitān
paramāṃ siddhimāpnotipunarāvṛttidurlabhām
yaidaṃ śṛṇuyānnityaṃ śrāvayedvāpimānavaḥ
tīrtheṣu piṇḍadānādīnropakāṇāṃ dadanti te
yatnenāpicarājendraaśvatthāropaṇaṅkuru
dhanīcāśvatthavṛkṣeṇaaśokaḥ śokanāśanaḥ
plakṣoyajṣapradaḥ proktaḥ kṣīrīcāyuḥ pradaḥ smṛtaḥ
jaṃ bukīkanyakādātrībhāryādādāḍimītathā
aśvatthoroganāśāyapalāśobrahmadastathā
aṅkolekulavṛddhistukhādireṇāpyarogitā
niṃ baprarohakāṇāṃ tunityaṃ tuṣyeddivākaraḥ
śrīvṛkṣeśaṅkarodevaḥ pāṭalāyāṃ tupārvatī
śiṃ śapāyāmapsarasaḥ kuṃ degandharvasattamāḥ
tiṃ tiḍīkedāsavargāvaṃ juledasyavastathā
puṇyapradaḥ śrīpradaś ca caṃ danaḥ panasastathā
saubhāgyadaś ca ṃ pakaś ca karīraḥ pāradārikaḥ
bahubhāryānārikelādrākṣāsarvāṅgasuṃ darī
ratipradātathākolīketakīśatrunāśinī
evamādinagāścānyeyenoktāstepidāyakāḥ
pratiṣṭhāṃ tegamiṣyanti yaistuvṛkṣāḥ praropitāḥ
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe prathame sṛṣṭikhaṇḍe vṛkṣāropaṇavidhirnāmaaṣṭāviṃśodhyāyaḥ
ekonatriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
saubhāgyaśayanaṃ nāmayatpurāṇavidoviduḥ
purādagdhaiṣulokeṣu bhūrbhuvaḥ svarmahādiṣu
vaikuṃ ṭhaṃsarvamāsādyaviṣṇorvakṣasthalesthitam
tataḥ kālenakiyatāpunaḥ sargavidhau nṛpaḥ
ahaṅkāravṛtelokepradhānapuruṣānvite
sparddhāyāṃ capravṛddhāyāṅkamalāsanakṛṣṇayoḥ
piṅgākārāsamudbhūtāvahnijvālātibhīṣaṇā
yadvakṣaḥ sthalamāśrityaviṣṇoḥ saubhāgyamāsthitam
utkṣiptamaṃ tarikṣāttubrahmaputreṇadhīmatā
dakṣeṇapītamātraṃ tadrūpalāvaṇyakārakam
balaṃ tejomahajjātaṃ dakṣasyaparameṣṭhinaḥ
śeṣaṃ yadapatadbhūmāvaṣṭadhātadvyajāyata
tatas tvoṣadhayojātāḥ saptasaubhāgyadāyikāḥ
ikṣavastarurājaś ca niṣpavāvaśśālidhānyakam
vikāravaccagokṣīraṅkusuṃ bhaṅkusumaṃ tathā
lavaṇaṃ cāṣṭamaṃ tadvatsaubhāgyāṣṭakamucyate
pītaṃ yadbrahmaputreṇayogajñānavidāpurā
duhitāsābhavattasmād yāsatītyabhidhīyate
tāmārādhyapumānbhaktyānārīvākiṃ naviṃ dati
bhīṣma uvāca
yadvidhānaṃ cajagataḥ śāṃ tayetadvadasvame
vasaṃ tamāsamāsādyatṛtīyāyāṃ janapriyaḥ
śuklapakṣasyapūrvāhṇetilaiḥ snānaṃ samācaret
tasminnahanisādevīkilaviśvātmanāsatī
pāṇigrahaṇikair mantrair udūḍhāvaravarṇinī
tayāsahaivaviśveśaṃ tṛtīyāyāmathārcayet
snāpayitvārcayedgaurīmiṃ duśekharasaṃ yutām
namostupāṭalāyaitupādaudevyāḥ śivasyaca
śirorudreśvarāyetivijayāyaicajānunī
īśāyetikaṭiṃ ratyaiśaṅkarāyetiśaṅkaram
kukṣidvayaṃ cakoṭavyaiśūlinaṃ śūlapāṇaye
śivaṃ vedātmanetadvadrudrāṇyaikaṃ ṭhamarcayet
trilocanāyetiharaṃ bāhūkālānalapriye
saubhāgyabhavanāyetibhūṣaṇāni sadārcayet
svāhāsvadhāyaicamukhamīśvarāyetiśūlinam
aśokavanavāsinyaipūjyāvoṣṭhaucabhūtidau
namordhanārīśaharamasitāṅgītināsikām
śarvāyapuraharttāraṃ vāsudevyaitathālakam
namaḥ śrīkaṃ ṭhanāthāyaśivakeśāṃ stathārcayet
bhīmograbhīmarūpiṇyaiśiraḥ sarvātmane namaḥ
sthāpayetsnigdhaniṣpāvānkusuṃ bhakṣīrajīrakam
tarurājekṣulavaṇaṅkustuṃ burumathāṣṭamam
dadyātsaubhāgyakṛdyasmāt saubhāgyāṣṭakamityuta
caitreśṛṅgāṭakānprāśyasvapedbhūmāvariṃ dama
punaḥ prabhātecatathākṛtasnānajapaḥ śuciḥ
sampūjya dvijadāmpatyaṃ mālyavastraṃ vibhūṣaṇaiḥ
saubhāgyāṣṭakasaṃ yuktasauvarṇaṃ pratimādvayam
prīyatāṃ metralalitābrāhmaṇāyanivedat
evaṃ saṃ vatsaraṃ yāvattṛtīyāyāṃ sadā nṛpa
prāśanedānamantrecaviśe ṣoyaṃ nibodhame
gośṛṅgāṃ bumadhauproktaṃ vaiśākhegomayaṃ punaḥ
jyeṣṭhemaṃ dārakusumaṃ bilvapatraṃ śucausmṛtam
śrāvaṇedadhi samprāśyaṃ nabhasyetukuśodakam
kṣīraṃ cāśvayujemāsikārttikepṛṣadājyakam
mārgaśīrṣetugomūtraṃ pauṣe samprāśayedghṛtam
māghekṛṣṇatilāṃ stadvatpaṣcagavyaṃ caphālgune
lalitāvijayābhadrābhavānīkumudāśivā
vāsudevītathāgaurīmaṅgalākamalāsatī
umācadānakāletuprīyatāmitikīrttayet
tasiṃ mastudvādaśemāsidvādaśyāṅkṛṣṇamarcayet
tathālakṣmīṃ ca tatra ivabhartrāsārdhamathārcayet
paurṇamāsyāmatastadvatsapatnīkaḥ pitāmahaḥ
upāsanīyoviduṣāparatrābhītimicchatā
saubhāgyāṣṭakaṃ tadvaccadātavyaṃ bhūtimicchatā
kubjakaṅkaravīraṃ cabāṇamamlānapaṅkajam
siṃ duvāraṃ casarveṣu māseṣu kusumaṃ smṛtam
japākusuṃ bhakusumaṃ mālatīśatapatrikā
yathālābhaṃ praśastāni karavīraṃ casarvadā
evaṃ saṃ vatsaraṃ yāvadupoṣyavidhivannaraḥ
umāmaheśvarauhaimauvṛṣabhaṃ cagavāsaha
sthāpayitvācaśayanaṃ brāhmaṇāyanivedayet
dvādaśyāṃ vatsaraṃ tvekaṃ mahālakṣmyācakeśavam
brahmāṇaṃ sahasāvitryāpūjayitvānarastviha
sarvānkāmānavāpnotimanasāsamabhīpsitān
anyānyapiyathāśaktimithunānyaṃ barādibhiḥ
dhānyālaṅkāragodānair anyaiś ca dhanasaṣcayaiḥ
vittaśāṭhayenarahitaḥ pūjayedgatavismayaḥ
sarvānkāmānavāpnotipadaṃ vāni tyamaśnute
yaśaḥ kīrtimavāpnotipratimāsaṃ narādhipa
saubhāgyārogyarūpaiś ca vastrālaṅkārabhūṣaṇaiḥ
yastudvādaśavarṣāṇisaubhāgyaśayanavratam
pūjyamānovasetsamyakyāvatkalpāyutaṃ naraḥ
viṣṇorlokamathāsādyaśivalokagatastathā
nārīvākuruteyātukumārīvānareśvara
śṛṇuyādapiyaś caiva pradadyādathavāmatim
idamihamadanenapūrvasṛṣṭaṃ śatadhanuṣācakṛtaṃ nareṇatadvat
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe prathame sṛṣṭikhaṇḍe vratādhyāyonāma ekonatriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
bhīṣma uvāca
yajṣapavartamāsādyaviṣṇunāprabhaviṣṇunā
kṛtvāvaipadavinyāsaṃ tanmeśaṃ samahāmune
sa kathaṃ mānuṣelokepadanyāsaṃ cakāraha
nṛsiṃ hasyatathāproktājanalokemahātmanaḥ
samyakpṛcchasibhostvaṃ yatsaṃ śṛṇutvaṃ samāhitaḥ
yathāpūrvaṃ padanyāsaḥ kṛtodevenaviṣṇunā
purākṛtayugebhīṣmadevakāryārthasiddhaye
viṣṇunācakṛtaṃ pūrvaṃ pṛthivyartheparaṃ tapa
trailokyaṃ vaśamānīyajitvādevānsavāsavān
dānavāyajṣabhoktārastatrāsanbalavattarāḥ
kṛtābāṣkalināsarvedānavenabalīyasā
paramārtiṃ yayauśakronirāśojīvitekṛtaḥ
brahmaṇovaradānenasarveṣāṃ tudivaukasām
vrajāmiśaraṇaṃ devaṅgatiranyānavidyate
jagāmatvaritobhīṣma yatra devaḥ pitāmahaḥ
brahmaṇaḥ sapadaṃ prāpyavṛtastaiś ca divaukasaiḥ
abravījjagataḥ kāryaṃ prāptāmāpadamuttamām
kathitaṃ vaimayāsarvaṃ bāṣkaleś ca durātmanaḥ
kriyatāṃ cāvilaṃ benapitātvaṃ naḥ pitāmahaḥ
tattvaṃ ciṃ tayadeveśaśāṃ tyarthaṃ jagatastviha
teṣāṃ capaśyatāṅkiṃ cicchrautasmārtādikāḥ kriyāḥ
yathāhiprākṛtaḥ kaścit svārthamuddiśyabhāṣate
vijṣāpyasetathāsmābhir nirastopakṛtaiḥ sadā
narakeṣv apisaṃ vāsastasyaduṣkṛtakāriṇaḥ
naitāvataivasādhutvaṅkṛteyātupratikriyā
śatadhāhṛdayaṃ dīrṇaṃ tannatṛptimupāgatam
yathākhyātaṃ mayādṛṣṭaṃ jagattatsthamavekṣyatām
niḥsvādhyāyavaṣaṭkāraṃ nivṛttotsavamaṅgalam
daṇḍanītyāparityaktaṃ śvāsamātrāvaśeṣitam
jagad ārtimapiprāptaṃ punaḥ kaṣṭatarāṃ daśāṃ
etāvatāhikālenavayaṅglāni mupāgatāḥ
jānām ibāṣkaliṃ taṃ tuvaradānāccagarvitam
ajeyaṃ bhavatāṃ manyeviṣṇusādhyobhaviṣyati
ājagāmamuhūrtenasarveṣām eva paśyatām
viṣṇur uvāca
yadarthamiṣyatedhyānaṃ sohaṃ tvāsamupāgataḥ
bhavatāpālanaṅkāryaṃ saṃ haredrudra evatu
hṛtaṃ rājyaṃ bāṣkalinātrailokyaṃ sacarācaram
bhṛtyasyakriyatāṃ sāhyaṃ mantradānenakeśava
vāsudeva uvāca
vāmanohaṃ bhaviṣyāmidānavānāṃ vināśakaḥ
prayacchasvamahābhāgayācṣaiṣātumayākṛtā
taṃ badhvācatatoyatnātkṛtvāpātālavāsinam
saukaraṃ rūpamāsthāyavadhārthaṃ cadurātmanaḥ
bhaviṣyāminasaṃ dehovrajaśakratvarānvitaḥ
athakālāṃ tareviṣṇāvaditergarbhatāṅgate
nimittāny atighorāṇi prādurbhūtāny anekaśaḥ
śobhanaṃ hi tadā jātaṃ nimittaṃ caiva mūrjitam
mālatīkusumānāṃ tu sugandhaḥ surabhir vavau
tridaśagaṇahitārthaṃsarvabhūtānukampī
vimalaviralakeśaś candraśaṅkhodayaśrīr
avataraticaviṣṇausiddhadevāsurāṇām animiṣanayanānāṃ viprasedurmukhāni
aditirajanagarbhāsāpidevīprayāṃ tīnatajaghanabharārttāmaṃ dasaṃ cāraramyā
alasavadanakhedaṃ pāṇḍubhāvaṃ vahaṃ tīgurutaramavagāḍhaṅgarbhamevodvahaṃ tī
tataḥ praviṣṭekhalugarbhavāsaṃ nārāyaṇebhūtabhaviṣyayogāt
vināpadaṃ prāptamanorathāni bhūtāni sarvāṇitadābabhūvuḥ
samīraṇovāticamaṃ damaṃ daṃ patatsubarṣeṣu nagodbhaveṣu
vimucyamānegaganerajobhiḥ śanaiśśanair naśyaticāṃ dhakāre
tāṃ niśāmayarājendradevamāturyathākramam
bāṣkaliṃ dānavendraṃ taṅkuryāṃ pātālavāsinam
śakrasyatumayādattaṃ dhanaṃ lāvaṇyameva ca
dānavānāṃ vināśāya ekaivaprabhavāmy aham
kṣipāmiśarajālāni cakrayānānyanekaśaḥ
gadāvrātāṃ ś ca vividhāndānavānāṃ vināśane
niḥsṛtāsahasāvāṇīvaktramevābhisaṃ sthitā
yenedaṃ cintyatepūrvaṃ yannadṛṣṭhaṃ nacaśrutam
kaśyapāyapurādattaṃ dhanaṃ lāvaṇyameva ca
kimayaṃ vigatotsāhovāyavothasamākulāḥ
bhramatīvahimedṛṣṭirmaitadrūpaṃ praciṃ titam
āviṣṭākimahaṃ vacmikenāpyasadṛśaṃ vacaḥ
vikalpavaśamāpannābhīkṣṇaṃ hṛdimamarśasā
dadhāradivyaṃ varṣāṇāṃ sahasraṃ divyamīśvaram
tataḥ samabhavattasyāṃ vāmanobhūtavāmanaḥ
jātenayenacakṣūṃ ṣidānavānāṃ hṛtāni vai
sarveṣāṃ mānasotsāhas trailokyāntaravāsinām
atipraharṣāt tu jagattrayasya mohaś ca duḥkhāni ca nāśamīyuḥ
surāṅganāścāpicabhāvayuktānṛtyanti tatrāpsarasāṃ samūhāḥ
vadanti satyānṛtakāryanirṇayaṃ tathābhir aṅgaṃ pratidarśayanti
gāyanti geyaṃ vinivṛttarāgāmuhurmuhurduḥkhasukhaprabhūtāḥ
itivigataviṣādenirmalejīvaloketimiranikaramuktāni rvṛtiṃ prāptukāmāḥ
rityevaṅkṛtsnamāsīj jagad idamakhilaṃ sarvataḥ sampṛhṛṣṭam
paramāsādyayaṃ viṣṇuṃ brahmāhajagataḥ kṛte
jātoyaṃ bhavatāmarthevāmanoyadapīśvaraḥ
eṣabrahmācaviṣṇuś ca eṣa evamaheśvaraḥ
eṣavedāś ca yajṣāś ca svargaś ca iṣana saṃśayaḥ
viṣṇuvyāptam idaṃ sarvaṃ jagatsthāvarajaṅgamam
ekaḥ satupṛthktvenasvayaṃ bhūritiviśrutaḥ
yathārthavarṇakesthānevicitraḥ sphāṭikomaṇiḥ
labhetasaṃ jṣāṃ bhagavānbrāhmādiṣutathāhyasau
evaṃ ciṃ tayatāṃ teṣāṃ bhāvitānāṃ divokasām
jagāmaśakrasahitobāṣkaleś ca niveśanam
dūrādeva catāṃ dṛṣṭvā purīṃ tasyasamāvṛtām
pāṇḍuraiḥ khagamāgamyaiḥ sarvaratnopaśobhitaiḥ
dīrghagrīvākṣikūṭaiś ca manojṣair upaśobhitām
padmagarbhasuvarṇābhāḥ pūrṇacandranibhānanāḥ
saṃ llāpollāpakuśalās tatra veśyāḥ sahasraśaḥ
natatpuṇyaṃ nasāvidyānatacchilpaṃ nasākalā
udyānaśata sambādhaṃsamājotsavamālini
vīṇāveṇumṛdaṅgānāṃ śabdaiḥ sarvatranādite
sadāprahṛṣṭādanujābahuratnopaśobhitāḥ
krīḍamānāḥ pradṛśyaṃ temerāvivayathāmarāḥ
sājyadhūmenacāgnīnāṃ vāyunānaṣṭakilbiṣe
sugandhidanujākīrṇepuretasiṃ mastubāṣkaliḥ
trailokyaṃ tuvaśekṛtvāsukhenāstesadānavaḥ
dharmajṣaḥ ś ca kṛtajṣaś ca satyavādījitendriyaḥ
sudarśaḥ pūrvadevānāṃ nayānayavicakṣaṇaḥ
brahmaṇyaś ca śaraṇyaś ca dīnānām anukaṃ pakaḥ
ṣāḍguṇyaviṣayotsāhaḥ smitapūrvābhibhāṣitaḥ
vedavedāṅgatatvajṣoyajṣayājītaporataḥ
nacaduḥśīlanirataḥ sasarvatrāvihiṃ sakaḥ
mānyamānayitāśuddhaḥ sumukhaḥ pūjyapūjakaḥ
sarvārthavidanādhṛṣyaḥ subhagaḥ priyadarśanaḥ
sa caiva ṃ pālayāmāsatrailokyesakalāḥ prajāḥ
nādhamaḥ kaścid apyāstetasminrājanidānave
dīnovāvyadhitovāpialpāyurvāthaduḥkhitaḥ
mūrkhovāmaṃ darūpovādurbhagovāni rākṛtaḥ
evaṃ yutaṃ taṃ vimalair guṇaughair dṛṣṭvā camatvācaniviṣṭabuddhiṃ
tejoyuktaṃ dānavaṃ taṃ tapaṃ tamivabhāskaraṃ
indraṃ purāgataṃ dṛṣṭvā dānavendrāyapārthiva
idamūcustadā gatvā dānavāyuddhadurmadāḥ
āś ca ryamitivaikṛtvā indrobhyetipurīṃ tava
asmābhir yadanuṣṭheyaṃ sāmprataṃ novadasvarāṭ
dānavānabravītsarvānpuretiṣṭhatasaṃ kulaṃ
praveśyatāṃ devarājaḥ pūjyaḥ satumamādyavai
kṛtārthaṃ manyatātmānaṃ praṇipātapuraḥ saram
uvācavacanaṃ rājādānavānāṃ dhuraṃ dharaḥ
yohaṃ śriyāvṛtaḥ śakraṃ paśyāmigṛhamāgatam
arthitvakāmyayāyastumāmayaṃ yācayiṣyati
gṛhāgatasyatasyāhaṃ dāsyeprāṇānapidhruvam
dārānputrāṃ stathāgāraṃ trailokyekākathāmama
āgatyasaṃ mukhaṃ tasyaaṃ kamānīyasādaram
pariṣvajyābhinandyainaṅgṛhaṃ prāveśayatsvakam
tasyasvāgatamarghyādyaiḥ kṛtvāpūjāṃ prayatnataḥ
adyamesaphalaṃ janmapūrṇāḥ sarvemanorathāḥ
yastvāṃ paśyāmiśakrādyasvayamevagṛhāgatam
khyāpyohaṃ danumukhyānāṃ devarājatvayākṛtaḥ
āgacchatāmamagṛhaṃ puṇyatātuparāhime
agniṣṭomādibhir yajṣaiḥ samyagiṣṭaistuyatphalam
tatphalaṃ samavāpyetatvayidṛṣṭepuraṃ dara
yatphalaṃ bhūmidānenagavāṃ dānenaṛtvije
mamādyatatphalaṃ bhūtamathavārājasūyakam
evaṅgehemayāyattepriyaṃ kāryaṃ taducyatām
kṛtaṃ catadvijānīyāyadyadisyātsuduṣkaraṃ
puṇyohaṃ puṇyatāṃ prāptodarśanāttavaśatruhan
atyāś ca ryam idaṃ manyetavāgamanakāraṇaṃ
jānehaṃ danumukhyānāṃ pradhānaṃ tvāṃ tubāṣkale
nātyāś ca ryam idaṃ bhātitvayidṛṣṭe'surottama
vimukhānārthinoyānti bhavatogṛhamāgatāḥ
arthināṃ kalpavṛkṣosidātācānyonavidyate
prabhāyāṃ sūryatulyosigāṃ bhīryesāgaropamaḥ
sahiṣṇutvedharā caiva śriyānārāyaṇopamaḥ
brāhmaṇaḥ kaśyapakulejātoyaṃ vāmanaḥ śubhe
mamāgniśaraṇārthāya yatra kuryāṃ makhaṃ tvahaṃ
tadasyakāraṇaṃ kṛtvā arthitaiṣāmama prabho
lokatrayaṃ mepahṛtaṃ tvayāvikramyabāṣkale
bhavaṃ taṃ yācayiṣyāmiparārthenāpicātmanā
jātosikāśyapecatvaṃ vaṃ śevaṃśavivarddhanaḥ
dityāsatavaṅgarbha sambhūtaḥ pitātrailokapūjitaḥ
evaṃ bhūtamahaṃ jṣātvātenatvāṃ yācayāmy aham
asyāgniśaraṇārthāyadīyatāṃ bhūpadatrayam
gṛhāyātemayitathāyadyogyaṃ tatsamācara
tadasmaidīyatāṃ śīghraṃ vāmanāyamahātmane
bāṣkalir uvāca
tvaṃ samīkṣasvadhātmānaṃ sarveṣāṃ caparāyaṇam
tvayibhāraṃ samāveśyasukhamāstepitāmahaḥ
dhyānadhāraṇayāyuktaściṃ tayānaḥ paraṃ padam
kṣīrābdhidvīpamāśrityasukhaṃsvapitikeśavaḥ
anyecadānavāḥ sarvebalinaḥ sāyudhāstvayā
ādityādvādaśaiveharudrāstvekādaśāpivā
tvayākratuśatair iṣṭaṃ samāptavaradakṣiṇaiḥ
tvayācaghātitovṛtronamuciḥ pākaśāsana
tvadājṣākāriṇāpūrvaṃ viṣṇunāprabhaviṣṇunā
hiraṇyakaśiporbhrātāhiraṇyākṣopighātitaḥ
hiraṇyakaśipuryotrajaṅghecāropyaghātitaḥ
vajrapāṇinamāyāṃ tamair āvaṇaśirogatam
saṅgrāmabhūmaudṛṣṭvā tvāṃ sarvenaśyanti dānavāḥ
yetvayāvijitāḥ pūrvaṃ dānavābalavattarāḥ
māṃ samuddhartukāmenatvayaivāgamanaṃ kṛtam
kariṣyāminasaṃ dehodāsyeprāṇānapidhruvam
kim arthaṃ devarājoktābhūmireṣātvayāhime
imedārāḥ sutāgāvoyaccānyadvidyatevasu
apakīrtirbhavenmahyaṃ pūrveṣāṃ cana saṃśayaḥ
gṛhāyātasyaśakrasyadattaṃ bāṣkalinānatu
bhavānatraviśeṣeṇavicāraṃ mākṛthāḥ kvacit
brāhmaṇasyaviśeṣeṇaprārthitaṃ tutvayā vibho
aśvāngajānbhūmidhanaṃ striyaścodbhinnacūcukāḥ
yāsāṃ darśanamātreṇavṛddhopitaruṇāyate
tāḥ striyovasudhāṃ caitāṃ vāmanasyapratigraham
pratidāsyāmidevendraprasādaḥ kriyatāṃ hime
etāvadukteva canetadābāṣkalinā nṛpa
purodhāstūśanāprāhadānavedraṃ tadāvacaḥ
bhavānrājādānavendraaiśvaryeṣṭavidhesthitaḥ
yuktāyuktaṃ najānāsideyaṃ kasyamayākvacit
prāptaṃ trailokyarājyatvaṃ jitvādevānsavāsavān
vākyasyāsyāvasānevabhavānprāpsyatibandhanaṃ
ya eṣavāmanorājanviṣṇurevasanātanaḥ
nāsyavaibhavatādeyaṃ pitāteghātitaḥ svayaṃ
ayaṃ tepitṛhāprāptomātṛhābandhughātakaḥ
nacaiṣadharmaṃ jānātiśakrādīnāṃ hiterataḥ
māyāvinādānavāyemāyayāyenanirjitāḥ
māyayābrāhmaṇaṃ rūpaṃ vāmanaṃ capradarśitam

etāstvāṃ bhakṣayiṣyantibhakṣyamīpsitamādarāt

anyathāmāmapibalādbhakṣayeyurbubhukṣitāḥ

sabhāgostuvarārohekāsāṃ citpṛthivītale

anyāḥ sūtigṛhecchidraṅgṛhṇīyustuhyapūjitāḥ

śivadūtya uvāca
kutsitaṃ bhavatādattaṃ prajānāṃ paripīḍanam
nacatvaṃ budhyasedātuṃ śaṅkararasyaviśeṣataḥ
trapākaraṃ yadbhavatiprajānāṃ paripīḍakam
natutadyujyatedātuṃ tāsāṃ bhakṣyaṃ tuśaṅkara

cūḍākarmaṇivṛttetukumārasyatadāśubhe
devalokāddevagaṇāmātṝṇāṃ bhoktumāgatāḥ

gandharvāpsarasaś caiva yakṣāḥ sarvecaguhyakāḥ

śivadūty uvāca
āsāṅkṛtaṃ dehibhojyaṃ durlabhaṃ yattriviṣṭape
snehāktaṃ saguḍaṃ hṛdyaṃ supakvaṃ parikalpitam
bhakṣyārthaṃ tāstadāprāhapārvatyāś caiva sannidhau
mayāvaisādhitaṃ cānnaṃ prakārair bahubhiḥ kṛtaṃ
tatsarvaṃ cavyayaṃ yātaṃ nacānyadihadṛśyate
bhavatīṣvāgatāsvadyakiṃ mayādeyamucyatām
apūrvaṃ bhavatīnāṃ yanmayādeyaṃ viśeṣataḥ
bhakṣayadhvaṃ hisahitālaṃ baumevṛṣaṇāvimau
mahāprasādaṃ tālabdhvādevyaḥ sarvāstadāśivam
praṇipatyasthitāśśarvaidaṃ vacanamabravīt
kariṣyanti śubhācārānvināhāsyenayenarāḥ
teṣāṃ dhanaṃ paśuḥ putrādārāś caiva gṛhādikam
hāsyenadīrghadaśanādaridrāś ca bhavanti te
tasmānnaniṃ dāhāsyaṃ cakartavyaṃ hivijānatā
caṇakānpūrikāś caiva vṛṣaṇaiḥ sahapūpakān
bandhubhiḥ svajanaiś caiva teṣāṃ vaṃ śonachidyate
rūpavānsubhagobhogīsarvaśāstraviśāradaḥ
śivadūtimayāpyevaṃ tāsāṃ dattaṃ cabhakṣaṇam
trapākaraṅkiṃ bhavatyā uktohaṃ tanniśāmaya
jayasvadevicāmuṇḍejayabhūtāpahāriṇi
viśvamūrtiyuteśuddhevirūpākṣitrilocane
mahāmārivicitrāṅgigītanṛtyapriyeśubhe
vikarālimahākālikālikepāpahāriṇi
pāśahastedaṇḍahastebhīmahastebhayānake
cāmuṇḍejvalamānāsyetīkṣṇadaṃ ṣṭremahābale
bhīmākṣibhīṣaṇedevisarvabhūtabhayaṅkari
karālivikarālecamahākālikarālini
kālikarālavikrāṃ tekālarātrinamostute
evaṃ stutāśivadūtīrudreṇaparameṣṭhinā
tutoṣaparamādevīvākyaṃ caiva uvāca ha
varaṃ vṛṇīṣvadeveśayattemanasivartate
stotreṇānenayedevistoṣyanti ttvāṃ varānane
teṣāṃ tvaṃ varadādevibhavasarvagatāsatī
yaś caiva ṃ śṛṇuyādbhaktyāstavaṃ devisamudbhavaṃ
sarvapāpavinirmuktaḥ paraṃ nirvāṇamṛcchatu
bhraṣṭarājyoyadārājānavamyāṃ niyataḥ śuciḥ
aṣṭamyāṃ cacaturdaśyāṃ sopavāsonarottama
saṃ vatsareṇalabhatāṃ rājyaṃ niṣkaṃ ṭakaṃ punaḥ
eṣājṣānānvitāśaktiḥ śivadūtīticocyate
ya evaṃ śṛṇuyānnityaṃ bhaktyāparamayā nṛpa
sarvapāpavinirmuktaḥ paraṃ nirvāṇamāpnuyāt
yaś ca inaṃ paṭhatebhaktyāsnātvāvaipuṣkarejale
yaś cedaṃ pūjayedbhaktyāpustakepisthitaṃ budhāḥ
tenaceṣṭaṃ bhavetsarvaṃ trailokyaṃ sacarācaraṃ
jāyaṃ tebahavaḥ putrādhanaṃ dhānyaṃ varastriyaḥ
ratnānyaśvāgajābhṛtyāsteṣāmāśubhavanti ca
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe prathame sṛṣṭikhaṇḍe śivadūtīcaritaṃ nāma ekatriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
dvātriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
bhīṣma uvāca
ahaṃ te kathayiṣyāmisarvametadaśeṣataḥ
satāṃ sambhāṣaṇe caiva puṇyatīrthānukīrttane
mānavāstupramucyaṃ ta āpannāḥ pretayoniṣu
śrūyatehipurābhīṣmabrāhmaṇaḥ saṃ śitavrataḥ
pṛthuḥ sarvatravikhyātaḥ santo ṣecasadāsthitaḥ
japayajṣavidhānenayuktaṅkālaṅkṣipeccasaḥ
yuktaḥ kṣamādayābhyāṃ cakṣāṃ tyāyuktaś ca tattvavit
ahiṃ sāhitacittaś ca mārddavecatathāsthitaḥ
iṣṭāpūrtasamāyuktoyuktodvaṃ dvavivarjane
evaṅkarmāṇikurvataḥ saṃsāravijigīṣayā
bahūnyabdānyatītāni brāhmaṇasyagṛhesataḥ
agrataḥ paṣcapuruṣānapaśyatsotibhīṣaṇān
vanekaṃ ṭakavṛkṣāḍhyenirjanepakṣivarjite
tāndṛṣṭvā vikṛtākārānsughorānpāpadarśanān
īṣatsaṃ trastahṛdayovyatiṣṭhanniś ca lākṛtiḥ
papracchamadhurābhāṣīkeyūyaṃ vikṛtāḥ kutaḥ
kiṃ vā caiva kṛtaṅkarmayenaprāptāś ca vaikṛtam
pretāūcuḥ
kṣutpipāsānvitā nityaṃ mahāduḥkhasamāvṛtāḥ
hṛtaprajṣāvayaṃ sarvenaṣṭasaṣjṣāvicetasaḥ
najānīmodiśaṃ cāpipradiśaṃ cāpikāṣcana
nāṃ tarikṣaṃ mahīṃ cāpinajānīmodivaṃ tathā
prabhātamidamābhātibhāskarodayadarśanāt
ahaṃ paryuṣitonāmasūcīmukhastathāparaḥ
brāhmaṇa uvāca
pretānāṅkarmajātānāṃ nāmnāvai sambhavaḥ kutaḥ
kiṃ tatkāraṇamuddiśyayatoyūyaṃ sanāmakāḥ
pretāūcuḥ
ahaṃsvādusadābhuṃ jedadyāṃ paryuṣitaṃ dvije
etatkāraṇamāsādyanāmaparyuṣitomama
sūcitābahavonenaviprāścānnādyakāṅkṣiṇaḥ
etatkāraṇamuddiśyasūcīmukhābhidhomataḥ
śīghraṅgato’smi vipreṇayācitaḥ kṣudhitenaca
asmākamapipāpiṣṭholekhakonāmanāmataḥ
kṛcchreṇalekhakoyātirohakastuavākśirāḥ
śīghragaḥ paṅgutāṃ prāptaḥ sūcīsūcīmukhobhavat
yaryuṣitolambagrībolaṃ bodaraudāhṛtaḥ
bṛhadvṛṣaṇalaṃ boṣṭhaḥ pāpādasmādajāyata
pṛcchasvayaditeśraddhāpṛṣṭāś ca kathayāmahe
brāhmaṇa uvāca
yejīvābhuvitiṣṭhanti sarvepyāhāramūlakāḥ
yuṣmākamapicāhāraṃ śrotumicchāmitattvataḥ
pretāūcuḥ
śṛṇuṣvāhāramasmākaṃ sarvasatvavigarhitam
yacchrutvāniṃ daseviprabhūyobhūyaś ca nityaśaḥ
śleṣmamūtrapurīṣeṇayoṣidaṅgamalenaca
gṛhāṇityaktaśaucāni pretābhuṃ janti tatra vai
strībhir dagdhāni kīrṇāni prakīrṇocchiṣṭakāni ca
cittalajjāvihīnāni homahīnāni yāni ca
guravonaivapūjyaṃ testrījitāni gṛhāṇica
nivṛttiṃ pretabhāvasyapṛcchāmastvāṃ dṛḍhavrata
brāhmaṇa uvāca
ekarātradvirātrādikṛcchracāṃ drāyaṇadibhiḥ
tulyomāne'pamānecatulyaḥ kāṣcanaloṣṭayoḥ
devatātithipūjāsugurupūjāsunityaśaḥ
śuklāṅgārakasaṃ yuktācaturthījāyateyadā
śraddhayāśrāddhakṛttasyāṃ napretojāyatenaraḥ
jitakrodhavimarśoyastṛṣṇāsaṅgavivarjitaḥ
kṣamāvāndānaśīlaś ca napretojāyatenaraḥ
gobrāhmaṇāṃ ś ca tīrthāni parvatāṃ ś ca nadīstathā
devāṃ ś caiva tuyovandyānnapretojāyatenaraḥ
pretāūcuḥ
śrutāś ca vividhādharmāḥ pṛcchāmoduḥkhitāmune
brāhmaṇa uvāca
śūdrānnenatubhuktenabrāhmaṇenaviśeṣataḥ
mātaraṃ pitaraṃ bhrātṝnbhaginīṃ sutameva ca
adṛṣṭadoṣāṃ styajatisapretojāyatenaraḥ
nyāsāpahartāmitradhrukśūdrapākarataḥ sadā
visraṃ bhaghātīkūṭasthaḥ sapretojāyatenaraḥ
sāmānyāṃ dakṣiṇāṃ labdhvā eka evanigūhati
evaṃ bruvāṇeviprendra ākāśeduṃ dubhisvanaḥ
puṣpavṛṣṭiḥ papātorvyāṃ devair muktāsahasraśaḥ
pretānāṃ tuvimānāni āgatāni samaṃ tataḥ
asyaviprasya sambhāṣātpuṇyasaṅkīrtanenaca
tasmāt sarvaprayatnenasatāṃ sambhāṣaṇaṅkuru
yaditeśreyasākāryaṅgaṅgāsutaatandritaḥ
śṛṇotivāpyabhīkṣṇaṃ vāśraddhayāparayānvitaḥ
bhīṣma uvāca
aṃ tarikṣekim arthaṃ tupuṣkaraṃ parikīrtyate
ṛṣikoṭiḥ samāyātādakṣiṇāpathavāsinī
snānārthaṃ puṣkarerājanpuṣkaraṃ caviyadgatam
matvā te munayaḥ sarve prāṇāyāmaparāyaṇāḥ
dhyāyamānāḥ paraṃ brahmasthitādvādaśavatsarān
brahmāmaharṣayas tatra devāḥ sendrāḥ samāgatāḥ
ṛṣayoṃ tarhitāḥ procurniyamāṃ stesuduṣkarān
ākāraṇaṃ puṣkarasyamantreṇakriyatāṃ dvijāḥ
āpohiṣṭhetitisṛbhir ṛgbhiḥ sāṃ nidhyameṣyati
kṛtenapuṇyatāṃ prāptāyenideśāccatedvijāḥ
garhitādharmaśāstreṣu teviprādakṣiṇottarāḥ
yecānyepārvatīyāś ca śrāddhenārhanti ketanam
etasmāt kāraṇādrājanviyatyevaṃ samāsthitam
kārtikyāṃ puṣkaraṃ snānātpūtatāmabhiyacchati
brahmaṇāsahitaṃ rājansarveṣāṃ puṇyadāyakam
tatrāgatāstuyevarṇāḥ sarvetepuṇyabhājanāḥ
āgneyaṃ tuyadāṛkṣaṅkārtikyāṃ bhavatikvacit
mahatīsātithirjṣeyāsnānedānetathottamā
yadā yāmyaṃ tu bhavati ṛkṣaṃ tasyānti thau kvacit
tithiḥ sāpimahāpuṇyāyatibhiḥ parikīrtitā
prājāpatyaṃ yadāṛkṣanti thautasyāṃ narādhipa
sāmahākārtikīproktādevānām apidurlabhā
yadācārkegurausomevāreṣveteṣu vaitriṣu
trīṇyetāni caṛkṣāṇisvayaṃ proktāni brahmaṇā
dānamakṣayatāṃ yātipitṝṇāṃ tarpaṇaṃ tathā
viśākhāsuyadābhānuḥ kṛttikāsucacandramāḥ
sayogaḥ puṣkaronāmapuṣkareṣv atidurlabhaḥ
aṃ tarikṣāvatīrṇetutīrthepaitāmaheśubhe
snānaṃ yetrakariṣyanti teṣāṃ lokāmahodayāḥ
naspṛhāṃ tenyapuṇyasyakṛtasyāpyakṛtasyaca
tīrthānāṃ pravaraṃ tīrthaṃ pṛthivyāmihapaṭhyate
nāsmātparaṃ puṇyatīrthaṃ lokeṣu nṛpapaṭhyate
kārtikyāṃ tuviśeṣeṇapuṇyāpāpaharāśubhā
uduṃ baravanāttasmād āgātācasarasvatī
tayātatpūritaṃ tīrthaṃ puṣkaraṃ munisevitam
dakṣiṇeśikharaṃ bhātiparvatasyāvidūrataḥ
nīlāṃ janacayaprakhyaṃ varṇatonīlaśādvalam
prāvṛṭkāleviyatpūrṇaṅghanavṛndamivocchritam
kadaṃ bapuṣpagandhāḍhyaṅkuṭajārjunabhūṣitam
śrīphalaiḥ śikharaṃ bhātisamantātsumanoharaiḥ
guṃ jadbhiḥ ṣaṭpadakulaiḥ samaṃ tādupaśobhitam
kokilārāvaruciraṃ śikhikekāravākulam
puṇyāpuṇyajalopetānadīyaṃ brahmaṇaḥ sutā
vaṃśastaṃ bātsuvipulāpravṛttācottarāmukhī
gatvā tatonātidūrātpunaryātiparāṅmukhī
tataḥ prabhṛtisādevīprasannāprakaṭāsthitā
antardhānaṃ parityajyaprāṇināmanukampayā
kanakāsuprabhā caiva nandāprācīsarasvatī
paṣcasrotāḥ puṣkareṣu brahmaṇāparibhāṣitā
tasyāstīresuramyāṇitīrthānyāyatanāni ca
saṃ sevitāni munibhiḥ siddhaiścāpisamaṃ tataḥ
hāṭakakṣitigaurīṇāṃ tattīrtheṣu mahodayam
dānaṃ dattaṃ naraiḥ snātair janayatyakṣayaṃ phalam
dhānyapradānaṃ pravaraṃ vadanti tilapradānaṃ catathāmunīṃ drāḥ
prāyopaveśaṃ prayataḥ prayatnād
yas teṣu kuryāt pramadā pumān vā
bhuṅkte phalaṃ brahmagṛhe yatheṣṭam
tatas tusādharmaphalāraṇīcajanmādiduḥkhārditacetasāṃ tu
sarvātmanācāruphalāsarasvatīsevyāprayatnātpuruṣair mahānadī
tatra yesalilaṃ pūtaṃ pibanti satataṃ narāḥ
natemanuṣyādevāstejagatyāmihasaṃ sthitāḥ
tad atra snānamātreṇa śūdrair api svabhāvajaiḥ
darśanātpuṣkarasyāpimahāpātakinopiye
tatropavāsīyajṣasyapuṇḍarīkasyayatphalam
tatprāpnotinaraḥ kṣipramalpāyāsenapuṣkare
tatropavāsaṃ snānaṃ capaṣcagavyāśanantathā
yaḥ karotinaraḥ sopidehāṃ tesvargamāpnuyāt
tepitasyānubhāvenasvaryānti cana saṃśayaḥ
yepunaḥ śūdravṛttisthāstrirātropoṣitānarāḥ
temṛtāyānamārūḍhāḥ padmāsanacaturbhujāḥ
gaṅgodbhedaṃ yatra gaṅgā samprāptāsaritāṃ varām
sarasvatīṃ draṣṭukāmāsāṃ tvārtheprodgatāṃ 'barāt
sārasvataṃ ca vimalaṃ vidyādharagaṇārcitam
pītam ekāṃ jalimitaṃ yenāptaṃ tenatatparaṃ
avalokyadiśaṃ pūrvāmāhagaṅgesakhitvayā
ekākinīviyuktāsmikvayāsyehamabāndhavā
tāṃ vijṣāyatatogaṅgārudaṃ tīṃ śokakarśitām
pūrvadeśātsamāyātādraṣṭuṃ tāṃ dīnamānasām
dṛṣṭvā catāṃ mahābhāgāṃ pariṣvajyatupīḍitām
netrepramṛjyacaitasyāḥ prāhagaṅgāvacastadā
mārodīstvaṃ mahābhāgeduḥṣkaraṃ tekṛtaṃ sakhi
etasmāt temahābhāgedraṣṭuṃ devāḥ samāgatāḥ
eṣāṃ cakriyatāṃ pūjāvāṅmanaḥ kāyakarmaṇā
sarasvatīsurendrāṇāṅkṛttvāpūjāvidhikramam
krameṇabrahmajāpaścātsaṅgatātusakhījanam
paścānmukhībrahmasutājāhnavītuudaṅmukhī
tatas tevibudhāḥ sarvepuṣkaraṃ yesamāgatāḥ
tvaṃ buddhistvaṃ matirlakṣmīstvaṃ vidyātvaṅgatiḥ parā
tvaṃ śraddhāttvaṃ parāni ṣṭhābuddhirmedhāratiḥ kṣamā
tvaṃ siddhistvaṃ svadhāsvāhātvaṃ pavitraṃ mataṃ mahat
saṃ dhyārātriḥ prabhābhūtirmedhāśraddhāsarasvatī
yajṣavidyāmahāvidyāguhyavidyācaśobhanā
ānvīkṣikītuyāvārtādaṇḍanītiś ca kathyate
evaṃ stutāhisādevīdivyāsvārthaparāyaṇaiḥ
evaṃ sāprāṅmukhī tatra sthitādevīsarasvatī
tatra śuddhāvaṭaṃ nāmatīrthaṃ paitāmahaṃsmṛtam
temṛtābrahmayānenadivaṃ yāṃ tyakutobhayāḥ
janmāṃ taraśataṃ teṣāṃ tair dattaṃ bhāvitātmanām
khaṇḍasphuṭitasaṃ skāraṃ tatra kurvantiyenarāḥ
tatra dīpapradānenajñānacakṣuratīṃ driyaḥ
snānājjapāttathāhomādanantaphalasādhakam
rāmeṇāgatyavai tatra piṇḍaṃ daśarathasyaca
dattaṃ śrāddhaṃ tatra tenamāṃ rkaṇḍeyenadarśite
tatra vāpīcatuḥ koṇā tatra piṇḍapradānarāḥ
tasyāṃ vāpyāṃ tuvaibrahmāpitṛmedhaṃ cakāraha
yajṣaṃ yajṣavidāṃ śreṣṭhaḥ samāptavaradakṣiṇam
vasavaḥ pitarojṣeyārudrāś caiva pitāmahāḥ
ādityāś ca tatas teṣāṃ vihitāḥ prapitāmahāḥ
trividhā apiāhūyapunaruktāviriṃ cinā
bhavadbhiḥ piṇḍadānādyaṅgrāhyamatrasthitaiḥ sadā
vṛtyarthaṃ pitarasteṣāṃ tuṣṭāś caiva pitāmahāḥ
labhaṃ tetarpaṇāttṛptiṃ piṇḍadānāttriviṣṭapam
prācīneśvaradevasyapurobhūtaṃ pratiṣṭhitam
āditīrthaṃ tadityuktaṃ darśanādapimuktidam
āditīrthenaraḥ snātvāyaḥ pradadyātsamādhinā
annamalpamapiprāyaḥ prāyaśaḥ svargamāpnuyāt
prācīsarasvatī tatra naraiḥ kiṃ mṛgyateparam
tasyāṃ snānātphalaṃ tṛptyaitapoyajṣādilakṣaṇam
yepibanti narāḥ puṇyāṃ prācīṃ devīṃ sarasvatīm
natenarāḥ surājṣeyāmārkaṇḍeyarṣirabravīt
sarasvatīnadīṃ prāpyanasnāneniyamaḥ kvacit
bhuktevānacavābhuktedivāvāyadivāni śi
tattīrthaṃsarvattīrthānāṃ prācīnaṃ pravaraṃ smṛtat
pāpaghnaṃ puṇyajananaṃ prāṇināṃ parikīrtitam
pūjayantiyathāśaktiteprayānti triviṣṭapam
devānāṃ pravaroviṣṇustena yatra sarasvatī
tatas tasmānmahātīrthaṃ manyamānām ahodayam
maṃ dākinīmudīkṣaṃ tīsthitā tatra sarasvatī
tattīrthaṃsarvatīrthānāṃ paraṃ svāyaṃ bhuvobravīt
maṃ dākinyāsamaṃ yatra prāpyapuṇyasamāgamam
matvācaikākinīṃ tāṃ tudīnāsyāṃ dīnamānasāṃ
sakhīṃ tadāsṛjadbrahmārūpiṇīṃ vimalekṣaṇām
hariṇīṃ harirapyāśujajṣekamalalocanām
vajriṇīmapideveśovajrapāṇirvisṛṣṭavān
sukuraṅgaruciṃ devonīlakaṃ ṭhovṛṣadhvajaḥ
sakhīṃ saṃ janayāmāsasarasvatyāstrilocanaḥ
vilokyamānāsārājansakhībhiḥ surasuṃ darī
prahṛṣṭāyātumārabdhādevādeśānmahānadī
tataḥ sakhībhiḥ sārddhaṃsāprācīnāgaṃ tumudyatā
sarasvatīsamastānāṃ tāsāṃ śreṣṭhatamāsmṛtā
prācīsarasvatītoyaṃ yepibanti mṛgābhuvi
ciṃ tāmaṇirivātraiṣāprācījṣeyāsarasvatī
tathākāmaphalasyeyaṃ hetubhūtāmadānadī
dakṣiṇāṃ diśamālokyapunaḥ paścānmukhīgatā
uktātayātathāgaṅgādiśaṃ prācīṃ vrajasvaha
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe prathame sṛṣṭikhaṇḍe tīrthāvatāronāmadvātriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
trayastriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
bhīṣma uvāca
kathaṃsamāgamobhūtaḥ kasminkālekadāmune
mārkaṇḍeyaḥ kasyasutaḥ kathaṃ jātomahātapāḥ
nāmnosyanigamaṃ brūhi yathābhūtaṃ mahāmune
athate sampravakṣyāmi mārkaṇḍeyodbhavaṃ punaḥ
purākalpemuniḥpūrvaṃ mṛkaṇḍurnāmaviśrutaḥ
bhṛgoḥ putromahābhāgaḥ sabhāryastaptavāṃ stapaḥ
sapaṣcavārṣikobhūtobāla evaguṇādhikaḥ
jṣāni nāsatadādṛṣṭobhramanbālastadāṅgaṇe
tasyapitrāsavaipṛṣṭaḥ kiyadāyuḥ sutasyame
saṅkhyāyācakṣvavarṣāṇitasyālpānyadhikāni vā
mṛkaṇḍunaivamuktastusajṣānīvākyamabravīt
ṣaṇmāsamāyuḥ putrasyadhātrāsṛṣṭaṃ munīśvara
naivaśokastvayākāryaḥ satyametadudāhṛtam
satacchrutvāvacobhīṣmajṣāni nāyadudāhṛtam
āhacainaṃ pitāputramṛṣīṃ stvam abhivādaya
evamuktaḥ savaipitrāprahṛṣṭaścābhivādane
navarṇāvarṇatāṃ vettisarvavarṇābhivādanaḥ
paṣcamāsāstvatikrāṃ tādivasāḥ paṣcaviṃśatiḥ
mārgeṇāthasamāyātāṛṣayas tatra saptavai
bālenatenatedṛṣṭāḥ sarvecāpyabhivāditāḥ
āyuṣmānbhavatair uktaḥ sabālodaṇḍamekhalī
uktvaivaṃ tepunarbālamapaśyankṣīṇajīvitam
dināni paṣcatasyāyurjṣātvābhītāś ca te nṛpa
taṅgṛhītvābālakaṃ cagatāstebrahmaṇoṃ tikam
cirāyurbrahmaṇābālaḥ proktaḥ saṛṣisannidhau
tatas temunayaḥ prītāḥ śrutvā vākyaṃ pitāmahāt
pitāmahaṛṣīndṛṣṭvā provācavismayānvitaḥ
kāryeṇayenacāyātaḥ koyaṃ bālonivedyatām
putromṛkaṇḍoḥ kṣīṇāyuḥ sāyuṣaṅkurubālakam
yajṣopavītaṃ daṇḍacadatvācainamabodhayat
yaṅkaṃ citpaśyasebālabhramaṃ taṃ bhūtalejanam
tasyābhivādaḥ kartavya evamāhapitāvacaḥ
abhivādanaśīloyaṅkṣitaudṛṣṭaḥ paribhraman
tīrthayātrāprasaṅgenadaivayogātpitāmaha
ṛtavākyādiyaṃ bhūmiḥ saṃ sthitāsarvatobhayā
matsamaścāyuṣābālomārkaṇḍeyobhaviṣyati

tīrthayātrāṅgatāviprāmārkaṇḍeyonijaṅgṛham
jagāmateṣu yāteṣu pitaraṃ svamathābravīt
dīrghāyuś ca kṛtaścāsmivarāndatvāvisarjitaḥ
tatrāhaṃ devadeveśamupāsiṣyepitāmaham
sarvakāmāvāptikaraṃ sarvārātinibarhaṇam
sarvasaukhyapradaṃ devamindrādīnāṃ parāyaṇam
brahmāṇanto ṣayiṣyāmi sarvalokapitāmaham
mārkaṇḍeyavacaḥ śrutvā mṛkaṇḍurmunisattamaḥ
jagāmaparamaṃ harṣaṅkṣaṇam ekaṃ samucchvasan
sarvasyajagatāṃ sraṣṭāyenadṛṣṭaḥ pitāmahaḥ
tvayādāyādavānasmiputreṇavaṃśadhāriṇā
tvaṅgacchapaśyadeveśaṃ puṣkarasthaṃ pitāmaham
dṛṣṭetasminjagannāthenajarāmṛtyureva ca
nṛṇāṃ bhavatisaukhyāni tathaiśvaryaṃ tapo'kṣayam

puṣkarāṇitathātrīṇinavidmas tatra kāraṇam
kanīyāṃ saṃ madhyamaṃ catṛtīyaṃ jyeṣṭhapuṣkaram
śṛṅgaśabdābhidhānāni śubhaprasravaṇāni ca
brahmāviṣṇustathārudronityaṃ sannihitāstrayaḥ
puṣkareṣu mahārājānātaḥ puṇyatamaṃ bhuvi
brahmalokasyapanthānaṃ dhanyāḥ paśyanti puṣkaraṃ
kārtikīṃ vāvasedekāṃ puṣkaresamameva ca
kartummayānaśakitaṅkarmaṇānaivasādhitam
tadayatnāttvayātātamṛtyuḥ sarvaharojitaḥ
tatra dṛṣṭaḥ sadeveśobrahmālokapitāmahaḥ
ahaṃ vaitoṣitoyenapaṣcavārṣikajanmanā
vareṇatvaṃ madīyenaupamāṃ cirajīvinām
āśramaḥ sthāpitastenamārkaṇḍāśramaityuta
tatra snātvāśucirbhūtvāvājapeyaphalaṃ labhet
sarvapāpaviśuddhātmācirāyurjāyatenaraḥ
tathānyaṃ tepravakṣyāmi itihā sampurātanam
yathārāmeṇavaitīrthaṃ puṣkaraṃ tuvinirmitam

rāma uvāca

sādhupaṣṭaṃ tvayāvīraraghūṇāṃ vaṃśavardhana

ahaṃ cajamadagniś ca bhāradvājaś ca lomaśaḥ

śuddhekṣaṇaṃ caśaśakaṅkṛṣṇaśākaṃ tathāmadhu

preṣiteṣu yathāśaktidatvāteṣu cadakṣiṇām

śrutapūrvaṃ casuśroṇikṣetrasyāsyaviceṣṭitam
atrakṣetrejanāḥ satyaṃ sarvehisvārthatatparāḥ
naśṛṇvanti pituḥ putrāḥ putrāṇāṃ pitarastathā
naśiṣyāhigurorvākyaṃ śiṣyasyāpitathāguruḥ
ityevaṃ kathayannevaprāptorevāṃ mahānadīm
cakrebhiṣekaṅkākutsthaḥ sānujaḥ sahasītayā
udīkṣyacamuhuḥ sūryaṃ devatāś ca samāhitaḥ
kṛtābhiṣekasturarājarāmaḥ sītādvitīyaḥ sahalakṣmaṇena
kṛtābhiṣekaḥ sahaśailaputryāguhenasārdhaṃ bhagavāni veśaḥ
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe prathame sṛṣṭikhaṇḍe mārkaṇḍeyāśramadarśanaṃ nāmatrrayastriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
catustriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
bhīṣma uvāca
kasminkālebhagavatābrahmaṇālokakāriṇā
kiṃ nāmānaṛtvijastebrahmaṇāyeprakalpitāḥ
kācavaidakṣiṇāteṣāṃ dattātenamahātmanā
yathābhūtaṃ yathāvṛttaṃ tathātvaṃ meprakīrtaya
sumahatkautukaṃ jātaṃ yajṣaṃ paitāmahaṃ prati
pūrvamevamayākhyātaṃ yadāsvāyaṃ bhuvomanuḥ
sṛṣṭvāprajāpatīnsarvānuktaḥ sṛṣṭiṅkuruṣvavai
svayaṃ tupuṣkaraṅ gatvā yajṣasyāhṛtyavistaram
gāyanti nityaṅgandharvānṛtyaṃ tyapsarasāṅgaṇāḥ
brahmodgātāhotādhvaryuś ca tvāroyajṣavāhakāḥ
ekaikas yatra yaścānyeparivārāḥ svayaṅkṛtāḥ
brahmācabrahmaṇācchaṃsīpotācāgnīdhra eva ca
ānvīkṣikīsarvavidyābrāhmīhyeṣācatuṣṭayī
udgātācapratyudgātāpratihartāsubrahmaṇyaḥ
catuṣṭayīdvitīyaiṣātūdgātuś ca prakīrtitā
hotācamaitrāvaruṇastathā'cchāvāka eva ca
grāvastuccacaturthotratṛtīyācacatuṣṭayī
adhvaryuś ca pratiṣṭhātāneṣṭonnetātathaiva ca
catuṣṭayīcaturthyeṣāproktāśaṃ tanunaṃ dana
etevaiṣoḍaśaproktāṛtvijovedaciṃ takaiḥ
śatāni trīṇiṣaṣṭiś ca yajṣāḥ sṛṣṭāḥ svayaṃ bhuvā
etāṃ ś ca iteṣu sarveṣu pravadanti sadādvijān
brahmāṇaṃ nāradaṃ cakrebrāhmaṇācchaṃsigautamam
udgātāṅgirasaḥ pratyudgātācapulahastathā
nārāyaṇaḥ pratihartāsubrahmaṇyotrirucyate
pulastyoddhvaryurevāsītpratiṣṭhātācavaiśibiḥ
bṛhaspatis tatra neṣṭā unnetāśāṃ śapāyanaḥ
bharadvājaḥ śamīkaś ca purukutsoyugandharaḥ
gargovedaśirāś caiva trisāmāddhvaryavaḥ kṛtāḥ
kaṇvādayas tathā cānye mārkaṇḍo gaṇḍir eva ca
putrapautrasametāś ca saśiṣyāḥ sahabāndhavāḥ
karmāṇi tatra kurvāṇādivāni śamatandritāḥ
dakṣiṇābrahmaṇedattāprācīhotustudakṣiṇā
addhvaryavepratīcītuudgātuścottarātathā
trailokyaṃ sakalaṃ brahmādadauteṣāṃ tudakṣiṇām
dhenūnāṃ caśataṃ prājṣair dātavyaṃ yajṣasiddhaye
aṣṭautuyajṣavāhānāṃ catvāriṃ śādhikāstathā
dvitīyasthāni nāṃ caiva caturviṃśatprakīrtitāḥ
ṣoḍaśaivatṛtīyānāṃ deyāvaidhenavaḥ śubhāḥ
dvādaśaivatathācānyā āgnīdhrādiṣudāpayet
anayā saṅkhyayā caiva grāmān dāsī rajāvikaṃ
sahasrabhojyaṃ dātavyaṃ snātvācāvabhṛthekratau
addhvaryūṇāṃ sadasyānāṃ svecchayādānamiṣyate
viṣṇuṃ cāhūyavaibrahmāvākyamāhamudānvitaḥ
tvayidṛṣṭenasākopaṅkariṣyatiśubhānanā
tvaṃ sadāmadhurābhāṣījihvātesravatemṛtam
tvayāprasāditāsāddhvītuṣṭāsātveṣyatidhruvam
lakṣmīstepuratoyātusāvitryāḥ sadanaṃ śubhā
tasyāstvaṃ padavīṅgacchasāṃ tvayasvapriyāṃ mama
mukhaṃ prekṣyasadākālaṃ vartatetavasuṃ dari
evaṃ vidhāni vākyāni madhurāṇibahūnica
devīśrāvayitavyāsāyathātuṣṭā'cirādbhavet
evamuktastadāviṣṇurbrahmaṇālokakāriṇā
jagāmatvaritobhūtvāsāvitrī yatra tiṣṭhati
dūrādevāgacchamānaṃ patnyāsahacakeśavam
uttasthausatvarābhūtvāviṣṇunācābhivaṃ ditā
pativratāmahābhāgābrahmaṇastvaṃ hṛdisthitā
aharniśaṃ ciṃ tayaṃ stvāṃ prasādaṃ tebhikāṅkṣati
sakhīṃ caināṃ priyāṃ pṛcchalakṣmīṃ bhṛgusutāṃ satīm
yadicaśraddadhānāsivākyādasmātsulocane
evamuktvātataḥ śauriḥ sāvitryāś ca raṇadvayam
ubhābhyāṃ caiva hastābhyāṅkṣamadevinamostute
saṅkocyapādausādevīsvakareṇakarauhareḥ
gṛhītvovācataṃ viṣṇuṃ sarvaṃ kṣāntaṃ mayācyuta
iyaṃ lakṣmīḥ sadāvatsahṛdayetenivatsyati
bhṛgoḥ patnyāṃ samutpannāpatnyeṣātavasuvratā
bhagavān yatra tatra iṣā avatāraṃ cakurvatī
devatvedevadehāvaimānuṣatvecamānuṣī
tvatsahāyānasaṃ dehodāṃ patyavratinīciram
viṣṇur uvāca
yajṣāvasānaṃ saṃjātaṃ preṣitohaṃ tavāṃ tikaṃ
sāvitrīmānayakṣipraṃ mayāsnānaṃ samācaret
lakṣmīr uvāca
āryeuttiṣṭhaśīghraṃ tvaṃ yāhi yatra pitāmahaḥ
vinātvayānayāsyāmispṛṣṭaupādaumayātava
utthāpyasāgrahīddhastaṃ dakṣiṇādakṣiṇekare
cirāyamāṇāṃ sāvitrīṃ jṣātvādevaḥ pitāmahaḥ
samīpasthaṃ mahādevamidamāhatadāvacaḥ
gacchatvam anayāsārddhaṃ pārvatyā'suradūṣaṇa
gaurītvadagratoyātupaścāttvaṅgacchaśaṅkara
pratibodhyānayayathāśīghramāyātitatkuru
gatvā diṣṭaudaṃ patītāṃ procaturbrahmaṇaḥ priyām
bṛhatkṛtyaṃ tvayā tatra karaṇīyaṃ pativrate
pṛcchasvemāṃ varārohāṅgaurīṃ parvatanaṃ dinīm
lakṣmīṃ caitāṃ viśālākṣīmindrāṇīṃ vāśubhānane
yāsāṃ vāśraddhadhāsitvaṃ pṛcchadevinamostute
āśīrvādastayādattodevadevasyaśūlinaḥ
śarīrārdhecategaurīsadāsthāsyatiśaṅkara
evaṃ bruvaṃ tīsāvitrīgṛhītābrahmaṇaḥ priyā
abhivaṃ dyatutāṃ devīṃ śaṅkarovākyamabravīt
ehyāgacchamahābhāge yatra tiṣṭhatitepatiḥ
tatra gacchavarārohestrīṇāṃ bhartāparāgatiḥ
bṛhadāgrahaṇedevipraṇayādgaṃ tum arhasi
lakṣmīś ca iṣāpārvatīcasthitādevitavāgrataḥ
etayorvacasādeviāvayoś ca śubhānane
lakṣmīś ca tekarelagnādakṣiṇecamayādhṛtā
ehyāgacchamahābhāge yatra tiṣṭhatitepatiḥ
nītāsātutadātābhyāṃ devīsāmadhyataḥ kṛtā
puraḥ sarauviṣṇurudrauśakrādyāś ca tathāsurāḥ
tatrāyātācasādevīsāvitrībrahmaṇaḥ priyā
sāvitrīṃ sumukhīṃ dṛṣṭvā sarvalokapitāmahaḥ
eṣādevīkarmakarīahaṃ tevaśagasthitaḥ
samādiśavarāroheyattekāryaṃ mayātviha
evamuktācasādevīsvayaṃ devenabrahmaṇā
pādayoḥ patitādevīgāyatrībrahmacoditā
āliṅgyasādaraṅkaṃ ṭhesāpariṣvajyapīḍitāṃ
gāyatrīṃ sāṃ tvayāmāsamānyaś ca iṣapatirmama
karttavyaṃ vacanantasyastrīṇāṃ prāṇeśvaraḥ patiḥ
uktaṃ bhagavatāpūrvaṃ sṛṣṭikāleviriṃ cinā
nacastrīṇāṃ pṛthagyajṣonavrataṃ nāpyupoṣaṇam
bhartṛniṃ dāṃ yākurutesvasṛniṃ dāṃ tathaiva ca
parivādaṃ pralāpaṃ vānarakaṃ sātugacchati
patyaujīvatiyānārīupavāsavrataṃ caret
evaṃ jṣātvātvayābharturnakāryaṃ vipriyaṃ sati
nacāsyadakṣiṇaṃ tvaṅgaṃ tvayāsevyaṃ kathaṃ cana
sarvakāryetvahaṃ cāsyadakṣiṇaṃ pakṣamāśritā
savyaṃ tvam āyeḥ sādhvipārśvenāradapuṣkarau
brahmasthānāni cānyāni sthitānyāyatanāni ca
labhevaiśobhamānehayāvatsṛṣṭiḥ prajāyate
bhavatyācamayā caiva sthātavyaṃ cana saṃśayaḥ
puṣkarebrahmaṇaḥ pārśvevāmaṃ catvaṃ samāśraya
gāyatry uvāca
tavaivājṣāmayākāryātvaṃ meprāṇasamāsakhī
ahaṃ tetvanujādevisadāmāṃ pātum arhasi
devadevastadābrahmāpuṣkareviṣṇunāsaha
snānāvasānedevānāṃ sarveṣāṃ pradadauvarān
devānāṃ capatiṃ śakraṃ jyotiṣāṃ cadivākaraṃ
nakṣatrāṇāṃ tathāsomaṃ rasānāṃ varuṇaṃ tathā
prajāpatīnāṃ dakṣaṃ canadīnāṃ caiva sāgaraṃ
kuberaṃ cadhanādhyakṣaṃ tathācakrecarakṣasāṃ
bhūtānāṃ caiva sarveṣāṅgaṇānāṃ capinākinam
mānavānāṃ manuṃ caiva pakṣiṇāṅgaruḍaṃ tathā
ṛṣīṇāṃ cavasiṣṭhaṃ cagrahāṇāṃ caprabhākaraṃ
evamādīnivaidatvādevadevaḥ pitāmahaḥ
viṣṇuṃ caśaṅkaraṃ caiva brahmāprovācasādaram
pṛthivyāḥ sarvatīrtheṣu bhavaṃ taupūjyasattamau
bhavadbhyāṃ navinātīrthaṃ puṇyatāmetikarhicit
liṅgaṃ vāpratimāvāpidṛśyate yatra kutracit
tattīrthaṃ puṇyatāṃ yātisarvamevaphalapradaṃ
mānavāhyupahāraiś ca yekariṣyanti pūjanaṃ
yuṣmākaṃ māṃ puraskṛtyateṣāṃ rogabhayaṅkutaḥ
yeṣu rāṣṭreṣu yuṣmākamutsavāḥ pūjanādikāḥ
pravartsyanti kriyāḥ sarvāyatphalaṃ teṣu tacchṛṇu
viprayogonacāpīṣṭair aniṣṭair nāpisaṅgatiḥ
nākṣirogaḥ śirārtirvāpittaśūlabhagaṃ darāḥ
nābhicāraṃ bhayaṃ tatrāpasmāronaviṣūcikā
ārogyaṃ sarvataś caiva dīrghāyuś ca prajādhanaṃ
nākālebhavitāmṛtyurgāvonālpapayomucaḥ
nākālaphalitāvṛkṣānotpātabhayamaṇvapi
etacchrutvātatoviṣṇurbrahmāṇaṃ stotumudyataḥ
viṣṇur uvāca
yajṣeśanārāyaṇajiṣṇuśaṅkarakṣitīśaviśveśvaraviśvalocana
śaśāṅkasūryācyutavīraviśvapravṛttamūrtemṛtamūrtaavyaya
jvaladdhutāśārciniruddhamaṇḍalapradeśanārāyaṇaviśvatomukha
samastadevārtiharāmṛtāvyayaprapāhimāṃ śaraṇagataṃ tathā vibho
vaktrāṇyanekāni vibho tavāhaṃ paśyāmiyajṣasyagatiṃ purāṇam
brahmāṇamīśaṃ jagatāṃ prasūtiṃ namostutubhyaṃ prapitāmahāya
tatsarvavijñānaviśuddhasatvair upāsyasekiṃ praṇamāmy ahaṃ tvām
evaṃ bhavaṃ taṃ prakṛteḥ purastādyovettyasausarvavidāṃ variṣṭhaḥ
guṇānviteṣu prasabhaṃ vivedyoviśālamūrtistvihasūkṣmarūpaḥ
paraṃ tvahaṃ vedmi kathaṃ purāṇaṃ bhavaṃ tamādyaṃ tapasāviśuddham
saṃ cintyatenāthavibhuṃ bhavaṃ taṃ jānātinaivaṃ tapasāvihīnaḥ
asmādṛśaiś ca pravarair vibodhyaṃ tvāṃ devamūrkhāḥ svamatiṃ vibhajya
naviṣṇurūpobhagavānsusūkṣmaḥ sthūlosidevaḥ kṛtakṛtyatāyāḥ
tatvaiḥ svarūpaiḥ samarūpadhāribhir ātmasvarūpevitatasvabhāvaḥ
saṃsāracakrebhramaṇādiyuktābhītiṃ punarnaḥ pratipālayasva
sarvajṣastvaṃ nasaṃ dehoprajṣārāśiś ca keśava
devānāṃ prathamaḥ pūjyaḥ sarvadātvaṃ bhaviṣyasi
nārāyaṇādanantaraṃ rudrobhaktyāviriṃ canam
tuṣṭāvapraṇatobhūtvābrahmāṇaṅkamalodbhavam
śaraṇaṃ tvāṃ prapannosmitrāhimāṃ bhavasaṃ sṛteḥ
pūrvaṃ nīlāṃ budākāraṅkuḍmalaṃ tepitāmaha
dṛṣṭvā raktamukhaṃ bhūyaḥ patrakesarasaṃ yutam
padmaṃ cānekapatrāntamasaṅkhyātaṃ niraṃ janam
tatra sthitenatvayaiṣāsṛṣṭiś caiva pravartitā
tvāṃ muktvānānyatastrāṇaṃ jagad vaṃ dyanamostute
sāvitrīśāpadagdhohaṃ liṅgaṃ mepatitaṅkṣitau
idānīṅkurumeśāṃ tiṃ trāhimāṃ sahabhāryayā
brahmāvaipātumepādaujaṅghevaikamalāsanaḥ
viriṃ com ekaṭiṃ pātusṛṣṭikṛdguhyameva ca
nābhiṃ padmanibhaḥ pātujaṭharaṃ caturānanaḥ
urastuviśvasṛkpātuhṛdayaṃ pātupadmajaḥ

evaṃ nyasyagurornāmaśaṅkaronāmaśaṅkaraḥ
tatas tuṣṭoharaṃ brahmāvākyametad uvāca ha
keṣu keṣu casthāneṣu tvāṃ paśyanti sadādvijāḥ
nāmnācakenatesthānaṃ śobhatedharaṇītale
puṣkarehaṃsuraśreṣṭhogayāyāṃ cacaturmukhaḥ
kāveryyāṃ sṛṣṭikartācanaṃ dipuryyāṃ bṛhaspatiḥ
prabhāsepadmajanmācavānaryāṃ casurapriyaḥ
dvāravatyāṃ tuṛgvedīvaidiśebhuvanādhipaḥ
pauṇḍrakepuṇḍarīkākṣaḥ piṅgākṣohastināpure
jayaṃ tyāṃ vijayaścāsmijayaṃ taḥ puṣkarāvate
ahicchannejayānaṃ dīkāṃ cīpuryāṃ janapriyaḥ
brahmāhaṃ pāṭalīputreṛṣikuṇḍemunistathā
mahitāremukuṃ daś ca śrīkaṃ ṭhaḥ śrīnivāsite
kāmarūpeśubhākārovārāṇasyāṃ śivapriyaḥ
mallikākṣetathāviṣṇurmahendrebhārgavastathā
gonardesthavirākāraujjayinyāṃ pitāmahaḥ
kauśāṃ byāṃ tumahābodhirayodhyāyāṃ carāghavaḥ
munīndraś citrakūṭe tu vārāho vindhyaparvate
gaṅgādvāreparameṣṭhīhimavatyapiśaṅkaraḥ
devikāyāṃ srucāhastaḥ sruvahastaś ca turvaṭe
vṛndāvanepadmapāṇiḥ kuśahastaś ca naimiṣe
bhāgīrathyāṃ padmatanurjalānaṃ dojalaṃ dhare
kauṅkaṇe caiva madrākṣaḥ kāṃ pilyekanakapriyaḥ
veṅkaṭecānnadātācaśaṃ bhuś caiva kratusthale
laṅkāyāṃ capulastyohaṅkāśmīrehaṃsavāhanaḥ
vasiṣṭhaścārbude caiva nāradaścotpalāvate
melakeśrutidātāhaṃ prapāteyādasāṃ patiḥ
aṅkoṭeyajṣabhoktācabrahmavādesurapriyaḥ
nārāyaṇaś ca gomaṃ temāyāpuryāṃ dvijapriyaḥ
ṛṣivededurādharṣodevāyāṃ suramardanaḥ
vijayāyāṃ mahārūpaḥ svarūporāṣṭravarddhane
pṛthūdarastumālavyāṃ śākaṃ bharyāṃ rasapriyaḥ
piṇḍāraketugopālaḥ śaṅkhoddhāreṅgavarddhanaḥ
kādaṃ bakeprajādhyakṣodevādhyakṣaḥ samasthale
gaṅgādharobhadrapīṭhejalaśāpyahamarbude
tryambaketripurādhīśaḥ śrīparvatetrilocanaḥ
śṛṅgiberapureśaurirnaumiṣecakrapāṇikaḥ
daṇḍapuryāṃ virūpākṣogautamodhūtapāpake
indrapuryāṃ devanāthodyūtapāyāṃ puraṃ daraḥ
haṃsavāhastulaṃ bāyāṃ caṇḍāyāṅgaruḍapriyaḥ
devadāruvane liṅgaṃ mahāpattau vināyakaḥ
tryambako mātṛkāsthāne alakāyāṃ kulādhipaḥ
trikūṭe caiva gonardaḥ pātālevāsukistathā
padmādhyakṣaś ca kedārekūṣmāṇḍesuratapriyaḥ
kuṇḍavāpyāṃ śubhāṅgastusāraṇyāṃ takṣakastathā
akṣoṭepāpahā caiva aṃ bikāyāṃ sudarśanaḥ
varadāyāṃ mahāvīraḥ kāṃ tāredurganāśanaḥ
anantaś caiva parṇāṭeprakāśāyāṃ divākaraḥ
virājāyāṃ padmanābhaḥ svarudraś ca vṛkasthale
mārkaṇḍo vaṭake caiva vāhinyāṃ mṛgaketanaḥ
aṣṭottaraṃ sthānaśataṃ mayā te parikīrtitam
eteṣāmapiyastvekaṃ paśyatebhaktimānnaraḥ
sthānaṃ suvirajaṃ labdhvāmodateśāśvatīḥ samāḥ
mānasaṃ vācikaṃ caiva kāyikaṃ yaccaduṣkṛtam
tatsarvaṃ nāśamāyātinātrakāryāvicāraṇā
yastvetāni casarvāṇi gatvā māṃ paśyatenaraḥ
puṣpopahārair dhūpaiś ca brāhmaṇānāṃ catarpaṇaiḥ
dhyānenacasthireṇāśuprāpyateparameśvaraḥ
tasyapuṇyaphalaṃ cāgryamaṃ temokṣaphalaṃ tathā
sabrahmalokamāsādyatatkālaṃ tatra tiṣṭhati
punaḥ sṛṣṭaubhaveddevovair ājānāṃ mahātapāḥ
akāmataḥ kāmatovātāni naśyanti tatkṣaṇāt
sthāneṣveteṣu vai gatvā māṃ paśyatisamādhinā
kṛtvāpūjopahāraṃ casnānaṃ capitṛtarpaṇam
kṛtvāpiṇḍapradānaṃ casocirādduḥkhavarjitaḥ
iharājyāni saubhāgyaṃ dhanaṃ dhānyaṃ varastriyaḥ
idaṃ yātrāvidhānaṃ yaḥ kurutekārayetavā
agamyāgamanaṃ yenakṛtaṃ jānātimānavaḥ
yātrāṃ cemāṃ sakṛtkṛtvāvedasaṃ skāramāpnuyāt
aprāpyaṃ prāpyatetenapāpaJcāpivinaśyati
sarveṣāṃ caiva vedānāṃ samāptistenavaikṛtā
yaiḥ kṛtvāpuṣkaresaṃ dhyāṃ sāvitrīsamupāsitā
bhṛṅgāreṇavareṇaivamṛṇmayenāpiśaṅkara
ānīyatajjalaṃ puṇyaṃ saṃ dhyopāstirdinakṣaye
samādhinā samādheyā saprāṇāyāmapūrvikā
tasyāṅkṛtāyāṃ yatpuṇyaṃ tacchṛṇuṣṭvaharādyame
tenadvādaśavarṣāṇibhavetsaṃ dhyāsuvaṃ ditā
aśvamedhaphalaṃ snānedānedaśaguṇaṃ tathā
tenāhaṃ bhojitas tatra bhavāmīhana saṃśayaḥ
umāsahāyastārtīyebhojitosina saṃśayaḥ
athavāyākumārīṇāṃ bhaktyādadyāccabhojanam
pāratramaihikaṃ vāpikāmayadbhir naraiḥ sadā
dātavyaṃ sarvadābhīṣmakaṭutailavivarjitam
nacāmlaṃ nacavaikṣāraṃ strīṇāṃ bhojyaṅkadācana
bhakṣyaṃ paṣcaprakāraṃ carasaiḥ sarvaiḥ susaṃ skṛtam
ghṛtapūryaḥ supakvāś ca bahukṣīrasamanvitāḥ
śikhariṇītathāpeyādadhikṣīrasamanvitā
āhlādakāriṇīpuṃ sāṃ strīṇāṃ cātīvavallabhā
dhanadhānyāṃ janopetaṃ nārīṇāṃ caśatākulam
pūpakaṃ śaṣkulaṃ tasyāṃ jāyatenātraṃ saśayaḥ
asautārayatesvānāṅkulānām ekaviṃśatiṃ
pūritaṃ cakulaṃ tasyāḥ pūrikāṃ yāpradāsyati
śikhariṇīpradātrīṇāṃ yuvatīnāṃ na saṃśayaḥ
modakānāṃ pradānena eva māhaprajāpatiḥ
etad eva tu gaurīṇāṃ bhojanaṃ hara śasyate
subhagāputriṇīsādhvīdhanaṛddhisamanvitā
pūpāni caiva puṇyāni kṛtāni madhurāṇica
drākṣārasapradhānaṃ caguḍakhaṇḍasamanvitam
śāradenatudhānyenakṛtvākhaṇḍaṃ vimiśritat
strīṇāṃ caiva tupeyāni bhakṣyāṇicadvijanmanām
ihacāvikavāsāṃ sivarṣāyogyāni sarvaśaḥ
yāni yāni capeyāni tāni yogyāni dāpayet
pratipūjyavidhānenavasudānaiḥ sakaṃ cukaiḥ
kuṅkumenānuliptāṅgyaḥ sragdāmabhir alaṅkṛtāḥ
datvātūpānahāvaṅghryornārikelaṅkaretathā
akṣṇoś ca ivāṃ janaṃ datvāsiṃ dūraṃ caiva mastake
guḍaṃ phalāni hṛdyāni vāṃ chitāni mṛdūnica
svayaṃ bhuṃ jītavaipaścātsabandhurbālakaiḥ saha
gṛhegataḥ pradāsyāmihṛṣṭodevaprasīdame
evamevapitṝṇāṃ ca āgatyasvīyamaṃ dire
piṇḍapradānapūrvaṃ tuśrāddhaṅkuryādvidhānataḥ
tīrthādaṣṭaguṇaṃ puṇyaṃ svagṛhedadatāṃ śiva
nacapaśyanti vainīcāḥ śrāddhaṃ dvijātibhiḥ kṛtaṃ
ekāṃ tetugṛheguptepitṝṇāṃ śrāddhamiṣyate
nīcadṛṣṭyāhataṃ taccapitṝnnaivopatiṣṭhati
pitṝṇāṃ tṛptidaṃ proktaṃ svayamevasvayaṃ bhuvā
gaurībhaktyādhikāyātuśastājṣātakriyātusā
rājasīmanasājṣātājanānāṅkīrtidāyinī
guptaṃ dānaṃ sadādeyamātmanohitamicchatā
pakvānnaṃ dṛśyatāmetidīyamānaṃ janair bhuvi
dṛśyamānaṃ tutattuṣṭyaidṛśyatenehakarhicit
bhavanenātrasaṃ dehaḥ satyaṃ paurāṇikaṃ vacaḥ
tīrthetubrāhmaṇaṃ naivaparīkṣeta kathaṃ cana
saktubhiḥ piṇḍadānaṃ casaṃ yāvaiḥ pāyasenavā
karttavyam ṛṣibhir dṛṣṭaṃ piṇyākenaiṅgudenavā
svadhāṃ tugṛdhrāḥ kākāvānaivadṛṣṭyāharantite
śrāddhaṃ tattair thikaṃ proktaṃ pitṝṇāṃ tṛptidaṃ param
bhaktyātuṣyantipitarastuṣṭāḥ kāmāndiśantite
putraṃ pautraṃ dhanaṃ dhānyaṅkāmānyānmanasecchati
bhaktyācārādhitodadyānnṛṇāṃ prītaḥ pitāmahaḥ
akālepyathakālevātīrtheśrāddhaṃsadānaraiḥ
prāptair evasadāsnānaṅkartavyaṃ pitṛtarpaṇam
piṇḍadānaṃ cakartavyaṃ pitṝṇāṃ cātivallabham
āśayāparayāyuktāḥ kāṅkṣaṃ taḥ salilaṃ cate
acchinnāsantatisteṣāṃ sadākālaṃ bhaviṣyati
pitaraḥ putradātāraṃ vṛddhiśrāddhābhikāṅkṣiṇaḥ
ataḥ śrāddhaṃ purāproktaṃ svayamevasvayaṃ bhuvā
guṇottaraṃ tuyatkāryaṃ dvijaiḥ pitṛparāyaṇaiḥ
tīrthekṣetregṛhevāpisaṅkrāṃ taugrahaṇepivā
etānvaiśrāddhakālāṃ stupurāsvāyaṃ bhuvobravīt
kṛteśrāddhenavaipuṃ sāṃ pīḍābhavatidehajā
tadāputrakṛtaṃ vāpisarvaṃ tyajatiduṣkṛtam
yathānabhavitāpīḍāgrahacoranṛpādikāt
duṣkṛtaṃ naśyatesarvaṃ paratracagatiṃ śubhām
kṛteyugepuṣkarāṇitretāyāṃ naimiṣaṃ smṛtam
dvāparecakurukṣetraṅkalaugaṅgāṃ samāśrayet
duṣkaraḥ puṣkarevāsoduṣkaraṃ puṣkaretapaḥ
yadan yatra kṛtaṃ pāpaṃ tīrthetadyātilāghavam
sāyaṃ prātaḥ smared yas tu puṣkarāṇikṛtāṣjaliḥ
upaspṛṣṭaṃ bhavettenasarvatīrtheṣu bhārata
sāyaṃ prātarupaspṛśyapuṣkareniyatendriyaḥ
dvādabdaṃ dvādaśāhaṃ māsaṃ māsārdhameva ca
sarveṣām eva lokānāṃ brahmalokoparisthitaḥ
daśakoṭisahasrāṇitīrthānāṃ vaimahītale
sānnidhyaṃ puṣkareteṣāṃ trisaṃ dhyaṅkurunandana
yāvattiṣṭhanti girayoyāvattiṣṭhantisāgarāḥ
tāvatpuṣkaramṛtyūnāṃ brahmalokona saṃśayaḥ
nirdahedduṣkṛtaṃ sarvaṃ sakṛtsnātvātupuṣkare
puṣkaraṃ duṣkaraṅkṣetraṃ sarvapāpapraṇāśanam
idānīṃ śṛṇumerājanpaṣcapātakanāśanam
ihajanmanidāridryavyādhikuṣṭhādipīḍitaḥ
tasyasadyobhavellakṣmīrāyuḥ pūrṇaṃ sutāḥ sukham
kṛtvātumaṇḍalagataṃ lokapālasamanvitam
brahmāṇaṃ tuparaṃ devaṃ yaḥ paśyatividhānataḥ
kārtikemāsiśuklāyāṃ paurṇamāsyāṃ viśeṣataḥ
sarvāsuvāyajedevaṃ pūrṇimāsuvidhānataḥ
saṅkrāntaucamahābāhocandrasūryagrahepivā
yaḥ paśyativibhuṃ devaṃ pūjitaṅguruṇā nṛpa
tasyasadyobhavettuṣṭiḥ pāpadhvaṃ saś ca jāyate
samānyodevatānāṃ cabhavatīhanarādhipa
brāhmaṇakṣatriyaviśāṃ bhaktānāṃ tuparīkṣaṇam
saṃ vatsaraṅguruḥ kuryājjātiśaucakriyādibhiḥ
upapannamitijṣātvāhṛdayenāvadhārayet
tepibhaktiyutādhyātvātvācāryaṃ parameśvaram
saṃ vatsaraṅguraubhaktiṅkuryurviṣṇauyathātathā
prasādayeyuś ca tataḥ pūrṇesaṃ vatsaregurum
bhagavaṃ stvatprasādenasaṃsārārṇavatāraṇam
sahasraśīrṣajapyenamaṇḍalabrāhmaṇenaca
dhyānenasyāttathāsmākamupadeśaḥ pradīyatām
icchāmovaidikīṃ lakṣmīṃ viṣeṇaprasīdatām
yathāvidhisamabhyarcedbrahmāṇaṃ viṣṇumagrataḥ
tebaddhanetrāḥ svāpyāstukārtikasyacaturdaśīm
śvetamālyāṃ baradharaṃ śvetagandhānulepanam
kṣīravṛkṣotthamācāryodāpayeddantadhāvanam
tecataṃ bhakṣayeyurhinadīṅ gatvā samudragām
itaradvātaṭākaṃ vāgṛhevāpividhānataḥ
bhakṣayitvākṣipeddūraṃ patitaṃ canirīkṣayet
sammukhaṃ prāṅmukhaṃ vāpividiśaṃ cāpivāgatam
parāṅmukhedaṃ takāṣṭhesarvedevāḥ parāṅmukhāḥ
svapnāndṛṣṭvā guroragreśrāvayeyurvicakṣaṇāḥ
tataḥ śubhāśubhaṃ tatra lakṣayetparamoguruḥ
paurṇamāsyāmathasnātvātatodevālayaṃ vrajet
guruś ca maṇḍalaṃ bhūmaukalpitāyāṃ tuvartayet
lakṣaṇair vividhair bhūmiṃ lakṣayitvāvidhānataḥ
ṣoḍaśāraṃ likhetpadmaṃ navadhāramathāpivā
varṇānukramataḥ śiṣyānpuṣpahastānpraveśayet
navanābhaṃ yadākuryānmaṇḍalaṃ varṇakair budhaḥ
indrāṇīpūrvakaṃ devamindramaindryāṃ tupūjayet
lokapālaiḥ samaṃ tadvadagniṃ sampūjayen nṛpa
diśivahneryamaṃ yāmyāṃ naiṛtyāṃ caiva nirṛtim
varuṇaṃ vāruṇāśāyāṃ vāyuṃ vāyavyagocare
kamaṇḍaluṃ pūrvatohisrucaṃ vaidakṣiṇetathā
haṃsaṃ vaipaścimāyāṃ tuuttarāyāṃ sruvaṃ tathā
āgneyyāṃ cabrasīṃ dadyānnair ṛtyāṃ pāduketathā
vāyavyāṃ yogapaṭṭaṃ caśānyāṃ cagalanti kām
viṣṇustupūrvataḥ pūjyodakṣiṇecāpiśaṅkaraḥ
madhyesvayaṃ padmajanmāsāvitrīdakṣiṇetathā
uttare caiva gāyatrīdevīpadmadalekṣaṇā
ṛgvedaṃ pūrvatonyasyayajurvedaṃ cadakṣiṇe
itihāsapurāṇāni cchaṃ dojyautiṣameva ca
dharmaśāstrāṇicānyāni indrādidikṣuvinyaset
pūrvatovāmadevaṃ casadyojātaṃ tudakṣiṇe
īśānaṃ paścimesthāpyatatpuruṣaṃ cottaretathā
aghoraḥ sarvataḥ pūjya eṣāpūjātumaṇḍale
pūrvatobhāskaraṃ pūjyadakṣiṇenadivākaraṃ
evaṃ pūjyavidhānenabrahmāṇaṃ parameśvaram
diṅmaṇḍaletuvinyasyaaṣṭaukuṃ bhānvidhānataḥ
śrīkāmaṃ vaiṣṇavenehakalaśenatupārthiva
rājyārthinaṃ snāpayeccadreṇakalaśenatu
dravyapratāpakāmaṃ tuāgneyaghaṭavāriṇā
mṛtyuṃ jayavidhānāyayāmyenasnāpayennaram
duṣṭapradhvaṃ sanāyālaṃ nair ṛtenavidhīyate
snāpayedvāruṇenāśupāpanāśāyamānavaṃ
śarīrārogyakāmaṃ tuvāyavyenābhiṣecayet
raudreṇajñānakāmasyalokapālaghaṭāstvime
jāyatebrahmasadṛśorājāsadyo'thavānaraḥ
athavādikṣusarvāsuyathāsaṅkhyenalokapān
evaṃ sampūjyadevāṃ stulokapālānprasannadhīḥ
paścātparīkṣitānśiṣyānbaddhanetrānpraveśayet
dagdhvāgneyyādhāraṇayāvāyunāvidhunettataḥ
somenāpyāyitānkṛtvāśrāvayetsamayāṃ stataḥ
naniṃ dyādbrāhmaṇāndevānviṣṇuṃ brahmāṇameva ca
indramādityamagniṃ calokapālāngrahāṃ stathā
guruṃ cabrāhmaṇaṃ vāpimunīṃ draṃ pūrvadīkṣitam
evaṃ tusamayānśrāvyapaścāddhomaṃ tukārayet
ūṃ ṃ namobhagavatebrahmaṇesarvarūpiṇehuṃ phaṭsvāhā
ṣoḍaśākṣaramantreṇahomayejjvalitenale
garbhādhānādikāḥ sarvā āhutīḥ sampradāpayet
homāṃ te dīkṣitaḥ paścād dāpayed gurudakṣiṇām
hastyaśvayānaśakaṭahemadhānyādikaṃ nṛpa
evaṅkṛtetuyatpuṇyaṃ mahatsaṃ jāyatetathā
dīkṣitothapurābhūtvāpādmaṃ vaiśṛṇuyādyadi
tenavedāḥ purāṇāni sarvamantrāḥ sasaṅgrahāḥ
japtāḥ syuḥ puṣkaretīrtheprayāgesiṃ dhusāgare
devahradekurukṣetrevārāṇasyāṃ viśeṣataḥ
phalaṃ śataguṇaṃ taccapuṣkarasthaṃ pitāmaham
dṛṣṭvā prāpnotivividhānkāmānkāmayateyadi
pūjāṃ vaidhāni kīṅkṛtvādīkṣitoyaḥ śṛṇotica
dīkṣitāś ca bhaviṣyāmaḥ pādmaṃ śroṣyāmahekadā
pādmaṃ tuṣoḍaśātmānaṃ nyasyadehekadāvayam
brahmayajṣaṃ cakārtikyāṅkadādrakṣyāmahe nṛpa
yaścemaṃ śṛṇuyāc caiva sarvemuktā itiśrutiḥ
yenalakṣmīrdhṛtistuṣṭiḥ puṣṭiścāpibhavennṛṇām
sarvegrahāḥ sadāsaumyājāyaṃ teyenapārthiva
ādityavāraṃ hastenapūrvamādāyabhaktitaḥ
ādityaṃ caiva sauvarṇaṅkṛtvāyatnenamānavaḥ
ghṛtenasnapanaṅkṛtvā sampūrṇāṅgadvijātaye
dāpayetkṛtyaviduṣebrāhmaṇāyaviśeṣataḥ
avisaṃvādinīceyaṃ śāṃ tipuṣṭipradānṛṇām
tadvaccitrāsusaṅgṛhyasomavāraṃ vicakṣaṇaḥ
rātribhakṣaḥ kṣipedaṣṭausomavārānprayatnataḥ
pratyekaṃ brāhmaṇābhojyāyathāśaktivicakṣaṇāḥ
navametutataḥ pūrṇekuryādbrāhmaṇabhojanam
kāṃ syabhājanasaṃ sthaṃ tukṣīra sampūritaṃ tataḥ
sampūrṇāṅgāyadātavyaṃ brāhmaṇāyaviśeṣataḥ
svātyāmaṅgārakaṃ pūjyakṣapayennaktabhojanaiḥ
aṣṭāvevaṃ cayāvaccakuryādbrāhmaṇabhojanam
aṅgārakaṃ casauvarṇaṃ sthāpitaṃ tāmrabhājane
dāpayedbrāhmaṇāyātha sampūrṇāṅgāya caiva hi
aṣṭametukramātkheṭānsauvarṇāndāpayedbudhaḥ
agnikāryaṃ cakurvītayathādṛṣṭaṃ vidhānataḥ
sarverogāvinaśyantituṣṭimāyāntidevatāḥ
duḥ svapnanāśobhavatiśṛṇvatāṃ paṭhatāṃ tathā
ketuś ca mūrdhnitiṣṭhanti raudrāḥ pīḍākarāgrahāḥ
tasyasānugrahāḥ sarveśāṃ tiṃ yacchanti nānyathā
śanaiś ca raṃ rāhuketūlohapātreṣu vinyaset
kṛṣṇaṃ vastrayugaṃ deyameteṣāṃ prīṇanāyavai
sauvarṇāṅgāś ca dātavyāḥ śāṃ tiśrīvijayepsubhiḥ
vratāṃ tesarva etehigrahāḥ sauvarṇakā nṛpa
dātavyāḥ śāṃ timicchadbhir vratāṃ tedvijabhojanam
yathāśaktidakṣiṇācagrahāṇāṃ prītayetathā
alpāyāsenarājendrasarvānkāmānavāpnuyāt
śaṅkarājjñānamanvicchedārogyaṃ bhāskarāttathā
brāhmyaṃ pitāmahāc caiva sarvajantupraśāṃ tidam
bhīṣma uvāca
tathāyuṣaḥ svalpatayā anyaiḥ prāptuṃ naśakyate
svalyāyāsenayatpuṇyaṃ saṃ vatsaramupoṣajam
idamarthaṃ mahārājaśvetorājāmahāyaśāḥ
vasiṣṭhaṃ pṛṣṭavānpraśnaṅkṣudhayāpīḍitobhṛśam
āsīdilāvṛtevarṣeśvetorājāmahābalaḥ
samahīṃ sakalāṃ jigyesaptadvipāṃ sapattanām
brahmaputrovasiṣṭhaś ca āsīttasyapurohitaḥ
sakadācin nṛpaśreṣṭhojitvāparamadhārmikaḥ
purohitam uvācedaṃ vasiṣṭhaṃ japatāṃ varam
śveta uvāca
suvarṇarūpyaratnānāṃ dānaṅkartuṃ dvijātiṣu
pṛthivyāmannadānaṃ tudātunnecchāmivaiguro
raktavastramalaṅkāraṅgrāmāṃ ś ca nagarāṇica
adadādbrāhmaṇebhyo 'sauśvetorājāmahāyaśāḥ
nānnaṃ jalaṃ tenarājṣādattamāsītkadācana
brāhmīṃ salokatāṃ prāptaḥ sarvālaṅkārabhūṣitaḥ
agāyetāṃ mahāprājṣaumunayaś ca taponvitāḥ
kṣudhāyāpīḍyatedehaṃ tṛṣṇayācaviśeṣataḥ
satayāpīḍyamānastukṣudhayārājasattamaḥ
vimānenāpyasausvargaṃ tyaktvāgādṛkṣaparvatam
yatrātmamūrtistatrāgātpurādagdhāmahāvane
tatrāsthīnisvayaṅgṛhyalihannāstesapārthivaḥ
punarvimānamāruhyayayaunākaṃ narādhipaḥ
athakālenamahatāsarājāsaṃ śitavrataḥ
svānyasthīnilihandṛṣṭovasiṣṭhenapurodhasā
evamuktastatorājāvasiṣṭhenamaharṣiṇā
uvācavacanaṃ cedaṃ śvetorājāthataṃ munim
bhagavaṃ stṛṭkṣudhārtohamannadānaṃ purāmayā
nadattaṃ muniśārdūlatenamāṅkṣutprabādhate
evamuktastadārājāvasiṣṭhomunipuṅgavaḥ
uvācataṃ nṛpaṃ bhūyovākyametanmahāmuniḥ
kiṃ tekaromirājendrakṣudhitasyaviśeṣataḥ
annadānapradānenasarvakāmaiḥ pradīpitaḥ
tannadattaṃ tvayārājanstokaṃ matvānarādhipaḥ
śveta uvāca
vasiṣṭhatvatprasādenatanmamācakṣvapṛcchataḥ
vasiṣṭha uvāca
astyekaṅkāraṇaṃ yenajāyatenātrasaṃśayaḥ
tacchṛṇuṣvanaravyāghrakathyamānaṃ mayātava
āsīdrājāpurākalpevinītāśvetikīrtitaḥ
sacāśvamedhamārebheyajṣaṅkartuṃ varaṃ nṛpaḥ
nānnaṃ dattaṃ tenakiṃ citsvalpaṃ matvāyathātvayā
tataḥ kālenamahatāmṛtosaujāhnavītaṭe
māyāpuryāṃ vinītāśvaḥ sārvabhaumo'bhavan nṛpaḥ
asāvapikṣudhāviṣṭa evamevāgatobhavat
martyaloke nadītīre gaṅgāyāṃ nīlaparvate
vimānenārkavarṇenabhāsvatādevavan nṛpa
hotāraṃ brāhmaṇaṃ nāmayajaṃ taṃ jāhnavītaṭe
taṃ dṛṣṭvā sāvapipunaḥ paryapṛcchaddvijottamam
kṣudhāyāḥ kāraṇaṃ rājansahotātam uvāca ha
dehiśīghraṃ yenabhavāṃ stṛṭkṣudhāvarjitodivi
evamuktastatorājātaṃ punaḥ pṛṣṭavāni dam
dhenuḥ syātṣoḍaśāḍhakyacaturbhir vatsakobhavet
ikṣudaṇḍamayāḥ pādādantāḥ puṣpamayāḥ śubhāḥ
nāsāgandhamayītasyājihvāguḍamayītathā
pucchesrakkalpanīyāsyādghaṃ ṭābharaṇabhūṣitā
īdṛśīṅkalpayitvātusvarṇaśṛṅgīṃ tukalpayet
raupyakhurāṅkāṃ syadohāṃ pūrvadhenuvidhānataḥ
kṛtvātāṃ brāhmaṇāyāśudāpayenmantrato nṛpa
sthitāṅkṛṣṇājinedhenuṃ vāsobhir gopitāṃ śubhām
sūtreṇāsūtritāṅkṛtvāpaṣcaratnasamanvitām
sarvauṣadhisamāyuktāṃ mantrapūtāṃ tudāpayet
annammejāyatāṃ sadyaḥ pānaṃ sarvarasāstathā
