tepiyānti paraṃ sthānaṃ sarvevarṇādvijātayaḥ
vaiśyavṛttiṃ vaṇigbhāvaṅkṛṣiṃ caiva tathāparaiḥ
kārayetkṛṣivāṇijyaṃ viprakarmanacatyajet
vaṇigbhāvānmṛṣātyuktaudurgatiṃ prāpnuyāddvijaḥ
samutpādyatatovṛttiṃ dadyādviprāyasarvaśaḥ
evaṃ mithyānakarttavyāmṛṣāpāpaprasūtikā
nāstisatyātparodharmonānṛtātpātakaṃ param
ataḥsarveṣu kāryeṣu satyamevaviśiṣyate
vāṇijyaṅkārayedvipromithyā'vaśyaṃ parityajet
vṛddhiṃ canikṣipettīrthesvayaṃ śeṣaṃ tubhojayet
kāṃ tāramaṭavīṃ caiva śvāpadaiḥsevitāṃ tathā
giriṅgiriguhāṃ durgāṃ mlecchānāṃ śastrapātinām
gṛhaṃ pratibhayaṃ sthānaṃ dhanalobhātsamaṃ tataḥ
skaṃ dhebhāraṃ vahaṃ tyanyetaryāṃ cakrenipātanaiḥ
kṣepaṇībhir mahāduḥkhaiḥ sadāprāṇavyayenaca
ebhir nyāyārjitaṃ vittaṃ vaṇigbhāvenayatnataḥ
pitṛdevadvijātibhyo dattaṃ cākṣayamaśnute
etaudoṣaumahāṃ taucavāṇijyelābhakarmaṇi
lobhānām aparityāgomṛṣāgrāhyaś ca vikrayaḥ
akṣayaṃ labhatedānādvaṇigdoṣair nalipyate
puṇyakarmaratovipraḥkṛṣiṃ hiparikārayet
vāhayeddivasasyārdhaṃ balīvardacatuṣṭayam
abhāvāttritayaṃ caiva aviśrāmaṃ nakārayet
dadyādghāsaṃ yatheṣṭaṃ canityamātarpayetsvayam
ātmanaḥśayanīyasyasadṛśaṅkārayedbudhaḥ
samaṃ nirvāpayedyatnācchītavātarajastathā
prāṇasyasadṛśaṃ paśyedgāṃ casāmānyavigraham
anenavidhināyastukṛṣikarmāṇikārayet
atibālātivṛddhaṃ casagohatyāṃ samālabhet
viṣamaṃ vāhayed yas tu durbalaṃ sabalaṃ tathā
sagohatyāsamaṃ pāpaṃ prāpnotīhana saṃśayaḥ
yovāhayedvināsasyaṅkhādaṃ taṅgāṃ nivārayet
mohāttṛṇaṃ jalaṃ vāpisagohatyāsamaṃ labhet
saṅkrāṃ tyāṃ paurṇamāsyāṃ cāmāvāsyāyāṃ tathaiva ca
halasyavāhanātpāpaṅgavāmayutahatyayā
amūṣupūjayed yas tu sitaiścitrādibhir naraḥ
ghāsamuṣṭiṃ paragaveyodadātisadāhnikam
yathāviprastathāgauś ca dvayoḥpūjāphalaṃ samam
vicārebrāhmaṇomukhyonṛṇāṅgāvaḥpaśau tathā
nārada uvāca
śṛṇucātrayathātathyaṃ brāhmaṇānāṅgavāṃ yathā
ekapiṇḍakriyaikyaṃ tupuruṣair nirmitaṃ purā
purābrahmamukhodbhūtaṅkūṭaṃ tejomayaṃ mahat
tatra sṛṣṭāmayācādauvedāś ca tvāra ekaśaḥ
sthityarthaṃsarvalokānāṃ bhuvanānāṃ samaṃ tataḥ
ājyaṅgoprabhavaṃ viddhitasmād eteprasūtakāḥ
tadākhilaṃ cabhuvanaṃ naṣṭaṃ sthāvarajaṅgamam
ebhir dhṛtāḥsadālokāḥpratiṣṭhanti svabhāvataḥ
svabhāvobrahmarūposāvetebrahmamayāḥsmṛtāḥ
udāraḥsarvakāryeṣu jātastathyoguṇākaraḥ
sarvadevamayaḥsākṣātsarvasatvānukaṃ pakaḥ
asyakāryaṃ mayāsṛṣṭaṃ puraivapoṣaṇaṃ prati
pāpasyakaṇamātraṃ tuteṣāṃ dehenatiṣṭhati
devīgaurdhenukādevāścādidevītriśaktikā
prasādādyasyayajṣānāṃ prabhavohiviniścitaḥ
amīṣāṃ bhakṣaṇepāpaṃ natiṣṭhatikalevare
tasmād ghṛtaṃ dadhikṣīraṃ nityaṅkhādanti dhārmikāḥ
viśiṣṭaṃ sarvadravyeṣu gavyamiṣṭaṃ paraṃ śubham
yasyāsyebhojanaṃ nāstitasyamūrtistupūtikā
annādyaṃ paṣcarātreṇa saptarātreṇa vai payaḥ
dadhiviṃśatirātreṇa ghṛtaṃ syān māsam ekakam
paramānnaṃ paraṃ śuddhaṃsvinnaṃ cātapataṇḍulaiḥ
bhuktvātuyatkṛtaṃ puṇyaṅkoṭikoṭiguṇaṃ bhavet
tadbhuktavāyatkṛtaṅkarmasarvaṃ lakṣaguṇaṃ bhavet
sarvadāsarvakāmeṣu dharmakāmārthamokṣadaḥ
nārada uvāca
keṣu kiṃ vāprayogeṇaparaṃ puṇyaṃ prakīrtitaṃ
sakṛtpradakṣiṇaṅkṛtvāgodhanaṃ cābhivaṃ dayet
surācāryoyathāvaṃ dyaḥpūjyosaumādhavoyathā
saptapradakṣiṇaṅkṛtvācaiśvaryātpākaśāsanaḥ
niṣiṃ cedyogavāṃ śṛṅgaṃ mastakenaivatajjalam
śrūyaṃ teyāni tīrthāni triṣulokeṣu nārada
siddhacāraṇayuktāni sevitāni maharṣibhiḥ
abhiṣekaḥ samasteṣāṅgavāṃ śṛṅgodakasyaca
prātarutthāyayomartyaḥspṛśedgāṃ caghṛtaṃ madhu
sarṣapāṃ ś ca priyaṅgūṃ ś ca kalmaṣātpratimucyate
ghṛtakṣīrapradāgāvoghṛtayonyoghṛtodbhavāḥ
ghṛtanadyoghṛtāvartāstāmesaṃ tusadāgṛhe
gāvomamāgratonityaṅgāvaḥpṛṣṭhata eva ca
gāvaś ca sarvagātreṣu gavāṃ madhyevasāmy aham
ityācamyajapenmantraṃ sāyaṃ prātaridaṃ śuciḥ
hariryathātathāgaṅgā etenahyavṛṣāḥsmṛtāḥ
gāvobandhurmanuṣyāṇāṃ manuṣyābāndhavāgavām
gomukhecāśritāvedāḥsaṣaḍaṅgapadakramāḥ
udare'vasthitaḥskaṃ daḥśīrṣebrahmāsthitaḥsadā
vṛṣaddhvajolalāṭecaśṛṅgāgraindra eva ca
karṇayoraśvinaudevaucakṣuṣośśaśibhāskarau
daṃ teṣu garuḍodevojihvāyāṃ casarasvatī
apānesarvatīrthāni prasrāve caiva jāhnavī
ṛṣayoromakūpeṣu mukhataḥpṛṣṭhatoyamaḥ
dhanadovaruṇaś caiva dakṣiṇaṃ pārśvamāśritau
vāmapārśvesthitāyakṣāstejasvanto mahābalāḥ
khurāṇāṃ paścimepārśve'psarasaś ca samāśritāḥ
pādāgrekhecarāvedyāhaṃ bhāśabdeprajāpatiḥ
catvāraḥsāgarāḥpūrṇādhenūnāṃ castaneṣu vai
gāṃ caspṛśatiyonityaṃ snātobhavatinityaśaḥ
gavāṃ rajaḥkhuroddhūtaṃ śirasāyastudhārayet
nārada uvāca
gavāṃ cadaśavarṇānāṅkasyadānecakiṃ phalam
brūhi tattvaṅguruśreṣṭhaparameṣṭhinpriyaṃ yadi
śvetāṅgāṃ brāhmaṇedatvāmānavaśceśvarobhavet
dhumrātusvargakāṃ tārasaṃsārepāpamokṣiṇī
akṣayaṅkapilādānaṅkṛṣṇāṃ datvānasīdati
pāṇḍurādurlabhālokegaurīcakulanaṃ dinī
raktākṣīrūpakāmasyadhanakāmasyanīlikā
ekāṃ cakapilāṃ datvāsarvapāpaiḥpramucyate
yattubālyakṛtaṃ pāpaṃ yauvanevārdhakekṛtam
vācākṛtaṅkarmakṛtaṃ manasāyatpraciṃ titaṃ
mānakūṭaṃ tulākūṭaṅkanyānṛtaṅgavānṛtam
sarvaṃ canāśayetkṣipraṅkapilāṃ yaḥprayacchati
daśayojanavistīrṇāmahāpārāmahānadī
nārācajalakāṃ tāreprasṛtecodakārṇave
tāvadgauḥpṛthivījṣeyāyāvadgarbhaṃ namuṃ cati
suvarṇaśṛṅgīṃ vastrāḍhyāṃ sarvālaṅkārabhūṣitām
tāmrapṛṣṭhīṃ raupyakhurāṃ tathākāṃ syopadohanām
śobhitāṅgandhapuṣpaiś ca sarvālaṅkārabhūṣitāṃ
īdṛśīṅkapilāṃ dadyāddvijātauvedapārage
tasyāṃ tuduhyamānāyāṃ bhūmaupatanti viṃ davaḥ
ārāmādivijāyaṃ tebahupuṣpaphalottamāḥ
yatra kāmaphalāvṛkṣānadyaḥpāyasakardamāḥ
prāsādāścāpisauvarṇās tatra gacchanti gopradāḥ
daśadhenūś ca yodadyādekaṃ caiva dhuraṃ dharaṃ
samānaṃ tuphalaṃ proktaṃ brahmaṇāsamudāhṛtam
ekaṃ cadaśabhir dadyātsahasrāṇāṃ śataṃ phalam
tasyānusāratovedyaṃ phalaṃ nāradayatnataḥ
pitṝnuddiśyayaḥputrovṛṣaṃ camokṣayedbhuvi
mokṣyaṃ tesarvataḥputravidhireṣasanātanaḥ
yāvanti caiva romāṇitasyatāsāṃ casarvaśaḥ
tāvadvarṣasahasrāṇisvargaṃ bhujanti mānavāḥ
lāṅgūlenavṛṣoyaccajalaṃ cotkṣipatidhruvaṃ
tattoyaṃ tusahasrābdaṃ pitṝṇāmamṛtaṃ bhavet
khureṇakarṣayedbhūmiṃ tatoloṣṭhaṃ cakardamaḥ
pitṛbhyaś ca svadhā tatra lakṣakoṭiguṇaṃ bhavet
caṃ danenāṅkitādhenustasyāḥsvargāyadīyate
dātā caiva pitṝṇāṃ caṛṇaṃ caiva pramuṃ cati
akṣayaṃ labhatesvargaṃ pūjitomaghavāyathā
sarvalakṣaṇasaṃ yuktātaruṇāgauḥpayasvinī
samāprasūtikābhadrāsācagauḥpṛthivīsmṛtā
gavāṃ caharaṇaṅkṛtvāmṛtegorathavatsake
krimipūrṇesakūpecatiṣṭhedābhūta samplavaṃ
gavāṃ caiva vadhaṅkṛtvāpitṛbhiḥsahapacyate
gopracāraprabhagnaś ca ṣaṇḍavāhanabandhanaḥ
sakṛccaśrāvayed yas tu kathāṃ puṇyatamāmimāṃ
yaidaṃ śṛṇuyādvāpiparaṃ puṇyatamaṃ mahat
saptajanmakṛtātpāpānmucyatetatkṣaṇena hi
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe prathame sṛṣṭikhaṇḍe gomāhātmyaṃ nāmāṣṭacatvāriṃ śattamo'dhyāyaḥ
ekonapaṣcāśo'dhyāyaḥ
nārada uvāca
kenācāreṇatasyaivabrāhmaṃ tejovinaśyati
śayanīyātsamutthāyarātryaṃ śedvijasattamaḥ
goviṃ daṃ mādhavaṅkṛṣṇaṃ hariṃ dāmodaraṃ tathā
nārāyaṇaṃ jagannāthaṃ vāsudevamajaṃ vibhum
sarasvatīṃ mahālakṣmīṃ sāvitrīṃ vedamātaram
brahmāṇaṃ bhāskaraṃ candraṃ dikpālāṃś ca grahāṃs tathā
śaṅkaraṃ ca śivaṃ śambhum īśvaraṃ ca maheśvaram
gaṇeśaṃ ca tathā skandaṃ gaurīṃ bhāgīrathīṃ śivām
puṇyaśloko nalo rājā puṇyaśloko janārdanaḥ
puṇyaślokā ca vede hī puṇyaśloko yudhiṣṭhiraḥ
aśvatthāmā balir vyāso hanūmāṃś ca vibhīṣaṇaḥ
kṛpaḥparaśurāmaś ca saptaitecīrajīvinaḥ
brahmahatyādibhiḥpāpair mucyatenātrasaṃśayaḥ
gavāṃ śatasahasrāṇāṃ dānasyaphalamaśnute
tataścāpiśucaudeśemalamūtraṃ parityajet
dakṣiṇābhimukhorātraudivākuryādudaṅmukhaḥ
paratodaṃ takāṣṭhaṃ catṛṇair uduṃ barādibhiḥ
ataḥparaṃ casaṃ dhyāyāṃ saṃ yataś ca dvijobhavet
pūrvāhṇeraktavarṇāṃ tumadhyāhneśuklavarṇikām
sāyaṃ sarasvatīṅkṛṣṇāṃ dvijodhyāyedyathāvidhi
tataḥsamācaretsnānaṃ yathājṣānenayatnataḥ
aṅgaṃ prakṣālayitvātumṛdbhiḥsaṃ lepayettataḥ
śirodeśelalāṭecanāsikāyāṃ hṛdibhruvoḥ
bāhvoḥpārśvetathānābhaujānvoraṅghridvayetathā
ubhayoḥsaptadātavyāmṛdaḥśuddhimabhīpsatā
aśvakrāṃ terathakrāṃ teviṣṇukrāṃ tevasuṃ dhare
mṛttikeharamepāpaṃ yanmayāpūrvasaṃ citam
tatas tuvedapūrveṇasnānaṅkuryādvicakṣaṇaḥ
nadenadyāṃ tathākūpepuṣkariṇyāṃ taṭākake
prātaḥsnānaṃ mahāpuṇyaṃ sarvapāpapraṇāśanam
yaḥkuryātsatataṃ viproviṣṇuloke mahīyate
prātaḥsaṃ dhyāsamīpecayāvaddaṇḍacatuṣṭayam
tāvatpānīyamamṛtaṃ pitṝṇāmupatiṣṭhate
paratoghaṭikāyugmaṃ yāvadyāmaikamāhnikam
madhutulyaṃ jalaṃ tasminpitṝṇāṃ prītivardhanam
tatas tusārddhayāmaikaṃ jalaṅkṣīramayaṃ smṛtam
kṣīramiśraṃ jalaṃ tāvadyāvaddaṇḍacatuṣṭayam
ataḥparaṃ capānīyaṃ yāvaddhipraharatrayam
tattoyaṃ rakṣasāmevagrahaṇenavināsmṛtam
rakṣārthaṃ tasyatoyasyayakṣāś caiva dhuraṃ dharāḥ
naprāpnuvanti pitaroyecalokāṃ taraṅgatāḥ
duṣprāpyaṃ salilaṃ teṣāmṛtesvānmartyavāsinaḥ
bandhuvargaistathācānyaistarpaṇīyaṃ pitṛvrataiḥ
nārada uvāca
jalasyadevatāviṣṇuḥ sarvalokeṣu gīyate
jalaṅgaṇḍūṣamātraṃ tupītvāpūtobhavennaraḥ
viśeṣātkuśasaṃ sargātpīyūṣādadhikaṃ jalam
kuśamūlebhavedbrahmākuśamadhyetukeśavaḥ
kuśāgreśaṅkaraṃ viddhikuśa etepratiṣṭhitāḥ
kuśahastaḥsadāmedhyaḥstotraṃ mantraṃ paṭhedyadi
sarvaṃśataguṇaṃ proktaṃ tīrthesāhasramucyate
kuśāḥkāśāstathādūrvāyavapatrāṇivrīhayaḥ
balvajāḥpuṇḍarīkāś ca kuśāḥ saptaprakīrtitāḥ
ānupūrvyeṇamedhyāḥsyuḥkuśālokepratiṣṭhitāḥ
vināmantreṇayatsnānaṃ sarvaṃ tanniṣphalaṃ bhavet
amṛtātsvādutāmetisaṃ sparśāccatilasyaca
daśabhiś ca tilaistāvatpitṝṇāṃ prītiruttamā
nīlapaṇḍavimokṣeṇatvam āvāsyātilodakaiḥ
varṣāsudīpadānenapitṝṇāmanṛṇobhavet
uktaṃ yadvāpyamāyāṃ tutasmācchataguṇādhikam
ayaneviṣuve caiva rākāmāyāṃ tathaiva ca
tathāmanvaṃ tarākhyāyāmanyasyāṃ puṇyasaṃ sthitau
grahaṇecandrasūryasyapuṇyatīrthegayādiṣu
tasmāt puṇyāhakaṃ prāpyatarpayetpitṛsaṃ cayam
tarpaṇaṃ devatānāṃ capūrvaṅkṛtvāsamāhitaḥ
adhikārībhavetpaścātpitṝṇāṃ tarpaṇebudhaḥ
śrāddhebhojanakālecapāṇinaikenadāpayet
ubhābhyāṃ tarpaṇedadyādvidhireṣasanātanaḥ
dakṣiṇābhimukhobhūtvāśucistutarpayetpitṝn
tṛpyatāmitivākyenanāmagotreṇavaipunaḥ
bhūmyāṃ dadātiyadapodātā caiva jalesthitaḥ
vṛthātaddīyatedānaṃ nopatiṣṭhatikasyacit
nopatiṣṭhetpitṝṇāṃ tusalilaṃ tannirarthakam
rajakaiḥkṣālitaṃ vastramaśuddhaṅkavayoviduḥ
śuṣkavāsāḥśucaudeśesthāneyattarpayetpitṝn
snānaṃ saṃ dhyāṃ capāṣāṇekhaḍgevātāmrabhājane
raupyāṅgulīyaṃ tarjanyāṃ dhṛtvāyattarpayetpitṝn
sarvaṃ caśatasāhasraguṇaṃ bhavatinānyathā
tathaivānām ikāyāṃ tudhṛtvāsvarṇāṅgulīṃ budhaḥ
tarpayetpitṛsaṃ dohaṃ lakṣakoṭiguṇaṃ bhavet
dhṛtvānām ikayāratnamaṃ jalerakṣayaṃ phalaṃ
snānārthamabhigacchaṃ taṃ devāḥpitṛgaṇaiḥsaha
vāyubhūtānugacchanti tṛṣārtāḥsalilārthinaḥ
nirāśāstenivartaṃ tevastraniṣpīḍanenaca
tasmānnapīḍayedvastramakṛtvāpitṛtarpaṇam
tisraḥkoṭyo'rdhakoṭīcayāni lomāni mānuṣe
devāḥpibanti śirasiśmaśrutaḥpitarastathā
devāḥpitṛgaṇāḥsarvegandharvājaṃ tavastathā
snānamātreṇatuṣyanti snānātpāpaṃ navidyate
nityasnānaṃ cayaḥkuryātsanaraḥpuruṣottamaḥ
snānantarpaṇaparyaṃ taṃ devāmaharṣayoviduḥ
ataḥparaṃ cadevānāṃ pūjanaṅkārayedbudhaḥ
ārogyārthaṃ casūryaṃ cadharmamokṣāyamādhavam
śivaṃ cakṛtyakāmārthaṃsarvakāmāya caṇḍikām
devāṃ stupūjayitvātuvaiśvadevabaliṃ caret
vahnikāryaṃ tataḥkṛtvāyajṣaṃ brāhmaṇatarpaṇam
devānāṃ sarvasatvānāṃ punastriviṣṭapaṃ vrajet
gatāgataṃ sthiraṅkṛtvākāmānmokṣaṃ sukhaṃ divam
nārada uvāca
kim arthaṃ cajalaṃ tātadevāḥpitṛgaṇaiḥsaha
naprāpnuvanti sarvajṣalabhaṃ temānavāyathā
purāsṛṣṭaṃ mayātoyaṃ sarvadevamayāmṛtam
tasyaivarakṣaṇārthaṃ carakṣāyakṣādhanurdharāḥ
paśavaḥpakṣiṇaḥkīṭāmartyalokevyavasthitāḥ
martyajātāś ca devāyetathaivamānuṣādhruvam
tarpayitvāguruṃ nityaṃ suralokepratiṣṭhitāḥ
asnāyīcamalaṃ bhuṅkte ajapīpūyaśoṇitam
akṛtvātarpaṇaṃ nityaṃ pitṛhācopajāyate
brahmahatyāsamaṃ pāpaṃ devānām apyapūjane
sandhyākṛtyamakṛtvācasūryaṃ hanti capāpakṛt
nārada uvāca
brāhmaṇasyasadācārakramaṃ brūhi cakarmaṇām
itareṣāṃ cavarṇānāṃ pravṛttamakhilaṃ vada
ācārāllabhatecāyurācārāllabhatesukham
ācārātsvargaṃ mokṣaṃ ca ācārohaṃ tyalakṣaṇam
duḥkhabhāgīcasatataṃ vyādhitolpāyureva ca
ācārāccaparaṃ lokamācāraṃ śṛṇutattvataḥ
prakṣālayettataḥpīṭhaṅkāṣṭhaṃ pātraṃ śilātalam
bhasmanākāṃ syapātraṃ tutāmramamlenaśuddhyati
śilāpātraṃ tutailenaphālaṅgovālakenatu
svarṇaraupyādipātraṃ tujalamātreṇaśudhyati
agninālohapātraṃ tupākaprakṣālanenatu
taijaḥ sānāṃ maṇīnāṃ casarvasyāśmamayasyaca
bhasmabhir mṛttikābhiś ca śuddhiruktāmayāpurā
śayyābhāryāśiśurvastramupavītaṅkamaṇḍaluḥ
ātmanaḥkathitāśśuddhānapareṣāṅkadācana
nabhuṃ jītaikavastreṇanasnāyādekavāsasā
saṃ skāraṅkeśadaṃ tānāṃ prātarevasamācaret
gurūṇāṃ canamaskāraṃ nityamevasamācaret
paJcārdrakastubhuṃ jānaḥśataṃ varṣāṇijīvati
devatānāṅgurorājṣāṃ snātakācāryayorapi
nākrāmetkāmataśchāyāṃ viprasyadīkṣitasyaca
gogaṇaṃ devataṃ vipraṅghṛtaṃ madhucatuṣpatham
pradakṣiṇaṃ prakurvītaprakhyātāṃ ś ca vanaspatīn
ucchiṣṭonaspṛśedagniṃ brāhmaṇaṃ daivataṅgurum
svaśīrṣaṃ puṣpavṛkṣaṃ cayajṣavṛkṣamadhārmikam
trīṇitejāṃ sinocchiṣṭaudīkṣetakadācana
sūryācandramasāvevaṃ nakṣatrāṇicasarvaśaḥ
nekṣedvipraṅguruṃ devaṃ rājānaṃ yatināṃ varam
yoginaṃ devakarmāṇaṃ dharmāṇāṃ kathakaṃ dvijam
nadīnāṃ capratīrecapatyuś ca saritāṃ tathā
yajṣavṛkṣasyamūlecaudyānepuṣpavāṭake
śarīrasyamalatyāgaṃ nakuryājjīvanetathā
nakṣauraṅkārayeddhīraḥ kujasyāhnikadācana
svagātrāsanayorvādyaṅgurorekāsanādanam
rājṣastapasvināṃ caiva paṅgoraṃ dhasyayoṣitaḥ
paṃ thādeyobrāhmaṇāyagobhyo rājabhya eva ca
brāhmaṇaṅgurupatnīṃ cadūrataḥparivarjayet
patitaṅkuṣṭhasaṃ yuktaṃ cāṇḍālaṃ cagavāśinam
nirdhūtaṃ jñānahīnaṃ cadūrataḥparivarjayet
striyaṃ duṣṭāṃ cadurvṛttāmapavādapradāyinīm
kukarmakāriṇīṃ duṣṭāṃ sadaivakalahapriyām
pramattāmadhikāṅgīṣcanirlajjāṃ bāhyacāriṇīm
vyayaśīlāmanācārāṃ dūrataḥparivarjayet
malināṃ nābhivaṃ detagurupatnīṅkadācana
naspṛśettāṃ camedhāvīspṛṣṭvāsnānenaśuddhyati
śṛṇuyāccavaconūnaṃ napaśyeccaguroḥstriyam
vadhūṃ putrasyabhrātuś ca svaputrīṃ yuvatīṃ dhruvam
anyāṃ cagurupatnīṃ canekṣetsparśaṃ nakārayet
tābhiḥsahakathālāpaṃ tathābhrūbhaṅgadarśanam
kalahaṃ nistrapāṃ vāṇīṃ sadaivaparivarjayet
nadadyāccasadāpādaṃ tuṣāṅgārāsthibhasmasu
kārpāsāsthiṣunirmālyecitikāṣṭhecitaugurau
śuṣkaṃ mīnaṃ nabhakṣetapūtigandhimamedhyakam
vighasaṃ cānyaducchiṣṭaṃ pākārthaṃ caparasyaca
nasthātavyaṃ nagaṃ tavyaṅkṣaṇamapyasatāsaha
natiṣṭheccakṣaṇaṃ dhīrodīpacchāyekalidrume
aspṛśyaiḥ sahacālāpaṃ patitaiḥkupitaiḥsaha
nakuryātkṣaṇamātraṃ tukṛtvāgaccheccarauravam
kaniṣṭhaṃ nābhivaṃ detapitṛvyaṃ mātulaṃ tathā
utthāyacāsanaṃ dadyātkṛtāṃ jalyagrataḥsthitaḥ
pārāvāragatodvignaṃ vahaṃ taṃ nābhivādayet
yajṣasyāṃ targataṃ naṣṭaṅkrīḍaṃ taṃ strījanaiḥsaha
bālakrīḍāgataṃ cāpipuṣpayuktaṅkuśair yutam
śiraḥprāvṛtyakarṇauvā apsumuktaśikhopivā
akṛtvāpādayoḥpūjāṃ nācāmeddakṣiṇāmukhaḥ
madhyamābhir mukhaṃ pūrvanti sṛbhiḥsamupaspṛśet
aṅguṣṭhadeśinībhyāṃ canāsāṃ catadanantaram
aṅguṣṭhānām ikābhyāṃ cacakṣuṣīsamupaspṛśet
kaniṣṭhāṅguṣṭhataśśrotrenābhimaṅguṣṭhakenatu
bāhūcāgreṇasaṃ spṛśyatataḥśuddhobhavennaraḥ
anenācamanaṅkṛtvāmānavaḥprayatobhavet
prāṇastripuṭaśṛṅgyācavyānopānaś ca mudrayā
samānastusamastābhir udānastarjanīṃ vinā
nāgaḥkūrmaś ca kṛkarodevadattodhanaṃ jayaḥ
upaprīṇaṃ tuteprītāyebhyo bhūmaupradīyate
śayanaṃ cārdrapādenaśuṣkapādenabhojanam
nāṃ dhakārecaśayanaṃ bhojanaṃ naivakārayet
paścimedakṣiṇe caiva nakuryāddaṃ tadhāvanam
svapnādāyuḥkṣayaṃ yātibrahmahāpuruṣobhavet
nakurvītatataḥsvapnaṃ śastaṃ capūrvadakṣiṇam
āyuṣyaṃ prāṅmukhobhuṅkte'yaśasyaṃ dakṣiṇāmukhaḥ
śriyaṃ pratyaṅmukhobhuṅkteyaśobhuṅktaudaṅmukhaḥ
prācyāṃ narolabhedāyuryāmyāṃ pretatvam aśnute
nirāmiṣaṃ havirdevāmatsyamāṃ sādimānuṣāḥ
pūtiparyuṣitaṃ duṣṭamanyebhuṃ jaṃ tyanāvṛtāḥ
svargasthitānām ihajīvalokecatvāriteṣāṃ hṛdayecasanti
dānaṃ praśastaṃ madhurācavāṇīdevārcanaṃ brāhmaṇatarpaṇaṃ ca
kārpaṇyavṛttisvajaneṣu niṃ dākucelatānīcajaneṣu bhaktiḥ
atīvaroṣaḥkaṭukācavāṇīnarasyacihnaṃ narakāgatasya
navanītopamāvāṇīkaruṇākomalaṃ manaḥ
dharmabījaprasūtānām etatpratyakṣalakṣaṇam
pāpabījaprasūtānām etatpratyakṣalakṣaṇam
śrāvayecchṛṇuyādvāpisadācārādikaṃ naraḥ
ācārādeḥphalaṃ labdhvāpāpātpūto'cyutodivi
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe prathame sṛṣṭikhaṇḍe sadācāravarṇanaṃ nāmaikonapaṣcāśo'dhyāyaḥ
paṣcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ
bhīṣma uvāca
ekadātudvijāḥsarvevyāsaśiṣyāḥ sahādarāt
vyā sampraṇamyapapracchudharmaṃ māṃ cayathābhavān
dvijāūcuḥ
kiṅkṛtvāmānavā svargaṃ bhuṃ jatecākṣayaṃ vada
labhyaṃ cākaṣṭakaṃ śuddhaṃ varṇānāṃ martyavāsinām
gurūṇāṃ calaghūnāṃ casādhyam ekaṅkratuṃ vada
yadyatkṛtvācadevānāṃ pūjyonākebhavennaraḥ
vyāsa uvāca
paJcākhyānaṃ vadiṣyāmiśṛṇudhvaṃ tatra pūrvataḥ
paJcānām ekakaṅkṛtvāviṃ denmokṣaṃ divaṃ yaśaḥ
mitrādrohoviṣṇubhaktiretepaṣcamahāmakhāḥ
pitādharmaḥpitāsvargaḥpitāhiparamaṃ tapaḥ
pitariprītimāpanneprīyaṃ tesarvadevatāḥ
sarvatīrthamayīmātāsarvadevamayaḥpitā
pradakṣiṇīkṛtātenasaptadvīpāvasuṅgharā
jānunīcakarauyasyapitroḥpraṇamataḥśiraḥ
nipatanti pṛthivyāṃ casokṣayaṃ labhatedivaṃ
pratīkecavilagnāni tāvatpūtaḥsutastayoḥ
pādāraviṃ dasalilaṃ yaḥpitroḥpibatesutaḥ
tasyapāpakṣayaṃ yātijanmakoṭiśatārjitaṃ
rogiṇaṃ cāpivṛddhaṃ capitaraṃ vṛttikarśitam
aṃ tyajātiṣumleccheṣu cāṇḍāleṣv apijāyate
pitrorapoṣaṇaṅkṛtvāsarvapuṇyakṣayobhavet
kathayāmipurāvṛttaṃ viprāḥśṛṇutayatnataḥ
purāsīccadvijaḥkaścin narottamaitismṛtaḥ
tataḥsarvāṇitīrthāni gacchatobrāhmaṇasyaca
ākāśesnānacelāni praśuṣyanti dinedine
ahaṅkāro'viśattasyamānasebrāhmaṇasyaca
matsamonāstivaikaścit puṇyakarmāmahāyaśāḥ
papātacabakaḥpṛthvyāṃ sabhasmībhūtavigrahaḥ
bhīrdvijendraṃ mahāmohaḥprāviśaccāṃ takarmaṇi
gacchabāḍabacāṇḍālaṃ mūkaṃ paramadhārmikam
śuśrūṣaṃ taṃ capitarausarvāraṃ bhāndadarśasaḥ
dadataṃ śītakālecasamyaguṣṇaṃ jalaṃ tayoḥ
tailatāpanatāṃ būlaṃ tathātūlavatīṃ paṭīm
nityāśanaṃ camiṣṭānnaṃ dugdhakhaṇḍaṃ tathaiva ca
dāpayaṃ taṃ vasaṃ tecamadhumālāṃ sugandhikāṃ
anyāni yāni bhogyāni kṛtyāni vividhāni ca
uṣṇecāvījayatsopinityaṃ capitarāvapi
tatas tayoḥpracaryāṃ cakṛtvābhuṅktethasarvadā
śramasyavāraṇaṅkuryātsaṃ tāpasyatathaiva ca
aṃ tarikṣecakrīḍaṃ tamādhārastaṃ bhavarjite
viprarūpadharaṅkāṃ taṃ nānyair bhūtaṃ casatparam
tejomayaṃ mahāsatvaṃ śobhayaṃ taṃ camaṃ diraṃ
dṛṣṭvā vismayamāpannovipraḥprovācamūkakam
āsannaṃ camamāgacchatvayaivecchāmiśāśvataṃ
mūka uvāca
pitrorarcāṅkaromyadya kathamāyāmiteṃ tikaṃ
tiṣṭhamedvāradeśeca ātithyaṃ tekaromy aham
ityukte caiva cāṇḍālecukopabrāhmaṇastadā
brāhmaṇaṃ māṃ parityajyakiṅkāryamadhikaṃ tava
mūka uvāca
kiṅkupyasivṛthāvipranabakohaṃ tavādhunā
gaganesnānaśāṭītenaśuṣyatinatiṣṭhati
vacanaṅkhāttataḥśrutvā madgṛhaṃ cāgatobhavān
tiṣṭhatiṣṭhavadiṣyāminocedgacchapativratāṃ
tāṃ cadṛṣṭvā dvijaśreṣṭhadayitaṃ tephaliṣyati
viniḥsṛtyadvijaṃ prāhagehaṃ tasyāḥprayāmy ahaṃ
savimṛśyadvijaśreṣṭhastenasārdhaṃ cacālaha
kirthaṃ catvayāvipracāṇḍālasyagṛhodare
sadāsaṃ sthīyatetātayoṣājanavṛtemudā
idānīṃ mānasaṃ śuddhaṃ nabhūtaṃ bhavatodhruvam
pativratādikaṃ dṛṣṭvā paścājjṣāsyasimāṅkila
pativratācakātātakiṃ vātasyāśśrutaṃ mahat
yenāhaṃ tatra gacchāmikāraṇaṃ vadamedvija
nadīnāṃ jāhnavīśreṣṭhāpramadānāṃ pativratā
manuṣyāṇāṃ prajāpālodevānāṃ cajanārdanaḥ
kuladvayasyapuruṣānuddharetsāśataṃ śataṃ
svargādbhraṣṭobhavedvāsyāḥsārvabhaumo nṛpaḥpatiḥ
asyaivamahiṣībhūtvāsukhaṃ viṃ dedanantaraṃ
punaḥpunaḥsvargarājyaṃ tasyatasyāna saṃśayaḥ
pativratābhavetkāvātasyāḥkiṃ vācalakṣaṇaṃ
brūhi medvijaśārdūlayathājānām itattvataḥ
putrācchataguṇaṃ snehādrājānaṃ cabhayādatha
ārādhayetpatiṃ śauriṃ yāpaśyetsāpativratā
kāryedāsīratauveśyābhojanejananīsamā
vipatsumantriṇībhartuḥsācabhāryāpativratā
bharturājṣāṃ nalaṅghedyāmanovākkāyakarmabhiḥ
bhuktepatyausadācāttisācabhāryāpativratā
yasyāṃ yasyāṃ tuśayyāyāṃ patiḥsvapitiyatnataḥ
naivamatsaramāyātinakārpaṇyaṃ namāni nī
māne'mānesamānaṃ cayāpaśyetsāpativratā
suveṣaṃ yānaraṃ dṛṣṭvā bhrātaraṃ pitaraṃ sutaṃ
manyatecaparaṃ sādhvīsācabhāryāpativratā
tāṅgacchadvijaśārdūlavadakāmaṃ yathātava
śubhānām etivikhyātā gatvā tāṃ pṛcchatehitaṃ
evamuktvātubhagavāṃ tatra ivāṃ taradhīyata
tasyaivādṛśyatāṃ dṛṣṭvā vismitobhūddvijastadā
sacasādhvīgṛhaṅ gatvā ṃ papracchāthapativratāṃ
atithervacanaṃ śrutvā gṛhānniḥsṛtya sambhramāt
dṛṣṭvā dvijaṃ satī tatra dvāradeśesthitābhavat
tāṃ cadṛṣṭvā dvijaśreṣṭha uvācavacanaṃ mudā
priyaṃ mamahitaṃ brūhi yathādṛṣṭaṃ tvamevahi
sāmprataṃ patyurarcāstinacāsmākaṃ svataṃ tratā
paścātkāryaṅkariṣyāmigṛhāṇātithyamadyavai
mamadehekṣudhānāstipipāsādyanacaśramaḥ
abhīṣṭaṃ vadakalyāṇinocecchāpaṃ dadāmite
ityuktvāsāmahābhāgāprayayaucagṛhodaram
tatrāpaśyaddvijovipraṃ yathācāṇḍālaveśmani
tiṣṭhaṃ taṃ cadvijaṃ taṃ casopaśyaddhṛṣṭamānasam
sacovācamudāvipraṃ dṛṣṭvā taṃ tāṃ satīṃ casaḥ
deśāṃ tarecayadvṛttaṃ tayācakathitaṅkila
kathaṃ jānātimadvṛttaṃ cāṇḍālopipativratā
jṣāyatekāraṇaṃ tātasarveṣāṃ bhūtabhāvanaiḥ
atipuṇyātsadācārādyatastvaṃ vismayaṅgataḥ
praṣṭuṃ dharmatulādhāraṃ sācamāṃ samupādiśat
āgacchamuniśārdūlaahaṅgacchāmitaṃ prati
gacchaṃ taṃ cahariṃ prāhatulādhāraḥkvatiṣṭhati
vikrīṇāticakrīṇātitulādhārastatas tataḥ
janoyavānrasaṃ snehaṅkūṭamannasyasaṃ cayaṃ
sarvaṃ tasyamukhādevagṛhṇāticadadātyapi
satyaṃ tyaktvānṛtaṅkiṃ citprāṇāṃ tesamupasthite
ityuktetutamadrākṣīdvikrīṇaṃ taṃ rasānbahūn
tatra vastudhanotthāṃ cabhāṣaṃ taṃ vividhāṅgiram
vṛtaṃ bahuvidhair martyaiḥstrībhiḥpuṃ bhiś ca sarvataḥ
tulādhāra uvāca
tāvanmesvasthatānāstiyāvaccarātriyāmakaḥ
bakasyamaraṇedoṣaṅkhecavastrāviśoṣaṇam
sarvaṃ tatra cajānīṣesajjanādrohakaṃ vraja
tathātātagamiṣyāmisajjanādrohakaṃ prati
tulādhārasamuddeśānnajānām itadālayam
ehyāgacchagamiṣyāmitvayāsārddhaṃ catadgṛham
tulādhārecanasnānaṃ nadevapitṛtarpaṇam
kathaṃ jānātimadvṛttaṃ deśāṃ tarasamudbhavam
tenātṛpyaṃ tapitarodevāmunigaṇaiḥsaha
bhūtabhavyapravṛttaṃ catenajānātidhārmikaḥ
nāstisatyātparodharmonānṛtātpātakaṃ param
sarvapāpakṣayastasyaviṣṇusāyujyatāṃ vrajet
anāś ca ryamanālasyaṃ tasminsarvaṃ pratiṣṭhitam
jṣātaṃ metvatprasādāccatulādhārasyakāraṇam
tasyaprāṇasamābhāryāsundarīnām asundarī
manasālocitaṃ tenaprāṇebhyo pigarīyasīm
uktaṃ catādṛśaṃ vākyaṃ śrutvā savismayaṅgataḥ
natātastenacabhrātānacāhaṃ tavabāndhavaḥ
pitṛmātṛkulasyaivatasyāna hi suhṛjjanaḥ
sacāhataṃ casarvajṣaṃ vaktuṃ nārhasidūṣaṇam
trailokyamohinīṃ bhāryāṅkaḥ pumān rakṣituṃ kṣamaḥ
dharaṇyāṃ parivijṣāyatvāgatohaṃ tavāntikam
eṣātiṣṭhatute'gārevrajāminijamandiram
bahukāmuka sampūrṇe kathaṃ rakṣābhavetstriyāḥ
sacovācapunastaṃ cakururakṣāṃ vrajāmy aham
gṛhasthaḥ saṅkaṭādāhadharmasyarājaputrakam
sadācaivedṛśībhāryāsthātavyāmadgṛhepitaḥ
arakṣārakṣaṇedevavadābhīṣṭaṅkurupriyam
mamatalpemayāsārdhaṃ śayānaṃ bhāryayāsaha
kṣaṇaṃ vimṛśyataṃ prāharājaputraḥpunastadā
bāḍhametadvacastātayathābhīṣṭaṃ tathākuru
tatobhāryāṃ jagādāthaasyavākyācchivāśivam
kartavyaṃ canatedoṣa ājṣayāmamasuṃ dari
etaduktvāgataḥsopibhūpateḥśāsanātpituḥ
anantaraṅkṣapāyāṃ cayaduktaṃ catathākṛtam
saṃ sparśātsvastriyaścāsyakāmābhilaṣitaṃ manaḥ
tasyā aṅgāni cāṅgeṣu laganti capunaḥpunaḥ
evaṃ saṃ vatsarasyārddhetatpatiścāgataḥpuraṃ
strīpuṃ sorekasaṃ sargātśāṃ tatātu kathaṃ bhavet
tasyāṃ yasyābhilāṣostinapṛṣṭaḥ savadedyuvā
lokānāṅkuśrutirvārtātenapuṇyabalācchrutā
janāpavādamokṣārthaṃ buddhistasyābhavacchubhā
dārūṇisvayamāhṛtyājijvalatsamahānalam
āgamattadgṛhaṃsadyaḥsopaśyattaṃ cayoṣitam
protphullavadanāṃ nārīṃ praviṣādagataṃ naraṃ
anayormānasaṃ jṣātvārājaputrovadadvacaḥ
kiṃ na sambhāṣasemāṃ camitrakaṃ ciramāgatam
abravītsopidharmātmārājaputramanaṣṭadhīḥ
yatkṛtaṃ duṣkaraṅkarmamayātvaddhitakāraṇāt
sarvaṃ vyarthamahaṃ manyejanānāṃ capravādataḥ
adyavahnimahaṃ yāsyeprapaśyaṃ tunarāḥ surāḥ
ityuktvāsamahābhāgaḥpraviveśahutāśanam
nāṅgamasyānalodhākṣīnnacavastraṃ nakuṃ talam
apatanpuṣpavarṣāṇitasyamūrdhnisamaṃ tataḥ
yair yaiś ca duṣkṛtaṃ vākyaṃ gaditaṃ tāv ubhau prati
teṣāṃ mukheprajāyaṃ tekuṣṭhāni vividhāni ca
tatrāgatyacadevāś ca vahnerākṛṣyataṃ mudā
apūjayansupuṣpaiś ca munayovismayaṅgatāḥ
sajjanādrohakaṃ nāmakṛtaṃ devāsurair nṛbhiḥ
tasyapādarajaḥpūtāsasyapūrṇāgharābhavat
surāścāhuś ca taṃ tatra bhāryāte sampragṛhyatām
nāstītisāmprataṃ pṛthvyāṅkāmalobhājitaḥpumān
devāsuramanuṣyāṇāṃ rakṣasāṃ mṛgapakṣiṇām
kīṭādīnāṃ casarveṣāṅkāma eṣasudurjayaḥ
kāmāllobhāttathākrodhānnityaṃ sattveṣu jāyate
amuṣyahṛdayenityaṃ vāsudevomudāsthitaḥ
evaṃ spṛṣṭvāthadṛṣṭvā taṃ manuṣyāḥsarvakalmaṣāt
pūyaṃ tehyanaghāś caiva labhaṃ tecākṣayāṃ divam
evamuktvāgatādevāvimānaiś ca divaṃ mudā
manuṣyāḥprayayustuṣṭādaṃ patīsvagṛhaṃ tathā
divyaṃ cakṣustadātasyacāsīddevānsapaśyati
trailokyasyacavārttāṃ cajānātilīlayābhṛśam
tatas tasyacavīthyāṃ cadṛṣṭastenasahaivasaḥ
gacchabāḍabadharmajṣavaiṣṇavaṃ puruṣottamam
taṃ cadṛṣṭvā tvabhīṣṭaṃ tesāmprataṃ caphaliṣyati
bakasyanidhanaṃ yadvāvastrasyāśoṣaṇaṃ tathā
jānīṣecāparoyaś ca kāmaste'stihṛdisthitaḥ
viṣṇurūpadvijenaivasārddhaṃ tenamudāyayau
apaśyatpuruṣaṃ śuddhaṃ jvalaṃ taṃ capuraḥsthitam
sarvalakṣaṇa sampūrṇaṃ dīpyamānaṃ svatejasā
vadanoyadyadvṛttaṃ vaidūrāttvāṃ cāgatohyaham
vaiṣṇava uvāca
prasannastesuraśreṣṭhodānavārīśvaraḥsadā
dṛṣṭvā tvāṃ camano'smākaṃ hṛṣyatīvādhunādvija
kalyāṇaṃ cātulaṃ tedyaphaliṣyatimanorathaḥ
suravartmanitenityaṃ celaṃ śuṣyatinānyathā
dṛṣṭvā devaṃ suraśreṣṭhaṃ mamagehehariṃ sthitam
kvāsauviṣṇuḥsthitonityaṃ darśayādyaprasādataḥ
vaiṣṇava uvāca
taṃ dṛṣṭvā kilbiṣāddhorānmucyasejanmabandhānat
apaśyattaṃ dvijaṃ viṣṇuṃ tiṣṭhaṃ taṃ padmatalpake
śirasaivapravaṃ dyāthajagrāhacaraṇaumudā
prasādībhavadeveśanajṣātastvaṃ purāmayā
ihāmutracadeveśatavāhaṅkiṅkaraḥ prabho
rūpaṃ tedraṣṭumicchāmiyadicāstikṛpāmayi
viṣṇur uvāca
snehātpuṇyavatāmevadarśanaṅkāritaṃ mayā
darśanātsparśanāddhyānātkīrtanādbhāṣaṇāttathā
sakṛtpuṇyavatāmevasvargaṃ cākṣayamaśnute
snātvācapuṇyatīrtheṣu dṛṣṭvā māṃ caiva sarvataḥ
dṛṣṭvā puṇyavatāṃ deśānmamadehevilīyate
kathayitvākathāṃ puṇyāṃ lokānām agrataḥsadā
upoṣya vāsare’smākaṃ śrutvā maccaritaṃ dhruvam

gacchamūkaṃ mahātmānaṃ tīrthaṃ puṇyavatāṃ varam

samāṃ paśyatidharmajṣoyathātenaprasannatā

mādhava uvāca
yasmādetādṛśībuddhiḥsphuratetesadānagha
tayorniśśvāsavātenamanyunācabhṛśaṃ punaḥ
tannirayaṃ nābādhehaṃ nadhātānacaśaṅkaraḥ

śaṅkhacakragadāpadmadhāraṇaṃ puruṣottamam
idānīṃ caprasiddhāmesarve caiva manorathāḥ
kiṃ tumevismayonāthamūkādijṣāni nobhṛśam
kathaṃ jānanti madvṛttaṃ deśāṃ taramupasthitam
śrībhagavān uvāca
pitrorbhaktaḥsadāmūkaḥpativratāśubhācasā

mahāpātakisaṃ sargānnarāś ca ivātipātakāḥ

kalyāṇānāṃ casarveṣāṅkarttāmūkojagattraye

kratubhistāni tulyāni samāptavaradakṣiṇaiḥ
kāmyaśrāddhaṃ mahāpuṇyam idaṃ tasyāgataṃ śivam
abhāvātkṛṣṇapakṣādautulāyāṅkartum arhati

punaḥsvabhavanaṃ yānti śāpaṃ datvāsudāruṇam

vivāhavratayajṣādaukṛtvānāṃ dīmukhaṃ dvijaḥ
tatas tupūjayedagregaṇeśaṃ śaṃ bhunaṃ danam
paraṃ ṣoḍaśamātṝś ca tatpaścātpitṛsaṃ cayam

grahaṇecandrasūryasyadatvāpiṇḍodakaṃ naraḥ

dṛṣṭvā tīvābhavanmohānmanmathāviṣṭacetanaḥ
niśśvasyasutarāṃ dīrghaṃ tatas tuvimanābhavat
śrutvā gṛhādviniḥsṛtyasādhvīpapracchataṃ patiṃ
unmanāstvaṃ kathaṃ nāthaniḥśvāsaste kathaṃ vibho
abhīṣṭaṃ vadamenāthayathāśaktikaromy aham
ityuktetām uvācedaṃ vṛthākiṃ bhāṣasepriye
naśaktātvaṃ nacaivāhaṃ moghaṃ vaktuṃ nayujyate
praṣṭuṃ nādhikaroṣītiyathādīrghataroḥphalam
tathāmeramaṇīlobhānmohādyadabhivāṃ chitam
daṃ patyorapiduḥsādhyamapayānaṃ vadāmy aham
jṣātvātutvanmanovṛttaṃ śaktāhaṅkāryasādhane
pāpābhyāsāccapāpmānaṃ pṛcchatītiviniś ca yaḥ
pathyasmin sampragacchaṃ tīṃ veśyāṃ paramasuṃ darīm
sarvataścānavadyāṅgīṃ dṛṣṭvā medahyatemanaḥ
yaditāṃ tvatprasādāccaprāpnominavayauvanāṃ
yadimāṅkuṣṭhinaṃ dīnaṃ pūtigandhaṃ navavraṇam
śrutvā teneritaṃ vākyaṃ sādhvīvacanamabravīt
manasāthasamālocyakṣapāṃ tehyuṣasidrutam
gomayaṃ sahaśodhanyāgṛhītvāsāyayaumudā
samprāpyagaṇikāgehaṃ śodhayitvācacatvaram
pratolīṃ vīthikāṃ caiva gomayaṃ pradadaumudā
sātūrṇamāgatāgehejanasyālokanebhayāt
athasāvāramukhyācaceṭikāśceṭakānapi
mayānoktepyuṣaḥkālekasyamatpriyakāraṇāt
rucyakarmaṇidīpyaṃ terathyācattvaravīthikāḥ
athasāvismayaṅ gatvā saṃ cintyarajanīkṣaye
tayācadṛśyatesācatathaivapunarāgatā
dṛṣṭvā tāṃ mahatīṃ sādhvīṃ brāhmaṇīṃ capativratām
dadhāracaraṇetasyāhākṣamasvetibhāṣiṇī
etāsāṃ mevināśāyasphurasīvapativrate
yadyatprārthayasesādhvinityaṃ dāsyāmitaddṛḍham
suvarṇaṃ maṇiratnaṃ vācelaṃ vāyanmanorathaṃ
tām uvācatataḥsādhvīnamecārtheprayojanam
tadāmehṛdisanto ṣaḥkṛtaṃ sarvaṃ tvayādhunā
gaṇikovāca
kurumerakṣaṇaṃ mātardrutaṅkṛtyaṃ camevada
trapayāni kṛtaṃ vācyaṃ tasyāmuktaṃ varaṃ priyam
kṣaṇaṃ vimṛśyasāveśyākṛtvākṣāṃ tim uvācaca
kuṣṭhinaḥpūtigandhasya samparkeduḥkhitābhṛśam
bhuktabhogyaṃ patiṃ hṛṣṭaṃ purneṣyāmimadgṛham
gaṇikovāca
gacchaśīghraṃ mahābhāgesvagṛhaṃ capativrate
bahavomepriyāḥ santi rājānastatsamāś ca ye
adyāhaṃ megṛhaṃ śūnyaṅkariṣyāmicatvadbhayāt
etacchrutvātusāsādhvīgatāsausvagṛhetathā
adyarātraucatadgehaṅgaṃ tuṅkhyātiṅkarotisā
kathaṃ yāsyāmitadgehaṃ mayāgaṃ tuṃ naśakyate
etajjṣātvākutaḥkṣāṃ tiḥkṛtaṅkāryaṃ kathaṃ bhavet
svapṛṣṭhasthamahaṅkṛtvāneṣyāmitadgṛhaṃ prati
kalyāṇitvatkṛtenaivasarvaṃ mekṛtyameṣyati
idānīṃ yatkṛtaṅkarmastrījanair apiduḥsaham
paureś ca pracuraṃ vittaṃ hṛtaṃ rājṣāśrutaṃ tadā
śrutvā sarvānniśācārānāhūya nṛpatīruṣā
jīvituṃ yadivovāṃ chācoraṃ māmadyadāsyatha
gṛhītvātu nṛpasyājṣāṃ yattair jighṛkṣayākulaiḥ
cāraiścorogṛhītastair balāc caiva nṛpājṣayā
nagaropāṃ tadeśecavṛkṣamūleghanevane
samādhisthomahātejāmāṇḍavyomunipuṅgavaḥ
vyātiṣṭhadvahnisaṅkāśoyogināṃ pravaromuniḥ
aṃ tarnāḍīgatovāyuḥkiṃ cinnapratibhātica
taṃ brahmatulyanti ṣṭhantaṃ dṛṣṭvā duṣṭāmahāmunim
coroyamadbhutākārodhūrtastiṣṭhatikānane
noktāś ca nekṣitāstenapuruṣā atidāruṇāḥ
tatorājā uvācedaṃ samprāptastaskaromayā
upāṃ tecapathidvārekurudhvaṅghoradaṇḍanam
māṇḍavyaś ca munis tatra pathiśūlecakīlitaḥ
pāyudeśecatair dattaṃ śūlaṃ yāvaccamastakam
vyathāṃ sacanajānātiśūleviddhatanuryamāt
anyair apikṛtodaṇḍaḥkṛtastaistumanohitaḥ
svapatiṃ pṛṣṭhataḥkṛtvāprayayausāpativratā
māṇḍavyasyatanausaṅgātkuṣṭhinogandha āgataḥ
māṇḍavya uvāca
evaṃ yenādhunākṛcchraṅkāritaṅgātravedanam
māṇḍavyenaivamuktaḥ sapapātadharaṇītale
dinatrayaṅgṛhaṃ nītvāśāpādveśmagatātataḥ
śayanīyesthitaṃ ramyedhṛtvā'tiṣṭhatpativratā
śaptvātaṃ camuniśreṣṭhogatodeśamabhīṣṭakam
nikhilaṃ vyathitaṃ dṛṣṭvā trailokyaṃ sacarācaram
śatakratuṃ puraskṛtyagatādevāḥpitāmaham
kāraṇaṃ canajānīmastvaṃ tuyogyaṃ vidhehinaḥ
pativratāyā yad vṛttaṃ māṇḍavyasya muneś ca yat
teṣāṃ śriyāvimānānāṃ munīnāṅkiraṇaistathā
śatasūryamivābhātinān yatra cagṛhodare
hāhatāsmi kathaṃsūromadgṛhesamupasthitaḥ
adṛśyaṃ tatayādevāvimānair haṃsasannibhaiḥ
akhilānāṃ cadevānāṃ dvijānāṃ cagavāṃ tathā
tenaivakāraṇenaiṣamayāśaptodivākaraḥ
nakopānnacamohāccalobhātkāmānnamatsarāt
tatas tecādhikaṃ puṇyaṃ mātarevaṃ bhaviṣyati
sācovācavidhiṃ tatra devānām agrataḥsatī
patiṃ tyaktvācamesatyaṃ śivaṃ menānurocate
yathāpūjyoharirdaivair yathālakṣmīś ca pūjitā
kāṃ stulokāngamiṣyāmibhagnācārāmalīmasā
asmākaṃ vacanenaivakuṣṭhīmanmathatāṃ vrajet
vadatyevaṃ vidhausācavimṛśyakṣaṇameva ca
vāḍhamuktavatīsācatataḥ sūryodayobhavat
abhavadbhasmarūposaumuniśāpaprapīḍitaḥ
dṛṣṭvā vismayapamāpannāḥsarvetepuravāsinaḥ
vimānenārkavarṇenasvarloṅkādāgatenaca
patināsahasāsādhvīsuraiḥsārddhaṅgatādivam
tenavṛttaṃ cajānātibhūtaṃ bhavyaṃ pravartanam
yaidaṃ śrāvayellokepuṇyākhyānamanuttamam
tasyapāpaṅkṣayaṃ yātijanmajanmakṛtaṃ cayat
sakṛcchṛṇotiyaḥpūtoduṣkṛtaughādvimucyate
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe prathame sṛṣṭikhaṇḍe
pativratopākhyānaṃ nāma
ekapaJcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ
dvipaṣcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ
māṇḍavyasya muner viṣṇoḥ śūlāghātaḥ kathaṃ tanau
patyau pativratāyāś ca kathaṃ kuṣṭhaṃ kalevare
śiśubhāvāccamāṇḍavyojhillikāyāmabhānataḥ
vastideśetṛṇaṃ datvāmohātsacamumocatām
tenāpavādadoṣeṇadharmasyājṣātureva ca
ahorātraṃ vyathākṛcchrābhuktātenadvijanmanā
kiṃ tusamādhinātenanajṣātaṃ śūla sambhavam
kṛcchraṃ camuninākṛtsnaṃ yogābhyāsādbhṛśādapi
kuṣṭhinobrahmaṇoghātādajitendriyakāraṇāt
pūtigandhaṃ tanaukuṣṭhaṃsaṃjātaṃ dvijasattama
purāviprāyatenaivadattaṅgaurīcatuṣṭayam
asyāstukāraṇādevasacamatsamatāṃ vrajet
yathaitaccaritaṃ nāthasarveṣāṃ śivamiṣyate
santi kṛtyāḥstriyaḥkāścitpuṃ saḥsarvasvadasyaca
tatrāpyarakṣaṇīyāṃ camanasāpinadhārayet
nastrīṇām apriyaḥkaścit priyovāpinavidyate
gāvastṛṇamivāraṇyeprārthayanti navaṃ navam
pumāṃ saṃ vittahīnaṃ cavirūpaṅguṇavarjitam
akulīnaṃ cabhṛtyaṃ cakāminībhajatedhruvam
bhartāraṃ caguṇopetaṅkulīnaṃ camahādhanam
suṃ daraṃ ratidakṣaṃ catyaktvānīcaṃ bhajedvadhūḥ
umānāradasaṃvādamākhyānaṃ viddhibhūsura
yenavidyāstriyāśceṣṭāvividhāḥkṛtsnaśodvija
svabhāvānnāradovipraviśvajijṣāsakomuniḥ
svāṃ tevimṛśyāthagataḥkailāsaṅgirimuttamam
vṛṣaketusadākhyānasapratiṣṭhehimegirau
praṇipatyamahātmāvaipapracchapārvatīṃ muniḥ
devisīmanti nīnāṃ tuduśceṣṭāṃ jṣātumutsahe
sarvāsāmapinārīṇāṃ svāntaṃ jānāsitattvataḥ
yuvatīnāṃ sadā cittaṃ puṃsu tiṣṭhaty asaṃśayam
suveṣaṃ puruṣaṃ dṛṣṭvā bhrātaraṃ yadi vā sutam
yoniḥklidyati nārīṇāṃ satyaṃ satyaṃ hi nārada
sthānaṃ nāsti kṣaṇaṃ nāsti nāsti prārthayitā naraḥ
tena nārada nārīṇāṃ satītvam upajāyate
ghṛtakumbhasamā nārī taptāṅgārasamaḥ pumān
yathaiva mattamātaṅgaṃ sṛṇimudgara yogataḥ
svavaśaṅkurute yaṃ tā tathā strīṇāṃ prarakṣakaḥ
putrāś ca sthāvirebhāvenastrīsvātaṃ tryamarhati
tataḥsvātaṃ tryabhāvāccasvecchayācavarāṅganā
puruṣeṇārthitādhīrāpreraṇādicarībhavet
arakṣaṇādyathāpākaḥśvakākavaśagobhavet
tathaivayuvatīnārīsvacchaṃ dādduṣṭatāṃ vrajet
punarevakulaṃ duṣṭaṃ tasyāḥ saṃ sargatobhavet
parabījenayojātaḥsacasyādvarṇasaṅkaraḥ
jārajaḥsaṅkaraḥpāponarakeniyataṃ vaset
kīṭajātaugatājātāḥpunaḥsarvemahītale
tatomlecchamupānītaṅkulaṃ syādvijanaṃ dana
kulakṣayobhavedyasmāt tasmād duṣṭāṃ nadhārayet
jṣātvaivayoṣitāṃ doṣaṅkṣamateyonarādhamaḥ
kuladvayaṃ samānārīsamayitvātutiṣṭhati
sādhvītārayatevaṃśānduṣṭāpātayatidhruvam
dāreṣv adhīnaṃ svargaṃ cakulaṃ paṅkaṃ yaśo'yaśaḥ
tasmād ekāṃ dvitīyāṃ vāvāmāmudvāhayedbudhaḥ
saṃ tānārthāttukāmāccabahudoṣāśritācasā
rajasvalāṃ cavanitāṃ nāvagacchatiyaḥpatiḥ
yomohāddurbhagāṅkṛtvāsādhvīṃ tyajatipāpakṛt
vanitāharaṇaṅkṛtvācāṇḍalakulatāṃ vrajet
evaṃ varṣasahasrāṇibhāraṃ vahatidurmatiḥ
punaḥkīṭeṣu saṃ tīrṇastadāmānuṣatāṃ vrajet
tataś ca kalahaṃ śokaṃ prāpnotipūrvakalmaṣāt
evaṃ janmatrayaṃ prāpyamucyatepātakānnaraḥ
tatkālaṃ narakaṃ bhuktvāsātukākītuvaṣcakī
ucchiṣṭanarakaṃ bhuktvāmānuṣevidhavābhavet
yaḥpunaścāṃ tyajāṅgacchenamlechāṃ vāpulkasāṃ naraḥ
dvitricaturguṇaṃ bhuktvā tatra saṃ cīrṇavaṃ cakaḥ
mātaraṅgurubhāryāṃ cabrāhmaṇīṃ mahiṣīṃ tathā
anyāṃ vāprabhupatnīṃ ca gatvā yātyapunarbhavaṃ
bhaginīṃ tatputrabhāryāṃ tathāduhitaraṃ snuṣām
pitṛvyāṃ mātulānīṃ tutathaiva capitṛṣvasām
mātṛṣvasrādikāmanyāṅ gatvā nāsticaniṣkṛtiḥ
brahmahāsabhavedaṃ dhovacasājaḍatāṃ vrajet
karṇayorbadhirojātaścyavatenāstiniṣkṛtiḥ
uktvā aślīlamatyarthamakhilaṃ strīkṛtena hi
evaṃ duṣkṛtamāsādya kathaṃ mokṣobhavetpunaḥ
śrībhagavān uvāca
tāsāṃ caganamaṅkṛtvātaptāṃ lohasyaputtalīṃ
samāliṅgyatyajetprāṇaṃ śucirlokāṃ taraṃ vrajet
yovaigṛhāśramaṃ tyaktvāmaccittojāyatenaraḥ
brahmahatyāyutaṃ tenakṛtaṅgurvaṅganāgamāt
śataṃ śatasahasraṃ capaiṣṭīmadyasyabhakṣaṇāt
svarṇāderharaṇaṅkṛtvāteṣāṃ saṃ sargakaṃ ciraṃ
etānyanyāni pāpāni mahāntipātakāni ca
agniṃ prāpyayathātūlaṃ tṛṇaṃ śuṣkaṃ praṇaśyati
tasmānmannāmagoviṃ daṃ smṛtvāpūtobhavennaraḥ
yovāgṛhāśrametiṣṭhennityaṅgoviṃ daghoṣaṇam
kṛtvācapūjayitvācasapāpātsantarobhavet
bhāgīrathītaṭeramyekhagasyagrahaṇeśive
gavāṅkoṭipradānenayatphalaṃ labhatenaraḥ
goviṃ dakīrtanetātamatpurecākṣayaṃ vaset
purāṇematkathāṃ śrutvā matsādṛśyaṃ labhennaraḥ
kathayitvāpurāṇaṃ caviṣṇusāyujyatāṃ vrajet
tasmānnityaṃ caśrotavyaṃ purāṇaṃ dharmasaṃ cayaṃ
anyadvāstrīkṛtedoṣeyathāyogaṃ bhaveddhruvaṃ
sarvabījasyadānenasāṃ bukumbhaṃ mahāphalam
dadyādviprāyapuṇyāhesadyaḥpūtobhavetkṣaṇāt
sarvaṃ dhānyādikaṃ bījaṅkāledadyādvijātaye
sarvapāpakṣayaṅkṛtvā akṣayaṃ svargamaśnute
guṇaṃ vakṣyāmi viprarṣesatīnāṃ yādṛśaṃ dṛḍham
śuddhavaṃ śobhavettasyā nityaṃ lakṣmīḥpravartate
punarvakṣyāmi yoṣāṇāṃ sarvalokahitaṃ śubham
uṣitvāpūrvakālaṃ capuṇyāpuṇyenayoṣitaḥ
paścātpativratāyāś ca tāś ca gacchanti madgatim
ṣaṇmāsaṃ vāthavarṣaṃ vā adhikaṃ capraśasyate
surāpaṃ viprahaṃ tāraṃ sarvapāpayutaṃ patim
paṅkātpūtaṃ nayetsvargaṃ bharttāṃ raṃ yānugacchati
kandarpasadṛśobhartāsāratīvamanoramā
pativratābalādyācavidūresvāmipātane
cihnaṃ labdhvāmṛtāvahnaupāpāduddharatepatiṃ
pativratācayānārīdeśāṃ taramṛtepatau
yāstrībrāhmaṇajātīyāmṛtaṃ patimanuvrajet
sāsvargamātmaghātenanātmānaṃ napatiṃ nayet
namriyetasamaṅ gatvā brāhmaṇībrahmaśāsanāt
pravrajyāgatimāpnotimaraṇādātmaghātinī
sarvāsāmapijātīnāṃ brāhmaṇaḥśasyaiṣyate
śrībhagavān uvāca
brāhmaṇyāḥ sāhasaṅkarmanaivayuktaṅkadācana
niḥśeṣesyāvadhaṅkṛtvāsanarobrahmahābhavet
tasmād brāhmaṇajātīyāviprayācavrataṃ caret
pravakṣyāmi yathātathyaṃ śṛṇuviprayathārthataḥ
āpaṇāṃ taramāmiṣyaṃ bhakṣayennakadācana
aśvamedhasahasrāṇāṃ hāyanephalamāpnuyāt
svāminopijalaṃ piṇḍaṃ sampradadyādamatsarāt
yugakoṭisahasrāṇiyugakoṭiśatāni ca
patināsahasāsādhvīviṣṇuloke yutābhavet
tatomahāvrataṃ prāpyanirayebrāhmaṇīvadhūḥ
uddharedubhayorvaṃśāṣchataśothasahasraśaḥ
bhojanātmatsyamāṃ sasyavratānāṃ viprayogataḥ
ciraṃ nirayamāsādyaśunībhavatiniścitam
duṣṭāyāmaithunaṅgacchedvidhavākulanāśinī
narakānanubhūyāthagṛdhriṇīdaśajanmasu
dvijanmapheravābhūtvātatomānuṣatāṃ vrajet
kanyādānaphalaṃ brūhi vadadāsyāḥphalaṃ cayat
śrībhagavān uvāca
rūpāḍhyeguṇa sampannekulīneyauvanānvite
samṛddhevitta sampūrṇekanyādānaphalaṃ śṛṇu
sarvābharaṇasaṃ yuktāṅkanyakāṃ yodadātica
tenadattādharāsarvāsaśailavanakānanā
anābharaṇakanyāyāḥpādaikasyaphalaṃ bhavet
yaḥpunaḥśulkamaśnātisayātinarakenaraḥ
vikrīyacātmajāṃ mūḍhonarakānnanivarttate
lobhādasadṛśepuṃ sikanyāṃ yastuprayacchati
rauravaṃ narakaṃ prāpyacāṇḍālatvaṃ cagacchati
ata evahiśulkaṃ cajāmāturnakadācana
gṛhṇātimanasāprājṣoyaddattaṃ tasyacākṣayam
bhūmiṅgāṃ ca hiraṇyaṃ cadhanaṃ vastraṃ cadhānyakam
jāmāturyautakaṃ datvāsarvaṃ bhavaticākṣayam
yautakaṃ dīyatekiṃ cittatsarvaṃ cākṣayaṃ bhavet
dātānasmaratedānaṃ pratigrāhīnayācate
avaśyaṃ yautakaṃ dānaṃ dātavyaṃ sātvikena hi
atyāsannetidūrasthecātyāḍhyecātidurgate
kulahīnecamūrkhecaṣaṭsukanyānadīyate
ativṛddhecātidīnerogiṣṭhedeśavāsini
atikruddhepyasantuṣṭeṣaṭsukanyānadīyate
lobhātsaṃ mānalābhāccakanyakāparivartanāt
munīnāṃ preyasīṃ nārīṃ yuvatīṃ rūpaśālinīm
sālaṅkārāṃ saśayyāṃ cadatvā'nantaphalaṃ labhet
ekāvarāyadātavyā aparābrāhmaṇāyatu
krītādevāyadātavyādhīreṇākaṣṭakarmaṇā
kalpakālaṃ bhavetsvargaṃ nṛpovākaumahādhanī
yaidaṃ śṛṇuyānnityaṃ puṇyākhyānamanuttamam
sarvapāpakṣayastasyasarvaśāstrārthapāragaḥ
labhetaso'kṣayaṃ svargaṃ nārīṇāṃ vallabhobhavet
śrutaṃ haratipāpāni janmajanmakṛtāni ca
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe prathame sṛṣṭikhaṇḍe paJcākhyānestrīṇām ākhyānaṃ nāma
dvipaJcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ
tripaṣcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ
śrī bhagavān uvāca
nityaṃ yajṣaśataṃ tasyasuniṣpannaṃ sudakṣiṇam
nalaṅghayetsamudrastuvelāṅkūrmodharāṃ tathā
saśarīreṇasvarlokamāgatyācyutatāṃ vrajet
satyenamunayaḥsarvemāṃ ca gatvā sthiraṅgatāḥ
satyādyudhiṣṭhirorājāsaśarīrodivaṅgataḥ
sarvaśatrugaṇaṃ jitvālokodharmeṇapālitaḥ
caturaśītisahasrāṇibrāhmaṇānāṃ canityaśaḥ
yadabhīṣṭaṃ dvijātīnām atonyaddāpayeddhanam
adaridraṃ tatojṣātvādvijavyūhaṃ parityajet
tathaivasnātakānāṃ tusahasrāṇituṣoḍaśa

niyutaṅkalpakoṭīnāṃ svarlokametimānavaḥ
svargādbhraṣṭobhavedbhūpodevībhaktiparāyaṇaḥ
prāsādaṅgāṇapatyaṃ cadevyāvāprītimānnaraḥ
kṛtvāsuragaṇānāṃ capūjitodivijāyate
ājñānaskhalitātasyasurāsuranareṣu ca
surasyapratimāyāṃ cagṛhaṅkṛtvāśilāmayam
viṣṇvādisarvadevānām arcanaṃ yatpṛthakpṛthak
pratyekaṃ sampravakṣyāmi narāṇāṃ hitahetave
ghṛtapradīpaṃ yodadyātmāsam ekamaharniśam
ghṛtasnānantathāliṅgeyaḥkuryādbhuvimānavaḥ
māsaikaṃ jaladānasyaphaleneśvaratāṃ vrajet
mālāpuṣpapradānenanaraḥsyāttrideśeśvaraḥ
śītetūlapaṭīṃ datvāsarvaduḥkhātpramucyate
janmajanmasulabhyetauṣṇecaśītalāṃ paṭīm
datvācanaivasīdetaśaktyāvastraṃ dadātiyaḥ
caturhastapramāṇaṃ cavarṣmaveṣṭaṃ suśobhanam
pidhānaṃ caraṇānāṃ cadatvāsvargānnahīyate
daśayojanavistīrṇemaṇḍaperūpabhāgbhavet
suvarṇaṃ ratnasaṃ yuktaṃ dattvādaśaguṇaṃ labhet
vajravaiḍūryagārutmamāṇikyādīnanarghataḥ
datvāliṅgevidhānāccabrāhmaṇevāyaśasvini
surabhidravyadānenavāvadūkaś ca suṃ daraḥ
raktāmṛtasukaṃ ṭhaś ca pūgadānānnarobhavet
varadāsīpradānenaurvyāṃ jātodhaneśvaraḥ
dharāyāmakṣayāṛddhirjanmajanmasujāyate
sarvatūryapradānenaguṇavānlokasaṃ mataḥ
nṛtyagītādiśāstreṇagandharvāṇāṃ patirbhavet
dāsīdāsayutaḥsvargedhanaiḥstrībhir varair yutaḥ
dadhnāsnānenadviguṇaṅghṛtenatuśatādhikam
annaṃ ṣaḍrasasaṃ yuktaṃ datvākṣitipatirbhavet
tathaivapāyasaṃ datvāmunīnāṃ pravarobhuvi
haviṣyānnaṃ mudādatvāvedaśāstrārthapāragaḥ
nirāmiṣapradānāccabrahmacārīvratībhavet
madhudānāccasaubhāgyaṅguḍenalavaṇenaca
śarkarādibhir lāvaṇyaṃ sarvalokeṣu gīyate
devānāṃ śaṃ bhuliṅgānām arcāṅkṛtvāvidhānataḥ
lokānāṃ ca hitārthāyadevāstiṣṭhanti saṃ mukhāḥ
sakṛtpradakṣiṇāṅkṛtvāśaṃ bhuliṅgeṣu paṇḍitaḥ
divyaṃ varṣaśataṃ pūrṇaṃ svargametinarottamaḥ
sacarauravamāsādyaharaṇātkīṭatāṃ vrajet
dātuḥpūjāṃ caliṅgārthehareścāpyādadātiyaḥ
jalapuṣpādidīpārthevasucānyadgṛhītavān
paścānnadīyatelobhādakṣayaṃ narakaṃ vrajet
dāsīṃ hṛtvātuliṅgasyanarakānnanivartate
śivadāsīṃ tato gatvā śivasvaharaṇetathā
bhakṣaṇādannapānānānnarodurgatimāpnuyāt
tasmād veśyājanānāṃ cadauṣṭyamevahitaṃ bhavet
atastugaṇikāṃ spṛṣṭvānaraḥsnānādviśudhyati
malināṃ durgatiṃ yātibahupūruṣasaṃ śrayāt
veśyātapasvinīyācadevārcanaratāsadā
pativrataparāśuddhāsvargaṃ cākṣayamaśnute
gaṇikāṃ mātṛvad yas tu sadāsannāṃ prapaśyati
surāsuranarāṇāṃ cavaṃ danīyoyathāhariḥ
devadāsaḥsadāyastudevakṛtyeṣu lolupaḥ
eteṣām eva liṅgāni kārayitvācamaṇḍapam
śaktyāyaṃ labhatenākaṅkālasyaniś ca yaṃ śṛṇu
hāyanaikaṃ tṛṇenaivaśarakāṇḍenatacchatam
ayutaṃ tvanyakāṣṭhenalakṣaṅkhādiradāruṇā
koṭikoṭicapāṣāṇaiḥsudṛḍhair yatnasaṃ yutaiḥ
yāvatkālaṃ vasetsvargenaromaṇḍapakārakaḥ
tāvatkālaṃ caharaṇenarodurgatimāpnuyāt
janānāṃ nicayeramyevastūnāṅkrayavikraye
āśrayecādhvagānāṃ canadīnadasamāgame
devānāṃ maṇḍapaṅkṛtvāyatphalaṃ labhatenaraḥ
anāthasyacadīnasyaśrotriyasyaviśeṣataḥ
kārayitvāgṛhaṃ ramyaṃ naraḥsvargānnahīyate
yaidaṃ śṛṇuyānnityaṃ puṇyākhyānamanuttamam
akṣayaṃ labhatesvargaṃ prāsādādeḥphalaṃ labhet
dhanināṃ ceśvarāṇāṃ catathāpuṇyavatāṃ punaḥ
pāṭhayitvāpaṭhitvātunaraḥsvargānnahīyate
devānāṃ dāsadāsīnāṃ sadādevālayeṣu ca
nṛpāṇām īśvarāṇāṃ cadhanināṅguṇināṃ puraḥ
paṭhitvāmokṣamāpnotiśravaṇāttatphalaṃ labhet
dvijāūcuḥ
cāturvarṇyāśramāṇāṃ capāpapuṇyavatāṃ nṛṇām
guṇāguṇavatāṃ caiva varṇāvarṇavatāṃ tathā
vyāsa uvāca
sarveṣām eva bhūtānāṃ rudrākṣeṇa yuto varaḥ
darśanādyasyalokānāṃ pāparāśiḥpralīyate
sparśanāddivamaśnātidhārāṇādraudratāṃ vrajet
śirasyurasibāhaucarudrākṣaṃ dhārayettuyaḥ
yatra tiṣṭhatyasauvipraḥ sadeśaḥpuṇyavānbhavet
taṃ dṛṣṭvā pyathavāspṛṣṭvānaraḥpūyetakalmaṣāt
yaj japyaṃ tarpaṇaṃ dānaṃ snānam arcā pradakṣiṇam
tīrthānāṃ camahattīrthaṃ rudrākṣasyaphalaṃ dvijāḥ
asyaivadhāraṇāddehīpāpātpūto'tipuṇyabhāk
gṛhītvācākṣamālāṃ cabrahmagraṃ thiyutāṃ śivām
yajjaptaṃ cakṛtaṃ dānaṃ stotraṃ maṃ surārcanam
sarvaṃ cākṣayatāmetipāpaṣcakṣayamāvrajet
mālāyālakṣaṇaṃ brūmaḥśrūyatāṃ dvijasattamāḥ
tasyāstulakṣaṇaṃ jṣātvāśaivamārgaṃ pralapsyatha
anyonyaṃ bījalagnaṃ camālāyāṃ parivarjayet
śūdrādigrathitā'śuddhādūrāttāṃ parivarjayet
sarveṣām eva devānāṃ japenmantraṃ svamālayā
prayataḥsakaletīrthekoṭikoṭiguṇaṃ bhavet
śuddhāyāmevabhūmyāṃ tumedhyakevṛkṣamūlake
goṣṭhecatuṣpathāgāreviṣṇormantraṃ śivasyaca
śūnyāgāreśavasyāgreśmaśānecacatuṣpathe
yāvaccāvaidikaṃ mantraṃ paurāṇaṃ cāgamodbhavam
sarvaṃ rudrākṣamālāyāmīpsiteṣṭārthadāyakam
rudrākṣasravajaṃ śuddhaṃ jalaṃ śirasidhārayet
sarvasmātkalmaṣātpūtaḥpuṇyaṃ bhavaticākṣayam
dvijāūcuḥ
rudrākṣastukutojātaḥkutovāmedhyatāṅgataḥ
vyāsa uvāca
purākṛtayugeviprāstripuronāmadānavaḥ
surāṇāṃ cavadhaṅkṛtvā aṃ tarikṣapurehisaḥ
praṇāśe sarvalokānāṃ sthirobrahmavareṇaca
śuśrāvaśaṅkarobhīmaṃ devair īśoniveditam
dhṛtvātaṃ cajaghānāthadṛṣṭaṃ divyenacakṣuṣā
sapapātamahīpṛṣṭhemaholkevacyutodivaḥ
ghaṭanavyākulādrudrātpatitāḥ svedabiṃ davaḥ
tatrāśrubiṃ dutojātomahārudrākṣakaḥkṣitau
asyaivacaphalaṃ jīvānajānaṃ tyatiguhyataḥ
praṇamyaśirasābhūmauskaṃ dovacanamabravīt
rudrākṣasyaphalaṃ nāthajṣātumicchāmitattvataḥ
īśvara uvāca
lakṣaṃ tudarśanātpuṇyaṅkoṭirvaisparśanenaca
daśakoṭiphalaṃ puṇyaṃ dhāraṇāllabhatenaraḥ
lakṣakoṭisahasrāṇilakṣakoṭiśatāni ca
japtvāsyalabhatepuṇyaṃ nātrakāryāvicāraṇā
kaṃ ṭherudrākṣamādāyaśvāpadomriyateyadi
sopirudratvam āpnotikiṃ punarmānuṣādayaḥ
dhyānadhāraṇahīnopirudrākṣaṃ yadidhārayet
saptāṣṭanavavaktraṃ cadaśaikādaśavaktrakam
rudrākṣaṃ dvādaśāsyaṃ catrayodaśamukhaṃ tathā
caturdaśāsyasaṃ yuktaṃ svayamuktaṃ caśaṅkaram
teṣāṃ catanmukhānāṃ cadevatāḥkāś ca tadvada
guṇovākīdṛśasteṣāṃ doṣovā jagad īśvara
īśvara uvāca
ekavaktraḥśivaḥsākṣādbrahmahatyāṃ vyapohati
mahatāpuṇyayogenaharānugrahakāraṇāt
ekavaktraṃ labhenmartyokailāsaṃ caṣaḍānana
sarvapāpakṣayaṃ yātiyadguhyaṅgovadhādikam
svargaṃ cākṣayamāpnotidvivaktradhāraṇāttataḥ
strīhatyābrahmahatyābhyāṃ bahūnāṃ caiva hatyayā
yatpāpaṃ labhatemartyaḥsarvaṃ naśyatitatkṣaṇāt
yatphalaṃ vahnipūjāyāmagnikāryeghṛtāhutau
etānyanyāni sarvāṇivajrādeś ca nivāraṇam
nāśubhaṃ vidyatekiṃ cittrivaktrasyatudhāraṇāt
yatpāpaṃ narahatyāyāṃ bahusattveṣu veśmasu
tatsarvaṃ dahateśīṅghraṃ caturvaktrasyadhāraṇāt
maheśastuṣyatenityaṃ bhūtānām adhipobhavet
vāmadevaimedevāvaktraiḥpaṣcabhir āśritāḥ
ataḥsarvatrabhūyiṣṭhāḥpaṣcavaktrodharātale
rudrasyātmajarūpoyaṃ tasmāt taṃ dhārayedbudhaḥ
kalpakoṭisahasrāṇikalpakoṭiśatāni ca
tāvatkālaṃ śivasyāgrepūjanīyaḥsurāsuraiḥ
sārvabhaumobhavedbhūmauśarvatejāḥśivālaye
ṣaḍvaktraṅkārtikeyaṃ tudhārayandakṣiṇebhuje
brahmahatyādibhiḥpāpair mucyatenātrasaṃśayaḥ
skaṃ dasyasadṛśaḥśūraḥkalpāṃ tesamupasthite
nātraparājayaṃ caitiguṇānām ākarobhuvi
kumāratvam avāpnotiyathāgaurīśanaṃ danaḥ
vaiśyāḥśūdrādayovarṇāḥsadaiśvaryaprapūritāḥ
vāgmīdhīraḥ sabhāyāṃ ca nṛpaveśmanisaṃ sadi
etānyanyāni sarvāṇiṣaḍvaktrasyaivadhāraṇāt
anantaḥkarkaṭaś caiva puṇḍarīkothatakṣakaḥ
viṣolbaṇaś ca kārīṣaḥśaṅkhacūḍaś ca saptamaḥ
etenāgāmahāvīryāḥsaptavaktrevyavasthitāḥ
prītyāsyāsarvapāpāni kṣayaṃ yānti dinedine
yatpāpaṃ labhatemartyaḥsarvaṃ naśyatitatkṣaṇāt
aṣṭavaktromahāsenaḥsākṣāddevovināyakaḥ
asyaivadhāraṇādevayatpuṇyaṃ tacchṛṇuṣvame
janmajanmanamūrkhaḥsyānnāturonacanaṣṭadhīḥ
naipuṇyaṃ lipikāryeṣu mahākāryeṣu kauśalam
sarvāraṃ bhādikāryeṣu kṣamaṃ tasyadinedine
ardhakūṭaṃ tulākūṭaṃ sarvakūṭaṃ tathaiva ca
śiśnodarakareṇaivasaṃ spṛśedvāgurustriyam
evamādīnisarvāṇihanti pāpāni sarvathā
akṣayaṃ tridivaṃ bhuktvāmuktoyātiparāṅgatim
guṇānyetāni sarvāṇiaṣṭavaktrasyadhāraṇāt
navāsyaṃ bhair avaṃ proktaṃ dhārayed yas tu bāhutaḥ
lakṣakoṭisahasrāṇibrahmahatyāḥkarotiyaḥ
tāḥsarvādahateśīghraṃ navavaktrasyadhāraṇāt
haravadvaraveśmasthogaṇeśonātrasaṃśayaḥ
pannagāś ca vinaśyanti daśavaktrasyadhāraṇāt
vaktrecaikādaśevatsarudrāś ca ikādaśasmṛtāḥ
śikhāyāṃ dhārayennityaṃ tasyapuṇyaphalaṃ śṛṇu
aśvamedhasahasrāṇiyajṣakoṭiśatāni ca
tatphalaṃ śīghramāpnotivaktraikādaśadhāraṇāt
rudrākṣaṃ dvādaśāsyaṃ yaḥkaṃ ṭhadeśetudhārayet
ādityastuṣyatenityaṃ dvādaśāsyevyavasthitaḥ
tatphalaṃ śīghramāpnotivajrādeś ca nivāraṇam
arthalābhaṃsukhaṃ bhuṅktaīśvaronadaridratā
hastyaśvanaramārjāramūṣakāṣchaśakāṃ stathā
vyāladaṃ ṣṭrisṛgālādīnhatvāvyāghātayatyapi
mucyatenātrasaṃ dehovaktradvādaśadhāraṇāt
śaṃ tamaḥsatuvijṣeyaḥsarvakāmaphalapradaḥ
sudhārasāyanaṃ caiva dhātuvādaś ca pādukā
mātṛpitṛsvasṛbhrātṛgurūnvāthanihatyaca
mucyatesarvapāpebhyo trayodaśāsyadhāraṇāt
akṣayaṃ labhatesvargaṃ yathādevomaheśvaraḥ
satataṃ mūrdhnibāhauvāśaktiiṃ paṇḍaṃ śivasyaca
nyasanaṅkenamantreṇadhāraṇaṃ vā kathaṃ vada
īśvara uvāca
amantroccāraṇādevaguṇāhyeteprakīrtitāḥ
idānīṃ mantrādiśyaṃ te auṃ rudra ekavaktrasya
auṃ hrīṃ caturvaktrasya auṃ hrāṃ paṣcavaktrasya
auṃ hrūṃ ṃ ṣaḍvaktrasya auṃ hraḥsaptavaktrasya
auṃ kaṃ aṣṭavaktrasya auṃ jūṃ navavaktrasya
auṃ kṣaṃ daśavaktrasya auṃ śrīṃ ekādaśavaktrasya
auṃ hrīṃ dvādaśavaktrasya auṃ kṣauṃ trayodaśavaktrasya
auṃ nrāṃ caturdaśavaktrasya
evaṃ mantrāyathākramaṃ nyastavyāḥ
śirasyurasimālāṃ cagṛhītvāyovrajennaraḥ
sarveṣāmapivaktrāṇāṃ dhāraṇematsamobhavet
dhārayitvāturudrākṣaṃ mriyateyaḥkṣitaunaraḥ
kātvaṃ nṛtyasidīnāsisaṃ vṛtājīrṇavāsasā
athasācadvijaṃ prāhadevadūtānmayāśrutam
apatatsapapātorvyāṃ rudrākṣasyārdhakhaṇḍake
samāruhyatataḥśrīmāṃ tatra tiṣṭhatisaṃ ciram
mamāṃ śakaṃ samāsādyaīśvaraḥkaudhanībhavet
evaṃ rudrākṣakhaṇḍecamṛtasyasugatiḥsuta
jṣānenadhāriṇaḥpuṃ saḥphalaṃ vaktuṃ naśaknumaḥ
yodadhātimṛtomālām ekaṃ rudrākṣakaṃ tuvā
yaḥpaṭhetpāṭhayedvāpiśrāvayecchṛṇutepivā
sarvapāpātpramuktātmāsukhaṃsvargaṃ labhetkramāt
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe prathame sṛṣṭikhaṇḍe rudrākṣamāhātmyaṃ nāmaikonaṣaṣṭhitamo'dhyāyaḥ
ṣaṣṭhitamo'dhyāyaḥ
skaṃ da uvāca
aparasyāpipṛcchāmiphalasyapūtatāṃ taroḥ
īśvara uvāca
dhātrīphalaṃ paraṃ pūtaṃ sarvalokeṣu viśrutam
pāvanaṃ vāsudevasyaphalaṃ prītikaraṃ śubham
asyabhakṣaṇamātreṇamucyatesarvakalmaṣāt
bhakṣaṇecabhavedāyuḥpānevaidharmasaṃ cayaḥ
alakṣmīnāśanaṃ snānesarvaiśvaryamavāpnuyāt
yasmingṛhemahāsenadhātrītiṣṭhatisarvadā
nagaṅgānagayā caiva nakāśīnacapuṣkaram
ekaivahinṛṇāṃ dhātrī samprāpteharivāsare
ekādaśyāṃ pakṣayuge dhātrīsnānaṃ karoti yaḥ
sarvapāpakṣayaṃ yānti viṣṇuloke mahīyate
dhātrīphalaṃ sadā sevyaṃ bhakṣaṇe snāna eva ca
niyataṃ pāraṇe viṣṇoḥ snānamātre harer dine
saṃyate pāraṇe caiva dhātryekasparśane naraḥ
bhuktvā tu laṅghayed yas tu ekādaśyāṃ sitāsite
ekenaivopavāsenakṛtenatuṣaḍānana
saptajanmakṛtātpāpānmucyatenātrasaṃśayaḥ
akṣayaṃ labhatesvargaṃ viṣṇusāyujyamāvrajet
dhātrīdraveṇasatataṃ yasyakeśāḥsuraṃ jitāḥ
napibetsapunarmātuḥstanaṅkaścit ṣaḍānana
dhātrīdarśanasaṃ sparśānnāmnauccāraṇepivā
varadaḥsaṃ mukhoviṣṇuḥsaṃ tuṣṭobhavatipriyaḥ
dhātrīphalaṃ cayatrāste tatra tiṣṭhatikeśavaḥ
tatra brahmāsthirāpadmātasmāt tāṃ tugṛhenyaset
alakṣmīrnaśyate tatra yatra dhātrīpratiṣṭhati
saṃ tuṣṭāḥ sarvadevāś ca natyajanti kṣaṇaṃ mudā
tasyatuṣṭobhavedviṣṇurnānyaiḥkratuśatair api
snātvādhātrīdraveṇaivapūjayed yas tu mādhavam
tathaivalakṣaṇaṃ smṛtvāpūjayitvāphalenatu
yāgatirjṣāni nāṃ skaṃ damunīnāṃ yogasevinām
gatiṃ tāṃ samavāpnotidhātrīsevāratonaraḥ
sāgatirlabhyatepuṃ sāṃ dhātrīphalasusevayā
prītiś ca sarvadevānāṃ devīnāṃ nogaṇasyaca
saṃ mukhāvaradāsnānedhātrīphalaniṣevaṇe
grahāduṣṭāś ca yekecidugrāś ca daityarākṣasāḥ
sarvenaduṣṭatāṃ yānti dhātrīphalasusevanāt
sarvayajṣeṣu kāryeṣu śastaṃ cāmalakīphalam
sarvadevasyapūjāyāṃ varjayitvāraviṃ suta
tasmād ravidinetātasaptamyāṃ caviśeṣataḥ
dhātrīphalāni satataṃ dūrataḥparivarjayet
yastusnātitathāśnātidhātrīṃ caravivāsare
saṅkrāntaucabhṛgorvāreṣaṣṭhyāṃ pratipididhruvam
navamyāṃ cāpyamāyāṃ cadhātrīṃ dūrātparityajet
nāsikākarṇatuṇḍeṣu mṛtasyacikureṣu vā
tiṣṭheddhātrīphalaṃ yasyasayātiviṣṇumaṃ diram
dhātrī samparkamātreṇamṛtoyātyacyutālayam
dhātrīdravaṃ naroliptvāyastusnānaṃ samācaret
asyadarśanamātreṇayevaipāpiṣṭhajaṃ tavaḥ
sarveteprapalāyaṃ tegrahāduṣṭāś ca dāruṇāḥ
puraikaḥpulkasaḥskaṃ damṛgayārthaṃ vanaṅgataḥ
mṛgapakṣigaṇānhatvātṛṣayāparipīḍitaḥ
kṣudhayāmalakīvṛkṣaṃ puraḥpīnaphalānvitam
dṛṣṭvā saṃ ruhyasahasācakhādaphalamuttamam
tatodaivātsavṛkṣāgrānnipapātamahītale
vedanāgāḍhasaṃ viddhaḥpaṣcatvam agamattadā
tataḥpretagaṇāḥsarverakṣobhūtagaṇāstathā
tanuṃ voḍhuṃ mudāsarveyevaiśamanasevakāḥ
naśaknuvanti cāṇḍālaṃ mṛtaṃ draṣṭuṃ mahābalāḥ
anyonyaṃ vigrahasteṣāṃ mamāyamitibhāṣatām
grahītuṃ cāpinetuṃ canaśaktāsteparasparam
pretāūcuḥ
kim arthaṃ munayodhīrāścāṇḍālaṃ pāpakāriṇam
prekṣituṃ navayaṃ śaktānacāpiyamasevakāḥ
mriyaṃ tepātitāyecasthirair yuddhaparāṅmukhāḥ
sāhasaiḥpātitābhītāvajrāgnikāṣṭhapīḍitāḥ
siṃ havyāghrahatāmartyāvyāghrair vājalajaṃ tubhiḥ
jalasthalasthitāḥpretāḥvṛkṣaparvatapātitāḥ
paśupakṣihatāyecakārāgāregaremṛtāḥ
ātmaghātamṛtāyecaśrāddhādikarmavarjitāḥ
gūḍhakarmamṛtādhūrtāguruvipra nṛpadviṣaḥ
pāṣaṇḍāḥkaulikāḥkrūrāgaradāḥkūṭasākṣiṇaḥ
āśaucānnasyabhoktāraḥpretabhogyāna saṃśayaḥ
mamāyamitibhāṣanto netuṃ taṃ canaśaknumaḥ
ādityaivaduṣprekṣyaḥkiṃ vākasyaprabhāvataḥ
munayaūcuḥ
anenabhakṣitaṃ pretāḥpakvaṃ cāmalakīphalam
tatsaṅgaṃ yānti tasyaivaphalāni pracurāṇica
tenaivakāraṇenāyaṃ duṣprekṣyobhavatāṃ dhruvam
vṛkṣāgrapatitasyāthaprāṇaḥsnehānnacatyajet
nāyaṃ cāreṇasūryasyanacānyepāpakāriṇaḥ
dhātrībhakṣaṇamātreṇapāpātpūtovrajeddivam
pretāūcuḥ
pṛcchāmovohyavijṣānānnavayaṃ niṃ dakāḥkvacit
viṣṇulokādvimānaṃ tuyāvannaivātragacchati
ucyatāṃ muniśārdūlāvodrutaṃ manasisthitam
ghoṣyaṃ te yatra vedāś ca mantrāṇivividhāni ca
purāṇasmṛtayo yatra kṣaṇaṃ sthātuṃ naśaknumaḥ
puratovainatiṣṭhāmastasmād vṛttaṃ samucyatām
kiṃ vaikṛtvāpretayoniṃ labhaṃ tehinarādvijāḥ
dvijāūcuḥ
śītavātātapakleśaiḥkṣutpipāsāviśeṣakaiḥ
anyair apicaduḥkhair yepīḍitāḥkūṭasākṣiṇaḥ
vadhabandhapramītāś ca pretāstenirayaṅgatāḥ
chidrānveṣaparāyecadvijānāṅkarmaghātinaḥ
tathaiva cagurūṇāṃ catepretāścāpunarbhavāḥ
dīyamānedvijāgryetudātāraṃ pratividhyati
parasyavā'tmanovāgāṅkṛtvāpīḍanavāhane
napālayanti yemūḍhāstepretāḥkarmajābhuvi
hīnapratijṣāścāsatyāstathābhagnavratānarāḥ
nalinīdalabhuktāś ca tepretāḥkarmajābhuvi
vikrīṇantisutāṃ śuddhāṃ striyaṃ sādhvīmakaṃ ṭakām
pitṛvyamātulādeś ca tepretāḥkarmajābhuvi
etecānyecabahavaḥpretājātāḥsvakarmabhiḥ
pretāūcuḥ
nabhavanti kathaṃ pretāḥkarmaṇākenavādvijāḥ
dvijāūcuḥ
yena caiva kṛtaṃ snānaṃ jaletīrthasyadhīmatā
namaskṛtaṃ paraṃ liṅgaṃ napretojāyatenaraḥ
ekādaśyāmupoṣyaivadvādaśyāṃ caviśeṣataḥ
devānāṃ pūjaneraktānavaipretābhavanti te
śrutvā paurāṇikaṃ vākyaṃ divyaṃ cadharmasaṃ hitam
pāṭhayitvāpaṭhitvācapiśācatvaṃ nagacchati
vrataiś ca vividhaiḥpūtāḥpadmākṣadhāraṇaistathā
japtvāpadmākṣamālāyāṃ pretatvaṃ naivagacchati
dhātrīphaladravaiḥsnātvā nityaṃ tadbhakṣaṇeratāḥ
tenaviṣṇuṃ su sampūjyanagachanti piśācatām
pretāūcuḥ
satāṃ saṃ darśanātpuṇyamitipaurāṇikāviduḥ
tasmād vodarśanaṃ jātaṃ hitaṃ naḥkartumarhatha
pretabhāvādyathāmuktiḥsarveṣāṃ nobhaviṣyati
vratopadeśakaṃ dhīrāyuṣmākaṃ śaraṇāgatāḥ
tatodayālavaḥsarvetānūcurdvijasattamāḥ
dhātrīṇāṃ bhakṣaṇaṃ śīghraṅkurvatāṃ muktihetave
pretāūcuḥ
dhātrīṇāṃ darśaneviprāvayaṃ sthātuṃ naśaknumaḥ
kathaṃ teṣāṃ phalānāṃ caśaktāvaibhakṣaṇedhunā
dvijāūcuḥ
asmākaṃ vacanenātradhātrīṇāṃ bhakṣaṇaṃ śivam
athatebhyo varaṃ labdhvādhātrīvṛkṣaṃ piśācakaiḥ
samāruhyaphalaṃ prāpyabhakṣitaṃ līlayātadā
tatodevālayāttūrṇaṃ rathaṃ pīnasuśobhanam
āgataṃ taṃ samāruhyasacāṇḍālapiśācakāḥ
skaṃ da uvāca
dhātrībhakṣaṇamātreṇapuṇyaṃ labdhvādivaṅgatāḥ
tadbhakṣiṇaḥ kathaṃsvargaṃ nagacchanti narādayaḥ
īśvara uvāca
pūrvaṃ tejñānalopāccanajānanti hitāhitam
ucchiṣṭaṃ śvabhir utspṛṣṭaṃ śleṣmamūtraṃ śakṛttuvā
matvācamohitāḥśreṣṭhaṃ pretādanti sadaivahi
śakṛcchaucajalaṃ vāṃ taṃ balisūkarakukkuṭaiḥ
durdāṃ tāgṛhiṇīyasyaśucisaṃ yamavarjitā
guruniḥsāritāduṣṭāsanti pretāś ca tatra vai
apuṅgavāḥkulair jātyābalotsāhavivarjitāḥ
badhirāś ca kṛśādīnāḥpiśācāḥkarmajātayaḥ
kṣaṇaṃ camaṅgalaṃ nāstiduḥkhair dehayutābhṛśam
tenaivavikṛtākārāḥsarvabhogavivarjitāḥ
nagnakārogasaṃ taptāmṛtārūkṣāmalīmasāḥ
etecānyecaduḥkhārtāḥsadaivapretajātayaḥ
tenakarmavipākenajāyaṃ tekāmamīdṛśāḥ
pitṛmātṛgurūṇāṃ cadevaniṃ dāparāś ca ye
pāṣaṇḍāḥkaulikāḥpāpāstepretāḥkarmajābhuvi
galapāśair jalaiḥśastrair garalair ātmaghātakāḥ
ihalokecatepretāścāṇḍālādiṣu sambhavāḥ
aṃ tyajāḥpatitāś caiva pāparogamṛtāś ca ye
mahāpātakasaṃ yuktāvivāhecabahiṣkṛtāḥ
śauryātsāhasikāyecatepretāḥkarmajābhuvi
rājadrohakarāyecapitṝṇāṃ drohaciṃ takāḥ
dhyānādhyayanahīnāś ca vratair devārcanādibhiḥ
amantrāḥsnānahīnāś ca gurustrīgamaneratāḥ
tathaivacāṃ tyajastrīṣudurgatāsucasaṅgatāḥ
mṛtāḥkrūropavāsenamlecchadeśasthitāmṛtāḥ
mlecchabhāṣāyutāśuddhāstathāmlecchopajīvinaḥ
striyoyaiś ca narakṣyaṃ tetepretānātrasaṃśayaḥ
kṣudhāsaṃ taptadehaṃ tuśrāṃ taṃ vipraṅgṛhāgatam
guṇapuṇyātithiṃ tyaktvāpiśācatvaṃ vrajanti te
vikrīṇanti cavaigāś ca mleccheṣu cagavāśiṣu
aśaucābhyaṃ tareyecajātāś ca paśavomṛtāḥ
ciraṃ pretāḥpiśācāś ca mṛtājātāḥpunaḥpunaḥ
snānasaṃ dhyāsurārcābhir vedayajṣavratākṣaraiḥ
ājanmavarjitāḥpāpāstepretāścāpunarbhavāḥ
bhojanocchiṣṭapātrāṇiyāni dehamalāni ca
nipātayanti yetīrthetepretānātrasaṃśayaḥ
pretalokeciraṃ sthitvājāyaṃ tecāṃ tyayoniṣu
patiṃ cavaṃ cayitvāyāviṣayendriyamohitāḥ
miṣṭaṃ cādanti yāḥpāpāstāstupretāściraṃ bhuvi
viṇmūtrabhakṣakāyecabrahmasvabhakṣaṇeratāḥ
abhakṣyabhakṣakāścānyetepretāścāpunarbhavāḥ
tasmād āmalakīṃ bhuktvāsnātvātasyadraveṇaca
tasmāt sarvaprayatnenasevayāmalakīṃ śivām
yaidaṃ śṛṇuyānnityaṃ puṇyākhyānam idaṃ śubham
sarvapāpaprapūtātmāviṣṇuloke mahīyate
śrāvayetsatataṃ lokevaiṣṇaveṣu viśeṣataḥ
sayātiviṣṇusāyujyamitipaurāṇikāviduḥ
skaṃ da uvāca
mahīruhaphalaṃ jṣātaṃ prapūtaṃ dvividhaṃ prabho
idānīṃ śrotumicchāmipatraṃ puṣpaṃ sumokṣadam
īśvara uvāca
sarvebhyaḥpatrapuṣpebhyaḥsattamātulasīśivā
sarvakāmapradāśuddhāvaiṣṇavīviṣṇusupriyā
yāmāśrityagatāḥsvargamakṣayaṃ munisattamāḥ
hitārthaṃsarvalokānāṃ viṣṇunāropitāpurā
yathāviṣṇoḥpriyālakṣmīryathāhaṃ priya eva ca
tuṣyatedaityahāviṣṇustulasyāś ca dalair vinā
tenadattaṃ hutaṃ jṣātaṅkṛtaṃ yajṣavratādikam
janmajanmanibhāsitvaṃ sukhaṃ bhāgyaṃ yaśaḥśriyaṃ
kulaṃ śīlaṅkalatraṃ caputraṃ duhitaraṃ tathā
dhanaṃ rājyamarogatvaṃ jñānaṃ vijñānameva ca
vedavedāṅgaśāstraṃ capurāṇāgamasaṃ hitāḥ
yathāgaṅgāpavitrāṅgīsuralokevimokṣadā
yathābhāgīrathīpuṇyātathaivaṃ tulasīśivā
kiṃ cagaṅgājalenaivakiṃ capuṣkarasevayā
tasmāt tāṃ saṃ nikṛṣṭetusadādevīṃ prapūjayet
yecapretāś ca kūśmāṇḍāḥpiśācābrahmarākṣasāḥ
alakṣmīrnāśinīghūrṇāyāḍākinyādimātaraḥ
sarvāḥsaṅkocitāṃ yānti dṛṣṭvā tutulasīdalaṃ
brahmahatyādayaḥpāpavyādhayaḥpāpa sambhavāḥ
kṛtaṅkratuśataṃ tenavidhivatpriyadakṣiṇam
hariliṅgeṣu cānyeṣu sālagrāmaśilāsuca
tulasīgrahaṇaṅkṛtvāviṣṇoḥsāyujyamāvrajet
naṃ danti puruṣāstasyamādhavārthekṣitautuyaḥ
tulasīṃ ropayeddhīraḥsayātimādhavālayam
pūjayitvāhariṃ devaṃ nirmālyaṃ tulasīdalam
dhārayedyaḥsvaśīrṣetupāpātpūtodivaṃ vrajet
pūjanekīrttanedhyāneropaṇedhāraṇekalau
tulasīdahatepāpaṃ rsvargaṃ mokṣaṃ dadātica
upadeśaṃ diśedasyāḥsvayamācaratepunaḥ
sarveṣāmapidevānāṃ devīnāṃ macasamaṃ tataḥ
śrāddheṣu yajṣakāryeṣu parṇam ekaṃ ṣaḍānana
guruṃ vipraṃ devatīrthaṃ tasmāt sevayaṣaṇmukha
śikhāyāṃ tulasīṅkṛtvāyastuprāṇānparityajet
yāgatiḥprāpyatedhīraiḥtulasīsevināṃ bhavet
vaiṣṇavatvam avāpnotikimanyaiḥśāstravistaraiḥ
arcitaḥkeśavoyenaśākhāmṛdulapallavaiḥ
bhāvayetpuruṣānmartyaḥśataśothasahasraśaḥ
pūjayitvāhariṃ nityaṅkomalaistulasīdalaiḥ
pradhānatoguṇāstātatulasyāgaditāmayā
nikhilaṃ purukālenaguṇaṃ vaktuṃ naśaknumaḥ
yastvidaṃ śṛṇuyānnityamākhyānaṃ puṇyasaṃ cayam
sakṛtpaṭhanamātreṇavahniṣṭomaphalaṃ labhet
nacādhayonacapretānaśokonāvamānanā
natiṣṭhanti kṣaṇaṃ tatra yatreyaṃ vartatelipiḥ
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe prathame sṛṣṭikhaṇḍe
tulasīmāhātmyaṃ nāma
ṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ
ekaṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ
dvijā ūcuḥ
tulasīpuṣpamāhātmyaṃ śrutaṃ tvattohareḥśubham
tasyāstotraṅkṛtaṃ puṇyaṃ śrotumicchāmahevayam
vyāsa uvāca
purāskaṃ dapurāṇecayanmayākīrtitaṃ dvijāḥ
śatānaṃ damuneḥśiṣyāḥsarvetesaṃ śitavratāḥ
śatānaṃ da uvāca
nāmoccārekṛtetasyāḥprīṇātyasuradarpahā
pāpāni vilayaṃ yānti puṇyaṃ bhavaticākṣayam
sā kathaṃ tulasīlokaiḥpūjyatevaṃ dyatena hi
darśanādevayasyāstudānaṅkoṭigavāṃ bhavet
sālagrāmaśilārthaṃ tutulasīpratyahaṅkṣitau
keśavārthaṅkalauyecaropayaṃ tīhabhūtale
kiṅkariṣyatisaṃ ruṣṭoyamopisahaiṅkaṅkaraiḥ
tulasīdalenadeveśaḥpūjitoyenaduḥkhahā
snānedānetathādhyāneprāśanekeśavārcane
keśavārthaṃ cinomitvāṃ varadābhavaśobhane
pūjanaṃ vāsudevasyalakṣakoṭiguṇaṃ bhavet
prabhāvaṃ tava deveśi gāyanti surasattamāḥ
munayaḥ siddhagandharvāḥ pātāle nāgarāṭ svayam
na te prabhāvaṃ jānanti devatāḥ keśavādṛte
guṇānāṃ parimāṇaṃ tu kalpakoṭiśatair api
kṛṣṇānandāt samudbhūtā kṣīrodamathanodyame
uttamāṅge purā yena tulasī viṣṇunā dhṛtā
prāpyaitāni tvayā devi viṣṇor aṅgāni sarvaśaḥ
pavitratā tvayā prāptā tulasīṃ tvāṃ namāmy aham
tathā kuruṣva me'vighnaṃ yato yāmi parāṃ gatim
ropitā gomatītīre svayaṃ kṛṣṇena pālitā
vṛndāvane vicaratā sevitā viṣṇunā svayam
vasiṣṭhavacanāt pūrvaṃ rāmeṇa sarayūtaṭe
rākṣasānāṃ vadhārthāya ropitātvaṃ jagatpriye
ropitā tapaso vṛddhyai tulasīṃ tvāṃ namāmy aham
viyoge vāsudevasya dhyātvā tvāṃ janakātmajā
śaṅkarārthaṃ purā devi pārvatyā tvaṃ himālaye
ropitā tapaso vṛddhyai tulasīṃ tvāṃ namāmy aham
duḥsvapnanāśanārthāya sevitā tvaṃ namo’stu te
dharmāraṇye gayāyāṃ ca sevitā pitṛbhiḥ svayam
sevitā tulasī puṇyā ātmano hitam icchatā
ropitā rāmacandreṇa sevitā lakṣmaṇena ca
pālitā sītayā bhaktyā tulasī daṇḍake vane
trailokyavyāpinī gaṅgā yathā śāstreṣu gīyate
ṛśyamūke ca vasatā kapirājena sevitā
tulasī vālināśāya tārāsaṅgamahetave
praṇamya tulasīdevīṃ sāgarotkramaṇaṃ kṛtam
kṛtakāryaḥ prahṛṣṭaś ca hanūmān punar āgataḥ
tulasīgrahaṇaṃ kṛtvā vimukto yāti pātakaiḥ
athavā muniśārdūla brahmahatyāṃ vyapohati
kṣīrodamathanodbhūte tulasi tvāṃ namāmy aham
dvādaśyāṃ jāgare rātrau yaḥ paṭhet tulasīstavam
dvātriṃśadaparādhāṃś ca kṣamate tasya keśavaḥ
yat pāpaṃ yauvane bālye kaumāre vārdhake kṛtam
tat sarvaṃ vilayaṃ yāti tulasīstavapāṭhataḥ
prītimāyātideveśastuṣṭolakṣmīṃ prayacchati
kuruteśatrunāśaṃ casukhaṃ vidyāṃ prayacchati
tulasīnām amātreṇadevāyacchanti vāṃ chitam
tulasīstavasaṃ tuṣṭāsukhaṃ vṛddhiṃ dadātica
nāśubhaṃ vidyatetasyaśubhamāpnotiniścitam
subhikṣaṃ sarvadātasyadhanaṃ dhānyaṃ capuṣkalam
niś ca lākeśavebhaktirnaviyogaś ca vaiṣṇavaiḥ
dvādaśyāṃ jāgarerātrauyaḥpaṭhettulasīstavam
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe prathame sṛṣṭikhaṇḍe tulasīstavamāhātmyaṃ nāmaikaṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ
dviṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ
dvijāūcuḥ
majjanādakhilaṃ pāpaṅkṣayaṃ yātisuniścitam
mahāpātakamanyaccatadādeśaṃ vadasvanaḥ
pāpātpūto'kṣayaṃ nākamaśnutediviśakravat
surayonernahāni ḥsyādupadeśaṃ vadasvanaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
gatiṃ ciṃ tayatāṃ viprāstūrṇaṃ sāmānyajanmanām
strīpuṃ sāmīkṣaṇādyasmādgaṅgāpāpaṃ vyapohati
gaṅgetismaraṇādevakṣayaṃ yāticapātakam
kīrtanādatipāpāni darśanādgurukalmaṣam
snānātpānāccajāhnavyāṃ pitṝṇāṃ tarpaṇāttathā
mahāpātakavṛndāni kṣayaṃ yānti dinedine
agninādahyatetūlaṃ tṛṇaṃ śuṣkaṅkṣaṇādyathā
tathāgaṅgājalasparśātpuṃ sāṃ pāpaṃ dahetkṣaṇāt
samprāpnotyakṣayaṃ svargaṅgaṅgāsnānenakeśavam
yaśorājyaṃ labhetpuṇyaṃ svargamaṃ teparāṅgatim
pitṝn uddiśya gaṅgāyāṃ yas tu piṇḍaṃ prayacchati
vidhināvākyapūrveṇatasyapuṇyaphalaṃ śṛṇu
annaikenatusāhasraṃ varṣaṃ pūjyaḥsurālaye
evaṃ piḍapradānenanityaṅkratuśataṃ bhavet
dhanaputrayutārogyaṃ sukhasaṃ mānapūjitāḥ
rasātalagatāyecayecakīṭāmahītale
sthāvarepakṣisaṅghādautemartyādhaninonṛpāḥ
jāmātṛbhāgineyaiś ca suhṛnmitraiḥpriyāpriyaiḥ
pradīyatejalaṃ piṇḍaṃ yathopakaraṇānvitam
gaṅgātoyeṣu tīreṣu teṣāṃ svargo'kṣayobhavet
piṇḍādūrdhvaṃ sthitāyecapitaromātṛgotrajāḥ
svargetasyasthitāḥsatvā adhaḥsthāmadhyavāsinaḥ
nityaṃ vāṃ ṣchanti sadgaṅgāṅgacchaṃ tusuranimnagām
ekogacchatigaṅgāṃ yaḥpūyaṃ tetasyapūruṣāḥ
gaṅgākṛtsnaguṇaṃ vaktuṃ naśaktaś ca turānanaḥ
ataḥkiṃ cidvadām yatra bhāgīrathyādvijāguṇam
adyāpi nanivartaṃ teratnapūrṇakṣayeṣu vai
prāsādā yatra sauvarṇāḥ sarvalokordhvagāśśivāḥ
iṣṭadravyaiḥsu sampūrṇāḥstriyo yatra manoramāḥ
pārijātaḥsamāḥpuṣpavṛkṣāḥkalpadrumopamāḥ
purudānair gatiryācagaṅgāṃ saṃ sevatāṃ casā
jārajaṃ patitaṃ duṣṭamaṃ tyajaṅgurughātinam
tyajanti pitaraṃ putrāḥpriyaṃ patnyaḥsuhṛdgaṇāḥ
yathāmātāsvayaṃ janmamalaśaucaṃ cakārayet
kroḍīkṛtyatathāteṣāṅgaṅgāprakṣālayenmalam
bhavanti tesuvikhyātābhogyālaṅkārapūjitāḥ
teṣāṅkulānāṃ lakṣaṃ tubhavāttārayateśivā
smṛtārtihartrīyair dhyātāsaṃ stutāsādhumoditā
gaṅgātārayatenṝṇāmubhauvaṃśaubhavārṇavāt
saṅkrāṃ tiṣuvyatīpātegrahaṇecandrasūryayoḥ
puṇyesnātvātugaṅgāyāṅkulakoṭiṃ samuddharet
śuklapakṣedivāmartyāgaṅgāyāmuttarāyaṇe
prāṇāṃs tyaktvā vrajet svargaṃ punar āvṛttivarjitam
sarvadevamayoviṣṇurgaṅgāviṣṇumayīyataḥ
gaṅgāyāṃ piṇḍadānena pitṝṇāṃ vai tilodakaiḥ
narakasthādivaṃ yānti svargasthāmokṣamāpnuyuḥ
samayācārahīnasya nāsti gaṅgāsamā gatiḥ
kiṃ yajṣair bahuvittāḍhyaiḥ kiṃ tapobhiḥ suduṣkaraiḥ
svargamokṣapradāgaṅgāsukhasaubhāgyapūjitā
bhuktimuktipradāgaṅgāsukhamokṣāgrataḥsthitā
anekajanmasaṅghātapāpaṃ puṃ sāṃ vinaśyati
snānamātreṇa gaṅgāyāṃ sadyaḥ syāt puṇyabhāṅ naraḥ
labhateyatphalaṃ dānegaṅgāsnānāddinedine
dṛṣṭvā tuharatepāpaṃ spṛṣṭvātulabhatedivam
prasaṅgādapisāgaṅgāmokṣadātvavagāhitā
sarvendriyāṇāṃ cāpalyaṃ vāsanāśakti sambhavam
nirghṛṇatvaṃ tatogaṅgādarśanātpravinaśyati
paradravyābhikāṅkṣitvaṃ paradārābhilāṣitā
sarvabhūtasamatvaṃ ca gaṅgāyāṃ majjanād bhavet
yas tu gaṅgāṃ samāśritya sukhaṃ tiṣṭhati mānavaḥ
gaṅgāṃ saṃ śrityayastiṣṭhettasyakāryaṃ navidyate
kṛtakṛtyaḥ savaimuktojīvanmuktaś ca mānavaḥ
yajṣodānantapojapyaṃ śrāddhaṃ casurapūjanam
gaṅgāyāṃ tu kṛtaṃ nityaṃ koṭikoṭiguṇaṃ bhavet
anyasthānekṛtaṃ pāpaṅgaṅgātīrevinaśyati
gaṅgātīrekṛtaṃ pāpaṅgaṅgāsnānenanaśyati
naraḥ snātvā tu gaṅgāyāṃ svakulaṃ ca samuddharet
ādareṇayathāstautidhanavaṃ taṃ sadānaraḥ
sakṛdgaṅgāṃ tathāstutvābhavetsvargasyabhājanam
aśraddhayāpi gaṅgāyāṃ yo’sau nāmānukīrtanaṃ
kṣitaubhāvayatomartyānnāgāṃ stārayatepyadhaḥ
divitārayatedevāngaṅgātripathagāsmṛtā
jñānato’jñānato vāpi kāmato'kāmato’pi vā
gaṅgāyāṃ ca mṛto martyaḥ svargaṃ mokṣaṃ ca vindati
sāgatistyajataḥprāṇāngaṅgāyāṃ tuśarīriṇaḥ
cāṃ drāyaṇasahasrāṇiyaś ca retkāyaśodhanam
pānaṅkuryādyathecchaṃ cagaṅgāṃ bhaḥsaviśiṣyate
tāvatprabhāvastīrthānāṃ devānāṃ tuviśeṣataḥ
tāvatprabhāvovedānāṃ yāvannāpnotijāhnavīm
tisraḥkoṭyordhakoṭīcatīrthānāṃ vāyurabravīt
viṣṇupādābja sambhūtegaṅgetripathagāmini
viṣṇupādaprasūtāsivaiṣṇavīviṣṇupūjitā
trāhimāmenasastasmād ājanmamaraṇāṃ tikāt
śraddhayādharma sampūrṇeśrīmatārajasācate
amṛtenamahādevibhāgīrathipunīhimāṃ
tribhiḥślokavarair ebhir yaḥsnāyājjāhnavījale
janmakoṭikṛtātpāpānmucyatenātrasaṃśayaḥ
mūlamantraṃ pravakṣyāmi jāhnavyāharabhāṣitam
sakṛjjapānnaraḥpūtoviṣṇudehepratiṣṭhati
mantraścāyaṃ
auṃ namogaṅgāyaiviśvarūpiṇyai nārāyaṇyai namo namaḥ
jāhnavītīra sambhūtāṃ mṛdaṃ mūrdhnābibhartiyaḥ
sarvapāpavinirmuktogaṅgāsnānaṃ vinānaraḥ
gaṅgājalorminirdhūtapavanaṃ spṛśateyadi
sapūtaḥkalmaṣādghorātsvargaṃ cākṣayamaśnute
yāvadasthimanuṣyasyagaṅgātoyepratiṣṭhati
pitrorbandhujanānāṃ caanāthānāṅgurorapi
gaṅgāyāmasthipātenanaraḥsvargānnahīyate
gaṅgāṃ prativahed yas tu pitṝṇāmasthikhaṇḍakam
dhanyājānapadāyecapaśavaḥpakṣikīṭakāḥ
sthāvarājaṅgamāścānyegaṅgātīrasamāśritāḥ
krośāṃ taramṛtāyecajāhnavyādvijasattamāḥ
mānavādevatāḥ santi itaremānavābhuvi
gaṅgājaleprayāsyanti tejīvāḥpathiyemṛtāḥ
kīṭāḥpaṃ taṅgāśśalabhāḥpādāghātenagacchatāṃ
yevadanti samuddeśaṅgaṅgāṃ pratijanaṃ dvijāḥ
tecayānti paraṃ puṇyaṅgaṅgāsnānaphalaṃ narāḥ
jāhnavīṃ yecaniṃ danti pāṣaṇḍair hatacetasaḥ
gaṅgāgaṅgetiyobrūyādyojanānāṃ śatair api
aṃ dhāś ca paṅgavastecavṛthābhavasamudbhavāḥ
garbhapātādvipadyaṃ teyegaṅgāṃ nagatānarāḥ
nakīrtayanti yegaṅgāṃ jaḍatulyānarādhamāḥ
parānnopadiśanti smavātūlāścittavibhramāḥ
napaṭhanti janāyecateṣāṃ śāstraṃ viniṣphalam
gaṅgāpuṇyaphalaṃ viprāḥkudhiyaḥpatitādhamāḥ
pāṭhayanti janāyecaśraddhayāni paṭhanti ca
bhāgīrathyālabhetsnānaṃ yaḥparānnenagacchati
icchayāni cchayācāpipreraṇenānyasevayā
jāhnavīṃ yogataḥpuṇyāṃ sagacchennirjarālayam
dvijāūcuḥ
gaṅgāyāḥkīrtanaṃ vyāsaśrutaṃ tvattovinirmalam
gaṅgā kasmāt kimākārākutaḥsāhyatipāvanī
vyāsa uvāca
śṛṇudhvaṃ kathayāmyadyakathāṃ puṇyāṃ purātanīṃ
yāṃ śrutvā mokṣamārgaṃ caprāpnotinarasattamaḥ
brahmalokaṃ purā gatvā nāradomunipuṅgavaḥ
kiṃ sṛṣṭaṃ catvayātātasaṃ mataṃ śaṃ bhukṛṣṇayoḥ
devīvādevatākāvāsarvāsāmuttamottamā
yāṃ samāsādyadevāś ca daityamānuṣapannagāḥ
aṇḍajāḥsvedajāvṛkṣāyecānyaudbhijjādayaḥ
sṛjatācapurāproktāmāyāprakṛtirūpiṇī
ādyābhavasvalokānāṃ tvattobhavaṃ sṛjāmy aham
etacchrutvāparāsācasaptadhācābhavat tadā
gāyatrīvākcasvarlakṣmīḥ sarvasasyavasupradā
jñānavidyā umādevīśaktibījātapasvinī
varṇikādharmadravāca etāḥ saptaprakīrtitāḥ
gāyatrīprabhavāvedāvedātsarvaṃ sthitaṃ jagat
svastisvāhāsvadhādīkṣā etāgāyatrijāsmṛtāḥ
uccārayetsadāyajṣegāyatrīṃ mātṛkādibhiḥ
krataudevāḥsvadhāṃ prāpyabhaveyurajarāmarāḥ
tataḥ sudhārasaṃ devāmumucurdharaṇītale
athasasyavatīpṛthvīoṣadhīnāṃ parāśubhā
bhāratī sarvalokānāṃ cānanemānasesthitā
vijñānaṅkalahaṃ śokaṃ mohāmohaṃ śivāśivam
kamalā sambhavaś caiva vastrabhūṣaṇasaṃ cayaḥ
sukhaṃ rājyaṃ triloketutataḥsāharivallabhā
umayāhetunāśaṃ bhorjñānaṃ lokeṣu saṃ tatam
jñānamātācasājṣeyāśaṃ bhorardhāṅgavāsinī
sarvalokeṣu lokānāṃ sthitisaṃhārakāriṇī
nihatā līlayā devyā ye'surā daityapuṅgavāḥ
evaṃ balāni daityānāṃ nihatya sarvadā tayā
mahatīṃ tāṃ samālokya mayā kamaṇḍalau dhṛtā
viṣṇupādābjasambhūtāśaṃ bhunāśirasādhṛtā
asmābhiś ca tribhir yuktābrahmaviṣṇumaheśvaraiḥ
dharmadravāparikhyātājalarūpākamaṇḍalau
baliyajṣeṣu sambhūtāviṣṇunāprabhaviṣṇunā
chadmanāchalitaḥpūrvaṃ balirbalavatāṃ varaḥ
tataḥpādadvayenaivakrāṃ taṃ sarvaṃ mahītalam
nabhaḥpādaś ca brahmāṇḍaṃ bhitvāmamapuraḥsthitaḥ
mayā sampūjitaḥpādaḥkamaṇḍalujalenavai
prakṣālyaivārcitātpādāddhemakūṭe'patajjalam
tatkūṭācchaṅkaraṃ prāpyabhramatesājaṭāsthitā
ānīyārādhitonityaṃ tapasāgajapuṅgavaḥ
tenabhitvānagaṃ vīryāttribhir daṃ taiḥkṛtaṃ bilam
samāsādyacatāṃ devīṃ sarvadharmaphalaṃ labhet
sāgatirnabhavejjanto rgaṅgāsaṃ sevayācayā
trailokyapuṇyasaṃ yogāttasmāt tāṃ vrajanārada
gaṅgātoyāsthisaṃ yogātsutāstesagarasyaca
svargatāḥpitṛbhiś caiva svapūrvāparajaiḥsaha
gaṅgādvāretapaḥkṛtvābrahmaṇāsadṛśobhavat
sarvatrasulabhāgaṅgātriṣusthāneṣu durlabhā
gaṅgādvāreprayāgecagaṅgāsāgarasaṅgame
trirātreṇaikarātreṇanaroyātiparāṅgatim
tatogacchatadharmajṣāḥśivāṃ bhāgīrathīmiha
viśeṣātkalikālecagaṅgāmokṣapradānṛṇāṃ
kṛcchrāccakṣīṇasatvānām anantaḥpuṇya sambhavaḥ
tatas tebrāhmaṇāhṛṣṭāḥśrutvā vyāsādgiraṃ śubhām
gaṅgāyāṃ tutapastaptvāmokṣamārgaṃ yayustadā
yaidaṃ śṛṇuyānmartyaḥpuṇyākhyānamanuttamam
dānaṃ japyaṃ tathādhyānaṃ stotraṃ mantraṃ surārcanam
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe prathame sṛṣṭikhaṇḍe gaṅgāmāhātmyaṃ nāma
dviṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ
triṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ
triṣaṣṭhitamo'dhyāyaḥ
etasminnantarepūrvaṃ vyāsaśiṣyomahāmuniḥ
namaskṛtyaguruṃ bhīṣmasaṃ jayaḥparipṛcchati
devānāṃ pūjanopāyaṅkramaṃ brūhi suniścitam
aṃ tecapūjākasyaivakasyakovāprabhāvakaḥ
kiṃ vākaṃ caphalaṃ brahmanpūjayitvālabhennaraḥ
vyāsa uvāca
taucadṛṣṭvā nagasutāsidhyarthaṃ paryabhāṣata
guṇaṃ cāsyapravakṣyāmi śṛṇutaṃ tusamāhitau
sarvaśāstrārthatattvajṣaḥsarvaśastrāstrakovidaḥ
nipuṇaḥsarvataṃ treṣu lekhakaścit rakṛtsudhīḥ
jñānavijñānatattvajṣaḥsarvajṣonātrasaṃśayaḥ
śrutvā mātṛmukhādevaṃ vacaḥparamakovidaḥ
barhiṇaṃ svaṃ samāruhyatvabhiṣekaḥkṛtaḥkṣaṇāt
pitaraupradakṣiṇaṅkṛtvālaṃ bodaradharaḥ sudhīḥ
tatas tutausamīkṣyāthapārvatīvismitābravīt
pitrorarcākṛtaḥkopikalāṃ nārhatiṣoḍaśīm
tasmāt sutaśatādeṣodhikaḥśataguṇair api
asyaivakāraṇādasyaagrepūjāmakheṣu ca
vedaśāstrastavādaucanityaṃ pūjāvidhāsuca
asyaivapūjanādagredevāstuṣṭābhavaṃ tuca
sarvāsāmapidevīnāṃ pitṝṇāṃ casamaṃ tataḥ
tataḥsarveṣu yajṣeṣu pūjayedgaṇapaṃ dvijaḥ
koṭikoṭiguṇaṃ teṣu devadevīvacoyathā
datvāsarvaguṇaṃ puṇyaṃ devadevyātathāmudā
kṛtaṅgaṇādhipatyaṃ casarvadevāgratastadā
tasmāt prājyeṣu yajṣeṣu stotreṣu nityapūjane
gaṇeśaṃ pūjayitvātusarvasiddhiṃ labhennaraḥ
evaṃ jṣātvātudevaistudayitaprāptikāmyayā
naktāhāraś ca turthyāṃ tupūjayitvāgaṇādhipaṃ
umānaṃ dapradaprājṣatrāhimāṃ bhavasāgarāt
harānaṃ dakaradhyānajñānavijñānada prabho
kṛtopavāsogaṇapaṃ pūjayedyonaromudā
stotraṃ tasyapravakṣyāmi nāmadvādaśakaṃ śubhaṃ
oṃ namogaṇapatayemantra eṣaudāhṛtaḥ
gaṇapatirvighnarājolaṃ batuṇḍogajānanaḥ
vināyakaścārukarṇaḥpaśupālobhavātmajaḥ
dvādaśaitāni nāmāni prātarutthāyayaḥpaṭhet
mahāpretāśśamaṃ yānti pīḍyatevyādhibhir naca
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe prathame sṛṣṭikhaṇḍe gaṇapatistotraṃ nāma
triṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ
catuṣṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
sarvasiddhikaraṃ pūtaṃ sarvābhīṣṭaphalapradaṃ
ekadaṃ taṃ mahākāyaṃ taptakāṣcanasannibham
laṃ bodaraṃ viśālākṣaṃ vaṃ dehaṅgaṇanāyakaṃ
muṃ jakṛṣṇājinadharaṃ nāgayajṣopavītakam
bāleṃ dukalikāmauliṃ vaṃ dehaṅgaṇanāyakaṃ
yoddhukāmaṃ mahābāhuṃ vaṃ dehaṅgaṇanāyakam
aṃ bikāhṛdayānaṃ daṃ mātṛkāpariveṣṭitam
citraratnavicitrāṅgaṃ citramālāvibhūṣaṇam
kāmarūpadharaṃ devaṃ vaṃ dehaṅgaṇanāyakam
gajavaktraṃ suraśreṣṭhaṃ cārukarṇavibhūṣitam
pāśāṅkuśadharaṃ devaṃ vaṃ dehaṅgaṇanāyakam
stūyamānaṃ mahādehaṃ vaṃ dehaṅgaṇanāyakam
gaṇāṣṭakam idaṃ puṇyaṃ bhaktitoyaḥpaṭhennaraḥ
yaidaṃ paṭhatenityaṃ mahārājobhavennaraḥ
vaśyaṅkarotitrailokyaṃ paṭhanācchravaṇādapi
stotraṃ paraṃ mahāpuṇyaṅgaṇapasyamahātmanaḥ
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe prathame sṛṣṭikhaṇḍe gaṇapatistotraṃ nāma
catuṣṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ
paṣcaṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
nāṃ dīmukheṣu sarveṣu pūjayedyogaṇādhipam
gaṇānāṃ tvetimantreṇasarvayajṣaghaṭeṣu ca
mṛṇmayepratimāyāṃ cacitrecāthadṛṣaṇmaye
dvāradāruṇipātrecaherabaṃ lekhayedbudhaḥ
sthāpayitvātuherabaṃ śaktyāyaḥpūjayedbudhaḥ
tasyakāryāṇisiddhyanti dayitāni samaṃ tataḥ
vidyārthīlabhatevidyāṃ vedaśāstrasamudbhavām
anyāṃ caśilpividyāṃ cavijayāṃ svargadāyinīm
dhanārthīvipulaṃ vittaṅkanyāṃ sādhvīṃ manoramām
mantraścāyaṃ auṃ namogaṇapataye
nārāyaṇapriyaiḥpuṣpair anyaiścāpisugandhibhiḥ
pūjopakaraṇaṃ vastraṃ sarvaṃ lakṣaguṇaṃ bhavet
lauhityadakṣiṇetīreliṅgarūpovināyakaḥ
haragaurīsamādeśāddevānāṃ saṃ matenaca
sthitolokapraśāṃ tyarthaṃsarvavighnavināśanāt
pūjayitvātutaṃ devaṃśaktitodravyasaṃ cayaiḥ
vināyakatvam āpnotivedaśāstrārthapāragaḥ
sakṛtpradakṣiṇaṅkṛtvādṛṣṭvā spṛṣṭvātumānavaḥ
saṃ sargiṇāṃ camlechānāṅgatyarthaṃsutapasvinām
putrārthaṃsarvalokānāṃ tatra śaṃ bhurvināyakaḥ
kṛtvābhiṣekaṃ lauhityespṛśed yas tu gaṇādhipam
saptajanmakṛtātpāpānmucyatenātrasaṃśayaḥ
pūjayitvātugaṇapaṃ narasyanātrasaṃśayaḥ
asyapūjāmakṛtvācasarvābhīṣṭaṃ vinaśyati
tatra devāś ca suprītābrahmaviṣṇuharādayaḥ
athāsurair mahāvīryair hiraṇyākṣamukhair aṇe
maghavātujitovīryāddhiraṇyākṣeṇavaitadā
tataḥ surāś ca nirvīryāyāvadvarṣaśataṃ purā
daivāsuremahāyuddhesurāṇāṃ caparājayaḥ
heraṃ bāyavarodataumayāprītayāmayā
pūjayāteparāsiddhirdevādīnāṃ bhavatviti
mahāmakhenayuṣmābhiḥpūjāgaṇapateḥkṛtā
helayānakṛtāmohāttasmāt prāptaḥparājayaḥ
śīghraṅgacchatavaipuṇyāṅgaṇapasyamahātmanaḥ
pūjāṅkurutadharmajṣājayastūrṇaṃ bhaviṣyati
prahṛṣṭāvibudhāḥ sarvegaṇapasyapuraḥsthitāḥ
devāūcuḥ
svargabhogapradaprītyāheraṃ batvāṃ natāḥsmaha
mahāmāyaṃ mahākāyaṃ heraṃ batvāṃ natāḥsmaha
ekadaṃ taṃ mahāprājṣaṃ laṃ batuṇḍaṃ vināyakam
devaṃ maharṣidevānāṃ mindrasyacanatāḥsmaha
yattepurārcanaṃ yajṣenakṛtaṃ tatkṣamasvanaḥ
surāṇāṃ cagiraḥśrutvā gaṇapovākyamabravīt
yuṣmābhir vriyatāṃ devāvaromattohivāṃ cchitaḥ
tataḥśakrādayaḥsarvebṛhaspatipurogamāḥ
ūcurgaṇapatiṃ devājayosmākaṃ bhavatviti
devānāṃ vacanaṃ śrutvā gaṇeśovākyamabravīt
bāḍhamevasuraśreṣṭhājayovobhavatudrutam
tatodevagaṇāḥ sarveharṣanirbharamānasāḥ
gaṇeśaṃ pūjayāmāsurgandhasāraistumaṇḍanaiḥ
savidhāsyativaḥkāmaṃ vāṃ cchitaṃ catataḥsurāḥ
pītāṃ baraṃ namaskṛtyaūcurdevagaṇāmudā
harātmajaṃ tu samprāpyapūjayitvāgaṇādhipam
āgatāstvatsakāśaṃ vaimahātmannadyakeśava
etacchrutvātudevānāṃ vacanaṃ hariravyayaḥ
śrutvā vāgamṛtaṃ devānārāyaṇamukhāccyutam
hṛṣṭāś ca sumudāviṣṭādravyair iṣṭaiḥsamarcayan
punarviṣṇur uvācedaṃ devānindrapurogamān
svaṃ svaṃ balaṃ samāhṛtyasajjībhavatavijvarāḥ
hariṣyetāndurācārānbalaṃ caiva samaṃ tataḥ
astravṛndaṃ tusaṅgṛhyayūyanti ṣṭhatanirbhayāḥ
mādhavasyavacaḥśrutvā pragatāḥsurapuṅgavāḥ
vimānāni samāruhyasarvedivyāstradhāriṇaḥ
devānāṃ harṣavākyāni daityacāraiḥśrutāni vai
rājānaṃ kathayāmāsurhiraṇyākṣaṃ mahābalam
adhunendrādidevāś ca nikhilāḥkrūrabuddhayaḥ
kathaṃ jayaṃ calapsyāmodaityavṛndetidāruṇe
tripurārir uvācedaṅgaṇeśaṃ yajatāmarāḥ
pūjayitvātutaṃ devaṃ jeṣyathāsuradānavān
tatodevagaṇair hṛṣṭaiḥpūjitogaṇanāyakaḥ
gaṇādhipenatuṣṭenakrūrodattovaromahān
jeṣyathādyāsurānsarvāṃ statodevāmudānvitāḥ
harerbāḍhamupaśrutyarathinaḥśastrapāṇayaḥ
yasyayāśaktirastīhadevāṣjetuṃ vadatvalam
tatorājṣovacaḥśrutvā madhurvacanamabravīt
jeṣyāmicahariṃ rājansahāyaṃ meniyojaya
jitenārāyaṇedevāḥsabhayāstridaśādhruvam
tasmānnārāyaṇo'smākaṃ bhāgaḥsarvapuraṃ jayaḥ
tatodhuṃ dhuś ca suṃ daś ca kālakeyomahābalaḥ
sahāyaś ca madhostasyajeṣyāmomādhavaṃ nṛpa
sarvadaityabalemukhyāś ca tvārodṛḍhavikramāḥ
kālamṛtyusamāvīrāḥsarvāstravidhipāragāḥ
taṃ cajeṣyāmijiṣṇuṃ capratijṣāmedṛḍhā nṛpa
ūcatustau nṛpaṃ hyāvāṃ jeṣyāvovaibalādbalau
jeṣyāminātrasaṃ dehodaityābhavatavijvarāḥ
tripuraścābravīdvākyaṃ jeṣyāmicavināyakam
tāvadūce'thasenānīrmayodevāṃ takobalī
kuberaṃ pratirakṣobhiḥsarvāṃ ś caiva hiraṇyakān
gatvovāca hiraṇyākṣaṃ jiṣṇudūtohamāgataḥ
rājyaṃ tyajasvavācānaḥprāṇeṣu yaditehitam
tataḥkopād uvācedaṃ nāradaṃ munisattamam
ahiṃ syastvaṃ brāhmāṇādyagacchatūrṇaṃ mamāgrataḥ
devānāṃ cavipattiṃ cakadanaṃ nidhanaṃ puraḥ
paśyaviprakṣaṇenāṃ taṃ prāptaṃ hariharādikam
sajjīkṛtyabalaṃ sarvānrathāṃ ścānayatadrutam
daityarājavacaḥśrutvā balādhyakṣaḥsamaṃ tataḥ
balānyāhūyasahasāsaṃ trastāstūrṇamāgatāḥ
koṭikoṭisahasrāṇiakṣauhiṇyobalāni ca
syaṃ danāni vicitrāṇigajoṣṭrāśvakharānapi
siṃ havyāghralulāyāṃ ś ca samāruhyayayustadā
vādyaiḥsarvaiś ca bhūyiṣṭhaiḥsiṃ hanādair bhayānakaiḥ
diśastupūrayāmāsuiḥ sandhuvelācalādharāḥ
sarvalokāś ca vitresuḥsamudrāś ca cakaṃ pire
devaduṃ dubhayoneduḥsarvadevaiḥsamīritāḥ
bhraṣṭakāmāgatākāśaṅghoraṃ tīvraṃ mahāhavam
parighaiḥpāśaśūlaiś ca khaḍgayaṣṭiparaśvadhaiḥ
śastrāstrair bahudhāmuktair diśaḥsarvāni raṃ taram
vigṛheṣu dharaṇyāṃ caparvateṣu jaleṣu ca
devasthānetathākāśeparvatāgreṣu sānuṣu
puṣkalādighanānāṃ cavarṣadhārājalaṃ yathā
pataṃ tyastrāṇisainyeṣu śataśothasahasraśaḥ
kecitpetuḥpṛthivyāṃ tuśaraiḥ sambhinnavigrahāḥ
śaktibhir musalaiścānyechatraśūlaparaśvadhaiḥ
patitāḥsaṃ mukheśūrāyuddheṣu nyāyavartinaḥ
yecānyekātarāḥpāpāhaṃ tārovimukhānraṇe
tridivasthāgajārohāḥsaindhavasthāstathāparān
rathasthāṃ ś ca rathārohāḥpadagāṃ ś ca padātayaḥ
parasparaṃ vinighnanti śūrāyuddhābhikāṅkṣiṇaḥ
muditāḥsatva sampannādharmiṣṭhābalasaṃ vṛtāḥ
keṣāṃ cidvāhavaiśchannāmusalair bhinnamastakāḥ
keśāśśirāṃ sivastrāṇinipeturdharaṇītale
madhyacchinnāstathābhinnāḥ petururvyāṃ mahābalāḥ
khaḍgapātaistathācograiiśchrannabhinnāḥparaśvadhaiḥ
gāmevapatitādhīrādivyālaṅkārabhūṣitāḥ
pradīptobhūddharādeśovīrair nāgair hayair athaiḥ
vividhābharaṇair naṣṭaiḥpatākābhiś ca ketubhiḥ
tatovasuṃ dharāsarvāsaśailavanakānanā
lohitaṃ pracuraṃ pītaṃ rakṣobhiś ca vṛkādibhiḥ
khāditaṃ prītimadbhiś ca pherugṛdhragaṇair mudā
mṛtasaṃ jīvanīvidyāṃ surāṇāṃ saṃ jajāpaha
viśalyakaraṇīṃ divyāṃ brahmavidyāṃ mahābalāṃ
tatra devāś ca jīvanti yemṛtāś ca mahāhave
avraṇābala sampannāḥprayudhyanti bhṛśaṃ punaḥ
tatas tujayaśabdenanaṃ danti siddhacāraṇāḥ
ṛṣayaḥkhecarāścānyeyecaivāpsarasāṅgaṇāḥ
gītiṅgāyanti gandharvāḥśaśaṃ suḥparamarṣayaḥ
jaghānasurasaṅghāṃ stānnartayāmāsabhūtale
niraṃ taraśaraugheṇacchāditaṅgaganantadā
nipatanti śarāḥsainyekoṭikoṭisahasraśaḥ
viśikhaiḥpīḍitādevāni peturdharaṇītale
petururvyāṃ mahāvīryāyeraṇesurapuṅgavāḥ
śaraiḥpravyathitāstetusthātuṃ śaktānasaṃ mukhe
naśekuḥsamaresthātuṃ maghavaṃ taṃ yayustadā
citrarathaitikhyātodevaśśastrabhṛtāṃ varaḥ
yathāhaṃsimahāśūrasurasenāṃ mudānvitaḥ
satvaṃ praśaṃ sanīyaś ca śūrosisurasaṃ mataḥ
hiraṇyākṣapriyaṅkarmakṛtaṃ yuddhetvayādhunā
idānīṃ mamabāṇaiś ca gacchasvayamamaṃ diram
idānīṃ tusthitaṃ yuddhebalaṃ sarvaṃ tuhelayā
ebhistvāṃ niśitair bāṇair nayāmiyamamaṃ diram
punarbāṇāṃ ś ca samareyojayitvādrutaṃ ruṣā
jaghānapracurāndaityāṃ stāṃ ś ca karttasalāghavāt
tatonyonyaṃ śaraistīkṣṇaiḥkālānalasamaprabhaiḥ
yuddhedhanuṣmatāṃ śreṣṭhaścicchedabhuvivegataḥ
draṣṭukāmāgatāḥpārśvam ṛṣidevāḥsuroragāḥ
evaṃśatasahasrāṇibāṇānāṃ vidhṛtāni ca
athakruddhomahātejāgandharvāṇāṃ patistadā
tribhir bibhedabāṇaiś ca lalāṭehṛdipaṣcabhiḥ
śaraiḥ sampātitodaityomugdhaḥkaśmalatāṅgataḥ
śithilīkṛtacāpaś ca lebhesaṃ jṣāṃ cirādbalī
tatobāṇasahasraistukālāṃ takasamaprabhaiḥ
bibhedadaityasiṃ haṃ tusurāṇām uttamobalī
hatacetāḥsadaityendrobahuśoṇitasaṃ sravaḥ
vihvalobahubāṇārtaḥśūlaṃ jagrāhadānavaḥ
hatvācapātayāmāsatribhir yaṃ tārameva ca
jaghānaśūlamurvīṣṭhastatodharvasattamam
vicakarttatribhir bāṇaiḥśūlaṃ citrarathobalī
śūlaṃ canaṣṭakaṃ dṛṣṭvā hatabhogamivoragam
gṛhītvāmudgaraṅghoraṃ pradudrāvasuraṃ balī
samudgaraṃ samāyātaṃ daityasenādhipaṃ tadā
sapapātamahīpṛṣṭhesaṃ cacālavasuṃ dharā
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe prathame sṛṣṭikhaṇḍe kālakeyavadhonāma
paṣcaṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ
ṣaṭṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
bhrātaraṃ nihataṃ dṛṣṭvā kāleyonāmadānavaḥ
citrarathaṃ pradudrāvadhṛtvābāṇaṃ sakārmukam
dṛṣṭvā suraṃ vidhāvaṃ taṅkālamṛtyusamaprabham
arautsīttaṃ mahāvīryojayaṃ taḥpākaśāsaniḥ
śastrābhighātaduḥkhārtaṅkaśmalaṃ cānyasaṃ yutam
jayaṃ tamabravīdvākyaṅkāleyaḥkrodhamūrcchitaḥ
nihatyabhrātṛhaṃ tāramathatvāṃ hanmisāmpratam
tatas taṃ cāsuraśreṣṭhaṅkālānalasamaprabham
yathāvṛṣṭigaṇaṃ prāpyanadīgair ikavāhinī
tathātaucamahāvīryaunakṣīṇaunacakātarau
yaṃ tāraṃ paṣcabhir bāṇaiḥpātayāmāsabhūtale
aṣṭābhir niśitair bāṇaiś ca turośvānapātayāt
śaktiṃ saṅgṛhyabhūmiṣṭhaḥkumāraṃ cajaghānaha
gadayāpīḍitaṃ sāśvaṃ savarūthaṃsakūbaram
pātayitvādharaṇyāṃ casiṃ hanādaṃ nanādaha
lāghavātsadharāṅ gatvā gadāpāṇirupasthitaḥ
vajrapātādyathāśabdolokānāṃ duḥsahobhavet
tathātayorgadāpāteśabdaḥsyāttumuhurmuhuḥ
evaṃ tayorgadāyuddhaṃ yāvadabdacatuṣṭayam
tadāpadātinoryuddhamadbhutaṃ lomaharṣaṇaṃ
dṛṣṭvā cavismayaṃ jagmurdevāsuramahoragāḥ
khaḍgapātair muhūrtāṃ tetayoiśchannetuvarmaṇī
śiraiśchatvāsyakhaḍgenapātayāmāsabhūtale
prabhagnādaityasaṅghāś ca diśaḥsarvāḥpradudruvuḥ
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe prathame sṛṣṭikhaṇḍe kāleyavadhonāma
ṣaṭṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ
saptaṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
saroṣaścātitāmrākṣohyasurānādideśaha
svayaṅgacchāmiyuddhāyadevānāṃ vijighāṃ sayā
etacchrutvātuvacanaṃ śeṣādaityagaṇādhipāḥ
yuddhāyaprayayuḥsarveśūlapāśātipaṇḍitāḥ
adhikaṃ pūrvasainyāś ca tathāśataguṇair api
niraṃ taraṃ tathākāśaṃ prayayuryuddhakāṅkṣiṇaḥ
tatorudrāḥ sasādhyāś ca viśvecavasavastathā
skaṃ daś ca gaṇapaś caiva viṣṇujiṣṇupurogamāḥ
sarveyoddhuṅgatāstecahṛṣṭāraṇasamutsukāḥ
nabhūtaṃ naśrutaṃ pūrvaṃ sarvalokabhayaṅkaram
śastrāstraibarhudhāyuktaṃ śiśireṇevakānanam
dharāṃ svargauka ākāśaṃ saṃ rudhyayuddhamābabhau
anyonyaṃ jaghnurākāśetathānyonyaṃ mahītale
śaktibhir musalair bhallair bahubhiḥśaravṛṣṭibhiḥ
dāruṇaiḥkhaḍgapātaiś ca tathācakraparaḥśvadhaiḥ
abhavanghorarūpāṇidharākāśevyayāni ca
śastraiḥśarair asṛkpātaiḥkaṅkavāyasajaṃ bukaiḥ
tathaivakṣatajaiḥsrastaiḥsvāṅgāccadevadānavāḥ
muṃ canti cārtanādāṃ ś ca siṃ hanādaṃ muhurmuhuḥ
keṣāṃ cidbāhavaśchinnāśchinnapādāstathāpare
chinnapārśvodarāḥkecinnipetuḥśataśobhuvi
koṭikoṭisahasrāṇigajavājyasurāṇica
apatandharaṇīpṛṣṭheraktaughebahudhābhuvi
tatas tudharaṇīpṛṣṭhetvabhavallohitārṇavaḥ
tṛṇakāṣṭhaparās tatra śaktayodārusaṃ cayāḥ
mudgarāmusalāḥśūlāmakarādyābhavanti ca
jayanti kādhvajāmīnāḥkamaṭhāś ca rmakāyakāḥ
śarādibhir mahoṣṭraiś ca niruddhāḥpracuraistathā
keśacāmaraśaivālāḥ sampūrṇāstāstataḥstataḥ
patadbhiś ca tathānyaiś ca vividhaiḥkṣatajārṇavaḥ
tadāvasuṃ dharāsarvāsaśailavanakānanā
parśunāparameṇaivaagnināgniśikhaiḥśaraiḥ
varuṇasyacapāśenabaddhāmagnāyamakṣaye
yeṣāṃ putraiś ca pautraiś ca purogaiḥsacivaistathā
nipātitāś ca daiteyāḥśaraśaktyṛṣṭivṛṣṭibhiḥ
pannagānāṃ viṣair ghorair daityāḥpeturdharātale
pātitāḥprayayuḥ sarvedharaṇyāṃ tugatāsavaḥ
kecidgacchanti pātālaṃ puṇyāpuṇyaprayogataḥ
prayudhyamāneṣv anyeṣu sāmprataṃ sarvajaṃ tuṣu
vibudhair arditādaityāḥśeṣāḥparvatamāśritāḥ
prajagmuś ca diśaḥsarvāḥkātarāraṇabhīravaḥ
ardayāmāsadevāṃ ś ca saṃ yamyāgnisamaiḥśaraiḥ
tasyabāṇārditādevābahavobaladarpitāḥ
patitādharaṇīpṛṣṭhekecidbhagnāraṇājire
dṛṣṭvā tasyamahatkarmadāruṇaṃ lokabhīṣaṇam
śaśaṃ surṛṣayodevās tatra śiṣṭāḥpracukruśuḥ
athakruddhomahātejāśśatakraturariṃ damaḥ
jaghānaśarasaṃ dohair balaṃ balavatāṃ varam
rudhireṇāvasiktāṅgauprasṛtenamahābalau
