tauyathāmādhavemāsipuṣpitaukiṃ śukadrumau
cakrāṇicasahasrāṇiśūlāni musalāni ca
tāni cakrāṇiśūlāni nicakarttaśarottamaiḥ
surarāṭsahasābhrānto līlayāsamarebalī
sacadaityomahātejāḥśaktyā caiva puraṃ daram
nijaghānatadātūrṇaṅgajasthaṃ castanāṃ tare
labdhasaṃ jṣobalaṃ jiṣṇurbibhedadanujaṅkṣaṇāt
carmatīkṣṇaṃ dhvajaṃ tasyaśareṇaikenavīrahā
śareṇaikenasūtasyaśiraścicchedatatkṣaṇāt
nipatyamūrcchitaḥpṛthvyāṃ muhūrtānmṛtyumāpasaḥ
gadāmādāyasahasāsajaghānamahāgajam
prahāreṇārditaḥpadmīsaṃ cacālasavihvalaḥ
rudhireṇāvasiktāṅgovimukhovedanāturaḥ
śatakratuṃ vidhāvanti śataśothasahasraśaḥ
ardhacandraiḥkṣurapraiś ca cicchedapākaśāsanaḥ
jaṃ tubhistasyamāyābhir arditāḥ surapuṅgavāḥ
dṛṣṭvā tasyamahatkarmamādhavoviśikhāṃ stathā
tatojiṣṇustribhir bāṇaiḥpātayāmāsabhūtale
dadhāramudgaraṅghoraṃ śakraṃ haṃ tuṃ samudyataḥ
sapapātamahīpṛṣṭhekṣatavakṣāmahābalaḥ
sādhusādhvitidevāś ca siddhāś caiva maharṣayaḥ
apūjayaṃ stadāśakraṃ bahubhiḥpuṣpavṛṣṭibhiḥ
gītaṅgāyanti gandharvānanṛtuścāpsarogaṇāḥ
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe prathame sṛṣṭikhaṇḍe balanamucivadhonāma
saptaṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ
aṣṭaṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāya
vyāsa uvāca
balaṃ canihataṃ dṛṣṭvā namuciṃ casvakāgrajam
mucistatrābravīdvākyaṃ jyeṣṭhomesūditastvayā
parokṣeṇādhunātvāṃ caśarair neṣyāmibhāskarim
tamabravīnmahātejāḥśakraḥsarvasurārcitaḥ
vahneruṣṇamavijṣāyapramohācchalabhāyathā
sahasāpraviśaṃ tyagniṃ tathāmāṃ yoddhumicchasi
evaṃ bruvāṇamindraṃ cajaghānaviśikhaistribhiḥ
sacicchedatribhir bāṇaiḥśakraḥparapuraṃ jayaḥ
āyasīṃ tāṅgadāṅkopānmahābalaparākramaḥ
devāḥpracakrurnṛtyāni dānavāvipradudruvuḥ
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe prathame sṛṣṭikhaṇḍe mucivadhonāmāṣṭa
ṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
vicakartaśarāṃ stāṃ stānnirbibhedaśarottamaiḥ
sadaityaḥ sahasāskaṃ daṃ chādayāmāsamārgaṇaiḥ
tāreyogniśaraiḥskaṃ daṃ jaghānaraṇamūrdhani
vaiśvānareṇasenānīs tatra samparyavārayat
tannirastaṅkṛtaṃ tenabāṇenāsphālitenaca
aghoraṃ prākṣipaddaityoghorarūpaṃ sudāruṇaṃ
bhūdharāviṭapāsiṃ sahāstathāsarpādayaḥśarāḥ
dhāvanti pārvatīputraṅkoṭikoṭisahasraśaḥ
chitvātāṃ stuśarānskaṃ dobibhedadaityapuṅgavaṃ
āpādaṃ śīrṣaparyaṃ taṃ śarair agnyarkasannibhaiḥ
svarṇapuṅkhāḥśarālagnādehedaityapaterbhṛśaṃ
rejustesvarṇaśakalāyathākṛṣṇaśiloccaye
tasyadehāttataś caiva bahususrāvaśoṇitaṃ
yathācamādhavemāsipurupuṣpaśśamītaruḥ
syaṃ danādhaś ca rāśvāś ca śiiśyarebhūmilagnakāḥ
athakruddhomahādaityaḥśūlaṃ bhīmaṃ cadāruṇaṃ
dhṛtvātaṃ praticikṣepakālamṛtyusamaprabhaṃ
pārvatīnaṃ danenāpiśūlaṃ pāśupatenaha
kṣiptaṃ tenakṛtaṃ dagdhaṃ muhūrtenaraṇājire
punaḥśaktiṃ mumocāthabrahmadattāntudānavaḥ
śūlaṃ pratijaghānāthaśatakūṭasamaprabham
tayoḥ savīryayorastredharaṇyāṃ praṇipetatuḥ
tāṃ stucchitvāmahābāhuḥsenānīścāpamasyavai
tathāśvānbahubhir bāṇaiḥpātayāmāsabhūtale
gṛhītvāmusalaṃ vegātsadudrāvasthaleguhaṃ
jaghānatenadaityendraḥśikhinaṃ śikhivāhanaṃ
tataḥskaṃ daḥpunastaṃ cajaghānāsurapuṅgavaṃ
pracicchedāsināvegānmusalaṃ cātidāruṇaṃ
tāreyaḥśaktimādāyajaghānakrauṃ cadāraṇam
sopiśaktiṃ mumocāthaamoghāṃ duṣṭaghātinīm
tataḥsaṃ dahyasāśaktirviśvapralayakāriṇī
yamadaṇḍasamānaṃ cabhitvāpunarguhaṅgatā
sagatāsuḥpapātorvyāṃ cālayaṃ ś ca vasuṃ dharāṃ
puṣpadhūpādibhiḥskaṃ daḥsarvadevaiḥprapūjitaḥ
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe prathame sṛṣṭikhaṇḍe tāreyavadhonāmaikona
vyāsa uvāca
raṇaṃ cakāradharmeṇasaṃ daṣṭauṣṭhapuṭobalī
sa gatvā cābravīdvākyaṃ sarvalokavigarhitaṃ
najānāsimahaddharmaṃ duṣṭamohādyathākramam
najānāsiyatodharmaṅkālamṛtyupuraḥsaraḥ
dharmātpracalitaḥ karmīkaṣṭaṃ yātidivāni śam
uktaṃ vasuṃ mahāvīryaṃ yamaṃ dharmaikasākṣikam
sajaghānatribhir bāṇaiḥkālamṛtyusamaprabhaiḥ
tatas tūccaiḥśaraiḥprājyair yugāṃ tānalasaprabhaiḥ
nijaghānayamaṃ saṅkhyesacicchedaśaraiḥśarān
etasminnantarekruddhaḥśaktyāpraśamanaṃ ruṣā
bibhedadaityaśārdūlohyahaṅkārayutobalī
tāmevātharuṣādharmogṛhītvāśaktikāṃ drutaṃ
nijaghānatayaivāmuṃ stanayoraṃ tarebhṛśam
savihvalitasarvāṅgomukhādāgataśoṇitaḥ
tataḥkruddhomahātejādhṛtvādaṇḍaṃ sudāruṇam
sāśvaṃ rathaṃ tathāsūtaṃ yoddhāraṃ śastrasaṃ cayam
cakārabhasmasāttaṃ caśamanaḥkrodhamūrcchitaḥ
śamanaṃ śūlahastastupradudrāvajighāṃ sayā
śūlahastaṃ samāyāṃ taṃ baḍavānalasannibham
āsasādaraṇemṛtyuḥśaktihastotinirbhayaḥ
sacadṛṣṭvā 'suromṛtyuṃ śūlenaivajaghānaha
śaktiṃ caiva tatomṛtyuḥpracikṣeparaṇājire
saṃ dahyasahasāśūlaṃ vahnikūṭasamaprabham
daityasyahṛdayaṃ bhitvāgatāsācadharātalam
athānyodurmukhomṛtyuṅkṛṣṭacāpomahābalaḥ
dṛṣṭvā taṃ viśikhaiḥprājyair jaghānasayamaṃ raṇe
śiraścicchedasahasāpātayitvācabhūtale
hataśeṣaṃ balaṃ sarvaṃ pradudrāvadiśodaśa
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe prathame sṛṣṭikhaṇḍe devāṃ takardurdharṣadurmukhavadhonāma
vyāsa uvāca
viśikhair ardayāmasaghorair āśīviṣopamaiḥ
naśaknuvanti bāṇānāṃ vegaṃ soḍhuṃ samaṃ tataḥ
puruhūtaḥsamāsthāyaprāgamattaṃ mahābalam
dṛṣṭvā śakraṃ mahāvīryaṃ namucirdaityapuṅgavaḥ
abravīdvāsavaṃ saṅkhyeva canaṃ sānugaṃ tadā
prākṛtaṃ nirjaraṃ hatvānayaśostinacapriyam
nalābhakṛtakaṃ vāpinajayastupuraṣṭuta
tamabravīnmahātejāḥśakraḥparapuraṃ jayaḥ
śūratāvākyamātreṇasarvatrasulabhābhavet
mahāparākramaṃ yadvā astitedānavādhama
darśayasvāhavevīryaṃ puraṃ neṣyāmibhāskareḥ
etacchrutvāmahātejāścukopadaityapuṅgavaḥ
anyonyaṃ sahasāvegāccharaiścicchidatuḥśarān
atyapūrvaṅkṛtaṅkarmatābhyāmevaraṇebhṛśam
lāghavaṃśarasaṃ dhānagrahamokṣaṃ sudurlabham
dṛṣṭvā tuvismayaṃ jagmurdevāsuragaṇāstadā
viśikhāḥśataśas tatra viniśceruḥ samaṃ tataḥ
śakraḥkopātpunaḥśīghraṃ dhanurudyamyavīryavān
tatomārgaṇasāhasrair aṣṭabhistvadhikaṃ tathā
śarair niraṃ tarākāśaṃ dadṛśus tatra saṃ yuge
nipatanti dharāpṛṣṭhekhaḍgapātaiḥsahasraśaḥ
māyāstraṃ darśayāmāsakrūrakṛnnamucistadā
tāmasaṃ triṣulokeṣu kṛtaṃ syāttuniraṃ taram
parasparaṃ napaśyanti devāsuragaṇābhṛśam
sūryacandragrahāṇāṃ cavahnīnāṃ cadivaukasām
vibhagnāḥsarvadevāś ca śakraś ca raṇasaṃ mukhe
prabhagnāścāpareśūrāḥ saṃ yānti cadiśodaśa
kūṭaṃ tasyaparijṣāyasarvadevārcitohariḥ
vilaṃ bitaṃ samālokyaśaktyācabahughaṃ ṭayā
cirātsaṃ labhyasaṃ jṣāṃ cadaiteyaḥkrodhamūrcchitaḥ
gatvā vegātsuraśreṣṭhamair āvataṃ dadhāraha
trāsayāmāsasutarāmindrasyadviradaṃ ruṣā
dhṛtvāsatugajaṃ sendraṃ mumocadharaṇītale
tatobhūmigataḥśakraḥkaśmalaṃ cakṣaṇaṅgataḥ
śakraṅgrahītukāmasyavadhārthaṃ yūthapasyasaḥ
sarveprajahṛṣurdevāgandharvālalitaṃ jaguḥ
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe prathame sṛṣṭikhaṇḍe dvitīyanamucivadhonāmaika
vyāsa uvāca
gatvā camādhavaṃ saṅkhyedevāsuragaṇāgrataḥ
abravītparuṣaṃ vākyamavyayaṃ harimīśvaram
nārāyaṇanajānāsiyuddhadharmamitaḥ katham
anyāyāddurvadhopāyaṅkṛtvānaṣṭonaśocasi
suratvaṃ copanaṣṭaṃ syādanyasṛṣṭiṅkaromy aham
bahubhiḥ sarvagātreṣu jaghānacamadhuṃ tataḥ
māyayāchāditaḥsobhūddaityastaṃ surasattamāḥ
yevaiśūrāś ca rudrādyāstridaśāḥ sattvadhāriṇaḥ
devyonānāvidhāścāpisāyudhāvāhanānvitāḥ
senānyogaṇapādevālokeśaharaviṣṇavaḥ
anyegrahādayodevāḥsarveyudhyantisaṅgatāḥ
vinaṣṭāś ca tadādevāmadhorvaimāyayādhruvam
saṃ mukhevimukhe caiva śaraśaktyṛṣṭivṛṣṭibhiḥ
patanti sahasādevābhūmauśastrābhipīḍitāḥ
etasminnantareviṣṇurgṛhītvācasudarśanam
asurānmāyayādevānjaghānaraṇamūrdhani
athateṣāṃ śirāṃ syeṣachitvā caiva sahasraśaḥ
pātayāmāsadeveśodaityānāṃ casurātmanām
evamanyānvibhurdaityāndrāvayāmāsasaṅgarāt
taṃ dṛṣṭvā munayo devāḥ sarve vismayam āyayuḥ
karṇe karṇe prajalpante devā munigaṇās tathā
sarvasākṣī tv ayaṃ devo daityajiṣṇur yuge yuge
daityānām agrataḥ pāparaṇe devān samantataḥ
hatvā iṅkaṃ te śivaṃ cādya dharmakīrtiyaśoguṇāḥ
atas tvāṃ niśitair bāṇair na yāmi yamasādanam
evam uktvā śarair ugrair jaghāna keśavaṃ raṇe
nicakartaśarāṃs tāṃs tu mādhavo vākyam abravīt
jānāmi tvāṃ raṇe daityaṃ hararūpadharaṃ priyam
śūraṃ śūravikarmāṇaṃ madhuṃ māyāniyojitam
mithyālokaṃ pradāsyāmi pātayitvā raṇājire
etasminn antare tīkṣṇaiḥ śarair vivyādhasaṃyuge
jaṭilaṃ vṛṣaketuṃ ca vṛṣabhasthaṃ maheśvaram
parasparaṃ bhindatoś ca prāptān prāptān śarān śaraiḥ
tataś ca pātayāmāsaghoṭakaṃ vṛṣarūpiṇam
bhrāmayitvātataḥśūlaṃ jaghānaparameśvaram
tribhiścicchedabāṇaiś ca śūlaṅkālānalaprabham
tataḥkrūromahābāhurmadhurmāyātimāyikaḥ
devīrūpaṃ samāsthāyasiṃ hasthaḥprayayauhariḥ
śarair bahuvidhair viṣṇuṃ jaghānaivābravīdvacaḥ
svāmītumesuraśreṣṭhatvayaivapātitoyudhi
ahaṃ tvāṃ cahaniṣyāmisutauskaṃ davināyakau
uktavaṃ taṃ cadaiteyaṃ jaghānabahumārgaṇaiḥ
sapapātamahīpṛṣṭhegatāsurlohitodgiraḥ
pitaraunihataudṛṣṭvā māyāvaddhomahābalaḥ
skaṃ daḥśaktiṃ samādāyaprāyādyodhayituṃ harim
tatodhātā'bravīdvākyaṃ skaṃ daṃ mohaprapīḍitam
paśyatepitaraudūrepaśyaṃ tauyuddhamīdṛśam
aṃ tarikṣebhramaṃ taucasaṃ sthitaulokasākṣiṇau
etacchrutvātatodṛṣṭvā tatra ivāṃ taradhīyata
petatustaudharāpṛṣṭhepravīraukṣatavikṣatau
madhustadāgatastūrṇamaṃ tardhānantamovṛtaḥ
pātayāmāsaviṣṇaucamāyayāśataparvatān
krodhātsudarśanenaivaśiraśchitvāni pātitaḥ
madhusūdanaitikhyātirviṣṇorlokeṣu kāritā
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe prathame sṛṣṭikhaṇḍe madhuvadhonāma
vyāsa uvāca
tatovṛtromahātejādaityānāṃ pravaroyudhi
diggajāḍhyaṅgajārūḍhaḥprādravadbalasūdanam
āgacchaṃ taṃ tatovṛtraṃ śaraiḥkālānalaprabhaiḥ
tatovṛtrastuśīrṣaṃ cajiṣṇorevapatatriṇā
ātmānaṃ casamāśvāsyadhanurudyamyavīryavān
śarāṃ śchitvābibhedāśuśarair āśīviṣopamaiḥ
śatakratuṃ mahāvīryaḥsarvadevādhipaṃ yudhi
parasparaṃ śarāyānti yathāsaptāśvaraśmayaḥ
manojavasamāḥśīghrāgāḍhāḥśikhariṇoyathā
baḍavānalasaṃ sparśāḥkhagāvajrārabhedakāḥ
tayordhanuṣmatoryuddheśarāstulyaguṇānvitāḥ
sanipatyamahīpṛṣṭhelāghavātsvarathaṃ yayau
rathasthastasyadevasyaśaktyācair āvaṇaṃ dṛḍham
bibhedalāghavenāśuvajreṇevamahāgiriṃ
śuśubhekaṃ pamānastusendraḥsacamahāgajaḥ
tataḥśaktiṃ samādāya āvidhyamaghavā'suram
kṣaṇātsaṃ jṣāṃ samālambya savinadyapatattriṇā
bibhedasamareśakraṃ satataḥkaśmalaṅgataḥ
indraḥsaṃ jṣāṃ punaḥprāpyajaghānaviśikhaiḥśitaiḥ
śatakoṭisamair bāṇair arditovyathayānvitaḥ
tatovṛtromahāśūlaṃ prākṣipannirjareśvare
śāṃ bhavāstreṇadeveśovaiṣṇavāstraṃ mumocaha
sparśanecasphuliṅgānām ubhayoḥsenayorbhaṭāḥ
naśaktāḥsaṃ mukhesthātuṃ śalabhājvalaneyathā
dagdhāḥpetuḥpṛthivyāṃ cadiśaḥ sarvāḥpradudruvuḥ
devadānavayorvīrāḥśūnyastatrābhavadraṇaḥ
astraṃ nirastakaṃ dṛṣṭvā sadaityaḥkrodhamūrcchitaḥ
māyayāśailasaṃ dohamastraṃ śakremumocaha
bāṇaughaiḥśailasaṅghātaṃ pracicchedaraṇehariḥ
aghoraṃ prāsṛjaddaityaḥpuruhūtemahābale
koṭikoṭisahasrāṇijaṃ tūnāṃ pravarāṇica
siṃ haśārdūlabhallūkavṛkavyāghramahāgajāḥ
daṃ daśūkādayaḥsatvāḥpradhāvanti sureśvaraṃ
sūtaṃ cāśvānpṛthivyāṃ capātayāmāsatatkṣaṇāt
sakaṃ ṭakāṅgadāṃ bhīmāṃ sampūjyāsurasattamaḥ
jaghānapadminaḥśīrṣemohāddaṃ tīkṣitiṃ yayau
sagadaḥsarvadeveśodharaṇīṃ samupasthitaḥ
adhaūrdhvaṃ prahāraṃ capārśvayoratibhīṣaṇaṃ
dṛṣṭvā devagaṇāḥsiddhādānavāvismayaṅgatāḥ
devadānavavīrāś ca draṣṭuṃ naivatadīśire
īśabrahmādayaḥkhetusthitādraṣṭuṃ tadadbhutaṃ
dṛśyete sarvalokaiś ca lāghavaṃ vismayaṅgataiḥ
maṇḍalaṃ cakradhanvaṃ calāghavaṃ capariplutaṃ
keśānvṛtrasyautplutya sampradhṛtyāsinādrutaṃ
śiraścicchedasahasāmaghavāraṇamūrdhani
jayaśabdastatas tvāsīddevānāṃ casamaṃ tataḥ
devaduṃ dubhayonedurnanṛtuścāpsarogaṇāḥ
gītaṅgāyanti gandharvāmunayaḥstutipāṭhakāḥ
bhītāḥpalāyitāḥsarvedaityāstyaktāyudhādiśaḥ
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe prathame sṛṣṭikhaṇḍe vṛtrāsuravadhonāma
vyāsa uvāca
traipuriḥsaṃ rurohāthābravīdvākyaṅgaṇādhipaṃ
pitāmenihataḥ pitrātavayasmādgaṇādhipa
tasmāt tvāmadyaviśikhair nayāmiyamasādanaṃ
tavatātenaduṣṭenasurāṇām ahitaṃ purā
kṛtaṅkarmamahatpāpaṃ śrutaṃ nojanakena hi
pāpakarmarataṃ duṣṭaṃ jṣātvājñānabalenaca
paṅkātpratāritomohātpreṣitoyamamaṃ diraṃ
tvāṃ cāhaṃ tatpathaṃ daityapreṣayābhikṣaṇādiha
uktavaṃ taṃ mahāprājṣaṃ surāṇāṃ cagaṇādhipaṃ
vivyādhadaśabhistīkṣṇaiḥkālānalasamaprabhaiḥ
yamadaṇḍasamair bāṇaiḥkṣurapraiś ca śilīmukhaiḥ
kaṅkapatrair mahātīkṣṇair vajrānalasamaprabhaiḥ
vicakartaśarāṃ ścāsyalaṃ bodaraḥsurārcitaḥ
tatobhadraś ca saubhadrobhīṣaṇonirjarāṃ takaḥ
svāṃ svāṅgadāṃ samādāyadudruvustaṃ vināyakam
lāghavāttuvṛthākṛtvāgadāsteṣāṃ mahābalaḥ
bhadrakasyatuśīrṣecāhanatparaśunātadā
bhīṣaṇasyakuṭhāreṇakhaḍgenanirjarāṃ takam
pātayitvācaherambomahāgirisamāṃ stadā
caturogaṇamukhyāṃ ś ca anyāṃ ścāpātayaddviṣaḥ
tataḥsaṃ jṣāṃ samālabh yatra ipuriścāsurottamaḥ
tāṃ stucicchedadharmātmāpunarvivyādhataṃ śaraiḥ
caturbhiḥsaiṃ dhavāṃ ś caiva śaraikenacasārathim
śaraiḥ sampātayāmāsadharaṇyāṅgaṇanāyakān
lāghavātturathaṃ cānyaṅ gatvā tripuranaṃ danaḥ
viśikhair vajrasaṅkāśaiḥ sambibhedagaṇādhipam
rudhireṇāvasiktāṅgoruṣāghorayamaprabhaḥ
lalāṭecatribhir bāṇaiḥ saptabhiś ca stanāṃ tare
tataḥsūtenadhīreṇaapanītoraṇājirāt
vimukhaṃ nāhanacchūrovināyakaḥsurārcitaḥ
cirātsaṃ jṣāṃ samālabhyayaṃ tāraṃ cābravīdvacaḥ
gacchasūtaraṇebhīruṃ vināyakaṃ harātmajam
tatoyaṃ tābravīdvākyaṃ satyaṃ pathyaṃ cakomalam
harātmajaśarānsoḍhuṅkaḥ samarthoraṇājire
tasmānmohagatastvaṃ camayānītaḥprabhāsuta
etajjṣātvātvidānīṃ bhoyadyuktaṃ tadvidhīyatām
auṣadhādiprayogeṇagajaḥsaṃ jṣāmabodhayat
akārayacchataguṇaprāṇaṃ cajayamādiśat
prāgjalaṃ mantritaṃ datvārurodhāsyāṅgakavraṇān
evaṃśatasahasrāṇisainyāni sainyapālakān
sadaityastasyapṛṣṭhasthaḥśaraiḥkālānalaprabhaiḥ
hatvātvapātayaccorvyāṃ mukhyamukhyānsurādhipān
śaraistasyatadādevāyamadaṇḍasamaprabhaiḥ
tatra tatra cakārāśubhīṣaṇaṃ saṃ citaṃ śaraiḥ
gajenapātitāḥkecidgajāroheṇacāpare
vegenabhramaṇenaivasurāḥkecitpratāpitāḥ
evaṃ suragaṇādhyakṣāḥśastrāstrair vividhaiś ca tam
tathāpitadgajaṃ yoddhuṃ naśaktāstemahābalāḥ
kṣipraṃ tāṃ stugajodaṃ taistraipuro'pātayaccharaiḥ
nagatāyedharaṇyāṃ cadevājarjaravigrahāḥ
śaraṇyaṅgaṇapaṃ jagmurbhītāstevedanāturāḥ
devānāṅkadanaṃ dṛṣṭvā gaṇādhīśaḥpratāpavān
sagajaṃ tāḍayāmāsavajrānalasamaiḥśaraiḥ
ākhukobhedayāṃ cakremahānāṅgaṃ mahābalam
parśunāpṛṣṭhavaṃśāgresthitvātenāhanatpunaḥ
sagajaḥsapapātorvyāṅgatāsurlohitaṃ vaman
śaśaṃ surmunayodevāḥ sādhusādhviticābruvat
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe prathame sṛṣṭikhaṇḍe traipurivimardonāma
vyāsa uvāca
śrutvā maheśvarādvākyaṃ devāḥśakrapurogamāḥ
dudruvurdaityasaṅghāṃ stānsarvesarvānsamaṃ tataḥ
ājagāmamahābāhuḥkuṃ bhonāmamahāsuraḥ
nair ṛtoyakṣarājānaṅgadayācāhanadbhṛśam
guhyakeśogadāpātair jaghānabhṛśamuttamam
tatonyonyaṅgadāyuddhamabhavadbhīṣaṇaṃ tayoḥ
prācuraṃ bhīṣaṇaṃ yānaṃ sphoṭatailābhivāstikam
tenakṛtvāmahāyuddhamavasānedhaneśvaraḥ
pātayāmāsataṃ sphoṭaṃ tasyakumbhasyacorasi
bhagnadaṃ ṣṭrastataḥkuṃ bhonipapātamahītale
syaṃ danasthomahāvīryojaṃ bhoharihayaṃ tadā
jaghānaśarasaṅghaiś ca tathaivair āvaṇaṃ bhṛśam
sapapātadharāpṛṣṭhegatāsurlohitokṣitaḥ
caturogaṇamukhyāṃ ś ca śaktyābibhedasaṃ yuge
senānyaś caiva pratyekaṃ pātayāmāsalāghavāt
śaktihastaṃ casaṃ hrādaṃ yamadaṇḍaṃ narāṃ takam
hatvācapātayāmāsasabhasmīkṛtavigrahaḥ
kālaś ca khaḍgapātenapātayāmāsabābhravam
śaktyāmṛtyurbibhedāśvaṃ tathāni rghṛṇakaṃ raṇe
agninādahyamānāś ca saptaitecamahābalāḥ
raṇesaṃ dagdhadehāś ca petururvyāṅgatāsavaḥ
pāśabaddhāmahāvīryāvaruṇasyamahātmanaḥ
petururvyāṃ mahāsatvāḥśūrāḥśūrabhayānakāḥ
śūrasyaraśmijālenanihatāḥpaṣcadānavāḥ
turutuṃ burudurmedhaḥ sādhakāsādhakābhidhāḥ
krūracaraṇeśānamodasaṃ modaṣaṇmukhāḥ
śarair nipātitādaityāḥsaṃ yugemātariśvanā
nair ṛtogadayābhīmaṃ pātayāmāsabhūtale
śūlapātaiś ca rudrāṇāṃ śataśodaityadānavāḥ
nipetuḥsaṃ yugebhītāḥsaṃ mukhāraṇapaṇḍitāḥ
vasūnāṃ śarapātaiś ca śūrāṇāṃ raśmimālinām
meghānāṅkarakābhiś ca vajrapātaiḥ sudāruṇaiḥ
nipātitāraṇedaityāḥśataśobalaśālinaḥ
asaṅkhyātāḥpataṃ tyurvyāṃ skaṃ daśaktyātathāhatāḥ
gaṇeśaparśupātenapatanti mukhyamukhyakāḥ
vaikuṃ ṭhakaramuktenacakreṇatīvrakarmaṇā
daityānāṃ pravarāṇāṃ caśirāṃ sinipatanti kau
śamanoyamadaṇḍenakoṭikoṭisahasraśaḥ
apātayattadābhūmyāṅkālaḥkhaḍgenadānavān
mṛtyuśśaktyātathādaityānpāśīpāśenacāparān
pātenatakṣakādīnāṃ sudhāṃ śoḥśiśireṇaca
aśvārohīkharomanyohanipāśastathāgajān
parigheṇagajaṅkuṃ bhedaityānāṃ nāśayattataḥ
evamaśvāngajāṃ ś caiva lāghavātsanyapātayat
anyābhir devatābhiś ca samātṛgaṇanāyakaiḥ
nipātitāmahoghorāyetepralayadānavāḥ
śaraiś ca khaḍgapātaiś ca śūlaśaktiparaśvadhaiḥ
yaṣṭiparighakuṃ taiś ca pātayaṃ tyasurānsurāḥ
evaṃ saṅkṣīyamāṇeṣu daityarāṭsamapadyata
ādityarathasaṅkāśaṃ ratharatnavibhūṣitam
śātakumbhamayaṃ divyaṅghaṃ ṭācāmarabhūṣitam
patākādhvaja sampūrṇaṃ ramyaṃ śakrarathopamam
samāruhyamahāvīrohiraṇyākṣo'surādhipaḥ
jaghānaśarajālaiś ca durnivāryaḥsurāsuraiḥ
sasainyāni gajānvīrorathāṃ ś ca sahasaiṃ dhavān
pātayāmāsabhūmaucaśataśothasahasraśaḥ
pātayāmāsadaityendraḥśaraughānmṛtyusannibhān
yathāpuṣkariṇīvṛndegajaḥkaṃ javanaṃ śitaiḥ
śarapātair athovegātsiṃ hanādaiḥpunaḥpunaḥ
dharaṇyāṃ patitāvegāttadādaityeśvarasyaca
daśabhiś ca sutīkṣṇāgrair jayaṃ taṃ sajaghānaha
remaṃ taṃ paṣcabhir bāṇaiḥśakraṃ paṣcadaśenatu
citrarathaṃ viṃśatibhiḥpaṣcaviṃśatibhir guham
heraṃ baṃ triśareṇaivacatvāriṃ śaccharair yamam
tathaivakālaṃ mṛtyuṃ capāṇinādviguṇenaca
guhyakeśaṃ jagatprāṇaṃ daśabhir daśabhiḥśaraiḥ
ṣaḍbhiś ca saptabhiś caiva rudrānsarvānpṛthakpṛthak
vasūnsarvāṃ ś ca saśaraiḥsiddhagandharvapannagān
daśāṣṭadaśabhiḥṣaḍbhir yuddhedevānbhinattyasau
ojaughādativīryāttuśīghralāghavardaśanān
āpatprāptāḥsurābhītyāpratikartuṃ naceśvarāḥ
maheśaśūlasaṅkāśaiḥśarair marmavibhedibhiḥ
tāḍitāni rjarāyuddhemūrcchitādharaṇīṃ yayuḥ
tasyaivasaṃ mukhesthātuṃ naśekuḥpravarāḥ surāḥ
tatodevāvinirdhūtāstridiveśenasaṃ yutāḥ
śaraṇyaṃ tehariṃ tatra śaraṇaṃ tāḍitāyayuḥ
etasminnantareviṣṇuḥprāhajiṣṇuṅkhageśvaram
nāśāyasatatas tūrṇaṅgatastasyānti kaṃ javāt
sarathaṃ mārgaṇair bhitvāviṣṇumārodhayajjavam
anyasṛṣṭiṅkaromyadyahatvātvāṃ casanirjjaram
tatoviṣṇur uvācedaṅgarjaṃ taṃ daityapuṅgavam
tataḥśaraśatair evajaghānaviṣṇumavyayam
sambhrāṃ taḥsacicchedayamadaṇḍanibhānśarān
punaḥśarasahasrāṇiprerayāmāsataṃ raṇe
tāṃ ś ca chitvāśaraiḥśauristaṃ cavivyādhamārgaṇaiḥ
pragauravādahāryābhaiḥsaṃ sparśādbāḍavānalaiḥ
śaraiś ca bhedakaistīkṣṇaiḥkhagamaiś ca manojavaiḥ
lāghavātkeśavāstrasyatūlaśuṣkatṛṇopamaiḥ
bādhayābhyarditaḥkruddhodhṛtvāśikhariṇaṃ raṇe
jaghānamādhavaṃ vegāddhiraṇyākṣomahābalaḥ
taṃ casaṃ cūrṇayāmāsagadayālīlayāhariḥ
evaṃ parvatasāhasraṃ pātitaṃ tukrameṇahi
tathaivalāghavāccūrṇaṃ hariṇādānavāriṇā
punarbāhusahasrāṇikṛtvāsaudānavottamaḥ
śaraiḥśaktibhir atyugraiḥśūlaiḥparaśukādibhiḥ
vavarṣabahubhir viṣṇuṅkrodhāviṣṭenacetasā
śarair dīptair mahāghorair asurāṇāṃ bhayaṅkaraiḥ
vivyādhasarvagātreṣu śaṃ bhuśūlopamaiśśaraiḥ
dānavādhipatiḥ saṅkhyehyavyayoharirīśvaraḥ
sacakaśmalatāṅ gatvā sarvaśaktimanuttamām
kālajihvopamāṅghorāmaṣṭaghaṃ ṭāsamanvitām
śuśubhesasuraśreṣṭhastaḍittvatsāndrameghavat
tataś ca cukruśurdaityājayetisādhuvādinaḥ
teṣāṃ śirāṃ sisaṃ cchidyamādhavaṃ punarāgamat
sadaityaṃ śaktipātenapātayāmāsavair aṇe
cirātsaṃ jṣāṃ samālambya vahnibāṇenakeśavam
tatomumocamāyāstraṃ cāsuraṃ cātidāruṇam
siṃ havyāghralulāyāṃ ś ca tadvaddvipasarīsṛpān
jaghānasamareviṣṇuṃ hiraṇyākṣaḥpratāpavān
tatomāyāstra sambhūtānśastrāstraughānraṇehariḥ
savihvalitasarvāṅgastatkṣaṇaṃ lohitokṣitaḥ
tacchūlaṃ catribhir bāṇaiḥpravivyādhasurādhipaḥ
yaṃ tāraṃ capracicchedadaśabhiś ca hariḥśaraiḥ
ārurohasadaityendraḥsaṃ mukhaṃ cākarodbalī
bhūmaṇḍalaṃ samuddhṛtyaviveśacarasātalam
śeṣāś ca viviśurdaityāstamanuprītisaṃ yutāḥ
tatoviṣṇurmahātejājṣātvādaityabalaṃ mahat
dadhāra rūpaṃ vārāhaṃ daityarājajighāṃsayā
dhṛtvākroḍatanuṃ viṣṇurviveśatamanudrutam
tatra gatvā rasāmūlerasātalagatāṃ mahīm
dṛṣṭvā svadaṃ ṣṭrayordadhrelokādhārāṃ vasuṃ dharām
tāṃ dhṛtvāgacchatastasyaviṣṇoramitatejasaḥ
samājagāmadaityendrodhṛṣṭaṃ vāgbhistudannanu
māyākroḍatanurviṣṇurdurvacāṃ sisahanruṣā
jaloparidadhāremāṃ dharāṃ bhūdhara eva ca
tasyāṃ nyasyasvasatvaṃ casacakāratadācalām
tataḥpaścātsasaṃ lagnodaityarāṭsamupasthitaḥ
māyayāsūkaroviṣṇustāṅgadāṃ samavaṃ cayat
tataḥpunāruṣāviṣṭohiraṇyākṣomahābalaḥ
muṣṭināprāharaddevaṃ dakṣiṇetubhuje prabho ḥ
evaṃ yuddhaṃ mahāghoraṃ savyāsavyaṅgatāgatam
paribhramaṇavikṣepaṅkṛtānukaraṇaṃ tathā
ūcuś ca devadeveśaṃ viṣṇuṃ vārāharūpiṇam
mākrīḍabālavaddevajahyamuṃ devakaṃ ṭakam
tato viṣṇur mahātejā māyāvārāharūpadhṛk
brahmādyanumatiṃ prāpyacakraṃ prākṣipadulbaṇam
sahasrasūryasaṅkāśaṃ sahasrāraṃ mahāprabham
taccakraṃ viṣṇunāmuktaṃ hiraṇyākṣaṃ mahābalam
cakārabhasmasātsadyobrahmādīnāṃ capaśyatām
daityāṃ takaraṇaṃ raudraṃ cakraṃ cāgamadacyutam
tatobrahmādayodevāḥśakrumukhyāś ca lokapāḥ
dṛṣṭvā cavijayaṃ viṣṇoḥstuvanti smasamāgatāḥ
devāūcuḥ
natāḥsmaviṣṇuṃ jagad ādibhūtaṃ surāsurendraṃ jagatāṃ prapālakam
yannābhipadmātkilapadmayonir babhūva taṃ vaiśaraṇaṅgatāḥsmaḥ
namaḥprakurmaś ca nṛsiṃ harūpiṇetathāpunarvāmanarūpiṇenamaḥ
namostutekṣatravināśanāyarāmāyarāmāyadaśāsyanāśine
mlecchāṃ takāyāpicakalkināmnenamaḥpunaḥkroḍavapurdharāya
niṣūdito'yaṃ hyadhunākilatvayādaityohiraṇyākṣaitipragalbhaḥ
pātātvamevāsyayuge yugecarūpāṇidhatsesumanoharāṇi
tvamevakālāgniharaś ca bhūtvāviśvaṅkṣayaṃ neṣyasicāṃ takāle
atobhavāneva caviśvakāraṇaṃ nateparaṃ jīvamajīvamīśa
yatiṅkacabhūtaṃ cabhaviṣyarūpaṃ pravarttamānaṃ catathaivarūpam
sarvaṃ tvamevāsicarācarākhyaṃ nabhātiviśvaṃ tvadṛtecakiṃ cit
astītināstīticabhedaniṣṭhaṃ tvayyevabhātaṃ sadasatsvarūpam
ṛtebhavatpādaparāyaṇaṃ janaṃ tenāgatāsmaśśaraṇaṃ śaraṇyam
vyāsa uvāca
tatoviṣṇuḥprasannātmā uvācatridivaukasaḥ
tuṣṭosmidevābhadraṃ voyuṣmatstotreṇasāmpratam
tatphalaṃ samavāpnotikīrtanācchravaṇānnaraḥ
ataḥparaṃ mahājñānaṃ nabhūtaṃ nabhaviṣyati
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe prathame sṛṣṭikhaṇḍe devāsurasaṅgrāmasamāptauvijayastotraṃ nāma
ṣaṭsaptatitamo'dhyāyaḥ
saṃ jaya uvāca
ye'surāś ca mṛtāyuddhesaṃ mukhevimukhe'pivā
gatiṃ teṣāmahaṃ brahmanśrotumicchāmitattvataḥ
adyāpyāsangatāḥkutra etanmeśaṃ sabhoguro
vyāsa uvāca
yemṛtāḥ saṃ mukheśūrādaityānāṃ pravarāraṇe
svayaṃ prāpyacadevatvaṃ bhogyamaśnanti śāśvatam
prāsādā yatra sauvarṇānānāratnāvibhūṣitāḥ
sarvakāmapradāvṛkṣāḥsvarṇadītoyasaṃ yutāḥ
dadhidugdhājyakhaṇḍaiś ca yutāpuṣkariṇīśubhā
atīvarūpa sampannāḥsadaivanavayauvanāḥ
evaṃ janmāṣṭakaṃ prāpyadhaninodhyakṣamantriṇaḥ
ardhasaṃ mukhagātreṇadivamaśnanti śāśvatam
vimukhāḥkātarābhītāyecamāyāvinoraṇe
haṃ tāronirayaṃ yānti tecamlecchāḥk uvācakāḥ
paranyāsāpahartārovimukhāḥ santi tattvataḥ
rātrauvāvipinenaṣṭecorāḥ sāhasakāriṇaḥ
sarvabhakṣaratāmūḍhāmlecchāgobrahmaghātakāḥ
uvācakāḥparemlecchā eteyekūṭayonayaḥ
teṣāṃ paiśācikībhāṣālokācāronavidyate
nāstiśaucaṃ tapojñānaṃ nadevapitṛtarpaṇam
dānaśrāddhādikaṃ yajṣesurāṇāṃ caprapūjanam
pitṝṇāṃ canaśuśrūṣādvijadevatapasvinām
jñānalopādatasteṣāṃ malaśaucaṃ navidyate
mātaraṃ bhaginīṃ cānyāṅgṛhiṇīṅkāmayanti ca
tārkṣyasyodvavanānāṃ caanyeṣāṅgotravāsinām
kulajātāḥ sadādaityāyeṣāṃ puṇyamakāraṇam
durgatiṃ camṛtāyānti dvijastrīśiśughātinaḥ
gavāśinodurātmānohyabhakṣyabhakṣaṇeratāḥ
kīṭayoniṃ vrajaṃ tyetetaravaś ca pipīlikāḥ
agrajaḥsahajasteṣāṃ sadṛṅnogrāmyavṛttayaḥ
lomakeśapraṇetāraḥkravyabhakṣaratābhuvi
sāhasaṃ cavrataṃ dānaṃ snānaṃ yajṣādikaṃ cayat
matsyamāṃ sādiṣuprītāmṛṣāvacanabhāṣiṇaḥ
sadākāmāḥ sadālobhāḥ sadākrodhamadānvitāḥ
kubhṛtyāḥkujanaprītāḥpūtigandharatānarāḥ
nadeveṣu navijṣeṣu nadharmaśravaṇeṣu ca
stotramantrādikepuṇyeyathākāryeṣv aniś ca yāḥ
bahurogādhiroṣāś ca bahurūpaparicchadāḥ
narajātiṣudaityānāṃ cihnānyetāni bhūtale
najānanti paraṃ lokaṃ naguruṃ svaṃ nacāparaṃ
svapnedānaṃ najānanti bhakṣaṇānnaparicchadaṃ
gopāyanti dhanaṃ yasmāt teyakṣānararūpiṇaḥ
prāṇāṃ tepidhanaṅkicinnadiśanti carājani
teyakṣādurgatisthāś ca parārthebhāravāhakāḥ
pretānāṃ lakṣaṇaṃ yadvā sarvalokavigarhitaṃ
strīṇāṃ capuruṣāṇāṃ caśṛṇuṣvaikamanāmama
malapaṅkadharā nityaṃ satyaśaucavivarjitāḥ
daṃ takuṃ talavastrāṇāṃ vapuṣomalasaṃ cayāḥ
gṛhapīṭhādipātrāṇāṃ sakṛcchaucaṃ narocate
napaśyanti sukhaṃstrīṇāṃ viśanti kānanedrutaṃ
vighasocchiṣṭapūtīnāṃ bhakṣaṇebhir atābhuvi
kadācitsvasthatānāstikvacidvāśucitātanau
lakṣaṇaṃ naralokeṣu pretānām īdṛśaṅkila
hitāhitaṃ najānanti mitrāmitraṅguṇāguṇam
pāpapuṇyādikaṃ sthānaṃ snānaṃ devadvijārcanaṃ
arimitramudāsīnaṃ naviṃ danti svabhāvataḥ
martyasthāḥpaśavastecajṣāyaṃ tebuddhisaṃ mataiḥ
buddhyānānātvabhāvāś ca bhramanti camṛṣābhuvi
yakṣarūpānarāstecasarvakarmabahiṣkṛtāḥ
eṣāṃ bhedaṃ pravakṣyāmi lakṣaṇaṃ dharaṇītale
vijātāmartyalokeṣu pāpasyaivānurūpataḥ
malīmasabhuviprasthaṃ nāgaraṃ chadmarūpiṇaṃ
vighasādi prabho ktāraṅkākamāhurmanīṣiṇaḥ
abhakṣyenirataḥpāpaḥkukuraḥpūti sampriyaḥ
pravṛttaḥ sarvagṛhyeṣu bhakṣyābhakṣyasajīvanaḥ
bhūmyāṃ paśvādiyonīnāṅkuleṣu prāpta sambhavāḥ
śunovigṛhyahastenamlecchānāṃ bhakṣaṇapriyāḥ
viśeṣātsūkarāṇāṃ catathācaraṇayodhināṃ
poṣaṇebhakṣaṇeprītāḥpūtigarhyeṣv asādhuṣu
parvatekaraṇādvahneḥkāṣṭhasaṃ cayasaṅgrahe
vijṣeyāstesadāmlecchāḥkṣatriyāṇāṃ bhayākulāḥ
lokānāṃ naṣṭadharmecasadāśaucavivarjite
kulīnānāṃ tadāmlecchābhaviṣyanti cadasyavaḥ
tasminkālejanāḥ sarveduḥkharogapratāpitāḥ
durbhikṣānnaparāmūḍhāḥsadārājaprapīḍitāḥ
tatrāsatyeratāmartyāḥsarvaśaucavivarjitāḥ
naśrūyaṃ tejanair evapurāṇāgamasaṃ hitāḥ
madyamāṃ sapriyāḥpāpāḥ sarvabhakṣāḥ sudāruṇāḥ
dāruṇācāraniratā nityaṃ chalaparāyaṇāḥ
napuṣṇanti sutāstātaṃ prasuvaṃ cagurūnapi
naśuśrūṣanti vaibhṛtyāḥ svāminaṅguṇaśālinam
bhartāraṃ nastriyaḥkāścicchvaśuraucasvamātaraḥ
nityakaṣṭānarās tatra kalahaś ca gṛhegṛhe
nṛpāmlecchāḥsurāpāś ca tathāmantripurohitāḥ
manuṣyaiś ca balisteṣāṃ matsyair māṃ sair nirāmiṣaḥ
pāṣaṇḍāyāsayogebhyaḥpradhānāguṇavārtayoḥ
tatonyonyaṃ priyāmūḍhāvanevānagareṣu ca
bhakṣyābhasamaśnanti matsyamāṃ sādikaṃ narāḥ
vanedvijātayaścānyebhuṃ jatecānupāpakam
bhaktimaṃ taṃ paśuṃ cānyatsarveyāṃ tyapunarbhavam
pātayanti pitṝnpāpāḥsarvetepūrvadevakāḥ
piśācārākṣasāyecamurtyakāguhyakādhruvam
etecāvinayaprītānadevānacamānuṣāḥ
saṃ jaya uvāca
kathaṃ camartyabhāveṣu lakṣaṃ jānanti tāttvikāḥ
etaṃ mesaṃśayaṃ nāthadūrīkurutatas tataḥ
vyāsa uvāca
kṛtapāpānurūpāstudvijātiṣvanyajātiṣu
asurārākṣasāḥpretāḥsvabhāvaṃ natyajanti te
jātāyecāsurāmartyesadātekalahotsukāḥ
kuhakāḥkaccarāḥkrūrāḥvijṣeyārākṣasābhuvi
janodvignādikaṃ dānantathādevārcanaṃ bhuvi
ugrabhāvāddhanaṃ labdhvārājyaṃ bhuṣjanti śāśvatam
jayaṃ śauryādikaṃ puṇyaṃ punaḥpāpakṣayaṃ vrajet
evamurvyāṃ tathānākenāgalokeyamālaye
vāsudevaṃ samārādhyaprahlādaḥsurapūjitaḥ
tasyaivagaṇamukhyatvaṃ lebhebhṛṅgīmahābalaḥ
keciddaityakulejātāḥpṛthivyāṃ surasattamāḥ
bhāvayanti pitṝnsarvānśataśothasahasraśaḥ
ekenāpisuptreṇakulatrāṇaṃ cadhīmatā
ekopivaiṣṇavaḥputraḥkulakoṭiṃ samuddharet
ekorakṣatidharmātmāpuregrāmaṃ janaṅkulam
vijṣātṛmeduraṃ cāsīdbrāhmaṇānāṃ puraṃ mahat
tatra sarvedvijāḥśaśvatsaṃ dhyopāsanatatparāḥ
vedapāṭharatādhīrādevātithidvijārcakāḥ
yajṣavratāgnikarmāṇaḥṣaṭkarmapariniś ca yāḥ
atikṛcchrecateṣāṃ vainapāpevartatemanaḥ
kurvanti satataṃ vīrāvrataṃ yajṣaṃ sanātanam
tatprojjhituṅgataḥsopirakṣārthaṃsthāpyaceṭikām
tasyāstvanavadhānenaśunācājyaṃ cabhakṣitam
bhiyātayātataḥpātraṃ svīyamūtreṇa sambhṛtam
āś ca ryaṃ catatovahnaulakṣitaṃ tenatatkṣaṇāt
kūṭaṃ hemamayaṃ sākṣātsvarṇaṃ jāṃ būnadaprabhaṃ
gṛhītvātanmudāvipraḥpāpayogaṃ cakāraha
mudā tatra yathāvṛttaṅkathitaṃ tutayādvija
kṛtaṅkarmadurācāraṃ śrutvā lobhādasādhubhiḥ
gurulobhāccasumahatsvāṃ tepaṅkaṃ viśatyapi
paṅkādevabhayānmohānmatibhraṃ śobhavattataḥ
striyoduṣṭājanāduṣṭāḥsarvepāpabalāttadā
tasyabhāryātadāsādhvīpuruduḥkhenasaṃ yutā
bhartāraṅkṛcchrasantaptāpurakāryaṃ jagādasā
brāhmaṇy uvāca
kaṣṭaṃ mevartatenāthadṛṣṭvā tvāṃ duḥkhasaṃ yutam
grāmācāramimaṃ yadvāpyaparaṅkartum arhasi
eteviprādurācārāḥsadārāḥ saparicchadāḥ
atipātakayogāccamahāpātakasaṃ matāḥ
aṃ te'punarbhavaṃ prāpyāparādhānto navidyate
ahamekotratiṣṭhāmisvapuṇyaparirakṣaṇāt
yadiyāsyāmicān yatra itohaṃ tatkṣaṇātpriye
kṣipraṃ sacatayāsārdhaṃ yayausīmāṃ taraṃ dvijaḥ
sthitvāpaśyatpurītāvatsthirātiṣṭhatipūrvavat
sācāhataṃ patiṃ sādhvīpurīceyaṃ nanaśyati
vimṛśyatām uvācedaṃ vipravaryaḥ suvismitaḥ
vicāryasādhavaṃ prāhamayābhrāṃ tyā upānahau
nānītetiṣṭhatas tatra dhārayiṣyāmikiṃ nuvai
evamuktvāpatiṃ sādhvīgṛhītvāteupāgatā
patyurabhyāśatodṛṣṭaṃ puraṃ nirvyathanaṅgatam
tatoviprādayovarṇāḥkaccarāḥpuravāsinaḥ
kṛcchādyamapuraṃ yānti nāstiteṣāṃ caniṣkṛtiḥ
pūrvavadbhakṣaṇeprītohyadyapāpaṅkarotica
steyaśīloniśācārībudhair jṣeyaḥ savaṃ cakaḥ
abudhaḥsarvakāryeṣu ajṣātaḥsarvakarmasu
samayācārahīnastupaśurevasabāliśaḥ
evamuṣṭrādayaḥ santi bhakṣādinakulādayaḥ
vighasādipriyonityaṃ naraḥśvākīrtitobudhaiḥ
prakṛtyācapalonityaṃ sadābhojanacaṃ calaḥ
plavagaḥkānanaprītonaraḥśākhāmṛgobhuvi
sūcakobhāṣayābudhyāsvajanenyajaneṣu ca
balavānkrāṃ taśīlaś ca satataṃ cānapatrapaḥ
pūtimāṃ sapriyobhogīnṛsiṃ haḥ samudāhṛtaḥ
tatsvanādevasīdanti bhītā anyevṛkādayaḥ
dviradādinarāyecajṣāyaṃ tedūradarśinaḥ
evamādikrameṇaivavijānīyānnareṣu ca
surāṇāṃ lakṣaṇaṃ brūmonararūpaṃ vyavasthitam
dvijadevātithīnāṃ cagurusādhutapasvinām
pūjātaporatonityaṃ dharmaśāstreṣu nītiṣu
kṣamāśīlojitakrodhaḥsatyavādījiteṃ indrayaḥ
vāgīśaḥsarvakāryeṣu guṇīdakṣomahābalaḥ
sākṣaraścāpividvāṃ ś ca gītanṛtyārthatattvavit
ātmavidyādikāryeṣu sarvataṃ trīsvareṣu ca
haviṣyeṣu casarveṣu gavyeṣu canirāmiṣe
gandhamālyeṣu vastreṣu śāstreṣvābharaṇeṣu ca
samprītaścātithaudānepārvaṇādiṣukarmasu
snānadānādibhiḥkāryevratair yajṣaiḥsurārcanaiḥ
kālogacchatipāṭhaiś ca naklībaṃ vāsaraṃ bhavet
ayamevamanuṣyāṇāṃ sadācāroniraṃ taram
gaṃ bhīraḥsarvadādevaḥsadaivamānavomṛduḥ
prītibhāvaṃ paraṃ saukhyaṃ sauhṛdaṃ sukṛtaṃ śubham
pretādīnāṃ capreteṣu paśauprītiḥpaśorapi
kākādayaḥsvajātaucatathānyecasvajātiṣu
prītābhavanti cāprītāvidyāteṣāṃ calakṣaṇam
evaṃ puṇyaviśeṣeṇasaviśeṣāsujātiṣu
priyāpriyaṃ vijānīyātpuṇyāpuṇyaṅguṇāguṇam
daṃ patyornasukhaṅkiṃ cijjātibhedānnṛṇāṃ bhuvi
atipuṇyāllabhedāyuḥśobhanāḥ puṇyakāriṇaḥ
pāpātmānolabhaṃ te'ntaṃ yecadaityādayonarāḥ
kṛtejātāḥsurābhūmaunadaityāścānyajātayaḥ
tretāyām ekapādaṃ cadvipadaṃ dvāpareyuge
saṃ dhyāyāṃ cakalerevasarvapādaṃ casaṅkulam
devādīnāṃ bhavejjātaṃ bhārataṃ yatpravartitam
aśvatthāmāharaḥsākṣāddharirnaṃ dakulodbhavaḥ
paJcendrāḥpāṇḍavājātāvidurodharma eva ca
gāṃ dhārīdraupadīkuṃ tīcaitādevyodharātale
devadaityāḥkalermadhyedaityāśśeṣecamānavāḥ
utpatsyaṃ tesadāpretāḥkravyādāḥpaśupakṣiṇaḥ
teṣāṃ cakulaṭādāsīnityakaṣṭāyavīyasī
nityaṃ dvaṃ dveṣu samprītyāteṣāmācārabhāṣiṇī
vaiśaṃ pāyana uvāca
daityādīnāṃ mṛṣābhāvātsuratvaṃ nasurālayam
rājyamāyustathākīrtirabhīṣṭaṃ dayitaṃ balam
nītividyādikaṃ bhāvyaṃ janmavṛddhaṃsanātanam
dānādhyayanakarmāṇiyajṣādica kathaṃ prabho
etadāptāyaśiṣyāyamahyaṃ bhovaktum arhasi
vyāsa uvāca
daityānāṃ sāhasādevatapobhavatiniścitam
yodānto viguṇair muktonītiśāsrārthatattvagaḥ
etaiś ca vividhaiḥpūtaḥsabhavetsuralakṣaṇaḥ
purāṇāgamakarmāṇinākeṣv atracavaidvija
svayamācaratepuṇyaṃ sadharoddharaṇakṣamaḥ
viśeṣādvaiṣṇavaṃ dṛṣṭvā prīyatepūjayeccayaḥ
ṣaṭkarmaniratovipraḥ sarvayajṣarataḥ sadā
viśvāsaghātinoyecakṛtaghnāvratalopinaḥ
dvijadeveṣu vidviṣṭāḥśātayanti dharāṃ narāḥ
yecamadyaratāḥ pāpādyūtakarmaratāstathā
pāṣaṇḍapatitālāpāḥśātayanti dharāṃ narāḥ
smṛtiśāstrārthakodvignāśśātayanti dharāṃ narāḥ
guruniṃ dāratādveṣācchātayanti dharāṃ narāḥ
dīnānāthānpīḍayanti śātayanti dharāṃ narāḥ
etecānyecabahavaḥpāpakarmakṛtonarāḥ
puruṣānpātayitvātuśātayanti dharāṃ narāḥ
yaidaṃ śṛṇuyādramyaṅguhyādguhyaṃ paraṃ hitam
nākālemaraṇaṃ tasyanacapāpaiḥpralipyate
kalpaṅkalpaṃ divaṃ bhuktvāmokṣamārgaṃ vrajatyasau
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe prathame sṛṣṭikhaṇḍe puṇyavyaktirnāma
ṣaṭsaptatitamo'dhyāyaḥ
vaiśaṃ pāyana uvāca
koyaṅkovāprabhāvosyakutrajātoghṛṇīśvaraḥ
kiṅkarotihikāryaṃ vaiyatoraśmimayobhṛśam
nikhilair mānuṣaiḥpūjyaḥsadaivabrāhmaṇādibhiḥ
vyāsa uvāca
sākṣādbrahmamayaṃ viddhidharmakāmārthamokṣadam
mayūkhair nirmalaiḥkūṭamaticaṇḍaṃ suduḥsaham
dṛṣṭvā pradudruvurlokāḥkaraiś ca ṇḍaiḥprapīḍitāḥ
tataś ca sāgarāḥsarvevaranadyonadādayaḥ
śuṣyanti jaṃ tavas tatra mriyaṃ tecāturājanāḥ
athaśakrādayodevābrahmāṇaṃ samupāgatāḥ
ayaṃ rajomayaḥsākṣātsudhāṃ śustanumadhyagaḥ
etābhyāṃ pālitālokāstrailokyesacarācarāḥ
divyopapādakādevāyevātraivajarāyujāḥ
aṇḍajāḥsvedajāś caiva yevātraivodbhijjādayaḥ
anenarakṣitālokājanitāḥpālitādhruvam
asyaivasadṛśonāstisarveṣāṃ parirakṣaṇāt
yaṃ cadṛṣṭvā pyuṣaḥkālepāparāśiḥpralīyate
tamārādhyajanāmokṣaṃ sādhayanti dvijātayaḥ
asyaivamaṇḍalasthāṃ cadevīṃ saṃ dhyāsvarūpiṇīṃ
dharāyāṃ patitocchiṣṭāḥpūtāstecāsyaraśmibhiḥ
saṃ dhyopāsanamātreṇakalmaṣātpūtatāṃ vrajet
dṛṣṭvā cāṇḍālakaṅgoghnaṃ patitaṅkuṣṭhasaṅgatam
mahāpātakasaṅkīrṇamupapātakasaṃ vṛtam
paśyanti yenarāḥ sūraṃ tepūtāgurukilbiṣāt
nāṃ dhatvaṃ nacadāridryaṃ naduḥkhaṃ nacaśocyatām
adṛṣṭānaivalokaiś ca devāhariharādayaḥ
dhyānarūpapragamyāstedṛṣṭodevohyayaṃ smṛtaḥ
devāūcuḥ
astuprasādanārādhyaścāstūpāsanapūjanam
sarvenarādayaḥ satvāmṛtāvasthāṅgatābhuvi
asyatejaḥprabhāveṇapraṇaṣṭāḥ sāgarādayaḥ
nasamarthāvayaṃ soḍhuṃ kathamanyepṛthagjanāḥ
tasmāt tavaprasādāccapūjayāmoyathāravim
devānāṃ vacanaṃ śrutvā gatobrahmakhageśvaram
brahmarūpadharaḥsākṣādduṣprekṣyaḥpralayānalaḥ
tvadṛte sarvalokānāṃ dinaikaṃ nāstijīvanam
prabhustvaṃ sarvalokānāṃ trātāgoptāpitāprasūḥ
carācarāṇāṃ sarveṣāṃ tvatprasādāddhṛtaṃ jagat
rūpagandhādikārītvaṃ rasānāṃ svādutātvayā
evaṃ viśveśvaraḥsūronikhilasthitikārakaḥ
tīrthānāṃ puṇyakṣetrāṇāṃ makhānāṃ jagataḥ prabho
tvam ekaḥprayatohetuḥ sarvasākṣīguṇākaraḥ
sarvajṣaḥsarvakartācahartāpātāsadotsukaḥ
dhvāṃ tapaṅkāmayaghnaś ca dāridryaduḥkhanāśanaḥ
āditya uvāca
pitāmahamahāprājṣaviśvendraviśvabhāvaka
brūhi śīghraṃ paraṃ yattekariṣyāmimataṃ vidhe
mayūkhastvaticaṇḍaś ca lokānām atiduḥsahaḥ
āditya uvāca
kiraṇāḥkoṭikoṭirmelokanāśakarāḥparāḥ
nacābhīṣṭakarālokeprayogācchindhitān prabho
tatoviriṃ cinātūrṇaṃ ravivākyavaśāddhruvaṃ
āhūyaviśvakarmāṇaṅkṛtvāvajramayīṃ bhrami
amoghaṃ yamadaṇḍaṃ caśūlaṃ paśupatestathā
kālasyacaparaḥkhaḍgaśśaktirgurupramodinī
caṇḍikāyāḥparaṃ śastraṃ vicitraṃ śūlakaṃ tathā
cakrebrahmājṣayāśīghraṃ tenaivaviśvakarmaṇā
sahasrakiraṇaṃ śiṣṭamanyac caiva praśātitam
ayaṃ carativiśvāṃ temeruśṛṅgaṃ bhramatyapi
sūraḥsaṃ caratemāsāndvādaśadvādaśātmakaḥ
saṅkramādasyasaṅkrāṃ tiḥsarvair evapratīyate
tāsuyadvāphalaṃ brūmolokānāṃ nikhilaṃ mune
dhanurmithunamīneṣu kanyāyāṃ ṣaḍaśītayaḥ
vṛṣavṛścikakuṃ bheṣu siṃ heviṣṇupadīsmṛtā
tarpaṇaṃ cākṣayaṃ viddhidānaṃ devārcanantathā
ṣaḍaśītisahasrāṇiṣaḍaśītauphalaṃ bhavet
viṣṇupadyāṃ tulakṣaṃ tuayanekoṭikoṭakaṃ
viṣṇupadyāṃ tuyaddānamakṣayaṃ parikīrtitaṃ
śītetūlapaṭīdānānnaduḥkhaṃ jāyatetanau
tulādānetalpadānedvayorevākṣayaṃ phalaṃ
sarvopakaraṇāṃ śayyāṃ yodadātivimatsaraḥ
varṇamukhyāyaviprāyasarājapadavīṃ labhet
tathaivāgniṃ jalaṃ datvānadītīrepathiprage
datvācatailatāṃ būlamūrvyā adhipatirbhavet
satyabhāvāddvijaṃ natvādhanīcākṣayatāṃ vrajet
māghemāsyasitepakṣepaṣcadaśyāmaharmukhe
sulakṣaṇāṃ cagāṃ datvāhemaśṛṅgāṃ maṇiprabhām
raupyakhurapradeśāṃ catathākāṃ syasudohanām
etāṃ datvādvijāgryāyasārvabhaumobhaven nṛpaḥ
datvānnābharaṇaṃ rājāmaṇḍaleśodhanīśvaraḥ
bhojyānnaṃ brāhmaṇedatvā akṣayaṃ svargamaśnute
dhānyaṃ vastraṃ tathābhṛtyaṅgṛhapīṭhādikaṃ cayat
yodadātidvijāgryāyataṃ calakṣmīrnamuṃ cati
yakaṃ ciddīyatedānaṃ svalpaṃ vāyadivābahu
yadvādevārcanaṃ stotraṃ dharmākhyānapratiśravaḥ
tṛtīyāmāghamāsasyasitāmanvaṃ tarāsmṛtā
tasyāṃ yaddīyatedānaṃ sarvamakṣayamucyate
dhanaṃ bhogyaṃ tathārājyaṃ nākaṅkalpāṃ tarasthitam
tasmād dānaṃ satāṃ pūjāpretyānantaphalapradā
manvaṃ tarātumāghesyātsaptamīyāśitītarā
tithiḥpuṇyatamāproktāpurāṇair abhir akṣitā
māghamāsesitepakṣesaptamīkoṭibhāskarā
tāmupoṣyanaraḥpuṇyāṃ mucyatenātrasaṃśayaḥ
sūryagrahaṇatulyāhiśuklāmāghasyasaptamī
aruṇodayavelāyāṃ tasyāṃ snānaṃ mahāphalam
tanmerogaṃ caśokaṃ cabhāskarīhaṃ tusaptamī
jananīsarvabhūtānāṃ saptamīsaptasaptike
arkapatraṃ yavāḥpuṣpaṃ sugandhaṃ badarīphalam
tatpatretāmrapātrevāyuktamānīyataṇḍulam
yajṣasūtraṃ sasiṃ dūraṃ datvācārghaṃsuśobhanam
sarvapāpaṅkṣayaṃ yātisaptajanmakṛtaṃ cayat
narakaiḥpīḍyatetāvadrogaiḥpāpaiś ca duḥkhadaiḥ
haviṣyaṃ bhojayedannaṃ śuddhamātapataṇḍulaiḥ
varjayeccaśilāghṛṣṭaṃ śṛṅgaberaṃ tuśākakam
koradūṣakapatraṃ caraṃ bhācchāgīghṛtaṃ tathā
keśakīṭādikaṃ varjyamuṣṇodasnānameva ca
anyaccanācaret tatra dharmaciṃ tāṃ vināvratī
sauravrataṃ mahāpuṇyaṃ purāṇair abhinaṃ ditam
varṣakoṭisahasrāṇivarṣakoṭiśatāni ca
ādityasyasamaṃ bhogyaṃ labhatediviśāśvatam
evaṃ svargakṣayādevarājābhūmaumahādhanī
tathāsvayaṃ sukhaṃ bhogyaṃ labhatediviśāśvatam
ārogyaṃ sampadaṃ janmībhāskarasyaprasādataḥ
mahājayetivikhyātā an yatra vijayāsmṛtā
vijayākoṭilakṣaṃ syādanantaṃ syānmahājayā
eṣāṃ bhedaṃ pravakṣyamiśṛṇuviprayathārthavat
uttamābharaṇair yuktaṃ sadvāhaṃ yodadātiha
samudraiḥ saptabhir juṣṭāṃ bhūmimetyārivarjitām
aśvahīnaṃ capatrāṅgaṃ vṛṣabhair vāpyalaṅkṛtam
hemamāṣaṃ dvimāṣaṃ vādakṣiṇāvihitābudhaiḥ
ratnabhāṇḍaṃ mahārthaṃ cahaimair evakṛtaṃ cayat
svarṇaṃ vākevalaṃ datvātriviṣṭapadhaneśvaraḥ
svargorvyorīśatāmetinataṃ lakṣmīrvimuṃ cati
arogīsuprasannātmādasyujetāpratāpavān
yāvatprabhāsatebhānustāvatpūjyatamohisaḥ
māghādaudvādaśīṃ māyāṃ saptamīṅkārayetsatu
ihābhīṣṭaphalaṃ bhuktvāsuraiś caiva prapūjyate
arkāṅgasaptamīvrataṅkṛtvācavidhivadbudhaḥ
pāpātpūtaihābhīṣṭaṃ samprāpyamuktimāpnuyāt
lakṣaṇaṃ capravakṣyāmi māsimāsicayovidhiḥ
vratasyāsyaprasādāccasurāṇām arcitodivi
puṃ nāmadheyanakṣatregṛhṇīyātsaptamīvratam
puṃ nāmadheyanakṣatrāṇyetānyāhurmanīṣiṇaḥ
paṣcamyām ekabhaktaṃ tuṣaṣṭhyāṃ naktaṃ prakīrtitam
saptamyāmupavāsaṃ caaṣṭamyāṃ pāraṇaṃ bhavet
arkāgraṃ śucigomayaṃ sumaricanto yaṃ phalaṃ cāśnu
temūlaṃ naktamupoṣaṇaṃ cavidhivatkṛtvaikabhaktaṃ tathā
kṣīraṃ vāpyaśanaṅghṛtāktamiticaproktāḥkrameṇāmunā
kṛtvāvāsarasaptamīṃ dinakṛtaḥprāpnotyabhīṣṭaṃ phalaṃ
arkāgraṅgrāmātpūrvottaradiggatārkaviṭapasyaśākhāgrasthitaṃ
viśiṣṭaṃ sūkṣmapatradvayaṃ satoyaṃ dantair aspṛṣṭaṃ pātavyaṃ
śucigomayaṃ bhūmāvapatitaṃ madyāṅguṣṭhābhyāṃ palamātraṃ dantair aspṛṣṭaṃ satoyaṃ pātavyam
sumaricamavraṇamapurātanaṃ sthūlamavaśuṣkam ekaṃ dantair aspṛṣṭaṃ satoyaṃ pātavyam
toyaṃ brahmapitraṅgulīmūlaprasaraṃ pātavyam phalaṅkharjūranārikelānām anyatamaṃ daṃ tair aspṛṣṭaṃ pātavyaṃ ghṛtāktamiticāhāraṃ mayūraḍiṃ bhaparimāṇaṃ
ātmanodviguṇāṃ chāyāṃ yadākurvītabhāskaraḥ
tadānaktaṃ vijānīyānnanaktaṃ niśibhojanaṃ
annadānantataḥkuryādvidhyuktaparimāṇakaṃ
sarvalakṣaṇa sampūrṇaṃ sarvābharaṇabhūṣitaṃ
ādityaṃ ciṃ tayeddevaṃ pūjākāleviśeṣataḥ
athamantraścāyaṃ
japya eṣaparaḥproktaḥsaptamyāṃ vijayāvahaḥ
paścāccapāraṇākāryātathāṣṭamyāṃ viśeṣataḥ
aṣṭamyāmevakartavyaṃ navamyāṃ naivapāraṇaṃ
vratephalaṃ nacāpnotinavamyāṃ pāraṇekṛte
pāraṇaṃ tvaparāhṇetukaṭutiktāmlavarjitaṃ
taṇḍulaṃ śodhayedyatnāttṛṇabījādikaṃ tyajet
mudgamāṣatilādīnighṛtaṃ caparivarjayet
brāhmaṇānbhojayedbhaktyāśaktaḥkṣīrādihavyakaiḥ
yathāśaktyannapānaiś ca vyaṃ janaiś ca nirāmiṣaiḥ
viprāyadakṣiṇāṃ dadyādvibhajyacānurūpataḥ
imāmanantaphaladāṃ yaḥkuryātsaptamīṃ naraḥ
māsimāsidvijaśreṣṭhavrataṅkṛtvārkatuṣṭaye
yaḥkuryātpāraṇaṃ bhaktyāsūryalokaṃ sagacchati
kalpakoṭiṃ vasetsvargetatoyātiparāṅgatiṃ
idamevaparaṅguhyaṃ bhāṣitaṃ śaṃ bhunāpurā
śravaṇātsatataṃ tasyavratasyaparipālanāt
śrāvayedvāpilokasyaphalaṃ tulyaṃ prakīrtitaṃ
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe prathame sṛṣṭikhaṇḍe arkāṅgasaptamīvrataṃ nāma
aṣṭasaptatitamo'dhyāyaḥ
vaiśaṃ mpāyana uvāca
bhagavaṃ stvatprasādāccaśrutaṃ mepāvanaṃ vrataṃ
vyāsa uvāca
kailāsaśikhareramyesukhāsīnaṃ maheśvaraṃ
praṇamyaśirasābhūmauskaṃ dovacanamabravīt
vārāderyatphalaṃ nāthaśrotumicchāmitattvataḥ
īśvara uvāca
naktāhāraṃ haviṣyāṃ nnaṅkṛtvāsvargānnahīyate
saptamyāś ca sadācāraṃ sarvamevārkavāsare
kurvataḥprītimāpnotisagaṇaḥparameśvaraḥ
śūrasyasadṛśaṃ yātitithivārasyapālanāt
sarvakāmapradaṃ puṇyamaiśvaryaṃ roganāśanam
svargadaṃ mokṣadaṃ puṇyaṃ ravervārevrataṃ hitam
ravivāreṇasaṅkrāṃ tyāsaptamyātaddineśive
vratapūjādikaṃ cāpyaṃ sarvaṃ cākṣayatāṃ vrajet
prāṇādahatavaktreṇaniḥsāryamaṇḍalenyaset
sarvaraktābharaṇaṃ dhyātvāhastābhyāṃ puṣpaṃ vidhṛtasaṅghrāyaiśānyāṅkṣipet
ādityāyavidmahebhāskarāyadhīmahi
vilepanāṃ tesaddhūpaṃ dhūpāṃ tecapradīpakam
tatojapyaṃ stutiṃ mudrāṃ namaskāraṃ tukārayet
aṃ jaliḥprathamāmudrādvitīyādhenukāsmṛtā
evaṃ yaḥpūjayedarkaṃ ravisāyujyamāvrajet
ravestasyaprasādāttumuktaṃ vārāṇasītaṭe
skaṃ da uvāca
tvaṃ cajṣānīśvaroyogīlokebhoktā'kṣarovyayaḥ
devānāṅgururekastvaṃ vyāptarūpīmaheśvaraḥ
sarvajṣovaradonityaṃ sarveṣāṃ prāṇināṃ prabhuḥ
duṣkṛtaṃ tekutonāthatathākrodhoviśeṣataḥ
śiva uvāca
lokānāṃ ca hitārthāyapṛthagbhūtāyuge yuge
sarvaṅkurmovayaṃ putrabrahmaviṣṇumaheśvarāḥ
nāsmākaṃ bandhamokṣaucanākāryaṅkāryamevavā
ekosaubahudhābhūtvākālabhedādaniṃ ditaḥ
māsemāsetutapatiekodvādaśatāṃ vrajet
mitromārgaśiremāsipaupeviṣṇuḥsanātanaḥ
varuṇomāghamāsetusūryovaiphālgunetathā
caitremāsitapedbhānurvaiśākhetāpanaḥsmṛtaḥ
jyeṣṭhamāsetapedindra āṣāḍhetapateraviḥ
gabhastiḥśrāvaṇemāsiyamobhādrapadetathā
hiraṇyaretāśvayujikārtiketudivākaraḥ
ityetedvādaśādityāmāsimāsi prakīrtitāḥ
ururūpāmahātejāyuṅgāṃ tānalavarcasaḥ
akṣayaṃ labhatesvargaṃ sukhaṃ rājyaṃ yaśaḥkramāt
ūṃ ṃ namaḥsahasrabāhaveādityāyanamonamaḥ
namastimiranāśāyaśrīsūryāyanamonamaḥ
tvaṃ cabrahmātvaṃ caviṣṇūrudrastvaṃ canamonamaḥ
sarvagaḥsarvabhūteṣu na hi kiṃ cittvayāvinā
ādityobhāskaraḥsūryoarkobhānurdivākaraḥ
suvarṇaretāmitraś ca pūṣātvaṣṭācatedaśa
svayaṃ bhūstimirāśaś ca dvādaśaḥparikīrtitaḥ
nāmānyetāni sūryasyaśuciryastupaṭhennaraḥ
sarvapāpāccarogāccamuktoyātiparāṅgatim
raktākhyāyeraktanibhāsiṃ sadūrāruṇavigrahāḥ
yāni nāmāni mukhyāni tacchṛṇuṣvaṣaḍānana
lokasākṣītrilokeṣu vyomādhipodivākaraḥ
agnigarbhomahāvipraḥsvargaḥsaptāśvavāhanaḥ
kālapriyaṃ puṇḍarīkaṃ mūlasthānaṃ cabhāvitam
śṛṇukārtikayatnenasarvapāpaharaṃ śubham
ūṃ ṃ indrāyanamaḥ ūṃ ṃ viṣṇavenamaḥ
sarvaśāṃ tikaraś caiva sarvavighnavināśanaḥ
nāśayetsarvarogāṃ ś ca lūtāvisphoṭakādikān
kāmalādikarogāṃ ś ca yerogāś caiva dāruṇāḥ
kāhikaṃ tryahikaṃ cajvaraṃ cāturthikaṃ tathā
kuṣṭhaṃ rogaṅkṣayaṃ rogaṅkukṣirogaṃ jvaraṃ tathā
aśmarīmūtraṅkṛcchrāṃ ś ca nānārogāmayāṃ stathā
yevātaprabhavārogāyerogāgarbha sambhavāḥ
mardayantomahārogāmarditāvedanātmakāḥ
mūlamantraṃ pravakṣyāmi sarvakāmārthasādhakam
mantraścāyaṃ auṃ hrāṃ hrīṃ saḥ sūryāyanamaḥ
vyādhayovainabādhaṃ tenacāni ṣṭaṃ bhayaṃ bhavet
sūryāvartodakaṃ yastugṛhītvātukrameṇatu
abhakteṣv anapatyeṣu pāṣaṇḍalaukikeṣu ca
japyamānetuṃ naśyanti rogāḥkrūragrahāstathā
sarvaśāṃ tiriyaṃ vatsasarvārthapratisādhikā
nāstikāyanadātavyādevabrāhmaṇaniṃ dake
prātarutthāyayonityaṅkīrtayiṣyatimānavaḥ
śarīrārogyakṛc caiva dhanavṛddhiyaśaskaraḥ
jāyatenātrasaṃ dehoyasyatuṣyeddivākaraḥ
ekakālaṃ dvikālaṃ vātrikālaṃ nityameva ca
yaḥpaṭhedravisānnidhyeso'bhīṣṭaṃ phalamāpnuyāt
putrārthīlabhateputraṅkanyārthīkanyakāṃ labhet
vidyārthīlabhatevidyāṃ dhanārthīlabhatedhanaṃ
śṛṇuyātsaṃ yutobhaktyāśuddhācārasamanvitaḥ
puṇyasthāneṣu tīrtheṣu paṭhetkoṭiguṇaṃ bhavet
grahebhojyeṣu pūjāyāṃ brahmabhojyedvijāgrataḥ
tapasvināṃ caviprāṇāṃ devānām agrataḥsudhīḥ
yaḥpaṭhetpāṭhayedvāpisuralokemahīyate
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe prathame sṛṣṭikhaṇḍe sūryaśāṃ ti
rnāmāṣṭasaptatitamo'dhyāyaḥ
ekonāśītitamo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
madhyadeśesvarāṭsamrāṭbhadreśvaraitiśrutaḥ
devāṃ stupūjayennityaṃ subhāvenasadākhalu
tatobhiṣakprayogāccalakṣaṇaṃ dṛśyatepurā
āhūyadvijamukhyāṃ ś ca mantriṇaḥsobravīdvacaḥ
rājovāca
kilbiṣaṃ ekareviprāduḥsahaṃ lokagarhitaṃ
tasmāt puṇyaṃ mahākṣetraṃ yatra tyakṣyāmivigrahaṃ
ājṣāpayatadharmajṣāḥparalokahitāyavai
vaṃśahīnasyamevīrāḥpretyāmutrahitaṃ cayat
dvijāūcuḥ
parityaktetvayārāṣṭredharmaśīlenadhīmatā
naṣṭaṃ jagad idaṃ rājaṃ stasmānnovaktum arhasi
sūraṃ mantrair mahādevaṃ yatnādārādhaya prabho
rājovāca
kenopāyenaviprendrāstoṣayiṣyāmibhāskaraṃ
amedhyenāthakuṣṭhenalokānāṅgarhitenaca
adṛśyaḥsarvabhūtānāṅgarhito’smi dvijātayaḥ
kiṅkariṣyāmirājyaṃ cakiṃ syādārādhanenatu
dvijāūcuḥ
ākārṣīttasyasūryasyaparamārādhanaṃ cayat
phalair nānāvidhair arghair akṣatātapataṇḍulaiḥ
japāpuṣpārkaparṇaiś ca karavīrakaraṃ jakaiḥ
arghyamauduṃ barekṛtvāsadāsūryāyapārthivaḥ
mahiṣībhistathācārghobhoginībhiḥsamaṃ tataḥ
sarvair aṃ taḥpurasthaiś ca sapatnīkaiś ca rakṣibhiḥ
arkaśāṃ tibhir atyugraiḥstotramantrādibhiḥparaiḥ
tathārkāṅgavrataṃ cānyatkṛtaṃ taiḥsusamāhitaiḥ
kramātsamāṃ samāsādyarogasyāṃ taṅgato nṛpaḥ
bāṇair jāyābhir ālabhyamarkaparṇānyapuṣpakaṃ
evamevamahāpuṇyaṅkṛtvāsarvajanapriyaṃ
saṃ tuṣṭobhūpamāgamyakṛpayācābravīdvacaḥ
varaṃ varayacābhīṣṭaṃ yastemanasivartate
sarveṣāṃ vohitārthāyasānugaḥpuravāsinām
rājovāca
sarveṣāṃ naḥparaṃ svargaṃ tvatsakāśebhavatviti
sūrya uvāca
amātyāstedvijāviprāḥsadārāḥ saparicchadāḥ
navīnayauvanāḥśuddhāyāvadābhūta samplavam
suradrumaiḥsu sampūrṇaiḥprāsādair drumakalpakaiḥ
pramadābhir mahābhāganṛtyagītādibhiḥparaiḥ
paṣcakalpāṃ tarerājāmanvādautvaṃ bhaviṣyasi
amītemanujābhūpapurasthāś ca purodhasaḥ
tathājanapadasthāś ca vidvāṃ sodhaninonarāḥ
tatra kīṭādayoyecatepītāḥsasutādayaḥ
evamevanṛpāviprāmunayaśśaṃ sitavratāḥ
yecakṣatrādayovarṇāḥ sūrasvargaṃ yayurdrutam
kaiścidabhyarthitaṃ vittaṃ putradārāstathāparaiḥ
sukhaṃsvargaṃ tathārogyaṃ bhāskarasyaprasādataḥ
puṇyakūṭam idaṃ bhadraṃ yaḥ paṭhen mānavaḥ śuciḥ
śṛṇoti saṃyato martyaḥ sobhīṣṭaṃ phalam āpnuyāt
pāragaḥ sarvapāpānāṃ bhāskarasyaiva saṃsadi
vāvadūko bhaven nityaṃ śravaṇāt puṇyavān dhanī
idaṃ guhyātiguhyaṃ ca bhāskareṇa pracāritaṃ
idaṃ yamāya kathitaṃ kṣitau vyāsena kīrtitam
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe prathame sṛṣṭikhaṇḍe
bhadreśvarākhyānaṃ nāma
ekonāśītitamo'dhyāyaḥ
aśītitamo'dhyāyaḥ
vaiśaṃ pāyana uvāca
ravyādīnāṅgrahāṇāṃ casādhanaṃ novadadvija
keteravyādayasteṣāṃ kathanto ṣaḥ kathaṃ priyam
kāledeśetu samprāptedarśanantacchivāśivam
vyāsa uvāca
śivāśivaṃ cakurvanti viśvakarmakṣayāyavai
sūraḥkāloṃ takojṣeyojaneṣu cagraheṣu ca
udumbarapalāśābhyāṃ pallavābhyāṃ juhotiyaḥ
ākṛṣṇenetimantreṇamūlakenāthaśāṃ taye
juhuyādājyayuktābhyāmabhīṣṭaphalahetave
śāṃ tayesarvarogāṇāṃ vadhabandhavimocane
śitaṃ cacchāgalaṃ dadyātsūrāyādityavāsare
saptamyāṃ casitepakṣepaṣcadaśyāṃ tathaiva ca
paramaṃ cāmaraṃ satvam ābrahmastaṃ bamātrake
brahmāṇḍecāṇumātrecasūraḥ sambhāvayiṣyate
saṃ hārāṃ taṅkramātsarvamutpattisthitikāraṇāt
prāṇasargejanānāṃ sapātāviśvacarastanau
śīrṣāntasthaḥsadācandrodviraṣṭakalayāyutaḥ
aharniśaṃ sudhāvṛṣṭiṃ dehevarṣatyadhomukhaḥ
jaṃ tavastenajīvanti mahāsatvānumātrakāḥ
urvyāṃ sasyāni puṣṇātitathāsthāvarajaṅgamān
etābhyāṃ puṣpavadbhyāṃ cadhāritaṃ janitaṃ jagat
tayorārādhanātpuṣṭiḥsadāpuṇyāparārdhikā
sādhayetsarvakāryāṇisādhakaḥsarvadāśuciḥ
napūjayatiyomohātsudhāṃ śuṃ mānavādhamaḥ
āyustasyakṣayaṃ yātinarakaṃ cādhigacchati
niṣkalaṅkakalādhāragaṅgādharaśiromaṇe
prakarotinaroyastusobhīṣṭaṃ phalamāpnuyāt
śuklapakṣetathākṛṣṇetriyāmāyāṃ vidurbudhāḥ
ūṃ ṃ hrāṃ hrīṃ somāyanamaḥ itijapyamantraḥ
prabhātejapanīyaḥ
evaṃ yaḥpūjayetsomaṃ śrāvayeccaśṛṇotivā
itisomapūjā
pittalebhājanekāṃ syedadhipūrṇeghṛteśive
svarṇevārājatevāresaumyekṛṣṇabhavebudham
paraṃ bhavatisaubhāgyaṃ pīyūṣādadhikaṃ bhṛśam
strīṇāṃ capuruṣāṇāṃ canadaurbhāgyaṅkadācana
rūpasaubhāgyakāmohaṃ dadhipūrṇaṃ cabhājanam
dadāmikāṃ syapātrasthaṃ dehisaubhāgyarūpakam
dvijāyavākyapūrveṇadadyādvimatsaronaraḥ
śaktitodakṣiṇādeyātathāvastrādikaṃ navam
bhojyānnaṃ sarvasampūrṇaṃ tāṃ būlaṃ sumanoharam
puṣpamālādikaṃ dadyādrūpasaubhāgyahetave
evaṃ yaḥkurutedānaṃ somoddiṣṭaṃ dvijātaye
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe prathame sṛṣṭikhaṇḍe somārcanaṃ
nāmāśītitamo'dhyāyaḥ
ekāśītitamo'dhyāyaḥ
vaiśaṃ pāyana uvāca
udbhavaṃ lohitāṅgasyasanto ṣaṃ tujaneṣu ca
prabhāvaṃ vaibhavaṃ tejaḥśrotumicchāmitattvataḥ
vyāsa uvāca
harāṃ śa sambhavodevaḥkujātaḥpṛthivīsutaḥ
sattvasthaḥ satva sampūrṇaśśūraḥśaktidharobhuvi
tīkṣṇaḥkrūragrahodevolohitāṅgaḥpratāpavān
anenabharjitādaityāḥkravyādāyasuradviṣaḥ
daśāyogāccamanujā udbhijjāḥpaśupakṣiṇaḥ
vaiśaṃ pāyana uvāca
śaṃ bhoreṣa kathaṃ jātaḥ kathaṃ jātomahīsutaḥ
guromayyāptabhāvetuvadaniḥsaṃśayaṃ mukhāt
vyāsa uvāca
hiraṇyākṣakuledhīmānasurāṇāṃ capārthivaḥ
aṃ dhaketisamākhyātodaityaḥsarvasurāṃ takṛt
jātoviṣṇuvarādevajātoviṣṇuparākramaḥ
tenaivanirjitādevāḥ sendrāḥkratubhujaḥkramāt
andhakenaivacāsmākaṃ hṛtaṃ rājyaṃ sukhaṃ makhaḥ
tasmāt tasyavadhopāyaucyatāṃ tadvidhīyatām
nāstiviṣṇuvarādevapīyūṣasyacabhakṣaṇāt
kurvelokahitārthāyaśraddhāṅkāmasamanvitām
tyaktvaikāṃ pārvatīṃ durgāṃ natasyamānasaṃ sthiram
tataḥkruddhojagatsvāmītaṃ cavair ūpyatāṃ nayet
evamuktvāprajādhyakṣaḥśraddhāṅkāmasamanvitām
vicikitsāṃ svamāyāṃ capreṣayāmāsataṃ prati
tatoviceṣṭitaḥkāmādyoṣānveṣaṇatatparaḥ
svadārānparayoṣāṃ canāpaśyadvicikitsayā
dṛṣṭaṃ ca himavatpṛṣṭhestrīratnaṃ cātiśobhanaṃ
dṛṣṭvā capārvatīṃ daityaḥkāmasyavaśagobhavat
jñānalopāttatodurgāṅgrahītuṃ tāṃ sacecchati
umācakoṭavīrūpaṅkṛtvādehasyacātmanaḥ
īśvarasyānti kasthācagrahītuṃ tāṃ sasārasaḥ
tataḥkāmavicetāś ca unmattīkṛtacetanaḥ
najahātiśivāṃ dhātrīṃ pārvatīṃ daityapuṅgavaḥ
tatodhyānātsamāgamyamilitaḥ pārvatīṃ dhavaḥ
dṛṣṭvā taṃ casadaityendraḥpragatastusvamālayam
sajjīkṛtyasvayodhāṃ ś ca śaṃ bhuṃ jetuṃ samutsukaḥ
gaurīmevasamānetuṅkāmamohādacetanaḥ
etacchrutvātutridaśā gatvā taṃ naṃ dineritāḥ
daityānraṇemṛtāṃ tatra daityācāryohyajīvayat
krodhācchaṃ bhustadāvākyaṃ naṃ dinaṃ nijagādaha
gacchadaityālayaṃ vīradrutamevamamājṣayā
paśyatāṃ sarvadaityānāṃ daityendrasyacasaṃ sadi
gṛhītvācikure'tyarthaṃ bhārgavaṃ taṃ durātmakam
labdhvācāsmatsakāśaṃ vaivihvalaṃ cānayakṣaṇāt
tatonaṃ dīśvaraḥśrīmānpārvatīpatineritaḥ
kāvyaṃ taṅkuṃ taledhṛtvādaityānāṃ puratobalāt
ānayaṃ taṃ cataṃ daityājaghnuḥpraharaṇaiḥśaraiḥ
naśekusterujāṅkartuṃ naṃ dinobalaśālinaḥ
devānām agratonaṃ dīgṛhītvātaṃ cakuṃ tale
gṛhītvābhārgavaṃśaṃ bhurasurāṇāṅguruṃ ruṣā
dudrāvaśaṅkaraṃ tatra ghoraiḥpraharaṇādibhiḥ
tridaśāś ca tathākruddhāstatovidyādharādayaḥ
prayayuḥsamaraṃ tatra daityānāṃ cabhṛśaṃ ruṣā
śātakumbhamayāṅgaisteśarair vajrasamānakaiḥ
dīpayanti bhṛśaṅkāṃ taistadgātrāṇinabhāṃ sica
hatvācapātayāmāsuḥkāśyapāḥsurasattamāḥ
jagad vyāptaṃ mahāsainyaṃ balāyudhasusaṃ vṛtam
nītaṅkṣayaṃ suraiḥsarvaiḥśastraiḥpratyayitaiḥkṣaṇāt
śūloddhṛtopisuciramavinaṣṭo'thanamradhīḥ
andhakogaṇatāṃ nītvākṛtobhṛṅgīriṭirdvija
tatodevānsamābhāṣyaśukramudgīrṇavānśivaḥ
śukraśśivaṃ samābhāṣyagatodaityānmudānvitaḥ
evaṃ bhaumaḥ samutpannoharāṃ śobhūsamudbhavaḥ
daśādyariṣṭecatathāgocareniṣṭarāśige
trikoṇemaṇḍale caiva raktapuṣpānulepanaiḥ
putrānsukhaṃ yaśaś caiva kiṃ bhūyaḥśrotumicchasi
vyāsa uvāca
etadvaḥkathitaṃ śiṣyādharmākhyānaṃ śubhāvaham
dvijātīnāṃ puṇyadaṃ casaṃ sevyaṃ caśubhepsubhiḥ
yathāsukhaṃ cagacchadhvaṅkṛtakṛtyāmamājṣayā
evaṃ viśrāvyabhagavānvyāsaḥsatyavatīsutaḥ
nirṇīyadharmaṃ vividhaṃ śamyāprāsamagātsuta
tvam apiśraddhayāvatsajṣātvātattvaṃ yathāsukham
viharasvayathākālaṅgāyamānohariṃ mudā
lokāndharmaṃ copadiśanprīṇayanjagatāṅgurum
nārāyaṇaṃ munivaraṃ draṣṭuṃ badarikāśrame
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe prathame sṛṣṭikhaṇḍe bhaumotpattipūjanaṃ
nāmaikāśītitamo'dhyāyaḥ
dvyaśītitamo'dhyāyaḥ
bhīṣma uvāca
budhasyasomasūnoś ca pūjanaṃ kathayādhunā
saumyaḥkrūrograhojṣeyaḥśubhāśubhapradonṛṇāṃ
śarākāraṃ maṇḍalaṃ tubudhasyaparikīrtitaṃ
harinmaṇisamair varṇaiścūrṇaiḥkuryāttumaṇḍalaṃ
pūjayet tatra gandhādyaiḥpuṣpair dhūpaiḥ suśobhanaiḥ
dānaṃ cavidhivatkuryāddaśāriṣṭecagocare
karpūrāś caiva mudgāś ca haridvastraṃ harinmaṇiḥ
suvarṇaṃ cayathāśaktidadyādbodhanatuṣṭaye
somaputramahāprājṣavedavedāṅgapāraga
itistutvāmahārājabudhaṃ bhaktyāsamāhitaḥ
prāpnuyānnikhilānkāmānsomasūnuprasādataḥ
guroś ca pūjanaṃ proktaṃ paṭṭasākāramaṇḍale
pītavarṇaiḥsuniṣpannaiścūrṇair ājansuśobhanaiḥ
daśāgocarayordauṣṭyedānaṃ dadyāccaśaktitaḥ
caṇakadvidalaṃ caiva pītavastraṃ suvarṇakaṃ
puṣyarāgaṃ tuviprāyadadyāccāriṣṭaśāṃ taye
bṛhaspatesurācāryasarvaśāstraviśārada
dānenānenasaṃ tuṣṭobhavasaumyomamādhunā
evaṅkṛteturājendrasvānukūlobhavedguruḥ
bhārgavasyāpivakṣyāmi pūjanaṃ nṛpatedhunā
yatkṛtvāsarvakāmāptiḥsamyakpuṃ sāṃ prajāyate
paṣcakoṇaṃ samuddiṣṭaṃ maṇḍalaṃ bhārgavasyatu
cūrṇakaiḥśvetavarṇaiś ca vidhināsudhiyākṛtaṃ
pūjayedbhārgavaṃ bhaktyānaraḥśraddhāsamanvitaḥ
raupyaṃ cadakṣiṇādānaṃ yathāśaktiprakīrtitaṃ
daśādyariṣṭecotpannesitamaśvaṃ pradāpayet
taṇḍulāḥśvetavastraṃ caraupyaṃ caṃ danameva ca
karpūraṃ casugandhāḍhyaṃ deyaṃ dānaṃ dvijātaye
bhṛguputramahābhāgadānavānāṃ purohita
dānenānenasaṃ tuṣṭobhavasarvāsurārcita
tasyatuṣṭobhavatyāśubhārgavaḥkurunaṃ dana
śanaiś ca rasyapūjārthaṃ maṇḍalaṃ canarākṛti
kṛtvācūrṇaiḥkṛṣṇavarṇaiḥpūjayet tatra bhaktitaḥ
kṛṣṇair gandhaiś ca puṣpaiś ca vastraiścāpitathāvidhaiḥ
lohaṃ cadakṣiṇādānaṃ piṇyākaṃ catilasyaca
dānaṃ śanaiś ca rāriṣṭekṛṣṇāṅgāṅkṛṣṇavastrakaṃ
suvarṇaṃ cayathāśaktidadyānnīlamaṇiṃ tathā
sūryasūnomahābhāgachāyāputramahābala
adhodṛṣṭebhavaśaneprasanno'smātpradānataḥ
evaṃ stutvāśaniṃ bhaktyāyaś ca dadyāddvijātaye
rāhorvarṇādikaṃ sarvaṃśanivanmaṇḍalaṃ tathā
sūryākāraṃ samuddiṣṭaṃ tatra pūjārkasūnuvat
gomedaṃ sarṣapāś caiva tilāmāṣāś ca kṛṣṇakāḥ
mahiṣīcatathācchāgodānaṃ rāhoḥprakīrtitam
bhavatuṣṭomahābhāgadānenānenasuvrata
ketormaṇḍalakaṅkuryāddhvajākṛtisuśobhanam
śanivatsakalaṃ jṣeyaṃ pūjāvarṇādikaṃ nṛpa
saptadhānyaṃ samuddiṣṭaṃ sasvarṇaṅketudānakam
evaṅkṛtesvānukūlaubhavetāṃ canṛṇāṃ nṛpa
pradadyātāṃ dhanaṃ putrānsukhaṃsaubhāgyameva ca
ākṛṣṇetiravermantraimaṃ devāstathāvidhoḥ
annātparītiśukrasyaśannodevīrayaṃ śaneḥ
kayānaitirāhoś ca ketoḥketumitismṛtaḥ
etemantrāḥ samuddiṣṭāgrahaṇāṃ pūjanejape
evaṅkṛte nṛpaśreṣṭhānukūlā akhilāgrahāḥ
etanmahārājamayāsamastaṃ tubhyaṃ samuddiṣṭamihakrameṇa
śrutvā naraḥsarvaśrutārthasārametīśvarasyaivacasannidhānam
idaṃ pavitraṃ yaśasonidhānam idaṃ pitṝṇāmativallabhaṃsyāt
idaṃ cadeveṣv amṛtāyakalpatepuṇyāvahaṃ pātakināṃ capuṃ sām
itipaṭhatiyaśasyaṃ yaḥśṛṇotīhabhaktyāmadhumuranakārerarcanaṃ vāthapaśyet
yaidaṃ śṛṇuyānnityamṛṣīṇāṃ caritaṃ śubham
tapaḥkṛtepraśaṃ santi tretāyāṃ jñānameva ca
abhayaṃ sarvabhūtānāṃ nāstidānamataḥparam
dānaṃ pradhānaṃ śūdrasyatvityāhabhagavānprabhuḥ
dānenasarvakāmāptistasyasaṃ jāyatetapaḥ
puṇyaṃ pavitramāyuṣyaṃ sarvapāpavināśanam
purāṇametatkathitaṃ tīrthaśrāddhānuvarṇanam
śṛṇotiyaḥpaṭhedvāpiśrīmānsaṃ jāyatenaraḥ
idaṃ mahārāja agādi tubhyaṃ
puṇyaṃ mahāpātakanāśanaṃ ca
sṛṣṭikhaṇḍam idaṃ rājan mayā tubhyaṃ prakīrtitam
purāṇasyādibhūtaṃ ca navadhā sṛṣṭipauṣkaram
dvijebhyaḥ śrāvayed vidvān yaś ca vai śṛṇuyāt paṭhet
iti śrīpādmapurāṇe sṛṣṭikhaṇḍe purāṇāvatāre
grahārcanavarṇanaṃ nāma
dvyaśītimo'dhyāyaḥ
sṛṣṭikhaṇḍaṃ samāptam
śubhaṃ bhavatu
atha śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe dvitīyaṃ bhūmikhaṇḍaṃ prārabhyate
auṃ śrīgaṇeśāya namaḥ
ṛṣaya ūcuḥ
śṛṇu sūta mahābhāga sarvatattvārthakovida
sandeham āgataṃ vidvan dāruṇaṃ buddhināśanam
kecit paṭhanti prahlādaṃ purāṇeṣu dvijottamāḥ
paṣcavarṣānvitenāpi keśavaḥ paritoṣitaḥ
nihato vāsudevena praviṣṭo vaiṣṇavīṃ tanum
sūta uvāca
kaśyapena purājṣātaṃ kṛtaṃ vyāsena dhīmatā
brahmaṇā kathitaṃ pūrvaṃ vyāsasyāgre svayaṃ prabhoḥ
tam evaṃ hipravakṣyāmi bhavatāmagratodvijāḥ
sandehakāraṇaṃ jātaṃ chinnaṃ devena vedhasā
vyāsa uvāca
śṛṇu sūta mahābhāga brahmaṇā paribhāṣitam
jātamātraḥ sarvasukhaṃ vaiṣṇavaṃ mārgam āśritaḥ
mahābhāgavataśreṣṭhaḥ prahlādo devapūjitaḥ
viṣṇunā saha yuddhāya sa putraḥ saṅgaraṅgataḥ
nihato vāsudevena praviṣṭo vaiṣṇavīṃ tanum
sṛṣṭibhāvaṃ śṛṇuṣva tvam asyaiva ca mahātmanaḥ
saṅgaraṃ prāpya putrādyair viṣṇunā saha vīryavān
praviṣṭo vaiṣṇavaṃ tejaḥ samprāpya svena tejasā
purākalpe mahābhāga yathājātaḥ sa vīryavān
vṛttāṃ taṃ tasya vīrasya pravakṣyāmi samāsataḥ
paścime sāgarasyānte dvārakā nāma vai purī
śivaśarmeti vikhyāto vedaśāstrārthakovidaḥ
tasyāpi paṣcaputrās tu babhūvuḥ śāstrakovidāḥ
yajṣaśarmā vedaśarmā dharmaśarmā tathaiva ca
viṣṇuśarmā mahābhāgo nūnaṃ tatkarmakovidaḥ
paṣcamaḥ somaśarmeti pitṛbhaktiparāyaṇaḥ
na vidanti mahātmānas tadbhāvena tu bhāvitāḥ
teṣāṃ tu bhaktiṃ sampaśyaṣ chivaśarmā dvijottamaḥ
cintayāmāsa medhāvī niṣkarṣiṣye surottamān
pitṛbhakteṣu yo bhāvo naiteṣāṃ manasi sthitaḥ
yathā jānāmy ahaṃ cātha kariṣye buddhipūrvakam
sadbhāvaṃ cintayāmāsa aṣjanārthaṃ dvijottamāḥ
upāyaṃ brāhmaṇaśreṣṭhas tapasas tejasaḥ kila
cakāra so’py upājṣo māyayā brahmavittamaḥ
teṣāmagretatovyājaṃ śivaśarmāvyadarśayat
mahatājvararogeṇamṛtāmātāvidarśitā
taistudṛṣṭāmṛtāmātāpitaraṃ vākyamabruvan
śivaśarmoparibhavaṃ putraṃ bhaktiparāyaṇam
yajṣaśarmāṇamāhūyaity uvācadvijottamaḥ
śivaśarmovāca
anenāpisutīkṣṇenaśastreṇaniśitenavai
tatkṛtaṃ tenaputreṇayathādeśaḥ śrutaḥ pituḥ
samāyātaḥ punaḥ paścātpitaraṃ vākyamabravīt
yathādiṣṭaṃ tvayātātatatsarvaṅkṛtavānaham
samādiśamamānyaccakāryakāraṇamadyaca
tamājṣāyamahābhāgaṃ pitṛbhaktaṃ sacadvijaḥ
niścayaṃ paramaṃ jṣātvādvitīyasya vicintayan
vedaśarmāṇamāhūyagacchatvaṃ mamaśāsanāt
striyāvinānaśaknomisthātuṅkaṃ darpamohitaḥ
māyayādarśitānārīsarvasaubhāgyasaṃ padā
enāmānayavatsatvaṃ mamārthekṛtaniścayaḥ
pitaraṃ taṃ namaskṛtyatām uvācagatastataḥ
tvāṃ deviyācatetātaḥ kāmabāṇaprapīḍitaḥ
evamākarṇitaṃ tasya māyayāvedaśarmaṇaḥ
jarayāpīḍitasyāpinaivecchāmikadācana
bhavaṃ taṃ rūpasaubhāgyairguṇaratnairalaṅkṛtam
kiṅkariṣyasitātenavṛddhenaśṛṇumānada
vedaśarmovāca
nedṛśaṃ māṃ vaderdevipitṛbhaktimanāgasam
piturarthaṃ samāyātastvāmahaṃ prārthayeśubhe
tadāmedarśayādyaivaseṃ drāṃ stvaṃ samaheśvarān
kiṃ tebalaṃ mahābhāgadarśayasvatvamātmanaḥ
vedaśarmovāca
mayāhūtāḥ samāyātāindrādyāḥ surasattamāḥ
vedaśarmovāca
yadidevāḥ prasānnāmeprasādasumukhāyadi
dadaṃ tuvimalāṃ bhaktiṃ pādayoḥ piturevame
evamastusurāḥ sarveyathāyātāstathāgatāḥ
tam uvācatathādṛṣṣṭvādṛṣṭaṃ tetapasobalam
vedaśarmovāca
dhanyohamadyasaṃ jātomuktaścaivaṛṇatrayāt
svaśirodevidāsyāmigṛhyatāṅgṛhyatāṃ śubhe
śitenatīkṣṇadhāreṇaśastreṇadvijasattamaḥ
tavārthepreṣitaṃ vipraputreṇavedaśarmaṇā
etacchiraḥ saṅgṛhāṇanikṛttaṃ cātmanātmanaḥ
tavārthedvijaśārdūlamām eva ṃ paribhuṅkṣvavai
tasya tairbhrātṛbhirdṛṣṭaṃ sāhasaṃ vedaśarmaṇaḥ
vepitāṅgatvamāpannāstebabhūvuḥ parasparam
mṛtānodharmasādhvīsāmātāsatyasamādhinā
ayam eva mahābhāgaḥ piturarthemṛtaḥ śubhaḥ
dhanyoyaṃ dhanyatāṃ prāptaḥ piturarthekṛtaṃ śubham
evaṃ sambhāṣitaṃ taistubhrātṛbhiḥ puṇyacāribhiḥ
samākarṇyadvijovākyaṃ jṣātvābhaktiparāyaṇam
nikṛttaṃ caśirastenaputreṇavedaśarmaṇā
dharmaśarmāṇamāhāthaśiraetatpragṛhyatām
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe bhūmikhaṇḍeśivaśarmacariteprathamo'dhyāyaḥ
dvitīyo'dhyāyaḥ
sūta uvāca
tadādāyamahātmāsaunirjagāmatvarānvitaḥ
dharmam ākṛṣṭavāṃś caiva dharmaśarmā tatas tadā
samākṛṣṭastuvaidharmastapasātasya dhīmataḥ
dharmaśarmāṇamāyātaidaṃ vacanamabravīt
kasmāttvayāsamāhūtodharmaśarmansamāgataḥ
yadyastiguruśuśrūṣāyadiniṣṭhā'calaṃ tapaḥ
pitṛbhaktyātavabhrātāvedaśarmāmahābhujaḥ
tapasānenatuṣṭosmipitṛbhaktyāmahāmate
evamākarṇitaṃ tenasuvākyaṃ dharmaśarmaṇā
vaivasvataṃ mahātmānaṃ sam uvācamahāyaśāḥ
dehimetvacalāṃ bhaktiṃ pituḥ pādārhaṇepunaḥ
prasuptavanmahāprājṣodharmaśarmāṇamabravīt
kvasādevīgatābhrātaḥ kvasatātobhavediti
samāsenasamākhyātaṃ yathāpitrāniyojitaḥ
samājṣāyatatohṛṣṭodharmaśarmātamabravīt
mamādyaivamahābhāgaśirasājīvitenaca
saṃ mukhībhavavaibhrātaḥ konyometvādṛśobhuvi
bhrātaraṃ caivamābhāṣyautsukaḥ pitaraṃ prati
gamanāyamatiṃ cakrebhrātrācadharmaśarmaṇā
dvāvetautugatautatrapitaraṃ hṛṣṭamānasau
dvābhyāṃ tatrasamāsthāyaśivaśarmāṇamuttamam
dharmaśarmātadovācapitaraṃ dīptisaṃ yutam
vedaśarmāsamānītastaṃ putraṃ pragṛhāṇabhoḥ
śivaśarmātatohṛṣṭobhaktiṃ vijṣāyatasya ca
nakiṃ cidabravīttaṃ tupunaściṃ tāmupeyivān
viṣṇuśarmāṇamābhāṣīdvatsam eva canaṅkuru
indralokaṃ vrajasvādyatasmādānayacāmṛtam
anayākāntayāsārddhaṃ sthātumicchāmisāṃ pratam
sāgarādyatsamutpannamamṛtaṃ vyādhināśanam
sādhunecchatimāmeṣāyathaināṃ tulabhāmyaham
tathākuruṣvaśīghraṃ tvamanyathānyaṃ prayāsyati
vṛddhaṃ jṣātvāvamanyetaiyaṃ bālāsurūpiṇī
evamākarṇyatadvākyaṃ pitustasya mahātmanaḥ
viṣṇuśarmātadovācapitaraṃ dīptatejasam
evamābhāṣyadharmātmāviṣṇuśarmāmahāmatiḥ
pitaraṃ taṃ namaskṛtyapunaḥ kṛtvāpradakṣiṇam
aṃ tarikṣagataścāsīdgacchamānasya dhīmataḥ
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe bhūmikhaṇḍeśivaśarmacaritedvitīyo'dhyāyaḥ
tṛtīyo'dhyāyaḥ
sūta uvāca
prasthitastenamārgeṇapraviṣṭogaganāṃ tare
sadṛṣṭodevadevenasahasrākṣeṇadhīmatā
udyamaṃ tasya vaijṣātvācakrevighnaṃ surādhirāṭ
menikāṃ tām uvācedaṅgacchatvaṃ mamaśāsanāt
samācarasvāsyaśīghraṅgatvāvighnaṃ sumadhyame
tathākuruṣvabhadraṃ teyathānāyātimegṛham
evamākarṇyatadvākyaṃ menikāprasthitātvarāt
sūta uvāca
rūpaudāryaguṇopetāsarvālaṅkārabhūṣitā
naṃ danasya vanasyāṃ tedolāyāṃ samupasthitā
susvareṇapragāyaṃ tīgītaṃ vīṇāsvaropamam
tenadṛṣṭāviśālākṣīcaturācārulocanā
indreṇapreṣitācaiṣānacabhadrakarābhavet
evaṃ jṣātvājagāmāthasatvareṇadvijottamaḥ
tayādṛṣṭastathāpṛṣṭaḥ kvayāsyasimahāmate
viṣṇuśarmātadovācamenikāṅkāmacāriṇīm
menikāviṣṇuśarmāṇaṃ praty uvācapriyaṃ punaḥ
kāmabāṇaiḥ prabhinnāhaṃ tvāmadyaśaraṇaṅgatā
yāvaddhitvaṃ mayādṛṣṭaḥ kāmākulitacetasā
kāmānalenasaṃ dagdhātāvadeva na saṃśayaḥ
sambhrāṃ tākāmasaṃ taptāprasādasumukhobhava
viṣṇuśarmovāca
bhavatyāścaprajānāmināhaṃ caitādṛśaḥ śubhe
viśvāmitrādayodeviputrohaṃ śivaśarmaṇaḥ
kāmādayomahādoṣāādāvevavinirjitāḥ
anyaṃ bhajaviśālākṣiindralokaṃ vrajāmyaham
niṣphalāmenakājātāpṛṣṭādevenavajriṇā
vibhīṣāṃ darśayāmāsanānārūpāṃ punaḥ punaḥ
yathānalenasaṃ dagdhāstṛṇānāṃ saṃ cayādvijāḥ
bhasmībhūtābhavaṃ tyevatathātāstāvibhīṣikāḥ
pralayaṅgatāstughorāstādāruṇābhīṣikādvijāḥ
savighnāndarśayāmāsasahasrākṣaḥ punaḥ punaḥ
tejasānāśayadvipraḥ svakīyenamahāyaśāḥ
evaṃ vighnānbahūṃ stasya indrasyāpimahātmanaḥ
nāśayāmāsamedhāvītapasastejasāpivā
naṣṭeṣuteṣuvighneṣudāruṇeṣumahatsuca
jṣātvātasya kṛtānvighnāndāruṇānbhīṣaṇākṛtīn
athakruddhomahātejāviṣṇuśarmādvijottamaḥ
indraṃ pratimahābhāgorāgaraktāṃ talocanaḥ
indralokādahaṃ cendraṃ pātayiṣyāminānyathā
evamanyaṅkariṣyāmidevānāṃ pālakaṃ punaḥ
tāvadevasamāyātodevendraḥ pākaśāsanaḥ
damenasatyaśaucābhyāṃ tvatsamonāsticāparaḥ
mamāparādhaṃ tvaṃ sarvaṅkṣaṃ tum arhasisattama
viṣṇuśarmātadovācadevarājaṃ tathāgatam
tejobhaṅgonakarttavyobrāhmaṇānāṃ mahātmanām
nāśayaṃ tenasaṃ dehoyadiruṣṭādvijottamāḥ
ātmatapaḥ prabhāveṇaanyasmaitvaṃ mahātmane
dātukāmastusaṃ jātoroṣapūrṇenacakṣuṣā
amṛtaṃ dehidevendrapitṛbhaktiṃ tathācalām
evaṃ vidhaṃ varaṃ dehiyadituṣṭosiśatruhan
evaṃ dadāmipuṇyaṃ tevaraṃ cāmṛtasaṃ yutam
evamābhāṣyataṃ vipramamṛtaṃ dattavānsvayam
sakumbhaṃ dattavāṃ stasmaiprīyamāṇenacātmanā
evamābhāṣyataṃ vipraṃ visṛjyacasahasradṛk
prasannobhūccataddṛṣṭvāvipratejaḥ suduḥsaham
viṣṇuśarmātatogatvāpitaraṃ vākyamabravīt
tātaindrātsamānītamamṛtaṃ vyādhināśanam
etadvākyaṃ mahacchrutvāśivaśarmāsutasya hi
sutānsarvānsamāhūyaprīyamāṇenacetasā
pitṛbhaktāḥ sutāyūyaṃ madvākyaparipālakāḥ
varaṃ vṛṇudhvaṃ suprītāḥ putrakādurlabhaṃ bhuvi
evamābhāṣitaṃ tasya śuśruvuḥ sarvasaṃ matāḥ
asmākaṃ jīvatāmmātāgatāyāyamamaṃ diram
nīrujābhavanāddevīprasādāttavasuvratā
bhavānpitāiyaṃ mātājanmajanmāṃ tarepitaḥ
śivaśarmovāca
adyaivāpimṛtāmātābhavatāṃ putravatsalā
jīvamānāsuhṛṣṭāsāeṣyatenātrasaṃśayaḥ
evamukteśubhevākyeṛṣiṇāśivaśarmaṇā
teṣāṃ mātāsamāyātāprahṛṣṭāvākyamabravīt
striyolokemahābhāgāḥ supuṇyāḥ puṇyavatsalāḥ
puṇyānputrānprasūyetasānārīpuṇyabhāginī
kulācāraṅkulādhāraṃ pitṛmātṛpratārakam
vināpuṇyaiḥ kathaṃ nārīsaṃ prāpnotisutottamam
najānekīdṛśaiḥ puṇyaireṣabhartāsupuṇyabhāk
yasya vīryānmayāprāptāyūyaṃ putrāstatodhikāḥ
evaṃ puṇyaprabhāvoyaṃ bhavaṃ taḥ puṇyavatsalāḥ
mamaputrāstusaṃ jātāḥ pitṛbhaktiparāyaṇāḥ
ekaikaśodhikāḥ paṣcamayāprāptāmahāśayāḥ
yajvānaḥ puṇyaśīlāścatapastejaḥ parākramāḥ
evaṃ saṃ vardhitāstetutayāmātrāpunaḥ punaḥ
harṣeṇamahatāviṣṭāḥ praṇemurmātaraṃ sutāḥ
putrā ūcuḥ
supuṇyaiḥ prāpyatemātāsanmātāsupitākila
bhavatīpuṇyakṛnmātānobhāgyaistupravartitā
yasyāgarbhodaraṃ prāpyasupuṇyaiś ca pravarddhitāḥ
śṛṇudhvaṃ māmakāḥ putrāḥ suvaraṃ puṇyadāyakam
mayituṣṭesutābhogānanubhuṃ jaṃ tucākṣayān
putrā ūcuḥ
asmānpreṣayagolokaṃ vaiṣṇavaṃ dāhavarjitam
gacchadhvaṃ vaiṣṇavaṃ lokaṃ yūyaṃ vigatakalmaṣāḥ
matprasādāt tapobhiś ca pitṛbhaktyānayā svayā
eva mukte tu tenāpi suvākye ṛṣiṇā tataḥ
śaṅkhacakragadāpāṇirgaruḍārūḍhaāgataḥ
saputraṃ śivaśarmāṇamity uvācapunaḥ punaḥ
putraiḥ sārddhaṃ samāgacchacaturbhiḥ puṇyakāribhiḥ
anayābhāryayāsārddhaṃ puṇyayāpatikāmyayā
śivaśarmovāca
amīgacchaṃ tuputrām eva iṣṇavaṃ lokamuttamam
kaṃ citkālaṃ tuneṣyāmibhūmauvaibhāryayāsaha
anenāpisuputreṇaaṃ tyenasomaśarmaṇā
evamukteśubhevākyeṛṣiṇāsatyabhāṣiṇā
tān uvācāthadeveśaḥ suputrāṣchivaśarmaṇaḥ
viṣṇurūpadharāḥ sarvebabhūvustatkṣaṇādapi
indranīlasamāvarṇaiḥ śaṅkhacakragadādharāḥ
sarvābharaṇasaubhāgyāviṣṇurūpāmahaujasaḥ
hārakaṅkaṇaśobhāḍhyāratnamālābhiśobhitāḥ
sūryatejaḥ pratīkāśāstejojvālābhirāvṛtāḥ
praviṣṭāvaiṣṇavaṅkāyaṃ paśyataḥ śivaśarmaṇaḥ
dīpaṃ dīpāyathāyānti tadvallīnāmahāmate
gatāstevaiṣṇavaṃ dhāmapitṛbhaktyādvijottamāḥ
prabhāvaṃ tupravakṣyāmi susatyaṃ somaśarmaṇaḥ
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe bhūmikhaṇḍeśivaśarmopākhyānetṛtīyo'dhyāyaḥ
sūta uvāca
gateṣuteṣugolokaṃ vaiṣṇavaṃ tamasaḥ param
śivaśarmāmahāprājṣaḥ kaniṣṭhaṃ vākyamabravīt
brāhmaṇa uvāca
amṛtasya mahākumbhaṃ rakṣadattaṃ mayādhunā
tīrthayātrāṃ prayāsyāmianayābhāryayāsaha
evamastumahābhāgakariṣyerakṣaṇaṃ śubham
daśavarṣapramāṇaṃ tutapastepeniraṃ taram
kumbhaṃ rakṣatidharmātmādivārātramataṃ dritaḥ
punaḥ sahisamāyātaḥ śivaśarmāmahāyaśāḥ
māyāṅkṛtvāmahāprājṣobhāryayāsahataṃ sutam
kuṣṭharogāturobhūtvātasya bhāryācatādṛśī
māṃ sapiṇḍopamaujātaudvāvetaumāyayākṛtau
samāgatauhitaudṛṣṭvāsarvatohisuduḥkhitau
kṛpayāparayāviṣṭaḥ somaśarmāmahāyaśāḥ
tayoḥ pādaṃ namaskṛtyabhaktyānamitakaṃ dharaḥ
bhavādṛśaunapaśyāmitapasābhisamanvitam
guṇavrātaiḥ supuṇyaiś ca kimidaṃ vartitaṃ tvayi
dāsavaddevatāḥ sarvāvartaṃ tesarvadātava
ādeśaṃ prāpyaviprendraākṛṣṭāstejasātava
tavāṅgekenapāpenagadoyaṃ vedanānvitaḥ
saṃ jātobrāhmaṇaśreṣṭhatanm ekathayakāraṇam
iyaṃ puṇyavatīmātāmahāpuṇyāpativratā
sākathaṃ duḥkhamāpnotikiṃ nāstitapasaḥ phalam
yācaśuśrūṣatekāṃ taṃ devavadguruvatsalā
sākathaṃ duḥkhamāpnotikuṣṭharogaṃ suduḥkhadam
śivaśarmovāca
śuśrūṣaṇaṃ mahābhāgayadipuṇyamihecchasi
evamukteśubhevākyesomaśarmāmahāyaśāḥ
śuśrūṣāṃ vākariṣyāmiyuvayoḥ puṇyayuktayoḥ
mayāpāpenaduṣṭenakṛpaṇenadvijottama
evamābhāṣyaduḥkhādvātayorduḥkhenaduḥkhitaḥ
śleṣmamūtrapurīṣaṃ caubhayoḥ paryaśodhayat
pādaprakṣālanaṃ cakreaṅgasaṃ vāhanaṃ tathā
dvāvetauhigurūvipraḥ saumaśarmāmahāyaśāḥ
tīrthaṃ nayatidharmātmāskaṃ dhamāropyasattamaḥ
tarpaṇaṃ capitṝṇāṃ tudevatānāṃ tupūjanam
dvābhyāmapisadharmātmāsakārayatinityaśaḥ
saṃ jṣāpayatisuprītaudvāvetaucamahāgurū
śayyāsanecatauvipraḥ prasvāpayatinityaśaḥ
vastrapuṣpādikaṃ sarvaṃ tābhyāṃ nityaṃ prayacchati
somaśarmāmahābhāgastābhyāmapicapūrayet
mūlaṃ payaḥ subhakṣyādyaṃ nityam eva dadāty asau
tayostuvāṃ chitaṃ nityaṃ somaśarmāmahāyaśāḥ
somaśarmāṇamāhūyapitākutsatiniṣṭhuraḥ
nakṛtaṃ śobhanaṃ mahyaṃ tvayaivakulapāṃ sana
evaṃ nānāvidhairvākyairniṣṭhurairduḥkhadāyakaiḥ
atāḍayaddaṇḍaghātaiḥ śivaśarmāsadāturaḥ
saṃ tuṣṭaḥ sarvadāsopipitaraṃ paripūjayet
yajjṣātvāśivaśarmācacaritaṃ svīyamīkṣate
amṛtaṃ matkṛtecāpiānītaṃ viṣṇuśarmaṇā
puṇyayuktaḥ sadharmātmāpitṛbhaktiparaḥ sadā
śivaśarmāpitasyaivabhaktiṃ dṛṣṭvāviciṃ tyavai
mayāvaipūrvamityuktaṃ suputraṃ yajṣasaṃ jṣakam
mātṛkhaṇḍānimānputrayatratatrakṣipasvahi
madvākyaṃ pālitaṃ tenakṛtānamātarikṛpā
sāhasaṃ tukṛtaṃ tenaputreṇavedaśarmaṇā
nimeṣamātramevāpisāhasaṅkārayetpunaḥ
aparaṃ satyasaṃ pannaṃ prabhāvaṃ tapasaḥ punaḥ
nityaṃ samārādhanepiadhikaṃ cāsyadṛśyate
tasmādasya parīkṣācasamayetapasaḥ kṛtā
bhaktibhāvāttathāsatyānnaivaputraḥ praṇaśyati
māyayācanijāṅge'pikuṣṭharogonidarśitaḥ
śleṣmamūtramalānāṃ caghṛṇāṃ naivakarotica

pādasaṃ vāhanaṃ dadyācchaucaṃ caivamahāmatiḥ
duḥsahaṃ vacanaṃ mahyaṃ dāruṇaṃ sahatesadā
bhartsanetāḍanecaivasadābhīṣṭapravācakaḥ
evaṃ duḥkhasamācāromamaputromahāmatiḥ

apaneṣyāmyahaṃ duḥkhaṃ viṣṇoś caiva prasādataḥ
vicāryamanasāvipraḥ śivaśarmāmahāmatiḥ
punar māyāṃ cakārātha kumbhād apahṛtaṃ payaḥ
paścāttaṃ casamāhūyasomaśarmāṇamabravīt
tavahastemayādattamamṛtaṃ vyādhināśanam
yenanīrugbhavāmyadyaprasādādviṣṇuśarmaṇaḥ

samutthāyatvarāyuktaḥ somaśarmākamaṇḍalum
taṃ cariktaṃ tatodṛṣṭvāhyamṛtenavinākṛtam
iticiṃ tāparobhūtvāsomaśarmāsuduḥkhitaḥ
pituragrecavṛttāṃ taṅkathayiṣyāmyahaṃ yadā
tataḥ kopaṃ prayāsyetagururmevyādhipīḍitaḥ
suciraṃ cintayitvātusomaśarmāmahāmatiḥ
yadi me satyamastītiguruśuśrūṣaṇaṃ yadi

tadāghaṭo'mṛtayutobhavatveṣa na saṃśayaḥ
tāvaccāmṛtapūrṇastupunarevābhavadghaṭaḥ
taṃ dṛṣṭvāharṣasaṃ yuktaḥ somaśarmāmahāyaśāḥ
gṛhāṇatvaṃ pitaścemaṃ payaḥ kumbhaṃ samāgatam
pānaṅkurumahābhāgagadānmuktobhavāciram
etadvākyaṃ mahāpuṇyaṃ satyadharmārthakaṃ punaḥ
śivaśarmāsutasyāpiśrutvācamadhurākṣaram
