jñānamābhāṣyasahyātmādhyānenasahasaṅgataḥ
kaśyapa uvāca
tataḥ paṣcaivatetatrādrākṣurātmānam eva tam
buddhimūcuḥ samāhūyasaṅgacchātmānam eva hi
dūtatvaṅkurukalyāṇiasmākamātmanāsaha
paṣcatattvāmahātmānoviśvasya dhārakāḥ śubhāḥ
evamābhāṣitaṃ teṣāṅgatvā''hātmānam eva tam
ahaṃ buddhirmahābhāgabhavaṃ taṃ samupāgatā
dūtatvemahatāṃ pārśvātteṣāṃ tvaṃ vacanaṃ śṛṇu
bhavanmaitrīṃ samicchanti akṣayāṃ paṣcaātmakāḥ
kurumaitrīṃ mahāprājṣajahidhyānaṃ sudūrataḥ
dhyānam uvāca
nakartavyaṃ tvayācātmannaiteṣāṃ vaisamāgamam
eṣāṃ saṃ sargamātreṇamahudduḥkhaṃ bhaviṣyati
mayājṣānenahīnastvaṅkathaṅkarmakariṣyati
garbhavāsaṃ nayiṣyanti bhavaṃ taṃ nānyathāvibho
jṣānenaivamayāhīnoajñānaṃ yāsyasidhruvam
evamuktvātamātmānaṃ virarāmamahāmatim
tatastāmāgatāṃ buddhimātmāprovācaniścitaḥ
jñānadhyānaumahātmānaumaṃ triṇaumamaśobhanau
evaṃ śrutvātatobuddhisteṣāṃ pārśveyaśasvinī
samācaṣṭasamagraṃ tatkathanaṃ jñānadhyānayoḥ
tatastepaṣcakāḥ sarveātmānaṃ pratijagmire
yasmācchuddhosilokeśatasmāttvāṃ samupāgatāḥ
ātmovāca
yūyaṃ paṣcaivasaṃ prāptāmamamaitraṃ samicchatha
svīyaṅguṇaṃ prabhāvaṃ cakathayaṃ tumamāgrataḥ
bhūmir uvāca
nāsikāgamanogandhassamebhṛtyomahāmanāḥ
ākāśa uvāca
ahamākāśakaḥ prāptomamakāyeprabhāvakam
śrūyatāmabhidhāsyāmiparabrahmasvarūpiṇam
bāhyāṃ tarāvakāśaścaśūnyasthānevasāmyaham
tatrāmātyautukarṇaumeśravaṇārthaṃ pratiṣṭhitau
vāyur uvāca
paṣcarūpeṇatiṣṭhāmikaromyevaṃ śubhāśubham
carmakāyesthitomātyaḥ sparśaṃ saṃ śrayateguṇam
kāyesaṃ sthaḥ sadānityaṃ pākayogaṅkaromyaham
sabāhyābhyaṃ taraṃ sarvaṃ dravyādravyaṃ pradarśaye
śukraṃ majjātathālālāevaṃ tvaksaṃ dhisaṃ sthitam
evaṃ mayātmavyāpārastavāgrekathitaḥ paraḥ
jalam uvācaḥ
amātyaṃ rasanāṃ viddhirasāsvādakarīṃ parām
nāsikovāca
sugaṃ dhenaparāṃ puṣṭiṅkāyasyāpikaromyaham
buddhiyuktāmahābhāgatasyābhāvenabhāvitā
svāmikāryāyakāyesminnahanti ṣṭhāminiścalā
śravaṇāvūcatuḥ
kāryākāryādikaṃ śabdaṃ lokairuktaṃ śubhāśubham
śṛṇuyāvaḥ svakāyasthausatyāsatyepriyāpriye
paṣcarūpātmakovāyuḥ śarīresminvyavasthitaḥ
sabāhyābhyaṃ tareceṣṭāṃ teṣāṃ jānāmitattvataḥ
śītoṣṇamātapaṃ varṣaṃ vāyoḥ sphuraṇam eva ca
sarvaṃ jānāmisaṃ sparśaṃ saṅgaśleṣādikaṃ nṛṇām
evaṃ hitesamākhyātomayāvyāpāra eva hi
netreūcatuḥ
saṃ sāreyānirūpāṇibhavyābhavyānisattama
yadāprerayatebuddhistadāpaśyāvanānyathā
vasāvaḥ kāyamadhyevairūpaṅguṇamihāvayoḥ
evaṃ vyāpāra sambandhaḥ kāyamadhyemahāmate
kṣāramamlādikaṃ sarvaṃ nīrasaṃ svāducintaye
vyāpāreṇaanenāpinityayuktāvasāmyaham
indriyāṇāṃ hisarveṣāṃ buddhireṣāpraṇāyakaḥ
evaṃ paṣcasamāyātānīṃ driyāṇipriyeśṛṇu
svīyāniyānikarmāṇikathayanti punaḥ punaḥ
athabuddhiḥ samāyātātam uvācamahāmatim
madvihīnoyadākāyastadānaśyatinānyathā
tasmāttvaṃ māṃ samāsthāyavarttayasvamahāmate
ahaṅkarmamahāprājṣatavapārśvaṃ samāgatam
tvāṃ preṣayāmyahaṃ tenapathāyenehagacchasi
evamākarṇyatatsarvamātmāprovācatānprati
yūyaṃ paṃ cātmakairyuktāḥ sarvasādhāraṇāḥ kila
paṃ cātmakā ūcuḥ
tiṣṭhāmohivayaṃ sarveprasādāttavatatrahi
etasmātkāraṇānmaitramicchāmastavanityaśaḥ
ātmovāca
kariṣyenātrasaṃ dehomaitraṃ hiprītikāraṇāt
vāryamāṇomahābhāgojṣānenāpimahātmanā
dhyānenacamahātmāsauteṣāṃ saṅgatimāgataḥ
paṣcatattvasamāyuktaḥ kāyitvaṅgatavānprabhuḥ
yadāgarbhaṃ samāyātoviṣṭhāmūtrasamākule
aṅgenavyākulībhūtaḥ paṃ cātmakān uvācasaḥ
bhobhoḥ paṃ cātmakāḥ sarveśṛṇudhvaṃ vacanaṃ mama
bhavatāṃ saṃ prasaṅgenamahāduḥkhenamohitaḥ
paṃ cātmakā ūcuḥ
tāvatsaṃ sthīyatāṃ rājanyāvadgarbhaḥ prapūrayet
paścānnirgamanaṃ tevaibhaviṣyati na saṃśayaḥ
asmākaṃ hibhavānsvāmīkāyadeśevyavasthitaḥ
teṣāṃ tadvacanaṃ śrutvāātmāduḥkhenapīḍitaḥ
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe bhūmikhaṇḍedevāsureśarīrakathanaṃ nāmasaptamo'dhyāyaḥ
aṣṭamo'dhyāyaḥ
kaśyapa uvāca
duḥkhākrāṃ tohidharmātmāsarvapīḍābhipīḍitaḥ
ādhivyādhisamākrāṃ tohāhābhūtovicetanaḥ
duḥkhenamahatāviṣṭojñānamāhaprapīḍitaḥ
ātmovāca
tavavākyaṃ mahāprājṣanakṛtaṃ tumayātadā
dhyānenavāryamāṇopipatitomohasaṅkaṭe
tasmādrakṣamahāprājṣagarbhavāsātsudāruṇāt
jñānam uvāca
mayātvaṃ vāritohyātmankṛtaṃ vākyaṃ nacaivame
paṃ cātmakairmahākrūraiḥ pātitogarbhasaṅkaṭe
idānīṅgacchatvaṃ dhyānaṃ tasmātsaṃ prāpsyasesukham
garbhavāsādbhaviṣyastemokṣaeva na saṃśayaḥ
tasya tadvacanaṃ śrutvājṣātvājñānasya tattvatām
dhyānamāhūyaprovācaśrūyatāṃ vacanaṃ mama
tvāmahaṃ śaraṇaṃ prāptodhyānamāṃ rakṣanityaśaḥ
evamastumahāprājṣadhyānamāhamahāmatim
etadvākyaṃ tataḥ śrutvāātmāvaidhyānamāgataḥ
yadādhyānaṅgatohyātmāvismṛtaṅgarbhajaṃ bhayam
sadvābhyāṃ sahitastatraātmāmohavinākṛtaḥ
itoniṣkrāṃ tamātrastutyajepaṃ cātmakaṃ vapuḥ
sūtikāletusaṃ prāpteprājāpatyevarānane
vāyunācalitogarbhaḥ prāṇenāpibalīyasā
yonirvikāsamāyāticaturviṃ śāṅgulaṃ tadā
paṣcaviṃ śāṅgulogarbhastenapīḍāvijāyate
evaṃ saṃ pīḍyamānastumūrcchayāmūrcchitaḥ priye
patitobhūmibhāgetujñānadhyānasamanvitaḥ
prājāpatyenadivyenavāyunāsapṛthakkṛtaḥ
bhūmisaṃ sparśamātreṇajñānadhyānetuvismṛte
saṃ sārabandhasaṃ digdhaātmāpriyatayāsthitaḥ
guṇadoṣasamākrāṃ tomahāmohasamanvitaḥ
evaṃ saṃ puṣyamāṇastuātmāpaṃ cātmakaiḥ saha
vyāpitohīṃ driyaiḥ sarvairviṣayaiḥ pāpakāribhiḥ
dhavānāṃ samohenabhāryādīnāṃ tathaiva ca
calituṃ naivaśaktostitathātmāsītprabaṃ dhitaḥ
jñānavijñānavibhraṣṭorāgadveṣādibhirhataḥ
prakṛtyākarmaṇābaddhomahāmūḍhovyajāyata
sūta uvāca
evaṃ mūḍhoyadātmāsaukāmakrodhavaśaṅgataḥ
lobharāgādibhiḥ sarvairvyāpṛtastairdurātmabhiḥ
iyaṃ bhāryāhyayaṃ putraidaṃ mitramidaṅgṛham
evaṃ saṃ sārajālenamahāmohenabaṃ dhitaḥ
jarayāvyādhibhiścaivasaṅgrastaścādhibhistathā
evamātmāsaṃ prataptoduḥkhamohaiḥ sudāruṇaiḥ
abhimānairmānabhaṅgairnānāduḥkhaiś ca khaṇḍitaḥ
vṛddhatvenatathādeviśabalatvenapīḍitaḥ
duḥkhaṃ cintayatenityaṃ hāhābhūtovicetanaḥ
vaikalyenatathāṅgānāṃ vyāptodevidinedine
saṃ sārebhramamāṇenavairāgyaṃ tatradarśitam
niḥ śaṅkaṃ baṃ dhuhīnaṃ capraśāṃ taṃ tuṣṭam eva ca
etāsāṃ higatomadhyenabibheṣianāvṛtaḥ
vītarāga uvāca
indriyārthavaśevartīmaryādāparivarjitaḥ
ātmovāca
puruṣasya kāhimaryādātāmācakṣvacasuvrata
vistareṇamahāprājṣayadijānāsiniścitam
vītarāgomahāprājṣastam uvācamahāmatiḥ
kleśitaṃ sarvabhāvaiś ca teṣuteṣuparityajet
athalajjāṃ pravakṣyāmi manoyānirviśatyalam
paścāttāpesusaṃ līnaḥ sālajjāparikathyate
ekaścapuruṣodivyaḥ kasya kiṃ cinnanāśayet
athalokānpravakṣyāmi yetvayāparikīrtitāḥ
yathākulālakaścakremṛpaḍaṃ canidhāpayet
bhrāmayitvātusūtreṇanānābhedānprakāśayet
bhāṇḍānāṃ tusahasrāṇisvecchayāmatisaṃ sthitaḥ
tathāyaṃ sṛjatedhātānānārūpāṇinānyathā
paścādvināśamāyānti yenakenāpihetunā
sarvadaivasthitāyecayelokāścasanātanāḥ
teṣāṃ lajjāprakartavyānāvartaṃ tehitebhuvi
ākāśavāyutejāṃ sipṛthvīcāpaścapaṣcamaḥ
amīlokāḥ prakāśaṃ teyecasarvatrasaṃ sthitāḥ
sattvānāmaṅgadeśeṣupaṣcaiteṣususaṃ sthitāḥ
strīṇāṃ rūpaṃ pravakṣyāmi śrūyatāṃ tātasāṃ pratam
sthāvareṣucasarveṣujaṅgameṣutathābhavān
kucābhyāṃ canitaṃ bābhyāṃ vayasācavirājate
hṛnmāṃ sasyādhikāvṛddhirdṛṣṭācātra na saṃśayaḥ
patanāyacalokānāṃ moharūpaṃ vidarśitam
nabhavatyevasānārīyātvayāparikīrtitā
līlayākurutedhātāvinodāyasadātmanaḥ
yathānāryāstathāpuṃ sojīvaḥ sarvatrasaṃ sthitaḥ
bhavānprakṛtisaṃ yuktaḥ puruṣeṣupradṛśyate
kaḥ kasya kurutelajjām eva ṃ jṣātvāsukhaṃ vraja
vṛddhāṃ striyaṃ pravakṣyāmi sadāvṛddhāṃ varānane
tvacājarjaratāṃ yātāyasyāpyaṅgevarānane
śvetaiś ca ivatathākeśaiḥ palitaiś ca samākulā
balahīnāthadīnāpivyāpitāvalinātadā
neyaṃ vṛddhābhavennārīparaṃ vṛddhācakathyate
etasyālakṣaṇaṃ proktaṃ yuvatīṃ pravadāmyaham
jṣānenavarddhatenityaṃ jīvapārśvesamāśritā
sumatirnāmasaṃ proktāsāvṛddhāyuvatītica
nārīpuruṣalokeṣusarvadaivapratiṣṭhitā
mātaraṃ vaipravakṣyāmi yātvayāparikīrtitā
prāṇināmaṅgadeśeṣusadaivacetanāsthitā
parajñānapradāyācasāprajṣāparikathyate
prajṣāmātāsamākhyātāprāṇināṃ pālanāyasā
saṃ sthitāsarvalokeṣupoṣaṇāyahitāyavā
sumatirnāmayāproktāsāmātāparikathyate
saṃ sāradvāramārgāṇiyānirūpāṇinityaśaḥ
bhavanti mātarohyetābahuduḥkhapradarśikāḥ
mātṛrūpaṃ samākhyātamanyatiṅkatevadāmyaham
ātmovāca
bhavānkohisamāyātomamasaṃ tāpanāśakaḥ
vistareṇasamākhyāhisvarūpamātmanaḥ svayam
vītarāga uvāca
yasmātkāmānivartaṃ tenirāśāḥ sarvaevate
yaṃ duṣṭatvānnapaśyanti karmāṇyetāninānyathā
yatsamīpaṃ hināyātiāśācaivakadācana
vītarāgosmibhadraṃ tevivekomamabāṃ dhavaḥ
ātmovāca
kīdṛśo'sautavabhrātāvivekonāmanāmataḥ
tasya tvaṃ lakṣaṇaṃ brūhibhrāturātmana eva ca
vītarāga uvāca
tasyaivalakṣaṇaṃ rūpaṃ navadāmitavāgrataḥ
bhrātustasya mahābhāgaāhvānaṃ cakaromyaham
bhobhovivekamebhrātarāvayostvaṃ vacaḥ śṛṇu
kaśyapa uvāca
śānti kṣamābhyāṃ saṃ yuktobhāryābhyāṃ casamāgataḥ
sarvadṛksarvagovyāpīsarvatattvaparāyaṇaḥ
saṃ dehānāṃ casarveṣāṃ yoripurjñānavatsalaḥ
dhāraṇādhīścadveputryautasyaivahimahātmanaḥ
tasya yogaḥ sutojyeṣṭhomokṣoyasya mahāguruḥ
nirmalonirahaṅkāronirāśoniṣparigrahaḥ
sarvavelāprasannātmāgatadvaṃ dvomahāmatiḥ
savivekaḥ samāyātoguṇaratnairvibhūṣitaḥ
kṣamāśānti samāyuktaḥ savivekaḥ samāgataḥ
vītarāgam uvācedamāhūtohaṃ samāgataḥ
tadbhrātaḥ kāraṇaṃ sarvaṅkathyatāṃ himamāgrataḥ
yamāśrityatvayādyaivakṛtamāhvānam eva me
vītarāga uvāca
pumānsthitoyaḥ puratomahāpāśairniyaṃ tritaḥ
mohasya bāṇaiḥ sambhrāṃ taḥ saṃ sārasya cabandhanaiḥ
sarvasya vyāpakaḥ svāmīayamātmāmamaivaca
paṣcatattvaiḥ samāviṣṭojñānadhyānavivarjitaḥ
pṛcchatāmenamātmānaṃ bhavāṃ stattveṣupaṇḍitaḥ
vītarāgavacaḥ śrutvāvivekovākyamabravīt
āgatetvayisaṃ sārekiṅkiṃ bhuktaṃ sukhaṃ svayam
ātmovāca
garbhavāsomahadduḥkhamasahyaṃ dāruṇaṃ mayā
bhuktam evamahāprājṣajñānahīnenavaisadā
dehepijñānavibhraṣṭaḥ sohaṃ jātohyanekadhā
bālyāvasthāṅgatenāthakṛtyākṛtyaṅkṛtaṃ mayā
tāruṇyenakṛtākrīḍābhuktābhāryāhyanekaśaḥ
vārdhakaṃ prāpyasaṃ taptaḥ putraśokādibhistathā
divārātraumahāprājṣanaviṃ dāmisukhaṅkvacit
evaṃ duḥkhaisusaṃ taptaḥ iṅkaṅkaromimahāmate
asmātsaṃ sārajālaughānmocayādyasubandhanāt
enaṅgacchamahātmānaṃ vītarāgaṃ sukhapradam
niḥ saṃśayaṃ tvayādṛṣṭaṃ nagnamācāravarjitam
sukhapradarśakohyeṣasarvasaṃ tāpanāśakaḥ
evamākarṇyaśuddhātmāvītarāgaṅgataḥ punaḥ
tam uvācaśvasandīnaḥ śrūyatāṃ vacanaṃ mama
sukhaṃ viṃ dāmiyenāhaṃ taṃ mārgaṃ mamadarśaya
punargacchavivekaṃ hisukhavārtākṛtātvayā
vītarāgeṇapuṇyenapreṣitogatavānprabhuḥ
tam uvācamahātmānaṃ vivekaṃ śuddhasattamam
sukhaṃ medarśayatvaṃ hivītarāgeṇapreṣitaḥ
bhavaccharaṇamāpannorakṣasaṃ sāradāruṇāt
jñānaṅgacchamahāprājṣasatesarvaṃ vadiṣyati
ātmātathoktaḥ saṃ prāptoyatrajñānaṃ pratiṣṭhitam
bhobhojñānamahātejaḥ sarvabhāvapradarśaka
śaraṇaṃ tvāmahaṃ prāptaḥ sukhamārgaṃ pradarśaya
jñānam uvāca
bhṛtyohaṃ tavalokeśatvaṃ māṃ vetsinasuvrata
mayādhyānenavaipūrvaṃ vāritastvaṃ punaḥ punaḥ
paṃ cātmakānāṃ saṅgenaāpadaṃ prāptavānbhavān
dhyānaṅgacchamahāprājṣasatedātāsukhasya ca
jṣānenapreṣitohyātmādhyānamāśrityasaṃ sthitaḥ
bhavaccharaṇamāyātaṃ mām eva ṃ parirakṣaya
evaṃ sambhāṣitaṃ tasya dhyānamākarṇyatadvacaḥ
sam uvācapunaścāpitamātmānaṃ prahṛṣṭavān
ātmavāṃ stvaṃ sthirobhūtvānirātaṅkovikalpitaḥ
tathādoṣānprajvalitvānirvāṇaṃ hiprayāsyati
ekāṃ tasthonirāhāromitāśībhavasarvadā
nirdvaṃ dvaḥ śabdasaṃ hīnoniścalohyāsanesthitaḥ
prāpsyaseparamaṃ sthānaṃ tadviṣṇoḥ paramaṃ padam
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe bhūmikhaṇḍe'dhyātmavarṇane'ṣṭamo'dhyāyaḥ
navamo'dhyāyaḥ
kaśya uvāca
evaṃ sambodhitastatraātmādhyānādikaistadā
tyaktukāmaḥ satatkāryaṃ paṃ cātmakaṃ sabuddhimān
nimittānyevapaśyaivaprāpyatāṃ stānprayātisaḥ
vihāyakāyaṃ nirlakṣyaṃ patitaṃ naivapaśyati
evaṃ jṣātvāśamaṅgacchaklaibyaṃ mābhajasupriye
ayamātmasvarūpeṇadaityadeveṣusaṃ sthitaḥ
ayaṃ brahmāayaṃ rudrohyayaṃ viṣṇuḥ sanātanaḥ
ayaṃ sṛjativiśvāniayaṃ pālayateprajāḥ
saṃ haratyeṣadharmātmādharmarūpījanārdanaḥ
anenotpāditādevādānavāścaivasupriya
devāścādharmanirmuktādharmahīnāḥ sutāstava
dharmoyaṃ mādhavasyāṅgaṃ sarvadaivaiś ca pālitam
tasya viṣṇuḥ sadharmātmāsarvadaivaprasādavān
yeṣāṃ viṣṇuḥ prasannovaidharmastairihapālitaḥ
viṣṇoḥ kāyamidaṃ dharmaṃ satyaṃ hṛdayam eva ca
yastaupālayatenityaṃ tasya viṣṇuḥ prasīdati
tasya viṣṇuḥ prakupyetanāśayedativīryavān
vaiṣṇavaiḥ pālitaṃ dharmaṃ tapaḥ satyenasaṃ sthitaiḥ
teṣāṃ prasannodharmātmārakṣām eva ṅkarotica
adharmeṇāpipāpenavartitāḥ pāpacetasaḥ
sūditāvāsudevenasamarecakrapāṇinā
yosāvātmāmayoktaḥ pūrvam eva tavāgrataḥ
soyaṃ viṣṇurnasaṃ dehodharmātmāsarvapālakaḥ
daityakāyeṣuyaḥ svasthaḥ pāpam eva samāsthitaḥ
sabāhyābhyaṃ tarebhūtvātavaputrānipātitāḥ
naiṣāṃ mohastukartavyobhavatyāvacanaṃ śṛṇu
kaśyapaṣcamuniśreṣṭham eva mābhāṣyaduḥkhitā
sambodhitāsāmunināduḥkhaṃ saṃ tyajyasaṃ sthitā
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe bhūmikhaṇḍedevāsurediti sambodhanaṃ nāmanavamo'dhyāyaḥ
daśamo'dhyāyaḥ
ṛṣaya ūcuḥ
tatastedānavāḥ sarvehiraṇyakaśipūttarāḥ
vistareṇāpinobrūhiteṣāṃ vṛttamanuttamam
sūta uvāca
bhagnāraṇāttutesarvebalahīnāstuvaitadā
gatadarpāḥ suduḥkhārtādaityāstepitaraṅgatāḥ
bhaktyāpraṇamyatesarvesamūcuḥ kaśyapaṃ tadā
dānavā ūcuḥ
devatānāṃ mahābhāgadānavānāṃ tathaiva ca
vayaṃ cadānavāḥ sarvebalavīryaparākramāḥ
upāyajṣāḥ sudhīrāścaudyamenasamanvitāḥ
takavaikāraṇaṃ tātabalatejaḥ samanvitāḥ
jayaścadṛśyatetātadeveṣvevamahāhave
kaśyapa uvāca
śṛṇudhvaṃ putrakāḥ sarvejayasyāpicakāraṇam
vīryanirvāpakastātomātākṣetramidaṃ sadā
kiṅkuryādviṣamārthetupitāputrecavaitathā
atrapradhānaṅkarmaivamām eva ṃ buddhirāśritā
tapodhyānasamāyuktaṃ tāraṇāyahitaṃ sutāḥ
patanāyapātakaṃ proktaṃ sarvadaiva na saṃśayaḥ
balenaparivāreṇaābhijātyenaputrakāḥ
unnatāgiridurgeṣuvṛkṣāḥ santi suputrakāḥ
sādhāraṇaḥ prāṇināṃ cadharmaeṣasuputrakāḥ
adharmamāsthitaṃ putrāyuṣmābhiḥ satyavarjitaiḥ
satyadharmatapobhraṣṭāḥ patitā duḥkhasāgare
devāś ca satyasampannāḥ śreyasā ca samanvitāḥ
tapaḥ śānti damopetāḥ supuṇyāḥ pāpavarjitāḥ
yatra viṣṇur hṛṣīkeśo jayas tatra pradṛśyate
teṣāṃ sahāyaḥ sambhūto vāsudevaḥ sanātanaḥ
yasya viṣṇuḥ sahāyaś ca tapaś caiva balaṃ tathā
yūyaṃ dharmavihīnās tu tapaḥ satyavivarjitāḥ
tapo vinā mahāprājṣā dharmeṇa yaśasā vinā
prāpyāpyaindraṃ padaṃ putrāstatobhraṣṭābhavanti hi
tasmādyūyaṃ prakurvaṃ tutapaḥ putrāḥ samanvitāḥ
avirodhenasaṃ yuktājñānadhyānasamanvitāḥ
evaṃ vidhāyadāputrāyūyaṃ dhanyābhaviṣyatha
parāṃ siddhiṃ tadāsarveprayāsyatha na saṃśayaḥ
evaṃ sambhāṣitāstetukaśyapenamahātmanā
samākarṇyapiturvākyaṃ dānavāstemahaujasaḥ
praṇamyakaśyapaṃ bhaktyāsamutthāyatvarānvitāḥ
sumaṃ traṃ cakriredaityāḥ parasparasamāhitāḥ
hiraṇyakaśipūrājātān uvācāthadānavān
tapaścaivakariṣyāmoduṣkaraṃ sarvadāyakam
hiraṇyākṣastadovācakariṣyedāruṇaṃ tapaḥ
tatobalenatrailokyaṅgrahīṣyenātrasaṃśayaḥ
vyāpādyadevatāḥ sarvāḥ padamaindraṃ vrajāmyaham
evaṃ nayujyatekartuṃ yuṣmābhirditijeśvarāḥ
viṣṇunā sahayadvairaṃ tadvairaṃ nāśakāraṇam
tam ārādhya hṛṣīkeśaṃ sukhaṃ gacchanti mānavāḥ
hiraṇyakaśipur uvāca
aham eva ṃ nakariṣyeharerārādhanaṅkadā
maraṇādadhikaṃ taṃ tumānayanti hipaṇḍitāḥ
viṣṇoḥ sevānavaikāryāmayācānyaiś ca dānavaiḥ
tam uvācamahātmānaṃ baliḥ pitāmahaṃ punaḥ
dharmaśāstreṣuyaddṛṣṭaṃ munibhistattvavedibhiḥ
rājanītiyutaṃ maṃ traṃ śatroścaiva pradhānataḥ
hīnamātmānamājṣāyaripuṃ taṃ balinaṃ thā
dīpacchāyāṃ samāśrityatamovasatisarvadā
snehaṃ daśāgataṃ prekṣyadīpasyāpimahābalam
prakāśaṃ yātivegenatamaścavarddhatepunaḥ
snehaṅkṛtvāsuraiḥ sārddhaṃ dharmabhāvaiḥ suradviṣaḥ
pūrvamuktaṃ sumaṃ traṃ tumuninākaśyapenahi
tenamaṃ treṇarājendrakurukāryaṃ svamātmavān
tasya tadvacanaṃ śrutvāprāhadaityaḥ pratāpavān
pautranaivaṅkariṣyehaṃ mānabhaṅgaṃ tathātmanaḥ
anyecabāṃ dhavāḥ sarvetamūcurnayapaṇḍitam
balinoktaṃ cayatpuṇyaṃ devatānāṃ priyaṅkaram
śakramānakaraṃ proktaṃ dānavānāṃ bhayaṅkaram
tapasānirjityadevānhariṣyāmaḥ svakaṃ padam
evamāmaṃ tryatesarvenirākṛtyabaliṃ tadā
viṣṇoḥ sārddhaṃ mahāvairahṛdikṛtvāmahāsurāḥ
evaṃ tedānavāḥ sarvetyaktarāgāḥ suniścitāḥ
kāmakrodhavihīnāścanirāhārājitaklamāḥ
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe bhūmikhaṇḍedaityatapaścaryāvarṇanaṃ nāmadaśamo'dhyāyaḥ
ekādaśo'dhyāyaḥ
ṛṣaya ūcuḥ
idānīṃ śrotumicchāmaḥ suvratasyām ahātmanaḥ
sūta uvāca
kathāprajṣāprabhāveṇapūrvam eva yathāśrutā
tathāviprāḥ pravakṣyāmi suvratasya mahātmanaḥ
caritaṃ pāvanaṃ divyaṃ vaiṣṇavaṃ śreyaāvaham
bhavatāmagrataḥ sarvaṃ viṣṇoś caiva prasādataḥ
pūrvakalpemahābhāgāḥ sukṣetrepāpanāśane
revātīresupuṇyecatīrthevāmanasaṃ jṣake
kauśikasya kulejātaḥ somaśarmādvijottamaḥ
dāridreṇasaduḥkhenasarvadaivaprapīḍitaḥ
samālokyatadākāṃ taṃ tam uvācatapasvinī
vyāmohenapramūḍhosityajaciṃ tāṃ mahāmate
nāsticiṃ tāsamaṃ duḥkhaṅkāyaśoṣaṇam eva hi
ciṃ tāyāḥ kāraṇaṃ viprakathayasvamamāgrataḥ
priyāvākyaṃ samākarṇyasomaśarmābravītpriyām
somaśarmovāca
icchayācinti taṃ bhadreciṃ tāduḥkhasya kāraṇam
tatsarvaṃ tupravakṣyāmi śrutvācaivāvadhāryatām
tathāputravihīnaścaetadduḥkhasya kāraṇam
śrūyatāmabhidhāsyāmisarvasandehanāśanam
lobhaḥ pāpasya bījaṃ himohomūlaṃ catasya hi
asatyaṃ tasya vaiskaṃ dhomāyāśākhāsuvistarā daṃ bhakauṭilyapatrāṇikubuddhyāpuṣpitaḥ sadā
chadmapākhaṇḍaśauryerṣyāḥ krūrāḥ kūṭāścapāpinaḥ
pakṣiṇomohavṛkṣasya māyāśākhāsamāśritāḥ
tṛṣṇodakenasaṃ vṛddhā'śraddhātasya dravaḥ priya
yādṛśaiś ca phalaiś ca ivasuphalolobhapādapaḥ
asya cchāyāṃ samāśrityayonaraḥ parituṣyate
phalānāṃ turasenāpiadharmeṇatupālitaḥ
tasmācciṃ tāṃ parityajyapumāṃ ṃ llobhaṃ nakārayet
dhanaputrakalatrāṇāṃ ciṃ tām ekāṃ nakārayet
yohividvānbhavetkāṃ tamūrkhāṇāṃ pathametihi
subhāryāmihaviṃ dāmikathaṃ putrānahaṃ labhe
punaścaitanyamāyātimahāduḥkhenapīḍyate
saṃ sārenāsti sambandhaḥ kenasārdhaṃ mahāmate
mitrāścabāṃ dhavāḥ putrāḥ pitṛmātṛsabhṛtyakāḥ
somaśarmovāca
yena sambaṃ dhinaḥ sarvedhanaputrādibāṃ dhavāḥ
ṛṇa sambaṃ dhinaḥ kecitkecinnyāsāpahārakāḥ
lābhapradābhavaṃ tyekeudāsīnāstathāpare
bhāryāpitācamātācabhṛtyāḥ svajanabāṃ dhavāḥ
nyāsāpahārabhāvenayasya yenakṛtaṃ bhuvi
nyāsasvāmībhavetputroguṇavānarūpavānbhuvi
yenaivāpahrataṃ nyāsaṃ tasya gehe na saṃśayaḥ
nyāsāpaharaṇādduḥkhaṃ sadatvādāruṇaṅgataḥ
nyāsasvāmīsuputrobhūnnyāsāpahārakasya ca
guṇavānarūpavāṃś caivasarvalakṣaṇasaṃ yutaḥ
svīyaṃ dravyaṃ samudgṛhyaprītimutpādyacottamām
yathāyenapradattaṃ syānnyāsasya haraṇātpurā
duḥkham eva mahābhāgadāruṇaṃ prāṇanāśanam
tādṛśaṃ tasya sauhṛdyātputrobhūtvāmahāguṇaiḥ
alpāyuṣastathābhūtvāmaraṇaṃ copagacchati
duḥkhaṃ datvāprayātyevaṃ bhūtvābhūtvāpunaḥ punaḥ
anenāpahṛtaṃ nyāsaṃ madīyasyopakāraṇam
dravyāpaharaṇenāpinameprāṇāgatāḥ kila
gaṃ tāsmisubhṛśaṃ cādyakasyāhaṃ sutaīdṛśaḥ
piśācatvaṃ mayādattamasyaivetidurātmanaḥ
prayātyanenamārgeṇaduḥkhaṃ datvāsudāruṇam
evaṃ nyāsaṃ samuddhartuḥ putrāḥ kāṃ tabhavanti vai
saṃ sāreduḥkhabahulādṛśyaṃ teyatratatraca
ṛṇa sambaṃ dhinaḥ putrānpravakṣyāmi tavāgrataḥ
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe bhūmikhaṇḍesuvratopākhyāneekādaśo'dhyāyaḥ
dvādaśo'dhyāyaḥ
ṛṇa sambaṃ dhinaṃ putraṃ pravakṣyāmi tavāgrataḥ
ṛṇaṃ yasya gṛhītvāyaḥ prayātimaraṇaṅkila
arthadātāsutobhūtvābhrātācāthapitāpriyā
mitrarūpeṇavarttetaatiduṣṭaḥ sadaivasaḥ
guṇaṃ naivaprapaśyetasakrūroniṣṭhurākṛtiḥ
jalpateniṣṭhuraṃ vākyaṃ sadaivasvajaneṣuca
miṣṭaṃ miṣṭaṃ samaśnātibhogānbhuṃ jatinityaśaḥ
gṛhadravyaṃ balādbhuṅktevāryamāṇaḥ sakupyati
jātakarmādibhirbālyedravyaṅgṛhṇātidāruṇaḥ
punarvivāha sambaṃ dhānnānābhedairanekadhā
gṛhakṣetrādikaṃ sarvaṃ mamaivahi na saṃśayaḥ
sukhaṇḍairmuśalaiś ca ivasarvaghātaiḥ sudāruṇaiḥ
mṛtetutasminpitarimātaryevātiniṣṭhuraḥ
niḥ snehoniṣṭhuraścaścaivajāyatenātrasaṃśayaḥ
śrāddhakarmāṇidānāninakarotikadaivasaḥ
evaṃ vidhāścavaiputrāḥ prabhavanti mahītale
pitaraṃ mātaraṃ caivakrīḍamānohitāḍayet
tāḍayitvāprayātyevaprahasyaivapunaḥ punaḥ
punarāyātisaṃ trastaḥ pitaraṃ mātaraṃ prati
pitaraṃ mārayitvācamātaraṃ catataḥ punaḥ
prayātyevaṃ saduṣṭātmāpūrvavairānubhāvataḥ
athātaḥ saṃ pravakṣyāmi yasmāllabhyaṃ bhavetpriyam
jātamātraḥ priyaṅkuryādbālyelālanakrīḍanaiḥ
śrāddhakarmāṇisarvāṇipiṇḍadānādikāṅkriyām
ṛṇatrayānvitaḥ snehādbhuṃ jāpayatinityaśaḥ
yasmāllabhyaṃ bhavetkāṃ taprayacchati na saṃśayaḥ
putrobhūtvāmahāprājṣaanenavidhinākila
udāsīnaṃ pravakṣyāmi tavāgrepriyasāṃ pratam
tavāgrekathitaṃ sarvaṃ putrāṇāṅgatirīdṛśī
yathāputrastathābhāryāpitāmātāthabāṃ dhavāḥ
bhṛtyāścānyesamākhyātāḥ paśavasturagāstathā
gajāmahiṣyodāsāścaṛṇa sambaṃ dhinastvamī
gṛhītaṃ naṛṇaṃ tenaāvābhyāṃ tunakasyacit
nyāsam eva ṃ nakasyāpikṛtaṃ vaipūrvajanmani
dhārayāvonakasyāpiṛṇaṅkāṃ taśṛṇuṣva hi
evaṃ jṣātvāśamaṅgacchatyajaciṃ tāmanarthakīm
kasya putrāḥ priyābhāryākasya svajanabāṃ dhavāḥ
hṛtaṃ nacaivakasyāpinaivadattaṃ tvayāpunaḥ
evaṃ jṣātvāśamaṅgacchajahiciṃ tāmanarthakīm
kasya putrāḥ priyābhāryākasya svajanabāṃ dhavāḥ
mahāmohenasaṃ mūḍhāmānavāḥ pāpacetasaḥ
anṛtaṃ dṛśyatekāṃ tasaṃ sārasya hibandhanam
evaṃ sambodhitodevyābhāryayāpriyayātadā
punaḥ prāhapriyāṃ bhāryāṃ sumanāṃ jñānavādinīm
somaśarmovāca
tathāpivaṃ śamicchanti sādhavaḥ satyapaṇḍitāḥ
satputreṇamahābhāgapitāmātācajaṃ tavaḥ
ekastārayatevaṃ śamanyesaṃ tāpakārakāḥ
sugarbhaḥ prāpyatepuṇyaistasmātpuṇyaṃ samācara
somaśarmovāca
puṇyasyācaraṇaṃ brūhitathājanmānyapipriye
supuṇyaḥ kīdṛśobhadrevadapuṇyasya lakṣaṇam
ādaupuṇyaṃ pravakṣyāmi yathāpuṇyaṃ śrutaṃ mayā
puruṣovāthavānārīyathānityaṃ cavartate
yathāpuṇyaiḥ samāpnotikīrtiṃ putrānpriyāndhanam
puṇyasya lakṣaṇaṅkāṃ tasarvam eva vadāmyaham
dānenaniyamaiścāpikṣamāśaucenavallabha
ahiṃ sayāsuśaktyācaasteyenāpivartanaiḥ
yaṃ yaṃ cintayateprājṣastaṃ taṃ prāpnotidurlabham
somaśarmovāca
kīdṛṅmūrtistudharmasya kānyaṅgānicabhāmini
prītyākathayam ekāṃ teśrotuṃ śraddhāpravartate
adṛśyavartmāsatyātmānadṛṣṭodevadānavaiḥ
tenadṛṣṭomahādharmodattātreyeṇavaisadā
indrādhikenarūpeṇapraśastenabhaviṣyataḥ
vāyubhakṣaunirāhārausaṃ jātauśubhadarśanau
daśavarṣasahasraṃ tutāvatkālaṃ taporjitam
paṃ cāgniḥ sādhyatedvābhyāṃ tāvatkālaṃ dvijottama
trikālaṃ sādhitaṃ tāvannirāhāraṅkṛtaṃ tathā
durvāsāstumuniśreṣṭhastapasācaivakarṣitaḥ
athadharmaḥ samāyātaḥ svarūpeṇacavaitadā
agnihotrisvarūpeṇa hy ātreyaṃ hi samāgatāḥ
kṣamāśānti stathālajjācāhiṃ sācahyakalpanā
etāḥ sarvāḥ samāyātāḥ strīrūpāstudvijottama
buddhiḥ prajṣādayāśraddhāmedhāsatkṛtiśāṃ tayaḥ
paṣcayajṣāstathāpuṇyāḥ sāṅgāvedāstutetadā
agnyādhānādayaḥ puṇyāaśvamedhādayastathā
rūpalāvaṇyasaṃ yuktāḥ sarvābharaṇabhūṣitāḥ
divyamālyāṃ baradharādivyagaṃ dhānulepanāḥ
kirīṭakuṇḍalopetādivyābharaṇabhūṣitāḥ
dīptimaṃ taḥ surūpāstetejojvālābhirāvṛtāḥ
evaṃ dharmaḥ samāyātaḥ parivārasamanvitaḥ
yatratiṣṭhatidurvāsāḥ krodhanaḥ kālavattathā
svasthobhavadvijaśreṣṭhautkṛṣṭaṃ tapasaḥ phalam
durvāsā uvāca
saptanāryaḥ pratiṣṭhanti surūpāḥ samalaṅkṛtāḥ
ayaṃ brāhmaṇarūpeṇasarvatejaḥ samanvitaḥ
daṇḍahastaḥ suprasannaḥ kamaṇḍaludharastathā
tavāgrebrahmacaryoyaṃ soyaṃ paśyasamāgataḥ
kapilaṃ piṅgalākṣaṃ casatyamenaṃ dvijottama
tādṛśaṃ paśyadharmātmanvaiśvadevasamaprabham
etaṃ paśyamahābhāgatavapārśvasamāgatam
prasannavāgdīptiyuktaḥ sarvajīvadayāparaḥ
jaṭilaḥ karkaśaḥ piṅgohyatitīvromahāprabhuḥ
nāśakohisapāpānāṅkhaḍgahastodvijottama
abhiśāṃ tomahāpuṇyonityakriyāsamanvitaḥ
payaḥ kamaṇḍalukarodaṃ takāṣṭhadharodvijaḥ
śauca eṣa samāyāto bhavataḥ sannidhāv iha
atisādhvīmahābhāgāsatyabhūṣaṇabhūṣitā
sarvabhūṣaṇaśobhāṅgīśuśrūṣeyaṃ samāgatā
atidhīrāprasannāṅgīgaurīprahasitānanā
padmahastāiyaṃ dhātrīpadmanetrāsupadminī
divyairābharaṇairyuktākṣamāprāptādvijottama
atiśāṃ tāsupratiṣṭhābahumaṅgalasaṃ yutā
divyaratnakṛtāśobhādivyābharaṇabhūṣitā
tavaśānti rmahāprājṣajñānarūpāsamāgatā
paropakārakaraṇābahusatyasamākulā
mitabhāṣāsadaivāsauakalpātesamāgatā
prasannāsākṣamāyuktāsarvābharaṇabhūṣitā
padmāsanāsurūpāsāśyāmavarṇāyaśasvinī
ahiṃ seyaṃ mahābhāgābhavaṃ taṃ tusamāgatā
taptakāṃ canavarṇāṅgīraktāṃ baravilāsinī
jñānabhāvasamākrāṃ tāpuṇyahastātapasvinī
muktābharaṇaśobhāḍhyānirmalācāruhāsinī
iyaṃ śraddhāmahābhāgapaśyapaśyasamāgatā
bahubuddhisamākrāṃ tābahujñānasamākulā
subhogāsaktarūpāsāsusthitācārumaṅgalā
sarveṣṭadhyānasaṃ yuktālokamātāyaśasvinī
sarvābharaṇaśobhāḍhyāpīnaśroṇipayodharā
gauravarṇāsamāyātāmālyavastravibhūṣitā
iyaṃ medhāmahāprājṣatavaivaparisaṃ sthitā
haṃ sacaṃ drapratīkāśāmuktāhāravilaṃ binī
sarvābharaṇa sambhūṣāsuprasannāmanasvinī
śvetavastreṇasaṃ vītāśatapatraṃ śayekṛtam
pustakakarāpaṅkajasthārājamānāsadaivahi
eṣāprajṣāmahābhāgabhāgyavaṃ taṃ samāgatā
lākṣārasasamāvarṇāsuprasannāsadaivahi
pītapuṣpakṛtāmālāhārakeyūrabhūṣaṇā
mudrikākaṅkaṇopetākarṇakuṇḍalamaṇḍitā
pītenavāsasādevīsadaivaparirājate
trailokyasyopakārāyapoṣaṇāyādvitīyakā
yasyāḥ śīlaṃ dvijaśreṣṭhasadaivaparikīrtitam
seyaṃ dayāsusaṃ prāptātavapārśvedvijottama
iyaṃ vṛddhāmahāprājṣabhāvabhāryātapasvinī
mamamātādvijaśreṣṭhadharmohaṃ tavasuvrata
itijṣātvāśamaṅgacchamām eva ṃ paripālaya
durvāsā uvāca
yadidharmaḥ samāyātomatsamīpaṃ tusāṃ pratam
tanmetvaṅkāraṇaṃ brūhidurvāsoyadimanyase
durvāsā uvāca
yenāhaṅkupitodevatadidaṅkāraṇaṃ śṛṇu
damaśaucaiḥ susaṅkleśaiḥ śodhitaṅkāyamātmanaḥ
lakṣavarṣapramāṇaṃ vaitapaścaryāmayākṛtā
evaṃ śrutvātadātasya tam uvācamahāmatiḥ
mayinaṣṭemahāprājṣalokonāśaṃ sameṣyati
duḥkhamūlamahaṃ tātanikarśāmibhṛśaṃ dvija
puṇyam eva ṃ prakurvāṇaḥ prāṇīprāṇānvimuṃ cati
durvāsā uvāca
tatsukhaṅkovijānātiniścayaṃ naivapaśyati
tacchreyonaivapaśyāmianyāyyaṃ hikṛtaṃ tava
tatsukhaṅkovijānāticānyāyaṃ dharmam eva vā
dharmaśāstroditaṃ caivakṛtaṃ sarvatranānyathā
iti jṣātvāsadharmātmābhavānsamavalokayet
yathācaurāmahāpāpāḥ svakāyenasahanti te
duḥkhenadāruṇaṃ tīvraṃ tathāsukhaṅkathaṃ nahi
yenakāyenapāpāścasaṃ carantihipātakam
tenapīḍāṃ sahaṃ tyevapātakasya hitatphalam
daṇḍam ekaṃ paraṃ dṛṣṭaṃ dharmaśāstreṣupaṇḍitaiḥ
durvāsā uvāca
evaṃ nyāyaṃ namanyehaṃ tathaivaśṛṇudharmarāṭ
śāpatrayaṃ pradāsyāmikruddhohaṃ tavanānyathā
yadākruddhomahāprājṣamām eva hikṣamasvaca
naivakṣamasiviprendradāsīputraṃ himāṅkuru
rājānaṃ tuprakartavyaṃ cāṇḍālaṃ camahāmune
durvāsāścatataḥ kruddhodharmaṃ caivaśaśāpaha
durvāsā uvāca
rājābhavatvaṃ dharmādyadāsīputraścanānyathā
gacchacāṇḍālayoniṃ cadharmatvaṃ svecchayāvraja
evaṃ śāpatrayaṃ dattvāgatosaudvijasattamaḥ
anenāpiprasaṅgenadṛṣṭodharmaḥ purākila
somaśarmovāca
dharmastukīdṛśojātastenaśaptomahātmanā
tadrūpaṃ tasya mebrūhiyadijānāsibhāmini
bharatānāṅkulejātodharmobhūtvāyudhiṣṭhiraḥ
yadārājāhariścaṃ droviśvāmitreṇakarṣitaḥ
tadācāṇḍālatāṃ prāptaḥ sahidharmomahāmatiḥ
evaṅkarmaphalaṃ bhuktaṃ dharmeṇāpimahātmanā
durvāsasohiśāpādvaisatyamuktaṃ tavāgrataḥ
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe bhūmikhaṇḍesomaśarmākhyānesomaśarma
sumanāsaṃ vāde dvādaśo'dhyāyaḥ
trayodaśo'dhyāyaḥ
somaśarmovāca
kīdṛśaṃ brahmacaryaṃ cayadijānāsibhāmini
nityaṃ satyeratiryasya puṇyātmātuṣṭitāṃ vrajet
ṛtauprāptevrajennārīṃ svīyāṃ doṣavivarjitaḥ
brahmacaryaṃ mayāproktaṅgṛhiṇāmuttamaṅkila
yatīnāṃ tupravakṣyāmi tanmenigadataḥ śṛṇu
damasatyasamāyuktaḥ pāpādbhītastusarvadā
bhāryāsaṅgaṃ varjayitvādhyānajñānapratiṣṭhitaḥ
yatīnāṃ brahmacaryaṃ casamākhyātaṃ tavāgrataḥ
tapaevapravakṣyāmi tanmenigadataḥ śṛṇu
prāṇināmupakārāyasaṃ sthitaudyamāvṛtaḥ
tapaevaṃ samākhyātaṃ satyam eva ṃ vadāmyaham
dṛṣṭvāmatirnayasya syātsasatyaḥ parikīrtitaḥ
dānam eva pravakṣyāmi yenajīvanti mānavāḥ
grāsamātraṃ tathādeyaṅkṣudhārtāya na saṃśayaḥ
tṛṇaṃ śayyāṃ cavacanaṅgṛhacchāyāṃ suśītalām
āsanaṃ vacanālāpaṅkauṭilyenavivarjitam
devānpitṝnsamabhyarcyaevaṃ dānaṃ dadātiyaḥ
prakuryānmānuṣobhūtvāsadevonātrasaṃśayaḥ
devānāṃ brāhmaṇānāṃ capūjāsvabhiratohiyaḥ
upakāreṣupuṇyeṣuniyamo'yaṃ prakīrtitaḥ
kṣamārūpaṃ pravakṣyāmi śrūyatāṃ dvijasattama
parākrośaṃ hisaṃ śrutyatāḍitesatikenacit
sahiṣṇuḥ syātsadharmātmānahirāgaṃ prayātica
evaṅkṣamāsamākhyātāśaucam eva ṃ vadāmyaham
śaucam eva ṃ samākhyātamahiṃ sāṃ tuvadāmyaham
tṛṇamapivinākāryaṣchettavyaṃ navijānatā
ahiṃ sāniratobhūyādyathātmanitathāpare
śānti eva prakṣyāmi śāṃ tyāsukhaṃ samaśnute
evaṃ śānti ḥ samākhyātāasteyaṃ tuvadāmyaham
damanādindriyāṇāṃ vaimanasopivikāriṇaḥ
auddhatyaṃ nāśayetteṣāṃ sacaitanyovaśītadā
śuśrūṣāṃ tupravakṣyāmi dharmaśāstreṣuyādṛśī
pūrvācāryairyathāproktātām eva ṃ pravadāmyaham
vācādehenamanasāgurukāryaṃ prasādhayet
jāyate'nugrahoyatraśuśrūṣāsānigadyate
īdṛśecāpidharmetuvartateyonaraḥ sadā
evaṃ jṣātvāmahāprājṣadharmam eva vrajasvahi
sarvaṃ hiprāpyatekāṃ tayadasādhyaṃ mahītale
bhāryāyāstuvacaḥ śrutvāsomaśarmāsubuddhimān
punaḥ provācatāṃ bhāryāṃ sumanāṃ dharmavādinīm
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe paṣcapaṣcāśatsahasrasaṃhitāyāṃ bhūmikhaṇḍe
dresumanopākhyānetrayodaśo'dhyāyaḥ
caturdaśo'dhyāyaḥ
somaśarmovāca
evaṃ vidhaṃ mahāpuṇyaṃ dharmavyākhyānamuttamam
kathaṃ jānāsibhadretvaṅkasmāccaivatvayāśrutam
bhārgavāṇāṅkulejātaḥ pitāmamamahāmate
cyavanonāmavikhyātaḥ sarvajñānaviśāradaḥ
tasyāhaṃ priyakanyāvaiprāṇādapicavallabhā
sabhāsucamunīnāṃ tudevatāyataneṣuca
tenasārddhaṃ vrajāmyekākrīḍamānāsadaivahi
kauśikānvaya sambhūtovedaśarmāmahāmatiḥ
piturmamasakhādaivādaṭamānaḥ samāgataḥ
duḥkhenamahatāviṣṭaścintayānomuhurmuhuḥ
samāgataṃ mahātmānaṃ tam uvācapitāmama
bhavaṃ taṃ duḥkhasaṃ taptamitijānāmisuvrata
kasmādduḥkhībhavāṣjātastasmāttvaṅkāraṇaṃ vada
etadvākyaṃ tataḥ śrutvācyavanasya mahātmanaḥ
tam uvācamahātmānaṃ pitaraṃ mamasuvrataḥ
vedaśarmāmahāprājṣasarvaduḥkhasya kāraṇam
mamabhāryāmahāsādhvīpātivratyaparāyaṇā
aputrāsāhisaṃ jātāmamavaṃ śonavidyate
etasminnaṃ tareprāptaḥ kaścitsiddhaḥ samāgataḥ
mamapitrātathātenahyutthāyavedaśarmaṇā
dvābhyāmantargataṃ pṛṣṭaṃ pūrvoktaṃ cayathātvayā
dharmeṇaprāpyateputrodhanaṃ dhānyaṃ tathāstriyaḥ
tatastenakṛtaṃ dharmaṃ saṃ pūrṇaṃ vedaśarmaṇā
somaśarmovāca
ubhayorlakṣaṇaṅkāṃ tetatsarvaṃ hivadasvame
satyaśaucakṣamāśānti tīrthapuṇyādikaistathā
divyarūpadharābhūtvāgandharvābrāhmaṇāstathā
vedapāṭhasamāyuktāgītajñānaviśāradāḥ
tasya pārśvaṃ samāyānti stutiṅkurvanti cātulām
tīrthaṃ calabhateprājṣaḥ snānārthaṃ dharmatatparaḥ
ārāmecataḍāgecayatrāśvatthovaṭastathā
brahmavṛkṣaṃ samāśrityaśrīvṛkṣaṃ catathāpunaḥ
aśvasthānaṃ samāśrityagajasthānagatonaraḥ
aśokaṃ cūtavṛkṣaṃ casamāśrityayadāsthitaḥ
saṃ nidhaubrāhmaṇānāṃ carājaveśmagatothavā
raṇabhūmiṃ samāśrityapūrvaṃ yatramṛtobhavet
mṛtyusthānānipuṇyānikevalaṃ dharmakāraṇam
gograhaṃ tususaṃ prāpyatathācāmarakaṃ ṭakam
evaṃ sthānaṃ samāpnotiyadāmṛtyuṃ samāśritaḥ
mātaraṃ paśyatepuṇyaṃ pitaraṃ canarottamaḥ
bhrātaraṃ śreyasāyuktamanyaṃ svajanabāṃ dhavam
baṃ dījanaistathāpuṇyaiḥ stūyamānaṃ punaḥ punaḥ
pāpiṣṭhaṃ naivapaśyetamātṛpitrādikaṃ punaḥ
gītaṅgāyanti gandharvāḥ stuvanti stāvakāḥ stavaiḥ
maṃ trapāṭhaistathāviprāmātāsnehenapūjayet
pitāsvajanavargāścadharmātmānaṃ mahāmatim
evaṃ dūtāḥ samākhyātāḥ puṇyasthānānitevibho
pratyakṣānpaśyatedūtānhāsyasnehasamāvilān
dharmarājomahāprājṣobhavaṃ taṃ tusamāhvayet
jāyatenātrasandehaḥ prasannātmāsatiṣṭhati
jñānavijñānasaṃ pannaḥ smarandevaṃ janārdanam
taiḥ sārddhaṃ tuprayātyevaṃ saṃ tuṣṭohṛṣṭamānasaḥ
daśamadvāramāśrityaātmātasya sa gacchati
śibikātasya āyātihaṃ sayānaṃ manoharam
vimānam eva cāyātihayovāgajauttamaḥ
vījyamānaḥ sapuṇyātmāpuṇyairevaṃ samaṃ tataḥ
gīyamānastudharmātmāstūyamānastupaṇḍitaiḥ
baṃ dibhiścāraṇairdivyairbrāhmaṇairvedapāragaiḥ
yathādānaprabhāveṇaphalamāpnotitatrasaḥ
ārāmavāṭikāmadhyesaprayātisukhenavai
apsarobhiḥ samākīrṇodivyābhirmaṅgalairyutaḥ
devaiḥ saṃ stūyamānastudharmarājaṃ prapaśyati
evaṃ sapaśyatedharmaṃ saumyarūpaṃ mahāmatim
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe paṣcapaṣcāśatsahasrasaṃhitāyāṃ bhūmikhaṇḍe
dresumanopākhyānecaturdaśo'dhyāyaḥ
paṣcadaśo'dhyāyaḥ
somaśarmovāca
pāpināṃ maraṇaṃ bhadrekīdṛśairlakṣaṇairyutam
tanmetvaṃ vistarādbrūhiyadijānāsibhāmini
śrūyatāmabhidhāsyāmitasmātsiddhācchrutaṃ mayā
pāpināṃ maraṇekāṃ tayādṛśaṃ liṅgam eva ca
mahāpātakināṃ caivasthānaṃ ceṣṭāṃ vadāmyaham
viṇmūtrāmedhyasaṃ yuktāṃ bhūmiṃ pāpasamanvitām
satāṃ prāpyasuduṣṭātmāprāṇānduḥkhenamuṃ cati
cāṇḍālabhūmiṃ saṃ prāpyamaraṇaṃ yātiduḥsthitaḥ
gardabhācaritāṃ bhūmiṃ veśyāgehaṃ samāśritaḥ
asthicarmanakhaiḥ pūrṇamāśritaṃ pāpakilbiṣaiḥ
tāṃ prāpyacasaduṣṭātmāmṛtyuṃ yātisuniścitam
anyāṃ pāpasamācārāṃ prāpyamṛtyuṃ sa gacchati
athaceṣṭāṃ pravakṣyāmi dūtānāṃ tutamicchatām
bhairavāndāruṇānghorānatikṛṣṇānmahodarān
piṅgākṣānpītanīlāṃ ścaatiśvetānmahodarān
atyuccānvikarālāṃ ścaśuṣkamāṃ savasopamān
raudradaṃ ṣṭrānkarālāṃ ścasiṃ hāsyānsarpahastakān
satāndṛṣṭvāprakaṃ petakhidyatecamuhurmuhuḥ
śivāsaṃ nādavadghorānmahārāvānmahāmate
muṃ canti dūtakāḥ sarvekarṇamūletutasya hi
galepāśaiḥ prabaddhvātekaṭiṃ baddhvātathodare
samādhṛṣyanipātyaṃ tehāhetivadatemuhuḥ
mriyamāṇasya yāceṣṭātām eva ṃ pavadāmyaham
paradravyāpaharaṇaṃ parabhāryāviḍaṃ banam
ṛṇaṃ parasya sarvasvaṅgṛhītaṃ yattupāpibhiḥ
kaṃ ṭhamāyānti tesarvemriyamāṇasya tasya ca
yānikānicapāpānipūrvam eva kṛtānica
āyānti kaṃ ṭhamūlaṃ temahāpāpasya nānyathā
pīḍābhirdāruṇābhistukaṃ ṭhoghuraghurāyate
rodatekaṃ pate'tyarthaṃ mātaraṃ pitaraṃ punaḥ
smaratebhrātaraṃ tatrabhāryāṃ putrānpunaḥ punaḥ
punarvismaraṇaṃ yātimahāpāpenamohitaḥ
tasya prāṇānagacchanti bahupīḍāsamākulāḥ
evaṃ pīḍāsamāyuktoduḥkhaṃ bhuṅktetimohitaḥ
tasya prāṇāḥ sudaḥ khenamahākaṣṭaiḥ pracālitāḥ
apānamārgamāśrityaśṛṇukāṃ taprayānti te
evaṃ prāṇīmahāmugdholobhamohasamanvitaḥ
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe paṣcapaṣcāśatsahasrasaṃhitāyāṃ bhūmikhaṇḍedresumano
pākhyānepāpamaraṇavivakṣānāmapaṣcadaśo'dhyāyaḥ
ṣoḍaśo'dhyāyaḥ
aṅgārasaṃ cayemārgeghṛṣyamāṇohinīyate
dahyamānaḥ saduṣṭātmāceṣṭamānaḥ punaḥ punaḥ
yatrātapomahātīvrodvādaśādityatāpitaḥ
nīyatetenamārgeṇasaṃ taptaḥ sūryaraśmibhiḥ
parvateṣvevadurgeṣuchāyāhīneṣudurmatiḥ
nīyatetenamārgeṇakṣudhātṛṣṇāprapīḍitaḥ
sadūtairhanyamānastugadākhaḍgaiḥ paraśvadhaiḥ
kaśābhistāḍyamānastuniṃ dyamānastudūtakaiḥ
tataḥ śītamayemārgevāyunāsevyatepunaḥ
tenaśītenaduḥkhīsabhūtvāyāti na saṃśayaḥ
ākṛṣyamāṇodūtaistunānādurgeṣunīyate
evaṃ pāpīsaduṣṭātmādevabrāhmaṇaniṃ dakaḥ
sarvapāpasamācāro nīyate yamakiṅkaraiḥ
yamaṃ paśyatiduṣṭātmākṛṣṇāṃ janacayopamam
tamugraṃ dāruṇaṃ bhīmaṃ bhīmadūtaiḥ samāvṛtam
ārūḍhaṃ mahiṣaṃ devaṃ dharmarājaṃ dvijottama
daṃ ṣṭrākarālamatyugraṃ tasyāsyaṅkālasaṃ nibham
pītavāsaṅgadāhastaṃ raktagaṃ dhānulepanam
raktamālyakṛtābhūṣaṅgadāhastaṃ bhayaṅkaram
evaṃ vidhaṃ mahākāyaṃ yamaṃ paśyatidurmatiḥ
taṃ dṛṣṭvāsamanuprāptaṃ sarvadharmabahiṣkṛtam
yamaḥ paśyatitaṃ duṣṭaṃ pāpiṣṭhaṃ dharmakaṃ ṭakam
śāsayettumahāduḥkhaiḥ pīḍābhirdārumudgalaiḥ
yāvadyugasahasrāṃ taṃ tāvatkālaṃ prapacyate
nārakīṃ yātivaiyoniṅkṛmikoṭiṣupāpakṛt
maraṇaṃ casapāpātmāevaṃ yātisuniścitam
śunāṃ yoniśataṃ prāpyabhuṅktevaipātakaṃ punaḥ
vyāghrobhavatiduṣṭātmārāsabhīṃ yātivaipunaḥ
mārjāraśūkarīṃ yoniṃ sarpayoniṃ tathaiva ca
nānābhedāsusarvāsutiryakṣucapunaḥ punaḥ
pāpapakṣiṣusaṃ yātianyāsumahatīṣuca
cāṇḍālabhillayoniṃ capuliṃ dīṃ yātipāpakṛt
etat te sarvam ākhyātaṃ pāpināṃ janmacaivahi
maraṇeśṛṇukāṃ tatvaṃ ceṣṭāṃ teṣāṃ sudāruṇām
pāpapuṇyasamācārastavāgrekathitomayā
iti śrīpadmapurāṇepaṣcapaṣcāśatsahasrasaṃ hitāyāmaindresumanopākhyāne
pāpapuṇyavivakṣānāmaṣoḍaśo'dhyāyaḥ
saptaśo'dhyāyaḥ
somaśarmovāca
kathaṃ putramahaṃ viṃ dyāṃ sarvajṣaṅguṇasaṃ yutam
dānadharmādikaṃ bhadreparatreha na saṃśayaḥ
vasiṣṭhaṅgacchadharmajṣaṃ taṃ prārthayamahāmunim
sūta uvāca
evaṅkariṣyekalyāṇitavavākyaṃ na saṃśayaḥ
evamuktvājagāmāśusomaśarmādvijottamaḥ
vasiṣṭhaṃ sarvavettāraṃ divyaṃ taṃ tapatāṃ varam
gaṅgātīresthitaṃ puṇyamāśramasthaṃ dvijottamam
tejojvālāsamākīrṇaṃ dvitīyamivabhāskaram
rājamānaṃ mahātmānaṃ brahmaṇyaṃ cadvijottamam
bhaktyāpraṇamyavipreśaṃ daṇḍavaccapunaḥ punaḥ
tam uvācamahātejābrahmasūnurakalmaṣaḥ
upāviśāsanepuṇyesukhenasumahāmate
evamuktvāsayogīṃ draḥ punaḥ prāhatapodhanam
gṛheputreṣutevatsadārabhṛtyeṣusarvadā
kṣemamastimahābhāgapuṇyakarmasucāgniṣu
nirāmayosicāṅgeṣudharmaṃ pālayasesadā
evamuktvāmahāprājṣaḥ punaḥ prāhasuśarmaṇam
evaṃ sambhāṣitaṃ vipraṃ virarāmasakumbhajaḥ
sahovācamahātmānaṃ vasiṣṭhaṃ tapatāṃ varam
bhagavaṣchrūyatāṃ vākyaṃ suprasannenacetasā
etanmesaṃśayaṃ tātakasmātpāpādvadasvame
tayāhaṃ preṣitastātatavapārśvaṃ samāturaḥ
vasiṣṭha uvāca
putrāmitrāṇyathabhrātāanyesvajanabāṃ dhavāḥ
tetesumanayāproktāḥ pūrvam eva tavāgrataḥ
putrasya lakṣaṇaṃ puṇyaṃ tavāgrepravadāmyaham
śuddhivijñānasaṃ pannastapasvīvāgvidāṃ varaḥ
sasarvaśāstravettācadevabrāhmaṇapūjakaḥ
yājakaḥ sarvayajṣānāṃ dātātyāgīpriyaṃ vadaḥ
viṣṇudhyānaparonityaṃ śāṃ todāṃ taḥ suhṛtsadā
evaṅguṇaiś ca saṃ yuktaḥ saputraḥ sukhadāyakaḥ
anye sambandhasaṃ yuktāḥ śokasaṃ tāpadāyakāḥ
etādṛśenakiṅkāryaṃ phalahīnenatenaca
āyānti yānti tesarvetāpaṃ datvāsudāruṇam
pūrvajanmakṛtaṃ puṇyaṃ yattvayāparipālitam
tatsarvaṃ hipravakṣyāmi śrūyatāmadbhutaṃ punaḥ
vasiṣṭha uvāca
bhavāṣchūdromahāprājṣapūrvajanmaninānyathā
kṛṣikarttājñānahīnomahālobhenasaṃ yutaḥ
ekabhāryāsadādveṣībahuputrohyadattavān
dānaṃ naivatvayādattaṃ śāstraṃ naivapratiśrutam
kṛtānaivatvayātīrtheyātrācaivamahāmate
evaṅkṛtaṃ tvayāviprakṛṣimārgaṃ punaḥ punaḥ
paśūnāṃ pālanaṃ sarvagavāṃ caivadvijottama
mahiṣīṇāṃ tathāśvānāṃ pālanaṃ capunaḥ punaḥ
tasya vyayaṃ supuṇyenanakṛtaṃ tutvayākadā
pātredānaṃ nadattaṃ tudṛṣṭvādurbalam eva ca
kṛpāṅkṛtvānadattaṃ tubhavatādhanam eva ca
gomahiṣyādikaṃ sarvaṃ paśūnāṃ saṃ citaṃ tvayā
vikrīyacadhanaṃ viprasaṃ citaṃ vipulaṃ tvayā
takraṅghṛtaṃ tathākṣīraṃ vikrayitvātatodadhi
duṣkālaṃ cinti taṃ vipramohito viṣṇumāyayā
kṛtaṃ mahārghamevātraannaṃ brāhmaṇasattama
devānāṃ pūjanaṃ viprabhavatānakṛtaṅkadā
śrāddhaṅkālaṃ tusaṃ prāpyaśraddhayānakṛtaṃ tvayā
bhāryāvadatitesādhvīdinamenaṃ samāgatam
śvaśurasya śrāddhakālaḥ śvaśrvāścaivamahāmate
tvaṃ śrutvātadvacastasyāgṛhaṃ tyaktvāpalāyase
dharmamārgaṃ nadṛṣṭaṃ teśrutaṃ naivakadātvayā
lobhomātāpitābhrātālobhaḥ svajanabāṃ dhavāḥ
tasmādduḥkhībhavāṣjātodaridreṇātipīḍitaḥ
dinedinemahātṛṣṇāhṛdayetepravarddhate
yadāyadāgṛhedravyaṃ vṛddhimāyātitetadā
tṛṣṇayādahyamānastutayātvaṃ vahnirūpayā
sahasraṃ lakṣaṃ mekoṭiḥ kadāarbudam eva ca
kharvonikharvaḥ saṃ jātastṛṣṇānaivapragacchati
tavakāyaṃ parityajyavṛddhimāyātisarvadā
anyam eva mupāyaṃ tudravyāgamanakāraṇāt
khanitramaṃ janaṃ vādaṃ dhātuvādamataḥ param
pṛcchamānobhramasyekastṛṣṇayāparimohitaḥ
praveśaṃ vivarāṇāṃ tuciṃ tamānaḥ supṛcchasi
tṛṣṇānalenasaṃ dīptohāhābhūtovicetanaḥ
dārāputreṣutaddravyaṃ pṛcchamāneṣuvaitvayā
kathitaṃ naivavṛttāṃ taṃ prāṇāṃ styaktvāgatoyamam
evaṃ sarvaṃ mayākhyātaṃ vṛttāṃ taṃ tavapūrvakam
suśīlājñānasaṃ pannāḥ satyadharmaratāḥ sadā
vināviṣṇoḥ prasādenadārāputrānnacāpnuyāt
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe bhūmikhaṇḍedresumanopākhyānesaptadaśo'dhyāyaḥ
aṣṭādaśo'dhyāyaḥ
somaśarmovāca
pūrvajanmakṛtaṃ pāpaṃ tvayākhyātaṃ camemune
tatsarvaṅkāraṇaṃ brūhijñānavijñānapaṇḍita
vasiṣṭha uvāca
yattvayāceṣṭitaṃ pūrvaṅkarmadharmāśritaṃ dvija
tadahaṃ saṃ pravakṣyāmi śrūyatāṃ yadimanyase
brāhmaṇaḥ kaścidanaghaḥ sadācāraḥ supaṇḍitaḥ
viṣṇubhaktastudharmātmānityaṃ viṣṇuparāyaṇaḥ
yātrāvyājenatīrthānāṃ bhramatyekaḥ samedinīm
aṭamānaḥ samāyātastavagehaṃ mahāmatiḥ
yācitaṃ sthānam ekaṃ vaivāsārthaṃ dvijasattama
vaiṣṇavaṃ brāhmaṇaṃ puṇyamity uvācapunaḥ punaḥ
adyatīrthaphalaṃ prāptaṃ tavāṅghridvayadarśanāt
gavāṃ sthānaṃ varaṃ puṇyaṃ nivāsāyaniveditam
aṅgasaṃ vāhanaṅkṛtvāpādaucaiva pramarditau
kṣālitaucapunastoyaiḥ snātaḥ pādodakenahi
sadyoghṛtaṃ dadhikṣīramannaṃ takraṃ pradattavān
evaṃ saṃ toṣitoviprastvayācasahabhāryayā
putraiḥ sārdhaṃ mahābhāgovaiṣṇavojñānapaṇḍitaḥ
āṣāḍhasya tuśuddhasya ikādaśīpāpanāśanī
tasmindinesusaṃ prāptāsarvapātakanāśinī
yasyāṃ devohṛṣīkeśoyoganidrāṃ pragacchati
tāṃ prāpyacatatolokāstatyajurbuddhipaṇḍitāḥ
gṛhasya sarvakarmāṇiviṣṇudhyānaratādvija
utsavaṃ paramaṃ cakrurgītamaṅgalavādanaiḥ
stuvanti brāhmaṇāḥ sarvevedaiḥ stotraiḥ sumaṅgalaiḥ
evaṃ mahotsavaṃ prāpyasacabrāhmaṇasattamaḥ
ekādaśyāstumāhātmyaṃ paṭhitaṃ brāhmaṇenavai
bhāryāputraiḥ sutaiḥ sārddhaṃ śrutaṃ dharmamanuttamam
vratametaṅkariṣyāmiitiniścitamānasaḥ
bhāryāputraiḥ samaṅgatvānadyāṃ snānaṅkṛtaṃ tvayā
hṛṣṭenamanasāviprapūjitomadhusūdanaḥ
sarvopahāraiḥ puṇyaiś ca gandhadhūpādibhistathā
rātraujāgaraṇaṅkṛtvānṛtyagītādibhistathā
brāhmaṇasya prasaṅgenanadyāṃ snānaṃ punaḥ kṛtam
pūjitodevadeveśaḥ puṣpadhūpādimaṅgalaiḥ
bhaktyāpraṇamyagoviṃ daṃ snāpayitvāpunaḥ punaḥ
nirvāpaṃ tādṛśaṃ dattaṃ brāhmaṇāyamahātmane
bhaktyāpraṇamyataṃ vipraṃ dattātasmaisudakṣiṇā
kṛtavānpāraṇaṃ vipraputrairbhāryādibhiḥ samam
evaṃ vrataṃ samācīrṇaṃ tvayāvaidvijasattama
saṅgatyābrāhmaṇasyaivaviṣṇoś caiva prasādataḥ
bhavānbrāhmaṇatāṃ prāptaḥ satyadharmasamanvitaḥ
bhūsurāṇāṃ mahāprājṣaṃ satyadharmasamāvilam
tasmaitubrāhmaṇāyaivavaiṣṇavāyamahātmane
tasya dānasya bhāvenamiṣṭānnamupatiṣṭhati
mahāmohaiḥ pramugdhohitṛṣṇayāvyāpitaṃ manaḥ
nadattaṃ brāhmaṇebhyohidīneṣvanyeṣuvaitvayā
tasya pāpasya bhāvenadāridraṃ tvāmupāviśat
prasādāttasya devasya viṣṇoś caivamahātmanaḥ
tasmādārādhyagovindaṃ nārāyaṇamanāmayam
prāpsyasitvaṃ paraṃ sthānaṃ tadviṣṇoḥ paramaṃ padam
pūrvajanamakṛtaṃ sarvaṃ yattvayāpariceṣṭitam
evaṃ jṣātvāmahābhāganārāyaṇaparobhava

somaśarmāmahāprājṣaḥ sumanayāsahasattamaḥ
kapilāsaṅgamepuṇyerevātīresupuṇyade
snātvātatrasamedhāvītarpayitvāsurānpitṝn
tapastepesuśāṃ tātmājapannārāyaṇaṃ śivam
dvādaśākṣaramaṃ treṇadhyānayuktomahāmanāḥ
sācasādhvīmahābhāgāpativrataparāyaṇā
sumanākāṃ tamevāpiśuśrūṣatitaponvitam
dhyāyamānasya tasyāpivighnaiḥ saṃ darśitaṃ bhayam
sarpāviṣolbaṇāḥ kṛṣṇāstatrayānti mahātmanaḥ
pārśvetetapyamānasya tasya tesomaśarmaṇaḥ
siṃ havyāghragajādṛṣṭābhayam eva ṃ pacakrire
vetālārākṣasābhūtāḥ kūṣmāṇḍāḥ pretabhairavāḥ
bhayaṃ vidarśayaṃ tyetedāruṇaṃ prāṇanāśanam
nānāvidhāmahābhīmāḥ siṃ hāstatrasamāgatāḥ
daṃ ṣṭrākarālavaktrāścajagarjuścātibhairavam
viṣṇordhyānātsadharmātmānacacālamahāmatiḥ
mahāvighnaiḥ susaṃ rūḍhaiścālitomunipuṅgavaḥ
evaṃ nacalatedhyānātsomaśarmādvijottamaḥ
jhaṃ jhāvātaiś ca śītenamahāvṛṣṭyāsupīḍitaḥ
bhaṃ bhārāvamahābhīmaḥ siṃ hastatrasamāgataḥ
taṃ dṛṣṭvābhayavitrastaḥ sasmāranṛhariṃ dvijaḥ
indranīlapratīkāśaṃ pītavastraṃ mahaujasam
śaṅkhacakradharaṃ devaṅgadāpaṅkajadhāriṇam
mahāmauktikahāreṇa induvarṇānukāriṇā
śrīvatsāṅkenadivyenahṛdayaṃ yasya rājate
sarvābharaṇaśobhāṅgaṃ śatapatranibhekṣaṇam
bhrājamānaṃ hṛṣīkeśaṃ dhyānaṃ tenakṛtaṃ dhruvam
tvam eva śaraṇaṅkṛṣṇaśaraṇāgatavatsala
śaraṇaṃ tasya praviṣṭosmikvāstebhayaṃ mamaivahi
yasmādbhayāḥ pravartaṃ tekṛtyādikamahābalāḥ
sarvabhayaprahartāraṃ tamasmiśaraṇaṅgataḥ
pātakānāṃ tusarveṣāṃ dānavānāṃ mahābhayam
rakṣako viṣṇubhaktānāṃ tamasmiśaraṇaṅgataḥ
vṛṃ dārakāṇāṃ sarveṣāṃ dānavānāṃ mahātmanām
yogatiḥ kṛṣṇabhaktānāṃ tamasmiśaraṇaṅgataḥ
abhayobhayanāśāyapāpanāśāyajñānavān
ekaścendrasvarūpeṇatamasmiśaraṇaṅgataḥ
vyādhīnāṃ nāśakāyaivayaauṣadhasvarūpavān
nirāmayonirānaṃ dastamasmiśaraṇaṅgataḥ
acalaścālayellokānapāpojñānam eva ca
tamasmiśaraṇaṃ prāptobhayaṅkiṃ ekariṣyati
sādhūnāṃ cāpisarveṣāṃ pālakoyohyanāmayaḥ
pātiviśvaṃ caviśvātmātamasmiśaraṇaṅgataḥ
yomemṛgendrarūpeṇabhayaṃ darśayategrataḥ
tamahaṃ śaraṇaṃ prāptonarasiṃ haṃ namāmyaham
gajalīlāgatiṃ devaṃ śaraṇāgatavatsalam
gajāsyaṃ jñānasaṃ pannaṃ sapāśāṅkuśadhāriṇam
kālāsyaṅgajatuṇḍaṃ caśaraṇaṃ sugatosmyaham
hiraṇyākṣaprahartāraṃ vārāhaṃ śaraṇaṃ gataḥ
vāmanaṃ taṃ prapannosmiśaraṇāgatavatsalam
hnasvāstuvāmanāḥ kubjāḥ pretāḥ kūṣmāṇḍakādayaḥ
mṛtyurūpadharāḥ sarvedarśayanti bhayaṃ mama
amṛtaṃ taṃ papannosmikiṃ bhayaṃ ekariṣyati
śaraṇaṃ taṃ prapannosmibhayaṅkiṃ ekariṣyati
tārakaḥ sarvalokānāṃ nāśakaḥ sarvapāpinām
tamahaṃ śaraṇaṃ prāptodharmarūpaṃ janārdanam
śaraṇaṃ tasya gaṃ tāsmisadāgatirayaṃ mama
jhaṃ jhāvātomahācaṇḍovapurdūyatimebhṛśam
śaraṇaṃ taṃ prapannosmisadāgatirayaṃ mama
atiśītaṃ cātivarṣāātapastāpadāyakaḥ
eṣāṃ rūpeṇayodevastasyāhaṃ śaraṇaṅgataḥ
kālarūpāamīprāptābhayadāmamacālakāḥ
eṣāṃ śaraṇaṃ prapannosmihareḥ svarūpiṇāṃ sadā
yaṃ sarvadevaṃ parameśvaraṃ hiniṣkevalaṃ jñānamayaṃ pradīpam
vadanti nārāyaṇamādisiddhaṃ siddheśvaraṃ taṃ śaraṇaṃ prapadye
itidhyāyanstuvannityaṅkeśavaṅkleśanāśanam
bhaktyātenasamānītastadātmahṛdayehariḥ
udyamaṃ vikramaṃ tasya sadṛṣṭvāsomaśarmaṇaḥ
āvirbhūyahṛṣīkeśastam uvācaprahṛṣṭavān
somaśarmanmahāprājṣaśrūyatāṃ bhāryayāsaha
dṛṣṭvāviśveraṃ devaṅghanaśyāmaṃ mahodayam
sarvābharaṇaśobhāṅgaṃ sarvāyudhasamanvitam
divyalakṣaṇasaṃ pannaṃ puṇḍarīkanibhekṣaṇam
pītenavāsasāyuktaṃ rājamānaṃ sureśvaram
vainateyasamārūḍhaṃ śaṅkhacakragadādharam
brahmādīnāṃ sudhātāraṃ jagatosyamahāyaśāḥ
viśvasyāsyasadātītaṃ rūpātītaṃ jagadgurum
harṣeṇamahatāviṣṭodaṇḍavatpraṇipatyatam
śriyāyuktaṃ bhāsamānaṃ sūryakoṭisamaprabham
baddhāṃ jalipuṭobhūtvātayāsumanayāsaha
jayayogīśayogīndrajayanāgāṅgaśāyana
yajṣāṅgajayayajṣeśajayaśāśvatasarvaga
jayajñānavatāṃ śreṣṭhajayatvaṃ jñānanāyaka
jayaprajṣādaprajṣāṅgajayaprāṇapradāyaka
jayajñānasvarūpeśajñānagamyāyate namaḥ
jayapadmapalāśākṣapadmanābhāyate namaḥ
jayalakṣmīvilāsāṅganamovedamayāyate
namaḥ kavyavahāyaiva svadhārūpāya te namaḥ
svāhārūpāya yajṣāya pāvanāya namo namaḥ
namas te śārṅgahastāya haraye pāpahāriṇe
keśavāya parāyaiva namas te viśvadhāriṇe
namaḥ kṛpākarāyaiva namo harṣamayāya te
anantāya namo nityaṃ śuddhāya kleśanāśine
ānandāya namo nityaṃ śuddhāya kevalāya te
namo namaḥ pareśāya ajitāyāmṛtātmane
kṣīrasāgaravāsāya namaḥ padmāpriyāya te
auṃkārāya ca śuddhāya acalāya namo namaḥ
namo namo varāhāya mahākūrmāya te namaḥ
namo vāmanarūpāya nṛsiṃhāya mahātmane
sarvajṣānāya matsyāya namo rāmāya te namaḥ
namaḥ kṛṣṇāya buddhāya namo mlecchapraṇāśine
evaṃ stutvā hṛṣīkeśaṃ tam uvāca janārdanam
guṇānāṃ tu paraṃ pāraṃ brahmā vetti na pāvana
nirguṇaṃ saguṇaṃ stotraṃ mayaiva tava keśava

prathamaṃ dehimekṛṣṇavaram ekaṃ suvāṣchitam
darśayasvaparaṃ sthānamacalaṃ mokṣadāyakam

viṣṇubhaktiparaṃ nityaṃ mamavaṃ śapradhārakam
sarvajṣaṃ sarvadaṃ dāṃ taṃ tapastejaḥ samanvitam
devabrāhmaṇalokānāṃ pālakaṃ pūjakaṃ sadā
devamitraṃ puṇyabhāvaṃ dātāraṃ jñānapaṇḍitam

evamastudvijaśreṣṭhabhaviṣyati na saṃśayaḥ
matprasādātsuputrastutavavaṃ śapratārakaḥ
bhokṣyasitvaṃ varānbhogāndivyāṃ ścamānuṣāniha

evaṃ varaṃ harirdattvāsapriyāyadvijāyasaḥ

divyalakṣaṇasaṃ pannaḥ sarvābharaṇabhūṣitaḥ
divyamālyāṃ baradharodivyagaṃ dhānulepanaḥ

evaṃ sambhāṣyatāṃ bhāryāṃ virarāmadvijottamaḥ
śṛṇukāṃ tasamāyātaḥ kaściddevavarottamaḥ
śvetanāgasamārūḍhodivyābharaṇabhūṣitaḥ
divyagaṃ dhānuliptāṅgodivyāścaryasamanvitaḥ
stūyamānaḥ samāyātodevagandharvacāraṇaiḥ
yoṣitaḥ puṇyarūpāḍhyārūpaśṛṅgārasaṃ yutāḥ
sarvābharaṇaśobhāḍhyāḥ sarvāḥ pūrṇamanorathāḥ
tābhiḥ sahasamakṣaṃ mepuruṣeṇamahātmanā
catuṣkaṃ pūritaṃ ratnaiḥ sarvaśobhāsamanvitam
tatrāhamāsanepuṇyesthāpitābrāhmaṇaiḥ kila

vedamaṅgalagītaistuśāstragītaiś ca puṇyadaiḥ

evamuktvāgatāḥ sarveevaṃ dṛṣṭaṃ mayaivahi
tayāyatkathitaṃ vṛttaṃ samākarṇyamahāmatiḥ
vicintayitvāthatadāsomaśarmāmahāmatiḥ
tasmādgarbhaṃ mahābhāgādadhāravrataśālinī

saṃ dīptaputrasaṃ yuktatejojvālāsamanvitā

athabrahmāsuraiḥ sārddhaṃ samāyātodvijottamaḥ
nāmakṛtvātatodevājagmuḥ sarvemahaujasaḥ
tasya gehemahālakṣmīrdhanadhānyasamākulā
gajāśvamahiṣīgāvaḥ kāṃ canaṃ ratnam eva ca
yathākuberabhavanaṃ śuśubhedhanasaṃ cayaiḥ
dhyānapuṇyādikaṅkarmacakāradvijasattamaḥ
tīrthayātrāṅgatovipronānāpuṇyasamākulaḥ
anyāniyānipuṇyānidānānidvijasattamaḥ
cakāratatramedhāvījñānapuṇyasamanvitaḥ
evaṃ sādhayatedharmaṃ pālayeccapunaḥ punaḥ
vivāhaṅkārayāmāsaharṣeṇamahatākila
putrasya putrāḥ saṃ jātāḥ saguṇālakṣaṇānvitāḥ
sateṣāṃ puṇyakarmāṇisomaśarmācakāraha
pautrāṇāṃ tumahābhāgasteṣāṃ sukhenamodate
sūryatejaḥ pratīkāśaḥ somaśarmāmahāmatiḥ
sācāpiśuśubhedevīsumanāpuṇyamaṅgalaiḥ
putrapautrairmahābhāgādānavrataiś ca saṃ yamaiḥ
atibhātiviśālākṣīpuṇyaiḥ pativratādibhiḥ

sūta uvāca
ekadāvyāsadevo'saubrahmāṇaṃ jagataḥ patim
suvratākhyānakaṃ sarvaṃ papracchātīvavismitaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
pārāśaryamahābhāgaśrūyatāṃ puṇyamuttamam
garbhenārāyaṇaṃ devaṃ dṛṣṭavānpuruṣottamam
śaṅkhacakradharaṃ devaṃ padmanābhaṃ supuṇyadam
dhyāyatecintayetsohigītejṣāneprapāṭhane
krīḍatyevaṃ sadāḍiṃ bhaiḥ sārddhaṃ cabālakottamaḥ
bālakānāṃ svakaṃ nāmahareścaivamahātmanaḥ
cakārasahimedhāvīpuṇyātmāpuṇyavatsalaḥ
samāhvayativaimitraṃ harernāmnāmahāmatiḥ
krīḍasvacamayāsārdhaṃ tvam eva puruṣottama
samam eva ṃ pragaṃ tavyamāvābhyāṃ madhusūdana
evam eva samāhvānaṃ nāmabhiścaharerdvijaḥ
krīḍanepaṭhanehāsyeśayanegītaprekṣaṇe
yānecahyāsanedhyānemaṃ trejṣānesukarmasu
sadhyāyatetam ekaṃ hiviśvanāthaṃ maheśvaram
tṛṇekāṣṭhecapāṣāṇeśuṣkesārdrehikeśavam
paśyatyevaṃ sadharmātmāgoviṃ daṅkamalekṣaṇam
ākāśebhūmimadhyetuparvateṣuvaneṣuca
jalesthalecapāṣāṇejīveṣvevamahāmatiḥ
nṛsiṃ haṃ paśyatevipraḥ suvrataḥ sumanāsutaḥ
bālakrīḍāṃ samāsādyaramatyevaṃ dinedine
gītaiś ca gāyatekṛṣṇaṃ surāgairmadhurākṣaraiḥ
dhyāyanti vedaviduṣaḥ satataṃ surāriṃ yasyāṅgamadhyesakalaṃ hiviśvam
yogeśvaraṃ sakalapāpavināśanaṃ cavrajāmiśaraṇaṃ madhusūdanasya
nārāyaṇaṅguṇanidhānamanaṃ tavīryaṃ vedāṃ taśuddhamatayaḥ prapaṭhanti nityam
saṃ sārasāgaramanaṃ tamagādhadurgamuttāraṇārthamakhilaṃ śaraṇaṃ prapadye
yogīṃ dramānasasarovararājahaṃ saṃ śuddhaṃ prabhāvamakhilaṃ satataṃ hiyasya
gāyāmyahaṃ surasagītakatālamānaiḥ śrīraṅgam ekamaniśaṃ bhuvanasya devam
ajñānanāśakamalaṃ cadineśatulyamānaṃ dakaṃ damakhilaṃ mahimāsametam
saṃ pūrṇam eva mamṛtasya kalānidhānaṃ taṅgītakauśalamananyarasaiḥ pragāye
yuktaṃ svayogakaraṇaiḥ paramārthadṛṣṭiṃ viśvaṃ sapaśyaticarācaram eva nityam
karābhyāṃ vādyamānastutālaṃ tālasamanvitam
gītenagāyatekṛṣṇaṃ bālakaiḥ sahamodate
evaṅkrīḍāratonityaṃ bālabhāvenavaitadā
suvrataḥ sumanāputro viṣṇudhyānaparāyaṇaḥ
krīḍamānaṃ prāhamātāsuvrataṃ cārulakṣaṇam
bhojanaṅkurum eva tsakṣudhātvāṃ paripīḍayet
tām uvācapunaḥ prājṣaḥ sumanāmātaraṃ punaḥ
bhojanāsanamārūḍhomiṣṭamannaṃ prapaśyati
idamannaṃ svayaṃ viṣṇurātmāhyannaṃ samāśritaḥ
ātmarūpeṇayo viṣṇuranenānnenatṛpyatu
kṣīrasāgarasaṃ vāsoyasyaivaparisaṃ sthitaḥ
jalenānenapuṇyenatṛptimāyātukeśavaḥ
ātmasvarūpeṇatṛptastṛptimāyātukeśavaḥ
śayaneyātidharmātmātadākṛṣṇaṃ pracintayet
yoganidrānvitaṅkṛṣṇaṃ tamahaṃ śaraṇaṅgataḥ
bhojanācchādaneṣvevamāsaneśayanedvijaḥ
tāruṇyaṃ prāpyadharmātmākāmabhogānvihāyavai
yatrasiddheśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ vaiṣṇavaṃ pāpanāśanam
rudramoṅkārasaṃ jṣaṃ cadhyātvācaivamaheśvaram
brahmaṇāvarddhitaṃ devaṃ narmadādakṣiṇetaṭe
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe paṣcapaṣcāśatsahasrasaṃhitāyāṃ bhūmikhaṇḍe
aindresumanopākhyāne ekaviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
dvāviṃśatitamo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
praśnam ekaṃ mahābhāgakariṣyesāṃ prataṃ vada
pūrvābhyāsenasaṃ dhyāyannārāyaṇamanāmayam
kasyāṃ jṣātyāṃ samutpannaḥ suvrataḥ pūrvajanmani
tanmetvaṃ sāṃ prataṃ brūhikathamārādhitohariḥ
anenāpisadeveśakoyaṃ puṇyasamāvilaḥ
tatrarājāmahātejāṛtadhvajasutobalī
tasyātmajomahāprājṣorukmabhūṣaṇaviśrutaḥ
saṃ dhyāvalītasya bhāryādharmapatnīyaśasvinī
tasyāṃ putraṃ samutpādyasaātmasadṛśaṃ tataḥ
tasya dharmāṅgadaṃ nāmacakāranṛpanaṃ danaḥ
sarvalakṣaṇasaṃ pannaḥ pitṛbhaktiparāyaṇaḥ
rukmāṅgadasya tanayoyoyaṃ bhagavatāṃ varaḥ
suprasannohṛṣīkeśaḥ sakāyovaiṣṇavaṃ padam
nītastusarvadharmajṣovaiṣṇavaḥ sātvatāṃ varaḥ
dharmāṅgadomahāprājṣaḥ prajṣājñānaviśāradaḥ
tatrasthovaimahāprājṣodharmosaudharmabhūṣaṇaḥ
pūrṇeyugasahasrāṃ tedharmovaidharmabhūṣaṇaḥ
tasmātpadātparibhraṣṭo viṣṇoś caiva prasādataḥ
suvratonāmamedhāvīsumanānaṃ davarddhanaḥ
somaśarmasya tanayaḥ śreṣṭhobhagavatāṃ varaḥ
tapaścacāramedhāvīviṣṇudhyānaparobhavat
ekīkṛtyamanaścāyaṃ saṃ yojyaviṣṇunā saha
evaṃ varṣaśataṃ sthitvādhyānenāsyamahātmanaḥ
tasmaivaraṃ dadāvanyaṃ salakṣmyāsahakeśavaḥ
varaṃ varayabhadraṃ tekṛṣṇo'haṃ tesamāgataḥ
evamākarṇyamedhāvīviṣṇorvākyamanuttamam
harṣeṇamahatāviṣṭodṛṣṭvādevaṃ janārdanam
baddhāṃ jalipuṭobhūtvāpraṇāmamakarottadā
saṃ pūrṇamastinijadoṣaguṇaistuprāptastasmātsamuddharajanārdanamāśudīnam
saṃ sārakānanaghanaṃ bahuduḥkhavṛkṣaiḥ saṃ sevyamānamapimohamayaiś ca siṃ haiḥ
saṃ dīptamastikaruṇābahuvahnitejaḥ saṃ tapyamānamaniśaṃ paripāhikṛṣṇa
saṃ sāravṛkṣamatijīrṇamapīhauccaṃ māyāsukaṃ dakaruṇābahuduḥkhaśākham
jāyādisaṅgacchadanaṃ phalitaṃ murāretatrādhirūḍhapatitaṃ bhagavanhirakṣa
dagdhosmikṛṣṇasatataṃ mamadehimokṣaṃ jṣānāṃ budaiḥ samabhiṣiṃ casadaivamāṃ tvam
ghorāṃ dhakārapaṭalemahatīvagartesaṃ sāranāmnipatitaṃ satataṃ hikṛṣṇa
tvām eva yeniyatamānasabhāvayuktādhyāyanti jñānamanasāpadavīṃ labhaṃ te
kāmaṃ tvam eva mamapūrayamedyakṛṣṇadūreṇayātumamapātakasaṃ cayaste
manmātāpitaraukṛṣṇasakāyaumaṃ direnaya
ātmanaścamahādevamayāsaha na saṃśayaḥ
śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca
evaṃ teparamaṅkāryaṃ bhaviṣyati na saṃśayaḥ
tasya tuṣṭohṛṣīkeśobhaktyātasya pratoṣitaḥ
bhūbhuje bubhuje divyān lokāṃś caiva mahāmate
devakāryārthamatraivakāśyapasya gṛhaṃ punaḥ
avatīrṇomahāprājṣovacanāttasya cakriṇaḥ
aindraṃ padaṃ hiyobhuṅkteviṣṇoś caiva prasādataḥ
aindraṃ padaṃ hiyobhuṅktesāṃ prataṃ vāsavodivi
etat te sarvam ākhyātaṃ sṛṣṭi sambandhakāraṇam
vyāsa uvāca
dharmāṅgado mahāprājṣo rukmāṅgadasuto balī
ādye kṛtayuge jātaḥ sṛṣṭikāle sa vāsavaḥ
anyo rukmāṅgado rājā kiṃ cāyaṃ tridaśādhipaḥ
etan me saṃśayaṃ jātaṃ tad bhavān vaktum arhati
yathāvārāścapakṣāścamāsāścaṛtavoyathā
saṃvatsarāś ca manavas tathā yānti yugāḥ punaḥ
paścātkalpaḥ samāyātivrajāmyevaṃ janārdanam
aham eva mahāprājṣamayiyānti carācarāḥ
punaḥ sṛjatiyogātmāpūrvavadviśvam eva hi
punarahaṃ punarvedāḥ punastedevatādvijāḥ
tathābhūpāścatesarvesvacaritrasamāvilāḥ
pūrvakalpemahābhāgoyathārukmāṅgadonṛpaḥ
tathādharmāṅgadaścāyaṃ saṃ jātaḥ khyātimāndvijaḥ
rāmādayomahāprājṣāyayātirnahuṣastathā
draṃ padaṃ prabhuṃ janti rājānodharmatatparāḥ
evaṃ vedāścadevāścapurāṇāḥ smṛtipūrvakāḥ
avyaktaṃ tumahābhāgaprabravīmitavāgrataḥ
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe paṣcapaṣcāśatsahasrasaṃhitāyāṃ bhūmikhaṇḍedresuvrato
pākhyānaṃ nāmadvāviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
trayoviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
ṛṣaya ūcuḥ
vicitreyaṅkathāpuṇyādhanyāyaśovidhāyinī
sarvapāpaharāproktābhavatāvadatāṃ vara
pūrvam eva yathāsṛṣṭirvistarātsūtanaṃ dana
sūta uvāca
vistareṇapravakṣyāmi sṛṣṭisaṃ hārakāraṇam
śrutamātreṇayasyāpinaraḥ sarvajṣatāṃ vrajet
tapasārādhyaprabahmāṇaṃ varaṃ prāptaṃ sudurlabham
tasmāddevānmahābhāgādamaratvaṃ tathaiva ca
devāṃ ṃ llokānsasaṃ vyāpyaprabhutvaṃ svayamarjitam
tatodevāḥ sagandharvāmunayovedapāragāḥ
nāgāścakinnarāḥ siddhayakṣāścaivatathāpare
brahmāṇaṃ tupuraskṛtyajagmurnārāyaṇaṃ prabhum
kṣīrasāgarasaṃ suptaṃ yoganidrāṅgataṃ prabhum
taṃ sambodhyamahāstotrairdevāḥ prāṃ jalayastathā
ācacakṣurmahāprājṣasamākarṇyajagatpatiḥ
nṛsiṃ harūpamāsthāyahiraṇyakaśipuṃ vyahan
punar vārāharūpeṇa hiraṇyākṣo mahābalaḥ
uddhṛtāvasudhāpuṇyāasuroghātitastadā
anyāṃ ścaghātayāmāsadānavānghoradarśanān
evaṃ caiteṣunaṣṭeṣudānaveṣumahatsuca
anyeṣuteṣunaṣṭeṣuditiputreṣuvaitadā
punaḥ sthāneṣuprāpteṣudeveṣucamahatsuca
sustheṣusarvalokeṣusāditirduḥkhapīḍitā
putraśokenasaṃ taptāhāhābhūtāvicetanā
bhartāraṃ sūryasaṅkāśaṃ tapastejaḥ samanvitam
dātāraṃ camahātmānaṃ bhartāraṅkaśyapaṃ tadā
bhagavannaṣṭaputrāhaṅkṛtādevenacakriṇā
daiteyādānavāḥ sarvedevaiś ca ivanipātitāḥ
putraśokānalenāhaṃ saṃ taptāmunisattama
subalaṃ cārusarvāṅgaṃ devarājasamaprabham
buddhimaṃ taṃ susarvajṣaṃ jṣātāraṃ sarvapaṇḍitam
tapastejaḥ samāyuktaṃ sabalaṃ cārulakṣaṇam
brahmaṇyaṃ jñānavettāraṃ devabrāhmaṇapūjakam
jetāraṃ sarvalokānāṃ mamānaṃ dakaraṃ dvija
evamākarṇyavaitasyāḥ kaśyapovākyamuttamam
kṛpāviṣṭamanāstuṣṭoduḥkhitāyādvijottama
tām uvācamahābhāgakṛpaṇāṃ dīnamānasām
tasyāḥ śirasisaṃ nyasya svahastaṃ bhāvatatparaḥ
bhaviṣyatimahābhāgeyādṛśovāṃ chitaḥ sutaḥ
sāditiḥ sarvadharmajṣācārukarmāmanasvinī
śatavarṣapramāṇaṃ sāśucisvāṃ tābabhūva ha
athakaśyapaāyātoharṣeṇamahatānvitaḥ
balamityabravītputraṃ nāmataḥ sadṛśomahān
evaṃ nāmacakārāthavratabandhaṃ cakārasaḥ
evaṃ varṣaśataṃ sāgraṅgataṃ tasya tapasya taḥ
mātuḥ samakṣamāyātastapastejaḥ samanvitaḥ
ditiḥ paśyatiputrasya harṣeṇamahatānvitā
tam uvācamahātmānaṃ balaṃ putraṃ tapasvinam
medhāvinaṃ mahātmānaṃ prajṣājñānaviśāradam
hiraṇyakaśipādyāsteyehatāścakrapāṇinā
sādanustam uvācedaṃ balaṃ putraṃ mahābalam
ādāvindraṃ hidevendraṃ drutaṃ sūdayaputraka
paścāddevānipātyaṃ tāṃ tatogaruḍavāhanaḥ
tayorākarṇyasādevīaditiḥ patidevatā
duḥkhenamahatāviṣṭāputramindramabhāṣata
devānāṃ hivadhārthāyatapastepeniraṃ jane
evamākarṇyatadvākyaṃ samātuḥ pākaśāsanaḥ
ciṃ tāmavāpaduḥkhenamahatīṃ devarāṭtadā
mahābhayenasaṃ trastaścintayāmāsavaitataḥ
ekadāhibalaḥ sopisaṃ dhyārthaṃ siṃ dhumāśritaḥ
kṛṣṇājinenadivyenadaṇḍakāṣṭhenarājitaḥ
sāgarasyopakaṃ ṭhetaṃ saṃ dhyāsanamupāgatam
japamānaṃ suśāṃ taṃ taṃ dadṛśepākaśāsanaḥ
balaṃ nipatitaṃ dṛṣṭvāgatasatvaṅgataṃ bhuvi
harṣeṇamahatāviṣṭodevarāṇmumudetadā
rājyaṃ cakāradharmātmāsukhenapākaśāsanaḥ
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe paṣcapaṣcāśatsahasrasaṃhitāyāṃ bhūmikhaṇḍebala
daityavadhonāmatrayoviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
caturviṃśatitamo'dhyāyaḥ
sūta uvāca
hataṃ śrutvāditiḥ putraṃ subalaṃ balam eva ca
ruditaṅkaruṇaṅkṛtvāhāhākaṣṭaṃ bhṛśaṃ mama
evaṃ sukaruṇaṅkṛtvābahukālaṃ tapasvinī
sāgatākaśyapaṅkāṃ taṃ tam uvācayaśasvinī
tavaputromahāpāpaindraḥ suragaṇeśvaraḥ
sāgaropagataṃ dṛṣṭvābalaṃ mebrahmalakṣaṇam
vajreṇaghātayāmāsasaṃ dhyāmāsyaṃ tam eva hi
evaṃ śrutvātataḥ kruddhomarīcitanayastadā
krodhenamahatāviṣṭaḥ prajajvālevavahninā
avaluṃ cyajaṭām ekāṃ śucyagnausadvijottamaḥ
tasmātkuṇḍātsamutpannohutāśanamukhādapi
kṛṣṇāṃ janacayopetaḥ piṅgākṣobhīṣaṇākṛtiḥ
daṃ ṣṭrākarālavaktrāṃ tojagatāṃ bhayadāyakaḥ
sarvāṅgatejasādīptomahāmeghopamobalī
uvācakaśyapaṃ vipramādeśomamadīyatām
kasmādutpāditoviprabhavatākāraṇaṃ vada
tamahaṃ sādhayiṣyāmiprasādāttavasuvrata
kaśyapa uvāca
adityāstvaṃ mahāprājṣajahiindraṃ durātmakam
evaṃ tenasamādiṣṭaḥ kaśyapenamahātmanā
balaṃ vīryaṃ tathākṣātraṃ tejodhairyasamanvitam
dṛṣṭvāhitasya daityasya sahasrākṣobhayāturaḥ
upāyaṃ cinti taṃ tasya vṛtrasyāpidurātmanaḥ
vadhārthaṃ devadevenasamāhūyamahāmunīn
saptarṣīnpreṣayāmāsavṛtraṃ daityeśvaraṃ prati
saṃ dhiṅkurvaṃ tuvaitenasārddhaṃ mamamunīśvarāḥ
evaṃ tenasamādiṣṭāmunayaḥ saptatetadā
vṛtrāsuraṃ tataḥ procuḥ sahasrākṣapracālitāḥ
ṛṣayaḥ saptatattvajṣāūcurvṛtraṃ mahābalam
sahasrākṣomahāprājṣobhavatāsahasattama
vṛtra uvāca
satyamāśrityacaivāhaṅkariṣyenātrasaṃśayaḥ
brahmahatyādikaiḥ pāpairlipyehaṃ nātrasaṃśayaḥ
brahmahatyādikaiḥ pāpairlipyehaṃ nātrasaṃśayaḥ
ity uvācamahāprājṣatvām eva ṃ sapuraṃ daraḥ
vṛtra uvāca
bhavatāṃ śiṣṭamārgeṇasatyenānenatasya ca
maitram eva ṅkariṣyāmitenasārddhaṃ dvijottamāḥ
vṛtramindrasya saṃ sthānaṃ nītaṃ brāhmaṇapuṅgavaiḥ
indrastamāgataṃ dṛṣṭvāvṛtraṃ mitrārthamudyataḥ
siṃ hāsanātsamutthāyaarghamādāyasatvaraḥ
evaṃ viśvāsayandaityaṃ vṛtramaitreṇavaitadā
chidraṃ paśyatiduṣṭātmāvṛtrasyāpisadaivahi
raṃ bhāsaṃ preṣitātenamohayasvamahāsuram
tathākuruṣvakalyāṇisaṃ mohāyasuradviṣaḥ
vanaṃ puṇyaṃ mahādivyaṃ puṇyapādapasevitam
bahuvṛkṣaphalopetaṃ mṛgapakṣisamākulam
kokilānāṃ rutaiḥ puṇyaiḥ sarvatramadhurāyataiḥ
śikhisāraṅganādaiś ca sarvatrasusamākulam
vāpīkuṇḍataḍāgaiś ca jalapūrṇairmanoharaiḥ
kamalaiḥ śatapatraiś ca puṣpitaiḥ samalaṅkṛtam
apsarogaṇasaṅkīrṇaṃ nānākautukamaṅgalaiḥ
hemaprāsāda sambādhaṃ daṇḍacchatraiś ca cāmaraiḥ
kalaśaiś ca patākābhiḥ sarvatrasamalaṅkṛtam
vedadhvanisamākīrṇaṅgītadhvanisamākulam
evaṃ naṃ danamāsādyasāraṃ bhācāruhāsinī
apsarobhiḥ samaṃ tatrakrīḍatyevaṃ vilāsinī
sūta uvāca
ekadātusavṛtrovaikālākṛṣṭogatovanam
katibhirdānavaiḥ sārddhaṃ mudayāparayāyutaḥ
devarājopiviprendraiśchadrānveṣīdviṣāṅkila
sahivṛtromahāprājṣoviśvastaḥ sarvakarmasu
caṃ danasyāpivṛkṣasya chāyāṃ śītāṃ supuṇyadām
samāśrityaviśālākṣīraṃ bhātatrapradīvyati
sakhībhistumahābhāgādolārūḍhāyaśasvinī
tatravṛtraḥ samāyātaḥ kāmākulitamānasaḥ
dolārūḍhāṃ samālokyaraṃ bhāṃ cārusulocanām
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe paṣcapaṣcāśatsahasrasaṃhitāyāṃ bhūmikhaṇḍevṛtra
vaṃ canaṃ nāmacaturviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
paṣcaviṃśatitamo'dhyāyaḥ
sūta uvāca
iyaṃ hikāgāyaticārulocanāvilāsabhāvaiḥ pariviśvam eva
atīvabālāśuśubhemanoharāsaṃ pūrṇabhāvaiḥ parimohayejjanam
dṛṣṭvāsaraṃ bhāṅkamalāyatākṣīṃ pīnastanīṃ carcitakuṅkumāṅgīm
padmānanāṅkāmagṛhaṃ mamaiṣānovāratiścārumanohareyam
saṃ pūrṇabhāvāṃ parirūpayuktāṅkāmāṅgaśīlāmatiśīlabhāvām
samāturastatrajagāmasatvaram uvācatāṃ dīnamanāḥ sulocanām
evamuktāviśālākṣīvṛtraṅkāmākulaṃ prati
ahaṃ raṃ bhāmahābhāgakrīḍārthaṃ vanamuttamam
sakhīsārdhaṃ samāyātānaṃ danaṃ vanamuttamam
tvaṃ tukovākimarthaṃ himamapārśvaṃ samāgataḥ
vṛtra uvāca
śrūyatāmabhidhāsyāmiyohaṃ bālesamāgataḥ
hutāśanātsamutpannaḥ kaśyapasya sutaḥ śubhe
ahaṃ vṛtraḥ kathaṃ devimām eva ṃ natuviṃ dasi
trailokyaṃ vaśamāyātaṃ yasyaivavaravarṇini
ahaṃ śaraṇamāyātaḥ kāmādrakṣavarānane
bhajasvamāṃ viśālākṣikāmenākulitaṃ priye
raṃ bhovāca
vaśagāhaṃ tavaivādyabhaviṣyāmi na saṃśayaḥ
yaṃ yaṃ vadāmyahaṃ vīrataṃ taṅkāryaṃ tvayaivahi
evaṃ sambandhakaṅkṛtvātayāsahamahābalaḥ
tam uvācamahābhāgaṃ vṛtraṃ dānavasattamam
surāpānaṅkuruṣvehapibasvamadhumādhavīm
tām uvācaviśālākṣīṃ raṃ bhāṃ śaśinibhānanām
putrohaṃ brāhmaṇasyāpivedavedāṅgapāragaḥ
surāpānaṅkathaṃ bhadrekariṣyamiviniṃ ditam
tayāturaṃ bhayādevyāprītyādattāsurāhaṭhāt
tasyādākṣiṇyabhāvenasurāpānaṅkṛtaṃ tadā
atīvamugdhaṃ surayājñānabhraṣṭoyadābhavat
brahmahatyādikaiḥ pāpaiḥ saliptovṛtrahātataḥ
brāhmaṇāstutataḥ procurindrapāpaṅkṛtaṃ tvayā
asmādvākyāttuviśvastovṛtronāmamahābalaḥ
hatoviśvāsabhāvenaevaṃ pāpaṃ tvayākṛtam
devabrāhmaṇahaṃ tāraṃ yajṣānāṃ dharmakaṃ ṭakam
nihataṃ dānavaṃ duṣṭaṃ trailokyasyāpināyakam
tadarthaṅkupitāyūyametannyāyasya lakṣaṇam
paścātkopaṃ prakarttavyamanyāyaṃ mamaciṃ tyatām
evaṃ sambodhitāviprāindreṇāpimahātmanā
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe bhūmikhaṇḍevṛtrāsuravadhonāmapaṣcaviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
ṣaḍviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
sūta uvāca
taṃ putraṃ nihataṃ śrutvāsāditirduḥkhapīḍitā
punarūcemahātmānaṅkaśyapaṃ munipuṅgavam
putraikaṃ dīyatāṅkāṃ tasupriyāhaṃ yadāvibho
kaśyapa uvāca
aghamāśrityadevenaindreṇāpidurātmanā
varṣāṇāṃ tuśataikaṃ tvaṃ śucirbhavayaśasvini
evamuktvāsayogīṃ drohastaṃ śirasivaitadā
tapastatāpasādevītapovananivāsinī
śuciṣmatīsadābhūtvāputrārthādvijasattama
tatodevaḥ sahasrākṣojṣātvāudyamam eva ca
dityāścaivamahābhāgaaṃ taraprekṣako'bhavat
paṣcaviṃ śābdikobhūtvādevarāḍdaivatopamaḥ
brāhmaṇasya carūpeṇatasyāścānti kagataḥ
satāṃ praṇamyadharmātmāmātaraṃ tapasānvitām
tām uvācasahasrākṣaḥ putro'haṃ tavaśobhane
brāhmaṇovedavidvāṃ ścadharmaṃ jānāmibhāmini
tapasastavasāhāyyaṅkariṣyenātrasaṃśayaḥ
śuśrūṣatisatāṃ devīṃ mātaraṃ tapasānvitām
tamindraṃ sānajānātiāgataṃ duṣṭakāriṇam
dharmaputraṃ vijānātiśuśrūṣaṃ taṃ dinedine
aṅgaṃ saṃ vāhayeddevyāḥ pādauprakṣālayettataḥ
bhaktyāsaṃ toṣitātasya saṃ tuṣṭātamabhāṣata
tasyāścaivāṃ taraṃ prepsurabhavatpākaśāsanaḥ
ūnevarṣaśatecāsyādadarśāṃ taramacyutaḥ
akṛtvāpādayoḥ śaucaṃ ditiḥ śayanamāviśat
śayyāṃ tesāśiraḥ kṛtvāmuktakeśātivihvalā
nidrāmāhārayāmāsatasyāḥ kukṣiṃ praviśyaha
vajrapāṇistatogarbhaṃ saptadhātaṃ nyakṛṃ tata
vajreṇatīkṣṇadhāreṇarurodaudaresthitaḥ
rodamānaṃ mahāgarbhaṃ tam uvācapunaḥ punaḥ
śatakraturmahātejāmārodīrityabhāṣata
saptadhākṛtavāṣchakrastaṅgarbhaṃ ditijaṃ punaḥ
ekaikaṃ saptadhācchittvārudamānaṃ sadevarāṭ
ativīryamahākāyāstīvratejaḥ parākramāḥ
ekonāvaibabhūvustepaṃ cāśanmarutastataḥ
marutonāmatekhyātāindram eva samāśritāḥ
bhūtānām eva sarveṣāṃ rocayanti gaṇaṃ mahat
nikāyeṣunikāyeṣuhariḥ prādātprajāpatiḥ
kramaśastānirājyānipṛthupūrvāṇitānivai
sadevaḥ puruṣaḥ kṛṣṇaḥ sarvavyāpījagadguruḥ
tapojiṣṇurmahātejāḥ sarvaekaḥ prajāpatiḥ
parjanyaḥ pāvakaḥ puṇyaḥ sarvātmāsarva eva hi
imāṃ sṛṣṭiṃ mahāpuṇyāṃ sarvapāpaharāṃ śubhām
yaḥ śṛṇotinarobhaktyāsarvapāpaiḥ pramucyate
yaḥ śṛṇotiimāṃ sṛṣṭiṃ sayātiparamāṅgatim
sarvapāpaviśuddhātmāviṣṇulokaṃ sa gacchati
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe bhūmikhaṇḍemarudutpattirnāmaṣaḍviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
saptaviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
sūta uvāca
mahābāhuṃ mahākāyaṃ yathendraṃ casureśvaram
krameṇāpitatobrahmārājyānicavicāryavai
vṛkṣāṇāṃ brāhmaṇānāṃ cagraharkṣāṇāṃ tathaiva ca
somaṃ rājyesobhyaṣiṃ cattapasāṃ camahāmatiḥ
dharmāṇāṃ dharmayajṣānāṃ puṇyānāṃ puṇyatejasām
apāṃ madhyetathādevaṃ tīrthānāṃ hitathaiva ca
varuṇaṃ sobhiṣicyaivaratnānāṃ cadvijottama
anyeṣāṃ sarvayakṣāṇāṃ rājyevaiśravaṇaṃ punaḥ
viṣṇum eva mahāprājṣamādityānāṃ pitāmahaḥ
rājyesaṃ sthāpayāmāsajanatāhitahetave
sarveṣām eva puṇyānāṃ dakṣam eva prajāpatim
daityānāṃ dānavānāṃ caviṣṇutejaḥ samanvitam
yakṣarākṣasabhūtānāṃ piśācoragasarpiṇām
yoginīnāṃ casarvāsāṃ vaitālānāṃ mahātmanām
kaṅkālānāṃ hisarveṣāṅkūṣmāṇḍānāṃ tathaiva ca
pārthivānāṃ casarveṣāṅgiriśaṃ śūlapāṇinam
parvatānāṃ hisarveṣāṃ himavaṃ taṃ mahāgirim
nadīnāṃ cataḍāgānāṃ vāpikānāṃ tathaiva ca
kuṇḍānāṅkūparājyehidivyeṣucasureśvaraḥ
sāgaraṃ sthāpitaṃ puṇyaṃ sarvatīrthamanuttamam
gandharvāṇāṃ tusarveṣāṃ rājyepuṇyetathaiva ca
nāgānāṃ puṇyavīryāṇāṃ vāsukiṃ cacaturmukhaḥ
sarpāṇāṃ tutathārājyeabhiṣicyasatakṣakam
vāraṇānāṃ tatorājyerāvaṇamasiṃ cata
aśvānāṃ caivasarveṣāmuccaiḥ śravasam eva ca
pakṣiṇāṃ caivasarveṣāvainateyamathāpisaḥ
mṛgāṇāṃ catatorājyebrahmāsiṃ hamathādiśat
govṛṣaṃ tugavāṃ madhyeabhiṣicyaprajāpatiḥ
vanaspatīnāṃ sarveṣāṃ plakṣam eva pitāmahaḥ
evaṃ rājyānisarvāṇisaṃ sthāpyacapitāmahaḥ
diśāpālāṃ statobrahmāsthāpayāmāsasattamaḥ
vairājasya tathāputraṃ pūrvasyāṃ diśisattamaḥ
sudhanvānaṃ diśaḥ pālaṃ rājānaṃ sobhyaṣiṃ cata
dakṣiṇasyāṃ mahātmānaṅkardamasya prajāpateḥ
putraṃ śaṅkhapadaṃ nāmarājānaṃ sobhyaṣiṃ cata
paścimāyāṃ tathābrahmāvaruṇasya prajāpateḥ
putraṃ capuṣkaraṃ nāmaso'bhyaṣiṃ catprajāpatiḥ
evaṃ caivābhyaṣiṃ caccadikpālānsamahaujasaḥ
yairiyaṃ pṛthivīsarvāsaptadvīpāsapattanā
pṛthuś caivaṃ mahābhāgaḥ sobhiṣiktonarādhipaḥ
rājasūyādibhiḥ sarvairabhiṣiktomahāmakhaiḥ
vidhināvedadṛṣṭenarājarājyemahīpatiḥ
cākṣuṣenāmnisaṃ puṇyeatītecamahaujasi
manvaṃ taremahābhāgadevapuṇyahitaiṣiṇi
vistaraṃ cāpi vyākhyāsye pṛthoś caiva mahātmanaḥ
yadi mām eva viprendra śuśrūṣasi atandritaḥ
etad evam adhiṣṭhānaṃ mahatpuṇyaṃ prakīrtitam
sarveṣvevapurāṇeṣuetaddhiniścitaṃ sadā
puṇyaṃ yaśasya māyuṣyaṃ svargavāsakaraṃ śubham
dhanyaṃ pavitramāyuṣyaṃ putradaṃ vṛddhidāyakam
yaḥ śṛṇotinarobhaktyābhāvadhyānasamanvitaḥ
aśvamedhaphalaṃ tasya jāyatenātrasaṃśayaḥ
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe paṣcapaṣcāśatsahasrasaṃhitāyāṃ
bhūmikhaṇḍe rājyābhiṣeko nāma
saptaviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
aṣṭāviṃśatitamo'dhyāyaḥ
ṛṣaya ūcuḥ
pṛthoścaivamahābhāgaśrotukāmāvayaṃ punaḥ
rājṣātenayathādugdhāiyaṃ dhātrīmahātmanā
yathādaityaiś ca nāgaiś ca yathāyakṣairyathādrumaiḥ
śailaiś ca iva piśācaiś ca gandharvaiḥ puṇyakarmabhiḥ
brāhmaṇaiś ca tathāsiddhairākṣasairbhīmavikramaiḥ
teṣām eva hisarveṣāṃ viśeṣaṃ pātradhāraṇam
kṣīrasyāpividhiṃ brūhiviśeṣaṃ camahāmate
venasyāpinṛpasyaivapāṇirevamahātmanaḥ
ṛṣibhirmathitaḥ pūrvaṃ sakasmādihakāraṇāt
vicitreyaṅkathāpuṇyāsarvapāpapraṇāśinī
śrotukāmāmahābhāgatṛptirnaivaprajāyate
sūta uvāca
janmavīryaṃ tathākṣetraṃ pauruṣaṃ dvijasattamāḥ
pravakṣyāmi yathāsarvaṃ caritraṃ tasya dhīmataḥ
śuśrūṣadhvaṃ mahābhāgāmām eva ṃ dvijasattamāḥ
abhaktāyanavaktavyamaśraddhāyaśaṭhāyaca
sumūrkhāyasumohāyakuśiṣyāyatathaiva ca
śraddhāhīnāyakūṭāyasarvanāśāyamādvijāḥ
bhavaṃ tobhāvasaṃ yuktāḥ satyadharmaparāyaṇāḥ
bhavatāmagrataḥ sarvaṃ caritraṃ pāpanāśanam
saṃ pravakṣyāmyaśeṣeṇaśṛṇudhvaṃ dvijasattamāḥ
svargyaṃ yaśasya māyuṣyaṃ dhanyaṃ vedaiś ca saṃ mitam
rahasya mṛṣibhiḥ proktaṃ pravakṣyāmi dvijottamāḥ
brāhmaṇebhyonamaskṛtvānasaśocetkṛtākṛtam
saptajanmārjitaṃ pāpaṃ śrutamātreṇanaśyati
brāhmaṇovedavidvāṃ ścakṣatriyovijayībhavet
vaiśyodhanasamṛddhaḥ syācchūdraḥ sukhamavāpnuyāt
evaṃ phalaṃ samāpnotipaṭhanācchravaṇādapi
pṛthorjanmacaritraṃ capavitraṃ pāpanāśanam
dharmagoptāmahāprājṣovedaśāstrārthakovidaḥ
sraṣṭāsarvasya dharmasya aṅgonāmaprajāpatiḥ
mṛtyoḥ kanyāmahābhāgāsunīthānāmanāmataḥ
tāṃ tuaṅgomahābhāgaḥ sunīthāmupayemivān
tasyām utpādayāmāsavenaṃ dharmapraṇāśanam
mātāmahasya doṣeṇavenaḥ kālātmajātmajaḥ
kāmāllobhānmahāmohātpāpam eva samācarat
vedācāramayaṃ dharmaṃ parityajyanarādhipaḥ
vedādhyāyaṃ vinālokeprāvartaṃ tatadājanāḥ
niḥ svādhyāyavaṣaṭkārāḥ prajāstasminprajāpatau
pravṛttaṃ napapuḥ somaṃ hutaṃ yajṣeṣudevatāḥ
ity uvācasaduṣṭātmābrāhmaṇānpratinityaśaḥ
āsītpratijṣākrūreyaṃ vināśepratyupasthite
ahamijyaścayaṣṭācayajṣaścetipunaḥ punaḥ
ityabravītsadāvenohyahaṃ viṣṇuḥ sanātanaḥ
ahaṃ brahmāahaṃ rudromitraindraḥ sadāgatiḥ
aham eva prabhoktācahavyaṅkavyaṃ na saṃśayaḥ
athatemunayaḥ kruddhāvenaṃ pratimahābalāḥ
ūcustesaṅgatāḥ sarverājānaṃ pāpacetanam
ṛṣaya ūcuḥ
rājāhipṛthivīnāthaḥ prajāṃ pālayatesadā
vayaṃ dīkṣāṃ pravekṣyāmoyajṣedvādaśavārṣikīm
adharmaṅkurumāyāgenaiṣadharmaḥ satāṅgatiḥ
kurudharmaṃ mahārājasatyaṃ puṇyaṃ samācara
prajāhaṃ pālayiṣyāmiititesamayaḥ kṛtaḥ
tāṃ stathābruvataḥ sarvānmaharṣīnabravīttadā
sraṣṭādharmasya kaścānyaḥ śrotavyaṅkasya vāmayā
śrutavīryatapaḥ satyemayāvākaḥ samobhuvi
prabhavaṃ sarvabhūtānāṃ dharmāṇāṃ caviśeṣataḥ
saṃ mūḍhānavidurnūnaṃ bhavaṃ tomāṃ vicetasaḥ
icchandaheyaṃ pṛthivīṃ plāvayeyaṃ jalaistathā
dyāṃ bhuvaṃ caivaruṃ dheyaṃ nātrakāryāvicāraṇā
apanetuṃ tadāvenaṃ tataḥ kruddhāmaharṣayaḥ
visphuraṃ taṃ tadāvenaṃ balādgṛhyatatoruṣā
kṛṣṇāṃ janacayopetamatihrasvaṃ vilakṣaṇam
dīrghāsyaṃ cavirūpākṣaṃ nīlakaṃ cukavarcasam
laṃ bodaraṃ vyūḍhakarṇamatibhītaṃ durodaram
dadṛśustemahātmānoniṣīdetyabruvaṃ stataḥ
teṣāṃ tadvacanaṃ śrutvāniṣasādabhayāturaḥ
parvateṣuvaneṣvevatasya vaṃ śaḥ pratiṣṭhitaḥ
niṣādāścakirātāścabhillānāhalakāstathā
bhramarāścapuliṃ dāścayecānyemlecchajātayaḥ
pāpācārāstutesarvetasmādaṅgātprajajṣire
gatakalmaṣam eva ṃ taṃ jātaṃ venaṃ nṛpottamam
mamaṃ thurdakṣiṇaṃ pāṇiṃ tasyaiva ca mahātmanaḥ
punarmamaṃ thusteviprādakṣiṇaṃ pāṇim eva ca
sukarātpuruṣojajṣedvādaśādityasannibhaḥ
taptakāṃ canavarṇāṅgodivyamālyāṃ barāvṛtaḥ
divyābharaṇaśobhāṅgodivyagaṃ dhānulepanaḥ
mukuṭenārkavarṇenakuṇḍalābhyāṃ virājate
mahākāyomahābāhūrūpeṇāpratimobhuvi
khaḍgabāṇadharodhanvīkavacīcamahāprabhuḥ
sarvalakṣaṇasaṃ pannaḥ sarvālaṅkārabhūṣaṇaḥ
tejasārūpabhāvenasuvarṇaiś ca mahāmatiḥ
tasmiṣjātemahābhāgedevāścaṛṣayomalāḥ
dīpyamānaḥ svavapuṣāsākṣādagnirivojjvalaḥ
ādyamājagavaṃ nāmadhanurgṛhyamahāvaram
śarāndivyāṃ ścarakṣārthekavacaṃ camahāprabham
jātesatimahābhāgepṛthauvīremahātmani
saṃ prahraṣṭānibhūtānisamastānidvijottama
sarvatīrthānitoyānipuṇyānivividhānica
pitāmahādyādevāstubhūtānivividhānica
sthāvarāṇicarāṇyevaabhyaṣiṃ cannarādhipam
mahāvīraṃ prajāpālaṃ pṛthum eva dvijottama
rājṣāṃ samadhirājyevaipṛthurvainyaḥ pratāpavān
tasya pitrāprajāḥ sarvāḥ kadānaivānuraṃ jitāḥ
anurāgāttasya vīrasya nāmarājetyajāyata
durgaṃ mārgaṃ vilopyaivasumārgaṃ parvatādaduḥ
akṛṣṭapacyāpṛthivīsarvatrakāmadhenavaḥ
parjanyaḥ kāmavarṣīcavedayajṣānmahotsavān
kurvanti brāhmaṇāḥ sarvekṣatriyāścatathāpare
sarvakāmaphalāvṛkṣāstasmiṣchāsatipārthive
nadurbhikṣaṃ nacavyādhirnākālamaraṇaṃ nṛṇām
sarvesukhenajīvanti lokādharmaparāyaṇāḥ
tasmiṣchāsatidurdharṣerājarājemahātmani
sūtasūtyāṃ samutpannaḥ saumyehanimahātmani
tasminnevamahāyajṣejajṣeprājṣo'thamāgadhaḥ
pṛthoḥ stavārthaṃ tautatrasamāhūtaumaharṣibhiḥ
sūtasya lakṣaṇaṃ vakṣyemahāpuṇyaṃ dvijottamāḥ
śikhāsūtreṇasaṃ yuktovedādhyayanatatparaḥ
sarvaśāstrārthavettāsāvagnihotramupāsate
dānādhyayanasaṃ pannobrahmācāraparāyaṇaḥ
devānāṃ brāhmaṇānāṃ capūjanābhirataḥ sadā
brahmācāraparonityaṃ sambandhaṃ brāhmaṇaiḥ saha
baṃ dinaścāraṇāḥ sarvebrahmācāravivarjitāḥ
jṣeyāstecamahābhāgāḥ stāvakāḥ prabhavanti te
stavanārthamubhausṛṣṭaunipuṇausūtamāgadhau
tāvūcurṛṣayaḥ sarvestūyatāmeṣapārthivaḥ
karmaitadanurūpaṣcayādṛśoyaṃ narādhipaḥ
tāvūcatustadāsarvāṃ stānṛṣīnbaṃ dimāgadhau
āvāṃ devānṛṣīṃś caiva prīṇayāvaḥ svakarmabhiḥ
nacāsyavidvovaikarmanatathālakṣaṇaṃ yaśaḥ
karmaṇāyenakuryāvaḥ stotramasya mahātmanaḥ
jānīvastannavipreṃ drāavijṣātaguṇasya hi
kṛtavānyānikarmāṇipṛthurevamahāyaśāḥ
ūcustemunayaḥ sarveguṇāndivyānmahātmanaḥ
satyavāṣjñānasaṃ pannobuddhimānkhyātavikramaḥ
sadāśūroguṇagrāhīpuṇyavāṃ styāgavānguṇī
dhārmikaḥ satyavādīcayajṣānāṃ yājakottamaḥ
priyavāksatyavādīcadhānyavāndhanavānguṇī
guṇajṣaḥ saguṇagrāhīdharmajṣaḥ satyavatsalaḥ
prajṣāvānsusvaraścaivavedavedāṅgapāragaḥ
dhātāgoptāprajānāṃ savijayīsamarāṅgaṇe
rājasūyādikānāṃ tuyajṣānāṃ rājasattamaḥ
eteguṇāasya cāṅgebhaviṣyanti mahātmanaḥ
ṛṣibhistauniyuktautukurvāṇausūtamāgadhau
guṇaiś ca ivabhaviṣyaiś ca stotraṃ tasya mahātmanaḥ
tadāprabhṛtivailokāstavaistuṣṭāmahāmate
purataścabhaviṣyanti dātāraḥ stāvanairguṇaiḥ
āśīrvādāḥ prayujyaṃ teteṣāṃ draviṇamuttamam
cāraṇāyatataḥ prādāttailaṅgaṃ deśamuttamam
pṛthuḥ prasādāddharmātmāhaihayaṃ deśam eva ca
revātīrepuraṅkṛtvāsvanāmnānṛpanaṃ danaḥ
brāhmaṇebhyodvijaśreṣṭhayajandātāpṛthuḥ purā
sarvajṣaṃ sarvadātāraṃ dharmavīryaṃ narottamam
taṃ dadṛśuḥ prajāḥ sarvāmunayaścatapomalāḥ
ūcuḥ parasparaṃ puṇyāeṣarājāmahāmatiḥ
devādīnāṃ vṛttidātāasmākaṃ caviśeṣataḥ
prajānāṃ pālakaścaivavṛttidohibhaviṣyati
iyaṃ dhātrīmahāprājṣāuptaṃ bījaṃ purākila
jīvanārthaṃ prajābhistugrāsayitvāsthirābhavat
tataḥ pṛthuṃ dvijaśreṣṭhaprajāḥ samabhidudruvuḥ
vidhatsvetisuvṛttiṃ nomunīnāṃ vacanaṃ tadā
grāsayitvātadānnānipṛthvījātāsuniścalā
bhayaṃ prajānāṃ sumahatsadṛṣṭvārājasattamaḥ
maharṣivacanātsopipragṛhyasaśaraṃ dhanuḥ
kauṃ jaraṃ rūpamāsthāyabhayāttasya tumedinī
vaneṣudurgadeśeṣuguptābhūtvācacārasā
napaśyatimahāprājṣaḥ kurūpaṃ dvijasattamāḥ
ācacakṣurmahāprājṣaṅkuJjaraṃ rūpamāsthitā
tataḥ kuJjararūpāṃ tāmabhidudrāvapārthivaḥ
tāḍyamānācasātenaniśitairmārgaṇaistataḥ
harirūpaṃ samāsthāyapalāyanaparābhavat
harerūpaṃ samāsthāyaabhidudrāvapārthivaḥ
sotikruddhomahāprājṣoroṣāruṇasulocanaḥ
subāṇairniśitaistīkṣṇairājaghānasamedinīm
ākulavyākulājātābāṇāghātahatātadā
māhiṣaṃ rūpamāsthāyapalāyanaparābhavat
abhyadhāvatavegenabāṇapāṇirdhanurdharaḥ
sāgaurbhūtvādvijaśreṣṭhāsvargam eva gatādhruvam
brahmaṇaḥ śaraṇaṃ prāptāviṣṇoś caivamahātmanaḥ
rudrādīnāṃ cadevānāṃ trāṇasthānaṃ naviṃ dati
alabhaṃ tībhṛśaṃ trāṇaṃ vainyamevānvaviṃ data
tasya pārśvaṃ punaḥ prāptābāṇaghātasamākulā
baddhāṃ jalipuṭābhūtvātaṃ pṛthuṃ vākyamabravīt
trāhitrāhītirājendrasārājānamabhāṣata
ahaṃ dhātrīmahābhāgasarvādhārāvasuṃ dharā
kṛtāṃ jalipuṭābhūtvāpūjyālokaistribhiḥ sadā
uvācacainaṃ rājānamavadhyāstrīsadānṛpa
strīṇāṃ vadhemahatpāpaṃ dṛṣṭamastidvijottamaiḥ
gavāṃ vadhemahatpāpaṃ dṛṣṭamastidvijottamaiḥ
mayāvināmahārājakathaṃ dhārayaseprajāḥ
ahaṃ yadāsthirārājaṃ stadālokāścarācarāḥ
māṃ vinātuimelokāvinaśyeyuścarācarāḥ
tataḥ prajāvinaśyeyurmamanāśesamāgate
kathaṃ dhārayitācāsiprajārājanmayāvinā
mayilokāḥ sthirārājanmayedaṃ dhāryatejagat
madvināśevinaśyeyuḥ prajāḥ sarvā na saṃśayaḥ
namāmarhasivaihaṃ tuṃ śreyaścettvaṃ cikīrṣasi
prajānāṃ pṛthivīpālaśṛṇudevavacomama
upāyaiś ca mahābhāgasusiddhiṃ yāṃ tyupakramāḥ
samālokyahyupāyaṃ tvaṃ prajāyenadhariṣyati
māṃ hatvātvaṃ mahārājadhāraṇepālanesadā
poṣaṇecamahāprājṣamadvināhikathaṃ nṛpa
dhariṣyasiprajāṃ cemāṅkopaṃ yacchatvamātmanaḥ
annamayībhaviṣyāmidhariṣyāmiprajāmimām
ahaṃ nārīavadhyācaprāyaścittībhaviṣyasi
evaṃ nānāvidhair vākyair ukto dhātryā narādhipaḥ
evam uktas tayā rājā pṛthur vainyaḥ prajāpatiḥ
tām uvāca mahābhāgāṃ dharitrīṃ dvijasattamāḥ
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe bhūmikhaṇḍe pṛthūpākhyāne
aṣṭāviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
ekonatriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
pṛthur uvāca
lokāḥ sukhenajīvanti sādhavaḥ puṇyadarśinaḥ
tasmādekaṃ prahartavyaṃ pāpiṣṭhaṃ pāpacetanam
tasmāttvāṃ hihaniṣyāmisarvasattvapraṇāśinīm
tvayābījānisarvāṇiluptānyetānisāṃ pratam
grāsaṅkṛtvāsthirībhūtvāprajāṃ hatvākvayāsyasi
hatepāpedurācāresukhaṃ jīvanti sādhavaḥ
tasmātpāpaṃ prahaṃ tavyaṃ satyam eva ṃ na saṃśayaḥ
bhavatyātumahatpāpaṃ prajāsaṅkṣayakārakam
prajānimittaṃ tvām eva haniṣyāmi na saṃśayaḥ
haniṣyetvāṃ śitairbāṇairmadvākyāttuparāṅmukhīm
svīyenatejasācaiva puṇyāṃ trailokyavāsinīm
prajāṃ caivadhariṣyāmidharmeṇāpi na saṃśayaḥ
imāḥ prajāājṣayāmesaṃ jīvayasadaivahi
tataḥ prīto'smitenityaṅgopāyiṣyāmisarvadā
dhenurūpeṇasāpṛthvībāṇāṃ citakalevarā
uvācedaṃ pṛthuṃ vainyaṃ dharmādhāraṃ mahāmatim
dharaṇy uvāca
tavādeśaṃ mahārājasatyapuṇyārthasaṃ yutam
prajānimittam atyarthaṃ vidhāsyāmi na saṃśayaḥ
samāraṃ bhāḥ prasiddhyanti puṇyāścaivāpyupakramāḥ
upāyaṃ paśyarājendrayenatvaṃ satyāvānbhaveḥ
dhārayethāḥ prajāścemāyenasarvāḥ pravarddhaye
saṃ lagnāścottamābāṇāmamāṅgeteśilāśitāḥ
samāṃ kuru mahārāja tiṣṭhen mayi yathā payaḥ
sūta uvāca
dhanuṣogreṇatāṣchailānnānārūpāngurūṃ stathā
utsārayaṃ stataḥ sarvāṃ samarūpāṃ cakārasaḥ
tadāprabhṛtiteśailāvṛddhimāpurdvijottamāḥ
tasyāaṅgātsvayaṃ bāṇānsvakīyānnṛpanaṃ danaḥ
gartāścakaṃ darāścaivabāṇāghātaiḥ samīkṛtāḥ
evaṃ pṛthvīṃ samāṃ sarvāṃ cakārapuṇyavarddhanaḥ
samīkṛtyamahābhāgovatsaṃ tasyāvyakalpayat
manuṃ svāyaṃ bhuvaṃ pūrvaṃ pariciṃ tyapunaḥ punaḥ
atīteṣvathasarveṣumanvaṃ tareṣusattamāḥ
viṣamatvaṅgatābhūmiḥ paṃ thānāsīccakutracit
samāniviṣamāṇyevaṃ svayamāsandvijottamāḥ
pūrvaṃ manoścākṣuṣasya prāptecaivāṃ taretadā
grāmāṇāṃ capurāṇāṃ capattanānāṃ tathaiva ca
deśānāṅkṣetrapannānāṃ maryādānahidṛśyate
kṛṣirnaivanavāṇijyaṃ nagorakṣāpravartate
nānṛtaṃ bhāṣatekaścinnalobhonacamatsaraḥ
nābhimānaṃ cavaipāpaṃ nakarotikadākila
imāḥ prajādvijāḥ sarvānivāsaṃ samarocayan
kvacidbhūmaugiraukvāpinadītīreṣuvaitadā
kuJjeṣusarvatīrtheṣusāgarasya taṭeṣuca
nivāsaṃ cakriresarvāḥ prajāḥ puṇyenavaitadā
tāsāmāhāraḥ saṃ jātaḥ phalamūlamadhustathā
mahatākṛcchreṇatāsāmāhāraścadvijottamāḥ
pṛthurvainyaḥ samālokyaprajānāṅkaṣṭam eva hi
svapāṇiḥ kalpitastenapātram eva ṃ mahāmate
sapṛthuḥ puruṣavyāghrodudohavasudhāṃ tadā
sarvasasya mayaṅkṣīraṃ sasarvānnaṅguṇānvitam
tenapuṇyenacānnenasudhākalpenatāḥ prajāḥ
tṛptiṃ nayanti devānvaiprajāḥ pitṝṃ stathāparān
prasādāttasya vainyasya sukhaṃ jīvanti tāḥ prajāḥ
devebhyaścapitṛbhyaścadatvācānnaṃ prajāstataḥ
paścādbhuṃ janti puṇyāstāḥ prajāḥ sarvādvijottamāḥ
tenacānnenadeveśaṃ tṛptiṅgacchanti devatāḥ
tasmātpuṇyāmahauṣadhyaḥ sambhavanti supuṇyadāḥ
sasya jātānisarvāṇipṛthurvainyaḥ prajāpatiḥ
tenānnenaprajāḥ sarvāvartaṃ tedyāpinityaśaḥ
ṛṣibhiścaivamilitairdugdhāceyaṃ vasuṃ dharā
ūrjaṅkṣīraṃ payaḥ kalpaṃ yena jīvanti cāmarāḥ
teṣāṃ satyena puṇyena sarve jīvanti jantavaḥ
satyapuṇyepravartaṃ teṛṣidugdhāvasuṃ dharā
athātaḥ saṃ pravakṣyāmi yadhādugdhāiyaṃ dharā
supātraṃ rājataṅkṛtvāsvadhākṣīraṃ sudhānvitam
parikalpyayamaṃ vatsaṃ dogdhācāṃ takaevasaḥ
alābupātramādāyaviṣaṅkṣīraṃ dvijottamāḥ
nāgānāṃ tutathādogdhādhṛtarāṣṭraḥ pratāpavān
sarpānāgādvijaśreṣṭhāstenavartanti cātulāḥ
nāgāvartanti tenāpihyatyugreṇadvijottamāḥ
viṣeṇaghorarūpeṇasarpāścaivabhayānakāḥ
tenaivavartayaṃ tyugrāmahākāyāmahābalāḥ
tadāhārāstadācārāstadvīryāstatparākramāḥ
athātaḥ saṃ pravakṣyāmi yathādugdhāvasuṃ dharā
pātramatrānnasadṛśamāyasaṃ sarvakāmikam
kṣīraṃ māyāmayaṅkṛtvāsarvārātivināśanam
teṣāmabhūtsavaivatsovirocanaḥ pratāpavān
ṛtviigadvamūrddhādaityānāṃ madhurdogdhāmahābalaḥ
tayāhimāyayādaityāḥ pravarttaṃ temahābalāḥ
mahāprajṣāmahākāyāmahātejaḥ parākramāḥ
tadbalaṃ pauruṣaṃ teṣāṃ tenajīvanti dānavāḥ
tayaitemāyayādyāpisarvamāyādvijottamāḥ
pravartaṃ temitaprajṣāstetadeṣāmidaṃ balam
tathātudugdhāyakṣaiḥ sāsarvādhārāsumedinī
itiśuśrumavipreṃ drāḥ purākalpemahātmabhiḥ
aṃ tardhānamayaṅkṣīramayaspātresuvistare
vaiśravaṇomahāprājṣastadāvatsaḥ prakalpitaḥ
maṇidharasya pitāpuṇyaḥ prājṣoddhimatāṃ varaḥ
dogdhārajatanābhastutasyāścāsīnmahāmatiḥ
sarvajṣaḥ sarvadharmajṣoyakṣarājasutobalī
aṣṭabāhurmahātejādviśīrṣaḥ sumahātapāḥ
yakṣāvartaṃ tatenāpisarvadaivadvijottamāḥ
punardugdhāiyaṃ pṛthvīrākṣasaiś ca mahābalaiḥ
tathācaiṣāpiśācaiś ca sāturairdagdhavāribhiḥ
utplutaṃ nṛkapālaṃ taṃ śāvapātramayaḥ kṛtam
suprajāṃ bhoktukāmāstetīvrakopaparākramāḥ
dogdhārajatanābhastuteṣāmāsīnmahābalaḥ
sumālīnāmavatsaścaśoṇitaṅkṣīram eva ca
rakṣāṃ siyātudhānāścapiśācāścamahābalāḥ
yakṣāstenacajīvanti bhūtasaṅghāścadāruṇāḥ
kṛtvāvatsaṃ suvidvāṃ saṃ taiś ca citrarathaṃ punaḥ
duduhuḥ padmapātretugāṃ dharvaṅgītasaṅkulam
surucirnāmagandharvasteṣāmāsīnmahāmatiḥ
dogdhāpuṇyatamaścaivatasyāścadvijasattamāḥ
śucigītaṃ mahātmānaḥ sukṣīraṃ duduhustadā
parvataiś ca mahāpuṇyairdugdhāceyaṃ vasuṃ dharā
ratnānivividhānyevaoṣadhīścāmṛtopamāḥ
merurdogdhācasaṃ jātaḥ pātraṅkṛtvātuśailajam
tenakṣīreṇasaṃ vṛddhāḥ śailāḥ sarvemahaujasaḥ
punardugdhāmahāvṛkṣaiḥ puṇyaiḥ kalpadrumādibhiḥ
pālāśaṃ pātrāmāninyuśchinnadagdhaprarohaṇam
śālodudohapuṣpāṅgaḥ plakṣovatsobhavattadā
guhyakaiścāraṇaiḥ siddhairvidyādharagaṇaistadā
dugdhāceyaṃ sarvadhātrīsarvakāmapradāyinī
yaṃ yamicchanti yelokāḥ pātravatsaviśeṣaṇaiḥ
taistaisteṣāṃ dadātyevakṣīraṃ sadbhāvamīdṛśam
iyaṃ dhātrīvidhātrītuiyaṃ śreṣṭhāvasuṃ dharā
sarvakāmadughādhenuriyaṃ puṇyairalaṅkṛtā
iyaṃ jyeṣṭhāpratiṣṭhātuiyaṃ sṛṣṭiriyaṃ prajā
pāvanīpuṇyadāpuṇyāsarvasasya prarohiṇī
mahālakṣmīriyaṃ vidyāsarvaviśvamayīsadā
sarvakāmadughādogadhrīsarvabījaprarohiṇī
sarveṣāṃ śreyasāṃ mātāsarvalokadharāiyam
paṃ cānāmapibhūtānāṃ prakāśorūpam eva ca
asīdiyaṃ samudrāṃ tāmedinītipariśrutā
madhukaiṭabhayoḥ kṛtsnāmedasāsamabhiplutā
duhitṛtvamanuprāptādevīpṛthvīticocyate
tenarājṣādvijaśreṣṭhāḥ pāliteyaṃ vasuṃ dharā
grāmādhāraṅgṛhāṇāṃ capurapattanamālinī
sasyākaravatīsphītāsarvatīrthamayīdvijāḥ
evaṃ vasumatīdevīsarvalokamayīsadā
evaṃ prabhāvorājendraḥ purāṇeparipaṭhyate
pṛthurvainyomahābhāgaḥ sarvakarmaprakāśakaḥ
yathāviṣṇuryathābrahmāyathārudraḥ sanātanaḥ
brāhmaṇairṛṣibhiḥ sarvairnamaskāryonṛpottamaḥ
varṇānāmāśramāṇāṃ yaḥ sthāpakaḥ sarvalokadhṛk
pārthivaiś ca mahābhāgaiḥ pārthivatvamihepsubhiḥ
ādirājonamaskāryaḥ pṛthurvainyaḥ pratāpavān
namaskāryomahārājovṛttidātāmahībhṛtām
evaṃ pātraviśeṣāścamayākhyātādvijottamāḥ
vatsānāṃ suviśeṣāścadogdhṝṇāṃ bhavadagrataḥ
kṣīrasyāpiviśeṣaṃ tuyathoddiṣṭaṃ hibhūbhujā
samākhyātaṃ tathāgrecabhavatāṃ vaiyathārthataḥ
dhanyaṃ yaśasya mārogyaṃ puṇyaṃ pāpapraṇāśanam
pṛthorvainyasya caritaṃ yaḥ śṛṇotidvijottamāḥ
sarvapāpaviśuddhātmāviṣṇulokaṃ prayātisaḥ
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe paṣcapaṣcāśatsahasrasaṃhitāyāṃ bhūmikhaṇḍe
pṛthūpākhyānaekonatriṃ śo'dhyāyaḥ
triṃ śo'dhyāyaḥ
ṛṣaya ūcuḥ
yosauvenastvayākhyātaḥ pāpācāreṇavartitaḥ
tasya pāpasya kāvṛttiḥ kiṃ phalaṃ prāptavāndvija
vistareṇavidāṃ śreṣṭhatvaṃ naetanmahāmate
sūta uvāca
pravakṣyāmi supuṇyaṃ cayathānyāyaṃ śruṃ tapurā
vimalatvaṅgatorājādharmatvaṅgatavānpunaḥ
mahāpāpānisarvāṇiarjitāninarādhamaiḥ
tīrthasaṅgaprasaṅgenateṣāṃ pāpaṃ prayātica
satāṃ saṅgātprajāyetapuṇyam eva na saṃśayaḥ
pāpānāṃ tuprasaṅgenapāpam eva prajāyate
sambhāṣāddarśanātsparśādāsanādbhojanātkila
pāpināṃ saṅgamāccaivakilbiṣaṃ parisaṃ caret
tathāpuṇyātmakānāṃ capuṇyam eva prasaṃ caret
mahātīrthaprasaṅgenapāpāḥ śudhyanti nānyathā
puṇyāṅgatiṃ prayāntyetenirddhūtāśeṣakalmaṣāḥ
ṛṣaya ūcuḥ
tatkathaṃ yānti tepāpāḥ parāṃ siddhiṃ dvijottama
sūta uvāca
lubdhakāścamahāpāpāḥ saṃ jātādāsadhīvarāḥ
revā ca yamunā gaṅgās tāsām ambhasi saṃsthitāḥ
jñānatojñānataḥ snātvāsaṅkrīḍanti cavaijale
mahānadyāḥ prasaṅgenate yānti paramāṅgatim
puṇyatoyaprasaṅgāccahyāplutāḥ sarvaevate
mahānadyāḥ prasaṅgāccaanyāsāṃ naivasattamāḥ
mahāpuṇyajanasyāpipāpaṃ naśyatipāpinām
prasaṅgāddarśanātsparśānnātrakāryāvicāraṇā
atrārtheśrūyateviprāitihāso'ghanāśanaḥ
kaścidastimṛgavyādhaḥ sulobhākhyomahāvane
mṛgānghātayatenityaṃ piśitāsvādalaṃ paṭaḥ
ekadātusuduṣṭātmābāṇapāṇirdhanurdharaḥ
śvabhiḥ parivṛtodurgaṃ vanaṃ viṃ dhyasya vaigataḥ
mṛgānarurūnvarāhāṃ ścabhītānsūditavānbahūn
revātīraṃ samāsādyakaścicchapharaghātakaḥ
śapharānsūdayitvāsanirjagāmabahirjalāt
jīvatrāṇaparāsārtābhītācalitacetanā
tvaramāṇāpalāyaṃ tīrevātīraṃ samāśritā
śvabhiścacālitāsātubāṇaghātakṣatāturā
pṛṣṭhaevasamāyātipuratoyātisāmṛgī
dṛṣṭavāṃ stāṃ śapharahābāṇapāṇiḥ samudyataḥ
tāvallubdhakalobhākhyaḥ śvabhiḥ sārddhaṃ samāgataḥ
nahaṃ tavyāmadīyeyaṃ mṛgayāṃ mesamāgatā
tasya vākyaṃ samākarṇyamīnahāmāṃ salaṃ paṭaḥ
bāṇaṃ mumocaduṣṭātmātāmuddiśyamahābalaḥ
pramṛtāsāmṛgītatrabāṇābhyāṃ pāpacetasoḥ
śvabhirdaṃ taiḥ samākrāṃ tātvaramāṇāpapātasā
śikharāccahradepuṇyerevāyāḥ pāpanāśane
śvānaścatvaramāṇāstepatitāvimalehrade
madīyeyaṃ mṛgīduṣṭakasmādbāṇairhatātvayā
tam uvācapunaḥ so'pimīnahāmṛgaghātakam
amāvāsyāsamāyogaṃ mahāpuṇyaphalapradam
velāyāṃ patitāḥ sarveparvaṇastasya sattama
japadhyānavihīnāstebhāvasatyavivarjitāḥ
tīrthasnānaprasaṅgenamṛgīśvācasalubdhakaḥ
sarvapāpavinirmuktāstegatāḥ paramāṅgatim
tīrthānāṃ caprabhāveṇasatāṃ saṅgāddvijottamāḥ
nāśayetpāpināṃ pāpaṃ dahedagniriveṃ dhanam
sūta uvāca
