tāṃ hasanprāhadharmātmāśivaśarmāmahāmatiḥ
iyaṃ hidurbalāprāptābhikṣārthaṃ dvāramāgatā
samāhūyapriyecaināṃ dehitvaṃ bhojanaṃ śubhe
kṛpayāparayāviṣṭājṣātvāmāṃ tusamāgatām
provācamaṅgalākāṃ taṃ dāsyāmipriyabhojanam
evamuktvācabhārtaraṃ maṅgalāmaṅgalānvitā
punarmāṃ bhojayāmāsamiṣṭānnenasudurbalām
mām uvācasadharmātmāśivaśarmāmahāmuniḥ
evamākarṇyatadvākyaṃ bhartuścaivamahātmanaḥ
svareṇalakṣitaḥ kāṃ tomayāvaipāpayātadā
vrīḍayādhomukhījātādṛṣṭobhartāyadāmayā
maṅgalācārusarvāṅgībhartāramidamabravīt
kāceyaṃ hisamācakṣvatvāṃ dṛṣṭvāhivilajjati
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe bhūmikhaṇḍevenopākhyānesukalācaritre
ekapaṣcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ
dvipaṣcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ
śivaśarmovāca
maṅgaleśrūyatāṃ vākyaṃ yadipṛcchasisāṃ pratam
yadarthaṃ hitvayāpṛṣṭaṃ tannibodhavarānane
iyaṃ hisāṃ prataṃ prāptāvarākībhikṣurūpiṇī
sudevānāmabhadreyaṃ mamajāyāpriyāsadā
kenāpikāraṇenaivadeśaṃ tyaktvāsamāgatā
māṃ jṣātvātusamāyātābhikṣurūpeṇategṛham
evaṃ jṣātvātvayābhadreātithyaṃ pariśobhitam
bharturvākyaṃ niśamyaivamaṅgalāpatidevatā
harṣeṇamahatāviṣṭāsvayam eva sumaṅgalā
ratnakāṃ canayuktaiścābharaṇaiś ca pativratā
ahaṃ hibhūṣitābhadretayaivapatikāmyayā
tayāhaṃ bhūṣitādevimānasnānaiś ca bhojanaiḥ
bhartrāhaṃ mānitādevijātaṃ duḥkhamanaṃ takam
mamorasimahātīvraṃ sarvaprāṇavināśanam
tasyām ānomayādṛṣṭoduḥkhamātmagataṃ tathā
ciṃ tāmedāruṇājātāyayāprāṇāvrajanti me
kadāpivacanaṃ dattaṃ namayāpāpayāśubham
pādaprakṣālanaṃ naivaaṅgasaṃ vāhanaṃ nahi
ekāṃ taṃ namayādattaṃ tasyaivahimahātmanaḥ
sambhāṣāṅkathamasyaivakariṣyepāpaniścayā
evaṃ hiciṃ tamānāyāḥ sphuṭitaṃ hṛdayaṃ mama
gatāḥ prāṇāstadākāyaṃ parityajyavarānane
tatradūtāḥ samāyātādharmarājasya vaitadā
vīrāścadāruṇāḥ krūrāgadācakrāsidhāriṇaḥ
taistubaddhāmahābhāgeśṛṅkhalairdṛḍhabandhanaiḥ
nītāyamapuraṃ taisturudamānāsuduḥkhitā
mudgaraistāḍyamānāhaṃ durgamārgeṇapīḍitā
bhartsyamānāyamasyāgretaistatrāhaṃ praveśitā
dṛṣṭāhaṃ yamarājenasakrodhenamahātmanā
aṅgārasaṃ cayekṣiptākṣiptānarakasaṃ caye
lohasya puruṣaṅkṛtvāagnināparitāpitaḥ
nānāpīḍātisaṃ taptānarakāgnipratāpitā
tailadroṇyāṃ parikṣiptākarambhavālukopari
asipatraiś ca saṃ cchinnājalamaṃ treṇavāhitā
kūṭaśālmalivṛkṣeṣukṣiptātenamahātmanā
pūyaśoṇitaviṣṭhāyāṃ patitākṛmisaṅkule
sarveṣunarakeṣvevaṅkṣiptāhaṃ nṛpanaṃ dini
pīḍāyukteṣutīvreṣutenaivāpimahātmanā
karapatraiḥ pāṭitāhaṃ śaktibhistāḍitābhṛśam
anyeṣvevanarakeṣupātitānṛpanaṃ dini
yonigarteṣukṣiptāsmipatitāduḥkhasaṅkaṭe
dharmarājenatenāhaṃ narakeṣunipātitā
valgunīyonimāsādyabhuktaṃ duḥkhaṃ sudāruṇam
gatāhaṅkrauṣṭukīṃ yoniṃ śunīyoniṃ punargatā
sakukkuṭīṃ camārjārīmākhuyoniṅgatāhyaham
evaṃ yoniviśeṣeṣupāpayoniṣutenaca
kṣiptāsmidharmarājenapīḍitāsarvayoniṣu
tenaivāhaṅkṛtābhūmauśūkarīnṛpanaṃ dini
tavahastemahābhāgesanti tīrthānyanekaśaḥ
tavaivatejaḥ puṇyenajātaṃ jñānaṃ varānane
idānīṃ māmuddharasvapatitāṃ narakasaṅkaṭe
narakaṃ camahābhāgetrāhimāṃ duḥkhabhāginīm
gatāhaṃ pāpabhāvenadīnāhaṃ canirāśrayā
kiṅkṛtaṃ himayābhadresukṛtaṃ puṇya sambhavam
śūkary uvāca
ayaṃ rājāmahābhāgaikṣvākurmanunaṃ danaḥ
viṣṇureṣamahāprājṣobhavatīśrīrhinānyathā
pativratāmahābhāgāpativrataparāyaṇā
mahāpativratālokaekātvaṃ nṛpateḥ priyā
yayāśuśrūṣitobhartābhavatyāhiaharniśam
patiśuśrūṣitasyāpiyadi me kuruṣepriyam
mamamātāpitātvaṃ vaitvaṃ meguruḥ sanātanaḥ
ahaṃ pāpādurācārāasatyājñānavarjitā
māmuddharamahābhāgebhītāhaṃ yamatāḍanaiḥ
evaṃ śrutvātayāproktaṃ samālokyanṛpaṃ tadā
kiṅkaromimahārājaeṣākiṃ vadatepaśuḥ
ikṣvākur uvāca
enāṃ duḥkhāṃ varākīṃ vaipāpayoniṅgatāṃ śubhe
evamuktāvarānārīsudevācārumaṅgalā
uvācaikābdapuṇyaṃ temayādattaṃ varānane
evamuktenavākyenatayādevyāhitatkṣaṇāt
rūpayauvanasaṃ pannādivyamālāvibhūṣitā
divyadehāca sambhūtātejojvālāsamāvṛtā
sarvabhūṣaṇaśobhāḍhyānānāratnaiś ca śobhitā
saṃ jātādivyarūpāsādivyagaṃ dhānulepanā
divyaṃ vimānamārūḍhāaṃ tarikṣaṅgatāsatī
tām uvācatatorājṣīṃ praṇatānatakaṃ dharā
vrajāmipātakānmuktāsvargaṃ puṇyatamaṃ śubham
praṇamyaivaṅgatāsvargaṃ sudevāśṛṇusattama
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe bhūmikhaṇḍevenopākhyānesukalācaritresudevāsvargārohaṇaṃ nā
madvipaṣcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ
tripaṣcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ
evaṃ dharmaṃ śrutaṃ pūrvaṃ purāṇeṣutadāmayā
patihīnākathaṃ bhogaṅkariṣyepāpaniścayā
kāṃ tenatuvinātenajīvaṅkāyenadhāraye
viṣṇur uvāca
tāstusakhyovarānāryoharṣeṇamahatānvitāḥ
śrutvādharmaṃ paraṃ puṇyaṃ nārīṇāṅgatidāyakam
stuvanti tāṃ mahābhāgāṃ sukalāṃ dharmavatsalām
brāhmaṇāścasurāḥ sarvepuṇyastriyonarottama
atyarthaṃ dṛḍhatāmindraḥ suviciṃ tyasureśvaraḥ
sukalāyāḥ paraṃ bhāvaṃ suvicāryāmareśvaraḥ
cālayedhairyamasyāścapatisnehaṃ na saṃśayaḥ
sasmāramanmathaṃ devaṃ tvaramāṇaḥ surādhipaḥ
puṣpacāpaṃ sasaṅgṛhya mīnaketuḥ samāgataḥ
priyayācatayāyuktoratyādṛṣṭamahābalaḥ
baddhāṃ jalipuṭobhūtvāsahasrākṣam uvācasaḥ
kasmādahaṃ tvayānāthaadhunāsaṃ smṛtovibho
ādeśodīyatāṃ medyasarvabhāvenamānada
sukaleyaṃ mahābhāgāpativrataparāyaṇā
śṛṇuṣva kāmadevatvaṅkurusāhāyyamuttamam
niṣkarṣayamahābhāgāṃ sukalāṃ puṇyamaṅgalām
evamastusahasrākṣakariṣyāmi na saṃśayaḥ
sāhāyyaṃ devadeveśatavakautukakāraṇāt
evamuktvāmahātejāḥ kaṃ darpomunidurjayaḥ
devāṣjetuṃ samartho'haṃ samunīnṛṣisattamān
kiṃ punaḥ kāminīṃ devayasyāaṅgenavaibalam
kāminīnāmahaṃ devaaṅgeṣunivasāmyaham
bhālekuceṣunetreṣukacāgreṣucasarvadā
nābhaukaṭyāṃ pṛṣṭhadeśejaghaneyonimaṇḍale
adharedaṃ tabhāgeṣukakṣāyāṃ hi na saṃśayaḥ
nārīmamagṛhaṃ devasadātatravasāmyaham
tatrasthaḥ puruṣānsarvānmārayāmi na saṃśayaḥ
svabhāvenābalādevasaṃ taptāmamamārgaṇaiḥ
pitaraṃ mātaraṃ dṛṣṭvāanyaṃ svajanabāṃ dhavam
surūpaṃ saguṇaṃ devamamabāṇāhatāsatī
yoniḥ spaṃ detanārīṇāṃ stanāgraucasureśvara
nāstidhairyaṃ sureśānasukalāṃ nāśayāmyaham
puruṣohaṃ bhaviṣyāmirūpavānguṇavāndhanī
kautukārthamimāṃ nārīṃ cālayāmimanobhava
naivakāmānnasaṃ trāsānnavālobhānnakāraṇāt
niṣkarṣiṣyaitogatvābhavanmohotrakāraṇam
evaṅkāmaṃ casaṃ diśyajagāmasurarāṭsvayam
ātmavikṛti sambhūtorūpavānguṇavānsvayam
sarvābharaṇaśobhāṅgaḥ sarvabhogasamanvitaḥ
bhogalīlāsamākīrṇaḥ sarvadaudāryasaṃ yutaḥ
yatrasātiṣṭhatedevīkṛkalasya priyānṛpa
ātmalīlāṃ svarūpaṣcaguṇaṃ bhāvaṃ pradarśayet
naivapaśyatisātaṃ tupuruṣaṃ rūpasaṃ padam
sābhilāṣeṇamanasātām eva ṃ paripaśyati
kāmaceṣṭāṃ sahasrākṣo'darśayatsarvabhāvakaiḥ
indreṇapreṣitādūtīsukalāṃ pratisāgatā
sukalāṃ sumahābhāgāṃ praty uvācaprahasya vai
asyārūpeṇasaṃ sārenāstinārīvarānanā
kātvaṃ bhavasikalyāṇikasya bhāryābhaviṣyasi
yasya tvaṃ saguṇābhāryāsadhanyaḥ puṇyabhāgbhuvi
tasyāstuvacanaṃ śrutvātām uvācamanasvinī
vaiśyajātyāṃ samutpannodharmātmāsatyavatsalaḥ
tasyāhaṃ hipriyābhāryāsatyasaṃ dhasya dhīmataḥ
mamabhartāsadharmātmātīrthayātrāṅgataḥ sudhīḥ
atikrāṃ tāḥ śṛṇuṣva tvaṃ trayaścaivāpivatsarāḥ
tatohaṃ duḥkhitājātāvinātenamahātmanā
etat te sarvam ākhyātamātmavṛttāṃ tam evate
bhavatīpṛcchatemāṅkābhaviṣyativadasvame
sukalāyāvacaḥ śrutvādūtyāābhāṣitaṃ punaḥ
ahaṃ tavānti kaṃ prāptākāryārthaṃ varavarṇini
śrūyatāmabhidhāsyāmiśrutvācaivāvadhāryatām
gatastenirghṛṇobhartātvāṃ tyaktvātuvarānane
kiṅkariṣyasitenāpipriyāghātakareṇaca
yastvāṃ tyaktvāgataḥ pāpīsādhavyācārasamanvitām
kiṃ vāsategatobāletatrajīvativaimṛtaḥ
kiṅkariṣyatitenaivaṃ bhavatīkhidyatevṛthā
kasmānnāśayatecāṅgaṃ divyaṃ hemasamaprabham
ekaṃ sukhaṃ mahābhāgebālakrīḍāṃ vināśubhe
vārddhakeduḥkhasaṃ prāptirjarākāyaṃ prahiṃ sayet
yāvattiṣṭhatitāruṇyaṃ tāvadbhuṃ janti mānavāḥ
yāvattiṣṭhatitāruṇyaṃ tāvadbhogānprabhuṃ jate
tādṛśoyaṃ bhavetkāyastāruṇyetugateśubhe
kāmābāṇādahaṃ tyaṅgaṃ tavemecārulocane
ayam ekaḥ samāyātaḥ puruṣorūpavānguṇī
ayaṃ hipuruṣavyāghraḥ sarvajṣoguṇavāndhanī
bālyaṃ nāstyapijīvasya tāruṇyaṃ nāstijīvite
akāmaḥ kāmadolokeātmarūpeṇavartate
yathāgehasya saṃ sthānaṃ tathākāyasya dṛśyate
yathāvārddhakinākāyastathāsūtreṇamaṃ diram
anekakāṣṭhasaṅghātairnānādārusamuccayaiḥ
mṛttikayodakenāpisamaṃ tātpariṇāmayet
liṃ pitaṃ lepakaiḥ kāṣṭhaṃ citraṃ bhavaticitrakaiḥ
prathamaṃ rūpamāyātigṛhaṃ sūtreṇasūtritam
vāyunādolitaṃ nityaṅgṛhaṃ camalināyate
svecchayācagṛhasvāmīrūpavattvaṃ nayedgṛham
kāṣṭhasaṅghaiś ca jīrṇatvaṃ bahukālaiḥ prayātisaḥ
sthānabhraṣṭāḥ prajāyaṃ temūlāgrepracalanti te
nasahellepanābhāramādhāreṇapratiṣṭhati
etadgṛhasya vārddhakyaṅkathitaṃ śṛṇudūtike
patamānaṅgṛhaṃ dṛṣṭvāgṛhasvāmīparityajet
tathābālyaṃ catāruṇyaṃ nṛṇāṃ vṛddhatvam eva ca
sabālyebālarūpaścajñānahīnaṃ prakārayet
citrayetkāyamevāpivastrālaṅkārabhūṣaṇaiḥ
lepanaiś ca ṃ danaiścānyaistāmbūlaprabhavādibhiḥ
kāyastaruṇatāṃ yātiatirūpovijāyate
bāhyābhyaṃ taramevāpirasaiḥ sarvaiḥ prapoṣayet
tenapoṣaṇabhāvenaparipuṣṭaḥ prajāyate
jāyatemāṃ savṛddhisturasaiścāpinavottamā
yānti vistaratāṃ rājannaṅgānyāpyāyitānyapi
pratyaṅgānirasaiś ca ivasvaṃ svaṃ rūpaṃ prayānti vai
daṃ tādharaustanaubāhūkaṭipṛṣṭhamurūubhe
ubhābhyāmapitānyevavṛddhimāyānti tānivai
aṅgānirasamāṃ sābhyāṃ surūpāṇibhavanti te
viṣṭhāmūtrasya vaikośaḥ kāyaeṣacadūtike
apavitraśarīroyaṃ sadāsravatinirghṛṇaḥ
yāvatpaṃ cāśadvarṣāṇitāvattiṣṭhativaidṛḍhaḥ
daṃ tāḥ śithilatāṃ yānti tathālālāyatemukham
cakṣurbhyāmapipaśyennakarṇābhyāṃ naśṛṇotica
gatiṅkartuṃ naśaknotihastapādaiś ca dūtike
akṣamojāyatekāyojarākālenapīḍitaḥ
tadrasaḥ śoṣamāyātijarāgnitāpaśoṣitaḥ
yathājīrṇaṅgṛhaṃ yātikṣayam eva ṃ na saṃśayaḥ
tathāsaṅkṣayamāyātivārddhaketukalevaram
mamarūpaṃ samāyātaṃ varṇasyevaṃ dinedine
kenāhaṃ rūpasaṃ yuktākenarūpatvamiṣyate
yathājīrṇaṅgṛhaṃ yātikenāsaupuruṣobalī
yasyārthamāgatādūtibhavatīkenaśaṃ sati
kimucaivatvayādṛṣṭaṃ mamāṅgevadasāṃ pratam
tasyāṅgādihahīnaṃ cadūtināstyadhikaṃ tathā
yathātvaṃ catathāsauvaitathāhaṃ nātrasaṃśayaḥ
kasya rūpaṃ navidyetarūpavānnāstibhūtale
ucchrāyāḥ patanāṃ tāścanagāstugirayaḥ śubhe
kālenapīḍitāyānti tadvadbhūtāścanānyathā
arūporūpavāndivyaātmāsarvagataḥ śuciḥ
sthāvareṣvevasarveṣujaṅgameṣucadūtike
ghaṭanāśātprayātyekam ekatvaṃ tvaṃ nabudhyase
piṇḍanāśādayaṃ cātmāekarūpovijāyate
ekaṃ rūpaṃ mayādṛṣṭaṃ saṃ sārevasatāsadā
evaṃ vadasvataṃ jṣātvāyasyārthamihacāgatā
vyādhināpīḍyamānasya kaphenāpivṛtasya ca
aṅgādvicalateśoṇaḥ sthānabhraṣṭobhijāyate
aṅgasaṃ dhiṣusarvāsupalatvaṃ cāṃ taraṅgataḥ
ekatonāśamāyātisvaṃ hirūpaṃ parityajet
viṣṭhātvaṃ jāyateśīghraṅkṛmibhiścabhavetkila
śrūyatāṃ jāyatepaścātkṛmidurgandhasaṅkulam
jāyaṃ tetatravaiyūkāḥ kṛmayovā na saṃśayaḥ
sakṛmiḥ kurutesphoṭaṅkaṇḍūṃ caparidāruṇām
vyathāmutpādayedyūkāsarvāṅgaṃ paricālayet
nakhāgrairghṛṣyamāṇāsākaṇḍūḥ śāṃ tāprajāyate
tadvattaiś ca śṛṇuṣva ivasuratasya na saṃśayaḥ
vāyunātenaprāṇenapākasthānaṃ praṇīyate
yadbhaktaṃ prāṇibhirdūtipākasthānaṅgataṃ punaḥ
ākṛṣṭaḥ sasamānenanītastenāpivāyunā
prāṇināṃ hikapāleṣukṛmayaḥ santi paṣcavai
dvāvetaukarṇamūletunetrasthānetataḥ punaḥ
kaniṣṭhāṅgulimānenaraktapucchāścadūtike
navanītasya varṇenakṛṣṇapucchā na saṃśayaḥ
teṣāṃ nāmāpi bhadre tvaṃ matto nigaditaṃ śṛṇu
piṅgalīśṛṅkhalīnāmadvaukṛmīkarṇamūlayoḥ
capalaḥ pippalaścaivadvāvetaunāsikāgrayoḥ
śṛṅgalījaṅgalīcānyaunetrayoraṃ tarasthitau
kṛmīṇāṃ śatapaṣcāśattādṛgbhūtā na saṃśayaḥ
bhālāṃ tevasthitāḥ sarverājikāyāḥ pramāṇataḥ
kapālarogiṇaḥ sarvevikurvanti na saṃśayaḥ
keśadvayaṃ mukhetasya vidyateśṛṇudūtike
prāṇināṃ saṅkṣayaṃ viddhitatkṣaṇehi na saṃśayaḥ
tadvīryaṃ rasarūpeṇapatatenātrasaṃśayaḥ
iḍācapiṅgalānāḍīsuṣumṇākhyācasaṃ sthitā
subalenāpitasyaivanāḍikājālapaṃ jare
kāmakaṇḍūrbhaveddūtisarveṣāṃ prāṇināṅkila
puṃ saścasphurateliṅgaṃ nāryāyoniścadūtike
strīpuṃ sausaṃ pramattautuvrajataḥ saṅgamaṃ tataḥ
kāyenakāyasaṅghṛṣṭirmaithunenahijāyate
kṣaṇamātraṃ sukhaṅkāyepunaḥ kaṇḍūścatādṛśī
sarvatradṛśyatedūtibhāvaevaṃ vidhaḥ kila
vrajatvamātmanaḥ sthānaṃ naivāstyatraapūrvatā
apūrvaṃ nāstimekiṃ citkaromyeva na saṃśayaḥ
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe bhūmikhaṇḍevenopākhyānesukalācaritre
tripaṣcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ
catuḥ paṣcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ
viṣṇur uvāca
evamuktāgatādūtītayāsukalayātadā
ālocyasāhasaṃ dhairyaṃ jñānam eva puraṃ daraḥ
īdṛśaṃ hivadetkāhinārībhūtvāmahītale
yogarūpaṃ susaṃ śiṣṭaṃ nyāyodaiḥ kṣālitaṃ vacaḥ
pavitreyaṃ mahābhāgāsatyarūpā na saṃśayaḥ
etadarthaṃ vicāryaivajiṣṇuḥ kaṃ darpamabravīt
tvayāsahagamiṣyāmidraṣṭuṃ tāṅkṛkalapriyām
gamyatāṃ tatradeveśayatrāstesāpativratā
mānaṃ vīryaṃ balaṃ dhairyaṃ tasyāḥ satyaṃ pativratam
gatvāhaṃ nāśayiṣyāmikiyanmātrāsureśvara
bhobhonaṅgaśṛṇuṣva tvamadhikaṃ bhāṣitaṃ mudhā
sudṛḍhāsatyavīryeṇasusthirādharmakarmabhiḥ
ṛṣīṇāṃ devatānāṃ cabalaṃ mayāpraṇāśitam
paśyatastavadeveśanāśayiṣyāmitāṃ striyam
navanītaṃ yathācāgnestejodṛṣṭvādravaṃ vrajet
tathemāṃ drāvayiṣyāmisvenarūpeṇatejasā
viṣṇur uvāca
ākarṇyavākyaṃ tumanobhavasya etāmasādhyāṃ tavakāmajāne
dhairyaṃ samudyamyacapuṇyadehāṃ puṇyenapuṇyāṃ bahupuṇyacārām
tenāpisārdhaṃ prajagāmabhūyoratyācadūtyācapativratāṃ tām
ekāṃ supuṇyāṃ svagṛhasthitāṃ tāṃ dhyānenapatyuścaraṇeniyuktām
nīlāṃ citaṃ bhogayutaṃ mahātmājhaṣadhvajaścaiva puraṃ daraśca
dṛṣṭvāsulīlaṃ puruṣaṃ mahāṃ taṃ caraṃ tam evaṃ parikāmabhāvam
jāyāhivaiśyasya mahātmanastumenenasārūpayutaṅguṇajṣam
anenadūtīparipreṣitāpurāyāmāṃ yuvatyāhaguṇajṣamenam
līlāsvarūpaṃ bahudhātmabhāvaṃ mamaiṣasarvaṃ paridarśayecca
mamaivakālaṃ prabalaṃ viciṃ tyāgatohim ekāṃ taguṇaiś ca satkhalaḥ
mamāpibhāvaṃ parigṛhyakāṃ tojīvetkiyānvāpisubuddhiyuktaḥ
śūnyohikāyomamacāstisadyaśceṣṭāvihīnomṛtakalpaeva
kāyasya grāmasya prajāḥ pranaṣṭāḥ suvikriyākhyaṃ parigṛhyakarma
mamādhikenāpisamaṃ sukāṃ taṃ saūdrdhvaśobhāmanayaccakāmaḥ
yadāmṛtobalavānharṣayuktaḥ svayaṃ dṛśāvaiparinṛtyamānaḥ
tathāanenāpiprabhāṣayedbhutaṃ yomāṃ hivāṣchatyapibhoktukāmaḥ
evaṃ vicāryaivatadāmahāsatīsatyākhyarajjvādṛḍhabaddhacetanā
gṛhaṃ svakīyaṃ praviveśasātadātattasya bhāvaṃ niyamenavettum
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe bhūmikhaṇḍevenopākhyānesukalācaritre catuḥ paṣcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ
paṣcapaṣcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ
viṣṇur uvāca
bhāvaṃ viditvāsurarāṭcatasyāḥ provācakāmaṃ purataḥ sthitaṃ saḥ
nacāstiśakyāsmaratejayāyasatyātmakadhyānasudaṃ śitāsatī
dharmākhyacāpaṃ svakare gṛhītvā
jṣānābhidhānaṃ varam eva bāṇam
yoddhuṃ raṇesaṃ pratisaṃsthitā
satī vīro yathā darpitavīryabhāvaḥ
jigīṣayeyaṃ puruṣārtham eva tvamātmanaḥ kuruṣepauruṣaṃ tu
yathā tvayākarmakṛtaṃ purāsmaraphalaṃ tuprāptaṃ tutathaivatīvram
bhuṃ jantiteduṣkṛtam evatatphalaṃ duḥkhānvitaṃ rūpavināśanaṃ ca
vyāghuṣyaāvāṃ tuvrajāvakāmaenāṃ parityajyasatīṃ prayujya
satyāḥ prasaṅgenapurāmayātulabdhaṃ phalaṃ pāpamayaṃ tvasahyam
jātaścameṣavṛṣaṇaḥ sadāhyahaṃ bhavāngatomāṃ tuvihāyatatra
tejaḥ prabhāvohyatulaḥ satīnāṃ dhātāsamarthaḥ sahituṃ nasūryaḥ
sukutsitaṃ rūpamidaṃ turakṣetpurānusūyāmunināhiśaptam
bhartuścamṛtyuṃ paribādhamānaṃ māṇḍavyaśāpasya cakauṇḍinasya
nakiṃ purāmanmathateśrutaṃ sadāsaṃ skārayuktāḥ prabhavanti satyaḥ
sāvitrīnāmnīdyumatsenaputrīnītaṃ priyaṃ sāpunarānināya
yamādihaivāśvapateḥ suputraṃ satītvam eva ṃ parisaṃ śrutaṃ ca
agneḥ śikhāṅkaḥ parisaṃ spṛśedvaitareddhikaḥ sāgaram eva mūḍhaḥ
galetubaddhāsuśilāṃ bhujābhyāṅkovāsatīṃ vaśyativītarāgām
uktetuvākyebahunītiyukteindreṇakāmasya suśikṣaṇārtham
kāma uvāca
tavātideśādahamāgatovaidhairyaṃ suhṛttvaṃ puruṣārtham eva
tyaktvātadarthaṃ paribhāṣasemāṃ niḥ satvarūpaṃ bahubhītiyuktam
vyābuddhi yāsyāmiyadāsureśasyāllokamadhyemamakīrtināśaḥ
ūḍhiṅkaromānavihīnaevasarvevadiṣyaṃ tyanayājitaṃ mām
yevaijitādevagaṇāścadānavāḥ pūrvaṃ munīṃ drāstapasaḥ prayuktāḥ
hāsyaṅkariṣyanti mamāpisadyonāryājitomanmathaeṣabhīmaḥ
tasmātprayāsyāmitvayaivasārdhamasyābalaṃ mānamataḥ sureśa
tejaś ca dhairyaṃ pariṇāśayiṣye
sambodhyacaivaṃ sasurādhināthaṃ cāpaṅgṛhītaṃ saśaraṃ supuṣpam
uvācakrīḍāṃ purataḥ sthitāṃ tāṃ vidhāyamāyāṃ bhavatīprayātu
vaiśyasya bhāryāṃ sukalāṃ supuṇyāṃ satyesthitāṃ dharmavidāṅguṇajṣām
itohigatvākurukāryamuktaṃ sāhāyyarūpaṣcapriyesakheśṛṇu
krīḍāṃ samābhāṣyatatomanobhavastvaṃ testhitāṃ prītimathāhvayatpunaḥ
indraṃ hidṛṣṭvāsukalāyathābhavetsnehānugācāruvilocaneyam
bhobhoḥ sakhesādhayagacchaśīghraṃ māyāmayaṃ naṃ danarūpayuktam
puṣpopayuktaṃ caphalapradhānaṅghuṣṭaṃ rutaiḥ kokilaṣaṭpadānām
āhūyavīraṃ makaraṃ dam eva rasāyanaṃ svāduguṇairupetam
cakreprayāṇaṃ surarājasārdhaṃ saṃ mohanāyaivamahāsatīṃ tām
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe bhūmikhaṇḍevenopākhyānesukalācaritre
paṣcapaṣcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ
ṣaṭpaṣcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ
viṣṇur uvāca
tasyāḥ satyavināśāyamanmathaḥ sasurādhipaḥ
tavārthamātmanaścaiva puṇyasyāpimahātmanaḥ
visṛjāmimahāsthānaṃ vāsturūpaṃ sukhodayam
satyākhyaṃ casupriyākhyaṃ sudevākhyaṅgṛhottamam
tam evanāśayedgatvākāmaeṣapramattadhīḥ
ripurūpaḥ suduṣṭātmāasmākaṃ hi na saṃśayaḥ
yatrāhaṃ vṛddhisaṃ puṣṭastatravāsohitebhavet
tatrapuṇyaṃ samāyātiśraddhayāsahakrīḍate
kṣamāśāṃ tyāsamāyuktāāyātimamamaṃ diram
prajṣāyuktaḥ sanirlobhoyatrāhaṃ tatrasaṃ sthitaḥ
śuciḥ svabhāvastatraivaamīcamamabāṃ dhavāḥ
mamagehesamāyātādhanyatāṃ śṛṇudharmarāṭ
gurūṇāṃ cāpiśuśrūṣāviṣṇurlakṣmyāsamāvṛtaḥ
madgehaṃ tusamāyānti devāścāgnipurogamāḥ
mokṣamārgaṃ prakāśedyojṣānodīptyāsamanvitaḥ
etaiḥ sārdhaṃ vasāmyevasatīṣudharmavatsuca
sādhuṣveteṣusarveṣugṛharūpeṣumesadā
sasatvāḥ sādhurūpāstevedhasāmegṛhīkṛtāḥ
saṃ carāmimahābhāgasvacchaṃ denacalīlayā
īśvaraścajagatsvāmītrinetrovṛṣavāhanaḥ
tadidaṃ saṃ sṛteḥ sāraṅgṛharūpaṃ maheśvaram
sadanaṃ śaṅkaretyākhyaṃ nāśitaṃ manmathenavai
viśvāmitraṃ mahātmānaṃ tapaṃ taṃ tapauttamam
menakāṃ hisamāśrityakāmoyaṃ jitavānpurā
satīpativratāhalyāgautamasya priyāśubhā
munayaḥ satyadharmajṣānānāstriyaḥ pativratāḥ
madgṛhāstāimāḥ sarvādīpitāḥ kāmavahninā
durdharoduḥsahovyāpīyotisatyeṣuniṣṭhuraḥ
mām eva ṃ paśyatenityaṅkvasatyaḥ paritiṣṭhati
samāṃ jṣātvāsamāyātibāṇapāṇirdhanurdharaḥ
nāśayenmadgṛhaṃ pāpovītihotraiś ca nāmakaiḥ
pāpaleśāścayaekūrāanyepākhaṇḍasaṃ śrayāḥ
pātayedardayedgehaṃ pāpaḥ śastrairdurātmabhiḥ
mām eva ṃ tāḍayetpāpomahābalamanobhavaḥ
asya dhāmnāpradagdhohaṃ śūnyatāṃ hivrajāmivai
nūtanaṅgṛhamicchāmistriyākhyaṃ patibhūpatim
kṛkalasyāpipuṇyasya priyeyaṃ śivamaṅgalā
tadgṛhaṃ sukalākhyaṃ medagdhuṃ pāpaḥ samudyataḥ
ayameṣasahasrākṣaḥ kāmenasahitobalī
kāmasya kāraṇātkasmātpūrvavṛttaṃ naviṃ dati
ahalyāyāḥ prasaṅgenameṣopasthovyajāyata
pauruṣaṃ himunerdṛṣṭvāsatyāścaiva pradhaṣarṇāt
naṣṭaḥ kāmasya doṣeṇasurarāṭtatrasaṃ sthitaḥ
bhuktavāndāruṇaṃ śāpaṃ duḥkhenamahatānvitaḥ
kṛkalasya priyāmenāṃ sukalāṃ puṇyacāriṇīm
eṣahaṃ tuṃ sahasrākṣaudyataḥ kāmasaṃ yutaḥ
yathāceṃ dreṇanāyātikāmaeṣatathākuru
dharmarājamahāprājṣabhavānmatimatāṃ varaḥ
ūnaṃ tejaḥ kariṣyāmikāmasya maraṇaṃ tathā
ekopāyomayādṛṣṭastamihaivaprapaśyatu
prajṣācaiṣāmahāprājṣāśakunīrūpacāriṇī
bharturāgamanaṃ puṇyaṃ śabdenākhyātukheyataḥ
duṣṭairnaṣṭānabhūyetasvasthacittā na saṃśayaḥ
prajṣāsaṃ preṣitātenagatāsāsukalāgṛham
pūjitāmānitāprajṣādhūpadīpādibhistadā
brāhmaṇaṃ sukalāpṛcchatkimeṣācavadenmama
brāhmaṇa uvāca
ityevamākarṇyasumaṅgalaṃ vacaḥ praharṣayuktāsahasābabhūva
dharmajṣam ekaṃ saguṇaṃ hikāṃ taṃ śakunātpradiṣṭaṃ hisamāgataṃ tam
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe bhūmikhaṇḍevenopākhyānesukalācaritre ṣaṭpaṣcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ
saptapaṣcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ
viṣṇur uvāca
krīḍāsatīrūpadharāprabhūtvāgehaṅgatācārupativratāyāḥ
tāmāgatāṃ satyasvarūpayuktāsāsādaraṃ vākyam uvācadhanyā
vākyaiḥ supuṇyaiḥ paripūjitāsā uvācakrīḍāsukalāṃ vihasya
tyaktvāgataḥ pāpatarāṃ supuṇyomām eva nāthaḥ śṛṇupuṇyakīrtiḥ
vākyaistupuṇyairabalāsvabhāvādākarṇyasarvaṃ sukalāsamuktam
saṃ śuddhabhāvāṃ caviciṃ tyacāhakasmādgataḥ sundarite'dyanāthaḥ
vihāyaterūpamatīvasatyamācakṣvasarvaṃ bhavatīsubhartuḥ
dhyānopayuktāsakalaṅkarotisakhīsvarūpāgṛhamāgatāme
krīḍābabhāṣeśṛṇusatyametaṃ caritrabhāvaṃ mamabhartturasya
ekāṃ taśīlāsaguṇānurūpāśuśrūṣayaikastamihaivadevi
yatastyaktvāgatobharttāmām eva ṃ maṃ dabhāginīm
patyāhīnāḥ kathaṃ nāryaḥ sujīvanti canirghṛṇāḥ
rūpaśṛṅgārasaubhāgyaṃ sukhaṃ saṃ paccanānyathā
nārīṇāṃ himahābhāgobhartāśāstreṣugīyate
tayāsarvaṃ samākarṇyayaduktaṅkrīḍayātadā
satyabhāvaṃ viditvāsāmene sambhāṣitaṃ tadā
viśvastāsāmahābhāgāsukalāpatidevatā
tām uvācapunaḥ sarvamātmaceṣṭānugaṃ vacaḥ
samāsenasamākhyātaṃ pūrvavṛttāṃ tamātmanaḥ
yathābhartāgatoyātrāṃ puṇyasādhanatatparaḥ
bodhitākrīḍayāsātusamāśvāsyapativratā
sūta uvāca
ekadātutayāproktaṅkrīḍayāsukalāṃ prati
sakhepaśyavanaṃ saumyaṃ divyavṛkṣairalaṅkṛtam
tatratīrthaṃ paraṃ puṇyamastipātakanāśanam
nānāvallīvitānaiś ca supuṣpaiḥ pariśobhitam
āvābhyāmapigaṃ tavyaṃ puṇyahetorvarānane
samākarṇyatayāsārddhaṃ sukalāmāyayātadā
kūjadbhiḥ pakṣibhiḥ puṇyaiḥ puṇyadhvanisamākulam
caṃ danādikavṛkṣaiś ca saurabhaiś ca virājitam
sarvabhogaiḥ susaṃ pūrṇaṃ mādhavyāmādhavenavai
racitaṃ mohanāyaivasukalāyāścakāraṇāt
tayāsārdhaṃ praviṣṭāsātadvanaṃ sarvabhāvanam
dadarśasaukhyadaṃ puṇyaṃ māyābhāvaṃ naviṃ dati
vīkṣamāṇāvanaṃ divyaṃ tayāsahajaneśvara
śakropicābhyayāttatradevamūrtivirājitaḥ
tayādūtyāsamaṃ prāptaḥ kāmastatrasamāgataḥ
sarvabhogapatirbhūtvākāmalīlāsamākulaḥ
kāmamāhasamābhāṣyaeṣāsāsukulāgatā
praharasvamahābhāgakrīḍāyāḥ purataḥ sthitām
māyāṅkṛtvāsamānītākrīḍayātavasaṃ nidhau
kāma uvāca
ātmarūpaṃ darśayasvacaturaṃ līlayānvitam
yenāhaṃ praharāmyetāṃ paṣcabāṇaiḥ sahasradṛk
kvāstetepauruṣaṃ mūḍhayenalokaṃ viḍaṃ base
kāma uvāca
tenāpidevadevenamahādevenaśūlinā
pūrvam eva hṛtaṃ rūpaṃ mamakāyonavidyate
icchāmyahaṃ yadānārīṃ haṃ tuṃ śṛṇuṣva sāṃ pratam
puṃ sāṅkāyaṃ samāśrityaātmarūpaṃ pradarśaye
pumāṃ saṃ vāsahasrākṣanāryāḥ kāryaṃ samāśraye
pūrvadṛṣṭāyadānārītām eva paricintayet
ciṃ tyamānasya puṃ sastunāryārūpaṃ punaḥ punaḥ
adṛṣṭaṃ tusamāśrityapuṃ samunmādayāmyaham
tathāpyunmādayāmyevaṃ nārīrūpaṃ na saṃśayaḥ
saṃ smaraṇātsmaronāmamamajātaṃ sureśvara
tāṃ dṛṣṭvātādṛśoraṅgavasturūpaṃ samāśraye
ātmatejaḥ prakāśenabādhyabādhakatāṃ vrajet
nārīrūpaṃ samāśrityadhīraṃ puruṣaṃ pramohayet
puruṣaṃ tusamāśrityabhāvayāmisuyoṣitam
rūpahīnosmiheindraasmadrūpaṃ samāśrayet
tavarūpaṃ samāśrityatāṃ sādhayeyathepsitām
evamuktvāsadevendraṅkāyaṃ tasya mahātmanaḥ
sakhāsaumādhavasyāpisamāśrityasumāyudhaḥ
tām eva haṃ tuṅkusumāyudhopisādhvīṃ supuṇyāṅkṛkalasya bhāryām
samutsukastiṣṭhatibāṇalakṣaṃ tasyāścakāyaṃ nayanairvilokya
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe bhūmikhaṇḍevenopākhyānesukalācaritre saptapaṣcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ
aṣṭapaṣcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ
viṣṇur uvāca
krīḍāprayuktāsuvanaṃ praviṣṭāvaiśyasya bhāryāsukalāsutanvī
dadarśasarvaṅgahanaṃ manoramaṃ tām eva papracchasakhīṃ satīsā
siddhaṃ sukāmaiḥ pravaraiḥ samastaiḥ papracchaharṣātsukalāsakhīṃ tām
krīḍovāca
evaṃ vākyaṃ tataḥ śrutvāharṣeṇamahatānvitā
samālokyamahadvṛttaṅkāmasya cadurātmanaḥ
vāyunānīyamānaṃ taṃ samāghrātinasaurabham
vātivāyuḥ svabhāvenasaurabheṇasamanvitaḥ
tadbāṇoviśatenāsāṃ yathātathāsulīlayā
sāgandhaṃ naivagṛhṇātipuṣpāṇāṃ cavarānanā
nacāsvādayatesātusurasānsāmahāsatī
lajjitaḥ parāṅmukhobhūtvābhūṃ papātalavacchadaiḥ
makaraṃ daḥ sudīnātmāphalādbhūmiṃ tataḥ punaḥ
bhakṣyatemakṣikābhiścayathāmṛtoraṇetathā
makṣikābhakṣyamāṇastupravāhenaprayātisaḥ
maṃ daṃ maṃ daṃ prayātyevataṃ hasanti capakṣiṇaḥ
sukalayājitohyeṣanimnaṃ paṃ thānamāśritaḥ
prītyāsametāratiḥ kāmabhāryāgatvābravītsāsukalāṃ vihasya
terūpamiṣṭamamalamindrasyāpimahātmanaḥ
yadeṣṭaṃ tetadābrūhisamāneṣye na saṃśayaḥ
sūta uvāca
vadaṃ tyautestriyaudṛṣṭvāśrutvovācasubhāṣitam
ratiṃ pratigṛhītvāmegatobharttāmahāmatiḥ
yatrametiṣṭhatebharttātatrāhaṃ patisaṃ yutā
tatrakāmaścameprītirayaṅkāyonirāśrayaḥ
vrīḍamānegatetedveyatrakāmomahābalaḥ
ūcatustaṃ mahāvīramindrakāyasamāśritam
cāpamākarṣamāṇaṃ taṃ netralakṣyaṃ mahābalam
durjayeyaṃ mahāprājṣatyajapauruṣamātmanaḥ
patikāmāmahābhāgāpativratāsadaivasā
kāma uvāca
yadidevitadācāhaṃ haniṣyāmi na saṃśayaḥ
athaveṣadharodevomahārūpaḥ surādhipaḥ
satayānugatastūrṇaṃ parayālīlayātadā
sarvabhogasamākīrṇaḥ sarvābharaṇaśobhitaḥ
divyamālyāṃ baradharodivyagaṃ dhānulepanaḥ
tayāratyāsamāyātoyatrāstepatidevatā
praty uvācamahābhāgāṃ sukalāṃ satyacāriṇīm
pūrvaṃ dūtīsamakṣaṃ teprītyācaprahitāmayā
śūraiś ca puruṣākāraiḥ sarvatraparirakṣitā
yāvatprasya ṃ datenetraṃ tāvatkālaṃ mahāmate
tvām eva ṃ hiprapaśyāmivanamadhyesamāgatām
samākhyātāstvayāśūrābhartuścatanayāḥ punaḥ
kathaṃ paśyāmyahaṃ tāvaddarśayasvamamāgrataḥ
mām eva ṃ parirakṣatedamaguṇaiḥ śaucaistudharmaḥ sadāsatyaṃ paśyasamāgataṃ mamapuraḥ śānti kṣamābhyāṃ yutam
bodhaścātimahābalaḥ pṛthuyaśāyomāṃ namuṃ cetkadābaddhāhaṃ dṛḍhabandhanaiḥ svaguṇajaiḥ sāṃ nidhyam eva ṅgataḥ
rakṣāyuktāḥ kṛtāḥ sarvesatyādyāmamasāṃ pratam
dharmalābhādikāḥ sarvedamabuddhiparākramāḥ
mām eva ṃ hiprarakṣanti kiṃ māṃ prārthayasebalāt
kobhavānnirbhayobhūtvādūtyāsārdhaṃ samāgataḥ
satyaṃ dharmastathāpuṇyaṃ jṣānādyāḥ prabalāstathā
mamabhartuḥ sahāyāścatemāṃ rakṣanti veśmani
ahaṃ rakṣāyutānityaṃ damaśānti parāyaṇā
namāṃ jetuṃ samarthaścaapisākṣācchacīpatiḥ
daṃ śitāhaṃ sadāsatyaṃ satyakenaivanānyathā
nirarthakāstasya bāṇābhaviṣyanti na saṃśayaḥ
tvām eva ṃ hihaniṣyanti dharmādayomahābhaṭāḥ
dūraṅgacchapalāyatvamatramātiṣṭhasāṃ pratam
vāryamāṇoyadātiṣṭherbhasmībhūtobhaviṣyasi
bhartrāvinānirīkṣetamamarūpaṃ yadābhavān
yathādārudahedagnistathādhakṣyāmi nānyathā
yathāgatāstathāsarvemahāśāpabhayāturāḥ
svaṃ svaṃ sthānaṃ mahārājaindrādyāḥ prayayustadā
gateṣuteṣusarveṣusukalāsāpativratā
svagṛhaṃ puṇyasaṃ yuktāpatidhyānenacāgatā
svagṛhaṃ puṇyasaṃ yuktaṃ sarvatīrthamayaṃ tadā
sarvayajṣamayaṃ rājansaṃ prāptāpatidevatā
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe bhūmikhaṇḍevenopākhyānesukalācaritreṣṭa paṣcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ
ekonaṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ
viṣṇur uvāca
kṛkalaḥ sarvatīrthānisādhayitvāgṛhaṃ prati
tṛptāḥ svargaṃ prayāsyanti pitaromamanānyathā
tāvatpratyakṣarūpeṇabaddhvātasya pitāmahān
divyarūpomahākāyaḥ kṛkalaṃ vākyamabravīt
tavatīrthaphalaṃ nāstiśramam eva vṛthākṛthāḥ
svayaṃ saṃ toṣamāpnoṣinahitepuṇyamuttamam
evaṃ śrutvātatovaiśyaḥ kṛkaloduḥkhapīḍitaḥ
bhavānkaḥ saṃ vadasyevaṅkasmādbaddhāḥ pitāmahāḥ
kenadoṣaprabhāveṇatanmetvaṅkāraṇaṃ vada
kasmāttīrthaphalaṃ nāstimamayātrākathaṃ nahi
sarvam eva samācakṣvayadijānāsisaṃ sphuṭam
pūtāṃ puṇyatamāṃ svīyāṃ bhāryāṃ tyaktvāprayātiyaḥ
tasya puṇyaphalaṃ sarvaṃ vṛthābhavatinānyathā
dharmācāraparāṃ puṇyāṃ sādhuvrataparāyaṇām
pativrataratāṃ bhāryāṃ suguṇāṃ puṇyavatsalām
tāmevāpiparityajyadharmakāryaṃ prayātiyaḥ
sarvācāraparābhavyādharmasādhanatatparā
pativrataratānityaṃ sarvadājñānavatsalā
evaṅguṇābhavedbhāryāyasya puṇyāmahāsatī
gaṅgādyāḥ puṇyanadyaścasāgarāstatranānyathā
tatrayajṣāścagāvaścaṛṣayastatranānyathā
tatrasarvāṇitīrthānipuṇyānivividhānica
bhāryāyogenatiṣṭhanti sarvāṇyetāninānyathā
puṇyabhāryāprayogeṇagārhasthyaṃ saṃ prajāyate
gṛhasthasya gṛhaḥ puṇyaḥ satyapuṇyasamanvitaḥ
gārhasthyaṃ casamāśrityasarvejīvanti jaṃ tavaḥ
tādṛśaṃ naivapaśyāmianyamāśramamuttamam
maṃ trāgnihotraṃ devāścasarvedharmāḥ sanātanāḥ
dānācārāḥ pravartaṃ teyasya puṃ saścavaigṛhe
evaṃ yobhāryayāhīnastasya gehaṃ vanāyate
yajṣāścavainasidhyanti dānānivividhānica
dharmakarmāṇisarvāṇipuṇyānivividhānica
nāstibhāryāsamaṃ tīrthaṃ dharmasādhanahetave
śṛṇuṣva tvaṅgṛhasthasya nānyodharmojagatraye
yatrabhāryāgṛhaṃ tatrapuruṣasyāpinānyathā
nāstibhāryāsamaṃ tīrthaṃ nāstibhāryāsamaṃ sukham
nāstibhāryāsamaṃ puṇyaṃ tāraṇāyahitāyaca
dharmayuktāṃ satīṃ bhāryāṃ tyaktvāyāsinarādhama
tayāvināyadātīrtheśrāddhadānaṅkṛtaṃ tvayā
tenadoṣeṇavaibaddhāstavapūrvapitāmahāḥ
bhavāṃ ścaurohyamīcaurāyaistubhuktaṃ sulolupaiḥ
tvayādattasya śrāddhasya annam eva ṃ tayāvinā
suputraḥ śraddhayāyuktaḥ śrāddhadānaṃ dadātiyaḥ
bhāryādattenapiṇḍenatasya puṇyaṃ vadāmyaham
yathā'mṛtasya pānenanṛṇāṃ tṛptirhijāyate
tathāpitṝṇāṃ śrāddhenasatyaṃ satyaṃ vadāmyaham
tvayaiṣāvaṃ citāmūḍhacaurakarmakṛtaṃ vṛthā
amīpitāmahāścaurāyairbhuktaṃ tutayāvinā
tadannam eva bhuṃ janti pitarohṛṣṭamānasāḥ
tenaivatṛptimāyānti saṃ tuṣṭāścabhavanti te
tasmādbhāryāṃ vinādharmaḥ puruṣasya nasidhyati
nāstibhāryāsamaṃ tīrthaṃ puṃ sāṃ sugatidāyakam
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe bhūmikhaṇḍevenopākhyānesukalācaritre ekonaṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ
ṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ
kṛkala uvāca
gacchagehaṃ mahābhāgatvāṃ vināduḥkhamācarat
sambodhayatvaṃ sukalāṃ svapatnīṃ dharmacāriṇīm
śrāddhadānaṅgṛhaṅgatvātasyāhastenavaikuru
smṛtvāpuṇyānitīrthāniyajasvatvaṃ surottamān
yajṣāḥ siddhiṃ tadāyānti yadāsyādgṛhiṇīgṛhe
viṣṇur uvāca
svagṛhaṃ prāpyamedhāvīdṛṣṭvātāṃ capativratām
sārthavāhenatenāpisvasthānaṃ prāpyabuddhimān
tayāsamāgataṃ dṛṣṭvābhartāraṃ dharmakovidam
kṛtaṃ sumaṅgalaṃ puṇyaṃ bharturāgamanetadā
samācaṣṭasadharmātmādharmasyāpiviceṣṭitam
samākarṇyamahābhāgābharturvākyaṃ mudāvaham
dharmavākyaṃ praśasyāthaanumenecataṃ tathā
viṣṇur uvāca
athosakṛkalovaiśyastayāsārdhaṃ supuṇyakam
cakāraśraddhayāśrāddhaṃ devatāgṛhasaṃ sthitaḥ
pitarodevagandharvāvimānaiś ca samāgatāḥ
tuṣṭuvustaumahātmānaudaṃ patīmunayastathā
ahaṃ cāpitathābrahmādevyāyuktomaheśvaraḥ
sarvedevāḥ sagandharvāvimānaiś ca samāgatāḥ
sarvedevāḥ sagandharvāstasyāḥ satyenatoṣitāḥ
ūcuścataumahātmānaudharmajṣausatyapaṇḍitau
kṛkala uvāca
sabhāryāyavaraṃ dātuṃ bhavaṃ tohisamāgatāḥ
eṣāsatīmahābhāgāsukalācārumaṅgalā
asyāḥ satyenatuṣṭāḥ smadātukāmāvaraṃ tava
samāsenatutatproktaṃ pūrvavṛttāṃ tam eva ca
tasyāścaritamāhātmyaṃ śrutvābhartāsaharṣitaḥ
tayāsahasadharmātmāharṣavyākulalocanaḥ
nanāmadevatāḥ sarvā uvācacapunaḥ punaḥ
yadituṣṭāmahābhāgātrayodevāḥ sanātanāḥ
anyecaṛṣayaḥ puṇyāḥ kṛpāṅkṛtvāmamopari
paścāddhivaiṣṇavaṃ lokaṃ sabhāryaścapitāmahaiḥ
gaṃ tumicchāmyahaṃ devāyadituṣṭāmahaujasaḥ
devā ūcuḥ
puṣpavṛṣṭiṃ tataścakrustayoruparibhūpate
jagurgītaṃ mahāpuṇyaṃ lalitaṃ susvaraṃ tataḥ
gandharvāgītatattvajñānanṛtuścāpsarogaṇāḥ
tatodevāḥ sagandharvāḥ svaṃ svaṃ sthānaṃ nṛpottama
varaṃ datvāprajagmustestūyamānāḥ pativratām
nārītīrthaṃ samākhyātamanyatiṅkacidvadāmite
yaḥ śṛṇotinarorājansarvapāpaiḥ pramucyate
śraddhayāśṛṇutenārīsukalākhyānamuttamam
brāhmaṇovedavidvāṃ ścakṣatriyovijayībhavet
dharmajṣojāyaterājansadācāraḥ sukhībhavet
vipulājāyatelakṣmīrdhanadhānyairalaṅkṛtā
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe bhūmikhaṇḍevenopākhyānesukalācaritreṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ
ekaṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ
bhāryātīrthaṃ samākhyātaṃ sarvatīrthottamottamam
pitṛtīrthaṃ samākhyāhiputrāṇāṃ tāraṇaṃ param
viṣṇur uvāca
kurukṣetremahātrekuṇḍalonāmabrāhmaṇaḥ
sukarmānāmasatputraḥ kuṇḍalasya mahātmanaḥ
dvāvetautumahātmānaujarayāparipīḍitau
tayoḥ śuśrūṣaṇaṃ cakrebhaktyācaparayātataḥ
tasmādvedānadhītesapituḥ śāstrāṇyanekaśaḥ
sarvācāraparodakṣodharmajṣojñānavatsalaḥ
aṅgasaṃ vāhanaṃ cakregurvoścasvayam eva saḥ
pādaprakṣālanaṃ caivasnānabhojanakīṅkriyām
mātāpitroścarājendraupacaryāṃ prakārayet
sūta uvāca
dayādānadamopetaḥ kāmaṅkrodhaṃ vijityasaḥ
daśāraṇyagatodhīmāṣjñānaśānti parāyaṇaḥ
sarveṃ driyāṇisaṃ yamyatapastepemahāmanāḥ
tat tapas tasya munayo dṛṣṭvā vismayam āyayuḥ
nedṛśaṅkenacittaptaṃ yathāsautapyatemuniḥ
devāś ca indrapramukhāḥ paraṃ vismayam āyayuḥ
ahoasya tapastīvraṃ śamaśceṃ driyasaṃ yamaḥ
śītavātātapasahodharādharaivasthitaḥ
naśṛṇotiyathāśabdaṅkasya ciddvijasattamaḥ
saṃ sthānaṃ tādṛśaṅgatvāsthitvāekāgramānasaḥ
brahmadhyānamayobhūtvāsānaṃ damukhapaṅkajaḥ
aśmakāṣṭhamayobhūtvāniśceṣṭogirivatsthitaḥ
tapaḥ iklaṣṭaśarīrotiśraddhāvānanasūyakaḥ
evaṃ varṣasahasraikaṃ saṃ jātaṃ tasya dhīmataḥ
pipīlikābhirbahvībhiḥ kṛtaṃ mṛdbhārasaṃ cayam
tasyoparimahākāyaṃ valmīkaṃ nijamaṃ diram
tamugratejasaṃ vipraṃ pradaśanti viṣolbaṇāḥ
saṃ prāpyagātramarmāṇiviṣaṃ tasya nabhedayet
tejasātasya viprasya nāgāḥ śānti mathāgaman
tasya kāyātsamudbhūtāarciṣodīptatejasaḥ
nānārūpāḥ subahuśodṛśyaṃ te ca pṛthakpṛthak
yathāmeghodaresūryaḥ praviṣṭobhātiraśmibhiḥ
sarpādaśanti vipraṃ taṃ sakrodhādaśanairapi
nabhiṃ danti cadaṃ ṣṭrāgrāccarmabhittvānṛpottama
trikālaṃ sādhyamānasya śītavarṣātapānvitaḥ
gataḥ kālomahārājapippalasya mahātmanaḥ
tadvaccavāyubhakṣaṃ tukṛtaṃ tenamahātmanā
trīṇivarṣasahasrāṇigatānitasya tapyataḥ
tasya mūrdhnitatodevaiḥ puṣpavṛṣṭiḥ kṛtāpurā
brahmajṣosimahābhāgadharmajṣosi na saṃśayaḥ
sarvajñānamayo'sitvaṃ saṃ jātaḥ svenakarmaṇā
yaṃ yaṃ tvaṃ vāṃ chasekāmaṃ taṃ taṃ prāpsyasinānyathā
samākarṇyamahadvākyaṃ pippalopimahāmanāḥ
praṇamyadevatāḥ sarvābhaktyānamitakaṃ dharaḥ
harṣeṇamahatāviṣṭovacanaṃ praty uvācasaḥ
idaṃ viśvaṃ jagatsarvaṃ mamavaśyaṃ yathābhavet
brahmaṇyaṃ sādhayennityaṃ viśvavaśyaṃ pacintayet
vidyādharapadaṃ labdhvākāmagāmīmahīyate
saṃ jātodevalokeśaḥ sarvaśāstraviśāradaḥ
yaṃ yaṃ cintayatekartuṃ taṃ taṃ hivaśamānayet
sūta uvāca
jṣātvāmānasikaṃ bhāvaṃ sārasastam uvācaha
sarvavaśyātmikīṃ siddhiṃ nāhaṃ manyetavaivahi
vaśyāvaśyamidaṅkarmaarvācīnaṃ praśasya te
parācīnaṃ najānāsipippalatvaṃ himūḍhadhīḥ
varṣāṇāṃ tusahasrāṇiyāvattrīṇitvayātapaḥ
samācīrṇaṃ tatogarvaṅkuruṣekiṃ mudhādvija
kuṇḍalasya sutodhīraḥ sukarmānāmayaḥ sudhīḥ
vaśyāvaśyaṃ jagatsarvaṃ tasyāsīcchṛṇusāṃ pratam
arvācīnaṃ parācīnaṃ savaijānātibuddhimān
lokenāstimahājṣānītatsamaḥ śṛṇupippala
nakuṇḍalasya putreṇasadṛśastvaṃ sukarmaṇā
nadattaṃ tenavaidānaṃ najñānaṃ paricinti tam
hutayajṣādikaṅkarmanakṛtaṃ tenavaikadā
nagatastīrthayātrāyāṃ nacavahnerupāsanam
svacchaṃ dacārījṣānātmāpitṛmātṛsuhṛtsadā
vedādhyayanasaṃ pannaḥ sarvaśāstrārthakovidaḥ
yādṛśaṃ tasya vaijñānaṃ bālasyāpisukarmaṇaḥ
tādṛśaṃ nāstitejñānaṃ vṛthātvaṅgarvamudvaheḥ
kobhavānpakṣirūpeṇamām eva ṃ parikutsayet
kasmānniṃ dasimejñānaṃ parācīnaṃ tukīdṛśam
arvācīnagatiṃ sarvāṃ parācīnasya sāṃ pratam
vadatvamaṇḍajaśreṣṭhajñānapūrvaṃ suvistaram
kiṃ vābrahmācaviṣṇuścakiṃ vārudrobhaviṣyasi
sārasa uvāca
tvayānaparitaptasya tapasaḥ sāṃ prataṃ śṛṇu
kuṇḍalasyāpiputrasya bālasyāpiyathāguṇaḥ
tathātenāstivaijñānaṃ parijṣātaṃ natatpadam
savadiṣyatidharmātmāsarvaṃ jñānaṃ tavaivahi
viṣṇur uvāca
evamākarṇyatatsarvaṃ sārasenaprabhāṣitam
nirjagāmasavegenadaśāraṇyaṃ mahāśramam
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe bhūmikhaṇḍevenopākhyāneekaṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ
dviṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ
viṣṇur uvāca
kuṇḍalasyāśramaṅgatvāsatyadharmasamākulam
sukarmāṇaṃ tatodṛṣṭvāpitṛmātṛparāyaṇam
śuśrūṣaṃ taṃ mahātmānaṅgurūsatyaparākramam
mahārūpaṃ mahātejaṃ mahājñānasamākulam
mātāpitroḥ padāṃ tetamupaviṣṭaṃ dadarśasaḥ
mahābhaktyānvitaṃ śāṃ taṃ sarvajñānamahānidhim
kuṇḍalasyāpiputreṇasukarmaṇāmahātmanā
āgataṃ pippalaṃ dṛṣṭvādvāradeśemahāmatim
āsanāttūrṇamutthāyaabhyutthānaṅkṛtaṃ punaḥ
āgacchatvaṃ mahābhāgavidyādharamahāmate
āsanaṃ pādyamarghaṃ cadadautasmaimahāmatiḥ
varṣāṇāṃ casahasrāṇitrīṇiyāvattvayātapaḥ
vaśyatvaṃ catvayāprāptaṅkāmacārastathaiva ca
dṛṣṭvāteceṣṭitaṃ sarvaṃ sārasenamahātmanā
mamābhidhānaṅkathitaṃ mamajñānamanuttamam
sarvaṃ jñānaṃ vadenmāṃ hisatukaḥ prabhurīśvaraḥ
brahmāṇaṃ tvaṃ mahājñānaṃ taṃ viddhiparameśvaram
viṣṇur uvāca
evamuktaḥ sadharmātmāsukarmānṛpanaṃ dana
paśyakautukamevādyatvaṃ vaśyāvaśyakāraṇam
indrādyālokapālāścadevāścāgnipurogamāḥ
samāgatāḥ samāhūtānānāvidyādharāstathā
sukarmāṇaṃ tataḥ procurdevāścāgnipurogamāḥ
kasmātsmṛtāstvayāvipratatorthakāraṇaṃ vada
mām eva ṃ bhāṣatevipravaśyāvaśyatvakāraṇam
pratyayārthaṃ samāhūtāasyaiva ca mahātmanaḥ
tamūcustetatodevāḥ sukarmāṇaṃ mahāmatim
asmākaṃ darśanaṃ vripranamoghaṃ jāyatevaram
acalāṃ dattadeveṃ drāḥ subhaktiṃ bhāvasaṃ yutām
tadvanmātācadeveśāvaramanyaṃ nayācaye
devā ūcuḥ
sukarmaṣchrūyatāṃ vākyaṃ prītyāyuktāsadaivate
evamuktvāgatādevāḥ svarlokaṃ nṛpanaṃ dana
dṛṣṭaṃ tupippalenāpikautukaṃ camahādbhutam
tam uvācasadharmātmāpippalaṅkuṇḍalātmajam
arvācīnaṃ tvidaṃ rūpaṃ parācīnaṃ cakīdṛśam
yenalokāḥ pramodaṃ teindrādyāḥ sacarācarāḥ
asya rūpaṃ nadṛṣṭaṃ hikenāpy eva hiyoginā
śrutirevavadatyevaṃ taṃ vaktuṃ śaṅkitevasā
apāṇipādanāsaścaakarṇomukhavarjitaḥ
teṣāmuktamakarṇaścasaśṛṇotisusākṣyadaḥ
pāṇihīnopigṛhṇātipādahīnaḥ pradhāvati
sarvatradṛśyatevipravyāpakaḥ pādavarjitaḥ
yaṃ jānātimahāyogīvyāsodharmārthakovidaḥ
tejomūrtiḥ sacākāśam ekavarṇamanaṃ takam
tadetannirmalaṃ rūpaṃ śrutirākhyātiniścitam
vyāsaścaivahijānātimārkaṇḍeyaścatatpadam
arvācīnaṃ pravakṣyāmi śṛṇuṣva ikāgramānasaḥ
yadāsaṃ hṛtyabhūtātmāsvayam ekaḥ pragacchati
apsuśayyāṃ samāsthāyaśeṣabhogāsanasthitaḥ
tamāśrityasvapityekobahukālaṃ janārdanaḥ
jalāṃ dhakārasaṃ taptomārkaṇḍeyomahāmuniḥ
sthānamicchansayogātmānirviṇṇobhramaṇenasaḥ
bhramamāṇaḥ sadadṛśeśeṣaparyaṅkaśāyinam
sūryakoṭipratīkāśaṃ divyābharaṇabhūṣitam
divyamālyāṃ baradharaṃ sarvavyāpinamīśvaram
yoganidrāṅgataṅkāṃ taṃ śaṅkhacakragadādharam
ekānārīmahābhāgākṛṣṇāṃ janacayopamā
daṃ ṣṭrākarālavadanābhīmarūpādvijottama
tayoktosaumuniśreṣṭhomābhairitimahāmuniḥ
padmapatraṃ suvistīrṇaṃ paṣcayojanamāyatam
tasminpatremahādevyāmārkaṇḍeyoniveśitaḥ
tām uvācasayogīṃ draḥ kātvaṃ bhavasibhāmini
pṛṣṭaivaṃ muninādevīsādaraṃ prāhabhūsura
nāgabhogāṅkaparyaṅkesayaḥ svapitikeśavaḥ
asyāhaṃ vaiṣṇavīśaktiḥ kālarātririhocyate
mahāmāyāpurāṇeṣujaganmohāyakathyate
ityuktvāsāgatādevīaṃ tardhānaṃ hipippalaḥ
devyāmanugatāyāṃ tumārkaṇḍeyasya paśyataḥ
tasya nābhyāṃ samutpannaṃ paṅkajaṃ hāṭakaprabham
tasmājjajṣemahātejābrahmālokapitāmahaḥ
tasmādvijajṣirelokāḥ sarvesthāvarajaṅgamāḥ
indrādyālokapālāścadevāścāgnipurogamāḥ
arvācīnaṃ svarūpaṃ tudarśitaṃ himayānṛpa
arvācīnasvarūpoyaṃ parācīnonirāśrayaḥ
yadāsadarśayetkāyaṅkāyarūpābhavanti te
brahmādyāḥ sarvalokāścaarvācīnāhipippala
parācīnaḥ sabhūtātmāyaṃ supaśyanti yoginaḥ
mokṣarūpaṃ paraṃ sthānaṃ parabrahmasvarūpakam
parācīnasya yadrūpaṃ vidyādharatavāgrataḥ
kasmādetanmahājñānamudbhūtaṃ tavasuvrata
arvācīnagatiṃ vidvānparācīnagatiṃ tathā
tapasonaivapaśyāmiparāṃ niṣṭhāṃ hisuvrata
yajanaṃ yājanaṃ tīrthaṃ tapovākṛtavānasi
tatprabhāvaṃ vadasvaivaṅkenajñānaṃ tavākhilam
tapaevanajānāminakṛtaṅkāyaśoṣaṇam
yajanaṃ yājanaṃ vāpinajānetīrthasādhanam
namayāsādhitaṃ dhyānaṃ puṇyakālaṃ sukarmajam
sphuṭam ekaṃ prajānāmipitṛmātṛprapūjanam
pādaprakṣālanaṃ puṇyaṃ svayam eva karomyaham
aṅgasaṃ vāhanaṃ snānaṃ bhojanādikam eva ca
trikāledhyānasaṃ līnaḥ sādhayāmidinedine
bhaktibhāvenaviṃ dāmipūjayāmisubhāvataḥ
gurūmejīvamānautuyāvatkālaṃ hipippala
tāvatkālaṃ himelābhohyatulaścaprajāyate
trikālaṃ pūjayāmyetauśuddhabhāvenacetasā
svacchaṃ dalīlāsaṃ cārīvartāmy eva hipippala
kiṃ mecānyenatapasākiṃ ekāyasya śoṣaṇaiḥ
kiṃ mesutīrthayātrābhiranyaiḥ puṇyaiś ca sāṃ pratam
makhānām eva sarveṣāṃ yatphalaṃ prāpyatedvija
tatphalaṃ tumayādṛṣṭaṃ pituḥ śuśrūṣaṇādapi
mātuḥ śuśrūṣaṇaṃ tadvatputrāṇāṅgatidāyakam
putrasya jāyatelokomātuḥ śuśrūṣaṇādapi
pituḥ śuśrūṣaṇetadvanmahatpuṇyaṃ prajāyate
tatragaṅgāgayātīrthaṃ tatrapuṣkaram eva ca
yatramātāpitātiṣṭhetputrasyāpi na saṃśayaḥ
anyānitatratīrthānipuṇyānivividhānica
bhavaṃ tyetāniputrasya pituḥ śuśrūṣaṇādapi
pituḥ śuśrūṣaṇāttasya dānasya tapasaḥ phalam
pituḥ śuśrūṣaṇātpuṇyaṃ putraḥ prāpnotyanuttamam
jīvamānaugurūtvetausvamātāpitarautathā
śuśrūṣatesutobhūtvātasya puṇyaphalaṃ śṛṇu
devāstasyāpituṣyanti ṛṣayaḥ puṇyavatsalāḥ
trayolokāstutuṣyanti pituḥ śuśrūṣaṇādiha
mātāpitrostuyaḥ pādaunityam eva hikṣālayet
puṇyairmiṣṭānnapānairyaḥ pitaraṃ mātaraṃ tathā
tāmbūlaiśchādanaiś ca iva pānaiścāśanakaistathā
bhaktyācānnenapuṇyenagurūyenābhipūjitau
sarvajṣānībhavetsopiyaśaḥ kīrtimavāpnuyāt
mātaraṃ pitaraṃ dṛṣṭvāharṣāt sambhāṣayetsutaḥ
gāvaḥ sauhṛdyamāyānti putrasya sukhadāḥ sadā
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe bhūmikhaṇḍevenopākhyānemātṛpitṛtīrtha
māhātmyedviṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ
triṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ
tayoścāpidvijaśreṣṭhamātāpitroścasnātayoḥ
putrasyāpihisarvāṅgepataṃ tyaṃ bukaṇāyadā
sarvatīrthasamaṃ snānaṃ putrasyāpisujāyate
vyādhitaṅkuṣṭhinaṃ tātaṃ mātaraṃ catathāvidhām
viṣṇustasya prasannātmājāyatenātrasaṃśayaḥ
prayātivaiṣṇavaṃ lokaṃ yadaprāpyaṃ hiyogibhiḥ
mahāgadenasaṃ prāptauparityajatipāpadhīḥ
putronarakamāpnotidāruṇaṅkṛmisaṅkulam
vṛddhābhyāṃ casamāhūtogurūbhyāmihasāṃ pratam
naprayātisutobhūtvātasya pāpaṃ vadāmyaham
viṣṭhāśījāyatemūḍhogrāmaghroṇī na saṃśayaḥ
yāvajjanmasahasraṃ tupunaḥ śvācābhijāyate
mūtraṃ viṣṭhāṃ sabhuṃ jītayāvajjanmasahasrakam
kṛṣṇasarpobhavetpāpīyāvajjanmaśatadvayam
mātaraṃ pitaraṃ vṛddhamavajṣāyapravarttate
grāhopijāyateduṣṭojanmakoṭiśatairapi
sacapāpībhavedvyāghraḥ paścādṛkṣaḥ prajāyate
mātaraṃ pitaraṃ putroyonamanyetaduṣṭadhīḥ
nāstimātṛsamaṃ tīrthaṃ putrāṇāṃ capituḥ samam
tasmādahaṃ mahāprājṣapitṛdevaṃ prapūjaye
mātṛpitṛprasādenasaṃ jātaṃ jñānamuttamam
trilokīyaṃ samastātusaṃ yātāmamavaśyatām
arvācīnagatiṃ jānedevasyāsyamahātmanaḥ
vāsudevasya tasyaivaparācīnāṃ mahāmate
sarvaṃ jñānaṃ samudbhūtaṃ pitṛmātṛprasādataḥ
konapūjayatevidvānpitaraṃ mātaraṃ tathā
sāṅgopāṅgairadhītaistaiḥ śrutiśāstrasamanvitaiḥ
mātānapūjitāyenatasya vedānirarthakāḥ
yajṣaiś ca tapasāviprakiṃ dānaiḥ kiṃ capūjanaiḥ
prayātitasya vaiphalyaṃ namātāyenapūjitā
napitāpūjitoyenajīvamānogṛhesthitaḥ
eṣaputrasya vaiyajṣodānam eva na saṃśayaḥ
dānasyāpiphalaṃ tenatīrthasyāpi na saṃśayaḥ
yajṣasyāpiphalaṃ prāptaṃ mātāyenāpyupāsitā
tasya sarvāsusaṃ siddhāyajṣādyāḥ puṇyadāḥ kriyāḥ
etadarthaṃ samājṣātaṃ dharmaśāstraṃ śrutaṃ mayā
tuṣṭepitarisaṃ prāptaṃ yadurājṣāpurāsukham
ruṣṭepitaricaprāptaṃ mahatpāpaṃ purāśṛṇu
ruruṇāpauraveṇāpipitrāśaptenabhūtale
evaṃ jñānaṃ mayācāptaṃ dvāvetauyadupāsitau
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe bhūmikhaṇḍevenopākhyānemātāpitṛtīrtha
māhātmyetriṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ
catuḥ ṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ
sakalaṃ vistareṇāpivadamekuṇḍalātmaja
śrūyatāmabhidhāsyāmicaritraṃ pāpanāśanam
nahuṣasya supuṇyasya yayāteścamahātmanaḥ
somavaṃ śātprabhūtohinahuṣomedinīpatiḥ
dānadharmānanekāṃ ścacakārahyatulānapi
makhānāmaśvamedhānāmiyājaśatamuttamam
vājapeyaśataṃ cāpianyānyajñānanekadhā
ātmanaḥ puṇyabhāvenaindralokamavāpasaḥ
putraṃ dharmaguṇopetaṃ prajāpālaṃ cakārasaḥ
yayātiṃ satyasaṃ pannaṃ dharmavīryaṃ mahāmatim
yayātiḥ satyasaṃ pannaḥ prajādharmeṇapālayet
yājayāmāsadharmajṣaḥ śrutvādharmamanuttamam
yajṣatīrthādikaṃ sarvaṃ dānapuṇyaṃ cakārasaḥ
rājyaṃ cakāramedhāvīsatyadharmeṇavaitadā
yāvadaśītisahasrāṇivarṣāṇāṃ nṛpanaṃ danaḥ
tāvatkālaṅgataṃ tasya yayātestumahātmanaḥ
teṣāṃ nāmānivakṣyāmi śṛṇuṣva ikāgramānasaḥ
tasyāsījjyeṣṭhaputrasturururnāmamahābalaḥ
pururnāmadvitīyo'bhūtkuruścānyastṛtīyakaḥ
yadurnāmasadharmātmācaturthonṛpateḥ sutaḥ
evaṃ catvāraḥ putrāścayayātestumahātmanaḥ
tejasāpauruṣeṇāpipitṛtulyaparākramāḥ
evaṃ rājyaṅkṛtaṃ tenadharmeṇāpiyayātinā
viṣṇur uvāca
ekadātudvijaśreṣṭhonāradobrahmanaṃ danaḥ
draṃ lokaṅgatorājandraṣṭuṃ caiva puraṃ daram
devovipraṃ samāyāṃ taṃ sarvajṣaṃ jñānapaṇḍitam
nārada uvāca
devarājakṛtaṃ sarvaṃ bhaktyāyaccaprabhāṣitam
saṃ tuṣṭosmimahāprājṣapraśnottaraṃ vadāmyaham
mahīlokātsusaṃ prāptaḥ sāṃ prataṃ tavamaṃ diram
tvāmanveṣṭuṃ samāyātodṛṣṭvānāhuṣam eva ca
satyadharmeṇakorājāprajāḥ pālayatesadā
sarvadharmasamāyuktaḥ śrutavāṣjñānavānguṇī
pṛthivyāmastikorājāvedajṣobrāhmaṇapriyaḥ
nārada uvāca
yasya satyenavīryeṇasarvelokāḥ pratiṣṭhitāḥ
bhavādṛśohibhūrlokeyayātirnahuṣātmajaḥ
pituḥ śreṣṭhomahārājahyaśvamedhaśataṃ tathā
vājapeyaśataṃ cakreyayātiḥ pṛthivīpatiḥ
dattānyanekarūpāṇidānānitenabhaktitaḥ
gavāṃ lakṣasahasrāṇigavāṅkoṭiśatānica
koṭihomāṃ ścakārāthalakṣahomāṃ stathaiva ca
bhūmidānādidānānibrāhmaṇebhyodadāccayaḥ
evaṅguṇaiḥ samāyuktoyayātirnahuṣātmajaḥ
varṣāṇāṃ tusahasrāṇiaśītirnṛpasattamaḥ
evamākarṇyadeveṃ dronāradātsamunīśvarāt
samālocyasamedhāvī sambhītodharmapālanāt
śatayajṣaprabhāveṇanahuṣohipurāmama
śacībuddhiprabhāveṇapadabhraṣṭovyajāyata
tādṛśoyaṃ mahārājaḥ pitustulyaparākramaḥ
prāpsyatenātrasandehaḥ padamaindraṃ na saṃśayaḥ
yenakenāpyupāyenataṃ bhūpaṃ divamānaye
ityevaṃ cintayāmāsatasmādbhītaḥ sureśvaraḥ
bhūpālasya nṛpaśreṣṭhayayāteḥ sumahadbhayāt
tamānetuṃ tatodūtaṃ preṣayāmāsadevarāṭ
sārathiṃ mātaliṃ nāmavimānenasamanvitam
sabhāyāṃ varttamānastuyathāindraḥ praśobhate
tathāyayātirdharmātmāsvasabhāyāṃ virājate
tam uvācamahātmānaṃ rājānaṃ satyabhūṣaṇam
sārathirdevarājasya śṛṇurājanvacomama
prahitodevarājenasakāśaṃ tavasāṃ pratam
āgaṃ tavyaṃ tvayādevadraṃ lokaṃ hinānyathā
putrerājyaṃ visṛjyaivakṛtvācāṃ teṣṭimuttamām
ilorājāmahātejāvasatenahuṣātmaja
purūravāmahāvīryovipracittirmahāmanāḥ
sagaronāmamedhāvīnahuṣaścapitātava
ṛtavīryaḥ kṛtajṣaścaśaṃ tanuścamahāmanāḥ
bharatoyuvanāśvaścakārtavīryonareśvaraḥ
yajṣānāhṛtyabahudhāmodaṃ tedivibhūbhṛtaḥ
yayātir uvāca
mātalir uvāca
yadaśītisahasrāṇivarṣāṇāṃ hitvayānṛpa
dānapuṇyādikaṅkarmayajṣaistuparisādhitam
divaṅgacchamahārājakarmaṇāsvenabhūpate
paṃ cātmakaṃ śarīraṃ cabhūmautyajamahāmate
divyarūpaṃ samāsthāyabhuṅkṣvabhogānmanonugān
yathāyathākṛtābhūmauyajṣādānaṃ tapaścate
tathātathāsvargabhogāḥ prārthayaṃ tenareśvara
yayātir uvāca
yenakāyenasidhyetasukṛtaṃ duṣkṛtaṃ bhuvi
mātalir uvāca
yatraivopārjitaṅkāyaṃ paṃ cātmakamidaṃ nṛpa
itaremānavāḥ sarvepāpapuṇyaprasādhakāḥ
yayātir uvāca
paṃ cātmakenakāyenasukṛtaṃ duṣkṛtaṃ narāḥ
utpādyaivaprayāṃ tyevaadhaūrdhvaṃ tumātale
koviśeṣohidharmajṣabhūmaukāyaṃ parityajet
dṛṣṭāṃ todṛśyatesūtapratyakṣaṃ martyamaṇḍale
viśeṣaṃ naivapaśyāmipāpapuṇyasya cādhikam
ātmākāyaścadvāvetaumitrarūpāvubhāvapi
kāyaṃ mitraṃ parityajyaātmāyātisuniścitaḥ
mātalir uvāca
satyamuktaṃ tvayārājankāyaṃ tyaktvāprayātisaḥ
sambaṃ dhonāstitenāpisamaṅkāyenacātmanaḥ
yasmātpaṣcatvarūpo'yaṃ saṃ dhijarjaritaḥ sadā
jarayāpīḍyamānastuvyādhibhirdūṣitaḥ sadā
ākulavyākulobhūtvājīvastyaktvāprayātisaḥ
aśvamedhādibhiryajṣaistīrthaiḥ saṃ yamanaistathā
supuṇyaiḥ sukṛtaiścānyairjarānaivapradhāryate
pātakaiś ca mahārājadravatekāyam eva sā
yayātir uvāca
kasmājjarāsamutpannākasmātkāyaṃ prapīḍayet
mātalir uvāca
haṃ tatevarṇayiṣyāmijarāyāḥ parikāraṇam
yasmācceyaṃ samudbhūtākāyamadhyenṛpottama
paṣcabhūtātmakaḥ kāyoviṣayaiḥ paṣcabhiḥ śritaḥ
yadātmātyajaterājansakāyaḥ paridhakṣyate
tasmādvijāyatedhūmodhūmānmeghāścajajṣire
meghādāpaḥ pravartaṃ teadbhyaḥ pṛthvīprakalpate
jalamāyātisādhvīsāyathānārīrajasvalā
rasātprabhavatecānnamannācchukraṃ na saṃśayaḥ
śukrāddhijāyatekāyaḥ kurūpaḥ kāya eva ca
yathāpṛthvīsṛjedgaṃ dhānrasaiś ca ratibhūtale
tathākāyaścarennityaṃ rasādhārohisarvaśaḥ
tasmājjajṣemahāvahnirdṛṣṭāṃ taṃ paśyabhūpate
yathākāṣṭhādbhavedvahniḥ punaḥ kāṣṭhaṃ prakāśayet
tatrasaṃ caratenityaṅkāyaṃ puṣṇātibhūpate
yāvadrasasya cādhikyaṃ tāvajjīvaḥ praśānti mān
caritvātādṛśaṃ vahniḥ kṣudhārūpeṇavartate
pradānaṃ labhatecānnamudakaṃ cāpibhūpate
śoṇitaṃ caratevahnistadvadvīryaṃ na saṃśayaḥ
yakṣmarogobhavettasmātsarvakāyapraṇāśakaḥ
grīvāpṛṣṭhaṅkaṭiṃ pāyuṃ sarvāsvevatusaṃ dhiṣu
tasyā'dhikyaṃ carennityaṅkāyaṃ puṣṇātisarvataḥ
tenaivajāyatekāmaḥ śalyarūpobhavennṛpa
sakāmāgniḥ samākhyātobalanāśakaronṛpa
nārīṃ casaṃ śrayetprāṇīpīḍitaḥ kāmavahninā
savahniḥ pracaretkāyeśoṇitaṃ śukram eva ca
śukraśoṇitayornāśācchūnyadehobhijāyate
atīvajāyatevāyuḥ pracaṇḍodāruṇākṛtiḥ
dṛṣṭāśrutātuyānārītaccittobhramatesadā
virūpaścasurūpaścadhyānānmadhyeprajāyate
balahīnoyadākāmīmāṃ saśoṇitasaṅkṣayāt
palitaṃ jāyatekāyenāśitekāmavahninā
tasmātsaṃ jāyatekāmīvṛddhobhūtvādinedine
surateciṃ tatenārīṃ yathāvārddhuṣikonaraḥ
tasmātprajāyatekāyonāśarūpaṃ samṛcchati
agniḥ prajāyatebhūyojarārūpo na saṃśayaḥ
prāṇināṅkṣayarūpeṇajvarobhavatidāruṇaḥ
sthāvarājaṅgamāḥ sarvejvareṇaparipīḍitāḥ
nāśamāyānti tesarvebahupīḍāprapīḍitāḥ
evamuktomahārājomātaliṃ vākyamabravīt
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe bhūmikhaṇḍevenopākhyānemātāpitṛtīrthamāhātmye
catuḥ ṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ
paṣcaṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ
yayātir uvāca
dharmasya rakṣakaḥ kāyomātalecātmanāsaha
nākameṣanaprayātitanmetvaṅkāraṇaṃ vada
mātalir uvāca
paṃ cānāmapibhūtānāṃ saṅgatirnāstibhūpate
ātmanāsahavartaṃ tesaṅgatyānaivapaṣcate
sarveṣāṃ tatrasaṅghātaḥ kāyagrāmepravartate
jarayāpīḍitāḥ sarveḥ svaṃ svaṃ sthānaṃ prayānti te
yathārasādhikāpṛthvīmahārājaprakalpitā
rasaiḥ iklannātataḥ pṛthvīmṛdutvaṃ yātibhūpate
chidrāṇyevaprajāyaṃ tevalmīkāścamahodarāḥ
tadvatkāyeprajāyaṃ tegaṇḍamālāvicārcikāḥ
gulmāstatraprajāyaṃ tesadyaḥ pīḍākarāstadā
ebhirdoṣaiḥ samāyuktaḥ kāyoyaṃ nahuṣātmaja
kathaṃ prāṇasamāyogāddivaṃ yātinareśvara
kāyepārthivabhāgo'yaṃ samānārthaṃ pratiṣṭhitaḥ
nakāyaḥ svargamāyātiyathāpṛthvītathāsthitaḥ
etat te sarvam ākhyātaṃ doṣaughaiḥ pārthivasya yaḥ
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe bhūmikhaṇḍevenopākhyānemātāpitṛtīrtha
māhātmyepaṣcaṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ
ṣaṭṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ
yayātir uvāca
pāpātpatatikāyoyaṃ dharmāccaśṛṇumātale
viśeṣaṃ nacapaśyāmipuṇyasyāpimahītale
punaḥ prajāyatekāyoyathāhipatanaṃ purā
mātalir uvāca
athanārakiṇāṃ puṃ sāmadharmādevakevalāt
kṣaṇamātreṇabhūtebhyaḥ śarīramupajāyate
sadyaḥ prajāyatedivyaṃ śarīraṃ bhūtasārataḥ
karmaṇāvyatimiśreṇayaccharīraṃ mahātmanām
udbhijjāḥ sthāvarājṣeyāstṛṇagulmādirūpiṇaḥ
kṛmikīṭapataṅgādyāḥ svedajānāmadehinaḥ
aṇḍajāḥ pakṣiṇaḥ sarvesarpānakrāścabhūpate
jarāyujāścavijṣeyāmānuṣāścacatuṣpadāḥ
vāyunādhamyamānācakṣetrebījaṃ prapadyate
yathāuptānibījānisaṃ siktānyaṃ bhasāpunaḥ
tanmūlādaṅkurotpattiraṅkurātparṇa sambhavaḥ
parṇānnālaṃ tataḥ kāṇḍaṅkāṇḍāccaprabhavaḥ punaḥ
prabhavāccabhavetkṣīraṅkṣīrāttaṃ dula sambhavaḥ
taṃ dulāccatataḥ pakvābhavaṃ tyoṣadhayastathā
yavādyāḥ śāliparyaṃ tāḥ śreṣṭhāḥ saptadaśasmṛtāḥ
oṣadhyaḥ phalasārāḍhyāḥ śeṣākṣudrāḥ prakīrtitāḥ
etālūnāmarditāścamunibhiḥ pūrvasaṃ skṛtāḥ
śūrpolūkhalapātrādyaiḥ sthālikodakavahnibhiḥ
ṣaḍvidhāhisvabhedenapariṇāmaṃ vrajanti tāḥ
anyonyarasasaṃ yogādanekasvādatāṅgatāḥ
bhakṣyaṃ bhojyaṃ peyalehyaṃ coṣyaṅkhādyaṃ cabhūpate
tāsāṃ bhedāḥ ṣaḍaṅgāścamadhurādyāścaṣaḍguṇāḥ
annamūlāśayesarvaprāṇānsthāpayatikramāt
apakvaṃ bhuktamāhāraṃ savāyuḥ kurutedvidhā
saṃ praviśyānnamadhyecapakvaṅkṛtvāpṛthagguṇam
jalasyādhaḥ svayaṃ prāṇaḥ sthitvāgniṃ dhamateśanaiḥ
vāyunādhamyamānogniratyuṣṇaṅkurutejalam
dvidhābhavatitatpakvaṃ pṛthaikkaṭṭaṃ pṛthagrasaḥ
malairdvādaśabhiḥ kiṭṭaṃ bhinnaṃ dehādbahirvrajet
karṇākṣināsikājihvādaṃ toṣṭhaprajanaṅgudā
malānasravedathasvedoviṇmūtraṃ dvādaśasmṛtāḥ
hṛtpadmepratibaddhāścasarvanāḍyaḥ samaṃ tataḥ
tāsāṃ mukheṣutaṃ sūkṣmaṃ prāṇaḥ sthāpayaterasam
rasenatenatānāḍīḥ prāṇaḥ pūrayatepunaḥ
saṃ tarpayanti tānāḍyaḥ pūrṇādehaṃ samaṃ tataḥ
tataḥ sanāḍīmadhyasthaḥ śārīreṇoṣmaṇārasaḥ
tvaṅmāṃ sāsthimajjāmedorudhiraṃ caprajāyate
raktāllomānimāṃ saṃ cakeśāḥ snāyuścamāṃ sataḥ
snāyormajjātathāsthīnivasāmajjāsthi sambhavā
majjākāreṇavaikalyaṃ śukraṃ caprasavātmakam
itidvādaśaśāntasya pariṇāmāḥ prakīrtitāḥ
śukraṃ tasya parīṇāmaḥ śukrāddehasya sambhavaḥ
ṛtukāleyadāśukraṃ nirdoṣaṃ yonisaṃ sthitam
tadātadvāyusaṃ sṛṣṭaṃ strīraktenaikatāṃ vrajet
visargakāleśukrasya jīvaḥ kāraṇasaṃ yutaḥ
māṃ satvaṃ māsamātreṇapaṣcadhājāyatepunaḥ
grīvāśiraścaskaṃ dhaścapṛṣṭhavaṃ śastathodaram
pāṇīpādautathāpārśvaukaṭirgātraṃ tathaiva ca
tribhirmāsaiḥ prajāyaṃ teśataśoṅkurasaṃ dhayaḥ
māsaiś ca turbhirjāyaṃ teaṅgulyādiyathākramam
mukhaṃ nāsācakarṇaucamāsairjāyanti paṣcabhiḥ
daṃ tapaṅktistathājihvājāyatetunakhāḥ punaḥ
karṇayoścabhavecchidraṃ ṣaṇmāsābhyaṃ tarepunaḥ
pāyurmeḍhramupasthaṃ caśiśnaścāpyujāyate
aṅgapratyaṅgasaṃ pūrṇaṃ śiraḥ keśasamanvitam
vibhaktāvayavaspaṣṭaṃ punarmāsāṣṭamebhavet
paṃ cātmakasamāyuktaḥ paripakvaḥ satiṣṭhati
māturāhāravīryeṇaṣaḍvidhenarasenaca
tataḥ smṛtiṃ labhejjīvaḥ saṃ pūrṇosmiṣcharīrake
sukhaṃ duḥkhaṃ vijānātinidrāṃ svapnaṃ purākṛtam
mṛtaścāhaṃ punarjātojātaścāhaṃ punarmṛtaḥ
nānāyonisahasrāṇimayādṛṣṭānyanekadhā
adhunājātamātrohaṃ prāptasaṃ skāra eva ca
adhyeṣyāmiparaṃ jñānaṃ saṃ sāravinivartakam
avaśyaṅgarbhaduḥkhenamahatāparipīḍitaḥ
jīvaḥ karmavaśādāstemokṣopāyaṃ vicintayet
yathāgirivarākrāṃ taḥ kaścidduḥkhenatiṣṭhati
tathājarāyuṇādehīduḥkhanti ṣṭhatiduḥkhitaḥ
patitaḥ sāgareyadvadduḥkhamāstesamākulaḥ
garbhakuṃ bhetathākṣiptaḥ pacyatejaṭharāgninā
yadduḥkhaṃ jāyatetasya tadgarbheṣṭaguṇaṃ bhavet
garbhavāsātparaṃ vāsaṅkaṣṭaṃ naivāstikutracit
dehināṃ duḥkhamatulaṃ sughoramapisaṅkaṭam
ityetadgarbhaduḥkhaṃ hiprāṇināṃ parikīrtitam
carasthirāṇāṃ sarveṣāmātmagarbhānurūpataḥ
garbhātkoṭiguṇāpīḍāyoniyaṃ tranipīḍanāt
saṃ mūrcchitasya jāyetajāyamānasya dehinaḥ
ikṣuvatpīḍyamānasya pāpamudgarapeṣaṇāt
garbhānniṣkramamāṇasya prabalaiḥ sūtivāyubhiḥ
jāyatesumahadduḥkhaṃ paritrāṇaṃ naviṃ dati
yaṃ treṇapīḍyamānāḥ syurniḥ sārāścayathekṣavaḥ
tathāśarīraṃ yonisthaṃ pātyateyaṃ trapīḍanāt
raktamāṃ savasāliptaṃ viṇmūtradravyabhājanam
vadanaikamahādvāraṅgavākṣāṣṭakabhūṣitam
oṣṭhadvayakapāṭaṃ tudaṃ tajihvāgalānvitam
jarāśokasamāviṣṭaṅkālavaktrānalesthitam
kāmakrodhasamākrāṃ taṃ śvasanaiścopamarditam
bhogatṛṣṇāturaṅgūḍhaṃ rāgadveṣavaśānugam
savarṇitāṅgapratyaṅgaṃ jarāyupariveṣṭitam
viṇmūtraraktasiktāṅgaṃ ṣaṭkauśikasamudbhavam
śatatrayaṃ śatādhikaṃ paṣcapeśīśatānica
sārdhābhistisṛbhiśchannaṃ samaṃ tādromakoṭibhiḥ
śarīraṃ sthūlasūkṣmābhirdṛśyādṛśyābhiraṃ tataḥ
etābhirmāṃ sanāḍībhiḥ koṭibhistatsamanvitam
dvātriṃ śaddaśanāḥ proktāviṃśatiścanakhāḥ smṛtāḥ
pittasya kuḍavaṃ jṣeyaṅkaphasyārdhāḍhakaṃ tathā
vasāyāścapalāḥ paṣcatadardhaṃ phalakasya ca
paṃ cārbudapalājṣeyāḥ palānidaśamedasaḥ
palatrayaṃ mahāraktaṃ majjāraktāccaturguṇā
śukrārdhakuḍavaṃ jṣeyaṃ tadardhaṃ dehināṃ balam
māṃ sasya caikaṃ piṇḍenapalasāhasramucyate
raktaṃ palaśataṃ jṣeyaṃ viṇmūtraṃ cāpramāṇataḥ
itidehagṛherājanvāsaḥ syānnityamātmanaḥ
śukraśoṇitasaṃ yogāddehaḥ saṃ jāyatekvacit
nityaṃ viṇmūtrasaṃ yuktastenāyamaśuciḥ smṛtaḥ
yathāvaiviṣṭhayāpūrṇaḥ śuciḥ sāṃ tarbahirghaṭaḥ
yaṃ prāpyātipavitrāṇipaṣcagavyahavīṃ ṣica
aśucitvaṃ prayāṃ tyāśudehoyamaśucistataḥ
hṛdyānyapyannapānāniyaṃ prāpyasurabhīṇica
aśucitvaṃ prayāṃ tyāśuko'nyaḥ syādaśucistataḥ
hejanāḥ kiṃ napaśyadhvaṃ yanniryātidinedine
dehānugomalaḥ pūtistadādhāraḥ kathaṃ śuciḥ
dehaḥ saṃ śodhyamānopipaṣcagavyakuśāṃ bubhiḥ
ghṛṣyamāṇaivāṅgāronirmalatvaṃ nagacchati
śucirekapradeśopiśucirnasyādṛte'pivā
divāvāyadivārātraumṛttauyaiḥ śodhyatekaraḥ
tathāpiśucibhāṅnasyānnavirajyanti tenarāḥ
kāyoyamagryadhūpādyairyatnenāpisusaṃ skṛtaḥ
tathājātyaivakṛṣṇorṇānaśuklājātujāyate
saṃ śodhyamānāpitathābhavenmūrtirnanirmalā
dvayasyāpagamātpaścādbhāvaśuddhyāviśuddhyati
gaṅgātoyenasarveṇamṛdbhārairgātralepanaiḥ
tīrthasnānais tapobhiś ca duṣṭātmā na ca śudhyati
svamūrtiḥ kṣālitā tīrthe na śuddhim adhigacchati
antarbhāvapraduṣṭasya viśato’pi hutāśanam
bhāvaśuddhiḥ paraṃ śaucaṃ pramāṇaṃ sarvakarmasu
anyathāliṅgyatekāṃ tābhāvenaduhitānyathā
yathāyathāsvabhāvasya mahābhāgaudāhṛtam
pariṣvaktopiyadbhāryāṃ bhāvahīnāṃ nakārayet
nādyādvividhamannādyaṃ rasyānisurabhīṇica
abhāvenanarastasmādbhāvaḥ sarvatrakāraṇam
bhāvataḥ śuciśuddhātmāsvargaṃ mokṣaṃ caviṃ dati
jṣānāmalāṃ bhasāpuṃ saḥ savairāgyamṛdāpunaḥ
avidyārāgaviṇmūtraleponaśyedviśodhanaiḥ
evametaccharīraṃ hinisargādaśuciṃ viduḥ
vidyādasāraniḥ sāraṅkadalīsārasannibham
jṣātvaivaṃ doṣavaddehaṃ yaḥ prājṣaḥ śithilībhavet
sotikrāmatisaṃ sāraṃ dṛḍhagrāhovatiṣṭhati
evametanmahākaṣṭaṃ janmaduḥkhaṃ prakīrtitam
puṃ sāmajñānadoṣeṇanānākarmavaśenaca
bāhyenavāyunācāsyamohasaṅgenadehinām
spṛṣṭamātrasya ghoreṇajvaraḥ samupajāyate
saṃ mūḍhasya smṛtibhraṃ śaḥ śīghraṃ saṃ jāyatepunaḥ
nacātmānaṃ vijānātinaparaṃ nacadaivatam
naśṛṇotiparaṃ śreyaḥ sacakṣurapinekṣate
saṃ sāreiklaśyatetenanarolobhavaśānugaḥ
garbhasmṛterabhāvecaśāstramuktaṃ śivenaca
bālarogaiś ca vividhaiḥ pīḍābālagrahairapi
tṛḍbubhukṣāparītāṅgaḥ kvacittiṣṭhatigacchati
viṇmūtrabhakṣaṇādyaṃ camohādbālaḥ samācaret
kaumāraḥ karṇavedhenamātāpitroścatāḍanaiḥ
akṣarādhyayanādyaiś ca duḥkhaṅgurvādiśāsanāt
pramatteṃ driyavṛtteścakāmarāgaprapīḍinaḥ
īrṣayāsumahadduḥkhaṃ mohādduḥkhaṃ prajāyate
rātraunaviṃ datenidrāṅkāmāgniparikheditaḥ
strīṣvāyāsitadehasya yepuṃ saḥ śukrabiṃ davaḥ
natesukhāyamaṃ tavyāḥ svedajāivabiṃ davaḥ
kṛmibhistāḍyamānasya kuṣṭhinaḥ pāmarasya ca
kaṇḍūyanāgnitāpenayatsukhaṃ strīṣutadviduḥ
tādṛśaṃ strīṣumaṃ tavyamadhikaṃ naivavidyate
martyasya vedanāsaivayāṃ vinācittanirvṛtiḥ
apūrvavatsamātmānaṃ jarayāparipīḍitam
jarābhibhūtopijaṃ tuḥ patnīputrādibāṃ dhavaiḥ
aśaktatvāddurācārairbhṛtyaiś ca paribhūyate
nadharmamarthaṅkāmaṃ camokṣaṃ cajarayāyutaḥ
śaktaḥ sādhayituṃ tasmādyuvādharmaṃ samācaret
vātapittakaphādīnāṃ vaiṣamyaṃ vyādhirucyate
vātādīnāṃ samūhenadehoyaṃ parikīrtitaḥ
tasmādvyādhimayaṃ jṣeyaṃ śarīramidamātmanaḥ
vātādyavyatiriktatvādvyādhīnāṃ paṃ jarasya ca
rogairnānāvidhairyātidehīduḥkhānyanekadhā
tatraikaḥ kālasaṃ yuktaḥ śeṣāścāgaṃ tavaḥ smṛtāḥ
yetvihāgaṃ tavaḥ proktāstepraśāmyanti bheṣajaiḥ
japahomapradānaiś ca kālamṛtyurnaśāmyati
yadivāpamṛtyurnasyādviṣāsvādādaśaṅkitaḥ
vividhāvyādhayastatrasarpādyāḥ prāṇinastathā
viṣāṇicābhicārāścamṛtyordvārāṇidehinām
svasthīkartuṃ naśaknotikālaprāptaṃ nacānyathā
nauṣadhaṃ natapodānaṃ namātānacabāṃ dhavāḥ
śaknuvanti paritrātuṃ naraṅkālenapīḍitam
avāṃ taritaśānti ḥ syātkālamṛtyumavāpnuyāt
jāyateyonikīṭeṣumṛtaḥ karmavaśātpunaḥ
maraṇaṃ tadvinirdiṣṭaṃ nanāśaḥ paramārthataḥ
mahātamaḥ praviṣṭasya chidyamāneṣumarmasu
hātātamātaḥ kāṃ tetikraṃ datyevaṃ suduḥkhitaḥ
maṇḍūkaivasarpeṇagrasya temṛtyunājagat
bāṃ dhavaiḥ saparityaktaḥ priyaiś ca parivāritaḥ
niḥ śvasandīrghamuṣṇaṃ camukhenapariśuṣyatā
khaṭvāyāṃ parivṛttohimuhyatecamuhurmuhuḥ
saṃ mūḍhaḥ kṣipatetyarthaṃ hastapādāvitastataḥ
khaṭvātovāṃ chatebhūmiṃ bhūmeḥ khaṭvāṃ punarmahīm
vivaśastyaktalajjaścamūtraviṣṭhānulepitaḥ
yācamānaścasalilaṃ śuṣkakaṃ ṭhoṣṭhatālukaḥ
yamadūtairnīyamānaḥ kālapāśenakarṣitaḥ
jīvastṛṇajalaukevadehāddehaṃ viśetkramāt
maraṇātprārthanādduḥkhamadhikaṃ hivivekinām
kṣaṇikaṃ maraṇeduḥkhamanaṃ taṃ prārthanākṛtam
jagatāṃ patirarthitvādviṣṇurvāmanatāṅgataḥ
jṣātaṃ mayedamadhunāmṛtyorbhavatiyadguruḥ
naparaṃ prārthayedbhūyastṛṣṇālāghavakāraṇam
ādauduḥkhaṃ tathāmadhyeduḥkhamaṃ tecadāruṇam
nisargātsarvabhūtānāmitiduḥkhaparaṃ parā
vartamānānyatītāniduḥkhānyetāniyānitu
atyāhārānmahadduḥkhamalpāhārāttadaṃ taram
kṣudhāhisarvarogāṇāṃ vyādhiḥ śreṣṭhatamaḥ smṛtaḥ
sacchāṃ tauṣadhalepenakṣaṇamātraṃ praśāmyati
kṣudvyādhivedanātīvrāniḥ śeṣabalakṛṃ tanī
tatkṣaṇādardhakālenakaṃ ṭhaṃ prāpyanivartate
natatsukhāyamaṃ tavyaṃ paramārthenapaṇḍitaiḥ
mṛtopamaścayaḥ śetesarvakāryavivarjitaḥ
tatrāpicakutaḥ saukhyaṃ tamasācoditātmanaḥ
prabodhepikutaḥ saukhyaṅkāryeṣūpahatātmanaḥ
kṛṣivāṇijyasevādyagorakṣādiparaśramaiḥ
prātarmūtrapurīṣābhyāṃ madhyāhnekṣutpipāsayā
tṛptāḥ kāmyenabādhyaṃ tenidrayāniśijaṃ tavaḥ
kheyathāpakṣibhirmāṃ sambhakṣyateśvāpadairbhuvi
khedayaṃ tyarjanekālekadārthāḥ syuḥ sukhāvahāḥ
prāgarthapatirudvignaḥ paścātsarvārthaniḥ spṛhaḥ
vasaṃ tagrīṣmatāpenadāruṇaṃ varṣaparvasu
vātātapenavṛṣṭyācakālepyevaṅkutaḥ sukham
sūtivaiṣamyaduḥkhaiś ca dukhaṃ viṣṭhādikarmabhiḥ
dantākṣirogeputrasya hākaṣṭaṅkiṅkaromyaham
gāvonaṣṭāḥ kṛṣirbhagnābhāryācaprapalāyitā
amīprāghūrṇikāḥ prāptābhayaṃ meśaṃ sinogṛhān
bālāpatyācamebhāryākaḥ kariṣyatiraṃ dhanam
vivāhakālekanyāyāḥ kīdṛśaścavarobhavet
etacciṃ tābhibhūtānāṅkutaḥ saukhyaṅkuṭuṃ binām
kuṭuṃ baciṃ tākulitasya puṃ saḥ śrutaṃ caśīlaṃ caguṇāścasarve
apakvakuṃ bhenihitāivāpaḥ prayānti dehenasamaṃ vināśanam
svajātīyādbhayaṃ prāyaḥ sarveṣām eva dehinām
napraviśyavanaṅkaścinnṛpaḥ khyātostibhūtale
yuddhebāhusahasraṃ hipātayāmāsabhūtale
śrīmataḥ kārtavīryasya ṛṣiputraḥ pratāpavān
ṛṣiputrasya rāmasya rāmodaśarathātmajaḥ
jaghānavīryamatulamūrdhvagaṃ sumahātmanaḥ
jarāsaṃ dhenarāmasya tejasānāśitaṃ yaśaḥ
jarāsaṃ dhasya bhīmenatasyāpipavanātmajaḥ
hanumānapisūryeṇavikṣiptaḥ patitaḥ kṣitau
hatavānarjunaḥ śrīmāngopālaiḥ savinirjitaḥ
dahyaṃ tevahnināśailāḥ savahniḥ śāmyatejalaiḥ
tajjalaṃ śoṣyatesūryaistesūryāḥ sahavāriṇā
parārdhadvayakālāṃ teśivenaparamātmanā
vihāyaikaṃ jagannāthaṃ paramātmānamavyayam
jṣātvāsātiśayaṃ sarvamatimānaṃ vivarjayet
evaṃ bhūtejagatyasminkaḥ suraḥ paṇḍitopivā
yāvadyastuvijānātitāvattatrasapaṇḍitaḥ
samādhānetusarvatraprabhāvaḥ sadṛśaḥ smṛtaḥ
evaṃ vastrayugaṃ rājṣāṃ prasthamātrāṃ bubhojanam
yānaṃ śayyāsanaṃ caivaśeṣaṃ duḥkhāyakevalam
pratyūṣetūryanirghoṣaḥ samaṃ puranivāsibhiḥ
rājyebhimānamātraṃ himamedaṃ vādyategṛhe
sarvamābharaṇaṃ bhāraḥ sarvamālepanaṃ malam
sarvaṃ pralapitaṅgītaṃ nṛtyamunmattaceṣṭitam
ityevaṃ rājya sambhogaiḥ kutaḥ saukhyaṃ vicārataḥ
nṛpāṇāṃ vigraheciṃ tāvānyonyavijigīṣayā
prāyeṇaśrīmadālepānnahuṣādyāmahānṛpāḥ
svargaṃ prāptānipatitāḥ kaḥ śriyāviṃ datesukham
svargepicakutaḥ saukhyaṃ dṛṣṭvādīptāṃ paraśriyam
nacānyatkriyatekarmaso'tradoṣaḥ sudāruṇaḥ
sukhābhilāṣaniṣṭhānāṃ sukhabhogādisaṃ plavaiḥ
akasmātpatitaṃ duḥkhaṅkaṣṭaṃ svargedivaukasām
itisvarge'pidevānāṃ nāstisaukhyaṃ vicārataḥ
kṣayaścaviṣayāsiddhausvargebhogāyakarmaṇām
tatraduḥkhaṃ mahatkaṣṭaṃ narakāgniṣudehinām
kuṭhāracchedanaṃ tīvraṃ valkalānāṃ catakṣaṇam
parṇaśākhāphalānāṃ capātaścaṇḍenavāyunā
dāvāgnihimaśoṣaiś ca duḥkhaṃ sthāvarajātiṣu
tadvadbhujaṅgasarpāṇāṅkrodheduḥkhaṃ cadāruṇam
duṣṭānāṅghātanaṃ lokepāśenacanibandhanam
akasmājjanmamaraṇaṅkīṭānāṃ camuhurmuhuḥ
sarīsṛpanikāyānām eva ṃ duḥkhānyanekadhā
paśūnāmātmaśamanaṃ daṇḍatāḍanam eva ca
nāsāvedhenasaṃ trāsaḥ pratodenasutāḍanam
vetrakāṣṭhādinigaḍairaṅkuśenāṅgabandhanam
bhāvenamanasākleśairbhikṣāyuvādipīḍanam
paśūnāṃ santi kāyānām eva ṃ duḥkhānyanekaśaḥ
varṣāśītātapādduḥkhaṃ sukaṣṭaṅgrahapakṣiṇām
kleśamānātikāyānām eva ṃ duḥkhānyanekadhā
garbhavāsemahadduḥkhaṃ janmaduḥkhaṃ tathānṛṇām
subālyaduḥkhaṃ cājñānaṅkaumāreguruśāsanam
yauvanekāmarāgābhyāṃ duḥkhaṃ caiverṣyayāpunaḥ
kṛṣivāṇijyasevādyairgorakṣādikakarmabhiḥ
vṛddhabhāvecajarayāvyādhibhiścaprapīḍanāt
maraṇecamahadduḥkhaṃ prārthanāyāṃ tatodhikam
rājāgnijaladāghātacauraśatrubhayaṃ mahat
arthasyārjanarakṣāyāṃ bhayaṃ nāśevyayepunaḥ
akāryesaṃ pravṛttiścaduḥkhānidhanināṃ sadā
bhṛtyavṛttiḥ kusīdaṃ cadāsatvaṃ parataṃ tratā
iṣṭāniṣṭābhiyogaścasaṃ yogāścasahasraśaḥ
anyonyāccaprakopaścarājṣoduḥkhaṃ mahībhṛtām
anityatātrabhāvānāṅkṛtakāmyasya dehinaḥ
nirayādimanuṣyāṃ taṃ tasmātsarvaṃ tyajedbudhaḥ
skaṃ dhātskaṃ dhenayanbhāraṃ viśrāmaṃ manyateyathā
anyonyātiśayopetāḥ sarvadābhogasaṃ plavāḥ
nānāyonisahasreṣu sambhavaḥ puṇyasaṅkṣayāt
rogāścavividhākārādevaloke'pisaṃ smṛtāḥ
yajṣasya hiśiraiśchannamaśvibhyāṃ saṃ dhitaṃ punaḥ
mārtaṇḍabhānoḥ kuṣṭhaṃ cavaruṇasya jalodaram
pūṣṇodaśanavaikalyaṃ bhujastaṃ bhaḥ śacīpateḥ
jvaraścasumahānāsīddakṣasyāpiprajāpateḥ
kalpekalpecadevānāṃ mahatāmapisaṅkṣayaḥ
parārdhadvayakālāṃ tebrahmaṇaścāpyanityatā
dakṣasya duhitāṃ pautrīṃ brahmākāmitavānpunaḥ
krodhenacajayāṃ devīṃ yogajṣāṃ śaptavānprabhuḥ
duḥkhānicasamastānisaṃ sthitāni na saṃśayaḥ
viśīrṇajanmamaraṇaṃ sarvāśitvaṃ havirbhujaḥ
strīvadhaḥ kāmasaktiścasārathyaṃ pāṇḍavebale
rudreṇatripuraṃ dagdhaṃ dakṣayajṣovināśitaḥ
skaṃ dasya janmavaiśukrātkrīḍādīnāṃ sahasraśaḥ
evaṃ trayopirāgādyairdoṣairdevāḥ samanvitāḥ
ebhyaḥ paraḥ prabhuḥ śāṃ taḥ paripūrṇaḥ samuktidaḥ
duḥkhairākulitaṃ jṣātvānirvedaṃ paramaṃ vrajet
nirvedāccavirāgaḥ syādvirāgājjñāna sambhavaḥ
jṣānenatatparaṃ jñānaṃ śivaṃ muktimavāpnuyāt
sarvajṣaḥ paripūrṇaścamuktaityabhidhīyate
mātalir uvāca
indralokepragaṃ tavyaṃ devarājasya śāsanāt
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe bhūmikhaṇḍevenopākhyānepitṛmātṛtīrtha
māhātmyeṣaṭṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ
saptaṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ
yayātir uvāca
saṃ jātaṃ śakrasaṃ vāhaetacchreyomamātulam
mānavāmartyalokecapāpaṅkurvanti dāruṇam
teṣāṅkarmavipākaṃ camātalevadasāṃ pratam
mātalir uvāca
śrūyatāmabhidhāsyāmipāpācārasya lakṣaṇam
mahāpātakamevāpijṣātavyaṃ jñānapaṇḍitaiḥ
sādhūnāmapisarveṣāṃ yaḥ pīḍāṃ hisamācaret
kulācāraṃ parityajyaanyācāraṃ vrajanti ca
etaccapātakaṅghoraṅkathitaṅkṛtyavedibhiḥ
mātāpitroścayoniṃ dāṃ tāḍanaṃ bhaginīṣuca
pitṛsvasṛniṃ danaṃ catadevapātakaṃ dhruvam
saṃ prāpteśrāddhakālepipaṣcakrośāṃ taresthitam
kāmātkrodhādbhayādvāpianyaṃ bhojayateyadā
etaccapātakaṃ tasya pitṛghātasamaṅkṛtam
dānakālepisaṃ prāpteāgatebrāhmaṇekila
etaccapātakaṅghoraṃ dānabhraṃ śakaraṃ smṛtam
yajamānagṛhesevāsaṃ sthitānbrāhmaṇānnijān
samāśritaṃ hiyaṃ vipraṃ dharmācārasamanvitam
nagaṇayenmūrkhaṃ vidvāṃ saṃ poṣyovipraḥ sadābhavet
sarvaiḥ puṇyaiḥ samāyuktaṃ sudānairbahubhirnṛpa
taṃ samabhyarcyavidvāṃ saṃ prāptaṃ vipraṃ sadārhayet
dattaṃ hutaṃ bhavettasya niṣphalaṃ nātrasaṃśayaḥ
brāhmaṇaḥ kṣatriyovaiśyaḥ śūdraścāpicaturthakaḥ
puṇyakāleṣusarveṣusaṃ śritaṃ pūjayeddvijam
mūrkhaṃ vāpihividvāṃ saṃ tasya puṇyaphalaṃ śṛṇu
kasmāddhikāraṇādrājaṣchakyaṃ prāpyanakārayet
anyovipraḥ samāyātastatkālaṃ śrāddhakarmaṇi
tāmbūladakṣiṇābhiścapitarastasya harṣitāḥ
śrāddhabhuktāyadātavyaṃ sadādānaṃ cadakṣiṇā
vyatīpātepisaṃ prāptevaidhṛtaucanṛpottama
amāvāsyāṃ tathārājanakṣayāheparapakṣake
śrāddham eva ṃ prakartavyaṃ brāhmaṇāditrivarṇakaiḥ
yajṣetathāmahārājaṛtvijaścaprakārayet
tathāviprāḥ prakartavyāḥ śrāddhadānāyasarvadā
avijṣātaḥ prakartavyobrāhmaṇonaivajānatā
yasyāpijṣāyatevaṃ śaḥ kulaṃ tripuruṣaṃ tathā
ācāraścatathārājaṃ staṃ vipraṃ sannimaṃ trayet
kulaṃ najṣāyateyasya ācāreṇavicārayet
avijṣātobhavedviprovedavedāṅgapāragaḥ
śrāddhadānaṃ prakartavyaṃ tasmādvipraṃ nimaṃ trayet
ādauparīkṣayedvipraṃ śrāddhedāneprakārayet
śāpaṃ dattvātatoyānti śrāddhādvipravivarjitāt
mahāpāpībhavetsopibrahmaṇaḥ sadṛśoyadi
mahāpāpīsavijṣeyaḥ sarvadharmabahiṣkṛtaḥ
yetyajanti śivācāraṃ vaiṣṇavaṃ bhogadāyakam
niṃ danti brāhmaṇaṃ dharmaṃ vijṣeyāḥ pāpavarddhanāḥ
yetyajanti śivācāraṃ śivabhaktāndviṣanti ca
hariṃ niṃ danti yepāpābrahmadveṣakarāḥ sadā
ācāraniṃ dakāyetemahāpātakakṛttamāḥ
ādyaṃ pūjyaṃ paraṃ jñānaṃ puṇyaṃ bhāgavataṃ tathā
vaiṣṇavaṃ harivaṃ śaṃ vāmatsyaṃ vākūrmam eva ca
pādmaṃ vāyepūjayanti teṣāṃ śreyovadāmyaham
pratyakṣaṃ tenavaidevaḥ pūjitomadhusūdanaḥ
tasmātprapūjayejjñānaṃ vaiṣṇavaṃ viṣṇuvallabham
devasthānecanityaṃ vaivaiṣṇavaṃ pustakaṃ nṛpa
asaṃ pūjyaharerjñānaṃ yegāyanti likhanti ca
ajṣāyatatprayacchanti śṛṇvaṃ tyuccārayanti ca
asaṃ skṛtapradeśeṣuyatheṣṭaṃ sthāpayanti ca
harijñānaṃ yathākṣemaṃ pratyakṣāccaprakāśayet
aśuciścāśucausthāneyaḥ pravaktiśṛṇotica
itisarvaṃ samāsenajñānaniṃ dāsamaṃ smṛtam
gurupūjāmakṛtvaivayaḥ śāstraṃ śrotumicchati
nakaroticaśuśrūṣāmājṣābhaṅgaṃ cabhāvataḥ
gurumārtamaśaktaṃ cavideśaṃ prasthitaṃ tathā
aribhiḥ paribhūtaṃ vāyaḥ saṃ tyajatipāpakṛt
paṭhamānaṃ purāṇaṃ tutasya pāpaṃ vadāmyaham
kuṃ bhīpākevasettāvadyāvadindrāścaturdaśa
paṭhamānaṅguruṃ yohiupekṣayatipāpadhīḥ
tasyāpipātakaṅghoraṃ ciraṃ narakadāyakam
bhāryāputreṣumitreṣuyaścāvajṣāṅkarotica

śivāyatanavṛkṣāṇāṃ puṇyārāmavināśanam
yaḥ pīḍāmāśramasthānāmācaredalpikāmapi

āśayāsamanuprāptaṅkṣuttṛṣāśramapīḍitam

nānukaṃ panti yemūḍhāste yānti narakārṇavam
ajāvikomāhiṣikoyaḥ śūdrāvṛṣalīpatiḥ
śūdroviprasya kṣatrasya yaācāreṇavartate
śilpinaḥ kāravovaidyāstathādevalakānarāḥ

narakeṣusapacyetayaścadaṇḍaṃ vṛthānayet
yasya rājṣaḥ prajārājyepacyatenarakeṣusaḥ
yedvijāḥ pratigṛhṇanti nṛpasya pāpavartinaḥ
prayānti tepighoreṣunarakeṣu na saṃśayaḥ
pāradārikacaurāṇāṃ yatpāpaṃ pārthivasya ca
ghṛtatailānnapānādimadhumāṃ sasurāsavam
guḍekṣukṣīraśākādidadhimūlaphalānica

apahṛtyanaroyātinarakenātrasaṃśayaḥ
apahṛtyanaroyātinarakenātrasaṃśayaḥ
śarīraghātanārthāyapūrvākāramavāpnuyāt

yamadūtairmahāghorairnīyamānāḥ suduḥkhitāḥ
devatiryaṅmanuṣyāṇāmadharmaniyatātmanām
dharmarājaḥ smṛtaḥ śāstāsughorairvividhairvadhaiḥ
vinayācārayuktānāṃ pramādānmalinātmanām
prāyaścittairguruḥ śāstānacatairīkṣyateyamaḥ
pāradārikacaurāṇāmanyāyavyavahāriṇām
nṛpatiḥ śāsakaḥ proktaḥ pracchannānāṃ cadharmarāṭ
tasmātkṛtasya pāpasya prāyaścittaṃ samācaret
nābhuktasyānyathānāśaḥ kalpakoṭiśatairapi
kāyenamanasāvācātasya cādhogatiḥ phalam
itisaṅkṣepataḥ proktāḥ pāpabhedāstridhādhunā
kathyaṃ tegatayaścitrānarāṇāṃ pāpakarmaṇām
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe bhūmikhaṇḍevenopākhyānepitṛtīrthavarṇaneyayāticaritre
saptaṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ
aṣṭaṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ
yayātir uvāca
dharmasyāpiphalaṃ brūhiśrotuṅkautūhalaṃ mama
mātalir uvāca
saṃ trāsajananaṅghoraṃ vivaśāḥ sarvadehinaḥ
puṃ strīnapuṃ sakairvṛddhairyātavyaṃ jaṃ tubhistataḥ
śubhāśubhaphalaṃ tatradehināṃ pravicāryate
yetatraśubhakarmāṇaḥ saumyacittādayānvitāḥ
yaḥ pradadyāccaviprāṇāmupānatkāṣṭhapāduke
śibikāyāḥ pradānenavimānenasukhaṃ vrajet
ārāmakartāchāyāsuśītalāsusukhaṃ vrajet
yānti puṣpakayānenapuṣpārāmapradāyinaḥ
devāyatanakartācayatīnāmāśramasya ca
anāthamaṇḍapānāṃ cakrīḍanyātigṛhottamaiḥ
devāgniguruviprāṇāṃ mātāpitroścapūjakaḥ
śraddhādānenavijṣeyamapivālāgramātrakam
yatpātrādicatuṣṭayaṃ śraddhāteṣusadāmama

sasyāddivyatithirbhūpadevānāṅkīrtivardhanaḥ
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe bhūmikhaṇḍevenopākhyānepitṛtīrthavarṇaneyayāti

mātalir uvāca
athadharmāḥ śivenoktāḥ śivadharmāgamottamāḥ
hiṃ sādidoṣanirmuktāḥ kleśāyāsavivarjitāḥ
sarvabhūtahitāḥ śuddhāḥ sūkṣmāyāsāmahatphalāḥ
anaṃ taśākhākalitāḥ śivamūlaikasaṃ śritāḥ
jñānadhyānasupuṣpāḍhyāḥ śivadharmāḥ sanātanāḥ
dhārayanti śivaṃ yasmāddhāryateśivabhāṣitaiḥ
śivadharmāḥ smṛtāstasmātsaṃ sārārṇavatārakāḥ
tathā'hiṃ sākṣamāsatyaṃ hrīḥ śraddhendriyasaṃ yamaḥ
dānamijyātapodānaṃ daśakaṃ dharmasādhanam
yathābhūḥ sarvabhūtānāṃ sthāsādhāraṇaṃ smṛtam
tattathāśivabhaktānāṃ tulyaṃ śivapuraṃ smṛtam
yathehasarvabhūtānāṃ bhogāḥ sātiśayāḥ smṛtāḥ
nānāpuṇyaviśeṣeṇabhogāḥ śivapuretathā
yasya yādṛgbhavetpuṇyaṃ śraddhāpātraviśeṣataḥ
bhogāḥ śivapuretasya jṣeyāḥ sātiśayāḥ śubhāḥ
sthānaprāptiḥ paraṃ tulyābhogāḥ śānti mayāḥ sthitāḥ
kuryātpuṇyaṃ mahattasmānmahābhogajigīṣayā
sarvātiśayam eva ikaṃ bhāvitaṃ casurottamaiḥ
kecittatraivamucyaṃ tejñānayogaratānarāḥ
āvartaṃ tepunaścānyesaṃ sārebhogatatparāḥ
viraktaḥ śāṃ tacittātmāśivajñānamavāpnuyāt
yecāpīśānyahṛdayāyajaṃ tīśaṃ prasaṅgataḥ
teṣāmapidadātīśaḥ sthānaṃ bhāvānurūpataḥ
teṣāṃ piśācalokeṣubhogānīśaḥ prayacchati
saṃ taptāduḥkhabhāreṇamriyaṃ tesarvadehinaḥ
annadaḥ puṇyadaḥ proktaḥ prāṇadaścāpisarvadaḥ
yasyānnapānapuṣṭāṅgaḥ kurutepuṇyasaṃ cayam
annapradātustasyārdhaṅkartuścārdhaṃ na saṃśayaḥ
dharmārthakāmamokṣāṇāṃ dehaḥ paramasādhanam
annaṃ prajāpatiḥ sākṣādannaṃ viṣṇuḥ śivaḥ svayam
tasmādannasamaṃ dānaṃ nabhūtaṃ nabhaṣyiti
trayāṇāmapilokānāmudakaṃ jīvanaṃ smṛtam
annapānāśvagovastraśayyāsūtrāsanānica
pretalokepraśastānidānānyaṣṭauviśeṣataḥ
evaṃ dānaviśeṣeṇadharmarājapuraṃ naraḥ
yepunaḥ krūrakarmāṇaḥ pāpādānavivarjitāḥ
bhuṃ jatedāruṇaṃ duḥkhaṃ narakenṛpanaṃ dana
asaṅkhyaistatpuraṃ vyāptaṃ prāṇināmupakārakaiḥ
sarveṣāṃ śivabhaktānāṃ tatpuraṃ parikīrtitam
rudrakṣetremṛtānāṃ cajaṅgamasthāvarātmanām
sopiyātiśivasthānaṅkiṃ punarbahuśorcayan
vaiṣṇavāviṣṇubhaktāścaviṣṇudhyānaparāyaṇāḥ
brahmavādīcadharmātmābrahmalokaṃ prayātisaḥ
puṇyakartāsupuṇyenapuṇyalokaṃ prayātica
tasmādīśesadābhaktiṃ bhāvayedātmanātmani
harauvāpimahārājayuktātmājñānavānsvayam
tasmātsarvavicāreṇabhāvadoṣavicārataḥ
evaṃ viṣṇuprabhāveṇaviśiṣṭenāpikarmaṇā
naraḥ sthānamavāpyetadeśabhāvānurūpataḥ
dehināṅkarmaniṣṭhānāṃ punarāvarttakaṃ smṛtam
ūrdhvaṃ śivapurājjṣeyaṃ vaiṣṇavaṃ lokamuttamam
vaiṣṇavāmānavāyānti viṣṇudhyānaparāyaṇāḥ
brāhmaṇābrahmalokaṃ tusadācārānarottamāḥ
prayānti yajvinaḥ sarvepurīṃ tāṃ tattvakovidāḥ
dralokaṃ tathāyānti kṣatriyāyuddhaśālinaḥ

iti śrīpadmapurāṇe bhūmikhaṇḍevenopākhyānepitṛtīrtheyayāti
mātalir uvāca
yamapīḍāṃ pravakṣyāmi mahātīvrāṃ sudāruṇām
bhuṃ janti pāpinaḥ sarvekrūrāstebrahmaghātakāḥ
kvacitpāpāḥ prapacyaṃ tetīvreṇakariṣāgninā
kvacitiṃ sahairvṛkairvyāghrairdaṃ śaiḥ kīṭaiś ca dāruṇaiḥ
makṣikābhiścaraudrābhiḥ kvacitsarpairviṣolbaṇaiḥ
mattamātaṅgayūthaiś ca balotkṛṣṭaiḥ pramāthibhiḥ
paṃ thānamullikhadbhiścatīkṣṇaśṛṅgamahāvṛṣaiḥ
mahāśṛṅgaiś ca mahiṣairduṣṭagātraprabādhakaiḥ
ḍākinībhiścaraudrābhirvikarālaiś ca rākṣasaiḥ
vyādhibhiścamahāghoraiḥ pīḍyamānāvrajanti te
mahātulāṃ samārūḍhādahyamānādavānale
mahāvegapradhūtāstemahācaṇḍenavāyunā
mahāpāṣāṇavarṣeṇabhidyamānāścasarvataḥ
patadbhirvajranirghoṣairulkāpātaiś ca dāruṇaiḥ
pradīptāṅgāravarṣeṇahanyamānāvrajanti te
mahatāpāṃ suvarṣeṇapūryamāṇāyamaṅgatāḥ
yenarāḥ pāpakarmāṇaḥ pāpaṃ bhuṃ janti dāruṇam
evaṃ pāpaviśeṣeṇapāpiṣṭhāḥ pāpakārakāḥ
narakaṃ pratibhuṃ janti bahupīḍāsamākulam
etat te sarvam ākhyātaṃ vivekaṃ puṇyapāpayoḥ
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe bhūmikhaṇḍevenopākhyānepitṛtīrthavarṇaneyayāti
