praty uvācasamākarṇyaśivakanyātapasvinī
evamākarṇyatadvākyaṃ dānavoduṣṭaceṣṭitaḥ
tām uvācaviśālākṣīṃ prahasyaivapunaḥ punaḥ
jātamātrasya bālasya nahuṣasya durātmanaḥ
evamākarṇyasāvākyaṅkopaṣcakresudāruṇam
provācasatyasaṃ sthāsātapasābhāvitāpunaḥ
anyathātvāmahaṃ śapsyepunareva na saṃśayaḥ
evamākarṇitaṃ tasyāḥ sūdenanṛpatiṃ prati
parityajyamahārājaetāmanyāṃ samāśraya
sūdenapreṣitodaityaḥ sahuṇḍaḥ pāpacetanaḥ
nirjagāmatvarāyuktaḥ sasvāṃ bhāryāṃ priyāṃ prati
ceṣṭitaṃ naivajānātidāsyāsūdenayatkṛtam
sūta uvāca
aśokasundarīsācamahatātapasākila
duḥkhaśokenasaṃ taptākṛśībhūtātapasvinī
cintayaṃ tīpriyaṅkāṃ taṃ taṃ dhyāyatipunaḥ punaḥ
upāyajṣāḥ sadābuddhyāudyamenāpisarvadā
vartaṃ tedanujaśreṣṭhānānābhāvaiś ca sarvadā
māyopāyenayogenahṛtāhaṃ pāpināpurā
tathāsaghātitaḥ putraāyoścaivabhaviṣyati
yaṃ dṛṣṭvādaivayogenabhavitāramanāmayam
udyamenāpipaśyetakiṃ vānaśyativānavā
kiṃ vāsaudyamaḥ śreṣṭhaḥ kiṃ vātatkarmajaṃ phalam
bhāvibhāvaḥ kathaṃ naśyettatovedaḥ pratiṣṭhati
viśeṣobhāvitodevaiḥ sakathaṃ cānyathābhavet
evam eva ṃ mahābhāgācintayaṃ tīpunaḥ punaḥ
kinnarovidvaronāmabṛhaśomahātanuḥ
sanābhyordhanaraḥ kāyaḥ pakṣābhyāṃ hivivarjitaḥ
dvibhujovaṃ śahastastuhārakaṅkaṇaśobhitaḥ
divyagaṃ dhānuliptāṅgobhāryayāsahacāgataḥ
tām uvācanirānaṃ dāṃ sasutāṃ śaṅkarasya hi
kinnaraṃ viṣṇubhaktaṃ māṃ preṣitaṃ devasattamaiḥ
huṇḍenapāpacāreṇavadhārthaṃ tasya dhīmataḥ
kṛtamevākhilaṅkarmahṛtaścāyusutaḥ śubhe
huṇḍaevaṃ vijānātiāyuputrohṛtomayā
bhakṣitastuviśālākṣiitijānātivaiśubhe
bhavatāṃ śrāvayitvāhigatosaudānavo'dhamaḥ
svenakarmavipākenapuṇyasyāpimahāyaśāḥ
svarjitasya mahābhāgenāśamicchanti ghātakāḥ
duṣṭātmānomahāpāpāḥ paratejovidūṣakāḥ
teṣāṃ yaśovināśārthaṃ prapaṣcanti dinedine
nānāvidhairupāyaisteviṣaśastrādibhistataḥ
haṃ tumicchanti taṃ puṇyaṃ puṇyakarmābhirakṣitam
pāpinaścaivahuṇḍādyāmohanastaṃ bhanādibhiḥ
pīḍayanti mahāpāpānānābhedairbalāvilaiḥ
puṇyasyāpimahābhāgepuṇyavaṃ taṃ surakṣitam
vaiphalyaṃ yānti teṣāṃ vaiupāyāḥ pāpināṃ śubhe
yaṃ trataṃ trāṇimaṃ trāścaśastrāgniviṣabandhanāḥ
rakṣayanti mahātmānaṃ devapuṇyaiḥ surakṣitam
kartārobhasmatāṃ yānti savaitiṣṭhatipuṇyabhāk
āyuputrasya vīrasya rakṣakādevatāḥ śubhe
tasmāccarakṣitovīronahuṣobalināṃ varaḥ
mākṛthādāruṇaṃ duḥkhaṃ muṃ caśokamakāraṇam
sahijīvatidharmātmāmātrāpitrāvināvane
yathāśaśīvirājetasvakalābhiḥ svatejasā
tvayāsārddhaṃ striyācaiva pṛthivyām ekabhūpatiḥ
bhaviṣyatimahāyogīyathāsvargetuvāsavaḥ
yayātiṃ nāmadharmajṣaṃ prajāpālanatatparam
tathākanyāśataṃ cāpirūpaudāryaguṇānvitam
yāsāṃ puṇyairmahārājaindralokaṃ prayāsyati
yayātirnāmadharmātmāātmajastebhaviṣyati
prajāpālomahārājaḥ sarvajīvadayāparaḥ
ururnāmatṛtīyaścacaturthovīryavānyaduḥ
evaṃ putrāmahāvīryāstejasvinomahābalāḥ
bhaviṣyanti mahātmānaḥ sarvatejaḥ samanvitāḥ
yadoścaivasutāvīrāḥ siṃ hatulyaparākramāḥ
teṣāṃ nāmānibhadraṃ tegadataḥ śṛṇusāṃ pratam
bhojaścabhīmakaścāpiaṃ dhakaḥ kuṣjarastathā
vṛṣṇirnāmasudharmātmāsatyādhārobhaviṣyati
ṣaṣṭhastuśrutasenaścaśrutādhārastusaptamaḥ
kāladaṃ ṣṭromahāvīryaḥ samarekālajidbalī
yadoḥ putrāmahāvīryāyādavākhyāvarānane
teṣāṃ tuputrāḥ pautrāstebhaviṣyanti sahasraśaḥ
sameṣyatimahāprājṣastavabhartāśubhānane
nihatyadānavaṃ huṇḍaṃ tvām eva ṃ pariṇeṣyati
duḥkhajātānisoṣṇāninetrābhyāṃ hipatanti ca
aśrūṇiceṃ dumatyāścasaṃ mārjayatimānadaḥ
āyoścaduḥkhamuddhṛtyasvakulaṃ tārayiṣyati
sukhinaṃ pitaraṅkṛtvāprajāpālobhaviṣyati
etat te sarvam ākhyātaṃ devānāṅkathanaṃ śubhe
acirāddrakṣyasibhartāraṃ tvam eva ṃ śṛṇusundari
kāmaṅkrodhaṃ parityajyalobhaṃ cāpiśivātmajā
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe bhūmikhaṇḍevenopākhyānegurutīrthamāhātmyecyavanacaritre nāhuṣākhyānenavādhikaśatatamo'dhyāyaḥ
daśādhikaśatatamo'dhyāyaḥ
āmaṃ tryasamunīnsarvānvaśiṣṭhaṃ tapatāṃ varam
tatastemunayaḥ sarvevaśiṣṭhādyāstapodhanāḥ
āśīrbhirabhinaṃ dyainamāyuputraṃ mahābalam
ākāśedevatāḥ sarvājaghnurvaiduṃ dubhīnmudā
puṣpavṛṣṭiṃ pracakrustenahuṣasya camūrdhani
athadevaḥ sahasrākṣaḥ suraiḥ sārddhaṃ samāgataḥ
dadauśastrāṇicāstrāṇisūryatejopamānica
tānidivyānicāstrāṇidivyarūpopamo'bhavat
athatādevatāḥ sarvāḥ sahasrākṣamathābruvan
syaṃ danodīyatāmasmainahuṣāyasureśvara
devānāṃ matamājṣāyavajrapāṇiḥ svasārathim
āhūyamātaliṃ taṃ tuādideśatatodvija
enaṅgacchamahātmānamuhyatāṃ syaṃ danenavai
sacovācasahasrākṣaṅkariṣyetavaśāsanam
evamuktvājagāmāśuhyāyuputraṃ raṇodyatam
rājānaṃ praty uvācaivadevarājasya bhāṣitam
ity uvācasahasrākṣastvām eva nṛpatīśvara
jahitvaṃ dānavaṃ saṅkhyetaṃ huṇḍaṃ pāpacetanam
samākarṇyasarājendraḥ sānaṃ dapulakodgamaḥ
prasādāddevadevasya vaśiṣṭhasya mahātmanaḥ
dānavaṃ sūdayiṣyāmisamarepāpacetanam
devānāṃ caviśeṣeṇamamamāyāpacāritam
evamuktemahāvākyenahuṣeṇamahātmanā
athāyātaḥ svayaṃ devaḥ śaṅkhacakragadādharaḥ
cakrāccakraṃ samutpāṭyasūryabiṃ bopamaṃ mahat
jvalatātejasādīptaṃ suvṛttāraṃ śubhāvaham
tasmaiśūlaṃ dadauśaṃ bhuḥ sutīkṣṇaṃ tejasānvitam
tenaśūlavareṇāsauśobhatesamarodyataḥ
dvitīyaḥ śaṅkaraścāsautripuraghnoyathāprabhuḥ
brahmāstraṃ dattavānbrahmāvaruṇaḥ pāśamuttamam
caṃ dratejaḥ pratīkāśaṃ śaṅkhaṃ canādamaṅgalam
vajram indras tathā śaktiṃ vāyuś cāpaṃ sa mārgaṇam
śastrāṇyastrāṇidivyānibahūnivividhānica
āśīrbhirnaṃ ditaścāpimunibhistattvavedibhiḥ
āruroharathaṃ divyaṃ bhāsvaraṃ ratnamālinam
ghaṃ ṭāravaiḥ praṇadaṃ taṅkṣudraghaṃ ṭāsamākulam
pratapaṃ stejasātadvaddaityānāṃ mastakeṣusaḥ
jagāmaśīghraṃ vegenayathāvāyuḥ sadāgatiḥ
yatrāsaudānavaḥ pāpastiṣṭhatesvabalairyutaḥ
tenamātalināsārddhaṃ vāhakenamahātmanā
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe bhūmikhaṇḍevenopākhyānegurutīrthamāhātmyecyavanacaritre nahuṣākhyānedaśādhikaśatatamo'dhyāyaḥ
ekādaśādhikaśatatamo'dhyāyaḥ
devatānāṃ varānāryoraṃ bhādyapsarasastathā
gandharvāṇāṃ tathānāryorūpālaṅkārasaṃ yutāḥ
kautukāyagatāstatrayatrarājāsatiṣṭhati
puraṃ mahodayaṃ nāmahuṇḍasyāpidurātmanaḥ
sapatākairmahādaṇḍaiḥ śobhamānaṃ purottamam
kailāsaśikharākāraiḥ sonnatairdivamāsthitaiḥ
prākāraiś ca mahāratnairaṭṭālakaśatairapi
parikhābhiḥ supūrṇābhirjalaiḥ svacchaiḥ praśobhitam
sunārībhiḥ samākīrṇaṃ puruṣaiś ca mahāprabhaiḥ
nānāprabhāvairdivyaiś ca śobhamānaṃ mahodayam
rājaśreṣṭhomahāvīronahuṣodadṛśepuram
puraprāṃ tevanaṃ divyaṃ divyavṛkṣairalaṅkṛtam
tadviveśamahāvīronaṃ danaṃ hiyathā'maraḥ
praviṣṭaḥ saturājeṃ drovanamadhyesarittaṭe
tatratārūpasaṃ yuktādivyānāryaḥ samāgatāḥ
sūtāścamāgadhāḥ sarvetaṃ stuvanti nṛpottamam
rājānamāyuputraṃ taṃ bhrājamānaṃ yathāravim
śuśrāvagītaṃ madhuraṃ nahuṣaḥ kinnareritam
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe bhūmikhaṇḍevenopākhyānegurutīrthamāhātmyecyavanacaritre nahuṣākhyāneekādaśādhikaśatatamo'dhyāyaḥ
dvādaśādhikaśatatamo'dhyāyaḥ
tadevagānaṃ casurāṅganābhirgītaṃ samākarṇyacagītakairdhruvaiḥ
samākulācāpibabhūvatatrasāśaṃ bhuputrīparicintayānā
āsanāttūrṇamutthāyamahotsāhenasaṃ yutā
tūrṇaṅgatāvarārohātapobhāvasamanvitā
taṃ dṛṣṭvādevasaṅkāśaṃ divyarūpasamaprabham
divyagaṃ dhānuliptāṅgaṃ divyamālābhiśobhitam
divyairābharaṇairvastraiḥ śobhitaṃ nṛpanaṃ danam
dīptimaṃ taṃ yathāsūryaṃ divyalakṣaṇasaṃ yutam
kiṃ vādevomahāprājṣogandharvovābhaviṣyati
kiṃ vānāgasutaḥ soyaṅkiṃ vāvidyādharobhavet
deveṣunaivapaśyāmikutoyakṣeṣujāyate
anayālīlayāvīraḥ sahasrākṣopijāyate
śaṃ bhureṣabhavetiṅkavākiṃ vācāyaṃ manobhavaḥ
kiṃ vāpituḥ sakhāmesyātpaulastyo'yaṃ dhanādhipaḥ
evaṃ samācintayatīcayāvattāvattvaraṃ rūpaguṇādhipāsā
sametyaraṃ bhāsumahāsakhībhir uvācatāṃ śaṃ bhusutāṃ prahasya
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe bhūmikhaṇḍevenopākhyānegurutīrthamāhātmyecyavanacaritre nahuṣākhyānedvādaśādhikaśatatamo'dhyāyaḥ
trayodaśādhikaśatatamo'dhyāyaḥ
raṃ bhovāca
tapasaḥ kṣaraṇaṃ syādvaipuruṣasyāpicintanāt
tapasimemanolīnaṃ nahuṣasyāpikāmyayā
namāṃ cālayituṃ śaktādevāsuramahoragāḥ
enaṃ dṛṣṭvāmahābhāgememanaścalatebhṛśam
raṃ tumicchāmyahaṅgatvāevamutsukatāṅgatam
tanmetvaṅkāraṇaṃ brūhiyadyastijñānamuttamam
āyuputrasya bhāryāhaṃ devaiḥ sṛṣṭāmahātmabhiḥ
raṃ bhovāca
sarveṣvevamahābhāgedeharūpeṣubhāmini
vasatyātmāsvayaṃ brahmajñānarūpaḥ sanātanaḥ
prakṛtiṃ naivajānātijñānavijñānakīṅkalām
ayaṃ śuddhaścadharmajṣaātmāvetticasundari
gacchaṃ tyapimanastāpamenaṃ dṛṣṭvāmahāmatim
bhartāyamāyuputrasteetatsatyaṃ na saṃśayaḥ
anyaṃ dṛṣṭvāviśaṅketapuruṣaṃ pāpalakṣaṇam
evaṃ vidhiḥ kṛtodevaiḥ satyapāśenabaṃ dhitaḥ
evamākarṇitaṃ bhadreātmanātaṃ casundari
anyaṃ bhāvaṃ najānātiāyuputraṃ caviṃ dati
evaṃ jṣātvāpradhānātmātavādyaivapradhāvati
ātmāsarvaṃ prajānātiātmādevaḥ sanātanaḥ
ayameṣasavīreṃ dronahuṣonāmavīryavān
jṣātvācāyoḥ sutaṃ bhadreanyaṃ caivanagacchati
etat te sarvam ākhyātaṃ śāśvataṃ tvanmanogatam
huṇḍaṃ hatvāmahāghoraṃ samaredānavādhamam
tvāṃ nayiṣyatisvasthānamāyoścagṛhamuttamam
hṛtodaityenavīreṃ dronijapuṇyenaśeṣitaḥ
pitṛmātṛvihīnastugatovṛddhiṃ mahāvane
evamābhāṣitaṃ śrutvāraṃ bhāyāḥ śivanaṃ dinī
harṣeṇamahatāviṣṭātām uvācasamudrajām
satyametanmayādṛṣṭaṃ sucitraṃ cāruhāsini
manobhavasamānaṃ tupuruṣaṃ divyalakṣaṇam
nadhāvatimahācetaenaṃ dṛṣṭvāyathāsakhi
enaṅgaṃ tavyamāvābhyāṃ sakhībhirgṛham eva hi
evamābhāṣyasāraṃ bhāgamanāyopacakrame
gamanāyotsukāṃ jṣātvānahuṣasyānti kaṃ prati
sūta uvāca
sakhyācaraṃ bhayāsārddhaṃ nahuṣaṃ vīralakṣaṇam
tasyānti kaṃ susaṃ prāpyapreṣayāmāsatāṃ sakhīm
enaṅgacchamahābhāgenahuṣaṃ devarūpiṇam
kathayasvakathāmetāṃ tavārtheāgatāyataḥ
raṃ bhovāca
evamuktvāgatāraṃ bhānahuṣaṃ rājanaṃ danam
cāpabāṇadharaṃ vīraṃ dvitīyamivavāsavam
āyuputramahābhāgaraṃ bhāhaṃ samupāgatā
śivasya kanyayāvīratayāhaṃ paripreṣitā
bhāryārūpaṃ varaṃ śreṣṭhaṃ sṛṣṭaṃ lokeṣudurlabham
gandharvaiḥ pannagaiḥ siddhaiścāraṇaiḥ puṇyalakṣaṇaiḥ
svayam eva samāyātaṃ tavārtheśṛṇusāṃ pratam
strīratnaṃ tanmahāprājṣasaṃ pūrṇaṃ puṇyanirmitam
aśokasundarīnāmatavārthaṃ tapasisthitā
evaṃ jṣātvāmahābhāgabhajamānāṃ bhajasvahi
tvāmṛtesāvarārohāpuruṣaṃ naivayācate
nahuṣeṇatayoktaṃ tuśrutvāvadhāritaṃ vacaḥ
pratyuttaraṃ dadaucātharaṃ bhemeśrūyatāṃ vacaḥ
mamāgrekathitaṃ pūrvaṃ vaśiṣṭhenamahātmanā
śrūyatāṅkāraṇaṃ bhadreyathāsaukhyaṃ bhaviṣyati
ahatvādānavaṃ huṇḍaṃ nagacchāmivarāṅganām
mamabhāryānasaṃ dehobhavatīvidhinākṛtā
mamārtheniścayaṅkṛtvātapaācaritaṃ tvayā
hṛtātasmātsupāpenabhavatīniyamānvitā
sūtigṛhādahaṃ tenadānavenādhamenavai
bālabhāvasthitodevipitṛmātṛvinākṛtaḥ
tasmāttaṃ tuhaniṣyāmihuṇḍaṃ vaidānavādhamam
paścāttvāmupaneṣye'haṃ vaśiṣṭhasyāśramaṃ prati
evaṃ visarjitātenasatvaraṃ sāgatāpunaḥ
aśokasundarīṃ devīṅkathayāmāsatasya ca
samāsenatathāsarvaṃ raṃ bhāsādvijasattama
aśokasundarīsātuavadhāryasubhāṣitam
tasthautatratayāsārddhaṃ susakhyāraṃ bhayātadā
bhartuścakīdṛśaṃ vīryamitipaśyāmivaisadā
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe bhūmikhaṇḍevenopākhyānegurutīrthamāhātmyecyavanacaritre nahuṣākhyānetrayodaśādhikaśatatamo'dhyāyaḥ
caturdaśādhikaśatatamo'dhyāyaḥ
athatedānavāḥ sarvehuṇḍasya paricārakāḥ
nahuṣasyāpisaṃ vādaṃ raṃ bhayātuyathāśrutam
ācacakṣuścadaityendraṃ huṇḍaṃ sarvaṃ subhāṣitam
tamākarṇyasacukrodhadūtaṃ vākyamathābravīt
gacchavīramamādeśājjānīhipuruṣaṃ hitam
sambhāṣatetayāsārddhaṃ puruṣaḥ śivakanyayā
svāminirdeśamākarṇyajagāmalaghudānavaḥ
dhanuṣādivyabāṇaistusabhāyāṃ hibhayaṅkaraḥ
anayāraṃ bhayāte'dyaanyayāśivakanyayā
satvaraṅgacchamātiṣṭhaduḥsahodānavādhipaḥ
nahuṣa uvāca
yo'sāvāyurbalīrājāsaptadvīpādhipaḥ prabhuḥ
nahuṣaṃ nāmavikhyātaṃ devabrāhmaṇapūjakam
huṇḍenāpahṛtaṃ bālyesvāminātavadānava
seyaṅkanyāśivasyāpidaityenāpahṛtāpurā
ghoraṃ tapaścaratyeṣāhuṇḍasyāpivadhāyaca
yohamādauhṛtobālastvayāyaḥ sūtikāgṛhāt
dāsyāapikaredattaḥ sūdasyāpidurātmanā
vadhārthaṃ śrūyatāṃ pāpasohamadyasamāgataḥ
asyāpihuṇḍadaityasya duṣṭasya pāpakarmaṇaḥ
anyāṃ ścadānavānghorānnayiṣyeyamasādanam
mām eva ṃ viddhipāpiṣṭhaevaṅkathayadānavam
evamākarṇyatatsarvaṃ nahuṣasya mahātmanaḥ
gatvāhuṇḍaṃ saduṣṭātmāācacakṣe'syabhāṣitam
niśamyatanmukhāttūrṇaṃ cukrodhaditijeśvaraḥ
kasmātsūdenapāpenatayādāsyānaghātitaḥ
soyaṃ vṛddhiṃ samāyātomayāvyādhirupekṣitaḥ
athainaṅghātayiṣyāmianayāśivakanyayā
āyoḥ putraṅkhalaṃ yuddhebāṇairebhiḥ śilāśitaiḥ
evaṃ sacintayitvātusārathiṃ vākyamabravīt
syaṃ danaṃ yojayasvatvaṃ turagaiḥ sādhubhiḥ śivaiḥ
senādhyakṣaṃ samāhūyaity uvācasamāturaḥ

sārohaisturagānyodhānpatākācchatracāmaraiḥ
evamākarṇyatattasya huṇḍasyāpitatolaghuḥ

sūta uvāca
athatedānavāḥ sarvevavṛṣustaṃ śarottamaiḥ
khaḍgaiḥ pāśairmahāśūlaiḥ śaktibhistuparaśvadhaiḥ
yuyudhuḥ saṃ yugetenanahuṣeṇamahātmanā
saṃ rabdhāgarjamānāsteyathāmeghāgirautathā

paṣcadaśādhikaśatatamo'dhyāyaḥ

mahātejaṃ mahāprājṣaṃ mahādānavanāśanam

nahuṣa uvāca
sthitosmisamarepaśyatvāmahaṃ haṃ tumāgataḥ
ahaṃ tvāṃ tuhaniṣyāmidānavaṃ pāpacetanam
ityuktvādhanurādāyabāṇānagniśikhopamān
chatreṇadhriyamāṇenaśuśubheso'pisaṃ yuge
indrasya sārathiṃ divyaṃ mātaliṃ vākyamabravīt
turagāṃ ścodayāmāsamahāvātajavopamān
utpetuścatatovāhāhaṃ sāivayathāṃ bare
chatreṇaiṃ duvarṇenarathenāpipatākinā
nabhastalaṃ tusaṃ prāpyayathāsūryovirājate
athahuṇḍorathastho'pirājamānaḥ svatejasā
tadāāsīnmahāprājṣadāruṇaṃ bhītidāyakam
subāṇairniśitaistīkṣṇaiḥ kaṅkapatraiḥ śilīmukhaiḥ
huṇḍenatāḍitorājāsubāhvoraṃ taretadā
saviddhastutadābāṇairadhikaṃ śuśubhenṛpaḥ
sāruṇaḥ karamālābhirudayaṃ ścadivākaraḥ
sūryavacchobhaterājāpūrvakālasya cāṃ bare
dṛṣṭvātupauruṣaṃ tasya dānavaṃ vākyamabravīt
tiṣṭhatiṣṭhakṣaṇaṃ daityapaśyamelāghavaṃ punaḥ
ityuktvāturaṇedaityaṃ jaghānadaśabhiḥ śaraiḥ
devaiś ca cāraṇaiḥ siddhaiḥ kṛtaḥ śabdaḥ suharṣajaḥ
jayajayetirājendraśaṅkhāndadhmuḥ punaḥ punaḥ
karṇaraṃ dhramāviveśahuṇḍasya mūrchitasya ca
śrutvāsadhanurādāyabāṇamāśīviṣopamam
sthīyatāṃ sthīyatāṃ yuddhenamṛtosmitvayāhataḥ
ekaviṃśatibhirbāṇairnahuṣaṃ cāhanatpunaḥ
paṣcabhirmātaliṃ viddhvārathanīḍaṃ tusaptabhiḥ
dhvajadaṇḍaṃ tribhistīkṣṇairdānavaḥ śikhipatribhiḥ
ādānaṃ tunidānaṃ tulakṣamokṣaṃ durātmanaḥ
lāghavaṃ tasya saṃ dṛṣṭvādevatāvismayaṅgatāḥ
tasya pauruṣamāpaśyasarājādānavottamam
śūrosikṛtavidyosidhīrosiraṇapaṇḍitaḥ
ityukvādānavaṃ taṃ tudhanurvisphāryabhūpatiḥ
turagānpātayāmāsacaturbhistasya sāyakaiḥ
daṃ śanaṃ daśabhiśchittvāśaraiś ca vidalīkṛtaḥ
sarvāṅgeṣucatriṃ śadbhirvivyādhadanujeśvaram
hatāśvovirathojātobāṇapāṇirdhanurdharaḥ
dhāvamānasya huṇḍasya khaḍgaṃ cicchedabhūpatiḥ
kṣuraprairniśitairbāṇaiś ca rmacicchedabhūpatiḥ
athahuṇḍaḥ saduṣṭātmāsamālokyasamaṃ tataḥ
jagrāhamudgaraṃ tūrṇaṃ mumocalaghuvikramaḥ
vajravegaṃ samāyāṃ taṃ dadṛśenṛpatistadā
mudgaraṃ svanavaṃ taṃ cāpātayadaṃ barāttataḥ
daśabhirniśitairbāṇaiḥ kṣurapraiś ca svavikramāt
mudgaraṃ patitaṃ dṛṣṭvādaśakhaṇḍamayaṃ bhuvi
khaḍgenatīkṣṇadhāreṇatasya bāhuṃ vicicchide
sagadaṃ patitaṃ bhūmausāṅgadaṅkaṭakānvitam
mahārāvaṃ tataḥ kṛtvāvajrasphoṭasamaṃ tadā
rudhireṇāpidigdhāṅgodhāvamānomahāhave
durnivāryaḥ samāyātaḥ pārśvaṃ tasya cabhūpateḥ
nahuṣeṇamahāśaktyātāḍitohṛdidānavaḥ
patitaḥ sahasābhūmauvajrāhataivācalaḥ
tasmindaityegatebhūmāvitaredānavāgatāḥ
viviśuḥ katidurgeṣukatipātālamāśritāḥ
devāḥ praharṣamājagmurgandharvāḥ siddhacāraṇāḥ
hatetasminmahāpāpenahuṣeṇamahātmanā
tāṃ devarūpāṃ tapasāpravarddhitāṃ saāyuputraḥ pratilabhyaharṣitaḥ
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe bhūmikhaṇḍevenopākhyānegurutīrthamāhātmyecyavanacaritre nahuṣākhyānepaṣcadaśādhikaśatatamo'dhyāyaḥ
ṣoḍaśādhikaśatatamo'dhyāyaḥ
aśokasundarīpuṇyāraṃ bhayāsahaharṣitā
nahuṣaṃ prāpyavikrāṃ taṃ tam uvācatapasvinī
ahaṃ tedharmataḥ patnīdevairdiṣṭātapasvinī
sadaivaciṃ tyamānācatvāmahaṃ tapasisthitā
nahuṣa uvāca
anayāraṃ bhayāsārddhamāvāṅgacchāvabhāmini
samāropyarathetāṃ tutāṃ raṃ bhāṃ tumanoramām
tenaivarathavaryeṇavaśiṣṭhasyāśramaṃ prati
jagāmalaghuvegenatābhyāṃ sahamahāyaśāḥ
tamāśramagataṃ vipraṃ samālokyapraṇamyaca
tayāsārddhaṃ mahātejāharṣeṇamahatānvitaḥ
yathāyuddhaṃ raṇejātaṃ nihatodānavādhamaḥ
nivedayāmāsasarvaṃ vaśiṣṭhāyamahātmane
vaśiṣṭho'pisamākarṇyanahuṣasya viceṣṭitam
harṣeṇamahatāviṣṭaāśīrbhirabhinaṃ dyatam
vivāhaṅkārayāmāsaagnibrāhmaṇasannidhau
āśīrbhirabhinaṃ dyaivamithunaṃ preṣitaṃ punaḥ
mātaraṃ pitaraṃ paśyadrutaṅgatvāmahāmate
tvāṃ cadṛṣṭvāhitemātāpitāsautavasuvrata
harṣeṇavṛddhimāpnotuparvaṇīvatusāgaraḥ
evaṃ saṃ preṣitovīromuninābrahmasūnunā
namaskṛtyadvijendraṃ taṅgatomātalinātadā
sūta uvāca
apsarāmenikānāmapreṣitādaivataistataḥ
āyorbhāryāsuduḥkhenapatitāśokasāgare
tām uvācamahābhāgāṃ devīmiṃ dumatīṃ prati
muṃ caśokaṃ mahābhāgetanayaṃ paśyasasnuṣam
nihatyadānavaṃ pāpaṃ tavaputrāpahārakam
samāyāṃ taṃ sabhāyāṃ cavīraśriyāsamanvitam
suvṛttaṃ saṅgaretasya nahuṣeṇayathākṛtam
menikāyāvacaḥ śrutvāharṣeṇamahatānvitā
sāmṛtaṃ supriyaṃ proktaṃ manaḥ protsāhakārakam
evamābhāṣyatāṃ devīrājānamidamabravīt
tavaputromahābāhuḥ samāyātohisāṃ pratam
ākhyāticamahārājaeṣām eva ivarāpsarāḥ
bhartāram eva mābhāṣyavirarāmasuharṣitā
samākarṇyanṛpendrastutām uvācapriyāṃ prati
purāproktaṃ mahābhāgemuninānāradenahi
putraṃ pratinakartavyaṃ duḥkhaṃ rājaṃ stvayākadā
taṃ nihatyasuvīryeṇadānavaṃ caiṣyatesutaḥ
saṃ jātaṃ satyam eva ṃ vaimuninābhāṣitaṃ purā
dattātreyomuniśreṣṭhaḥ sākṣāddevobhaviṣyati
śuśrūṣitastvayādevimayācatapasāpurā
putraratnaṃ tenadattaṃ vaiṣṇavāṃ śapradhārakam
sadāhaniṣyatiparaṃ dānavaṃ pāpacetanam
dattātreyeṇamedattovaiṣṇavāṃ śaḥ sutottamaḥ
evaṃ sambhāṣyatāṃ devīṃ rājāceṃ dumatīṃ tadā
harṣeṇamahatāviṣṭo viṣṇuṃ sasmāravaipunaḥ
kleśāpahaṃ saukhyapradaṃ narāṇāṃ sadvaiṣṇavānāmihamokṣadaṃ param
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe bhūmikhaṇḍevenopākhyānegurutīrthamāhātmyecyavanacaritre nahuṣākhyāneṣoḍaśādhikaśatatamo'dhyāyaḥ
saptadaśādhikaśatatamo'dhyāyaḥ
nahuṣaḥ priyayāsārddhaṃ tayācaivasaraṃ bhayā
nāgāhvayaṃ puraṃ prāptaḥ sarvaśobhāsamanvitam
hematoraṇasaṃ yuktaṃ patākābhiralaṅkṛtam
nānāvāditranādaiś ca baṃ dicāraṇaśobhitam
devarūpopamaiḥ puṇyaiḥ puruṣaiḥ samalaṅkṛtam
nārībhirdivyarūpābhirgajāśvaiḥ syaṃ danaistathā
nānāmaṅgalaśabdaiś ca vedadhvanisamākulam
gītavāditraśabdaiś ca vīṇāveṇusvanaistataḥ
sarvaśobhāsamākīrṇaṃ viveśasapurottamam
vedamaṅgalaghoṣaiś ca brāhmaṇaiś ca iva pūjitaḥ
dadṛśepitaraṃ vīromātaraṃ casupuṇyakām
harṣeṇamahatāviṣṭaḥ pituḥ pādaunanāmasaḥ
aśokasundarīsātutayoḥ pādaupunaḥ punaḥ
nanāmabhaktyābhāvenaubhayoḥ sāvarānanā
raṃ bhācasānanāmāthaprītiṃ caivāpyadarśayat
namaskṛtvāsamābhāṣyasvaguruṃ nṛpanaṃ danaḥ
evamuktomahābhāgaḥ sānaṃ dapulakodgamaḥ
āyur uvāca
adyaivavyādhayonaṣṭāduḥkhaśokāvubhaugatau
bhavatodarśanātputrasutuṣṭyāhṛṣyatejagat
svavaṃ śoddharaṇaṅkṛtvāaham eva samuddhṛtaḥ
iṃ dumaty uvāca
parvaṇiprāpyaiṃ dostutejodṛṣṭvāmahodadhiḥ
vṛddhiṃ yātimahābhāgatathāhaṃ tavadarśanāt
varddhitāsmisuhṛṣṭāsmiānaṃ denasamākulā
darśanāttemahāprājṣadhanyājātāsmimānada
śiraścāghrāyatasyāpivatsaṃ dhenuryathāsvakam
abhinaṃ dyasutaṃ prāptaṃ nahuṣaṃ devarūpiṇam
āśīrbhiścārcayaddevīpuṇyāiṃ dumatītadā
sūta uvāca
athāsaumātaraṃ puṇyāṃ devīmiṃ dumatīṃ sutaḥ
kathayāmāsavṛttāṃ taṃ yathāharaṇamātmanaḥ
svabhāryāyāstathotpattiṃ prāptiṃ caivamahāyaśāḥ
huṇḍenāpiyathāyuddhaṃ huṇḍasyāpinipātanam
mātāpitroryathāvṛttaṃ tayorānaṃ dadāyakam
harṣeṇamahatāviṣṭausaṃ jātaupūrṇamānasau
jigāyapṛthivīṃ sarvāṃ saptadvīpāṃ sapattanām
pitresamarpayāmāsavasupūrṇāṃ vasuṃ dharām
pitaraṃ yājayāmāsarājasūyādibhistadā
mahāyajṣaiś ca dānaiś ca vratairniyamasaṃ yamaiḥ
sudānairyaśasāpuṇyairyajṣaiḥ puṇyamahodayaiḥ
susaṃ pūrṇaukṛtautautupitaraucāyusūnunā
athadevāḥ samāgatyanāgāhvayaṃ purottamam
abhyaṣiṃ canmahātmānaṃ nahuṣaṃ vīramardanam
munibhiścasusiddhaiś ca āyunātenabhūbhujā
abhiṣiṃ cyasvarājyetaṃ sametaṃ śivakanyayā
bhāryāyuktaḥ svakāyenaāyurājāmahāyaśāḥ
divaṃ jagāmadharmātmādevaiḥ siddhaiḥ supūjitaḥ
puruṣaiḥ puṇyakarmākhyairīdṛśaṃ puṇyamuttamam
janitavyaṃ mahābhāgakimanyaiḥ śokakārakaiḥ
yathājātaḥ sadharmātmānahuṣaḥ pitṛtārakaḥ
kulasya dharttāsarvasya nahuṣojñānapaṇḍitaḥ
āyoḥ sutasyāpiśṛṇotimartyobhogānsabhuktvaitipadaṃ murāreḥ
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe bhūmikhaṇḍevenopākhyānegurutīrthamāhātmyecyavanacaritre nahuṣākhyānesaptadaśādhikaśatatamo'dhyāyaḥ
aṣṭādaśādhikaśatatamo'dhyāyaḥ
gaṅgāmukhepurātātarodamānāvarāṅganā
netrābhyāmaśrubiṃ dūnipatanti camahājale
puṣpāṇidivyarūpāṇisaugaṃ dhānimahānti ca
gaṅgodakemahābhāganirmalāaśrubiṃ davaḥ
asthicarmāvaśeṣastujaṭācīradharaḥ punaḥ
hemavarṇānidivyāninītvāśivaṃ samarcayet
sākānārīsamācakṣvasavākohimahāmate
arcayitvāśivaṃ sothakasmātpaścātpradevati
śṛṇuvatsapravakṣyāmi vṛttāṃ taṃ devanirmitam
caritraṃ sarvapāpaghnaṃ viṣṇoś caivamahātmanaḥ
yosauhuṇḍomahāvīryonahuṣeṇahatoraṇe
nihataṃ pitaraṃ śrutvāsāmātyaṃ saparicchadam
āyuputreṇavīreṇanahuṣeṇabalīyasā
jānanti devatāḥ sarvāduḥsahaṃ samarāṅgaṇe
huṇḍātmajovihuṇḍastutrailokyaṃ haṃ tumudyataḥ
piturvairaṅkariṣyāmihaniṣyemānavānsurān
evaṃ samudyataḥ pāpīdevabrāhmaṇakaṃ ṭakaḥ
upadravaṃ samārebheprajāḥ pīḍayatecasaḥ
tasyaivatejasādagdhādevāścendrapurogamāḥ
śaraṇaṃ devadevasya jagmurviṣṇormahātmanaḥ
ūcuścapāhinonityaṃ vihuṇḍasya mahābhayāt
śrīviṣṇur uvāca
varddhaṃ tudevatāḥ sarvāḥ susukhenamaheśvarāḥ
vihuṇḍaṃ nāśayiṣyāmipāpiṣṭhaṃ devakaṃ ṭakam
evamābhāṣyatāndevānmāyāṅkṛtvājanārdanaḥ
māyāmayaṃ cakārāthastrīrūpaṣcaguṇānvitam
viṣṇumāyāmahābhāgāsarvaviśvapramohinī
cakārarūpamatulaṃ viṣṇormāyāpramohinī
vihuṇḍasya vadhārthāyarūpalāvaṇyaśālinī
sadevānāṃ vadhārthāyadivyamārgaṃ jagāmaha
naṃ danāṃ tetatomāyāmapaśyadditijeśvaraḥ
tayāvimohitodaityaḥ kāmabāṇakṛtāṃ taraḥ
ātmanāśaṃ najānātikālarūpāṃ varastriyam
tāṃ dṛṣṭvānavahemābhāṃ rūpadraviṇaśālinīm
lubdhovihuṇḍaḥ pāpātmātām uvācavarāṅganām
māyovāca
saptakoṭimitaiś ca iva puṣpaiḥ pūjayaśaṅkaram
teṣāṃ puṣpakṛtāṃ mālāṃ mamakaṃ ṭhetudānava
tadāhaṃ supriyābhāryābhaviṣyāmi na saṃśayaḥ
vihuṇḍa uvāca
vanāniyānipuṇyānidivyāniditijeśvaraḥ
kāmodākhyadrumonāstivadaṃ tyevaṃ mahājanāḥ
pṛcchamānaḥ saduṣṭātmākāmabāṇaiḥ prapīḍitaḥ
kāmodakaṃ drumaṃ brūhikāṃ taṃ puṣpasamanvitam
śukra uvāca
kāmodaḥ pādaponāstiyoṣidevāstidānava
taddhāsājjajṣiredaityasugaṃ dhīnivarāṇyapi
sumānyetānidivyānikāmodāyā na saṃśayaḥ
hṛdyānipītapuṣpāṇisaurabheṇayutānica
tenāpyekenapuṣpeṇayaḥ samarcatiśaṅkaram
tasyepsitaṃ mahākāmaṃ saṃ pūrayatiśaṅkaraḥ
tādṛśānyevapuṣpāṇilohitānimahānti ca
saurabheṇavinādaityateṣāṃ sparśaṃ nakārayet
evamākarṇitaṃ tenavākyaṃ śukrasya bhāṣitam
uvācasātukutrāstikāmodābhṛgunaṃ dana
śukra uvāca
gaṅgādvāremahāpuṇyemahāpātakanāśane
kāmodākhyaṃ puraṃ tatranirmitaṃ viśvakarmaṇā
kāmodapattanenārīdivyabhogairalaṅkṛtā
tathācābharaṇairbhātisarvadevaiḥ supūjitā
tvayātatraivagaṃ tavyaṃ pūjitavyāvarāpsarāḥ
upāyenāpipuṇyenatāṃ prahāsayadānava
evamuktvātuyogīṃ draḥ saśukrodānavaṃ prati
virarāmamahātejāḥ svakāryāyodyato'bhavat
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe bhūmikhaṇḍevenopākhyānegurutīrthamāhātmyecyavanacaritre kāmodākhyāne'ṣṭādaśādhikaśatatamo'dhyāyaḥ
ekonaviṃśatyadhikaśatatamo'dhyāyaḥ
yasyāḥ prahasanāttātasuhṛdyānibhavanti vai
puṣpāṇidivyagaṃ dhīnidurlabhānisurāsuraiḥ
kasmāttudevatāḥ sarvāḥ pravāṃ chanti mahāmate
śaṅkaraḥ sukhamāyātihāsyapuṣpaiḥ supūjitaḥ
kāmodāsābhavetkātukasya putrīvarāṅganā
hāsyāttasyām ahābhāgasupuṣpāṇibhavanti ca
koguṇastatkathāṃ brūhisakalāṃ vistareṇaca
mamaṃ thuḥ sāgaraṅkṣīramamṛtārthaṃ samudyatāḥ
mathanāddevadaityānāṅkanyāratnacatuṣṭayam
varuṇenadarśitaṃ pūrvaṃ somenaivatathāpunaḥ
paścātsaṃ darśitaṃ puṇyamamṛtaṅkalaśesthitam
kanyācatuṣṭayaṃ pūrvaṃ devānāṃ hitamicchati
sulakṣmīrnāmasācaikādvitīyāvāruṇītathā
jyeṣṭhānāmatathākhyātākāmodānyāpracakṣate
tāsāṃ madhyevarāśreṣṭhāpūrvaṃ jātāmahāmate
tasmājyeṣṭhetivikhyātālokepūjyāsadaivahi
vāruṇīpānarūpā ca payaḥ phenasamudbhavā
amṛtasya taraṅgāccakāmodākhyābabhūva ha
somorājātathālakṣmīrjajṣāteamṛtādapi
trailokyabhūṣaṇaḥ somaḥ saṃ jātaḥ śaṅkarapriyaḥ
mṛtyurogaharājātāsurāṇāṃ vāruṇītathā
jyeṣṭhāsupuṇyadājātālokānāṃ hitamicchatām
amṛtādutthitādevīkāmodānāmapuṇyadā
viṣṇoḥ prītyaibhaviṣyetuvṛkṣarūpaṃ prayāsyati
viṣṇuprītikarīsātubhaviṣyatisadaivahi
tulasīnāmasāpuṇyābhaviṣyati na saṃśayaḥ
tayāsahajagannāthoramiṣyati na saṃśayaḥ
tulasyāḥ patram ekaṃ yonītvākṛṣṇāyadāsyati
menetasyopakārāṇāṅkimasmaicadadāmyaham
evaṅkāmodanāmāsaupūrvaṃ jātāsamudrajā
yadāsāhasatedevīharṣagadgadabhāṣiṇī
sauhṛdyānisugaṃ dhīnimukhāttasyāḥ patanti vai
amlānānisupuṣpāṇiyogṛhṇātisamudyataḥ
pūjayecchaṅkaraṃ devaṃ brahmāṇaṃ mādhavaṃ tathā
rodityeṣāyadāsācakenaduḥkhenaduḥkhitā
tānicaivamahābhāgahṛdyānisumahānti ca
saurabheṇavinātaistuyaḥ pūjayatiśaṅkaram
tasya duḥkhaṃ casaṃ tāpojāyatenātrasaṃśayaḥ
puṣpaistutādṛśairdevānsakṛdarcatipāpadhīḥ
etat te sarvam ākhyātaṅkāmodākhyānamuttamam
athakṛṣṇoviciṃ tyaivadṛṣṭvāvikramasāhasam
vihuṇḍasyāpipāpasya udyamaṃ sāhasaṃ tadā
nāradaṃ preṣayāmāsamohayainaṃ durāsadam
nāradastvathasaṃ śrutyavākyaṃ viṣṇormahātmanaḥ
gacchamānaṃ durātmānaṅkāmodāṃ pratidānavam
sāṃ prataṅkenakāryeṇakasyārthaṅkenanoditaḥ
brahmātmajaṃ namaskṛtyapraty uvācakṛtāṃ jaliḥ
vipravaryaṃ punaḥ prāhakāryakāraṇamātmanaḥ
naṃ danasya vanoddeśekācinnārīvarānanā
tasyādarśanamātreṇagato'haṅkāmavaśyatām
pūjayasvamahādevaṃ puṣpaistusaptakoṭibhiḥ
tatastesupriyābhāryābhaviṣyāmi na saṃśayaḥ
tāmahaṅkāmayiṣyāmisiṃ dhujāṃ śuṇusāṃ pratam
manollāsairmahāhāsairhāsayiṣyāmyahaṃ punaḥ
prītāsatīmahābhāgāhasiṣyatipunaḥ punaḥ
tasmāddhāsyātpatiṣyanti divyānikusumānica
taistudevamumākāṃ taṃ pūjayiṣyāmisāṃ pratam
tenapūjāpradānenatuṣṭodāsyatimephalam
īśvaraḥ sarvabhūteśaḥ śaṅkarolokabhāvanaḥ
nārada uvāca
viṣṇurastisumedhāvīsarvadaityakṣayāvahaḥ
yenopāyenapuṣpāṇikāmodākhyānidānava
gaṅgātoyeṣudivyānipatiṣyanti na saṃśayaḥ
tānitvaṃ tupratigṛhāṇasuhṛdyānimahānti ca
gṛhītvātānipuṣpāṇisādhayasvamanīpsitam
nāradodānavaśreṣṭhaṃ mohayitvātataḥ punaḥ
tataścasatudharmātmācintayāmāsavaipunaḥ
kathamaśrūṇisāmuṃ cetkenopāyenaduḥkhitā
tatobuddhiḥ samutpannākāmodākhyaṃ puraṅgataḥ
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe bhūmikhaṇḍevenopākhyānegurutīrthamāhātmyecyavanacaritre kāmodākhyāneekonaviṃśatyadhikaśatatamo'dhyāyaḥ
viṃ śādhikaśatatamo'dhyāyaḥ
kāmodākhyaṃ puraṃ divyaṃ sarvadevasamākulam
kāmodāyāgṛhaṃ prāpyapraviveśadvijottamaḥ
kāmodāṃ tutatodṛṣṭvāsarvakāmasamākulām
tayāsaṃ pūjitovipraḥ suvākyaiḥ svāgatādibhiḥ
divyāsanesamārūḍhastāṃ papracchadvijottamaḥ
anāmayaṃ capapracchaāśīrbhirabhinaṃ dyatām
kāmodovāca
prasādādbhavatāṃ viṣṇoḥ sukhenavartayāmyaham
kathayasvamahāprājṣatvaṃ praśnottarakāraṇam
vyāpakaḥ sarvalokānāṃ mamāṅgematināśakaḥ
suptayātumayādṛṣṭaḥ svapnovaidāruṇomune
avyakto'sauhṛṣīkeśaḥ saṃ sāraṃ sagamiṣyati
tadāprabhṛtiduḥkhenavyāpitāhaṃ mahāmate
tanmetvaṅkāraṇaṃ brūhibhavāṣjñānavatāṃ varaḥ
nārada uvāca
vātikaḥ paittikaścaivakaphajaḥ sānnipātikaḥ
ādityodayavelāyāṃ dṛśyatesvapnauttamaḥ
satsvapnomānavānāṃ hipuṇyasya phaladāyakaḥ
anyadevaṃ pravakṣyāmi svapnasya kāraṇaṃ śubhe
mahāvātāṃ dolanaiś ca calaṃ tyāpovarānane
truṭaṃ tyaṃ bukaṇāḥ sūkṣmāstasmādudakasaṃ cayāt
bahirevapataṃ tyetenirmalāṃ bukaṇāḥ śubhe
punarlayaṃ prayāṃ tyetedṛśyādṛśyābhavanti vai
ātmāśuddhoviraktasturāgadveṣavivarjitaḥ
paṣcabhūtātmakānāṃ camuṣitvaivasuniścalaḥ
ṣaḍviṃśatisutatvānāṃ madhyecaiṣavirājate
śuddhātmākevalonityaḥ prakṛteḥ saṅgatiṅgataḥ
tadbhāvairvāyurūpaiś ca calatesthānatoyadā
aṃ tarātmāśubhaṃ nāmatasya evaprakathyate
payasaścayathābhinnābhavaṃ tyaṃ bukaṇāḥ śubhe
sahipṛthvīsavaivāyuḥ sacāpyākāśa eva hi
savaitoyaṃ sadīpyetaetepaṣcapurākṛtāḥ
ātmanastejasobhūtāmalarūpāmahātmanaḥ
tasyāpisaṅgatiṃ prāptāekatvaṃ hiprayānti te
svātmabhāvapradoṣeṇanāśayanti varānane
tatiṃ paḍamanyamicchanti vāraṃ vāraṃ varānane
teṣāṅkrīḍāvihāroyaṃ sṛṣṭi sambandhakāraṇam
punarbhūtiḥ punarhānistādṛśasya punaḥ punaḥ
apāṃ rūpasya dṛṣṭāṃ taṃ tadvadeṣāṃ na saṃśayaḥ
nanaśyatodharākāśaunanaśyaṃ tyāpa eva ca
ātmādayohyamībhadrenityarūpā na saṃśayaḥ
piṇḍaevapraṇaśyetateṣāṃ saṃ jāta eva ca
viṣayāṇāṃ sudoṣaiḥ sarāgadveṣādibhirhataḥ
prāṇāḥ prayānti vaipiṇḍātpaṣcapaṃ cātmakādvija
piṇḍāṃ tevasateātmāpratirūpastutasya ca
aṃ tarātmāyathācāgneḥ sphuliṅgastuprakāśate
tathāprakāśamāyātidṛśyādṛśyaḥ prajāyate
śuddhātmācaparaṃ brahmasadājāgartinityaśaḥ
aṃ tarātmāprabaddhastuprakṛteścamahāguṇaiḥ
annāhāreṇasaṃ puṣṭairaṃ tarātmāsukhaṃ vrajet
paścātsaṃ jāyatenidrātāmasīlayavarddhinī
nāḍīmārgeṇayaḥ sūryomerumullaṃ dhyagacchati
tadārātriḥ prajāyetayāvannodayateraviḥ
viṣayāṃ dhakārairmuktastuaṃ tarātmāprakāśate
bhāvaistattvātmakānāṃ tupaṣcatattvaiḥ prapoṣitaiḥ
pūrvajanmasthitaiḥ piṇḍairaṃ tarātmāpragṛhyate
saṃ sāraaṃ tarātmāvaidoṣairbaddhaḥ praṇīyate
kāyaṃ rakṣatijīvātmāpaścāttiṣṭhatimadhyagaḥ
śuṣkābhastrāyathāśvāsaṅkurutevāyupūritā
evaṅkāyaḥ pramugdhastumṛtakalpaḥ prajāyate
tatonidrāmahāmāyātasyāṅgeṣuprayātisā
hṛdikaṃ ṭhetathācāsyenāsikāgrepratiṣṭhati
bāhūsaṅkucyasanti ṣṭheddhṛdgatonābhimaṇḍale
ātmanastuprabhāvāccaudānonāmamārutaḥ
prajāyatemahātīvrābalarodhaṅkarotisaḥ
tathācātmāsusaṃ lagnaḥ prāṇavāyur na saṃśayaḥ
aṃ tarātmaprasaktastuprāṇavāyuḥ śubhānane
pūrvajanmārjitānvāsānsmṛtvātatrapradhāvati
tatrasaṃ sthomahāprājṣaḥ svecchayāramatepunaḥ
evaṃ nānāvidhānsvapnānaṃ tarātmāprapaśyati
uttamāṃ ścaviruddhāṃ ścakarmayuktānprapaśyati
girīṃ stathāsudurgāṃ ścauccāvacānprapaśyati
jalaṃ nadīṃ taḍāgaṃ ca payaḥ sthānā nipaśyati
karmayuktovarārohelābhālābhaprakāśakaḥ
tad bhāvyaṃ ca varārohe viṣṇoś caiva bhaviṣyati
tannimittaṃ tvayā dṛṣṭo duḥsvapnaḥ sa tu prekṣitaḥ
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe bhūmikhaṇḍe
viṃśādhikaśatatamo'dhyāyaḥ
ekaviṃśatyadhikaśatatamo'dhyāyaḥ
kāmodovāca
navidurdevatāḥ sarvāyasyāṃ taṃ rūpam eva ca
yasyāmāyāprapaṣcastusaṃ sāraḥ śṛṇunārada
kasmātprayātisaṃ sāraṃ mamasvāmījagatpatiḥ
nārada uvāca
śṛṇudevipravakṣyāmi yatkṛtaṃ tenacakriṇā
bhṛgoragrepratijṣātaṃ yajṣarakṣāṅkaromyaham
āgatyadhvaṃ sitaḥ sarvaḥ sayajṣaḥ pāpacetanaiḥ
hariṅkruddhaḥ sayogīṃ draḥ śaśāpabhṛgurevatam
daśajanmānibhuṅkṣvatvaṃ macchāpakaluṣīkṛtaḥ
tannimittaṃ tvayā devi duḥsvapnaḥ parivīkṣitaḥ
ity uktvā tāṅgato vipro brahmalokaṃ sa nāradaḥ
kṛṣṇasyāpisuduḥkhenaduḥkhitāsābhavattadā
rurodakaruṇaṃ bālāhāhetivadatīmuhuḥ
gaṅgātīropaviṣṭāsājalāṃ teśṛṇunandana
sunetrābhyāṃ tathāśrūṇiduḥkhenāpipramuṃ cati
tānyaśrūṇipramuktānigaṅgātoyepataṃ tyapi
gaṅgātoyepraphullānivāhitāniprayānti vai
dadṛśedānavaśreṣṭho viṣṇumāyāpramohitaḥ
duḥkhajāninajānātimuninākathitānyapi
harṣeṇamahatāviṣṭaḥ parijagrāhaso'suraḥ
saptakoṭibhirdaityeṃ dro viṣṇumāyāpramohitaḥ
athakruddhājagaddhātrīśaṅkaraṃ vākyamabravīt
śokotpannānipadmānigaṅgātoyagatānivai
ayameṣapragṛhṇātikāmākulitacetanaḥ
pūjayeccāpiduṣṭātmāśokasaṃ tāpakārakaiḥ
duḥkhajaiḥ śokajaiḥ puṣpaistaiḥ suśreyaḥ kathaṃ bhavet
yādṛśenāpibhāvenamām eva paripūjayet
tādṛśenāpibhāvenaasya siddhirbhaviṣyati
satyadhyānavihīnoyaṅkāmodānyastamānasaḥ
saṃ jātaḥ pāpacāritrojahidevisvatejasā
evamākarṇyatadvākyaṃ śaṃ bhoścaivamahātmanaḥ
asyaivasaṅkṣayaṃ śaṃ bhokariṣyetavaśāsanāt
evamuktvātatodevītasyāpivadhakāṅkṣayā
kṛtvāmāyāmayaṃ rūpaṃ brāhmaṇasya mahātmanaḥ
pūjayecchaṅkaraṃ nāthaṃ supuṣpaiḥ pārijātajaiḥ
sametyadānavaḥ pāpodivyāṃ pūjāṃ vināśayet
kāmākulaḥ suduḥkhārtastadgatobhāvatatparaḥ
viṣṇoś caivamahāmāyāṃ pūrvadṛṣṭāṃ sadānavaḥ
sasmāradānavaḥ pāpaḥ kāmabāṇaiḥ prapīḍitaḥ
tasyāḥ smaraṇamātreṇakaṃ darpeṇabalīyasā
kālākṛṣṭaḥ saduṣṭātmāśokajātānitānisaḥ
parigṛhyasamāyātaḥ pūjanārthīmaheśvaram
devyākṛtāṃ hipūjāṃ casupuṣpaiḥ pārijātajaiḥ
tāṃ nirṇāśyasulobhenaśokajaiḥ paripūjayet
netrābhyāṃ tasya duṣṭasya biṃ davaste'śru sambhavāḥ
devībrāhmaṇarūpeṇatam uvācamahāmate
kobhavānpūjayeddevaṃ śokākulamanāḥ sadā
pataṃ tyaśrūṇidevasya mastakeśokajānite
apavitrāṇimebrūhietamarthaṃ mamāgrataḥ
vihuṇḍa uvāca
pūrvaṃ dṛṣṭāmayānārīsarvasaubhāgyasaṃ padā
sarvalakṣaṇasaṃ pannākāmasyāyatanaṃ mahat
tasyām ohenasaṃ dagdhaḥ kāmenākulatāṅgataḥ
teṣāṃ puṣpakṛtāṃ mālāṃ mamakaṃ ṭheparikṣipa
koṭibhiḥ saptasaṅkhyātaiḥ pūjayasvamaheśvaram
tadarthaṃ pūjayāmyevaīśvaraṃ phaladāyakam
śrīdevy uvāca
kvatebhāvaḥ kvatedhyānaṅkvatejñānaṃ durātmanaḥ
kāmodāyāvaraṃ rūpaṅkīdṛśaṃ vadasāṃ pratam
kvalabdhānisupuṣpāṇitasyāhāsyodbhavānica
vihuṇḍa uvāca
bhāvaṃ dhyānaṃ najānāminadṛṣṭāsāmayākadā
gaṅgātoyagatānyevaparigṛhṇāminityaśaḥ
tairahaṃ pūjayāmyekaṃ śaṅkaraṃ pravadāmyaham
mamāgrekathitaṃ vipraśukreṇāpimahātmanā
etat te sarvam ākhyātaṃ yaccapṛṣṭosmisāṃ pratam
śrīdevy uvāca
kāmodārodanājjātaiḥ puṣpaistairduḥkha sambhavaiḥ
yādṛśenāpibhāvenapuṣpaiś ca yādṛśaistvayā
arcitodevadeveśastādṛśaṃ phalamāpnuhi
divyapūjāṃ vināśyaivaṃ śokapuṣpaiḥ prapūjasi
asaudoṣastavaivādyasamutpannaḥ sudāruṇaḥ
tasmāddaṇḍaṃ pradāsyāmibhuṅkṣvasvakarmajaṃ phalam
tasyāvākyaṃ samākarṇyakālakṛṣṭobabhāṣatām
rereduṣṭadurācāramamakarmapradūṣaka
hanmitvāmihakhaḍgenaanenāpi na saṃśayaḥ
ityuktvābrāhmaṇaṃ taṃ saniśitaṅkhaḍgamādade
haṃ tukāmaḥ saduṣṭātmāabhyadhāvatadānavaḥ
sādevīviprarūpeṇasaṅkruddhāparameśvarī
hanmitvāmihakhaḍgenaanenāpi na saṃśayaḥ
svasthānamāgataṃ dṛṣṭvāhuṅkāraṃ visasarjaha
tenahuṅkāranādenapatitodānavādhamaḥ
niśceṣṭaḥ kāmarūpeṇavajrāhataivācalaḥ
lokāḥ svāsthyaṅgatāḥ sarveduḥkhatāpavivarjitāḥ
etasmātkāraṇādvatsasāstrīvaiparidevati
gaṅgātīrevarārohāduḥkhavyākulamānasā
viṣṇur uvāca
evamuktvāsuputraṃ taṅkuJjaloaṇḍajeśvaraḥ
virarāmamahāprājṣaḥ kiṣcinnovācabhūpate
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe bhūmikhaṇḍevenopākhyānegurutīrthamāhātmyecyavanacaritre kāmodākhyāneekaviṃśatyadhikaśatatamo'dhyāyaḥ
dvāviṃśatyadhikaśatatamo'dhyāyaḥ
viṣṇur uvāca
virarāmamahāprājṣaḥ kiṃ cinnovācatānprati
vaṭādhaḥ sthodvijaśreṣṭhastam uvācamahāśukam
kiṃ vādevo'thagandharvaḥ kiṃ vāvidyādharobhavān
kasya śāpādimāṃ prāptoyoniṅkīrasya pātakīm
kasmātteīdṛśaṃ jñānaṃ vartate'tīṃ driyaṃ śuka
kiṃ vācchannenarūpeṇaanenāpimahāmate
vidyāṃ tapaḥ prabhāvaṃ cayasmādbhramasimedinīm
upaviśyāsanepuṇyechāyāmāśrayaśītalām
nāhaṃ devonagandharvonāhaṃ vidyādharaḥ punaḥ
yohaṃ viprapravakṣyāmi tanmenigadataḥ śṛṇu
kaśyapasya kulejātaḥ kaścidbrāhmaṇasattamaḥ
vedavedāṅgatattvajṣaḥ sarvakarmaprakāśakaḥ
vidyādharetivikhyātaḥ kulaśīlaguṇairyutaḥ
rājamānaḥ śriyāvipraācāraistapasātadā
vasuśarmānāmaśarmādharmaśarmācatetrayaḥ
teṣāmahaṃ dharmaśarmākaniṣṭhoguṇavarjitaḥ
vasuśarmāmamabhrātāvedaśāstrārthakovidaḥ
ācāreṇasusaṃ pannovidyādisuguṇaiḥ punaḥ
nāmaśarmāmahāprājṣastadvaccāsīdguṇādhikaḥ
ahamekomahāmūrkhaḥ saṃ jātaḥ śṛṇusattama
vidyānāmuttamaṃ viprabhāvamarthaṃ śubhaṅkadā
saṃ jātaḥ kṣitimadhyetunavidvānmeguṇākaraḥ
itisaṃ ciṃ tyadharmātmāmām uvācasuduḥkhitaḥ
evamākarṇyatattasya piturvākyaṃ mayāśubham
nāhaṃ tātagamiṣyāmigurorgehaṃ suduḥkhadam
yatravaitāḍanaṃ nityaṃ bhrūbhaṅgādicakrośanam
annaṃ nadṛśyatetatrakarmaṇāśṛṇusattama
tasmādduḥkhamayaṃ tātanayāsyegurumaṃ diram
vidyākāryaṅkariṣyenakrīḍārthamahamutsukaḥ
bhokṣyesvapsyeprasādāttekariṣyekrīḍanaṃ pitaḥ
ḍiṃ bhaiḥ sārddhaṃ sukhenāpidivārātramataṃ dritaḥ
mām uvācasadharmātmāmūḍhaṃ jṣātvāsuduḥkhitaḥ
māputrasāhasaṅkārṣīrvidyārthamudyamaṅkuru
vidyayāprāpyatesaukhyaṃ yaśaḥ kīrtistathātulā
jñānaṃ svargaścamokṣaścatasmādvidyāṃ prasādhaya
pūrvaṃ suduḥkhamūlātupaścādvidyāsukhapradā
tasmātsādhayaputratvaṃ vidyāṅgurugṛhaṃ vraja
mamalajjāsamutpannājīvanāśakarītadā
iticiṃ tāparojātoduḥkhaśokasamākulaḥ
kathaṃ vidyāmahaṃ jānekathaṃ viṃ dāmyahaṅguṇān
kathaṃ mejāyatesvargaḥ kathaṃ mokṣaṃ vrajāmyaham
devatāyataneduḥkhīupaviṣṭastvahaṅkadā
madbhāgyaiḥ preritaḥ kaścitsiddhaekaḥ samāgataḥ
nirāśrayojitāhāraḥ sadānaṃ dastuniḥ spṛhaḥ
parabrahmaṇisaṃ līnojñānadhyānasamādhimān
tamahaṃ saṃ śritoviprajñānarūpaṃ mahāmatim
dīnarūpohyahaṃ jātomaṃ dabhāgyastathāpunaḥ
sumūḍhenamayātasya pūrvavṛttāṃ tam eva hi
tam evaṃ śrāvitaṃ sarvaṃ sarvajṣatvaṅkathaṃ vrajet
etadarthaṃ mahāduḥkhībhavānmamagatiḥ sadā
sacovācamahātmāmesarvaṃ jñānasya kāraṇam
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe bhūmikhaṇḍevenopākhyānegurutīrthamāhātmyecyavanacaritre dvāviṃśatyadhikaśatatamo'dhyāyaḥ
trayoviṃśatyadhikaśatatamo'dhyāyaḥ
śrūyatāmabhidhāsyāmijñānarūpaṃ tavāgrataḥ
jñānasya nāstivaidehohastaupādaucacakṣuṣī
nāsākarṇaunajñānasya nāsticaivāsthisaṅgrahaḥ
kenadṛṣṭaṃ tuvaijñānaṅkāniliṅgānitasya vai
divāprakāśakaḥ sūryorātrauprakāśayecchaśī
gṛhaṃ prakāśayeddīpolokamadhyesthitāamī
tatpadaṅkenavaidhāmnādṛśyateśṛṇusattama
naviṃ danti himūḍhāstemohitāviṣṇumāyayā
kāyamadhyesthitaṃ jñānaṃ dhyānadīptamanaupamam
tatpadaṃ tenadṛśyetacaṃ drasūryādibhirnaca
hastapādauvinājñānamacakṣuḥ karṇavarjitam
sarvamāghrātiviprendraśṛṇotyevaṃ na saṃśayaḥ
nāstijñānasamodīpaḥ sarvāṃ dhakāranāśane
svargebhūmaucapātālesthānesthānecadṛśyate
kāyamadhyesthitaṃ jñānaṃ naviṃ danti kubuddhayaḥ
jñānasthānaṃ pravakṣyāmi yasmājjñānaṃ prajāyate
prāṇināṃ hṛdayenityaṃ nihitaṃ sarvadādvija
kāmādīnsumahābhogānmahāmohādikāṃ stathā
tattvamūlamidaṃ jñānaṃ nirmalaṃ sarvadarśakam
niḥ saṅgoniḥ spṛhobhūtvāekāṃ tasthānamāśritaḥ
sarvaprakāśakojṣānīsarvadarśībhaviṣyasi
vṛttāṃ taṃ vetsyasitvaṃ tumatprasādān na saṃśayaḥ
siddhenatenameviprajñānarūpaṃ prakāśitam
etat te sarvam ākhyātamātmavṛttāṃ tam eva hi
kīrayoniṅkathaṃ prāptobhavāṣjñānavatāṃ varaḥ
tanmetvaṅkāraṇaṃ brūhisarvasandehanāśanam
saṃ sargājjāyatepāpaṃ saṃ sargātpuṇyam eva hi
lubdhakenāpipāpenakenāpyekaḥ śukaḥ śiśuḥ
cāṭukāṃ rasurūpaṃ taṃ paṭuvākyaṃ samīkṣyaca
gṛhītobrāhmaṇaikenamamaprītyāsamarpitaḥ
mām eva ṃ vadatesopitātatātetiāsyatām
ityādicāṭukairvākyairmām eva ṃ paribhāṣayet
nītaḥ śukobiḍālenamamaduḥkhasya hetave
biḍālenahataḥ pakṣītenaivabhakṣitohisaḥ
śrutvāmṛtyuṅgataṃ vipraśukaṃ taṃ cāṭukārakam
mahatāduḥkhabhāvenaasukhenātiduḥkhitaḥ
tasya duḥkhenamugdhosmitīvreṇāpisupīḍitaḥ
prālapaṃ rāmacaṃ dretiśukarājetipaṇḍita
ślokarājetitaṃ vipramohāccalitamānasaḥ
tato'haṃ duḥkhasaṃ taptaḥ saṃ jātaḥ svenakarmaṇā
viyogenāpiviprendraśukasya śṛṇusāṃ pratam
vismṛtaṃ tanmayājñānaṃ siddhenāpiprakāśitam
saṃ smaraṣchokasaṃ taptastaṃ śukaṃ cāṭukārakam
gadyapadyamayairvākyaiḥ saṃ skṛtākṣarasaṃ yutaiḥ
tvāṃ vinākaścamāṃ vatsabodhayiṣyatisāṃ pratam
kathābhistuvicitrābhiḥ pakṣirājaprasādyamām
evamādipralapyāhaṃ śokenāpisupīḍitaḥ
maraṇeyādṛśobhāvomatiścāsīccayādṛśī
tādṛśenāpibhāvenajāto'haṃ dvijasattama
garbhavāsomayāprāptojñānasmṛtividhāyakaḥ
smṛtaṃ pūrvakṛtaṅkarmasvayam eva viceṣṭitam
mayāpāpenamūḍhenakiṅkṛtaṃ hyakṛtātmanā
tenamenirmalaṃ jñānaṃ jātaṃ vaisarvadarśakam
sabāhyābhyaṃ taraṃ viprakṣālitaṃ nirmalaṅkṛtam
tasminkālemṛtovipratadbhāvenāpibhāvitaḥ
tādṛśo'smipunarjātaḥ śukarūpomahītale
maraṇeyādṛśobhāvaḥ prāṇināṃ parijāyate
tādṛśāḥ syustusatvāstetadrūpāstatparāyaṇāḥ
tadguṇāstatsvarūpāstebhāvabhūtābhavanti hi
mṛtyakālasya viprendrabhāvenāpi na saṃśayaḥ
atulaṃ prāptavāṣjñānamahamatramahāmate
vartamānaṃ mahāprājṣajṣānenāpimahāmate
sarvaṃ vidāmyahaṃ hyatrasaṃ sthitopi na saṃśayaḥ
tāraṇāyamanuṣyāṇāṃ saṃ sāreparivartatām
etat te sarvam ākhyātaṃ śṛṇubhārgavanaṃ dana
sthalajāccodakātsarvaṃ bāhyaṃ malaṃ praṇaśyati
janmāṃ tarakṛtānpāpāngurutīrthaṃ praṇāśayet
saṃ sāratāraṇāyaivajaṅgamaṃ tīrthamuttamam
viṣṇur uvāca
śukaevaṃ mahāprājṣaścyavanāyamahātmane
tattvaṃ prakāśayitvātuvirarāmanṛpottama
nāhaṃ rājyasya kāmārthīnānyatiṅkacitprakāmaye
viṣṇur uvāca
gobhūsvarṇāmbudhānyānāṅkurudānaṃ mahāmate
tasmāddānaṃ prakartavyaṃ māmuddiśyacabhūpate
yādṛśenāpibhāvenamāmuddiśyadadātiyaḥ
tādṛśaṃ tasya vaibhāvaṃ satyam eva ṅkaromyaham
ṛṣīṇāṃ darśanātsparśādbhraṣṭastepāpasaṃ cayaḥ
āgamiṣyasiyajṣāṃ temamadehaṃ na saṃśayaḥ
evamābhāṣyataṃ venamaṃ tarddhānaṅgatohariḥ
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe bhūmikhaṇḍevenopākhyānegurutīrthamāhātmyasaṃ pūrtivarṇane
caturviṃśatyadhikaśatatamo'dhyāyaḥ
sūta uvāca
aṃ tarddhānaṅgateviṣṇauvenorājāmahāmatiḥ
harṣeṇamahatāviṣṭaścintayitvānṛpottamaḥ
samāhūyanṛpaśreṣṭhaṃ taṃ pṛthuṃ madhurākṣaraiḥ
tam uvācamahātmānaṃ harṣeṇamahatātadā
tvayāputreṇabhūrloketāritosmisupātakāt
nītaujjvalatāṃ vatsavaṃ śomesāṃ prataṃ pṛtho
mayāvināśitodoṣaistvayāguṇaiḥ prakāśitaḥ
yajehamaśvamedhenadāsyedānānyanekaśaḥ
viṣṇulokaṃ vrajāmyadyasakāyasteprasādataḥ
sambharasvamahābhāga sambhārāṃ stvaṃ nṛpottama
āmaṃ trayamahābhāgabrāhmaṇānvedapāragān
evaṃ pṛthuḥ samādiṣṭovenenāpimahātmanā
praty uvācamahātmāsavenaṃ pitaramādarāt
kururājyaṃ mahārājabhuṅkṣvabhogānmanonugān
divyānvāmānuṣānpuṇyānyajṣairyajajanārdanam
dhanurādāyapṛthvīśaḥ sabāṇaṃ yatnapūrvakam
ādideśabhaṭānsarvānghoṣadhvaṃ bhūtalemama
kariṣyanti cayatpāpaṃ ājṣāṃ venasya bhūpateḥ
ullaṅghyavadhyatāṃ sohiyāsyatenātrasaṃśayaḥ
yajadhvaṃ mānavāḥ sarvetanmanaskāvimatsarāḥ
evaṃ śikṣāṃ pradatvāsaurājyaṃ bhṛtyeṣuvenajaḥ
śatavarṣapraṇaṃ vainirāhārobabhūva ha
tapasātasya vaituṣṭobrahmāpṛthum uvācaha
pṛthur uvāca
venaeṣamahāprājṣaḥ pitāmekīrtivarddhanaḥ
samācaratiyaḥ pāpamasya rājyenarādhamaḥ
śiraśchettābhavatveṣatasya devojanārdanaḥ
adṛṣṭaiś ca mahācakrairhariḥ śāstābhavetsvayam
manasākarmaṇāvācākartuṃ vāṃ chatipātakam
teṣāṃ śirāṃ sitruṭyaṃ tuphalaṃ pakvaṃ yathādrumāt
etadevavaraṃ manyetvattaḥ śṛṇusureśvara
prajānāṃ doṣabhāvenanalipyatipitāmama
tathākuruṣvadeveśavaraṃ dātuṃ yadīcchasi
evamastumahābhāgapitātepūtatāṅgataḥ
viṣṇunā śāsitovatsaputreṇāpitvayāpṛtho
evaṃ pṛthuṃ samuddiśyavaraṃ datvāgatovibhuḥ
pṛthurevasamāyātorājyakarmaṇisaṃ sthitaḥ
vainyasya rājyeviprendrāḥ pāpaṅkaścinnacācaret
ityājṣāvartatetasya vainyasyāpimahātmanaḥ
sarvalokāḥ samācāraiḥ parivartanti nityaśaḥ
dānabhogaiḥ pravartaṃ tesarvadharmaparāyaṇāḥ
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe bhūmikhaṇḍevenopākhyānecaturviṃśatyadhika
śatatamo'dhyāyaḥ
paṣcaviṃśatyadhikaśatatamo'dhyāyaḥ
sūta uvāca
venasyājṣāṃ susaṃ prāpyapṛthuḥ paramadhārmikaḥ
sambabhresarva sambhārānnānāpuṇyānnṛpātmajaḥ
nimaṃ tryabrāhmaṇānsarvānnānādeśodbhavānapi
athavenaiyājāsāvaśvamedhenabhūpatiḥ
dānānyadādbrāhmaṇebhyonānārūpāṇyanekaśaḥ
jagāmavaiṣṇavaṃ lokaṃ sakāyojagatīpatiḥ
etadvaḥ sarvamākhyātaṃ caritraṃ tasya bhūpateḥ
sarvapāpapraśamanaṃ sarvaduḥkhavināśanam
pṛthurevasadharmātmārājāpṛthvīṃ praśāsati
etat te sarvam ākhyātaṃ bhūmikhaṃ ṇḍamanuttamam
prathamaṃ sṛṣṭikhaṇḍaṃ tudvitīyaṃ bhūmikhaṇḍakam
bhūmikhaṇḍasya māhātmyaṅkathayiṣyāmyahaṃ punaḥ
asya khaṇḍasya vaiślokaṃ yaḥ śṛṇotinarottamaḥ
yonarobhāvasaṃ yukto'dhyāyaṃ saṃ śṛṇutesudhīḥ
tasya puṇyaṃ pravakṣyāmi śrūyatāṃ dvijasattamāḥ
asya padmapurāṇasya paṭhamānasya nityaśaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
kasmātkalaunajāyaṃ teśṛṇvānasya capadmaja
narasya puṇyayuktasya nānāvighnāḥ sudāruṇāḥ
tatphalaṃ dṛśyatetātapurāṇepadmasaṃ jṣake
purāṇaṃ cāpiyattadvadaśvamedhasamaṅkila
nabhuṃ janti narāḥ pāpāḥ pāpamārgeṣusaṃ sthitāḥ
aśvamedhasamaṃ puṇyaṃ nabhuṃ janti kalaunarāḥ
yenaśrutamidaṃ puṇyaṃ purāṇaṃ padmasaṃ jṣakam
aśvamedhādayoyajṣāstasmānnaṣṭāmahāmate
kalauyugegatāḥ svargesavedāḥ sāṅgasasvarāḥ
yaḥ kopisatvasaṃ pannaḥ śraddhāvānbhagavatparaḥ
śravaṇārthaṃ mahāśraddhāpūrvaṃ tasya prajāyate
śṛṇvānasya narasyāpimahāvighnonasaṃ caret
aśraddhājāyatepūrvaṃ pāṭhakasya narasya ca
lobhaścajāyatetasya śṛṇvānasya dvijottama
preṣito viṣṇudevenamahāmohaḥ sadāruṇaḥ
akarotsavināśaṃ tuśṛṇvataścāsyanityaśaḥ
dūṣakāḥ kutsakāḥ pāpāḥ sambhavanti dinedine
jṣātavyaṃ tusubuddhenavighnarūpaṃ mamādhunā
saṃ jātaṃ dṛśyatevyāsatathāhomaṃ samācaret
vaiṣṇavaiś ca mahāmaṃ trairviṣṇusūktaiḥ supuṇyadaiḥ
viṣṇorarāṭamaṃ treṇasahasraśīrṣakeṇaca
idaṃ viṣṇusumaṃ treṇaābrahmeṇapunaḥ punaḥ
bṛhatsāmnāsumaṃ treṇadvādaśākṣarakeṇaca
aṣṭottaratilājyaiś ca pālāśaiḥ samidhairapi
grahāṇāmapikarttavyaṃ sthāpanaṃ pūjanaṃ dvija
vighneśaṃ pūjayettatraśāradāṃ casureśvarīm
jātavedāṃ mahāmāyāṃ caṇḍikāṅkṣetranāyakam
tilaiś ca taṃ dulairājyaisteṣāṃ maṃ trasamudyataiḥ
yathā sambhāvikāṃ tātadakṣiṇāṃ dhenusaṃ yutām
tatovighnāḥ praṇaśyanti purāṇaṃ siddhimāpnuyāt
tasyāṅgejāyaterogobahupīḍāpradāyakaḥ
bhāryāśokaḥ putraśokodhanahāniḥ prajāyate
nānāvidhānmahārogānbhuṃ jatenātrasaṃśayaḥ
ekādaśīṃ susaṃ prāpyapūjayenmadhusūdanam
ṣoḍaśaiścopacāraiś ca bhāvayuktenacetasā
brāhmaṇānbhojayetpaścādyathāvittānusārataḥ
keśavāyatatodatvāsaṅkalpaṃ haviṣānvitam
svayaṅkuryāttataḥ prājṣobhojanaṃ sahabāṃ dhavaiḥ
purāṇasaṃ hitāpūrṇāśrotavyādharmatatparaiḥ
sapādaṃ lakṣam ekaṃ tubrahmākhyaṃ puṣkaraṃ śṛṇu
kṛteyugetuniṣpāpāḥ śṛṇvanti manujādvija
lakṣasyārddhaṃ tataḥ kṛtsnaṃ purāṇaṃ padmasaṃ jṣakam
ślokānāṃ tusahasrābhyāṃ dvābhyām eva tathādhikam
tretāyugetathāprāpteyadāśroṣyanti mānavāḥ
dvāviṃśatisahasrāṇisaṃ hitāpadmasaṃ jṣitā
dvāparekathitāviprabrahmaṇāparamātmanā
dvādaśaivasahasrāṇāṃ padmākhyāsātusaṃ hitā
kalauyugepaṭhiṣyanti mānavāviṣṇutatparāḥ
saṃ hitāsvevaviprendraśeṣākhyānapravistaraḥ
dvādaśaivasahasrāṇināśaṃ yāsyanti sattama
bhūmikhaṇḍaṃ naraḥ śrutvāsarvapāpaiḥ pramucyate
śrotavyaṃ hiprayatnenapadmākhyaṃ pāpanāśanam
prathamaṃ sṛṣṭikhaṇḍaṃ tudvitīyaṃ bhūmikhaṇḍakam
tṛtīyaṃ svargakhaṇḍaṃ capātālaṃ tucaturthakam
paṣcamaṃ cottaraṅkhaṇḍaṃ sarvapāpapraṇāśanam
yaḥ śṛṇotinarobhaktyāpaṣcakhaṇḍānyanukramāt
mahābhāgyenalabhyaṃ tepaṣcakhaṇḍānibhūsurāḥ
śrutānimokṣadānisyuḥ satyaṃ satyaṃ na saṃśayaḥ
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe bhūmikhaṇḍepaṣcapaṣcāśatsahasrasaṃ hitāyāṃ venopākhyāne
paṣcaviṃśatyadhikaśatatamo'dhyāyaḥ
samāpto'yaṃ bhūmikhaṇḍo dvitīyaḥ
iti śrīpādmemahāpurāṇe dvitīyaṃ bhūmikhaṇḍaṃ samāptam
atha śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe tṛtīyaṃ svargakhaṇḍaṃ prārabhyate
jagajjanānāṃ hṛdi saṃniviṣṭaṃ
trikālajṣāmahātmānonānāpuṇyasamāśrayāḥ
ye'rbudāraṇyaniratāḥ puṣkarāraṇyavāsinaḥ
śrīśailaniratāyecakurukṣetranivāsinaḥ
dharmāraṇyaratā ye ca daṇḍakāraṇyavāsinaḥ
jaṃ būmārgaratāyecayecasatyanivāsinaḥ
etecānyecabahavaḥ saśiṣyāmunayo'malāḥ
naimiṣaṃ samupāyātāḥśaunakandraṣṭumutsukāḥ
taṃ pūjayitvāvidhivattenate ca supūjitāḥ
āsaneṣuvicitreṣubṛsyādiṣuyathākramam
śaunakenapradatteṣuāsīnāstetapodhanāḥ
kṛṣṇāśritāḥkathāḥpuṇyāḥparasparamathābruvan
kathāṃ teṣutatasteṣāṃ munīnāṃ bhāvitātmanām
ājagāmamahātejāḥ sūtastatramahādyutiḥ
vyāsaśiṣyaḥpurāṇajṣoromaharṣaṇasaṃ jṣakaḥ
tānpraṇamyayathānayāyaṃ sataiś ca ivābhipūjitaḥ
upaviṣṭaṃ yathāyogyaṃ śaunakādyāmaharṣayaḥ
vyāsaśiṣyaṃ sukhāsīnaṃ sūtaṃ vairomaharṣaṇam
taṃ papracchurmahābhāgāḥśaunakādyāstapodhanāḥ
ṛṣayaūcuḥ
tvattaḥ śrutāmahāpuṇyāḥpurāpaurāṇikīḥkathāḥ
sāṃ prataṃ capravṛttāḥ smakathāyāṃ sakṣaṇāhareḥ
punaḥ purāṇam ācakṣva harivārtāsamanvitam
hareranyākathāsūtaśmaśānasadṛśīsmṛtā
tīrthānāṃ puṇyadātṝṇāṃ nāmāni kila kīrtaya
kṣetrāṇi kāni puṇyāni ke ca pūjyāḥ śiloccayāḥ
nadyaś ca kāḥ parāḥ puṇyā nṛṇāṃ pāpaharāḥ śubhāḥ
sūta uvāca
sādhusādhumahābhāgāḥ sādhupṛṣṭaṃ tapodhanāḥ
taṃ praṇamyapravakṣyāmipurāṇaṃ padmasaṃ jṣakam
pārāśaryaṃ paramapuruṣaṃ viśvavedyaikayoniṃ
śaśvac chāntaṃ svamativiṣayaṃ śuddhatejoviśālaṃ
vedavyāsaṃ vitatayaśasaṃ sarvadāhaṃ namāmi
yasya prasādād vakṣyāmi nārāyaṇakathām imām
pravakṣyāmimahāpuṇyaṃ purāṇaṃ padmasaṃ jṣitam
sahasraṃ paṣcapaṣcāśatṣaḍbhiḥkhaṇḍaiḥ samanvitam
tatrādāvādikhaṇḍaṃ syādbhūmikhaṇḍaṃ tataḥparam
brahmakhaṇḍaṃ catatpaścāttataḥpātālakhaṇḍakam
kriyākhaṇḍaṃ tataḥkhyātamuttaraṅkhaṇḍamanti mam
tadvṛttāṃ tāśrayaṃ tasmātpādmamityucyatebudhaiḥ
etatpurāṇamamalaṃ viṣṇumāhātmyam uttamam
brahmātannāradāyāhanārado'smadguroḥpuraḥ
vyāsaḥ sarvapurāṇānisetihāsānisaṃ hitāḥ
adhyāpayāmāsamuhurmāmatipriyamātmanaḥ
sarvatīrthābhiṣekaṃ calabhateśṛṇutehiyaḥ
śraddhayāparayābhaktyāśrutamātreṇamuktidaḥ
aśraddhayāpiśṛṇutelabhatepuṇyasaṃ cayam
tatrādikhaṇḍaṃ vakṣyāmi puṇyaṃ pāpavināśanam
śṛṇvantu munayaḥ sarvesaśiṣyāstvatrayesthitāḥ
iti śrīpādmemahāpurāṇe svargakhaṇḍe
dvitīyo'dhyāyaḥ
sūta uvāca
ādisargamahaṃ tāvatkathayāmidvijottamāḥ
jṣāyateyenabhagavānparamātmāsanātanaḥ
sṛṣṭeṣupralayādūrdhvaṃ nāsītiṅkaciddvijottamāḥ
nityaṃ niraṃ janaṃ śāṃ taṃ nirmalaṃ nityanirmalam
ānaṃ dasāgaraṃ svacchaṃ yatkāṅkṣanti mumukṣavaḥ
sarvajṣaṃ jñānarūpatvādanaṃ tamajamavyayam
avināśisadāsvacchamacyutaṃ vyāpakaṃ mahat
sargakāletusaṃ prāptejṣātvātaṃ jñānarūpakam
ātmalīnaṃ vikāraṃ catatsraṣṭumupacakrame
tasmātpradhānamudbhūtaṃ tataś cāpimahānabhūt
sātvikorājasaś caiva tāmasaś ca tridhāmahān
pradhānenāvṛtohyevatvacābījamivāvṛtam
vaikārikastaijasaś ca bhūtādiś caiva tāmasaḥ
yathāpradhānenamahānmahatāsatathāvṛtaḥ
bhūtādistuvikurvāṇaḥśabdatanmātrakaṃ tataḥ
sasarjaśabdatanmātrādākāśaṃ śabdalakṣaṇam
śabdamātraṃ tathākāśaṃ bhūtādiḥ samamāvṛṇot
śabdamātraṃ tathākāśaṃ sparśamātraṃ sasarjaha
ākāśaṃ śabdamātraṃ tusparśamātraṃ samāvṛṇot
tatovāyuvikurvāṇorūpamātraṃ sasarjaha
sparśamātrastuvaivāyūrūpamātraṃ samāvṛṇot
jyotiś cāpivikurvāṇaṃ rasamātraṃ sasarjaha
sambhavanti tatoṃ bhāṃ sirasamātrāṇitānitu
rasamātrāṇicāṃ bhāṃ sirūpamātraṃ samāvṛṇot
vikurvāṇānicāṃ bhāṃ sigandhamātraṃ sasarjire
tasmājjātāmahīceyaṃ sarvabhūtaguṇādhikā
tasmiṃs tasmiṃs tutanmātrāttenatanmātratāsmṛtā
tanmātrāṇyaviśeṣāṇiviśeṣāḥkramaśoparāḥ
bhūtatanmātrasargoyamahaṅkārāttutāmasāt
taijasānīṃ driyāṇyāhurdevāvaikārikādaśa
ekādaśaṃ manaścātrakīrtitaṃ tattvaciṃ takaiḥ
jṣānendriyāṇipaṣcātrapaṣcakarmendriyāṇi ca
tāni vakṣyāmi teṣāṃ ca karmāṇi kulapāvanāḥ
śravaṇaṃ tvak cakṣur jihvā nāsikā caiva paṣcamī
pāyūpasthaṃ hastapādau kīrtitā vāk ca paṣcamī
ākāśavāyutejāṃsi salilaṃ pṛthivī tathā
śabdādibhir guṇair viprāḥ saṃyuktā uttarottaraiḥ
nānāvīryāḥ pṛthagbhūtās tatas te saṃhatiṃ vinā
nāśaknuvan prajāḥ sraṣṭum asamāgatya kṛtsnaśaḥ
ekasaṅghāssalakṣyāś ca saṃ prāpyaikyam aśeṣataḥ
puruṣādhiṣṭhitatvāccapradhānānugraheṇaca
mahadādayoviśeṣāṃ tāaṇḍamutpādayanti te
bhūtebhyo ṇḍaṃ mahāprājṣāvṛddhaṃ tadudakeśayam
prākṛtaṃ brahmarūpasyaviṣṇoḥ sthānam anuttamam
tatrāvyaktasvarūposauviṣṇurviśveśvaraḥprabhuḥ
svedajāṇḍamabhūttasyajarāyuś ca mahīdharāḥ
garbhodakaṃ samudrāś ca tasyābhūnmahadātmanaḥ
tasminnaṇḍebhavatsarvaṃ sadevāsuramānuṣam
yatpadmaṃ taddhaimamaṇḍamabhūcchrīkeśavecchayā
brahmarūpaṃ samāsthāyajagatsruṣṭuṃ pravartate
sṛṣṭaṃ capātyanuyugaṃ yāvatkalpavikalpanā
nārasiṃ hādirūpeṇarudrarupeṇasaṃ haret
iti śrīpādmemahāpurāṇesvargakhaṇḍedvitīyo'dhyāyaḥ
tṛtīyo'dhyāyaḥ
ṛṣayaūcuḥ
nadīnāṃ parvatānaṃ canāmadheyānisarvaśaḥ
tathājanapadānāṃ cayecānyebhūmimāśritāḥ
pramāṇaṃ capramāṇajṣapṛthivyāḥkilasarvataḥ
sūta uvāca
paṣcemānimahāprājṣamahābhūtānisaṅgrahāt
jagatīsthānisarvāṇisamānyāhurmanīṣiṇaḥ
bhūmirāpastathāvāyuragnirākāśamevaca
guṇottarāṇisarvāṇiteṣāṃ bhūmiḥpradhānataḥ
śabdasparśaś ca rūpaṣcarasogandhaś ca paṣcamaḥ
bhūmereteguṇāḥproktāṛṣibhistattvavedibhiḥ
śabdaḥ sparśaś ca rūpaṣcatejasothaguṇāstrayaḥ
śabdaḥ sparśaś ca vāyostuākāśeśabda evaca
etepaṣcaguṇāviprāmahābhūteṣupaṣcasu
vartaṃ tesarvalokeṣuyeṣubhūtāḥpratiṣṭhitāḥ
anyonyaṃ nātivartaṃ tesāmyaṃ bhavativaitadā
yadātuviṣamībhāvamāviśanti parasparam
ānupūrvyāvinaśyanti jāyante cānupūrvaśaḥ
sarvāṇyaparimeyāṇitadeṣāṃ rūpamaiśvaram
yatrayatrahidṛśyaṃ tedhāvanti pāṃ cabhautikāḥ
teṣāṃ manuṣyāstarkeṇapramāṇānipracakṣate
aciṃ tyāḥkhaluyebhāvāstānnatarkeṇasādhayet
sudarśanaṃ pravakṣyāmidvīpaṃ tumunipuṅgavāḥ
parimaṇḍalomahābhāgādvīpo'saucakrasaṃsthitaḥ
vṛkṣaiḥpuṣpaphalopetaiḥ saṃ pannodhanadhānyavān
lavaṇenasamudreṇasamaṃ tātparivāritaḥ
yathāhipuruṣaḥpaśyedādarśemukhamātmanaḥ
evaṃ sudarśanodvīpodṛśyate ca kramaṇḍalaḥ
dviraṃ śepippalastasyadviraṃ śecaśaśomahān
sarvauṣadhiṃ samādāyasarvataḥparivāritaḥ
āpastato nyāvijṣeyāḥśeṣaḥ saṅkṣepaucyate
ṛṣayaūcuḥ
yāvānbhūmyavakāśoyaṃ dṛśyateśaśalakṣaṇe
evaṃ taiḥkilapṛṣṭaḥ sasūtovākyamathābravīt
sūta uvāca
prāgāyatāmahāprājṣāḥṣaḍeteratnaparvatāḥ
avagāḍhāhyubhayataḥ samudraupūrvapaścimau
himavānhimakūṭaś ca niṣadhaś ca nagottamaḥ
nīlaś ca vaiḍūryamayaḥśvetaś ca śaśisannibhaḥ
sarvadhātupinaddhaś ca śṛṅgavānnāmaparvataḥ
etevaiparvatāviprāḥ siddhacāraṇasevitāḥ
teṣām antaraviṣkumbhau yojanāni sahasraśaḥ
tatra puṇyājanapadās tāni varṣāṇi sattamāḥ
vasanti teṣāṃ sattvāni nānājātīni sarvaśaḥ
idaṃ tu bhārataṃ varṣaṃ tato haimavataṃ param
hemakūṭāt paraṃ caiva harivarṣaṃ pracakṣate
prāgāyato mahābhāgā mālyavān nāma parvataḥ
tataḥ paraṃ mālyavataḥ parvato gandhamādanaḥ
ādityataruṇābhāso vidhūmaivapāvakaḥ
yojanānāṃ sahasrāṇi caturaśītir ucchritaḥ
adhastāc caturaśītir yojanānāṃ dvijottamāḥ
ūrdhvam adhaś ca tiryak ca lokān āvṛtya tiṣṭhati
tasya pārśveṣv amī dvīpāś catvāraḥ saṃsthitā dvijāḥ
bhadrāśvaḥ ketumālaś ca jambūdvīpaś ca sattamāḥ
uttarāś caiva kuruvaḥ kṛtapuṇyapratiśrayāḥ
sa vai vicintayāmāsa sauvarṇān prekṣya vāyasān
merur uttamamadhyānām adhamānāṃ ca pakṣiṇām
tamādityonuparyetisatataṃ jyotiṣāṃ varaḥ
candramāś ca sanakṣatrovāyuś caiva pradakṣiṇaḥ
saparvatomahāprājṣādivyapuṣpasamanvitaḥ
bhavanairāvṛtaiḥ sarvaiḥrjāmbūnadamayaiḥśubhaiḥ
tatradevagaṇāviprāgandharvāsurarākṣasāḥ
apsarogaṇasaṃyuktāḥśailekrīḍanti sarvadā
tatrabrahmācarudraś ca śakraś cāpisureśvaraḥ
tumbururnāradaś caiva viśvāvasurhāhāhūhūḥ
abhigamyāmaraśreṣṭhaṃ stuvanti vividhaiḥ stavaiḥ
saptarṣayomahātmānaḥkaśyapaś ca prajāpatiḥ
tasmātkuberobhagavāṃ ś ca turthaṃ bhāgamaśnute
tataḥkalāṃ śaṃ vittasyamanuṣyebhyaḥprayacchati
karṇikāravanaṃ ramyaṃ śilājālasamucchritam
tatrasākṣātpaśupatirdivyabhūtaiḥ samāvṛtaḥ
umāsahāyobhagavānramatebhūtabhāvanaḥ
karṇikāramayīṃ mālāṃ bibhradāpādalaṃ binīm
tamugratapasaḥ siddhāḥ suvratāḥ satyavādinaḥ
paśyanti nahidurvṛttaiḥśakyodraṣṭuṃ maheśvaraḥ
tasyaśailasyaśikharātkṣīradhārādvijottamāḥ
viśvarūpātparamitābhīmanirghātanisvanā
puṇyāpuṇyatamairjuṣṭāgaṅgābhāgīrathīśubhā
tayāhyutpāditaḥpuṇyaḥ sahradaḥ sāgaropamaḥ
tāṃ dhārayāmāsatadādurddharāṃ parvatairapi
śataṃ varṣasahasrāṇiśirasaivapinākadhṛk
merostupaścimepārśveketumālodvijottamāḥ
jaṃ būkhaṇḍetutatraivamahājanapadodvijāḥ
āyurdaśasahasrāṇivarṣāṇāṃ tatrasattamāḥ
suvarṇavarṇāś ca narāstriyaścāpsarasāṃ samāḥ
anāmayāvītaśokānityaṃ muditamānasāḥ
gandhamādanaśṛṅgeṣukuberaḥ saharākṣasaiḥ
saṃ vṛtopsarasāṃ saṅghairmodateguhyakādhipaḥ
gandhamādanapārśvetuparevigatapātakāḥ
ekādaśasahasrāṇivarṣāṇāṃ paramāyuṣaḥ
tatrakṛṣṇānarāviprāstejoyuktāmahābalāḥ
striyaścotpalapatrābhāḥ sarvāḥ supriyadarśanāḥ
nīlotpaladharaṃ śvetaṃ śvetāddhairaṇyakaṃ varam
varṣamairāvataṃ viprānānājanapadāvṛtam
dhanukhaṇḍeḥmahābhāgādvevarṣedakṣaṇttare
ilāvṛttaṃ madhyagaṃ tupaṣcavarṣāṇi caiva hi
āyuḥpramāṇamārogyaṃ dharmataḥkāmato'rthataḥ
samanvitānibhūtāniteṣusarveṣusattamāḥ
evameṣāmahābhāgāḥparvataiḥpṛthivīcitā
hemakūṭastusumahānkailāsonāmaparvataḥ
hiraṇyaśṛṅgaḥ sumahāndivyomaṇimayogiriḥ
tasyapārśvemahaddivyaṃ śubhraṅkāṣcanavālukam
ramyaṃ viṣṇusaronāmayatrarājābhagīrathaḥ
dṛṣṭvā bhāgīrathīṅgaṅgāmuvāsabahulāḥ samāḥ
yūpāmaṇimayāstatrakṣetrāś cāpihiraṇmayāḥ
tatreṣṭvātugataḥ siddhiṃ sahasrākṣomahāyaśāḥ
sraṣṭābhūtipatiryatrasarvalokaiḥ sanātanaḥ
upāsyatetigmate jāyatrabhūtaḥ samaṃ tataḥ
naranārāyaṇaubrahmāmanuḥ sthāṇuś ca paṣcamaḥ
brahmalokādapākrāṃ tāsaptadhāpratipadyate
vaṭodakāsānalinīpārvatīcasarasvatī
jaṃ būnadīcasītācagaṅgāsindhuś ca saptamī
aciṃ tyādivyasaṃ jṣāsāprabhāvaiś ca samanvitā
dṛśyādṛśyācabhavatitatratatrasarasvatī
etādivyāḥ saptagaṅgāstriṣu lokeṣuviśrutāḥ
rakṣāṃ sivaihimavatīhemakūṭecaguhyakāḥ
sarpānāgāś ca niṣadhegokarṇaṃ catapovanam
devāsurāṇāṃ sarveṣāṃ śvetaḥparvatamucyate
śṛṅgavāṃ stumahābhāgādevānāṃ pratisaṃ caraḥ
ityetānimahābhāgāḥ saptavarṣāṇibhāgaśaḥ
bhūtānyupaniviṣṭānigatimanti dhruvāṇi ca
teṣāṃ mṛddhirbahuvidhādṛśyatedevamānuṣā
aśakyaṃ parisaṅkhyātuṃ śraddheyātuvibhūṣitā
yāṃ tupṛcchathamāṃ viprādivyamenāṃ śaśākṛtim
pārśveśaśasyadvevarṣeukteyedakṣiṇottare
karṇetunāgadvīpaś ca kāśyapadvīpa evaca
karṇadvīpaśiloviprāḥśrīmānmalayaparvataḥ
etaddvitīyaṃ dvīpasyadṛśyateśaśisaṃsthitam
itiśrīpādmemahāpurāṇesvargakhaṇḍetṛtīyo'dhyāyaḥ

merorathottaraṃ paścātpūrvamācakṣvasūtataḥ
sūta uvāca

uttarāḥkuravoviprāḥpuṇyāḥ siddhaniṣevitāḥ
tatravṛkṣāmadhuphalānityapuṣpaphalopagāḥ
aparekṣīriṇonāmavṛkṣāstatradvijottamāḥ

devalokacyutāḥ sarvejāyante tatramānavāḥ
śuklābhijanasaṃ pannāḥ sarvasupriyadarśanāḥ
mithunāni cajāyante striyaścāpsarasopamāḥ
teṣāṃ tekṣīriṇāṅkṣīraṃ pibanty amṛtasaṃnibham
ekamevānurūpaṣcacakravākasamaṃ dvijāḥ
nirāmayāś ca telokānityaṃ muditamānasāḥ
daśavarṣasahasrāṇidaśavarṣaśatāni ca
jīvanti temahābhāgānacānyonyaṃ jahatyuta
bhāruḍānāmaśakunāstīkṣṇatuṇḍāmahābalāḥ
tānnirharaṃ tīhamṛtāndarīṣuprakṣipanti ca
uttarāḥkuravoviprāvyākhyātāstesamāsataḥ
merupārśvamahaṃ pūrvaṃ pravakṣyāmiyathātatham
tasyamūrddhābhiṣekastubhadrāśvasyatapodhanāḥ
bhadraśālavanaṃ yatrakālāmrāś ca mahādrumāḥ
kālāmrāstumahābhāgānityaṃ puṣpaphalāḥśubhāḥ
drumāś ca yojanotsedhāḥ siddhacāraṇasevitāḥ
tatratepuruṣāḥśvetāstejoyuktamahābalāḥ
striyaḥkumudavarṇāś ca sundaryaḥpriyadarśanāḥ
candravarṇāś ca turvarṇāḥpūrṇacandranibhānanāḥ
candraśītalagātrāś ca nṛtyagītaviśāradāḥ
daśavarṣasahasrāṇitatrāyurdvijasattamāḥ
kālāmrarasapītāstenityaṃ saṃsthitayauvanāḥ
sudarśanonāmamahānjaṃ būvṛkṣaḥ sanātanaḥ
sarvakāmaphalaḥpuṇyaḥ siddhacāraṇasevitaḥ

yojanānāṃ sahasraṃ caśataṃ cadvijasattamāḥ
tathāmālyavataḥśṛṅgepūrvepūrvānugāṃ takāḥ

sūta uvāca
varṣaṃ ramaṇakaṃ nāmajāyante tatramānavāḥ
śuklābhijanasaṃ pannāḥ sarvetepriyadarśanāḥ
niḥ sapatnāś ca te sarve jāyante tatramānavāḥ
daśavarṣasahasrāṇiśatānidaśapaṣcaca

yajṣānugāvipravarādhanvinaḥpriyadarśanāḥ
mahābalāstatrajanāviprāmuditamānasāḥ

tatrasvayaṃ prabhādevīnityaṃ vasatiśaṇḍinī
uttareṇatuśṛṅgasyasamudrāṃ tedvijottamāḥ
varṣamairāvataṃ nāmatasmācchṛṅgavataḥparam

candramāś ca sanakṣatrojyotirbhūtaivāvṛtaḥ
padmaprabhāḥpadmavarṇāḥpadmapatranibhekṣaṇāḥ
padmapatrasugandhāś ca jāyante tatramānavāḥ
aniṣpannānaṣṭagandhānirāhārājitendriyāḥ
trayodaśasahasrāṇivarṣāṇāṃ tedvijottamāḥ
āyuḥpramāṇaṃ jīvanti narādhārmikapuṅgavāḥ
haristiṣṭhativaikuṇṭhaḥśakaṭekanakāmaye

saṅkṣepevistare caiva kartākārayitātathā
pṛthivyāpastathākāśaṃ vāyustejaś ca sattamāḥ
sayajṣaḥ sarvabhūtānāmāsyaṃ tasyahutāśanaḥ

sūta uvāca
atratekīrttayiṣyāmivarṣaṃ bhāratam uttamam
pṛthoś ca prājṣavainyasyatathaikṣvākormahātmanaḥ
yayāteraṃ barīṣasyamāṃ dhāturnahuṣasyaca
kuśikasyaivarājarṣergādheś caiva mahātmanaḥ
anyeṣāṃ camahābhāgāḥkṣatriyāṇāṃ balīyasām
sarveṣāmevabhūtānāṃ priyaṃ bhāratam uttamam
tatovarṣaṃ pravakṣyāmiyathāśrutamahodvijāḥ
mahendromalayaḥ sahyaḥśuktimānṛkṣavānapi
teṣāṃ sahasraśoviprāparvatāstesamīpataḥ
avijṣātāḥ sāravaṃ tovipulāścitrasānavaḥ
anye tu yeparijṣātāhrasvāhrasvopajīvinaḥ
āryamlecchasadharmāṇastemiśrāḥpuruṣādvijāḥ
nadīṃ pibanti vimalāṃ gaṅgāṃ sindhuṃ sarasvatīm
godāvarīṃ narmadāṃ ca bahūdāṃ ca mahānadīm
śatadruṃ candrabhāgāṃ ca yamunāṃ ca mahānadīm
dṛṣadvatīṃ vitastāṃ ca vipāpāṃ svacchabālukām
nadīṃ vetravatīṃ caiva kṛṣṇāṃ veṇīṃ canimnagām
irāvatīṃ vitastāṃ capayoṣṇīṃ devikāmapi
vedasmṛtiṃ vedaśirāṃ tridivāṃ sindhulākṛmim
karīṣiṇīṃ citravahāṃ trisenāṃ caiva nimnagām
gomatīṃ dhūtapāpāṃ cacaṃ danāṃ camahānadīm
kauśikīṃ tridivāṃ hṛdyāṃ nācitāṃ rohitāraṇīm
rahasyāṃ śatakuṃ bhāṃ casarayūṃ cadvijottamāḥ
carmaṇvatīṃ vetravatīṃ hastisomāṃ diśaṃ tathā
śarāvatīṃ payoṣṇīṃ cabhīmāṃ bhīmarathīmapi
kāverīculukāṃ cāpitāpīṃ śatamalāmapi
nīvārāṃ mahitāṃ cāpisuprayogāṃ tathānadīm
pavitrāṅkṛṣṇalāṃ sindhuṃ vājinīṃ puramālinīm
pūrvābhirāmāṃ vīrāṃ cabhīmāṃ mālāvatīṃ tathā
palāśinīṃ pāpaharāṃ mahendrāṃ paṭalāvatīm
karīṣiṇīmasiknīṃ cakuśacīrīṃ mahānadīm
marutāṃ pravarāṃ menāṃ hemāṅghṛtavatīṃ tathā
anāvatīmanuṣṇāṃ casevyāṅkāpīṃ casattamāḥ
sadāvīrāmadhṛṣyāṃ cakuśacīrāṃ mahānadīm
rathacitrāṃ jyotirathāṃ viśvāmitrāṅkapiṃ jalām
caṃ drāvahaphalīṃ caiva kucīrāmambuvāhinīm
vainadīṃ piṅgalāṃ veṇāṃ tuṅgavegāṃ mahānadīm
vidiśāṅkṛṣṇaveṇāṃ catāmrāṃ cakapilāmapi
dhenuṃ sakāmāṃ vedasvāṃ haviḥ srāvāṃ mahāpathām
śiprāṃ capicchalāṃ caiva bhāradvājīṃ canimnagām
kaurṇikīṃ nimnagāṃ śoṇāṃ bāhudāmathacandramām
durgāmaṃ taḥśilāṃ caiva brahmamedhyāṃ dṛṣadvatīm
parokṣāmatharohīṃ catathājaṃ būnadīmapi
sunāsāṃ tamasāṃ dāsīṃ sāmānyāṃ varaṇāmasim
nīlāṃ dhṛtikarīṃ caiva parṇāśāṃ camahānadīm
mānavīṃ vṛṣabhāṃ bhāsāṃ brahmamedhyāṃ dṛṣadvatīm
etāścānyāś ca bahulāmahānadyodvijarṣabhāḥ
sadānirāmayāṅkṛṣṇāṃ maṃ dagāṃ maṃ davāhinīm
brāhmaṇīṃ camahāgaurīṃ durgāmapicasattamāḥ
citrotpalāṃ citrarathāmatulāṃ rohiṇīṃ tathā
maṃ dākinīṃ vaitaraṇīṅkokāṃ cāpimahānadīm
śuktimatīmanaṅgāṃ catathaivavṛṣasāhvayām
lohityāṅkaratoyāṃ catathaivavṛṣakātvayām
kumārīmṛṣitulyāṃ camāriṣāṃ casarasvatīm
maṃ dākinīṃ supuṇyāṃ casarvāṅgaṅgāṃ casattamāḥ
viśvasyamātaraḥ sarvāḥ sarvāś caiva mahāphalāḥ
tathānadyaḥ suprakāśāḥśataśothasahasraśaḥ
ityetāsaritoviprāḥ samākhyātāyathāsmṛti
tatremekurupāṃ cālāḥśālvamātreyajāṅgalāḥ
śūrasenāḥpuliṃ dāś ca baudhāmālāstathaivaca
matsyāḥkuśaṭṭāḥ saugandhyāḥkutsapāḥkāśikośalāḥ
cedimatsyakaruṣāś ca bhojāḥ sindhupuliṃ dakāḥ
uttamāś ca daśārṇāś ca ekalāścotkalaiḥ saha
paṣcālāḥkośalāś caiva naikapṛṣṭhayugandharāḥ
bodhāmadrāḥkaliṅgāś ca kāśayoparakāśayaḥ
jaṭharāḥkukurāś caiva sudaśārṇāḥ susattamāḥ
kuṃ tayo'vaṃ tayaś caiva tathaivāparakuṃ tayaḥ
gomaṃ tāmallakāḥpuṇḍrāḥvidarbhānṛpavāhikāḥ
aśmakāḥ sottarāś caiva goparāṣṭrāḥkanīyasaḥ
adhirājyakuśaṭṭāś ca mallarāṣṭrāś ca keralāḥ
mālavāścopavāsyāś ca cakrāvakrālayāḥśakāḥ
videhāmagadhāḥ sadmāmalajāvijayāstathā
aṅgāvaṅgāḥkaliṅgāś ca yakṛllomāna evaca
mallāḥ sudeṣṇāḥprahlādāmahiṣāḥśaśakāstathā
bāhlikāvāṭadhānāś ca ābhīrāḥkālatoyakāḥ
aparāṃ tāḥparāṃ tāś ca paṅkalāś ca rmacaṇḍikāḥ
aṭavīśekharāś caiva merubhūtāś ca sattamāḥ
upāvṛtānupāvṛtāḥ surāṣṭrāḥkekayāstathā
kuṭṭāparāṃ tāmāheyāḥkakṣāḥ sāmudraniṣkuṭāḥ
bahirgiryyoṅgamaladāmagadhāmālavārghaṭāḥ
sattvatarāḥprāvṛṣeyāḥbhārgavāś ca dvijarṣabhāḥ
puṇḍrābhārgāḥkirātāś ca sudeṣṇābhāsurāstathā
śakāniṣādāniṣadhāstathaivānartanaiṛtāḥ
pūrṇalāḥpūtimatsyāś ca kuṃ talākuśakāstathā
tarigrahāḥ śūrasenāījikāḥkalpakāraṇāḥ
tilabhāgāmasārāś ca madhumattāḥkakuṃ dakāḥ
kāśmīrāḥ sindhusauvīrāgāṃ dhārādarśakāstathā
abhīsārāḥkudrutāś ca saurilābāhlikāstathā
darvīcamālavādarvāvātajāmarathoragāḥ
balaraṭṭāstathāviprāḥ sudāmānaḥmumallikāḥ
bandhākarīkaṣāś caiva kuliṃ dāgandhikāstathā
vanāyavodaśāḥpārśvaromāṇaḥkuśabiṃ davaḥ
kācchā gopālakacchāś ca jāṅgalāḥ kuruvarṇakāḥ
kirātā barbarāḥ siddhā vaidehās tāmraliptikāḥ
auḍramlecchāḥ sasairindrāḥ pārvatīyāś ca sattamāḥ
athāpare janapadā dakṣiṇā munipuṅgavāḥ
draviḍāḥ keralāḥ prācyā mūṣikā bālamūṣikāḥ
karṇāṭakā māhiṣakā vikandhā mūṣikās tathā
jhallikāḥ kuntalāś caiva sauhṛdā nalakānanāḥ
kaukkuṭakās tathā bolāḥ kokaṇā maṇivālakāḥ
samaṅgā kanakāś caiva kuṅkurāṅgāramāriṣāḥ
vyūḍhakāḥkorakāḥproṣṭāḥ saṅgavegadharāstathā
mālavāmalarāś caiva tathaivāparavartakāḥ
kuliṃ dāḥkāladāś caiva caṇḍakāḥkuraṭāstathā
muśalāstanavālāś ca satīrthāpūtisṛṃ jayāḥ
anidāyāḥśivāṭāś ca tapanāḥ sūtapāstathā
ṛṣikāś ca vidarbhāś ca staṅganāparataṅgakāḥ
uttarāścāparemlecchājanāhimunipuṅgavāḥ
javanāś ca sakāṃ bojādāruṇāmlecchajātayaḥ
sakṛghṛhāḥkulaṭyāś ca hūṇāpārasikaiḥ saha
tathaivaramaṇāścānyāstathācadaśamālikāḥ
kṣatriyopaniveśāś ca vaiśyaśūdrakulāni ca
śūrābhīrāś ca daradāḥkāśmīrāḥpaśubhiḥ saha
khāṇḍīkāś ca tuṣārāś ca padmagāgirigahvarāḥ
ādreyāḥ sabhirādājāstathaivastanapoṣakāḥ
droṣakāś ca kaliṅgāś ca kirātānāṃ cajātayaḥ
tomarāhanyamānāś ca tathaivakarabhaṃ jakāḥ
etecānyejanapadāḥprācyodīcyāstathaivaca
uddeśamātreṇamayādeśāḥ saṅkīrtitādvijāḥ
itiśrīpādmemahāpurāṇesvargakhaṇḍeṣaṣṭho'dhyāyaḥ

kṛtaṃ tretādvāparaṃ catiṣyaṃ ca dvijasattaāḥ
pūrve kṛtayugaṃ nāma tatas tretāyugaṃ dvijāḥ
tatpaścāddvāparaṃ cāthatatastiṣyaḥ pravartate
catvāritusahasrāṇivarṣāṇāṃ munipuṅgavāḥ
āyuḥ saṅkhyākṛtayugesaṅkhyātāhitapodhanāḥ
tathā trīṇisahasrāṇitretāyāmāyuṣoviduḥ
mahābalāmahāsattvāḥ prajṣāguṇasamanvitāḥ
prajāyante ca jātāś ca śataśo'thasahasraśaḥ
dvijāḥ kṛtayugeviprābalinaḥ priyadarśanāḥ
prajāyante ca jātāś ca munayovaitapodhanāḥ
mahotsāhāmahātmānodhārmikāḥ satyavādinaḥ
priyadarśāvapuṣmanto mahāvīryyādhanurdharāḥ
vīrāhidhijāyante kṣatriyāḥ śūrasaṃ matāḥ
tretāyāṃ kṣatriyāstāvatsarvevaicakravartinaḥ
mahotsāhāvīryavantaḥ parasparavadhaiṣiṇaḥ
tejasāṃ dhenasaṃyuktāḥ krodhanāḥ puruṣāḥ kila
lubdhāścānṛtakāś caiva tiṣyejāyanti bhodvijāḥ
īrṣyāmānas tathā krodhomāyāsūyā tathaiva ca
tiṣyebhavanti bhūtānāṃ rāgolobhaś ca sattamāḥ
guṇottaraṃ haimavataṃ har ivarṣaṃ tataḥ param
itiśrīpādme mahāpurāṇe svargakhaṇḍe saptamo'dhyāyaḥ
aṣṭamo'dhyāyaḥ
ṛṣaya ūcuḥ
jaṃ būkhaṇḍastvayāprokto yathā vadihasattamaḥ
viṣkaṃ bhasyacaprabrūhiparimāṇaṃ hitattvataḥ
śākadvīpaṣcanobrūhikuśadvīpaṣcadhārmikam
sūta uvāca
viprāḥ subahavodvīpāḥ yairidaṃ saṃ tataṃ jagat
saptadvīpānpravakṣyāmiśṛṇudhvaṃ dvijapuṅgavāḥ
aṣṭādaśasahasrāṇiyojanānidvijottamāḥ
ṣaṭśatāni capūrṇāniviṣkaṃ bhojambuparvataḥ
lavaṇasyasamudrasyaviṣkaṃ bhodviguṇaḥ smṛtaḥ
nānājanapadākīrṇomaṇividrumacitritaḥ
siddhacāraṇasaṃ kīrṇaiḥ sāgaraḥ parimaṇḍalaḥ
śākadvīpaṣcavakṣyāmi yathā vadihasattamāḥ
śṛṇutādya yathā nyāyaṃ bruvatomamadhārmikāḥ
jambudvīpapramāṇenadviguṇaḥ sadvijarṣabhāḥ
viṣkaṃ bhenamahābhāgāḥ sāgaro'pivibhāgaśaḥ
kṣīrodomuniśārdūlāyenasamparivāritaḥ
śākadvīpasyasaṃ kṣepo yathā vanmunisattamāḥ
ukta eṣamahābhāgāḥ kimanyatkathayāmivaḥ
ṛṣaya ūcuḥ
śākadvīpasyasaṃ kṣepo yathā vadihadhārmika
uktastvayāmahāprājṣavistaraṃ brūhitattvataḥ
sūta uvāca
tathaiva parvatāviprāḥ saptātramaṇiparvatāḥ
ratnākarās tathā nadyasteṣāṃ nāmānivarṇaye
atīvaguṇavat sarvaṃ tattvaṃ pṛcchathadhārmikāḥ
prāgāyatomahābhāgāmalayonāmaparvataḥ
tatovarṣaṃ prabhavativarṣākāledvijottamāḥ
revatīdivinakṣatraṃ pitāmahakṛtovidhiḥ
uttareṇatuviprendrāḥ śyāmonāmamahāgiriḥ
navameghaprabhaḥ prāṃ śuḥ śrīmānujjvalavigrahaḥ
yataḥ śyāmatvamāpannāḥ prajāmuditamānasāḥ
ṛṣaya ūcuḥ
sumahānsaṃ śayo'smākaṃ prāptoyaṃ sūtayattvayā
prajāḥ kathaṃ sūtasamyaksamprāptāḥ śyāmatāmiha
sūta uvāca
sarveṣvevamahāprājṣādvīpeṣu munipuṅgavāḥ
gauraḥ kṛṣṇaś ca patagastayorvarṇāntaredvijāḥ
śyāmoyasmātpravṛttovaitasmātśyāmagiriḥ smṛtaḥ
tataḥ paraṃ muniśreṣṭhādurgaśailomahodayaḥ
teṣāṃ yojanaviṣkaṃ bhodviguṇaḥ pravibhāgaśaḥ
varṣāṇiteṣu viprendrāḥ samproktānimanīṣibhiḥ
jaladhāromahāprājṣaḥ sukumāraitismṛtaḥ
reva tasya tukaumāraḥ śyāmaś ca maṇikāṣcanaḥ
keśarasyāthamaudākīpareṇatumahānpumān
jaṃ būdvīpenasaṅkhyātas tasya madhye mahādrumaḥ
śākonāmamahāprājṣāḥ prajās tasya sahānugāḥ
tatra puṇyājanapadāḥ pūjyate tatra śaṅkaraḥ
tatra gacchanti siddhāś ca cāraṇādaivatāni ca
dhārmikāś ca prajāḥ sarvāḥ catvārogatamatsarāḥ
varṇāḥ svakarmaniratānacasteno'tradṛśyate
dīrghāyuṣomahāprājṣājarāmṛtyuvivarjitāḥ
nadyaḥ puṇyajalās tatra gaṅgācabahudhāgatā
sukumārīkumārīcaśītāśītodakā tathā
mahānadīcabhoviprās tathā maṇijalānadī
ikṣuvarddhanikā caiva nadīmunivarāḥ smṛtāḥ
tataḥ pravṛttāḥ puṇyodānadyaḥ paramaśobhanāḥ
sahasrāṇāṃ śatānyevayatovarṣativāsavaḥ
natāsāṃ nāmadheyāniparismartuṃ tathaiva ca
śakyaṃ teparisaṅkhyātuṃ puṇyāstāhisaridvarāḥ
tataḥ puṇyājanapadāś ca tvārolokaviśrutāḥ
mṛgāś ca maśakāś caiva mānasāmallakās tathā
mṛgāś ca brahmabhūyiṣṭhāḥ svakarmaniratādvijāḥ
maśakeṣu turājanyādhārmikāḥ sarvakāmadāḥ
mānasāś ca mahābhāgāvaiśyadharmopajīvinaḥ
sarvakāmasamāyuktāḥ śūrādharmārthaniścitāḥ
śūdrāstumallakānityaṃ puruṣādharmaśīlinaḥ
na tatra rājāviprendrānadaṇḍonacadaṇḍikāḥ
etāvadevaśakyaṃ tu tatra dvīpeprabhāṣitum
iti śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe svargakhaṇḍe 'ṣṭamo'dhyāyaḥ
navamo'dhyāyaḥ
sūta uvāca
uttareṣu cabhoviprādvīpeṣu śrūyatekathā
paraspareṇadviguṇāḥ sarvedvīpādvijarṣabhāḥ
parvatāś ca mahāprājṣāḥ samudraiḥ parivāritāḥ
parvataḥ paścimekṛṣṇonārāyaṇasakhodvijāḥ
tatra ratnānidivyānisvayaṃ rakṣatikeśavaḥ
sampūjyateśālmaliś ca dvīpeśālmalikedvijāḥ
krauṃ cadvīpemahākrauṃ cogirīratnacayākaraḥ
mokṣibhiḥ saṅgatonityaṃ prabhurnārāyaṇohariḥ
dyutimānnāmaviprendrāstṛtīyaḥ kumudogiriḥ
caturthaḥ puṣpavānnāmapaṣcamastukuśeśayaḥ
ṣaṣṭoharigirirnāmaṣaḍeteparvatottamāḥ
teṣāmantar aviṣkaṃ bhodviguṇaḥ pravibhāgaśaḥ
audbhidaṃ prathamaṃ varṣaṃ dvitīyaṃ reṇumaṇḍalam
tṛtīyaṃ surathaṃ nāmacaturthaṃ laṃ banaṃ smṛtam
dhṛtimatpaṣcamaṃ varṣaṃ ṣaṣṭhaṃ varṣaṃ prabhākaram
saptamaṃ kāpilaṃ varṣaṃ saptaitevarṣalaṃ bakāḥ
eteṣu devagandharvāḥ prajāś ca muditādvijāḥ
gauraprāyojanaḥ sarvaḥ sukumāraś ca sattamāḥ
avaśiṣṭeṣu sarveṣu vakṣyāmidvijapuṅgavāḥ
yathā śrutaṃ mahāprājṣāvarṇyateśṛṇutadvijāḥ
krauṃ cadvīpemahābhāgāḥ krauṃ conāmamahāgiriḥ
krauṃ cātparovāmanakovāmanādaṃ dhakārakaḥ
aṃ dhakārātparoviprāmainākaḥ parvatottamaḥ
govindātparataś caiva puṇḍarīkomahāgiriḥ
puṇḍarīkātparaś cāpi procyateduṃ dubhisvanaḥ
purastāddviguṇasteṣāṃ viṣkaṃ bhomunipuṅgavāḥ
deśāṃs tatra pravakṣyāmitanmenigadataḥ śṛṇu
manonugātparodeśauṣṇonāmatapodhanāḥ
uṣṇātparaḥ prāvarakaḥ prāvarādaṃ dhakārakaḥ
aṃ dhakārakadeśāttumunideśaḥ paraḥ smṛtaḥ
siddhacāraṇasaṃ kīrṇogauraḥ prāyojanaḥ smṛtaḥ
etedeśāḥ samākhyātādevagandharvasevitāḥ
paryupāsanti taṃ nityaṃ devāḥ sarvemaharṣayaḥ
vāgbhirmanonukūlābhiḥ pūjayanti dvijottamāḥ
dvīpeṣu teṣu sarveṣu prajānāṃ munisattamāḥ
ārogyāyuṣpramāṇābhyāṃ dviguṇaṃ dviguṇaṃ tataḥ
etejanapadāviprādvīpeṣu teṣu sattamāḥ
īśvaro daṇḍam udyamya svayam eva prajāpatiḥ
dvīpānetānmunivarārakṣaṃ stiṣṭhati sarvadā
sarājāsaśivoviprāḥ sapitāsapitāmahaḥ
gopāyatidvijaśreṣṭhāḥ prajāḥ sadvijapaṇḍitāḥ
tataḥ paraṃ mahāśailodṛśyatelokasaṃ sthitiḥ
caturasromahāprājṣaḥ sarvataḥ parimaṇḍalaḥ
tatra tiṣṭhanti viprendrāś ca tvārolokasaṃ matāḥ
diggajāhimuniśreṣṭhāvāmanairāvatāṃ janāḥ
supratīkas tathā viprāḥ prabhinnakaraṭāmukhāḥ
tasyāhaṃ parimāṇaṃ nasaṅkhyātumihamutsahe
asambandhāmuniśreṣṭhāstānnigṛhṇanti tedvijāḥ
puṣkaraiḥ padmasaṃ kāśairvikarṣanti mahāprabhaiḥ
śatadhāpunarevāśutetānmuṃ canti nityaśaḥ
śvasadbhirmukhanāsābhyāṃ diggajair ivamārutāḥ
āgacchanti dvijaśreṣṭhās tatra tiṣṭhanti vaiprajāḥ
yathoddiṣṭaṃ mayāproktaṃ sanirmāṇamidaṃ jagat
śrutvedaṃ pṛthivīmānaṃ puṇyadaṃ camanonugam
śrīmāṃ starativiprendrāḥ siddhārthaḥ sādhusaṃ mataḥ
yaḥ śṛṇotisamākhyātuṃ parvaṇīdaṃ dhṛtavrataḥ
iti śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe svargakhaṇḍe navamo'dhyāyaḥ
daśamo'dhyāyaḥ
ṛṣaya ūcuḥ
pṛthivyāhiparīmāṇaṃ saṃ sthānaṃ saritas tathā
tvattaḥ śrutvāmahābhāgaamṛtaṃ pītam evaca
tatra bhūmaucatīrthānipāvanānītinaḥ śrutam
ācakṣvatānisarvāṇi yathā phalakarāṇi ca
saviśeṣaṃ mahāprājṣaśrotum icchāmahetava
sūta uvāca
dhanyaṃ puṇyaṃ mahākhyānaṃ pṛṣṭamevatapodhanāḥ
yathā matipravakṣyāmi yathā yogaṃ yathā śrutam
purātanaṃ pravakṣyāmidevarṣernāradasyahi
yudhiṣṭhireṇasaṃ vādaṃ śṛṇuta dvijasattaāḥ
hṛtarājyāḥ pāṇḍuputrāvane tasmin mahārathāḥ
nyavasanti mahābhāgādraupadyāsahapāṇḍavāḥ
athāpaśyanmahātmānaṃ devarṣiṃ tatra nāradam
dīpyamānaṃ śriyābrāhmyādīptāgnisamatejasam
sataiḥ parivṛtaḥ śrīmānbhrātṛbhiḥ kurunandanaḥ
yathā cadevānsāvitrīyājṣasenī tathā patīn
pratigṛhyatataḥ pūjāṃ nāradobhagavānṛṣiḥ
āśvāsayaddharmaputraṃ yuktarūpapriyeṇaca
uvācacamahātmānaṃ dharmarājaṃ yudhiṣṭhiram
brūhidharmabhṛtāṃ śreṣṭhakiṃ prārthyaṃ hidadāmite
athadharmasutorājāpraṇamyabhrātṛbhiḥ saha
uvācaprāṃ jalirvākyaṃ nāradaṃ devasaṃ mitam
tvayituṣṭemahābhāga sarvalokābhipūjite
samdehaṃ memuniśreṣṭhahṛtsthaṃ tvaṣchettumarhasi
pradakṣiṇāṃ yaḥ kurutepṛthivīṃ tīrthatatparaḥ
nārada uvāca
śṛṇurājannavahitodilīpena yathā purā
vasiṣṭhasyasakāśādvai sarvam etadupaśrutam
purābhāgīrathītīredilīporājasattamaḥ
śubhedeśemahārājapuṇyedevarṣipūjite
sapitṝṃ starpayāmāsadevāṃ ś ca paramadyutiḥ
ṛṣīṃ ś ca tarpayāmāsavidhidṛṣṭenakarmaṇā
dadarśabhūtasaṃ kāśaṃ vasiṣṭhamṛṣimuttamam
purohitaṃ sataṃ dṛṣṭvā dīpyamānamivaśriyā
upasthitaṃ mahārājapūjayāmāsabhārata
sahidharmabhṛtāṃ śreṣṭhovidhidṛṣṭenakarmaṇā
śirasācārghyamādāyaśuciḥ prayatamānasaḥ
evamuktvāmahārājadilīpodvipadāṃ varaḥ
vāgyataḥ prāṃ jalirbhūtvā tūṣṇīmāsīdyudhiṣṭhira
taṃ dṛṣṭvā niyamenāthasvādhyāyenacakarṣitam
dilīpaṃ nṛpatiśreṣṭhaṃ muniḥprītamanābhavat
iti śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe svargakhaṇḍe daśamo'dhyāyaḥ
ekādaśo'dhyāyaḥ
vasiṣṭha uvāca
satyenacamahābhāgatuṣṭosmitava sarvaśaḥ
yasyedṛśastedharmoyaṃ pitaras tāritāstvayā
tena paśyasimāṃ putrayājyaścāsimamānagha
dilīpa uvāca
kṛtamityevamanyehiyadahaṃ dṛṣṭavānprabhum
tadahaṃ śrotum icchāmipṛthaksaṅkīrtanaṃ tvayā
pradakṣiṇāṃ yaḥ pṛthivīṃ karoti dvijasattaa
vasiṣṭha uvāca
kathayiṣyāmitadahamṛṣīṇāṃ matparāyaṇam
tadekāgramanāstātaśṛṇutīrtheṣu yatphalam
vidyātapaś ca kīrtiś ca satīrthaphalamaśnute
pratigrahādupāvṛttaḥ santuṣṭoniyataḥ śuciḥ
ahaṃ kāranivṛttaś ca satīrthaphalamaśnute
akrodhanaś ca rājendrasatyaśīlodṛḍhavrataḥ
ātmopamaś ca bhūteṣu satīrthaphalamaśnute
ṛṣibhiḥ kratavaḥ proktādeveṣvapi yathā kramam
nateśakyādaridreṇayajṣāḥ prāptuṃ mahīpate
bahūpakaraṇāyajṣānānāsambhāravistarāḥ
ṛṣīṇāṃ paramaṃ guhyamidaṃ dharmabhṛtāṃ vara
tīrthābhigamanaṃ puṇyaṃ yajṣairapiviśiṣyate
anupoṣyatrirātrāṇitīrthābhigamanenaca
adattvākāṣcanaṃ gāś ca daridronāma jāyate
agniṣṭomādibhiryajṣairiṣṭvāvipuladakṣiṇaiḥ
daśakoṭisahasrāṇitīrthānāṃ vaimahīpate
sānnidhyaṃ puṣkareyeṣāṃ trisamdhyaṃ sūryavaṃ śaja
ādityāvasavorudrāḥ sādhyāś ca samarudgaṇāḥ
divyayogāmahārājapuṇyenamahatādvijāḥ
manasā pyabhikāmasyapuṣkarāṇimanīṣiṇaḥ
pūyaṃ te sarvapāpāni nākapṛṣṭhecapūjyate
asiṃ mastīrthe mahābhāganityamevapitāmahaḥ
puṣkareṣu mahābhāgadevāḥ sarṣipurogamāḥ
siddhiṃ paramikāṃ ṃ pāptāḥ puṇyenamahatānvitāḥ
tatrābhiṣekaṃ yaḥ kuryātpitṛdevārcanerataḥ
aśvamedhāddaśaguṇaṃ pravadanti manīṣiṇaḥ
apyekaṃ bhojayedvipraṃ puṣkarāraṇyamāśritaḥ
tenaitipūjitāṃ ṃ llokānbrahmaṇaḥ sadanesthitān
sāyaṃ prātaḥ smaredyas tupuṣkarāṇikṛtāṃ jaliḥ
upaspṛṣṭaṃ bhavettena sarvatīrtheṣu pārthiva
janmaprabhṛtiyat pāpaṃ striyovāpuruṣasyavā
yathā surāṇāṃ sarveṣāmādistumadhusūdanaḥ
tathaiva puṣkarorājantīrthānāmādirucyate
uṣṭvā dvādaśarṣāṇi puṣkare niyataḥ śuciḥ
yas tuvarṣaśataṃ pūrṇamagnihotramupāśnute
kārtikīṃ vāvasedekāṃ puṣkaresamamevatat
duṣkaraṃ puṣkaregaṃ tuṃ duṣkaraṃ puṣkaretapaḥ
duṣkaraṃ puṣkaredānaṃ vastuṃ caiva suduṣkaram
trīṇiśṛṃ gāṇiśubhrāṇitrīṇiprasravaṇāni ca
puṣkarāṇyāditīrthāninavidmas tatra kāraṇam
uṣṭvādvādaśavarṣāṇiniyatoniyatāśanaḥ
iti śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe svargakhaṇḍe
puṣkaratīrthamāhātmyavarṇanaṃ nāma
ekādaśo'dhyāyaḥ
dvādaśo'dhyāyaḥ
vasiṣṭha uvāca
pradakṣiṇamupāvṛttojaṃ būmārgesamāviśet
jaṃ būmārgaṃ samāviśyapitṛdevarṣipūjitam
tatroṣyarajanīḥ paṣcaṣaṣṭhakāleśnuvannaraḥ
jambumārgādupāvṛttogacchettudulikāśramam
agastyāśramamāsādyapitṛdevārcanerataḥ
śākavṛttiḥ phalairvāpikaumāraṃ vindate param
kanyāśramaṃ samāsādyaśrīpuṣṭaṃ lokapūjitam
dharmāraṇyaṃ hitatpuṇyamādyaṃ capārthivarṣabha
arcayitvāpitṝndevānprayatoniyatāśanaḥ
prādakṣiṇyaṃ tataḥ kṛtvāyayātipatanaṃ vrajet
nāmnābhadravaṭaṃ nāmatriṣu lokeṣu viśrutam
mahādevaprasādāccagāṇapatyam avāpnuyāt
narmadāṃ tusamāsādyanadīṃ trailokyaviśrutām
iti śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe svargakhaṇḍe dvādaśo'dhyāyaḥ
trayodaśo'dhyāyaḥ
yudhiṣṭhira uvāca
vasiṣṭhenadilīpāyakathitaṃ tīrtham uttamam
narmadāyāś ca māhātmyaṃ vasiṣṭhoktaṃ dvijottama
kathameṣāmahāpuṇyānadī sarvatraviśrutā
narmadānāmavikhyātātanmamabrūhinārada
nārada uvāca
narmadāsaritāṃ śreṣṭhā sarvapāpapraṇāśinī
tārayet sarvabhūtānisthāvarāṇicarāṇi ca
narmadāyāstumāhātmyaṃ vasiṣṭhoktaṃ mayāśrutam
puṇyākanakhalegaṅgākurukṣetresarasvatī
grāmevāyadivāraṇyepuṇyā sarvatranarmmadā
sadyaḥ punātigāṃ geyaṃ darśanādevanārmadam
kaliṅgadeśepaścārddheparvate'marakaṃ ṭake
puṇyācatriṣu lokeṣu ramaṇīyāmanoramā
sadevāsuragandharvāṛṣayaś ca tapodhanāḥ
tapastaptvāmahārājasiddhiṃ caparamāṃ gatāḥ
upoṣyarajanīmekāṃ kulānāṃ tārayecchatam
janeśvarenaraḥ snātvā piṇḍaṃ dattvā yathā vidhi
parva tasya samaṃ tātturudrakoṭiḥ pratiṣṭhitā
prītā tasya bhavet sarvā rudrakoṭir na saṃśayaḥ
tatra snātvā śucir bhūtvā brahmacārī jitendriyaḥ
pitṛkāryaṃ tu kurvīta vidhidṛṣṭena karmaṇā
āsaptamaṃ kulaṃ tasya svargetiṣṭhatipāṇḍava
ṣaṣṭivarṣasahasrāṇisvargaloke mahīyate
apsarogaṇasaṃ kīrṇodivyastrīparivāritaḥ
divyagandhānuliptaś ca divyālaṃ kārabhūṣitaḥ
dhanavāndānaśīlaś ca dhārmikaś caiva jāyate
yojanānāṃ śataṃ sāgraṃ śrūyatesariduttamā
ṣaṣṭitīrthasahasrāṇiṣaṣṭikoṭyas tathaiva ca
sarvahiṃ sānivṛttaś ca sarvabhūtahiterataḥ
evaṃ sarvasamācāraḥ kṣetrapālānparivrajet
tasya puṇyaphalaṃ rājanśṛṇuṣvāvahitohime
śataṃ varṣasahasrāṇāṃ svargemodetapāṇḍava
apsarogaṇasaṃ kīrṇedivyastrīparicārite
divyagandhānuliptaś ca divyālaṃ kārabhūṣitaḥ
tataḥ svargātparibhraṣṭorājābhavativīryavān
gṛhaṃ salabhate caiva nānāratnavibhūṣitam
ālekhyasahitaṃ divyaṃ dāsīdāsasamanvitam
mattamātaṃ gaśabdaiś ca hayānāṃ hreṣitenaca
rājarājeśvaraḥ śrīmān sarvastrījanavallabhaḥ
tasmin gṛheuṣitvātukrīḍābhogasamanvitaḥ
jīvedvarṣaśataṃ sāgraṃ sarvarogavivarjitaḥ
kanyāstrīṇisahasrāṇiekaikasyāpicāpare
pṛthivyāmāsamudrāyāmīdṛśonaiva jāyate
yādṛśoyaṃ naraśreṣṭhaparvate'marakaṃ ṭake
koṭitīrthaṃ tuvijṣeyaṃ parva tasya tupaścime
rudrojāleśvaronāmatriṣu lokeṣu viśrutaḥ
tasya piṇḍapradānenasamdhyopāsanakarmaṇā
dakṣiṇenarmadāyāstukapilākhyāmahānadī
saralārjunasaṃ cchannānātidūrevyavasthitā
astipuṇyāmahābhāgātriṣu lokeṣu viśrutā
tatra koṭiśataṃ sāgraṃ tīrthānāṃ tuyudhiṣṭhira
purāṇeśrūyaterājan sarvaṃ koṭiguṇaṃ bhavet
tasyāstīretuyevṛkṣāḥ patitāḥ kālaparyayāt
narmadātoyasaṃyuktāstepiyānti parāṃ gatim
dvitīyātumahābhāgaviśalyakaraṇāśubhā
tatra tīrenaraḥ snātvā viśalyobhavatikṣaṇāt
yakṣarākṣasagandharvāṛṣayaś ca tapodhanāḥ
narmadāsaṃ śritāpuṇyāviśalyānāmanāmataḥ
utpāditāmahābhāgā sarvapāpapraṇāśinī
upoṣyarajanīmekāṃ kulānāṃ tārayecchatam
kapilācaviśalyācaśrūyaterājasattama
īśvareṇapurāṇoktālokānāṃ hitakāmyayā
anaśanaṃ tuyaḥ kuryāt tasmin tīrthenarādhipa
narmadāyāṃ tu rājendrapurāṇeyacchrutaṃ mayā
sarasvatyāṃ cagaṅgāyāṃ narmadāyāṃ yudhiṣṭhira
samaṃ dānaṃ ca snānaṃ ca yathā me śaṅkaro'bravīt
parityajatiyaḥ prāṇānparvate'marakaṃ ṭake
varṣakoṭiśataṃ sāgramindraloke mahīyate
narmadāyājalaṃ puṇyaṃ phenormisamalaṃ kṛtam
pavitraṃ śirasāvaṃ dyaṃ sarvapāpaiḥ pramucyate
narmadā sarvapuṇyācabrahmahatyāpahāriṇī
evaṃ puṇyācaramyācanarmadāpāṇḍunandana
trayāṇāmapilokānāṃ punātyeṣāmahānadī
vaṭeśvaremahāpuṇyegaṅgādvāretapovane
eteṣu sarvasthāneṣu yerditāḥ saṃśitavratāḥ
śrūyatedaśaguṇaṃ puṇyaṃ narmadodvāsasaṅgame
iti śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe svargakhaṇḍe trayodaśo'dhyāyaḥ
caturdaśo'dhyāyaḥ
nārada uvāca
narmadātu na dīśreṣṭhāpuṇyāpuṇyatamātriṣu
munibhistumahābhāgairvibhaktādharmakāṅkṣibhiḥ
yajṣopavītamātrāṇipravibhaktānipāṇḍava
jaleśvaraṃ cayattīrthaṃ triṣu lokeṣu viśrutam
tasyotpattiṃ kathayataḥ śṛṇupāṇḍavanandana
purāmunigaṇāḥ sarvesendrāś caiva marudgaṇāḥ
stuvamānāstusamprāptā yatra devomaheśvaraḥ
vijṣāpayanti deveśaṃ sendrāś caiva marudgaṇāḥ
īśvara uvāca
svāgataṃ tumuniśreṣṭhāḥ kimarthamihacāgatāḥ
kiṃ duḥkhaṃ ko'nusaṃ tāpaḥ kutovābhayamāgatam
ṛṣaya ūcuḥ
tasmādbhītāvirūpākṣatvāmevaśaraṇaṃ gatāḥ
trāyasvamahatoduḥkhāddevatvaṃ hiparāgatiḥ
evaṃ prasādaṃ deveśasarveṣāṃ kartumarhasi
yenadevāḥ suprasannāḥ sukhamedhanti śaṅkara
etat sarvaṃ kariṣyāmimāviṣādaṃ kariṣyatha
acireṇaivakālenakuryāṃ yuṣmatsukhāvaham
āśvāsayitvātānsarvānnarmadātaṭamāsthitaḥ
ciṃ tayāmāsasarveśastadvadhaṃ pratipāṇḍava
evaṃ saṃ ciṃ tyabhagavānnāradaṃ smaratetadā
smaraṇādevasamprāptonāradaḥ samupasthitaḥ
nārada uvāca
ājṣāpayamahādevakimarthaṃ saṃ smṛtohyaham
īśvara uvāca
bāṇasyadānavendrasyaśīghraṃ gacchāthatatkuru
bhartāro devatābhāś ca striyaścāpsarasopamāḥ
strīṇāṃ hṛdayanāśāyapraviṣṭastaṃ puraṃ prati
śobhatetatpuraṃ divyaṃ nānāratnopaśobhitam
śatayojanavistīrṇaṃ tatodviguṇamāyatam
mālākuṇḍalakeyūrairmukuṭenavirājitam
hāraratnaiś ca saṃ channaṃ candrakāṃ tivibhūṣitam
lalanās tasya ratnāḍhyāḥ narāḥ kanakamaṇḍitāḥ
utthitonāradaṃ dṛṣṭvā dānavendromahābalaḥ
bāṇa uvāca
arghaṃ pādyaṃ yathā nyāyaṃ kriyatāṃ dvijasattaa
tasya bhāryāmahādevīanaupamyātunāmataḥ
nārada uvāca
sasāgarānavadvīpādattābhavatimedinī
sūryakoṭipratīkāśairvimānaiḥ sarvakāmikaiḥ
modatecākṣayaṃ kālaṃ suciraṃ kṛtaśāsanaḥ
kadaṃ bacaṃ pakāśokāanekavividhadrumāḥ
aṣṭamīcacaturthīcadvādaśīca tathā ubhe
saṃ krāṃ tirviṣuvaṣcaiva dinacchidramukhaṃ tathā
puṇyānyetānisarvāṇiupavāsanti yāḥ striyaḥ
tāsāṃ tudharmayuktānāṃ svargevāsonasaṃśayaḥ
kalikālāttunirmuktāḥ sarvapāpavivarjitāḥ
upavāsaratānāryonopasarpanti tāpasāḥ
evaṃ śrutvātusuśroṇiyatheṣṭaṃ kartumarhasi
nāradasyavacaḥ śrutvārājṣīvacanamabravīt
suvarṇamaṇiratnānivastrāṇyābharaṇāni ca
pratigṛhṇadvijaśreṣṭhaprīyetāṃ hariśaṅkarau
nārada uvāca
anyasmaidīyatāṃ bhadrekṣīṇavṛtiś ca yodvijaḥ
evaṃ tāsāṃ manohṛtvāsarvāsāmupadiśyavā
jagāma bharataśreṣṭha svakīyaṃ sthānakaṃ punaḥ
atrākṛṣṭamanāstāstuan yatra gatamānasāḥ
iti śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe svargakhaṇḍe caturdaśo'dhyāyaḥ
paṣcadaśo'dhyāyaḥ
nārada uvāca
nāmnāhareśvaraṃ sthānaṃ triṣu lokeṣu viśrutam
gāḍīvaṃ maṃ daraṃ kṛtvāguṇaṃ kṛtvātuvāsukim
sthānaṃ kṛtvātuvaiśākhaṃ viṣṇuṃ kṛtvāśarottamam
agre cāgniṃ pratiṣṭhāpya mukhe vāyuḥ samarpitaḥ
svayamindraś ca cāpāṃ tebāṇevaiśravaṇaḥ sthitaḥ
yamastudakṣiṇehastevāmekālastudāruṇaḥ
cakrāṇāmārakenyastāgandharvālokaviśrutāḥ
prajāpatīrathaśreṣṭhebrahmā caiva tusārathiḥ
evaṃ kṛtvātudeveśaḥ sarvadevamayaṃ ratham
sotiṣṭhatsthāṇubhūtohisahasraṃ par ivatsarān
yadātrīṇisametāniantar ikṣacarāṇi ca
tripurāṇitriśalyenatadātānibibhedasaḥ
bhraṣṭatejāstriyojātābalaṃ teṣāṃ vyaśīryata
utpātāś ca pure tasmin prādurbhūtāsahasraśaḥ
tripurasyavināśāyakālarūpobhavattadā
aṭṭahāsampramuṃ canti rūpāḥ kāṣṭamayās tathā
nimeṣonmeṣaṇaṃ caiva kurvanti citrakarmaṇā
svapnepaśyanti cātmānaṃ raktāṃ baravibhūṣitam
etānpaśyatiutpātāṃs tatra sthānetuyejanāḥ
teṣāṃ balaṃ cabuddhiś ca harakrodhenanāśitam
samīritonalaśreṣṭhauttamāṃ geṣu bādhate
sarvaṃ tadvyākulībhūtaṃ hāhākāramacetanam
tenaivadīpitaṃ sarvaṃ jvalateviśikhaiḥ śikhaiḥ
drumāārāmagaṇḍānigṛhāṇivividhāni ca
daśadikṣupravṛttoyaṃ samiddhohavyavāhanaḥ
tataḥ śilāḥ pramuṃ canti diśodaśavibhāgaśaḥ
sarvaṃ kiṃ śukasamprakhyaṃ jvalitaṃ dṛśyatepuram
gṛhādgṛhāntarenaivagaṃ tuṃ dhūmaiś ca śakyate
harakopānalādagdhaṃ kraṃ damānaṃ suduḥkhitam
prāsādaśikharāgrāṇiviśīryanti sahasraśaḥ
nānāratnavicitrāṇivimānānyapyanekadhā
gṛhāṇi caiva ramyāṇidahyaṃ tedīptivahninā
sīdanti cānalaspṛṣṭāḥ kraṃ danti vividhaisvaraiḥ
girikūṭanibhās tatra dṛśyaṃ teṃ 'gārarāśayaḥ
anyonyaṃ capariṣvajyahutāśanaprapīḍitāḥ
dahyaṃ tedānavās tatra śataśothasahasraśaḥ
haṃ sakāraṇḍavākīrṇānalinīsahapaṃ kajā
dahyaṃ tenaladagdhānipurodyānānidīrghikāḥ
amlānaiḥ paṃ kajaiśchannāvistīrṇāyojanaiḥ śataiḥ
girikūṭanibhās tatra prāsādāratnabhūṣitāḥ
sahastrībālavṛddheṣu goṣupakṣiṣuvājiṣu
sapatnīkāś caiva suptāḥ saṃ suptābahavojanāḥ
putramāliṅgyategāḍhaṃ dahyaṃ tetripurāriṇā
kācidbālāviśālākṣīmuktāvalivibhūṣitā
dhūmenākulitāsātupratibuddhāśikhārdditā
sutaṃ saṃ ciṃ tyamānāsāpatitādharaṇītale
kācitsuvarṇavarṇābhānīlaratnairvibhūṣitā
dhūmenākulitāsātupatitādharaṇītale
anyāgṛhītahastātusakhīdahatibālakaiḥ
anenadivyarūpānyādṛṣṭāmadavimohitā
śirasāprāṃ jaliṃ kṛtvāvijṣāpayatipāvakam
striyaḥ kimaparādhyaṃ tegṛhapaṃ jarakokilāḥ
nadākṣiṇyaṃ natelajjānasatyaṃ śaucavarjitaḥ
anekarūpavarṇāḍhyāupalabhyāvadasvaha
kiṃ tvayānaśrutaṃ lokeavadhyāḥ sarvayoṣitaḥ
nakāruṇyaṃ dayāvāpidākṣiṇyaṃ vāstriyopari
mlecchānāmapikaṣṭosidurnivāryohyacetanaḥ
āsāmapidurācārastrīṇāṃ kiṃ vinipātase
duṣṭanirghṛṇanirlajjahutāśamaṃ dabhāgyaka
nirāśastvaṃ durācārabālāndahasinirdaya
evaṃ pralapamānāstājalpamānābahusvaram
anyāḥ krośanti saṃ kruddhābālaśokenamohitāḥ
puṣkariṇyāṃ jalejvālākūpeṣvapi tathaiva ca
asmānsamdahyamlecchatvaṃ kāṃ gatiṃ prāpayiṣyasi
evaṃ pralapatāṃ tāsāṃ vahnirvacanamabravīt
vaiśvānara uvāca
svavaśonaivayuṣmākaṃ vināśaṃ tukaromy aham
ahamādeśakartāvaināhaṃ karttāsmyanugraham
atrakodhasamāviṣṭovicarāmiyadṛcchayā
tatobāṇomahātejāstripuraṃ vīkṣyadīpitam
āsanastho'bravīdevamahaṃ devairvināśitaḥ
alpasārairdurācārairīśvarasyaniveditaḥ
aparīkṣyahyahaṃ dagdhaḥ śaṅkareṇamahātmanā
nānyaḥ śatrustumāṃ haṃ tuṃ varjjayitvāmaheśvaram
utthitaḥ śirasākṛtvāliṅgaṃ tribhuvaneśvaram
ratnānisuvicitrāṇistriyonānāvidhās tathā
gṛhītvāśirasāliṅgaṃ nyastaṃ nagaramaṇḍale
tvatprasādānmahādevamāmeliṅgaṃ vinaśyatu
tvayāyadyapivadhyohaṃ māmeliṅgaṃ vinaśyatu
toṭakacchaṃ dasādevaṃ stutvātuparameśvaram
oṃ śivaśaṅkara sarvakarāyanamobhavabhīmamaheśaśivāyanamaḥ
yaḥ paṭhet toṭakaṃ divyaṃ prayataḥ śucimānasaḥ
imaṃ stavaṃ mahādivyaṃ śrutvā devo maheśvaraḥ
īśvara uvāca
putrapautrasapatnīnāṃ bhāryābhṛtyajanaiḥ saha
tato nivārayāmāsarudraḥ saptaśikhaṃ tathā
tṛtīyaṃ rakṣitaṃ tasya śaṅkareṇamahātmanā
evaṃ tutripuraṃ dagdhaṃ śaṅkareṇamahātmanā
jvālāmālāpradīptaṃ tupatitaṃ dharaṇītale
