urvaśītīrthamāsādya tathā somāśramambudhaḥ
kuṃ bhakarṇāśramesnātvā pūjyate bhuvi mānavaḥ
tathā kokāmukhesnātvā brahmacārīsamāhitaḥ
jātismaratvaṃ prāpnotidṛṣṭametatpurātanaiḥ
sakṛnnadīṃ samāsādyakṛtārthobhavatidvijaḥ
ṛṣabhadvīpamāsādyasevyakrauṃ caniṣūdanam
audyānakaṃ mahārājatīrthaṃ muniniṣevitam
brahmatīrthaṃ samāsādyapuṇyaṃ brahmarṣisevitam
vājapeyam avāpnoti naro nāsty atra saṃśayaḥ
tataś ca ṃ pāṃ samāsādyabhāgīrathyāṃ kṛtodakaḥ
daṇḍārpaṇaṃ samāsādyagosahasraphalaṃ labhet
lāviḍhikāntato gacchetpuṇyāṃ puṇyaniṣevitām
iti śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe svargakhaṇḍe gayāditīrthamāhātmyakathanaṃ
nāmaaṣṭatriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
navatriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
nārada uvāca
athasamdhyāṃ samāsādyasavidyāṃ tīrtham uttamam
upaspṛśyanaro vidvānbhavennāsty atra saṃśayaḥ
rāmasyacaprasādenatīrtharājaṃ kṛtaṃ purā
karatoyāṃ samāsādyatrirātropoṣitonaraḥ
gaṅgāyāstvatharājendrasāgarasyacasaṅgame
aśvamedhaṃ daśaguṇaṃ pravadanti manīṣaṇaḥ
gaṅgāyāstuparaṃ dvīpaṃ prāpyayaḥ snātibhārata
trirātropoṣitorājan sarvakāmam avāpnuyāt
tatovaitaraṇīṃ gatvānadīṃ pāpapramocanīm
virajaṃ tīrthamāsādyavirājati yathā śaśī
prabhāvecakulaṃ pūtvā sarvapāpaṃ vyapohati
śoṇasyajyotirathyāś ca saṅgamenivasaṣchuciḥ
śoṇasyanarmadāyāś ca prabhavekurupuṅgava
ṛṣabhaṃ tīrthamāsādyakośalāyāṃ narādhipa
kośalāyāṃ samāsādyakālatīrthamupaspṛśet
vṛṣabhaikādaśaguṇaṃ labhatenātra saṃśayaḥ
puṣpavatyāmupaspṛśyatrirātropoṣitonaraḥ
tatobadārikātīrthesnātvā prayatamānasaḥ
rāmatīrthenaraḥ snātvā vājimedhaphalaṃ labhet
śrīparvataṃ samāsādyanadītīramupaspṛśet
śrīparvatemahādevo devyāsahamahādyutiḥ
tatra devahradesnātvā śuciḥ prayatamānasaḥ
ṛṣabhaṃ parvataṃ gatvābhāṇḍeṣu surapūjitam
vājapeyam avāpnoti nākapṛṣṭhecamodate
tato gaccheta kāverīṃ vṛtāmṛpsarasāṅgaṇaiḥ
athagokamarṇamāsādyatriṣu lokeṣu viśrutam
bhūtayakṣāḥ piśācāś ca kinnarāḥ samahoragāḥ
siddhacāraṇagandharvā mānuṣāḥ pannagās tathā
saritaḥ sāgarāḥ śailā upāsante umāpatim
daśāśvamedham āpnoti gāṇapatyaṃ ca vindati
upoṣya dvādaśarātraṃ kṛtārtho jāyate naraḥ
nidarśanaṃ ca pratyakṣaṃ brāhmaṇānāṃ narādhipa
gāyatrīṃ paṭhate yas tuyonisaṃ karajodvijaḥ
gāthāvāgītikāvāṇī tasya sampadyatenṛpa
abrāhmaṇasyapaṭhataḥ sāvitrītūpanaśyati
saṃ var tasya tuviprarṣevāpīmāsādyadurllabhām
rūpasyabhāgībhavatisubhagaścābhi jāyate
tatoveṇāṃ samāsādyatarpayetpitṛdevatāḥ
mayūrahaṃ sasaṃ ktaṃ vimānaṃ labhatenaraḥ
tatogodāvarīṃ prāpyanityasiddhaniṣevitām
veṇāyāḥ saṅgamesnātvā vājapeyaphalaṃ labhet
brahmasthūṇāṃ samāsādyatrirātropoṣitonaraḥ
kubjāvanaṃ samāsādyabrahmacārīsamāhitaḥ
tato devahradesnātvā kṛṣṇaveṇājalodbhave
yatra kratuśatairiṣṭvādevarājodivaṃ gataḥ
agniṣṭomaśataṃ vindyādgamanādeva tatra tu
jātimātrahradesnātvā bhavejjātismaronaraḥ
śarabhaṃ gāśramaṃ gatvāśukasyacamahātmanaḥ
daṇḍakāraṇyam āsādya mahārāja upaspṛśet
śarabhaṃ gāśramaṃ gatvāśukasyacamahātmanaḥ
rāmatīrthaṃ naraḥ snātvā vindyādbahusuvarṇakam
saptagodāvarīṃ snātvā niyatoniyatāśanaḥ
tuṃ gakāraṇyamāsādyabrahmacārījitendriyaḥ
vedānadhyāpayat tatra munīnsārasvataḥ purā
tatra vedānpraṇaṣṭāṃ stumunerāṅgirasaḥ sutaḥ
upaviṣṭomaharṣīṇāmuttarīyeṣu bhārata
auṃ kāreṇa yathā nyāyaṃ samyaguccāritenaha
ṛṣayas tatra devāś ca varuṇo'gniḥprajāpatiḥ
pitāmahaś ca bhagavāndevaiḥ sahamahādyutiḥ
bhṛguṃ niyojayāmāsayājanārthemahādyutim
tataḥ sacakrebhagavānṛṣīṇāṃ vidhivattadā
sarveṣāṃ punarādhānaṃ devadṛṣṭenakarmaṇā
devāstribhuvanaṃ yātāṛṣaś ca yathā sukham
tadaraṇyaṃ praviṣṭasyatuṃ gakaṃ rājasattama
pāpaṃ vinaśyatesadyaḥ striyāvaipuruṣasyavā
tatra māsaṃ vaseddhīroniyatoniyatāśanaḥ
medhāvanaṃ samāsādyapitṛdevāṃ ś ca tarpayet
agniṣṭomam avāpnoti smṛtiṃ medhāṃ ca vindati
ātmānaṃ sādhayet tatra giraukālaṃ jarenṛpa
tatogir ivaraśreṣṭhecitrakūṭeviśāṃ pate
maṃ dākinīṃ samāsādyanadīṃ pāpavimocanīm
atrābhiṣekaṃ kurvāṇaḥ pitṛdevārcanerataḥ
pumāṃs tatra naraḥ śreṣṭhagamanādevasidhyati
pradakṣiṇamupāvṛtyayaśaḥ sthānaṃ vrajennaraḥ
abhigamyamahādevaṃ virājati yathā śaśī
tatopaspṛśyarājendrakṛtvācāpi pradakṣiṇam
niyatātmānaraḥ pūtogaccheta paramāṃ gatim
tato gacchetkuruśreṣṭhaśṛṃ gaverapuraṃ mahat
yatra tīrṇomahāprājṣorāmodāśarathiḥ purā
gaṅgāyāṃ tu na raḥ snātvā brahmacārījitendriyaḥ
tatomuṃ javaṭaṃ gachetsthānaṃ devasyadhīmataḥ
pradakṣiṇamupāvṛtyagāṇapatyam avāpnuyāt
yatra brahmādayo devādiśaś ca sadigīśvarāḥ
lokapālāś ca siddhāś ca niratāḥ pitaras tathā
tathā nāgāḥ suparṇāś ca siddhāḥ śukradharās tathā
hariś ca bhagavānāsteprajāpatipuraskṛtaḥ
tatra trīṇyapikuṇḍānitayor madhye najāhnavī
prayāgātsamatikrāṃ tā sarvatīrthapuraskṛtā
yamunā gaṅga yā sārdhaṃ saṅgatā lokabhāvinī
prayāgaṃ jaghanasyāntamupasthamṛṣayoviduḥ
prayāgaṃ supratiṣṭhānaṃ kambalāśvatarāv ubhau
tīrthaṃ bhogavatī caiva vedīproktāprajāpateḥ
tatra vedāś ca yajṣāś ca mūrttimanto yudhiṣṭhira
prajāpatimupāsaṃ taṛṣayaś ca mahānaghāḥ
tataḥ puṇyatamaṃ nāstitriṣu lokeṣu bhārata
prayāgaṃ sarvatīrthebhyaḥ prabhāveṇādhikaṃ prabho
śravaṇāt tasya tīrthasyanāmasaṅkīrtanād api
mūrdhakānamanādvāpi sarvapāpaiḥ pramucyate
tatrābhiṣekaṃ yaḥ kuryātsaṅgamesaṃśitavrataḥ
puṇyaṃ sumahadāpnotirājasūyāśvamedhayoḥ
eṣāyajanabhūmirhidevānāmapitatkathā
matirutkramaṇīyāteprayāgamaraṇaṃ prati
daśatīrthasahasrāṇiṣaṣṭikoṭyas tathā parāḥ
snāta evatadāpnotigaṅgāyāmunasaṅgame
tatrābhiṣekaṃ yaḥ kuryātso'śvamedham avāpnuyāt
daśāśvamedhikaṃ caiva gaṅgāyāṃ kurunandana
kurukṣetrasamāgaṅgā yatra tatrāvagāhitā
yadyakāryaśataṃ kṛtvākṛtaṃ gaṅgāvasevanam
sarvaṃ dahatigaṅgāpastūlarāśimivānalaḥ
sarvaṃ kṛtayugepuṇyaṃ tretāyāṃ puṣkaraṃ smṛtam
dvāparetukurukṣetraṃ gaṅgākaliyugesmṛtā
punātikīrttitāpāpaṃ dṛṣṭvā puṇyaṃ prayacchati
avagāḍhācapītvācapunātyāsaptamaṃ kulam
yāvadasthimanuṣ yasya gaṅgāyāḥ spṛśatejalam
yathā puṇyānitīrthānipuṇyānyāyatanāni ca
nagaṅgāsadṛśaṃ tīrthaṃ nadevaḥ keśavātparaḥ
brāhmaṇebhyaḥ paraṃ nāstievamāhapitāmahaḥ
siddhakṣetraṃ cavijṣeyaṃ gaṅgātīrasamāśritam
idaṃ satyaṃ dvijātīnāṃ sādhūnāṃ mānaseṣu ca
muktiṃ caiva japetkarṇeśiṣṭasyānuga tasya ca
mahīśīrṣamidaṃ guhyaṃ sarvapāpapramocanam
śrīmatsvargyaṃ mahāpuṇyaṃ sapatnaśamanaṃ śivam
medhājananamagryaṃ vaitīrthavaṃ śānukīrttanam
mahīṃ vijayaterājāvaiśyodhanam avāpnuyāt
śūdroyātīpsitānkāmānbrāhmaṇaḥ pāragaḥ paṭhan
yaścedaṃ śṛṇuyānnityaṃ tīrthapuṇyaṃ sadāśuci
jātismaratvamāpnotinākapṛṣṭhecamodate
gamyānyapicatīrthānikīrtitānyagamānyapi
ṛṣibhirdevakalpaiś ca kṛtānisukṛtaiṣibhiḥ
bhāvitaiḥ karaṇaiḥ pūrvamāstikyāchrutidarśanāt
prāpyaṃ tetānitīrthānisadbhiḥ śiṣṭānudarśibhiḥ
nākṛtonākṛtātmācanāśucirnacataskaraḥ
pitāmahapurogāś ca devāḥ sarṣigaṇās tathā
vasiṣṭha uvāca
tvaṣcadharmeṇadharmajṣanityamevābhitoṣitāḥ
dilīpakīrtiṃ mahatīṃ prāpsyase bhuvi śāśvatīm
nārada uvāca
evamuktvābhyanujṣāpyavasiṣṭhobhagavānṛṣiḥ
prītaḥ prītenamanasā tatra ivāntaradhīyata
dilīpaḥ kuruśārdūlaśāstratattvārthadarśanāt
evam eṣā mahābhāga pratiṣṭhāne pratiṣṭhitā
tīrthayātrāmahāpuṇyā sarvapāpapramocanī
anenavidhināyas tupṛthivīṃ paryaṭiṣyati
aśvamedhaśataṃ sāgraṃ phalaṃ pretyaiṣabhokṣyate
tataścāṣṭaguṇaṃ pārthaprāpsyasedharmam uttamam
dilīpaḥ pārthanṛpatir yathā pūrvamavāptavān
netācatvamṛṣīnyasmāttasmātteṣṭaguṇaṃ phalam
rakṣogaṇavikīrṇānitīrthānyetānibhārata
idaṃ devarṣicaritaṃ sarvatīrthānusaṃ śritam
ṛṣimukhyāḥ sadā yatra vālmīkistvathakaśyapaḥ
asito devalaś caiva mārkaṇḍeyo'thagālavaḥ
bharadvājasyaśiṣyaś ca muniruddālakas tathā
śaunakaḥ sahaputreṇavyāsaś ca tapatāṃ varaḥ
durvāsāś ca muniśreṣṭhojābāliś ca mahātapāḥ
eteṛṣivarāḥ sarvetvatpratīkṣyāstapodhanāḥ
ebhiḥ sahamahābhāgatīrthānyetānyanuvraja
prāpsyasemahatīṃ kīrtiṃ yathā rājāmahābhiṣaḥ
yathā yayātirdharmātmā yathā rājāpurūravāḥ
tathā tvaṃ kuruśārdūlasvenadharmeṇaśobhase
yathā bhagīrathorājā yathā rāmaś ca viśrutaḥ
yathā vaivṛtrahāsarvānsapatnānadahat purā
trailokyaṃ pālayāmāsadevarāṭvigatajvaraḥ
tathā śatrukṣayaṃ kṛtvātvaṃ prajāḥ pālayiṣyasi
svadharmeṇārjitāmurvīṃ prāpyarājīvalocana
khyātiṃ yāsyasivīryeṇakārttavīryārjuno yathā
sūta uvāca
evamābhāṣyarājānaṃ nāradobhagavānṛṣiḥ
anujṣāpyamahārājaṃ tatra ivāntaradhīyata
yudhiṣṭhiro'pidharmātmāṛṣibhiḥ sahasuvrataḥ
jagāmākhilatīrthānisādaraḥ pṛthivīpatiḥ
mayoktāmṛṣayaḥ sarvetīrthayātrāśrayāṃ kathām
yaḥ paṭhecchṛṇuyādvāpisamuktaḥ sarvapātakaiḥ
ṛṣīṇāṃ puṇyakīrtīnāṃ nāvaktavyaṃ mamāstivai
iti śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe svargakhaṇḍe nānāvidhatīrthakathanaṃ
nāmanavatriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
catvāriṃ śo'dhyāyaḥ
sūta uvāca
evamuktānitīrthāniviṣṇudehānisuvratāḥ
eṣāmanyatamāsaṅgānmuktobhavatimānavaḥ
tīrthānuśravaṇaṃ dhanyaṃ dhanyaṃ tīrthaniṣevaṇam
pāparāśinipātāyanānyopāyaḥ kalau yuge
vāsaṃ kuryāmahaṃ tīrthetīrthasparśamahaṃ tathā
pāpāni tasya naśyanti tīrthālāpanamātrataḥ
tīrthānāṃ sevanādevasevitobhavatiprabhuḥ
nārāyaṇojagatkartānāstitīrthātparaṃ padam
brāhmaṇas tulasī caiva aśvatthas tīrthasaṣcayaḥ
viṣṇuś ca parameśānaḥ sevya eva sadā nṛbhiḥ
brāhmaṇānāṃ viśeṣeṇasevanaṃ munipuṅgavāḥ
sarvatīrthāvagāhāderadhikaṃ viduragrajāḥ
tasmāddvijapadaṃ sākṣāt sarvatīrthamayaṃ śubham
bhajetānudinaṃ vidvāṃs tatra tīrthādhikaṃ bhavet
aśvatthasyatulasyāś ca gavāṃ kuryātpradakṣiṇam
sarvatīrthaphalaṃ prāpyaviṣṇuloke mahīyate
tasmādduṣkṛtakarmāṇināśayettīrthasevanāt
an yathā narakaṃ yātikarmabhogāddhiśāmyati
pāpināṃ narakevāsaḥ sukṛtīsvargamaśnute
tasmātpuniṣevetatīrthaṃ khaluvicakṣaṇaḥ
ṛṣaya ūcuḥ
śrutānikilatīrthānisamāhātmyānisuvrata
idānīṃ śrotum icchāmaḥ prayāgasyaviśeṣakam
prayāgaṃ tupurāproktaṃ saṃ kṣepātsūtayattvayā
viśeṣācchrotum icchāmaḥ sūtanaḥ kathyatāmiti
sūta uvāca
sādhupṛṣṭaṃ mahābhāgāḥ prayāgaṃ pratisuvratāḥ
haṃ tāhaṃ tatpravakṣyāmiprayāgasyopavarṇanam
mārkaṇḍeyenakathitaṃ yatpurāpāṇḍusūnave
bhāratetuyadāvṛtteprāptarājyepṛthāsute
tasmin nantar erājākuṃ tīputroyudhiṣṭhiraḥ
bhrātṛśokenasaṃ taptaḥ ciṃ tayaṃ stupunaḥ punaḥ
āsīdduryodhanorājāekādaśacamūpatiḥ
asmānsaṃ tapyabahuśaḥ sarvetenidhanaṃ gatāḥ
vāsudevaṃ samāśrityapaṣcaśeṣāstupāṇḍavāḥ
kathaṃ droṇaṃ cabhīṣmaṃ cakarṇaṃ caiva mahābalam
rājānonihatāḥ sarveyecānyeśūramāninaḥ
vinārājyenakartavyaṃ kiṃ bhogairjīvitenavā
dhikkaṣṭamitisaṃ ciṃ tyarājāvihvalatāṃ gataḥ
niśceṣṭo'thanirutsāhaḥ kiJcit tiṣṭhatyadhomukhaḥ
labdhasaṃ jṣoyadārājāciṃ tayānaḥ punaḥ punaḥ
kaṃ carevidhināyogaṃ niyamaṃ tīrthamevavā
yenāhaṃ śīghramāmucyemahāpātakakilbiṣāt
kathaṃ pṛcchāmivaikṛṣṇaṃ yenedaṃ kāritaṃ mahat
dhṛtarāṣṭraṃ kathaṃ pṛcche yasya putraśataṃ hatam
vyāsaṃ kathamahaṃ pṛcche yasya gotrakṣayaḥ kṛtaḥ
rudantaḥ pāṇḍavāḥ sarvebhrātṛśokapariplutāḥ
yeca tatra mahātmānaḥ sametāḥ pāṇḍavāśritāḥ
kuṃ tīcadraupadī caiva yeca tatra samāgatāḥ
bhūmaunipatitāḥ sarverodamānāḥ samaṃ tataḥ
vārāṇasyāṃ tumārkaṇḍastenajṣātoyudhiṣṭharaḥ
yathā viklavamāpannorodamānaḥ suduḥkhitaḥ
acireṇaivakālenamārkaṇḍastumahātapāḥ
hastināpurasamprāptorājadvāresatiṣṭhati
dvārapālo'pitaṃ dṛṣṭvā rājṣaḥ kathitavāndrutam
tvāṃ draṣṭukāmo mārkaṇḍo dvāre tiṣṭhaty asau muniḥ
yudhiṣṭhira uvāca
svāgataṃ temahāprājṣasvāgataṃ temahāmune
adyamepitaras tṛptāstvayidṛṣṭemahāmune
siṃ hāsanaupasthāpyapādaśaucārcanādibhiḥ
yudhiṣṭhiromahātmāvaipūjayāmāsataṃ munim
tatastamūcemārkaṇḍaḥ pūjito'haṃ tvayāvibho
kenavāviklavībhūtaḥ kathayasvamamāgrataḥ
yudhiṣṭhira uvāca
asmākaṃ caiva yadvṛttaṃ rājyasyārthemahāmune
mārkaṇḍeya uvāca
śṛṇurājanmahābāho yatra dharmovyavasthitaḥ
naivadṛṣṭaṃ raṇepāpaṃ yudhyamānasyadhīmataḥ
kiṃ punārājadharmeṇakṣatri yasya viśeṣataḥ
tad eva ṃ hṛdayekṛtvātasmāt pāpaṃ naciṃ tayet
tatoyudhiṣṭhirorājāpraṇamyaśirasāmunim
pṛcchāmitvāṃ muniśreṣṭhasadātraikālyadarśanam
mārkaṇḍeya uvāca
śṛṇurājanmahābhāgayanmāṃ pṛcchasibhārata
evaṃ sāṃ khyaṃ cayogaṃ catīrthaṃ caiva yudhiṣṭhira
kiṃ punarbrāhmaṇaiḥ puṇyaiḥ kīrtitaṃ vaipurāvibho
prayāgagamanaṃ śreṣṭhaṃ narāṇāṃ puṇyakarmaṇām
iti śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe svargakhaṇḍe catvāriṃ śo'dhyāyaḥ
ekacatvāriṃ śo'dhyāyaḥ
dhiṣṭhira uvāca
kathaṃ prayāgagamanaṃ narāṇāṃ tatra kīdṛśam
mṛtānāṃ kāgatis tatra snātānāṃ caiva kiṃ phalam
yevasanti prayāgetubrūhiteṣāṃ cakiṃ phalam
mārkaṇḍeya uvāca
purāṛṣīṇāṃ viprāṇāṃ kathyamānaṃ mayāśrutam
āprayāgāt pratiṣṭhānād dharmakī vāsukīhradāt
kambalāśvataraunāgaunāgāś ca bahumūlikāḥ
etatprajāpatikṣetraṃ triṣu lokeṣu viśrutam
atrasnātvā divaṃ yānti yemṛtāste'punarbhavāḥ
tatra brahmādayo devārakṣāṃ kurvanti saṅgatāḥ
anyecabahavastīrthāḥ sarvapāpapraṇāśanāḥ
naśakyāḥ kathituṃ rājanbahuvarṣaśatairapi
saṃ kṣepeṇapravakṣyāmiprayāgasyacakīrttanam
ṣaṣṭirdhanuḥ sahasrāṇiparirakṣanti jāhnavīm
yamunāṃ rakṣati sadā savitā saptavāhanaḥ
prayāgaṃ tuviśeṣeṇasvayaṃ rakṣativāsavaḥ
maṇḍalaṃ rakṣatiharirdevaiḥ sahasusaṃ matam
taṃ vaṭaṃ rakṣatenityaṃ śūlapāṇirmaheśvaraḥ
sthānaṃ rakṣativaidevaḥ sarvapāpaharaṃ śubham
prayāgasmaramāṇasya sarvam āyātisaṃ kṣayam
darśanāt tasya tīrthasyanāmasaṅkīrtanād api
mṛttikālabhanādvāpinaraḥ pāpādvimucyate
paṣcakuṇḍānirājendrayeṣāṃ madhye tujāhnavī
prayāgetupraviṣṭasyapāpaṃ kṣaratitatkṣaṇāt
yojanānāṃ sahasreṣu gaṅgāṃ smaratiyonaraḥ
kīrtanānmucyatepāpair dṛṣṭvā bhadrāṇipaśyati
avagāhyacapītvācapunātyāsaptamaṃ kulam
satyavādījitakrodhoahiṃ sāṃ paramāsthitaḥ
dharmānusārītattvajṣogobrāhmaṇahiterataḥ
manasā ciṃ titānkāmānsamyakprāpnotipuṣkalān
brahmacārīvasenmāsampitṛdevāṃ ś ca tarpayet
īpsitāṃ ṃ llabhatekāmān yatra tatrābhi jāyate
tapanasyasutādevītriṣu lokeṣu viśrutā
samāgatā mahābhāgā yamunā yatra nimnagāḥ
tatra sannihito nityaṃ sākṣād devo maheśvaraḥ
duṣprāpaṃ mānuṣaiḥ puṇyaṃ prayāgaṃ tu yudhiṣṭhira
devadānavagandharvā ṛṣayaḥ siddhacāraṇāḥ
iti śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe svargakhaṇḍe
ekacatvāriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
dvicatvāriṃ śo'dhyāyaḥ
mārkaṇḍeya uvāca
śṛṇu rājan prayāgasya māhātmyaṃ punar eva tu
yaṃ gatvā sarvapāpebhyo mucyate nātra saṃśayaḥ
ārtānāṃ ca daridrāṇāṃ niścitavyavasāyinām
sthānaṃ muktvā prayāgaṃ tunākṣayaṃ tu kadācana
gaṅgāyamunām āsādya yas tu prāṇān parityajet
dīptakāṣcanavarṇābhe vimāne sūryavarcasi
īpsitān labhate kāmān vadanti ṛṣipuṅgavāḥ
varāṅganāsamākīrṇair modate śubhalakṣaṇaiḥ
tatra svargāt paribhraṣṭaḥ kṣīṇakarmādivaś cyutaḥ
deśasthoyadivāraṇyevideśeyadivāgṛhe
sabrahmalokamāpnotivadanti ṛṣipuṅgavāḥ
sarvakāmaphalāvṛttāmahī yatra hiraṇmayī
strīsahasrākuleramyemaṃ dākinyāstaṭeśubhe
modateṛṣibhiḥ sārdhaṃ svakṛtenehakarmaṇā
tataḥ śubhānikarmāṇiciṃ tayānaḥ punaḥ punaḥ
guṇavānvittasampannobhavatīhanasaṃśayaḥ
karmaṇāmanasā vācāsatyadharmapratiṣṭhitaḥ
suvarṇaṃ maṇimuktāṃ vāyadidhānyaṃ pratigraham
svakāryepitṛkāryevādevatābhyarcane'pivā
evaṃ tīrthenagṛhṇīyāt puṇyeṣvāyataneṣu ca
kapilāṃ pāṭalāvarṇāṃ prayāgeyaḥ prayacchati
svarṇaśṛṃ gīṃ raupyakhurāṃ cailakaṃ ṭhīṃ payasvinīm
prayāgeśrotriyaṃ sādhuṃ grāhayitvā yathā vidhi
śuklāṃ baradharaṃ śāntaṃ dharmajṣaṃ vedapāragam
sāgaustasmaicadātavyāgaṅgāyamunasaṅgame
vāsāṃ sicamahārhāṇiratnānivividhāni ca
yāvadromāṇitasyāgoḥ santi gātreṣu sattama
gavāṃ śatasahasrebhyo dadyādekāṃ payasvinīm
putrāndārān tathā bhṛtyāngaurekāpratitārayet
tasmātsarveṣu dāneṣu godānaṃ tuviśiṣyate
gaurevarakṣāṃ kurutetasmāddeyādvijātaye
iti śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe svargakhaṇḍe
ekacatvāriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
dvicatvāriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
yudhiṣṭhira uvāca
yathā prayāgasya mune māhātmyaṃ kathitaṃ tvayā
tathā tathā pramucye'haṃ sarvapāpairnasaṃśayaḥ
mārkaṇḍeya uvāca
balīvardasamārūḍhaḥ śṛṇutasyāpiyatphalam
yas tuputrāṃs tathā bālānsnāpayetpāyayet tathā
yathā tmanas tathā sarvāndānaṃ vipreṣu dāpayet
śvaryalobhānmohādvāgacchedyānenayonaraḥ
niṣphalaṃ tasya tattīrthaṃ tasmādyānaṃ parityajet
na paśyatiyamaṃ ghoraṃ narakaṃ tenakarmaṇā
putrāṃ studārāṃ ṃ llabhatedhārmikānnayasaṃ yutān
vaṭamūlaṃ samāśrityayas tuprāṇānparityajet
tatra tedvādaśādityāstapaṃ terudramāśritāḥ
naṣṭacaṃ drārkapavanaṃ yadācaikārṇavaṃ jagat
svapit yatra ivavaiviṣṇurjāyamānaḥ punaḥ punaḥ
devadānavagandharvaṛṣayaḥ siddhacāraṇāḥ
sadāsevanti tattīrthaṃ gaṅgāyamunasaṅgame
tatra brahmādayo devādiśaś caiva digīśvarāḥ
lokapālāś ca sādhyāś ca pitarolokasaṃ matāḥ
tathā nāgāś ca siddhāś ca suparṇāḥ khecarāś ca ye
saritaḥ sāgarāḥ śailā nāgā vidyādharās tathā
hariś ca bhagavān āste prajāpatipuraskṛtaḥ
prayāgaṃ rājaśārdūla triṣu lokeṣu viśrutam
tataḥ puṇyatamaṃ nāsti triṣu lokeṣu bhārata
śravaṇāt tasya tīrthasya nāma saṅkīrtanād api
mṛttikālambhanād vāpi naraḥ pāpāt pramucyate
tatrābhiṣekaṃ yaḥ kuryāt saṅgame saṃśitavrataḥ
tulyaṃ phalam avāpnoti rājasūyāśvamedhayoḥ
daśatīrthasahasrāṇi ṣaṣṭikoṭyas tathā parāḥ
sā gatis tyajataḥ prāṇān gaṅgāyamunasaṅgame
ye prayāgaṃ na samprāptās triṣu lokeṣu viśrutam
evaṃ dṛṣṭvā tutattīrthaṃ prayāgaṃ paramaṃ padam
mucyate sarvapāpebhyaḥ śaśāṃ kaivarāhuṇā
kambalāśvataraunāgauyamunādakṣiṇetaṭe
tatra snātvā capītvācamucyate sarvapātakaiḥ
narastārayatesarvāndaśātītāndaśāparān
kṛtvābhiṣekaṃ tu na raḥ so'śvamedhaphalaṃ labhet
pūrvapārśvetugaṅgāyāṃ triṣu lokeṣu bhārata
kūpaṣ caiva tu sāmudraṃ pratiṣṭhānaṃ tu viśrutam
uttareṇa pratiṣṭhānād bhāgīrathyās tu pūrvataḥ
urvaśīpuline ramye vipule haṃsapāṇḍure
ṣaṣṭivarṣasahasrāṇi ṣaṣṭivarṣaśatāni ca
tataḥ svargaparibhraṣṭaḥ kṣīṇakarmādivaścyutaḥ
urvaśīsadṛśīnāṃ tukanyānāṃ labhateśatam
gavāṃ śatasahasrāṇāṃ bhoktābhavatibhūmipa
bhuktvātuvipulānbhogāṃ stattīrthaṃ labhatepunaḥ
kuśāsanadharonityaṃ niyataḥ saṃ yatendriyaḥ
suvarṇālaṃ kṛtānāṃ tunārīṇāṃ labhateśatam
pṛthivyāmāsamudrāyāṃ mahābhogapatirbhavet
daśagrāmasahasrāṇāṃ bhoktābhavatibhūmipaḥ
dhanadhānyasamāyuktodātābhavatinityaśaḥ
sabhuktvāvipulānbhogāṃ stattīrthaṃ smaratepunaḥ
upoṣyayogayuktaś ca brahmajñānam avāpnuyāt
koṭitīrthaṃ samāsādyayas tuprāṇānparityajet
tataḥ svargātparibhraṣṭaḥ kṣīṇakarmādivaścyutaḥ
suvarṇamaṇimuktāḍhyekulebhavatirūpavān
daśāśvamedhakaṃ tatra tīrthaṃ tatrāparaṃ bhavet
kṛtvābhiṣekaṃ tu na raḥ so'śvamedhaphalaṃ labhet
dhanāḍhyorūpavāndakṣodātābhavatidhārmikaḥ
kurukṣetrasamāgaṅgā yatra tatrāvagāhyate
kurukṣetrāddaśaguṇā yatra sindhvāsamāgatā
yatra gaṅgāmahābhāgābahutīrthatapodhanā
siddhakṣetraṃ hitajjṣeyaṃ nātra kāryā vicāraṇā
kṣitautārayatemartyānnāgāṃ stārayate'pyadhaḥ
divitārayatedevāṃ stenasātripathāsmṛtā
yāvadasthīnigaṅgāyānti ṣṭhanti tasya dehinaḥ
tīrthānāṃ tuparaṃ tīrthaṃ nadīnāmuttamānadī
mokṣadā sarvabhūtānāṃ mahāpātakināmapi
sarvatrasulabhāgaṅgātriṣusthāneṣu durlabhā
gaṅgādvāreprayāgecagaṅgāsāgarasaṅgame
tatra snātvā divaṃ yānti yemṛtāste'punarbhavāḥ
sarveṣāṃ caiva bhūtānāṃ pāpopahatacetasām
gatimanveṣamāṇānāṃ nāstigaṅgāsamāgatiḥ
pavitrāṇāṃ pavitraṃ yāmaṃ galānāṃ camaṅgalam
maheśvaraśirobhraṣṭā sarvapāpaharāśubhā
iti śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe svargakhaṇḍe prayāgamāhātmye
tricatvāriṃ śo'dhyāyaḥ
catuś ca tvāriṃ śo'dhyāyaḥ
mārkaṇḍeya uvāca
śṛṇurājanprayāgasyamāhātmyaṃ punar eva tu
mānasaṃ nāmatattīrthaṃ gaṅgāyāmuttaretaṭe
trirātropoṣitobhūtvā sarvānkāmānavāpnuyāt
gobhūhiraṇyadānenayatphalaṃ prāpnuyānnaraḥ
akāmovāsakāmovāgaṅgāyāṃ yovipadyate
bahuvarṣāṇirājendraṣaṭsahasrāṇibhuṣjate
tataḥ svargātparibhraṣṭaḥ kṣīṇakarmādivaścyutaḥ
suvarṇamaṇimuktāḍhye jāyatesamahākule
ṣaṣṭitīrthasahasrāṇiṣaṣṭitīrthaśatāni ca
māghe māsi gamiṣyanti gaṅgāyamunasaṅgame
ahīnāṃ gohyarogaś ca paṣcendriyasamanvitaḥ
yāvanti romakūpāṇi tasya gātrasyadehinaḥ
tataḥ svargātparibhraṣṭojaṃ būdvīpapatirbhavet
sabhuktvāvipulānbhogāṃ stattīrthaṃ bhajatenaraḥ
jalapraveśaṃ yaḥ kuryātsaṅgamelokaviśrute
ṣaṣṭivarṣasahasrāṇiṣaṣṭivarṣaśatāni ca
adhaḥ śirāstuyojvālāmūrdhvapādaḥ pibennaraḥ
śataṃ varṣasahasrāṇisvargaloke mahīyate
bhuktvātuvipulānbhogāṃ stattīrthaṃ bhajatenaraḥ
śataṃ varṣasahasrāṇāṃ somaloke mahīyate
tataḥ svargātparibhraṣṭorājābhavatidhārmikaḥ
bhuktvātuvipulānbhogāṃ stattīrthaṃ bhajatepunaḥ
ṛṇapramocanaṃ nāmatīrthaṃ tatparamaṃ smṛtam
ekarātroṣitobhūtvā ṛṇaiḥ sarvaiḥ pramucyate
sūryalokam avāpnoti anṛṇīcasadābhavet
iti śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe svargakhaṇḍe prayāgamāhātmye
catuś ca tvāriṃ śo'dhyāyaḥ
paṣcacatvāriṃ śo'dhyāyaḥ
yudhiṣṭhira uvāca
anāśakaphalaṃ brūhibhagavaṃs tatra kīdṛśam
mārkaṇḍeya uvāca
śṛṇurājanprayāgetuanāśakaphalaṃ vibho
prāpnotipuruṣodhīmānśraddadhānaś ca yādṛśam
ahīnāṃ govirogaś ca paṣcendriyasamanvitaḥ
kulānitārayedrājandaśapūrvāndaśāparān
yudhiṣṭhira uvāca
etanmesaṃśayaṃ brūhiparaṃ kautūhalaṃ hime
mārkaṇḍeya uvāca
śṛṇurājanmahāvīrayuduktaṃ padmayoninā
ṛṣīṇāṃ sannidhaupūrvaṃ kathyamānaṃ mayāśrutam
paṣcayojanavistīrṇaṃ prayāgasyatumaṇḍalam
vyatītānpuruṣānsaptabhaviṣyāṃ ś ca caturdaśa
evaṃ jṣātvātu rājendrasadāśraddhāparo bhavet
aśraddadhānāḥ puruṣāḥ pāpopahatacetasaḥ
yudhiṣṭhira uvāca
snehādvādravyalobhādvāye tu kāmavaśaṃ gatāḥ
kathaṃ tīrthaphalaṃ teṣāṃ kathaṃ puṇyam avāpnuyuḥ
vikrayaṃ sarvabhāṇḍānāṃ kāryākāryamajānataḥ
mārkaṇḍeya uvāca
śṛṇurājanmahāguhyaṃ sarvapāpapraṇāśanam
mucyate sarvapāpebhyaḥ yathā diṣṭaṃ svayaṃ bhuvā
śucistuprayatobhūtvā 'hiṃ sakaḥ śraddhayānvitaḥ
viśraṃ bhaghātakānāṃ tuprayāgeśṛṇutatphalam
trikālamevasnāyītaāhāraṃ bhaikṣyamācaret
tribhirmāsaiḥ pramucyetaprayāgāttu na saṃśayaḥ
evaṃ jṣānenasampūrṇaḥ sadābhavatibhogavān
tāritāḥ pitaras tenanarakātprapitāmahāḥ
yudhiṣṭhira uvāca
mārkaṇḍeya uvāca
diṣṭyātesaphalaṃ janmadiṣṭyātetāritaṃ kulam
kīrtanādvarddhatepuṇyaṃ śrutaṃ pāpapraṇāśanam
yudhiṣṭhira uvāca
yamunāyāṃ tu kiṃ puṇyaṃ kiṃ phalaṃ tu mahāmune
etanme sarvam ākhyāhi yathā dṛṣṭaṃ yathā śrutam
mārkaṇḍeya uvāca
tapanasya sutā devī triṣu lokeṣu viśrutā
samāgatā mahābhāgā yamunā yatra nimnagā
yenaiva niḥ sṛtā gaṅgā tenaiva yamunā gatā
yojanānāṃ sahasreṣu kīrtanāt pāpanāśinī
tatra snātvā ca pītvā ca yamunāyāṃ yudhiṣṭhira
kīrttanāllabhatepuṇyaṃ dṛṣṭvā bhadrāṇipaśyati
avagāḍhācapītvācapunātyāsaptamaṃ kulam
prāṇāṃ styajatiyas tatra sayātiparamāṃ gatim
agnitīrtham iti khyātaṃ yamunādakṣiṇe taṭe
tatra snātvā divaṃ yānti yemṛtāste'punarbhavāḥ
evaṃ tīrthasahasrāṇi yamunādakṣiṇe taṭe
uttareṇapravakṣyāmiādit yasya mahātmanaḥ
tīrthaṃ tuvirajaṃ nāma yatra devāḥ savāsavāḥ
upāsatesmasamdhyāṃ tunityakālaṃ yudhiṣṭhira
devāḥ sevanti tattīrthaṃ yecānyeviduṣojanāḥ
śraddadhānaparobhūtvā kurutīrthābhiṣecanam
anyecabahavastīrthāḥ sarvapāpaharāḥ śubhāḥ
teṣu snātvā divaṃ yānti yemṛtāste'punarbhavāḥ
kevalaṃ śreṣṭhabhāvena gaṅgā sarvatra pūjyate
yāvajjīvakṛtaṃ pāpaṃ tatkṣaṇādevanaśyati
yastvidaṃ kalyautthāyapaṭhate ca śṛṇotivā
iti śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe svargakhaṇḍe yamunāmāhātmye
paṣcacatvāriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
ṣaṭcatvāriṃ śo'dhyāyaḥ
yudhiṣṭhira uvāca
śrutaṃ mebrahmaṇāproktaṃ purāṇepuṇyasammitam
tīrthānāṃ tusahasrāṇiśatāniniyutāni ca
sarvepuṇyāḥ pavitrāś ca gatiś ca paramāsmṛtā
pṛthivyāṃ naimiṣaṃ puṇyamantar ikṣecapuṣkaram
prayāgamapilokānāṃ kurukṣetraṃ viśiṣyate
gatiṃ caparamāṃ divyāṃ bhogāṃ ś caiva yathepsitān
etaṃ mesaṃśayaṃ brūhi yathā dṛṣṭaṃ thāśrutam
mārkaṇḍeya uvāca
etepātakinaḥ sarvetenedaṃ bhāṣitaṃ mayā
śṛṇuprayāgamāhātmyaṃ yathā dṛṣṭaṃ yathā śrutam
yathaivānyanmayādṛṣṭaṃ purārājan yathā śrutam
śāstraṃ pramāṇaṃ kṛtvātupūjyateyogamātmanaḥ
prayāgetumṛtasyedaṃ sarvaṃ bhavatinān yathā
yathā sarveṣu bhūteṣu sarvatraivatudṛśyate
evaṃ sarveṣu lokeṣu prayāgaḥ pūjyatebudhaiḥ
kohidevatvamāsādyamānuṣatvaṣcikīrṣati
anenaivānumānenatvaṃ jṣāsyasiyudhiṣṭhira
yathā puṇyamapuṇyaṃ vā tathaiva kathitaṃ mayā
yudhiṣṭhira uvāca
śrutaṃ tadyattvayāproktaṃ vismito'haṃ punaḥ punaḥ
tadācalabhatebhogāngāṃ catatkarmaṇāṃ phalam
tānikarmāṇipṛcchāmipunaryaiḥ prāpyatemahīm
mārkaṇḍeya uvāca
śṛṇurājanmahābāhoyathoktakarmaṇāmahī
gāmagniṃ brāhmaṇaṃ śāstraṃ kāṣcanaṃ salilaṃ striyaḥ
naiteṣāmūrdhvagamanamevamāhaprajāpatiḥ
gacchanti narakaṃ ghoraṃ yenarāḥ pāpakāriṇaḥ
hastyaśvaṃ gāmanaḍvāhaṃ maṇimuktādikāṣcanam
anenakarmaṇāyuktāḥ pacyaṃ tenarake'dhamāḥ
evaṃ yogaṃ cadharmaṃ cadātāraṃ cayudhiṣṭhira
niruktaṃ tupravakṣyāmi yathā yaṃ svayamāpnuyāt
iti śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe svargakhaṇḍe prayāgamāhātmye
ṣaṭcatvāriṃ śo'dhyāyaḥ
saptacatvāriṃ śo'dhyāyaḥ
mārkaṇḍeya uvāca
śṛṇurājanprayāgasyamāhātmyaṃ punar eva tu
naimiṣaṃ puṣkaraṃ caiva gotīrthaṃ sindhusāgaram
kurukṣetraṃ gayā caiva gaṅgāsāgaramevaca
etecānyecabahavoyecapuṇyāḥ śiloccayāḥ
daśatīrthasahasrāṇitriṃśatkoṭyas tathā pare
prayāgesaṃ sthitānityamevamāhurmanīṣiṇaḥ
trīṇicāpyagnikuṇḍāniyeṣāṃ madhye tujāhnavī
prayāgādabhiniṣkrāṃ tā sarvatīrthapuraskṛtā
tapanasyasutādevītriṣu lokeṣu viśrutā
gaṅgāyamunayāsārdhaṃ saṃ sthitālokabhāvinī
prayāgaṃ rājaśārdūlakalāṃ nārhanti ṣoḍaśīm
tisraḥ koṭyo'rddhakoṭīcatīrthānāṃ vāyurabravīt
prayāgaṃ samadhiṣṭhānaṃ kambalāśvatarāvubhau
tatra devāś ca yajṣāś ca mūrtimanto yudhiṣṭhira
pūjayanti prayāgaṃ teṛṣayaś ca tapodhanāḥ
yajaṃ tekratubhirdevāṃs tathā bahudhanānṛpāḥ
tataḥ puṇyatamonāstitriṣu lokeṣu bhārata
daśatīrthasahasrāṇitisraḥ koṭyas tathā pare
yatra gaṅgāmahābhāgāsadeśastattapovanam
siddhakṣetraṃ tutajjṣeyaṃ gaṅgātīrasamāśritam
itisatyaṃ dvijātīnāṃ sādhūnāmātmajasyavā
suhṛdāṃ cajapetkarṇeśiṣyasyānuga tasya vā
maharṣīṇāmidaṃ guhyaṃ sarvapāpapraṇāśanam
yaścedaṃ śṛṇuyānnityaṃ tīrthaṃ puṇyaṃ sadāśuciḥ
jātismaratvaṃ labhatenākapṛṣṭhecamodate
prāpyaṃ tetānitīrthānisadbhiḥ śiṣṭārthadarśibhiḥ
tvayā tu samyakpṛṣṭenakathitaṃ tumayāvibho
pitaras tāritāḥ sarvetāritāś ca pitāmahāḥ
prayāgasyatusarvetekalāṃ nārhanti ṣoḍaśīm
evaṃ jñānaṃ cayogaṃ catīrthaṃ caiva yudhiṣṭhira
iti śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe svargakhaṇḍe prayāgamāhātmye
saptacatvāriṃ śo'dhyāyaḥ
aṣṭacatvāriṃ śo'dhyāyaḥ
yudhiṣṭhira uvāca
kathāsarvātviyaṃ proktāprayāgasyamahāmune
mārkaṇḍeya uvāca
śṛṇurājanpravakṣyāmiproktaṃ sarvam idaṃ jagat
brahmāviṣṇustatheśāno devatāprabhuravyayaḥ
brahmāsṛjatibhūtānisthāvaraṃ jaṃ gamaṃ cayat
tānyetāniparolokeviṣṇuḥ pālayatiprajāḥ
īśvaraḥ sarvabhūtānāṃ yaḥ paśyatisapaśyati
uttareṇa pratiṣṭhānād idānīṃ brahma tiṣṭhati
maheśvaro vaṭe bhūtvā tiṣṭhate parameśvaraḥ
tato devāḥ sagandharvāḥ siddhāś ca paramarṣayaḥ
rakṣanti paramaṃ nityaṃ pāpakarmaparāyāyaṇān
ye tu cānye ca tiṣṭhanti nayānti paramāṃ gatim
yudhiṣṭhira uvāca
apy āha me yathā tattvaṃ yathaiṣāṃ tiṣṭhate śrutam
kena vā kāraṇe naiva tiṣṭhanti lokasaṃmatāḥ
mārkaṇḍeya uvāca
prayāgenivasanty etebrahmaviṣṇumaheśvarāḥ
kāraṇaṃ tupravakṣyāmiśṛṇutattvaṃ yudhiṣṭhira
paṣcayojanavistīrṇaṃ prayāgasyatumaṇḍalam
tiṣṭhanti rakṣaṇārthāyapāpakarmanivāraṇāḥ
tasmiṃs tusvalpakaṃ pāpaṃ narakepātayiṣyati
evaṃ brahmācaviṣṇuś ca prayāgesamaheśvaraḥ
saptadvīpāḥ samudrāś ca parvatāś ca mahītale
tiṣṭhanti dhriyamāṇāś ca yāvad ābhūtasamplavam
prajāpateridaṃ kṣetraṃ prayāgamitiviśrutam
etatpuṇyaṃ pavitraṃ caprayāgaṃ tuyudhiṣṭhira
iti śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe svargakhaṇḍe prayāgamāhātmye
aṣṭacatvāriṃ śo'dhyāyaḥ
ūnapaṣcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ
sūta uvāca
bhrātṛbhiḥ sahitāḥ sarvepāṇḍavādharmaniś ca yāḥ
vāsudevo'pi tatra ivakṣaṇenābhyāgatastadā
pāṇḍavaiḥ sahitaiḥ sarvaiḥ pūjyamānaḥ samādhavaḥ
kṛṣṇenasahitaiḥ sarvaiḥ punarevamahātmabhiḥ
tataḥ svastīticoktvāvaikṣaṇādāśramamāgataḥ
yudhiṣṭhiro'pidharmātmābhrātṛbhiḥ sahitastusaḥ
mahādānaṃ dadaucāthadharmaputroyudhiṣṭhiraḥ
yastvidaṃ kalyamutthāyapaṭhatevāśṛṇotivā
vāsudeva uvāca
nityaṃ yajṣaratobhūtvā prayāgevigatajvaraḥ
prayāgaṃ saṃ smarannityaṃ sahāsmābhiryudhiṣṭhira
svayaṃ prāpsyasirājendrasvargalokaṃ tuśāśvatam
pratigrahādupāvṛttaḥ santuṣṭoniyataḥ śuciḥ
ahaṃ kāranivṛttaś ca satīrthaphalamaśnute
akopanaś ca rājendrasatyavādīdṛḍhavrataḥ
ātmopamaś ca bhūteṣu satīrthaphalamaśnute
ṛṣibhiḥ kratavaḥ proktādevaiś cāpi yathā kramam
nahiśakyādaridreṇayajṣāḥ prāptuṃ mahīpate
bahūpakaraṇoyajṣonānāsambhārasambhramaḥ
ṛṣīṇāṃ paramaṃ guhyamidaṃ bharatasattama
tīrthābhigamanaṃ puṇyaṃ yajṣairapiviśiṣyate
daśakoṭisahasrāṇitriṃśatkoṭyas tathā pare
māghamāsetugaṅgāyāṃ gamiṣyanti nararṣabha
punardrakṣyasirājendrayajamānoviśeṣataḥ
iti śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe svargakhaṇḍe prayāgamāhātmyaṃ
nāma ūnapaṣcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ
paṣcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ
ṛṣaya ūcuḥ
bhavatākathitaṃ sarvaṃ yatiṃ kacitpṛṣṭamevaca
idānīmapipṛcchāma ekaṃ vadamahāmate
eteṣāṃ khalutīrthānāṃ sevanādyatphalaṃ labhet
sūta uvāca
karmayogaḥ kilaproktovarṇānāṃ dvijapūrvaśaḥ
nānāvidhomahābhāgās tatra caikaṃ viśiṣyate
haribhaktiḥ kṛtāyenamanasā vacasāgirā
harirevasamārādhyaḥ sarvadeveśvareśvaraḥ
harināmamahāmantrairnaśyet pāpapiśācakam
hareḥ pradakṣiṇaṃ kṛtvāsakṛdapyamalāśayāḥ
sarvatīrthasamāplāvaṃ labhaṃ teyannasaṃśayaḥ
pratimāṃ caharer dṛṣṭvā sarvatīrthaphalaṃ labhet
viṣṇunāmaparaṃ japtvā sarvam aṃ traphalaṃ labhet
viṣṇuprasādatulasīm āghrāya dvijasattamāḥ
pracaṇḍaṃ vikarālaṃ tadyamasyāsyaṃ na paśyati
sakṛtpraṇāmīkṛṣṇasyamātuḥ stanyaṃ pibennahi
haripādemanoyeṣāṃ tebhyo nityaṃ namonamaḥ
pulkasaḥ śvapacovāpiyecānyemlecchajātayaḥ
te'pivaṃ dyāmahābhāgāharipādaikasevakāḥ
kiṃ punarbrāhmaṇāḥ puṇyābhaktārājarṣayas tathā
punātibhuvanaṃ viprāgaṅgādisalilaṃ yathā
darśanātsparśanāt tasya ālāpād apibhaktitaḥ
brahmahatyādibhiḥ pāpair mucyatenātra saṃśayaḥ
hareḥ pradakṣiṇaṃ kurvannuccaistannāmakṛnnaraḥ
karatālādisamdhānaṃ susvaraṃ kalaśabditam
haribhaktikathāmuktvākhyāyikāṃ śṛṇuyāccayaḥ
kiṃ punas tasya pāpānām āśaṅkā munipuṅgavāḥ
tīrthānāṃ ca paraṃ tīrthaṃ kṛṣṇanāma maharṣayaḥ
tīrthīkurvanti jagatīṃ gṛhītaṃ kṛṣṇanāma yaiḥ
tasmānmunivarāḥ puṇyaṃ nātaḥ parataraṃ viduḥ
viṣṇuprasādanirmālyaṃ bhuktvādhṛtvācamastake
viṣṇurevabhavenmartyoyamaśokavināśanaḥ
yemahāviṣṇumavyaktaṃ devaṃ vāpimaheśvaram
ekībhāvena paśyanti nateṣāṃ punarudbhavaḥ
tasmādanādinidhanaṃ viṣṇumātmānamavyayam
te yānti narakānghorāṃ nnatāṃ stugaṇayeddhīraḥ
mūrkhaṃ vāpaṇḍitaṃ vāpibrāhmaṇaṃ keśavapriyam
śvapākaṃ vāmocayatinārāyaṇaḥ svayaṃ prabhuḥ
nārāyaṇātparonāstipāparāśidavānalaḥ
kṛtvāpipātakaṃ ghoraṃ kṛṣṇanāmnāvimucyate
svayaṃ nārāyaṇo devaḥ svanāmnijagatāṃ guruḥ
ātmano'bhyadhikāṃ śaktiṃ sthāpayāmāsasuvratāḥ
phalānāṃ gauravāccāpi te yānti narakaṃ bahu
tasmāddharaubhaktimānsyāddharināmaparāyaṇaḥ
pūjakaṃ pṛṣṭhatorakṣennāminaṃ vakṣasiprabhuḥ
harināma mahāvajraṃ pāpaparvatadāraṇe
tāvevadhanyāvākhyātauyautupūjākaraukarau
aho lokā atitarāṃ daivadoṣeṇa vaṣcitāḥ
nāmoccāraṇamātreṇamuktidaṃ nabhajanti vai
vaṣcitāste ca kaluṣāḥ strīṇāṃ saṅgaprasaṅgataḥ
pratiṣṭhanti calomāniyeṣāṃ nokṛṣṇaśabdane
temūrkhāhyakṛtātmānaḥ putraśokādivihvalāḥ
rudanti bahulālāpairnakṛṣṇākṣarakīrtane
jihvāṃ labdhvāpiloke'sminkṛṣṇanāmajapennahi
tasmādyatnenavaiviṣṇuṃ karmayogenamānavaḥ
karmayogārccitoviṣṇuḥ prasīdatyevanān yathā
tīrthādapyadhikaṃ tīrthaṃ viṣṇorbhajanamucyate
sarveṣāṃ khalutīrthānāṃ snānapānāvagāhanaiḥ
tasmādbhajadhvaṃ munayaḥ kṛṣṇaṃ paramamaṅgalam
iti śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe svargakhaṇḍe viṣṇubhaktipraśaṃ sanaṃ
nāmapaṣcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ
ekapaṣcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ
ṛṣaya ūcuḥ
karmayogaḥ kathaṃ sūtayenacārādhitohariḥ
yenāsaubhagavānīśaḥ samārādhyomumukṣubhiḥ
tadvadākhilalokānāṃ rakṣaṇaṃ dharmasaṅgraham
taṃ karmayogaṃ vadanaḥ sūtamūrtimayas tuyaḥ
itiśuśrūṣavoviprābhavadagrevyavasthitāḥ
sūta uvāca
evamevapurāpṛṣṭovyāsaḥ satyavatīsutaḥ
ṛṣibhiragnisaṃ kāśairvyāsastānāhatacchṛṇu
vyāsa uvāca
śṛṇudhvaṃ mṛṣayaḥ sarvevakṣyamāṇaṃ sanātanam
āmnāyasiddhamakhilaṃ brāhmaṇārthaṃ pradarśitam
ṛṣīṇāṃ śṛṇvatāṃ pūrvaṃ manurāhaprajāpatiḥ
sarvavyādhiharaṃ puṇyamṛṣisaṅghairniṣevitam
samāhitadhiyoyūyaṃ śṛṇudhvaṃ gadatomama
garbhāṣṭame'ṣṭamevābdesvasūtroktavidhānataḥ
daṇḍīcamekhalīsūtrīkṛṣṇājinadharomuniḥ
bhikṣāhāroguruhitovīkṣyamāṇogurormukham
kārpāsamupavītārthaṃ nirmitaṃ brahmaṇāpurā
brāhmaṇānāṃ trivṛtsūtraṃ kauśaṃ vāvastramevavā
sadopavītī caiva syātsadābaddhaśikhodvijaḥ
vasedavikṛtaṃ vāsaḥ kārpāsaṃ vākaṣāyakam
tad eva paridhānīyaṃ śuklaṃ tāntavam uttamam
uttaraṃ tusamāmnātaṃ vāsaḥ kṛṣṇājinaṃ śubham
uddhṛtyadakṣiṇaṃ bāhuṃ savyabāhausamarpitam
upavītaṃ bhavennityaṃ nivītaṃ kaṃ ṭhasajjane
savyabāhuṃ samuddhṛtyadakṣiṇetudhṛtaṃ dvijāḥ
prācīnāvītamityuktaṃ pitryekarmaṇiyojayet
agnyāgāregavāṃ goṣṭhehometapye tathaiva ca
svādhyāyebhojanenityaṃ brāhmaṇānāṃ casannidhau
upāsanegurūṇāṃ ca samdhyayoḥ sādhusaṅgame
upavītībhavennityaṃ vidhireṣasanātanaḥ
mauṃ jītrivṛtsamāṃ śliṣṭāṃ kuryādviprasyamekhalām
muṃ jābhāvekuśenāhurgraṃ thinaikenavātribhiḥ
dhārayed vaiṇavapālāśau daṇḍau keśāntikau dvijaḥ
yajṣārhavṛkṣajaṃ vāthasaumyamavraṇamevaca
sāyaṃ prātardvijaḥ samdhyāmupāsītasamāhitaḥ
kāmāllobhādbhayānmohāttyaktvaināṃ patito bhavet
agnikāryaṃ tataḥ kuryātsāyaṃ prātaḥ prasannadhīḥ
snātvā santar payeddevānṛṣīnpitṛgaṇāṃs tathā
abhivādanaśīlaḥ syānnityaṃ vṛddheṣu dharmataḥ
ākāraścāsyanāmnoṃ 'tevācyaḥ pūrvākṣaraplutaḥ
nābhivādyaḥ saviduṣā yathā śūdras tathaiva saḥ
vyatyastapāṇinākāryaṃ pādasaṅgrahaṇaṃ guroḥ
savyenasavyaḥ sapraṣṭavyodakṣiṇenatudakṣiṇaḥ
laukikaṃ vaidikaṃ vāpi tathā dhyātmikamevavā
avāpyaprayatojñānaṃ taṃ pūrvamabhivādayet
nodakaṃ dhārayedbhaikṣyaṃ puṣpāṇisamidhas tathā
evaṃ vidhānicānyāninadevārtheṣu karmasu
brāhmaṇaṃ kuśalaṃ pṛcchetkṣatrabandhumanāmayam
vaiśyaṃ kṣemaṃ samāgamyaśūdramārogyamevaca
upādhyāyaḥ pitājyeṣṭhobhrātātrātācabhītitaḥ
mātulaḥ śvaśuraś caiva mātāmahapitāmahau
varṇaśreṣṭhaḥ pitṛvyaś ca puṃ so'traguravaḥ smṛtāḥ
mātāmātāmahīgurvīpiturmātuś ca sodarāḥ
śvaśrūḥ pitāmahījyeṣṭhādhātrīcaguravaḥ striyaḥ
jṣeyas tuguruvargo'yaṃ mātṛtaḥ pitṛtodvijāḥ
anuvartanameteṣāṃ manovākkāyakarmabhiḥ
gurūn dṛṣṭvā samuttiṣṭhedabhivādyakṛtāṣjaliḥ
naitairupaviśetsārdhaṃ vivadennātmakāraṇāt
jīvitārthamapidveṣādgurubhirnaivabhāṣaṇam
gurūṇāmapisarveṣāṃ paṣcapūjyāviśeṣataḥ
teṣāmādyāstrayaḥ śreṣṭhāsteṣāṃ mātāsupūjitā
jyeṣṭhobhrātācabhartācapaṣcaiteguravaḥ smṛtāḥ
ātmanaḥ sarvayatnenaprāṇatyāgenavāpunaḥ
pūjanīyāviśeṣeṇapaṣcaitebhūtimicchatā
yāvatpitācamātācadvāvetaunirvikāriṇau
tāvat sarvaṃ parityajyaputraḥ syāttatparāyaṇaḥ
pitāmātācasuprītausyātāṃ putraguṇairyadi
saputraḥ sakalaṃ dharmaṃ prāpnuyāttenakarmaṇā
nāstimātṛsamaṃ daivaṃ nāstipitṛsamoguruḥ
tayornityaṃ priyaṃ kuryātkarmaṇāmanasā girā
natābhyāmananujṣātodharmamanyaṃ samācaret
dharmasāraḥ samuddiṣṭaḥ pretyānaṃ taphalapradaḥ
samyagārādhyavaktāraṃ visṛṣṭastadanujṣayā
yobhrātaraṃ pitṛsamaṃ jyeṣṭhaṃ mūḍho'vamanyate
puṃsāṃ vartmanisṛṣṭenapūjyobhartātu sarvadā
mātulāṃ ś ca pitṛvyāṃ ś ca śvaśurānṛtvijogurūn
asāvahamitibrūyātpratyutthāyābhivādayet
avācyodīkṣitonāmnāyavīyānapiyo bhavet
abhivādyaś ca pūjyaś ca śirasānamya evaca
brāhmaṇakṣatriyādyaiś ca śrīkāmaiḥ sādaraṃ sadā
nābhivādyāś ca vipreṇakṣatriyādyāḥ kathaṃ cana
jñānakarmaguṇopetāyadyapyetebahuśrutāḥ
brāhmaṇaḥ sarvavarṇānāṃ svastikuryāditiśrutiḥ
savarṇenasavarṇānāṃ kāryamevābhivādanam
gururagnirdvijātīnāṃ varṇānāṃ brāhmaṇoguruḥ
patirekoguruḥ strīṇāṃ sarvatrābhyāgatoguruḥ
mānyasthānānipaṣcāhuḥ pūrvaṃ pūrvaṃ gurūttarāt
paṣcānāṃ triṣuvarṇeṣu bhūyāṃ sibalavanti ca
yatra syuḥ so'tramānārhaḥ śūdro'pidaśamīṃ gataḥ
paṃ thādeyobrāhmaṇāyastriyairājṣevicakṣuṣe
vṛddhāyabhārabhagnāyarogiṇedurbalāyaca
bhikṣāmāhṛtyaśiṣṭānāṃ gṛhebhyaḥ prayato'nvaham
nivedyaguruve'śnīyādvāgyatastadanujṣayā
mātaraṃ vāsvasāraṃ vāmāturvābhaginīṃ nijām
bhikṣetabhikṣāṃ prathamaṃ yācainaṃ navimānayet
sajātīyagṛheṣvevasārvavarṇikamevavā
vedayajṣairahīnānāṃ praśastānāṃ svakarmasu
alābhetvanyagehānāṃ pūrvaṃ pūrvaṃ vivarjayet
sarvaṃ vāvicaredgrāmaṃ pūrvoktānāmasambhave
samāhṛtyatubhaikṣyānnaṃ yāvadarthamamāyayā
bhuṣjītaprayatonityaṃ vāgyato'nanyamānasaḥ
bhaikṣyaiṇavarttinovṛttirupavāsasamāsmṛtā
dṛṣṭvā hṛṣyetprasīdecca pratinaṃ decca sarvaśaḥ
prāṅmukho'nnānibhuṣjītasūryābhimukhamevavā
nādyādudaṅmukhonityaṃ vidhireṣasanātanaḥ
prakṣālyapāṇipādaucabhuṣjānodvirupaspṛśet
śuddhedeśesamāsīnobhuktvācadvirupaspṛśet
iti śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe svargakhaṇḍe karmayogakathanaṃ
nāma ekapaṣcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ
dvipaṣcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
bhuktvāpītvācasuptvācasnātvā rathyopasarpaṇe
oṣṭhāvalomakauspṛṣṭvāvāsoviparidhāyaca
retomūtrapurīṣāṇāmutsarge'nṛtabhāṣaṇe
ṣṭhīvitvā'dhyayanāraṃ bhekāsaśvāsāgame tathā
catvaraṃ vāśmaśānaṃ vāsamākramyadvijottamaḥ
caṇḍālamlecchasambhāṣestrīśūdrocchiṣṭabhāṣaṇe
ucchiṣṭaṃ puruṣaṃ dṛṣṭvā bhojyaṃ cāpi tathā vidham
bhojanesamdhyayoḥ snātvā pītvāmūtrapurīṣayoḥ
āgatovācametsuptvāsakṛtsakṛdathānyataḥ
agnergavāmathālaṃ bhespṛṣṭvāprayatam evavā
strīṇāmathātmanaḥ sparśenīlīṃ vāparidhāyaca
upasparśejjalaṃ vārtaṃ tṛṇaṃ vābhūmimevaca
keśānāṃ cātmanaḥ sparśevāsasaḥ skhali tasya ca
anuṣṇābhirakeśābhiraduṣṭābhiś ca dharmataḥ
śauce'psu sarvadā cāmedāsīnaḥ prāgudaṅmukhaḥ
śiraḥ prāvṛtyakaṃ ṭhaṃ vāmuktakeśaśikho'pivā
akṛtvāpādayoḥ śaucaṃ mārgatonaśucirbhavet
sopānatkopānasthovānoṣṇīṣīcācamedbudhaḥ
na caiva varṣadhārābhirnatiṣṭhannuddhṛtodakaiḥ
naikahastārpitajalairvināsūtreṇavāpunaḥ
napādukāsanasthovābahirjānurathāpivā
nāvikṣitābhiḥ phenādyairupetābhirathāpivā
śūdrāśucikaronmuktairnakṣārābhis tathaiva ca
nacaivāṃ gulibhiḥ śabdaṃ nakuryānnānyamānasaḥ
napāṇikṣubhitābhirvānabahirgandha evavā
hṛdgābhiḥ pūyatevipraḥ kaṃ ṭhyābhiḥ kṣatriyaḥ śuciḥ
prāśitābhis tathā vaiśyaḥ strīśūdrausparśatoṃ 'tataḥ
aṃ guṣṭhamūlāntaratorekhāyāṃ brāhmamucyate
antar āṃ guṣṭhadeśinyaiḥ pitṝṇāṃ tīrthamucyate
kaniṣṭhāmūlataḥ paścātprājāpatyaṃ pracakṣate
aṃ gulyagraṃ smṛtaṃ daivaṃ tadevārṣaṃ prakīrtitam
mūlenadaivamārṣaṃ syādāgneyaṃ madhyataḥ smṛtam
triḥ prāśnīyādapaḥ pūrvaṃ brāhmeṇaprayatastataḥ
saṃ mṛjyāṃ guṣṭhamūlenamukhaṃ vaisamupaspṛśet
aṃ guṣṭhānāmikābhyāṃ tuspṛśennetradvayaṃ tataḥ
tarjanyaṃ guṣṭhayogenaspṛśennāsāpuṭadvayam
kaniṣṭhāṃ guṣṭhayogenaśravaṇesamuspṛśet
sarvāsāmathayogenahṛdayaṃ tutanavā
spṛśedvaiśirasastadvadaṃ guṣṭhenāṃ sakadvayam
triḥ prāśnīyādyadaṃ bhastuprītāstenāsyadevatāḥ
brahmāviṣṇurmaheśaś ca bhavaṃ tītyanuśuśruma
gaṅgā ca yamunā caiva prīye te parimārjanāt
saṃ spṛṣṭayorlocanayoḥ prīyeteśaśibhāskarau
nāsatyadasrauprīyetespṛśennāsāpuṭadvayam
karṇayoḥ spṛṣṭayostadvatprīyetecānilānalau
saṃ spṛṣṭehṛdayecāsyaprīyaṃ te sarvadevatāḥ
mūrdhnisaṃ sparśanādekaḥ prītaḥ sapuruṣo bhavet
nocchiṣṭaṃ kurvatevaktrevipruṣoṃ gelaganti yāḥ
spṛśanti biṃ davaḥ pādauyaācāmayataḥ parān
bhūmipāṃ śusamājṣeyānatairaspṛśyatābhavet
phalamūlecekṣudaṇḍenadoṣaṃ prāhavaimanuḥ
yadyaddravyaṃ samādāyabhaveduccheṣaṇānvitaḥ
vastrādiṣuvikalpaḥ syāttatsaṃ spṛśyācamediha
kṛtvāmūtraṃ purīṣaṃ vādravyahastonaduṣyati
nidhāyadakṣiṇekarṇebrahmasūtramudaṅmukhaḥ
ahnikuryācchakṛnmūtraṃ rātrauceddakṣiṇāmukhaḥ
antar dhāyamahīṃ kāṣṭaiḥ patrairloṣṭatṛṇenavā
prāvṛtyacaśiraḥ kuryādviṇmūtrasyavisarjanam
chāyākūpanadīgoṣṭhacaityāṃ bhaḥ pathibhasmasu
agnau caiva śmaśānecaviṇmūtraṃ nasamācaret
nagomayenakāṣṭhevāmahāvṛkṣe'thaśādvale
natiṣṭhannacanirvāsānacaparvatamaṇḍale
tuṣāṃ gārakapāleṣu rājamārge tathaiva ca
nodyāne'pāṃ samīpevānoṣarenagarāśaye
nasopānatpādukovāchatrīvānāntarikṣake
nacaivābhimukhaḥ strīṇāṃ gurubrāhmaṇayorgavām
najyotīṃ ṣinirīkṣanvānavāpratimukhothavā
āhṛtyamṛttikāṃ kūlāllepagandhāpakarṣaṇīm
kuryādatandritaḥ śaucaṃ viśuddhairuddhṛtodakaiḥ
nāharenmṛtikāṃ vipraḥ pāṃ śulāṃ nasakardamām
namārgānnoṣarāddeśācchaucaśiṣṭāṃ parasyaca
nadevāyatanātkūpāddhāmnonacajalāt tathā
upaspṛśettato nityaṃ pūrvoktenavidhānataḥ
iti śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe svargakhaṇḍe karmayogakathane
dvipaṣcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ
tripaṣcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
evaṃ daṇḍādibhiryuktaḥ śaucācārasamanvitaḥ
āhūtodhyāpanaṃ kuryādvīkṣyamāṇogurormukham
nityamudyatapāṇiḥ syātsādhvācāraḥ susaṃ yataḥ
āsyatāmiticoktaḥ sannāsītābhimukhaṃ guroḥ
pratiśravaṇasambhāṣeśayānonasamācaret
āsīnonacabhuṣjānonatiṣṭhennaparāṅmukhaḥ
nīcaiḥ śayyāsanaṃ cāsya sarvadā gurusannidhau
nacaivāsyānukurvīta gatibhāṣaṇaceṣṭitam
udakuṃ bhaṃ kuśānpuṣpaṃ samidho'syāharetsadā
mārjanaṃ lepanaṃ nityamaṃ gānāṃ vaisamācaret
nāsyanirmālyaśayanaṃ pādukopānahāvapi
ākrāmedāsanaṃ cāsyacchāyādīnvākadācana
sādhayeddaṃ takāṣṭhādīṃ llabdhaṃ cāsmainivedayet
jṛṃ bhitaṃ hasitaṃ caiva kaṃ ṭhaprāvaraṇaṃ tathā
yathā kālamadhīyītayāvannavimanāguruḥ
āsīno'dhoguroḥ pārśvesevāṃ casusamāhitaḥ
āsaneśayaneyānenaivatiṣṭhetkadācana
gośvoṣṭrayānaprāsāde tathā dhoviṣṭareṣu ca
āsītaguruṇāsārdhaṃ śilāphalakanauṣuca
jitendriyaḥ syātsatataṃ vaśyātmākrodhanaḥ śuciḥ
prayuṃ jītasadāvācaṃ madhurāṃ hitakāriṇīm
gandhamālyaṃ rasaṃ kalpaṃ śuktiṃ prāṇivihiṃ sanam
kāmaṃ lobhaṃ bhayaṃ nidrāṃ gītavāditranartanam
ātarjanaṃ parīvādaṃ strīprekṣālaṃ bhanaṃ tathā
udakuṃ bhaṃ sumanasogośakṛnmṛttikākuśān
āharedyāvadannānibhaikṣyaṃ cāharahaś ca ret
ghṛtaṃ calavaṇaṃ sarvaṃ varjyaṃ paryuṣitaṃ cayat
anṛtyadarśīsatataṃ bhavedgītādinispṛhaḥ
nādityaṃ vaisamīhetanācareddaṃ tadhāvanam
ekāntamaśucistrībhiḥ śūdrādyairabhibhāṣaṇam
gurūcchiṣṭaṃ bheṣajānnaṃ prayuṃ jītanakāmataḥ
malāpakarṣaṇaṃ snānaṃ nācareddhikadācana
laukikaṃ vaidikaṃ vāpi tathā dhyātmikamevavā
ādadītayatojñānaṃ taṃ nadruhyetkadācana
natvābhisṛṣṭoguruṇāsvāngurūnabhivādayet
vidyāguruṣvetad eva ṃ nityāvṛttiṣuyogiṣu
bālaḥ saṃ mānayenmānyāṣchiṣṭovāyadikarmaṇi
utsādanaṃ cagātrāṇāṃ snāpanocchiṣṭabhojanaḥ
guruvatpratipūjyāś ca savarṇāguruyoṣitaḥ
asavarṇāś ca sampūjyāḥ pratyutthānābhivādanaiḥ
abhyaṃ janaṃ snāpanaṃ cagātrotsādanamevaca
gurupatnyānakāryāṇikeśānāṃ caprasādhanam
gurupatnītuyuvatīnābhivādyātupādayoḥ
kurvīta vaṃ danaṃ bhūmyāmasāvahamitibruvan
viproṣyapādagrahaṇapūrvakaṃ cābhivādanam
mātṛṣvasāmātulānīśvaśrūścāthapitṛṣvasā
sampūjyāgurupatnīvatsamāstāgurubhāryayā
bhrātṛbhāryāś ca saṅgrāhyā savarṇāhany ahany api
viproṣya tūpasaṅgrāhyā jṣātisambandhiyoṣitaḥ
piturbhaginyāmātuś ca jāyasyāṃ casvasaryapi
mātṛvadvṛttimātiṣṭhenmātātābhyo garīyasī
evamācārasampannamātmavaṃ tamadāṃ bhikam
vedamadhyāpayeddharmaṃ purāṇāṃ gāninityaśaḥ
saṃvatsaroṣiteśiṣyegururjñānamanirdiśan
harateduṣkṛtaṃ tasya śiṣ yasya vasatoguruḥ
ācāryaputraḥ śuśrūṣurjñānadodhārmikaḥ śuciḥ
śaktonnadombudaḥ sādhuradhyāpyādaśadharmataḥ
kṛtakaṃ ṭhas tathā 'drohaḥ medhāvīgurukṛnnaraḥ
āptaḥ priyo'thavidhivatṣaḍadhyāpyādvijātayaḥ
ācamyasaṃ yatonityamadhīyītaudaṅmukhaḥ
upasaṅgṛhyatatpādauvīkṣyamāṇogurormukham
adhīṣvabhoitibrūyādvirāmo'stviticā''ramet
prākkūlānparyupāsītapavitraiś caiva pāvakaḥ
prāṇāyāmaistribhiḥ pūtastataoṃ kāramarhati
brāhmaṇaḥ praṇavaṃ kuryād ante'pi vidhivad dvijāḥ
kuryād adhyāpanaṃ nityaṃ sa brahmāṣjalipūrvataḥ
sarveṣām eva bhūtānāṃ vedaś cakṣuḥ sanātanaḥ
adhīyītāpy ayaṃ nityaṃ brāhmaṇyād dhīyate'nyathā
adhīyītaṛconityaṃ kṣīrāhutyāsadevatāḥ
prīṇātitarpayankālaṃ kāmairhūtāḥ sadaivatāḥ
yajūṃ ṣyadhīteniyataṃ dadhnāprīṇātidevatāḥ
sāmānyadhīteprīṇātighṛtāhutibhiranvaham
atharvāṅgirasonityaṃ madhvāprīṇātidevatāḥ
dharmāṃ gānipurāṇānimāṃ saistarpayatesurān
prātaś ca sāyaṃ prayatonaityakaṃ vidhimāśritaḥ
gāyatrīṃ samadhīyītagatvāraṇyaṃ samāhitaḥ
sahasraparamāṃ devīṃ śatamadhyāṃ daśāvarām
gāyatrīṃ vaijapennityaṃ japayajṣaḥ prakīrtitaḥ
gāyatrīṃ caiva vedāṃ ś ca tulayātolayatprabhuḥ
ekataś ca turovedāgāyatrīṃ catathaikataḥ
oṃ kāramāditaḥ kṛtvāvyāhṛtīstadanantar am
tato'dhīyītasāvitrīmekāgraḥ śraddhayānvitaḥ
purākalpesamutpannābhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ sanātanāḥ
mahāvyāhṛtayastisraḥ sarvāśubhanibarhaṇāḥ
pradhānaṃ puruṣaḥ kāloviṣṇubrahmamaheśvarāḥ
satvaṃ rajastamastisraḥ kramādvyāhṛtayaḥ smṛtāḥ
eṣamantromahāyogaḥ sārātsāraudāhṛtaḥ
yo'dhīte'hanyahanyetāṃ gāyatrīṃ vedamātaram
vijṣāyārthaṃ brahmacārīsayātiparamāṃ gatim
gāyatrīvedajananīgāyatrīlokapāvanī
śrāvaṇasyatumāsasyapaurṇamāsyāṃ dvijottamāḥ
āṣāḍhyāṃ proṣṭhapadyāṃ vāvedopākaraṇaṃ smṛtam
yat sūryayāmyagamanaṃ māsān viprordhvapaṣcamān
adhīyītaśucaudeśebrahmacārīsamāhitaḥ
puṣye tu cchaṃ dasāṃ kuryādbahirutsarjanaṃ dvijaḥ
māsiśuklasyavāprāptepūrvāhṇeprathame'hani
vedāṃ gānipurāṇānikṛṣṇapakṣeṣu mānavaḥ
karṇaśrave'nilerātraudivāpāṃ susamūhane
akālikamanadhyāyameteṣvāhaprajāpatiḥ
etānabhyudinānvidyādyadāprāduṣkṛtāgniṣu
tadāvidyādanadhyāyamanṛtaucābhradarśane
etānakālikānvidyādanadhyāyānṛtāvapi
sajyotiḥ syādanadhyāyaḥ śeṣerātrau yathā divā
nityānadhyāya evasyādgrāmeṣu nagareṣu ca
dharmanaipuṇyakāmānāṃ pūtigandhecanityaśaḥ
ucchiṣṭaḥ śrāddhabhuk caiva manasā pinaciṃ tayet
tryahaṃ nakārayedbrahmarājṣorāhoś ca sūtake
yāvadekānnaniṣṭhāsyātsnehālopaś ca tiṣṭhati
śayānaḥ prauḍhapādaś ca kṛtvā ca ivāvasakthikām
nādhīyītāmiṣaṃ jagdhvāśūdraśrāddhānnamevaca
amāvāsyācaturdaśyoḥ paurṇamāsyaṣṭamīṣuca
upākarmaṇicotsargetrirātraṃ kṣapaṇaṃ smṛtam
aṣṭakāsuahorātramṛtvaṃ tāsucarātriṣu
mārgaśīrṣe tathā pauṣemāghamāse tathaiva ca
tisro'ṣṭakāḥ samākhyātākṛṣṇapakṣeṣu sūribhiḥ
śleṣmātakasyacchāyāyāṃ śālmalermadhukasyaca
ācāryesaṃ sthitecāpi trirātraṃ kṣapaṇaṃ smṛtam
chidrāṇyetāniviprāṇāmanadhyāyāḥ prakīrtitāḥ
hiṃ santi rākṣasāsteṣu tasmādetānvivarjayet
ekāmṛcamathaikaṃ vāyajuḥ sāmānivāpunaḥ
nāṣṭakādyāsvadhīyītamārutecābhidhāvati
anadhyāyas tunāṃ geṣu netihāsapurāṇayoḥ
nadharmaśāstreṣvanyeṣu sarvāṇyetānivarjayet
eṣadharmaḥ samāsenakīrtitobrahmacāriṇaḥ
brahmaṇā'bhihitaḥ pūrvamṛṣīṇāṃ bhāvitātmanām
sasaṃ mūḍhonasambhāṣyovedabāhyodvijātibhiḥ
navedapāṭhamātreṇasantuṣṭovaibhaveddvijaḥ
pāṭhamātrāvasānastupaṃ kegaur ivasīdati
sa saṃmūḍhaḥ śūdrakalpaḥ pātratāṃ na prapadyate
yuktaḥ paricared enam āśarīravimokṣaṇam
adhīyīta tathā nityaṃ brahmaniṣṭhaḥ samāhitaḥ
sāvitrīṃ śatarudrīyaṃ vedāṃ tāṃś ca viśeṣataḥ
abhyaset satataṃ yukto bhikṣāśanaparāyaṇaḥ
etadvidhānaṃ paramaṃ purāṇaṃ
purā maharṣipravarābhipṛṣṭaḥ
iti śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe svargakhaṇḍe
tripaṣcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ
catuḥ paṣcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
vedaṃ vedau tathā vedānvedāṃ gāni tathā dvijāḥ
adhītyacādhigamyārthaṃ tataḥ snāyāddvijottamaḥ
guravetudhanaṃ dattvāsnāyītatadanujṣayā
tīrṇavratothayuktātmāśaktovāsnātumarhati
vaiṇavīṃ dhārayedyaṣṭimantar vāsastathottaram
yajṣopavītadvitayaṃ sodakaṃ cakamaṇḍalum
chatraṃ coṣṇīṣamamalaṃ pādukecāpyupānahau
raukmecakuṇḍaledhāryekṛttakeśanakhaḥ śuciḥ
an yatra kāṃ canādvipronaraktāṃ bibhṛyātsrajam
śuklāṃ baradharonityaṃ sugandhaḥ priyadarśanaḥ
naraktamulbaṇaṃ cānyadhṛtaṃ vāsonakuṇḍalam
upavītamalaṃ kāraṃ darśayankṛṣṇamājinam
nāpasavyaṃ parīdadhyādvāsonavikṛtaṃ vaset
āharedvidhivaddārānsadṛśānātmanaḥ śubhān
rūpalakṣaṇasaṃyuktān yonidoṣavivarjitān
āhared brāhmaṇo bhāryāṃ śīlaśaucasamanvitām
ṛtukālābhigāmī syād yāvat putro’bhi jāyate
ṣaṣṭhyaṣṭamīṃ paṣcadaśīṃ dvādaśīṃ cacaturdaśīm
ādadhītavivāhāgniṃ juhuyājjātavedasam
etānisnātakonityaṃ pāvanāni capāvayet
akurvāṇaḥ patatyāśunarakānatibhīṣaṇān
kuryādgṛhyāṇikāryāṇisamdhyopāsanamevaca
sakhyaṃ samādhikaiḥ kuryādupeyādīśvaraṃ sadā
kurvītātmahitaṃ nityaṃ sarvabhūtānukaṃ pakaḥ
deśavāgbuddhisārūpyamācaranvicaretsadā
yenāsyapitaroyātāyenayātāḥ pitāmahāḥ
tenayāyātsatāṃ mārgaṃ tenagacchannaduṣyati
nityaṃ svādhyāyaśīlaḥ syānnityaṃ yajṣopavītavān
sāvitrījāpanirataḥ śrāddhakṛnmucyategṛhī
vibhāgaśīlaḥ satataṃ kṣamāyuktodayālukaḥ
gṛhasthastusamākhyātonagṛheṇagṛhībhavet
kṣamādayācavijñānaṃ satyaṃ caiva damaḥ śamaḥ
adhyātmanityatājñānametadbrāhmaṇalakṣaṇam
etasmānnapramādyetaviśeṣeṇadvijottamaḥ
gṛhasthomucyatebandhānnātra kāryā vicāraṇā
anyamanyusamutthānāṃ doṣāṇāṃ marṣaṇaṃ kṣamā
svaduḥkheṣvevakāruṇyaṃ paraduḥkheṣu sauhṛdam
dayetimunayaḥ prāhuḥ sākṣāddharmasyasādhanam
caturdaśānāṃ vidyānāṃ dhāraṇāhiparārthataḥ
dharmakāryāṇikurvīta hyetadvijñānamucyate
yathā bhūtāpramādaṃ tusatyamāhurmanīṣiṇaḥ
damaḥ śarīroparatiḥ śamaḥ prajṣāprasādataḥ
adhyātmamakṣaraṃ vidyā yatra gatvānaśocati
sākṣādevahṛṣīkeśastajjñānamitikīrtitam
nahidehaṃ vināviṣṇuḥ puruṣairvidyateparaḥ
bhūtānāṃ priyakārīsyānnaparadrohakarmadhīḥ
navedadevatāniṃ dāṃ kuryāttaiś ca nasaṃ vaset
iti śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe svargakhaṇḍe catuḥ paṣcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ
paṣcapaṣcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
nahiṃ syāt sarvabhūtāninānṛtaṃ vāvadetkvacit
nāhitaṃ nāiṃ prayaṃ vācyaṃ nastenaḥ syātkadācana
tṛṇaṃ vāyadivāśākaṃ mṛdaṃ vājalamevaca
narājṣaḥ pratigṛhṇīyānnaśūdrātpatitād api
nacānyasmādaśaktaścenniṃ ditānvarjayedbudhaḥ
prāṇānapaharatyevaṃ yācakas tasya durmateḥ
nadevadravyahārīsyādviśeṣeṇadvijottamaḥ
naviṣaṃ viṣamityāhurbrahmasvaṃ viṣamucyate
puṣpaṃ śākodakaṃ kāṣṭhaṃ tathā mūlaṃ phalaṃ tṛṇam
adattāni canasteyaṃ manuḥ prāhaprajāpatiḥ
gṛhītavyānipuṣpāṇidevārcanavidhaudvijaḥ
tṛṇaṃ kāṣṭhaṃ phalaṃ puṣpaṃ prakāśaṃ vaiharedbudhaḥ
tilam udgayavādīnāṃ muṣṭir grāhyā pathisthitaiḥ
nadharmasyāpadeśenapāpaṃ kṛtvāvrataṃ caret
vratenapāpaṃ vyāguhyakurvanstrīśūdradaṃ bhanam
aliṅgīliṅgiveṣeṇayovṛttimupatiṣṭhati
yācanaṃ yonisambandhaṃ sahavāsaṃ cabhāṣaṇam
devadrohādgurudrohaḥ koṭikoṭiguṇādhikaḥ
janāpavādonāstikyaṃ tasmātkoṭiguṇādhikam
gobhiś ca daivatairvipraiḥ kṛṣyārājopasevayā
kulānyakulatāṃ yānti yānihīnānidharmataḥ
kulānyakulatāṃ yānti brāhmaṇā'tikrameṇaca
anṛtātpāradāryācca tathā 'bhakṣ yasya bhakṣaṇāt
aśrotriyeṣu dānāccāvṛṣaleṣu tathaiva ca
vihitācārahīneṣu kṣipraṃ naśyativaikulam
śūdrarājyecanavasennapākhaṇḍajanairvṛte
kṛṣṇovā yatra caratimṛgonityaṃ svabhāvataḥ
puṇyāvāviśrutānadyas tatra vānivaseddvijaḥ
arddhakośaṃ nadīkūlaṃ varjayitvādvijottamaḥ
namūrkhairnāvaliptaiś ca nānyairjāyāvasāyibhiḥ
ekaśayyāsanepaṃ ktirbhāṇḍepakvānnamiśraṇam
ekādaśasamuddiṣṭādoṣāḥ sāṃ karyasaṃ sthitāḥ
samīpecāpyavasthānāt pāpaṃ saṃ kramate nṛṇām
ekapaṃ ktyupaviṣṭāyenaspṛśanti parasparam
bhasmanākṛtamaryyādānateṣāṃ saṃ karo bhavet
dvāreṇastaṃ bhamārgeṇaṣaḍbhiḥ paṃ ktirvibhidyate
nakuryācchuṣkavairāṇivivādaṃ nacapaiśunam
parakṣetregāṃ caraṃ tīṃ nacācakṣītakarhicit
nasaṃ vasetsūcakenanakaṃ vaimarmaṇispṛśet
na sūryapariveṣaṃ vā nendracāpaṃ parāhnikam
parasmai kathayed vidvān śaśinaṃ vātha kāṣcanam
ātmanaḥ pratikūlānipareṣāṃ nasamācaret
tithiṃ pakṣasyanabrūyānnakṣatrāṇinanirdiśet
nodakyāmabhibhāṣetanāśuciṃ vādvijottamaḥ
nadevaguruviprāṇāṃ dīyamānaṃ tuvārayet
nacātmānaṃ praśaṃ sedvāparaniṃ dāṃ cavarjayet
vedaniṃ dāṃ devaniṃ dāṃ prayatnenavivarjayet
yas tudevānṛṣīṃ ś caiva vedānvāniṃ datedvijaḥ
na tasya niṣkṛtirdṛṣṭāśāstreṣvihamunīśvarāḥ
niṃ dayedvāguruṃ devaṃ vedaṃ vāsopabṛṃ haṇam
kalpakoṭiśataṃ sāgraṃ rauravepacyatenaraḥ
tūṣṇīmāsītaniṃ dāyāṃ nabrūyātiṃ kaciduttaram
vivādaṃ svajanaiḥ sārdhaṃ nakuryādvaikadācana
napāpaṃ pāpināṃ brūyādapāpaṃ vādvijottamaḥ
nṛṇāṃ mithyābhiśastānāṃ patanty aśrūṇirodanāt
tāniputrānpaśūnghnanti teṣāṃ mithyābhiśaṃ sinām
dṛṣṭaṃ vaiśodhanaṃ vṛddhairnāstimithyābhiśaṃ sane
nekṣetodyaṃ tamādityaṃ śaśinaṃ vā'nimittataḥ
nāstaṃ yāntaṃ navāristhaṃ nopaspṛṣṭaṃ namadhyagam
tirohitaṃ samīkṣetanādarśādyanugāminam
nanagnāṃ striyamīkṣetapuruṣaṃ vākadācana
nacamūpurīṣaṃ vānacasaṃ sṛṣṭamaithunam
nāśuciḥ sūryasomādīngrahānālokayedbudhaḥ
nābhibhāṣetacaparamucchiṣṭovāvaguṃ ṭhitaḥ
natailodakayośchāyāṃ napaṃ ktiṃ bhojanesati
nāśnīyādbhāryayāsārdhaṃ naināmīkṣetacāśnatīm
kṣuvatīṃ jṛṃ bhamāṇāṃ vānāsanasthāṃ yathā sukham
nodakecātmanorūpaṃ śubhaṃ vāśubhamevavā
nalaṃ ghayeccamatimānnādhitiṣṭhetkadācana
naśūdrāyamatiṃ dadyātkṛsaraṃ pāyasamdadhi
nocchiṣṭaṃ vāmadhudhṛtaṃ nacakṛṣṇājinaṃ haviḥ
lobhaṃ daṃ bhaṃ tathā śāṭhyaṃ hmasūyāṃ jñānakutsanam
īrṣyāṃ madaṃ tathā śokaṃ mohaṃ capar ivarjayet
nakuryāt kasyacit pīḍāṃ sutaṃ śiṣyaṃ tutāḍayet
nahīnānupasevetanacatṛṣṇāmatiḥ kvacit
naviśiṣṭamasatkuryānnātmānaṃ vāsanādbudhaḥ
nanakhenalikhedbhūmiṃ gāṃ casaṃ veśayannahi
nanadīṣunadīṃ brūyātparvateṣu caparvatān
śirobhyaṃ gāvaśiṣṭenatailenāṃ gaṃ nalepayet
nasarpaśastraiḥ krīḍetasvānikhāninasaṃ spṛśet
romāṇicarahasyānināśiṣṭenasahavrajet
napāṇipādavāṅnetracāpalyaṃ samupāśrayet
naśiśnodaracāpalyaṃ nacaśravaṇayoḥ kvacit
nacāṃ ganakhavādyaṃ vaikuryānnāṃ jalināpibet
nābhihanyājjalaṃ padbhyāṃ pāṇināvākadācana
naśātayediṣṭikābhirmūlāni caphalāni ca
namlecchabhāṣaṇaṃ śikṣennākarṣeccapadāsanam
kuryādvimarddanaṃ dhīmānnākasmādevaniṣphalam
notsaṅgebhakṣayedbhakṣyaṃ vṛthāceṣṭāṃ nacācaret
nanṛtyedathavāgāyennavāditrāṇivādayet
nasaṃ hatābhyāṃ pāṇibhyāṃ kaṇḍūyedātmanaḥ śiraḥ
nākṣaiḥ krīḍennadhāvetanāpsuviṇmūtramācaret
nocchiṣṭaḥ saṃ viśennityaṃ nanagnaḥ srānamācaret
nagacchaṃ stupaṭhedvāpina caiva svaśiraḥ spṛśet
nābālātapamāsevetpretadhūmaṃ vivarjayet
nākāraṇādvāniṣṭhīvennabāhubhyāṃ nadīṃ taret
napādakṣālanaṃ kuryātpādenaivakadācana
nāgnaupratāpayetpādaunakāṃ syedhāvayedbudhaḥ
nābhiprasārayeddevaṃ brāhmaṇāngāmathāpivā
vāyvagninṛpaviprānvāsūryaṃ vāśaśinaṃ prati
aśuddhaḥ śayanaṃ pānaṃ svādhyāyaṃ snānabhojanam
naspṛśetpāṇinocchiṣṭoviprogobrāhmaṇānalān
nacālanaṃ padāvāpinadevapratimāṃ spṛśet
nāśuddhogniṃ paricarennadevānkīrtayedṛṣīn
nāvagāhedagādhāmbudhāvayennā'nimittataḥ
amedhyāliptamarhaṃ vālohitaṃ vāviṣāṇivā
caityavṛkṣaṃ navaichiṃ dyānnāpsuṣṭhīvanamācaret
nāsthibhasmakapālāninakeśānnacakaṃ ṭakān
tuṣāṃ gārakarīṣaṃ vānādhitiṣṭhetkadācana
nacāgniṃ laṃ ghayeddhīmānnopadadhyādadhaḥ kvacit
nacainaṃ pādataḥ kuryācchūrpeṇanadhamedbudhaḥ
navṛkṣamavarohetanāvekṣetāśuciḥ kvacit
suhṛnmaraṇamātraṃ vāsvayaṃ naśrāvayetparān
apaṇyaṃ kūṭapaṇyaṃ vāvikrayenaprayojayet
navahniṃ mukhaniḥśvāsairjvālayennāśucirbudhaḥ
puṇyasthānodakasthānesīmāntaṃ vāhayennatu
parasparaṃ paśūnvyāghrānpakṣiṇonacayodhayet
parabādhāṃ nakurvīta jalavātātapādibhiḥ
kārayitvāsukarmāṇigurūnpaścānnavaṣcayet
sāyaṃ prātargṛhadvārānrakṣārthaṃ parighaṭṭayet
vigṛhyavādaṃ kṛtvāvāpraveśaṃ cavivarjayet
nakhādanbrāhmaṇastiṣṭhennajalpedvāhasedbudhaḥ
napakṣakeṇopadhamennaśūrpeṇacapāṇinā
mukhenāgniṃ samiṃ dhītamukhādagnira jāyata
parastriyaṃ nabhāṣetanāyājyaṃ yājayedbudhaḥ
nadevāyatanaṃ gacchetkadācidvā'pradakṣiṇam
napīḍayedvāvastrāṇinadevāyatanesvapet
navyādhidūṣitairvāpinaśūdraiḥ patitenavā
naniṃ dedyoginaḥ siddhānvratinovāyatīṃs tathā
devatāyatanaṃ prājṣādevānāṃ caiva satriṇām
nākrāmetkāmataśchāyāṃ brāhmaṇānāṃ cagorapi
svāṃ tunākrāmayecchāyāṃ patitādyairnaro gibhiḥ
nāṃ gārabhasmakeśādiṣvadhitiṣṭhetkadācana
nabhakṣayedabhakṣyāṇināpeyaṃ capibeddvijaḥ
iti śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe svargakhaṇḍe paṣcapaṣcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ
ṣaṭpaṣcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
nādyācchūdrasyavipronnaṃ mohādvāyadikāmataḥ
ṣaṇmāsānyodvijobhuṅkteśudrasyānnaṃ vigarhitam
jīvannevabhavecchūdromṛtaḥ śvācābhi jāyate
brāhmaṇakṣatriyaviśāṃ śūdrasyacamunīśvarāḥ
rājānnaṃ vartakānnaṃ caṣaṇḍhānnaṃ carmmakāriṇām
gaṇānnaṃ gaṇikānnaṃ caṣaḍannaṃ cavivarjayet
gāṃ dharvalohakārānnaṃ mṛtakānnaṃ vivarjayet
kulālacitrakārānnaṃ vārdhuṣeḥ pati tasya ca
suvarṇakāraśailūṣavyādhavaṃ dhyāturasyaca
cikitsakasya caivānnaṃ puṃścalyā daṇḍakasya ca
somavikrayiṇaścānnaṃ śvapākasyaviśeṣataḥ
pāpīyonnaṃ casaṅghānnaṃ śastrājīvasya caiva hi
brahmadviṣaḥ pāparuceḥ śrāddhānnaṃ mṛtakasyaca
vṛthāpākasyacaivānnaṃ śāvānnaṃ cāturasyaca
aprajānāṃ tunārīṇāṃ kṛtaghnasya tathaiva ca
kārukānnaṃ viśeṣeṇaśastravikrayiṇas tathā
śauṇḍānnaṃ ghāṃ ṭikānnaṃ cabhiṣajāmannamevaca
punarbhuvoviśeṣeṇa tathaiva didhiṣūpateḥ
avajṣātaṃ cāvadhūtaṃ saroṣaṃ vismayānvitam
yoyasyānnaṃ samaśnātisatasyāśnātikilbiṣam
arddhakākulaṃ mitraṃ cagopālovāhanāpitau
eteśūdreṣu bhojyānnāyaścātmānaṃ nivedayet
kuśīlavaḥ kuṃ bhakaś ca kṣetrakarmaka evaca
eteśūdreṣu bhojyānnā dṛṣṭvā svalpaguṇambudhaiḥ
piṇyākaṃ caiva tailaṃ caśūdrādgrāhyaṃ dvijātibhiḥ
vṛṃ tākaṃ nālikāśākaṃ kusuṃ bhaṃ bhasmakaṃ tathā
palāṇḍuṃ laśunaṃ śuktaṃ niryyāsaṃ caiva varjayet
chatrākaṃ viḍvarāhaṃ casvinnaṃ pīyūṣamevaca
gṛṃ janaṃ kiṃ śukaṃ caiva kūṣmāṇḍaṃ ca tathaiva ca
tathā kṛsarasaṃ yāvaupāyasāpūpamevaca
anupākṛtamāṃ saṃ cadevānnānihavīṃ ṣica
yavāgūṃ mātuliṅgaṃ camatsyānapyanupākṛtān
piṇyākaṃ coddhṛtasnehaṃ devadhānyaṃ tathaiva ca
nāśnīyātpayasātakraṃ nābhakṣyānupayojayet
kṛmiduṣṭaṃ bhāvaduṣṭaṃ mṛtsaṃ sargaṃ cavarjayet
kṛmikīṭāvapannaṃ casuhṛtkledaṃ canityaśaḥ
śvāghrātaṃ capunaḥ siddhaṃ caṇḍālāvekṣitaṃ tathā
asaṅgataṃ paryyuṣitaṃ paryastānnaṃ canityaśaḥ
kākakukkuṭasaṃ spṛṣṭaṃ kṛmibhiś caiva saṅgatam
manuṣyairapyavaghrātaṃ kuṣṭhināspṛṣṭamevaca
narajasvalayādattaṃ napuṃ ś ca lyāsarogayā
vivatsāyāś ca gokṣīraṃ meṣasyānirdaśasyaca
āvikaṃ samdhinīkṣīramapeyaṃ manurabravīt
balākaṃ haṃ sadātyūhaṃ kalaviṃ kaṃ śukaṃ tathā
vāyasānkhaṃ jarīṭāṃ ś ca śyenaṃ gṛdhraṃ tathaiva ca
ulūkaṃ cakravākaṃ cabhāsampārāvataṃ tathā
kapotaṃ ṭiṭṭibhaṃ caiva grāmakukkuṭamevaca
siṃ haṃ vyāghraṃ camārjāraṃ śvānaṃ sūkaramevaca
śṛgālaṃ markaṭaṃ caiva garddabhaṃ nacabhakṣayet
jalecarānasthalacarānprāṇinaścetidhāraṇā
godhākūrmaḥ śaśaḥ khaḍgaḥ sallakaścetisattamāḥ
bhakṣyānpaṣcanakhānnityaṃ manurāhaprajāpatiḥ
matsyānsaśalkānbhuṣjītamāṃ saṃ rauravamevaca
vārdhrīṇasambakaṃ bhakṣyaṃ mīnaṃ haṃ samparājitam
śapharīsiṃ hatuṇḍaṃ ca tathā pāṭhīnaro hitau
matsyāś ca itesamuddiṣṭābhakṣaṇīyādvijottamāḥ
prokṣitaṃ bhakṣayedeṣāṃ māṃ saṃ cadvijakāmyayā
yathā vidhiprayuktaṃ caprāṇānāmapicātyaye
bhakṣayennaivamāṃ sāniśeṣabhojīnalipyate
auṣadhārthamaśaktovāniyogādyajṣakāraṇāt
āmantritaś ca yaḥ śrāddhedaivevāmāṃ samutsṛjet
yāvanti paśuromāṇitāvannarakamṛcchati
adeyaṃ vāpyapeyaṃ vātathaivāspṛśyamevavā
dvijātīnāmanālokyaṃ nityaṃ madyamitisthitiḥ
bhakṣayitvāpyabhakṣyāṇipītvā'peyānyapidvijaḥ
nādhikārībhavettāvadyāvattannajahātyadhaḥ
iti śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe svargakhaṇḍe bhakṣyābhakṣyaniyamo
nāmaṣaṭpaṣcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ
saptapaṣcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
brahmaṇābhihitaṃ pūrvamṛṣīṇāṃ brahmavādinām
arthānāmucitaṃ pātreśraddhayāpratipādanam
yodadātiviśiṣṭebhyaḥ śraddhayāparayāyutaḥ
tadvaidattamahaṃ manyeśeṣaṃ kasyāpirakṣati
yattupāpopaśāṃ tyarthaṃ dīyateviduṣāṃ kare
dānaṃ tatkāmyamākhyātamṛṣibhirdharmaciṃ takaiḥ
dānadharmaṃ niṣevetapātramāsādyaśaktitaḥ
śrotriyāyakulīnāyavinītāyatapasvine
yas tudadyānmahīṃ bhaktyābrāhmaṇāyāhitāgnaye
sayātiparamaṃ sthānaṃ yatra gatvānaśocati
ikṣubhiḥ saṃ yutāṃ bhūmiṃ yavagodhūmaśālinīm
brāhmaṇāyadaridrāya sarvapāpaiḥ pramucyate
bhūmidānātparaṃ dānaṃ vidyatenehakiṃ cana
annadānaṃ tenatulyaṃ vidyādānaṃ tatodhikam
yobrāhmaṇāyaśāṃ tāyaśucayedharmaśīline
dadyādaharahaḥ svarṇaṃ śraddhayābrahmacāriṇe
gṛhasthāyānnadānenaphalamāpnotimānavaḥ
annamevāsyadātavyaṃ dattvāpnotiparāṃ gatim
vaiśākhyāṃ pūrṇamāsyāṃ tubrāhmaṇānsaptapaṣcavā
upoṣyavidhināśāntaḥ śuciḥ prayatamānasaḥ
pūjayitvātilaiḥ kṛṣṇairmadhunācaviśeṣataḥ
yāvajjīvaṃ tuyat pāpaṃ tatkṣaṇādevanaśyati
kṛṣṇājinetilānkṛtvāhiraṇyaṃ madhusarpiṣī
ghṛtānnamudakuṃ bhaṃ cavaiśākhyāṃ tuviśeṣataḥ
māghamāsetamisretudvādaśyāṃ samupoṣitaḥ
śuklāṃ baradharaḥ kṛṣṇaistilairhutvāhutāśanam
amāvāsyāmanuprāpyabrāhmaṇāyatapasvine
prīyatāmīśvaroviṣṇurhṛṣīkeśaḥ sanātanaḥ
saptajanmakṛtaṃ pāpaṃ tatkṣaṇādevanaśyati
yas tukṛṣṇacaturdaśyāṃ snātvā devaṃ pinākinam
kṛṣṇāṣṭamyāṃ viśeṣeṇadhārmikāyadvijātaye
snātvā bhyarcya yathā nyāyaṃ pādaprakṣālanādibhiḥ
prīyatāṃ memahādevodadyāddravyaṃ svakīyakam
dvijaiḥ kṛṣṇacaturdaśyāṃ kṛṣṇāṣṭamyāṃ viśeṣataḥ
amāvāsyāṃ tathā bhaktaiḥ pūjanīyastrivikramaḥ
ekādaśyāṃ nirāhārodvādaśyāṃ puruṣottamam
eṣātithirvaiṣṇavīsyāddvādaśīśuklapakṣataḥ
yatiṃ kaciddevamīśānamuddiśyabrāhmaṇeśucau
dīyateviṣṇumevāpitadanaṃ taphalaṃ smṛtam
yohiyāṃ devatāmicchetsamārādhayituṃ naraḥ
brāhmaṇānpūjayedyatnātsatasyāstoṣayettataḥ
dvijānāṃ vapurāsthāyanityanti ṣṭhanti devatāḥ
pūjyaṃ tebrāhmaṇālābhepratimādiṣutaiḥ kvacit
dvijeṣu devatānityaṃ pūjanīyāviśeṣataḥ
vibhūtikāmaḥ satataṃ pūjayeddhipuraṃ daram
brahmavarcasakāmas tu brahmāṇaṃ jñānakāmukaḥ
karmaṇāṃ siddhikāmas tu pūjayed vai vināyakam
bhogakāmas tu śaśinaṃ balakāmaḥ samīraṇam
ye vāṣchanti mahābhogān jṣānāni ca maheśvaram
te pūjayanti bhūteśaṃ keśavaṣcāpi bhoginaḥ
tailapradaḥ prajām iṣṭāṃ dīpadaś cakṣur uttamam
bhūmidaḥ sarvam āpnotidīrghamāyurhiraṇyadaḥ
gṛhadātāgryaveśmānirūpyadorūpam uttamam
annadātāśriyaṃ sveṣṭāṃ godobrāhmaṇaviṣṭapam
yānaśayyāpradobhāryyāmaiśvaryamabhayapradaḥ
dhānyadaḥ śāśvataṃ saukhyaṃ brahmadobrahmaśāśvatam
dhānyānyapi yathā śaktivipreṣu pratipādayet
vedavidyāviśiṣṭeṣu pretyasvargaṃ samaśnute
gavāṃ cānnapradānena sarvapāpaiḥ pramucyate
iṃ dhanānāṃ pradānenadīptāgnir jāyate naraḥ
phalamūlānipānāniśākānivividhāni ca
auṣadhaṃ snehamāhāraṃ rogiṇorogaśāntaye
asipatravanaṃ mārgaṃ kṣuradhārāsamanvitam
tīkṣṇatāpaṣcataratichatropānatpradonaraḥ
yadyadiṣṭatamaṃ lokeyaccāsyāpekṣitaṃ gṛhe
saṃ krāṃ tyādiṣukāleṣu dattaṃ bhavaticākṣayam
prayāgādiṣutīrtheṣu puṇyeṣvāyataneṣu ca
dattvācākṣayamāpnotinadīprasravaṇeṣu ca
dānadharmātparodharmobhūtānāṃ nehavidyate
tasmādviprāyadātavyaṃ śrotriyāyadvijātibhiḥ
svargāyabhūtikāmena tathā pāpopaśāntaye
mumukṣuṇātudātavyaṃ brāhmaṇebhyas tathā nvaham
dīyamānaṃ tuyomohādgoviprāgnisureṣu ca
yas tudravyārjanaṃ kṛtvānārcayedbrāhmaṇānsurān
sarvasvamapahṛtyainaṃ rājārāṣṭrātpravāsayet
mriyamāṇeṣu vipreṣu brāhmaṇaḥ satugarhitaḥ
natasmātpratigṛhṇīyuḥ navaseyuś ca tenahi
ājṣāyitvāsvakādrāṣṭrādrājātaṃ vipravāsayet
sapūrvābhyadhikaḥ pāpīnarakepacyatenaraḥ
nacamūrkhamavṛttasthaṃ daśarātramupoṣitam
satenakarmaṇāpāpīdahatyāsaptamaṃ kulam
yorcitaṃ pratigṛhṇīyāddadyādarcitam evaca
napākhaṇḍeṣu sarveṣu nāvedavididharmavit
rūpyaṃ caiva hiraṇyaṃ cagāmaśvaṃ pṛthivīṃ tilān
avidvānpratigṛhṇīyādbhasmībhavatikāṣṭhavat
apirājanyavaiśyābhyāṃ natuśūdrāt kathaṃ cana
vedānadhītyasakalānyajṣāṃ ścāvāpya sarvaśaḥ
natāṃ gatim avāpnoti santo ṣādyām avāpnuyāt
sthityarthādadhikaṃ gṛhṇanbrāhmaṇoyātyadhogatim
guruṃ bhṛtyāṃ ścojjihīrṣustarpayandevatātithīn
sarvataḥ pratigṛhṇīyānnatutṛpyetsvayaṃ tataḥ
evaṃ gṛhasthoyuktātmādevatātithipūjakaḥ
vartamānaḥ saṃ yatātmāyātitatparamaṃ padam
putreṣu bhāryāṃ nikṣipyagatvāraṇyaṃ tutattvavit
ekākīvicarennityamudāsīnaḥ samāhitaḥ
eṣavaḥ kathitodharmogṛhasthānāṃ dvijottamāḥ
jṣātvātutiṣṭhenniyataṃ tathā nuṣṭhāpayeddvijān
iti śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe svargakhaṇḍe gṛhasthadharmanirṇayo
nāmasaptapaṣcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ
aṣṭapaṣcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
evaṃ gṛhāśramesthitvādvitīyaṃ bhāgamāyuṣaḥ
vānaprasthāśramaṃ gacchetsadāraḥ sāgnirevaca
nikṣipyabhāryāṃ putreṣu gacchedvanamathāpivā
dṛṣṭvā pat yasya vāpatyaṃ jarjarīkṛtavigrahaḥ
śuklapakṣasyapūrvāhṇepraśastecottarāyaṇe
gatvāraṇyaṃ niyamavāṃ stapaḥ kuryātsamāhitaḥ
phalamūlānipūtāninityamāhāramāharet
yadāhāro bhavettenapūjayetpitṛdevatāḥ
pūjayedanti thiṃ nityaṃ snātvā cābhyarcayetsurān
gṛhādādāyacāśnīyādaṣṭaugrāsānsamāhitaḥ
jaṭāś ca bibhṛyānnityaṃ nakharomāṇinotsṛjet
svādhyāyaṃ sarvathākuryānniyacchedvācamanyataḥ
agnihotraṃ cajuhuyātpaṣcayajṣānsamācaret
cīravāsābhavennityaṃ snāyāttriṣavaṇaṃ śuciḥ
ṛtviṣṭyāgrayaṇe caiva cāturmāsyānikārayet
uttarāyaṇaṃ cakramaśodakṣiṇāyanamevaca
vāsaṃ taśāradairmeddhayairutpannaiḥ svayamāhṛtaiḥ
puroḍāśāṃ ś ca rūṃ ś caiva vidhivannirvapetpṛthak
devatābhyaḥ pitṛbhyaś ca dattvāmedhyataraṃ haviḥ
śeṣaṃ samupabhuṣjītalavaṇaṃ casvayaṃ kṛtam
bhūstṛṇaṃ śaṣpakaṃ caiva śleṣmātakaphalāni ca
naphālakṛṣṭamaśnīyādutsṛṣṭamapikenacit
nagrāmajātānyārtopipuṣpāṇicaphalāni ca
śrāvaṇenaivavidhināvahniṃ paricaretsadā
nanaktaṃ kiṃ cidaśnīyādrātraudhyānaparo bhavet
bhūmauśayītasatataṃ sāvitrījapyatatparaḥ
śaraṇyaḥ sarvabhūtānāṃ sadvibhāgaparaḥ sadā
parivādaṃ mṛṣāvādaṃ nidrālasyecavarjayet
ekāgniraniketaḥ syātprokṣitāṃ bhūmimāśrayet
śilāyāṃ śarkarāyāṃ vāśayītasusamāhitaḥ
sadyaḥ prakṣālakovāsyānmāsasaṃ cayikopivā
ṣaṇmāsanicayovāpisamāni caya evavā
naktaṃ cānnaṃ samaśnīyāddivācāhṛtyaśaktitaḥ
caturthakālakovāsyātkiṃ vāpyaṣṭamakālikaḥ
cāṃ drāyaṇavidhānairvāśuklekṛṣṇecavarjayet
pakṣepakṣesamaśnīyādyavāgūṃ kvathitāṃ sakṛt
svābhāvikaiḥ svayaṃ śīrṇairvaikhānasamatesthitaḥ
grīṣmepaṣcatapāś ca syādvarṣāsvabhrāvakāśikaḥ
ārdravāsāś ca hemaṃ tekramaśovarddhayettapaḥ
upaspṛśettriṣavaṇaṃ pitṛdevāṃ ś ca tarpayet
ekapādenatiṣṭhetamarīciṃ vāpibetsadā
paṣcāgnidhūmagovāsyādūṣmagaḥ somapopivā
payaḥ pibec chuklapakṣe kṛṣṇapakṣe tu gomayam
śīrṇaparṇāśanovāsyātkṛcchrairvāvartayetsadā
yogābhyāsarataś ca syādrudrādhyāyībhavetsadā
atharvaśirasodhyetāvedāṃ tābhyāsatatparaḥ
yamānsevetasatataṃ niyamāṃ ścāpyatandritaḥ
tāpaseṣvevavipreṣu yātrikaṃ bhaikṣamāharet
gṛhamedhiṣucānyeṣu dvijeṣu vanacāriṣu
grāmādāhṛtyacāśnīyādaṣṭaugrāsānvanevasan
pratigṛhyapuṭenaivapāṇināśakalenavā
vidyāviśeṣānsāvitrīṃ rudrādhyāyaṃ tathaiva ca
mahāprasthānikaṃ vāsaukuryādanaśanaṃ tathā
iti śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe svargakhaṇḍe vānaprasthāśramācāradharmo
nāmāṣṭapaṣcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ
ekonaṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
evaṃ vanāśramesthitvātṛtīyaṃ bhāgamāyuṣaḥ
caturthaṃ cāyuṣobhāgaṃ saṃ nyāsenanayetkramāt
yogābhyāsarataḥ śāṃ tobrahmavidyāparāyaṇaḥ
prājāpatyāṃ nirūpyeṣṭimāgneyīmathavāpunaḥ
dāntaḥ śuklakaṣāyosaubrahmāśramamupāśrayet
jñānasaṃ nyāsinaḥ kecidvedasaṃ nyāsino'pare
karmasaṃ nyāsinastvanyetrividhāḥ parikīrtitāḥ
procyatejñānasaṃ nyāsīātmanyevavyavasthitaḥ
vedamevābhyasennityaṃ nirāśīrniṣparigrahaḥ
yastvagnimātmasākṛtvābrahmārpaṇaparodvijaḥ
jṣeyaḥ sakarmasaṃ nyāsīmahāyajṣaparāyaṇaḥ
trayāṇāmapicaiteṣāṃ jṣānītvabhyadhikomataḥ
na tasya vidyatekāryaṃ naliṅgaṃ vāvipaścitaḥ
nirmamonirbhayaḥ śāṃ tonirdvaṃ dvaḥ parṇabhojanaḥ
jīrṇakaupīnavāsāḥ syānnagnovādhyānatatparaḥ
brahmacārījitāhārogrāmādannaṃ samāharet
adhyātmaratirāsītanirapekṣonirāśiṣaḥ
nābhinaṃ detamaraṇaṃ nābhinaṃ detajīvanam
kālamevapratīkṣetanirdeśaṃ bhṛtako yathā
evaṃ jñānaparoyogībrahmabhūyāyakalpate
ekavāsāthavāvidvānkaupīnācchādanopivā
muṇḍīśikhīvāthabhavettridaṇḍīniṣparigrahaḥ
kāṣāyavāsāḥ satataṃ dhyānayogaparāyaṇaḥ
grāmāṃ tevṛkṣamūlevāvaseddevālayepivā
samaḥ śatrau tathā mitre tathā mānāpamānayoḥ
yas tumohenavānyasmādekānnādībhavedyatiḥ
na tasya niṣkṛtiḥ kāciddharmaśāstreṣu dṛśyate
rāgadveṣaviyuktātmāsamaloṣṭāśmakāṣcanaḥ
prāṇihiṃ sānivṛttaś ca maunīsyāt sarvanispṛhaḥ
dṛṣṭipūtaṃ nyasetpādaṃ vastrapūtaṃ jalaṃ pibet
satyapūtāṃ vadedvāṇīṃ manaḥ pūtaṃ samācaret
snātvā śaucayutonityaṃ kamaṇḍalukaraḥ śuciḥ
mokṣaśāstreṣu niratobrahmasūtrījitendriyaḥ
daṃ bhāhaṃ kāranirmuktoniṃ dāpaiśunyavarjitaḥ
ātmajñānaguṇopetoyadimokṣam avāpnuyāt
snātvā camyavidhānenaśucirdevālayādiṣu
yajṣopavītīśāṃ tātmākuśapāṇiḥ samāhitaḥ
dhautakāṣāyavasanotasmiṣchannatanūruhaḥ
ādhyātmikaṃ casatataṃ vedāntābhihitaṃ yat
kṣamādayācasanto ṣovratān yasya viśeṣataḥ
vedāntajñānaniṣṭhovāpaṣcayajṣānsamāhitaḥ
homamantrānjapennityaṃ kālekālesamāhitaḥ
svādhyāyaṃ cānvahaṃ kuryātsāvitrīṃ samdhyayorjapet
dhyāyītasatataṃ devamekāntaṃ parameśvaram
ekavāsādvivāsāvāśikhīyajṣopavītavān
kamaṇḍalukarovidvāṃ stridaṇḍoyātitatparam
iti śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe svargakhaṇḍe yatidharmanirūpaṇaṃ
nāmaikonaṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ
ṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
evaṃ tvāśramaniṣṭhānāṃ yatīnāṃ niyatātmanām
bhaikṣyeṇavartanaṃ proktaṃ phalamūlairathāpivā
godohamātranti ṣṭhetakālaṃ bhikṣuradhomukhaḥ
bhikṣetyuktvāsakṛttūṣṇīmādadyādvāgyataḥ śuciḥ
prakṣyālyapāṇīpādauca samācamya yathā vidhi
ādityaṃ darśayitvānnaṃ bhuṣjītaprāṅmukhonaraḥ
hutvāprāṇāhutīḥ paṣcagrāsānaṣṭausamāhitaḥ
ācamyadevaṃ bahmāṇaṃ dhyāyetaparameśvaram
ālābudārupātrecamṛṇmayaṃ vaiṇavaṃ tathā
catvāriyatipātrāṇimanurāhaprajāpatiḥ
samdhyāsūktiviśeṣeṇaciṃ tayennityamīśvaram
kṛtvāhṛtpadmanilayeviśvākhyaṃ viśvasambhavam
ātmānaṃ sarvabhūtānāṃ parastāttamasaḥ sthitam
pradhānapuruṣātītamākāśaṃ dahanaṃ śivam
tadaṃ taṃ sarvabhāvānāmīśvaraṃ brahmarūpiṇam
oṃ kārāṃ tethavātmānaṃ samāpyaparamātmani
ākāśedevamīśānaṃ dhyāyītākāśamadhyagam
kāraṇaṃ sarvabhāvānāmānaṃ daikasamāśrayam
purāṇapuruṣaṃ viṣṇuṃ dhyāyanmucyetabandhanāt
jīvanaṃ sarvabhūtānāṃ yatra lokaḥ pralīyate
ānaṃ daṃ brahmaṇaḥ sūkṣmaṃ yatpaśyanti mumukṣavaḥ
anaṃ taṃ satyamīśānaṃ viciṃ tyāsītavāgyataḥ
guhyādguhyatamaṃ jñānaṃ yatīnāmetadīritam
tasmājjñānaratonityamātmavidyāparāyaṇaḥ
ānaṃ damakṣaraṃ jñānaṃ dhyāyetacatataḥ param
yasmādbhavanti bhūtāniyajjṣātvāneha jāyate
satasmādīśvaro devaḥ parastādyodhitiṣṭhati
yadantar etadgamanaṃ śāśvataṃ śivamavyayam
yaidaṃ svaparokṣastusadevaḥ syānmaheśvaraḥ
vratāniyānibhikṣūṇāntathaivāyaṃ vratāni ca
ekaikātikrameṇaivaprāyaścittaṃ vidhīyate
upetyacastriyaṃ kāmātprāyaścittaṃ samāhitaḥ
prāṇāyāmasamāyuktaṃ kuryātsāntapanaṃ śuciḥ
tataś ca retaniyamātkṛcchraṃ saṃ yatamānasaḥ
nadharmayuktamanṛtaṃ hinastītimanīṣiṇaḥ
tathā picanakartavyaḥ prasaṅgohyeṣadāruṇaḥ
ekarātropavāsaś ca prāṇāyāmaśataṃ tathā
hiṃ sācaivāparātṛṣṇāyācṣātmajñānanāśikā
yadetaddraviṇaṃ nāmaprāṇāhyetebahiś ca rāḥ
evaṃ kṛtvāsaduṣṭātmābhinnavṛttovratacyutaḥ
akasmādevahiṃ sāṃ tuyadibhikṣuḥ samācaret
kuryātkṛcchrātikṛcchraṃ tucāṃ drāyaṇamathāpivā
skaṃ detendriyadaurbalyātstriyaṃ dṛṣṭvā yatiryadi
tenadhārayitavyāvaiprāṇāyāmāstuṣoḍaśa
divāskaṃ detrirātraṃ syātprāṇāyāmaśatambudhāḥ
pratyakṣalavaṇecoktaṃ prājāpatyaṃ viśodhanam
tasmānnārāyaṇaṃ dhyātvā tasya dhyānaparo bhavet
yadbrahmaṇaḥ paraṃ jyotiḥ praviṣṭākṣaramavyayam
yoṃ tarātmāparaṃ brahmasavijṣeyomaheśvaraḥ
eṣadevomahādevaḥ kevalaḥ paramaṃ śivaḥ
tadevākṣaramadvaitaṃ tadānityaṃ paraṃ padam
tasmānmahīyatedevesvadhāmnijñānasaṃ jṣite
ātmayogātparetatvemahādevastataḥ smṛtaḥ
nānyaṃ devaṃ mahādevādvyatiriktaṃ prapaśyati
manyaṃ teyesvamātmānaṃ vibhinnaṃ parameśvarāt
natepaśyanti taṃ devaṃ vṛthāteṣāṃ pariśramaḥ
tasmādyatetaniyataṃ yatiḥ saṃ yatamānasaḥ
jñānayogarataḥ śāṃ tomahādevaparāyaṇaḥ
eṣavaḥ kathitoviprāyatīnāmāśramaḥ śubhaḥ
pitāmahenamunināvibhunāpūrvamīritaḥ
jñānaṃ svayaṃ bhuvāproktaṃ yatidharmāśrayaṃ śivam
iti śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe svargakhaṇḍe ṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ
ekaṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ
sūta uvāca
evam uktā purā viprā vyāsenāmitatejasā
etāvad uktvā bhagavān vyāsaḥ satyavatīsutaḥ
samāśvāsya munīn sarvān jagāma ca yathā gatam
evaṃ kṛtvā priyo viṣṇor bhavaty eva na cānyathā
rahasyaṃ tatra vakṣyāmi śṛṇuta dvijasattamāḥ
ye cātra kathitā dharmā varṇāśramanibandhanāḥ
haribhaktikalāṃśāṃśasamānā na hi te dvijāḥ
kalau nārāyaṇaṃ devaṃ yajate yaḥ sa dharmabhāk
dāmodaraṃ hṛṣīkeśaṃ puruhūtaṃ sanātanam
hṛdi kṛtvā paraṃ śāntaṃ jitam eva jagat trayam
kalikāloragādaṃśāt kilbiṣāt kālakūṭataḥ
kiṃ japaiḥ śrīharer nāma gṛhītaṃ yadi mānuṣaiḥ
kiṃ snānair viṣṇupādāmbu mastake yena dhāryate
kiṃ yajṣena hareḥ pādapadmaṃ yena dhṛtaṃ hṛdi
kiṃ dānena hareḥ karma sabhāyāṃ vai prakāśitam
harer guṇagaṇān śrutvā yaḥ prahṛṣyet punaḥ punaḥ
samādhinā prahṛṣṭasya sā gatiḥ kṛṣṇacetasaḥ
tatra vighnakarāḥ proktāḥ pākhaṇḍālāpapeśalāḥ
nāryas tatsaṅginaś cāpi haribhaktivighātakāḥ
nārīṇāṃ nayanādeśaḥ surāṇām api durjayaḥ
haribhaktiḥ kutaḥ puṃsāṃ nārībhaktijuṣāṃ dvijāḥ
rākṣasyaḥ kāminīveṣāś ca ranti jagati dvijāḥ
narāṇāṃ buddhikavalaṃ kurvanti satataṃ hitāḥ
tāvat sunirmalā medhā sarvaśāstravidhāriṇī
tāvaj japas tapas tāvat tāvat tīrthaniṣevaṇam
tāvac ca guruśuśrūṣā tāvad dhitaraṇe matiḥ
tāvat satāṃ saṅgarucis tāvat paurāṇalālasā
yāvat sīmantinīlolanayanāṃ dolanaṃ na hi
tatra ye haripādābjamadhuleśaprasāditāḥ
teṣāṃ na nārīlolākṣikṣepaṇaṃ hi prabhur bhavet
janmajanmahṛṣīkeśasevanaṃ yaiḥ kṛtaṃ dvijāḥ
nārīṇāṃ kila kiṃ nāma saundaryaṃ paricakṣate
bhūṣaṇānāṃ ca vastrāṇāṃ cākacakyaṃ tad ucyate
snehātmajñānarahitaṃ nārīrūpaṃ kutaḥ smṛtam
pūyamūtrapurīṣāsṛktvaṅmedo’sthivasānvitam
tad evaṃ pṛthag ācintya spṛṣṭvā snātvā śucir bhavet
taiḥ saṃhitaṃ śarīraṃ hi dṛśyate sundaraṃ janaiḥ
aho’tidurdaśā nṝṇāṃ durdaivaghaṭitā dvijāḥ
kucāvṛte’ṅge puruṣo nārī buddhvā pravarttate
kā nārī vā pumān ko vā vicāre sati kiṃcana
tasmāt sarvātmanā sādhur nārīsaṅgaṃ vivarjayet
ko nāma nārīm āsādya siddhiṃ prāpnoti bhūtale
kāminī kāminīsaṅgisaṅgam ity api santyajet
tatsaṅgād rauravam iti sākṣād eva pratīyate
ajṣānāl lolupālokās tatra daivena vaṣcitāḥ
sākṣān narakakuṇḍe’smin nārīyonau pacen naraḥ
yata evāgataḥ pṛthvyāṃ tasminn eva punā ramet
tatrātikaṣṭaṃ loke’sminn aho daivaviḍambanā
punaḥ punā ramet tatra aho nistrapatā nṛṇām
tasmād vicārayed dhīmān nārīdoṣagaṇān bahūn
maithunād balahāniḥ syān nidrātitaruṇāyate
nidrayāpahṛtajñānaḥ svalpāyur jāyate naraḥ
tasmāt prayatnato dhīmān nārīṃ mṛtyum ivātmanaḥ
vihāya komahāmūḍho nārīpādaṃ hi sevate
janārdanāṅghrisevā hi hy apunarbhavadāyinī
nārīṇāṃ yonisevā hi yonisaṅkaṭakāriṇī
ūrdhvabāhur ahaṃ vacmi śṛṇu me paramaṃ vacaḥ
nārīsaṅgaṃ parityajyayaś cāpi par ivarttate
kulāṅganādaivayogādūḍhāyadinṛṇāṃ satī
tasya tuṣṭojagannāthobhavatyevanasaṃśayaḥ
nārīsaṅgohidharmajṣairasatsaṅgaḥ prakīrtyate
tasmiṃs tuṣṭejagattuṣṭaṃ prīṇiteprīṇitaṃ jagat
haraubhaktiṃ vinānṝṇāṃ vṛthājanmaprakīrtitam
nārāyaṇamanāvyaktaṃ nataṃ sevetakojanaḥ
tasya mātāmahābhāgāpitā tasya mahākṛtī
itīrayanti yemartyānateṣāṃ nirayegatiḥ
brāhmaṇāhiviśeṣeṇapratyakṣaṃ harirūpiṇaḥ
pūjayeyur yathā yogaṃ haristeṣāṃ prasīdati
viṣṇurbrāhmaṇarūpeṇavicaretpṛthivīmamām
dvijapādāmbubhaktyāyaiḥ pītvāśirasicārpiṃ tam
sākṣātkṛṣṇamukhedattaṃ tadvaibhuṅktehariḥ svayam
brāhmaṇānāmadhiṣṭhānātpṛthvīdhanyetigīyate
teṣāṃ pāṇaucayaddattaṃ haripāṇautadarpitam
tebhyaḥ kṛtānnamaskārāttiraskārohipāpmatām
tasmātsatāṃ samārādhyobrāhmaṇoviṣṇubuddhitaḥ
pretyapīpūṣadhārābhiḥ siṃ catekalpakoṭikam
dvijatuṇḍaṃ mahākṣetramanūṣaramakaṃ ṭakam
nānāsumiṣṭamannaṃ yodadātidvijatuṣṭaye
tasya lokāmahābhogāḥ koṭikalpāntamuktidāḥ
brāhmaṇaṃ capuraskṛtyabrāhmaṇenānukīrtitam
purāṇaṃ śṛṇuyānnityaṃ mahāpāpadavānalam
purāṇaṃ sarvatīrtheṣu tīrthaṃ cādhikamucyate
yathā sūryavapurbhūtvā prakāśāyacareddhariḥ
tathaivāntaḥ prakāśāyapurāṇāvayavohariḥ
vicaredihabhūteṣu purāṇaṃ pāvanaṃ param
tasmādyadihareḥ prīterutpādedhīyatematiḥ
śrotavyamaniśaṃ puṃ bhiḥ purāṇaṃ kṛṣṇarūpiṇam
purāṇākhyānamamalamamalīkaraṇaṃ param
yasmin vedārthamāhṛtyahariṇāvyāsarūpiṇā
tasmātkṛtepurāṇehiśruteviṣṇurbhavediti
sākṣātsvayaṃ harirvipraḥ purāṇaṃ ca tathā vidham
tathā gaṅgāmbusekenanāśayetkilbiṣaṃ svakam
keśavodravarūpeṇapāpāttārayatemahīm
vaiṣṇavoviṣṇubhajanasyākāṅkṣīyadivartate
viṣṇubhaktipradādevīgaṅgā bhuvi cagīyate
viṣṇurūpāhisāgaṅgālokavistārakāriṇī
brāhmaṇeṣu purāṇeṣu gaṅgāyāṃ goṣupippale
nārāyaṇadhiyāpuṃ bhirbhaktiḥ kāryāhyahaitukī
pratyakṣaviṣṇurūpāhitatvajṣairniścitāamī
tasmātsatatamabhyarcyāviṣṇubhaktyabhilāṣiṇā
viṣṇaubhaktiṃ vinānṝṇāṃ niṣphalaṃ janmaucyate
kalikālapayorāśiṃ pāpagrāhasamākulam
mahāduṣṭajanavyālamahābhīmaṃ bhayānakam
kiṃ sukhaṃ labhate jantur asadvārtāvadhāraṇe
tad vicitrakathālokenānāviṣayamiśritāḥ
śrotavyā yadi vai nṝṇāṃ viṣaye sajjate manaḥ
nirvāṇe yadi vā cittaṃ śrotavyā tad api dvijāḥ
helayā śravaṇāc cāpi tasya tuṣṭo bhaved dhariḥ
niiṣkrayopihṛṣīkeśonānākarmacakārasaḥ
śuśrūṣūṇāṃ hitārthāyabhaktānāṃ bhaktavatsalaḥ
nalabhyatekarmaṇāpivājapeyaśatādinā
rājasūyāyutenāpi yathā bhaktyāsalabhyate
yatpadaṃ cetasāsevyaṃ sadbhirācaritaṃ muhuḥ
bhavābdhitaraṇesāramāśrayadhvaṃ hareḥ padam
rereviṣayasaṃ lubdhāḥ pāmarāniṣṭhurānarāḥ
rauravehikimātmānamātmanāpātayiṣyatha
vināgovindasaumyāṃ ghrisevanaṃ māgamiṣyati
anāyāsenaduḥkhānāntaraṇaṃ yadivāṃ chatha
bhajadhvaṃ kṛṣṇacaraṇāvapunarbhavakāraṇe
nānānarakasampātādutthitoyadipūruṣaḥ
sthāvarāditanuṃ labdhvāyadibhāgyavaśātpunaḥ
bālyādibahudoṣeṇapīḍitobhavatidvijāḥ
punaryauvanamāsādyadāridryeṇaprapīḍyate
rogeṇaguruṇāvāpianāvṛṣṭyādinā tathā
vārddhakenalabhetpīḍāmanirvācyāmitastataḥ
manasaś ca lanādvyādhestatomaraṇamāpnuyāt
natasmādadhikaṃ duḥkhaṃ saṃsārepyanubhūyate
tatrātiyātanāṃ bhuktvā punar eva prajāyate
anārādhitagovindacaraṇe tv īdṛśī daśā
anāyāsena maraṇaṃ vināyāsena jīvanam
yadāsau kṛṣyate yāmyair dūtaiḥ kiṃ dhanam anviyāt
dānaṃ svargasya sopānaṃ dānaṃ kilbiṣanāśanam
yat kiṃcid vidyate puṃsāṃ tac ca kṛṣṇe samarpayet
kṛṣṇārpitaṃ kuśaladamanyārpitam asaukhyadam
cakṣurbhyāṃ śrīharer eva pratimādinirūpaṇam
śrotrābhyāṃ kalayet kṛṣṇaguṇanāmāny aharniśam
jihvayā haripādāmbusvāditavyaṃ vicakṣaṇaiḥ
ghrāṇenāghrāya govindapādābjatulasīdalam
tvacā spṛṣṭvā harer bhaktaṃ manasā dhyāya tatpadam
kṛtārtho jāyate jantur nātra kāryā vicāraṇā
tanmanā hi bhavet prājṣas tathā syāt tadgatāśayaḥ
tam evānte’bhyeti loko nātra kāryā vicāraṇā
nārāyaṇam anādyantaṃ nataṃ seveta ko janaḥ
iti śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe svargakhaṇḍe
ekaṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ
dviṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ
sūta uvāca
tasya viṣṇoḥ pareśasyanānāvigrahadhāriṇaḥ
ekaṃ purāṇaṃ rūpaṃ vai tatra pādmaṃ paraṃ mahat
brāhmaṃ mūrdhāharerevahṛdayaṃ padmasaṃ jṣitam
vaiṣṇavaṃ dakṣiṇobāhuḥ śaivaṃ vāmomaheśituḥ
ūrū bhāgavataṃ proktaṃ nābhiḥ syān nāradīyakam
mārkaṇḍeyaṃ ca dakṣāṅghrir vāmo hy āgneyam ucyate
bhaviṣyaṃ dakṣiṇo jānur viṣṇor eva mahātmanaḥ
brahmavaivartasaṃjṣaṃ tu vāmajānur udāhṛtaḥ
laiṅgaṃ hi gulphakaṃ dakṣaṃ vārāhaṃ vāmagulphakam
skāndaṃ purāṇaṃ lomāni tvag asya vāmanaṃ smṛtam
kaurmaṃ pṛṣṭhaṃ samākhyātaṃ mātsyaṃ medaḥ prakīrtitam
majjā tu gāruḍaṃ proktaṃ brahmāṇḍam asthi gīyate
evam evābhavad viṣṇuḥ purāṇāvayavo hariḥ
hṛdayaṃ tatra vai pādmaṃ yac chrutvāmṛtam aśnuyate
svargakhaṇḍaṃ samākarṇyamahāpātakinopiye
mucyaṃ tetepipāpebhyastvacojīrṇādyathoragāḥ
apicetsudurācāraḥ sarvadharmabahiṣkṛtaḥ
ādisvargaṃ samākarṇyayatphalaṃ sam avāpnuyāt
māghemāseprayāgetusnātvā pratidinaṃ naraḥ
yathā pāpāt pramucyate tathā hiśravaṇādbhavet
dattātenasvarṇatulādattā caiva dharākhilā
kṛtaṃ vitaraṇaṃ tenadraridreyatkṛtamṛṇam
harernāmasahasrāṇipaṭhitānihyabhīkṣṇaśaḥ
sarvevedās tathā dhītāstattatkarmakṛtaṃ tathā
adhyāpakāś ca bahavaḥ sthāpitāvṛttidānataḥ
guṇavanto jñānavanto dharmavanto numānitāḥ
meṣakarkaṭayor madhye toyaṃ dattaṃ suśītalam
brāhmaṇārthegavārthecaprāṇāstyaktāś ca tenahi
anyāni casukarmāṇikṛtānitenadhīmatā
yenādikhaṇḍaṃ sadasiśrutaṃ saṃ śrāvitaṃ tathā
svargakhaṇḍaṃ samādhītyanānābhogānsamaśnute
antaḥ puraganārīṇāṃ sukhasuptaḥ prabudhyate
kiṃ kiṇīravasannādais tathā madhurabhāṣaṇaiḥ
tataś ca brahmaṇolokaṃ prāpyatejomayaṃ vapuḥ
tatra ivajñānamāsādyanirvāṇaṃ paramṛcchati
kuryādevasadālāpaṃ sacchāstraṃ śṛṇuyān naraḥ
tatra pādmaṃ mahāśāstraṃ sarvāmnāyaphalapradam
śṛṇudhvaṃ he lokā vadata harināmaikam atulaṃ
yadīcchāvīcīnāṃ sukhataraṇam iṣṭānilabhata
iti śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe svargakhaṇḍe dviṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ
sampūrṇam idam ādikhaṇḍāparanāmakam ādisvargakhaṇḍaṃ svargakhaṇḍaṃ vā
śubham astu śrīr astu
iti śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe tṛtīyaṃ svargakhaṇḍaṃ samāptam
atha śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe caturthaṃ brahmakhaṇḍaṃ ārabhyate
śrīvedavyāsāya namaḥ
śaunaka uvāca
kalau samāgate sūta prāṇināṃ kena karmaṇā
sūta uvāca
sādhu sādhu muniśreṣṭha puṇyātmanāṃ varo bhavān
sarveṣāṃ ca janānāṃ ca śubhavāṣcho nirantaram
etad vyāsaḥ purā vipraḥ sarvajṣaḥ sarvapūjitaḥ
pṛṣṭo jaimininā taṃ sa yad āha śṛṇu vaiṣṇava
daṇḍavat praṇipatyāsau vyāsaṃ sarvārthapāragam
guruṃ satyavatīsūnuṃ papraccha munipuṅgavaḥ
alpenāpi ca puṇyena martyāś cālpāyuṣo yataḥ
vyāsa uvāca
sādhusaṅgād bhaved vipra śāstrāṇāṃ śravaṇaṃ prabho
na rocate kathā bhūmau pāpiṣṭhāya janāya vai
vaiṣṇavī sa tu vijṣeyaḥ pāpiṣṭhapravaro dvijaḥ
śrīkṛṣṇasya kathāṃ śrutvā’’nandī bhavati vaiṣṇavaḥ
asatyāṃ tāṃ tu yo brūyāj jṣeyaḥ sa pāpināṃ guruḥ
kṛṣṇasya yaḥ kathārambhe kuryād vighnaṃ narādhamaḥ
narakān niṣkṛtir nāsti manvantaraśatāvadhi
teṣāṃ karasthā narakā bahukleśakarāḥ sadā
janmāntarārjitaṃ pāpaṃ tatkṣaṇād eva naśyati
śrīkṛṣṇacaritaṃ yo vai śrotum icchāṃ karotyapi
bhaktyā yo vai naraḥ kuryāt śrīkṛṣṇacaritaṃ tathā
na jāne śravaṇe tasya kā gatir vā bhaviṣyati
brahmahatyādikaṃ pāpaṃ akālamaraṇaṃ tathā
surāpānaṃ tathā steyaṃ sarvaṃ naśyati pāpinaḥ
pāpaṃ kṛtvā tu yo martyaḥ paścāt pāpaṃ nivartayet
tasya pāpaṃ vrajen nāśamagninā tūlarāśivat
śrīkṛṣṇacaritaṃ vipra tiṣṭhed vai pustakaṃ gṛhe
tasya gṛhasamīpaṃ hinā yānti yamakiGkarāḥ
vadanti vaiṣṇavān kāṃś ca vāJchā brūhi guro mama
idānīṃ tān samājṣātuṃ teṣāṃ māhātmyam uttamam
vyāsa uvāca
sādhusaṅgaṃ tu yaḥ kuryāt kṣaṇaṃ vārdhakṣaṇaṃ dvija
hiṃ sādaṃ bhakāmakrodhairvarjitāścaiva yenarāḥ
lobhamohaparityaktājṣeyāstevaiṣṇavādvija
pitṛbhaktādayāyuktāḥ sarvaprāṇihiteratāḥ
amatsarāvaiṣṇavāyevijṣeyāḥ satyabhāṣiṇaḥ
viprabhaktiratāyecaparastrīṣunapuṃ sakāḥ
ekādaśīvrataratāvijṣeyāstecavaiṣṇavāḥ
gāyanti harināmānitulasīmālyadhārakāḥ
haryaṃ ghrisalilaiḥ siktāvijṣeyāstecavaiṣṇavāḥ
śrotrayormastakeyeṣāṃ tulasyāḥ parṇamuttamam
karhiciddṛśyatevipravijṣeyāstecaveṣṇavāḥ
pākhaṇḍasaṅgarahitāvipradveṣavivarjitāḥ
siṃ ceyustulasīṃ yecajṣātavyāvaiṣṇavānarāḥ
kanyādānaratāyecayevaihyatithipūjakāḥ
śṛṇvanti viṣṇucaritaṃ vijṣeyāvaiṣṇavānarāḥ
yasya gṛhesupratiṣṭhetśālagrāmaśilāpica
mārjayanti hareḥ sthānaṃ pitṛyajṣapravartakāḥ
janedīnedayāyuktāvijṣeyāstecavaiṣṇavāḥ
harinaivedyaṃ ye'śnantivijṣeyāvaiṣṇavājanāḥ
vedaśāstrānuraktāyetulasīvanapālakāḥ
rādhāṣṭamīvrataratāvijṣeyāstecavaiṣṇavāḥ
śrīkṛṣṇapuratoyecadīpaṃ yacchanti śraddhayā
paraniṃ dāṃ nakurvanti vijṣeyāstecavaiṣṇavāḥ
sūta uvāca
pṛṣṭojaiminināvyāsaityuktaḥ sa yathā kramam
adhyāyaṃ śraddhayāyuktaṃ yeśṛṇvanti narottamāḥ
sarvapāpavinirmuktāyānti viṣṇoḥ paraṃ padam
iti śrīpādmemahāpurāṇebrahmakhaṃ ḍevyāsajaiminisaṃ vādeprathamo'dhyāyaḥ
dvitīyo'dhyāyaḥ
sūta uvāca
śṛṇuśaunakavakṣyāmicānyadharmmaṃ purātanam
vyāsajaiminisaṃ vādaṃ śrotṝṇāṃ pāpanāśanam
vyāsa uvāca
śrīkṛṣṇamandireyo vai lepanaṃ kurutenaraḥ
sarvapāpavinirmuktaḥ śrāṃ toyātiharergṛham
yaścāṃ bulepanaṃ kuryātsaṃ kṣepācchṛṇujaimine
purāsīddaṇḍakonāmnācaurolokabhayapradaḥ
asatyabhāṣīkrūraś ca parastrīgamanerataḥ
gomāṃ sāśīsurāpaś ca pākhaṇḍajanasaṅgabhāk
vṛtticchedīdvijātīnāṃ nyāsāpahārakas tathā
śaraṇāgatahaṃ tācaveśyāvibhramalolupaḥ
ekadāsadvijaśreṣṭha kasyacid viṣṇumandiram
jagāmaharaṇārthāyaviṣṇordravyaṃ samūḍhadhīḥ
athadvāripraviśyāsāvaṃ ghriḥ karddamasaṃ yutaḥ
lohasyacaśalākābhyāṃ mudghāṭyatvararaṃ mudā
nānāpuṣpasugaṃ dhāḍhyaṃ nānāpātrasamākulam
śāyitorādhayāsārddhaṃ dṛṣṭaḥ pītāṃ baro'cyutaḥ
praṇamyarādhikānāthaṃ niṣpāpaḥ so'bhavattadā
dravyeṇakāryamastītitannetuṃ kṛtavānmanaḥ
pātayitvāṃ śukaṃ bhūmaukauśeyaṃ kamalāpateḥ
babaṃ dhavastujātaṃ capāṇaukṛtvāsakaṃ pitaḥ
viṣṇormāyāpateścāthatānisarvāṇijaimine
kṛtvāśabdaṃ sughoraṃ capatitānyathatānivai
āgatābahuśolokāścorodravyaṃ javenaca
daṃ śitaḥ kālasarpeṇamṛto'saugatakilbiṣaḥ
yamājṣayā tasya dūtāḥ pāśamudgarapāṇayaḥ
āgatāstaṃ samānetuṃ daṃ ṣṭriṇaś ca rmavāsasaḥ
dṛṣṭvātaṃ śamanaḥ kruddhaḥ papracchasacivaṃ prati
anenakiGkṛtaṃ karmapāpaṃ vāpuṇyamevavā
samūlaṃ vadaheprājṣacitraguptamamāgrataḥ

kiṃ tvākarṇayalokeśasukṛtaṃ cāsyavarttate

haraṇārthaṃ harerdravyaṃ gato'saupāpināṃ varaḥ
tenapuṇyaprabhāveṇanirgataṃ pātakaṃ mahat
vyāsa uvāca
śrutvāsavacanaṃ tasya pīṭhaṃ kanakanirmitam
nanāmaśirasātaṃ vaiprovācavinayānvitaḥ
kṛtārtho'smikṛtārtho'smikṛtārtho'sminasaṃ śayaḥ
nānābhogasamāyuktaṃ janmamṛtyunivāraṇam
vyāsa uvāca
samastasukhadaṃ sthānaṃ preṣayāmāsacakriṇaḥ
teṣāṃ kiṃ vābhaviṣyatinajāne'haṃ dvijottama
yaidaṃ śṛṇuyādbhaktyāpaṭhedyovāsamāhitaḥ
koṭijanmārjitaṃ pāpaṃ naśyatyevanasaṃ śayaḥ
iti śrīpādmemahāpurāṇebrahmakhaṃ ḍeharimandiralepanamāhātmyaṃ
nāmadvitīyo'dhyāyaḥ
tṛtīyo'dhyāyaḥ
śaunaka uvāca
kārttikasyacamāhātmyaṃ brūhisūtamamāgrataḥ
tadvra tasya phalaṃ kiṃ vādoṣaṃ kiṃ tadakurvataḥ
sūta uvāca
puraikadāmuniśreṣṭhavyāsaṃ satyavatīsutam
jaiminiḥpṛṣṭavānetadārebhekathitaṃ muniḥ
vyāsa uvāca
pratijanmanisaṃ mūḍhaḥ śūkaraś ca bhaveddhruvam
devānāṃ durlabhaṃ mokṣaṃ prāpnoti kṛpayāhareḥ
kārttikemuniśākaṃ vaiyo'śnāticanarottamaḥ
saṃ vatsarakṛtaṃ pāpaṃ śākenaikenanaśyati
aṃ teviṣṇupadaṃ gacchet sarvapāpavivarjitaḥ
prātaḥ snānaṃ naroyo vai kārtikeśrīharipriye
dīpaṃ nabhasiviprendratasiṃ mastuṣṭaḥ sadāhariḥ
yodadyāccagṛhedīpaṃ kṛṣṇasyasaghṛtaṃ dvijaḥ
pradīpasyacamāhātmyaṃ viśeṣamucyatemayā
niśāmayadvijaśreṣṭhasetihāsaṃ samāhitaḥ
pūrvaṃ tretāyugeviprovaikuṃ ṭhonāmataḥ śuciḥ
datvāgṛhaṃ gatoviproghṛtapūrṇaṃ dvijarṣabhaḥ
mūṣako'gnibhayāt tatra vegenāpipalāyitaḥ
ākhoścasakalaṃ pāpaṃ vinaṣṭaṃ kṛpayāhareḥ
sarpeṇadaṃ śitaścākhuḥ prāṇatyāgaṃ cakāraha
tatoyamājṣayādūtāḥ pāśamudgarapāṇayaḥ
āgatāstaṃ samānetuṃ babaṃ dhuścarmarajjubhiḥ
yāvannetuṃ manaś ca kruḥ śaṃ khacakragadādharāḥ
āgatāgaruḍārūḍhāviṣṇudūtāścaturbhujāḥ
vimānaṃ gaganecaiva rājahaṃ sayutaṃ śubham
nirmitaṃ kanakaiḥ śuddhaiḥ kāmagaṃ kṛpayāhareḥ
pāśaṃ chitvātatodūtāḥ procusteyamakiGkarān
viṣṇubhakto'pyasaumūḍhāvyarthaṃ tubaṃ dhanaṃ kṛtam
gacchadhvaṃ śamanapreṣyāyadivāṃ chāstijīvitum
śrutvāprakaṃ pitāstevaipṛcchanti vinayānvitāḥ
kenapuṇyaprabhāveṇayuṣmābhirnīyatepuram
asauviṣṇormahāpāpīyūyaṃ tadvaktumarhatha
viṣṇudūtā ūcuḥ
