ūdrghvasthapaṣcalokānāṃ dāhesandehaevanaḥ
kathamaṃ gāravṛṣṭiśca kathaṃ novāmahādhvaniḥ
munaya ūcuḥ
saevāṃ gāravṛṣṭiṃ capipāsurivatāmapāt
devothavīramāhūyakiṃ vīretyabravīdbhavaḥ
vīrohanūmatoliṅgapīṭhābhāvādidaṃ kṛtam
kapeścittaṃ parijṣātuṃ mayākṛtam idaṃ bṛhat
dagdhānapyakhilāṃ ṃ llokānpūrvataḥ śobhanānvibhuḥ
kalpayāmāsaviśvātmāvīrabhadramathābravīt
āliṅgyāghrāyaśirasitāṃ būlaṃ dattavānharaḥ
athāsauhanumānīśapūjanaṃ kṛtavānatha
idamāhamahāvīṇāmamavaidīyatāmiti
gandharvonamayātyājyāvīṇāprāṇasamāmama
mamāpiprāṇasadṛśīvīṇetyāhakapīśvaraḥ
ādāyavīṇāṃ mahatīṃ svarataṃ tusamanvitām
alābusaṃ yutāṃ kṛtvārājavṛkṣaphalākṛtim
tasyorasivinikṣipyagāyannāgācchivāṃ tikam
bṛhatīkusumaiḥ śuddhairdevapādāvapūjayat
tasmaivaramathaprādādākalpaṃ jīvitaṃ punaḥ
samudralaṃ ghaneśaktiṃ varaṃ prādādathāparam
samastabhūṣāsuvibhūṣitāṃ gaḥ svadīptimaṃ dīkṛtadevadīptiḥ
prasannamūrtistaruṇaḥ śivāṅgakaḥ sambhāvayāmāsasamastadevān
pītamudgamanīyaṃ casamādāyamaheśvaraḥ
pītavastram idaṃ devatvaṃ gṛhāṇahareśubham
brahmaṇeraktavasanaṃ sarveṣāṃ vasudas tathā
devarṣidānavādīnāṃ dattavānvasuyugmakam
susūkṣmaṃ bahumūlyaṃ casvarṇabhūṣaṇam eva ca
athabhuktvāsukhāsīnaḥ sāmātyaḥ sapurohitaḥ
nānāmunigaṇairbhūpairvānarairgautamītaṭe
śambhuṃ purāṇatattvajṣaṃ rāghavovākyamabravīt
tvameva sarvaṃ jānīṣe sarva dharmaguhāśayam
śambhur uvāca
dhyānamevakṛteśreṣṭhaṃ tretāyāṃ yajṣa eva ca
dvāparecārcananti ṣyedānaṃ caharikīrtanam
narāṇāṃ mugdhacittatvātkṛcchrasthānāṃ viśāṃ pate
nakrataunasvadhākārepurāṇānāṃ canaśrutau
nayajṣenacatīrtheṣu nacaśuśrūṣaṇesatām
nejyāyāṃ devatānāṃ canasvajātīyakarmmaṇi
nadevasmaraṇenāpinacakvāpivṛṣenṛpa
ataś ca dīrghakālānāṃ puṇyānāmakṣamānarāḥ
dānaṃ tusvalpakālatvātkartuṃ śaknotimānavaḥ
ataś ca kaliduṣṭānāṃ prāyaścitaṃ navidyate
keṣāṃ citpāpanāśaḥ syātprāyaścittaistunān yathā
brahmajṣānīgayāśrāddhīkāśīgaṃ tāśrutaurataḥ
purāṇajṣāvamāścaiteśrotā tasya carāghava
yugānāmanusāreṇa tathā rthasyavivecanāt
purāṇavaktā sarva smādbrāhmaṇastuviśiṣyate
tenāpicakṛtaṃ pāpaṃ nasajyetkimutānyataḥ
anyeṣāmapikeṣāṃ citpurāṇaṃ pāpanāśanam
yaḥ purāṇeṣu viśvāsīvaktāraṃ manyategurum
brahmavidyāpradātāraṃ viśeṣaṃ jṣātibandhutaḥ
tasya pāpānisarvāṇivilayaṃ yāntyasaṃ śayam
athaśrīśailagamanaṃ pūjakasyamaheśituḥ
ataḥ kalaumanuṣyāṇāṃ purāṇaṃ pāpanāśanam
purākaliyugerāmavṛttaṃ saṅkīrtśṛṇu
āsīttugautamonāmabrāhmaṇovedavarjitaḥ
tasya puṣṭiḥ paśuścāstāṃ bhrātarauvedavarjitau
tābhyāṃ sahakṛṣiṃ cakreta tatra vṛddhimavāpaca
dhanadhānyādikaṃ kiṃcid rājānaṃ dattavānatha
uvācavacanaṃ kiṃcid adhikāraṃ nirūpaya
rājovāca
yugeṣvanyeṣu dharmoyaṃ kalidharmonatādṛśaḥ
bhūpatitvaṃ hibhūpālanṛpāṇāṃ dharmaucyate
brāhmaṇaś ca parikṣīṇastaṃ kurvannaivaduṣyati
śūdrāṇāṃ tukṛṣirddharmonāpadyapyagrajanmanaḥ
tasmātkṣattreṇavartiṣyegrāmānmamasamādiśa
grāmādhikāraduṣṭasyavartanaṃ tvan yathā bhavat
abhakṣimāṃ saṃ cāpāyisurācābhāṣidurvacaḥ
parayoṣā tathā gāmiparasvaṃ pratyahārica
akrīḍidyūtamasakṛtkalaṃ jaṃ cādidurbhujā
nāpūjijagatāmīśaḥ śivovāviṣṇurevavā
evaṃ kālenadurvṛttaṃ rājāvākyamabhāṣata
tasmānniyogadharmeṇabhavaṃ taṃ bhraṃ śayāmica
nahi sarvam idaṃ tyaktuṃ śaktohaṃ pṛthivīpate
śambhur uvāca
evaṃ vadatidurviprerājātūṣṇīmatiṣṭhata
satuvaiśūdratulyaś ca bubhujennaṃ sahāmiṣam
kadācidathadurvṛttaḥ pratolīmaṇḍapasthitaḥ
dvijenapaṭhyamānaṃ tupadyaṃ tuśrutavānidam
parātparataraṃ yāṃ tinārāyaṇaparāyaṇāḥ
vyākhyānamapicaśrutvāpaurāṇikamabhāṣata
kīdṛṅnārāyaṇaḥ proktaḥ kīdṛśopimaheśvaraḥ
kiṃ paraṃ tvayanaṃ proktaṃ dveṣaḥ kīdṛgudāhṛtaḥ
paurāṇika uvāca
paraṃ tadbrahmaṇaḥ sthānaṃ sukhavyaktaikalakṣaṇam
avināśitayātattukīrtitaṃ paramaṃ padam
āpohinarajanmatvānnārāḥ proktāmanīṣibhiḥ
nārāścāsyāyanaṃ yasmāttenanārāyaṇaḥ smṛtaḥ
tatparaṃ vartanaṃ yeṣāṃ teproktāstatparāyaṇāḥ
mahadādīnitatvāniyāniteṣāṃ yaīśvaraḥ
sūryāgniśaśinetro'saumaheśaḥ syādumāpatiḥ
dveṣohivairaṃ vijṣeyamīśvareparamātmani
śambhur uvāca
evaṃ purāṇabhaṭṭenasamīritam idaṃ vacaḥ
ciṃ tayanpunarapyāhamādṛśasya kathaṃ gatiḥ
paurāṇiko'thataṃ prāhaśṛṇuvakṣyāmitegatim
dharmaṃ cara yathā śakti yathā kālaṃ yathā vidhi
vimuktapāpaḥ paścāttvamuttamāṃ gatimeṣyasi
purāṇamathavānityaṃ śṛṇuṣvāvahitaś ca san
nirāśovāmaheśānaṃ pūjayasvapinākinam
devaṃ vāpuṇḍarīkākṣaṃ keśavaṃ kleśanāśanam
athavāgacchakāśīśaṃ muktauvāmṛtimāpnuhi
gayāṃ vāgaccha tatra tvaṃ śrāddhaṃ kartuṃ prayatnataḥ
athavā sarva vedānāṃ sāraṃ pātakanāśanam
śrīśailamathavāgacchakedāramathavecchayā
śrutvā sarvaṃ kariṣyāmipurāṇaṃ bhavatomukhāt
śāstraṃ viśvāsahetuṃ cavarjaṃ cāpi vadasvame
paurāṇika uvāca
varjyaṃ māṃ saṃ surānyastrībhogodyūtaṃ vikatthanam
pāruṣyamanṛtaṃ māyādevadevaviniṃ danam
gurūṇāṃ suravṛddhānāṃ purāṇasmṛtibhāṣiṇām
niṃ danaṃ śvetavṛṃ tākaṃ kṛtakālābuvartanam
bījapūraṃ kusuṃ bhaṃ calohitaṃ śṛṃ gam eva ca
araruṃ nālikeraṃ cakūṣmāṇḍakaṃ tathaiva ca
kovidāraphalaṃ tailapakvaṃ mānavajaṃ payaḥ
vārdhrīṇasakharīdugdhaṃ sūtikākṣīram āvikam
auṣṭramekaśaphakṣīraṃ mārgamājaṃ nṛsambhavam
vivatsāsandhinīkṣīraṃ lavaṇaṃ caivayogiyat
nālikerarasaṃ kāṃ syetāmremadhucasīsake
kācetakraṃ karaṃ bhāṃ ścaghṛtāktānnaivakārayet
homaṃ tumṛṇmayepātrepuroḍāśaṃ turājate
nasevetaparaṃ lokeśubhārthītuvicakṣaṇaḥ
pātrāntaścūrṇalepopi tatra bhakṣaṇam eva ca
siṃ dhusaurāṣṭrakāṃ bojamāgadheṣu casiṃ hale
nadoṣāyabhavet tatra kṣīraṃ calavaṇānvitam
kṣīrāṇicasamastānilavaṇānicayogataḥ
deśeṣvanyeṣu doṣāyapānecaivehasaṃ śayaḥ
śambhur uvāca
evaṃ tasya vacaḥ śrutvābrāhmaṇasyamahātmanaḥ
svamevabhavanaṃ gatvāciṃ tayāmāsaduḥkhitaḥ
rātraumṛtyurdivācetinajānātimahānapi
krimikīṭamanuṣyādyaiḥ sukhaduḥkhaiḥ pṛthakpṛthak
pratijīvaṃ tuhetūnāṃ bhedo'pisuviniścayaḥ
janmakālemahājñānaṃ śaiśavetyalpabodhanam
dūṣikāśleṣmalālābhirvalīpalitakaṃ panaiḥ
śvāsakāsānilākṣiptairhṛṣīkairvikalairyutaḥ
kiṃcid dhartuṃ naśaknotinacajānātikiṃ cana
tiṣṭhaṃ tīṣuparastrīṣuguhyasthānaṃ pradarśayet
kośakaṇḍūyanaparaḥ krūrojīvitalakṣaṇaiḥ
bhuṃ jānaḥ śleṣmaṇāgrāsaṅgrasituṃ nacaśaknuyāt
yadākāsastadājajṣepāyuvāyuścaśabdavān
niḥsṛtiścamalasyāpiśleṣmanirgama eva ca
snuṣādibhartsanaṃ bālatālahāsyanidarśanam
gurunirgamanādīnisaṃ ciṃ tyacapunaḥ punaḥ
āhūtobhojanādyarthaṃ bhojyānnādiviniṃ dayan
ciramuṣṇaṃ canirbhartsyapunaścintāmavāpasaḥ
atiduṣkṛtikarmmāhaṃ kathaṃ bhokṣye kathaṃ svape
dvijasyasadanaṃ gatvāpurāṇajṣasyarāghava
lajjāvākkṛtavaktraś ca kiṃ karomītyabhāṣata
na kiṃcidapyuvācāsaudvijaḥ paurāṇikastadā
pāpoyamitivijṣāyaśiṣyeṇaniragāmayat
bhuvyāsīnaṃ tuvijṣāyapurāṇārthavicārakam
kathaṃ kathamapiprāpyapīṭhaṃ dattaṃ canābhajat
niṣaṇṇobhūtalerāmapurāṇajṣamabhāṣata
prāyaścittaṃ kariṣyāmitadatraivavidhīyatām
brāhmaṇa uvāca
pāpānikīrtayasvatvaṃ sarva thaivakṛtānitu
sacāpi nākṛtaṃ kiṃ cinmayāpāpamitīrayan
rudanpapātabhūmyāṃ ca kathaṃ tātetipīḍitaḥ
mahāpāpaṃ trirāvṛttepunaś ca yadicetkṛtam
paurāṇikamahābhāgaprāpyāpitvāmahaṃ katham
paurāṇika uvāca
śāstraṃ pramāṇaṃ sarveṣāṃ prāyaścittavinirṇaye
tadvināyohitaṃ brūyātprāyāścittaṃ natadbhavet
sakṛtkṛtesakṛtproktaṃ dvitīyedviguṇaṃ bhavet
tṛtīyetriguṇaṃ proktaṃ caturthenāstiniṣkṛtiḥ
tvayākṛtaṃ tubahudhācaturvidhamapīcchayā
kathaṃ vaktumahaṃ śaktaḥ prāyaścittaṃ bhavādṛśe
upavāsatrayaṃ kṛtvāśivarātrimaviṃ data
caturthamupavāsaṃ cacakārātīvaduḥkhitaḥ
pāraṇaṃ cāpyamāyāṃ sakṛtavānaphalavalkalaiḥ
athapradakṣiṇaṃ cakreśrīśailasyacasadvijaḥ
gatavānmaṃ diraṃ paścācciṃ tayātikṛśaḥ śvasan
kathaṃ pāpanivṛttirmetūrṣṇībhū tasya setsyati
anaṃ tamavicāryaṃ kiṃ pāpaṣcasumahattaram
śrutvānakopimebrūyātprāyaścittaṃ vidhīyatām
kiṃ tu kasmin purāṇetuśrutejṣātaṃ bhaviṣyati
itikṛtvāmatiṃ sothapurāṇajṣamabhāṣata
purāṇamekaṃ metātavyākhyātubhagavāniti
jātakarmādisaṃ skārānkārayasvamamāśuvai
dvijobhūtvāśṛṇomyadyaprāyaścittaṃ karomyataḥ
vidhāyakaṃ purāṇaṃ mebhaviṣyaticakīrtitam
ataḥ śakyaṃ kariṣyāmipurāṇārthaṃ viniścayan
paurāṇika uvāca
yathā vatkīrtayiṣyāmipurāṇaṃ pāpanāśanam
yathā jñānaṃ yathā śakti yathā śuddhaṃ yathā vidhi
kiṃ vāṃ cchasipurāṇaṃ tukīrtayiṣyetadevatu
sarvaṃ rucipurāṇaṃ mevaktavyaṃ kiṃ hitaṃ vada
śrute yasmin bhidānaivajāyatetuharīśayoḥ
paurāṇika uvāca
śṛṇotiyastatprathamaṃ tasya pāpaṃ vinaśyati
śrotavyaṃ manyatepāpoyadibhāryāvinaśyati
kiṃ caikaṃ duṣkaraṃ vakṣyeśroturvakturaniṃ dakam
vyākhyātariyadiprītirddharmādevaprakāśinī
ācāradarśanepuṇyekarmamokṣādidarśake
tadātuṣṭomaheśaḥ syādviṣṇuriṣṭaphalapradaḥ
pitarastāritāstenayāṃ titeparamāṃ gatim
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe pātālakhaṇḍe śivarāghavasaṃvāde
paṣcadaśottaraśatatamo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīrāma uvāca
kathaṃ pātakasaṅghātasaṃ kramebrāhmaṇādhame
purāṇajṣaḥ kathaṃ vyākhyāṃ cakāra dvijasattaa
śambhur uvāca
adhyāpanecādhyayanejāyatecāthasaṅgamaḥ
saṅgatauvatsaraṃ rāmayātipātakipātakam
apipātakasandohacīrṇapāpaṃ praṇaśyati
prabhūtavahnināśehidhūmarāśiryathaivahi
śalabhodīpanāśāyavahnināśāyanaprabhuḥ
kṛtaṃ pāpaṃ tathā nyeṣāṃ nāśanāyapurāṇikaḥ
bhūtādigrastamartyānāṃ bhūtādibhayamocakaḥ
paurāṇikas tathā pāpaṃ nakiṃ citprāptumarhati
ātmanācakṛtaṃ pāpamanyairapicayatkṛtam
purāṇajṣonāśayatitvatiduṣṭaṃ svakarmmavā
bhavānīśehṛṣīkeśesamavṛttirvivekavān
lokavedakriyāvettārudrajāpyatiniḥspṛhaḥ
tuṣṭaḥ śāntaḥ kriyādakṣaḥ prabhūtoyogakṛdvaśī
yathaiva te purāṇajṣo vasiṣṭho bhagavān ṛṣiḥ
niyogāttavabhūpālaayodhyāyāmatiṣṭhata
apālayadbhuvaṃ kṛtsnāṃ tvāṃ carakṣaḥ samāpatat
sacaśukropadeśenarākṣasastvāmathābhyagāt
nidrāsaktaṃ haniṣyāminān yathā vasarastviti
suptaṃ pramattaṃ kākutsthaṃ rakṣohanti na saṃśayaḥ
brahmāvāptavaraṃ taddhimayākāryaṃ nivāraṇam
itisaṃ ciṃ tyaviprarṣiḥ senāmādāyanirgataḥ
rakṣohaṃ tumaśaktastumṛtyuhīnaṃ tatomuniḥ
svayaṃ carākṣasobhūtvāvākyamāhamahāmuniḥ
saāharājārakṣoghnastamahaṃ haṃ tumāgataḥ
bhuktvāmiṣaṃ madīyaṃ tuyuddhaṃ kṛtvājayaṃ vraja
rākṣasa uvāca
kathaṃ tvaṃ rākṣasomahyaṃ bhakṣaṇāyabhaviṣyasi
vasiṣṭho'pyathamānuṣyamāsthāyaviyatisthitaḥ
niṣṭhīvyamastake tasya muṣṭinātamatāḍayat
tāḍitorākṣasastenavyadrāvayadṛṣiścatam
palāyamānāvanyonyaṃ jaladhiṃ tugatāvubhau
tatra sthenagraheṇāsaugṛhītorākṣasastadā
muniḥpunarayodhyāyāṃ pūrvavatsamatiṣṭhata
śambhur uvāca
tasmātsvābhimataṃ kuryātpurāṇajṣovimatsaraḥ
śravaṇasyavidhānaṃ cakathayāmiśubhaṃ śṛṇu
śuklapakṣedine śuddhe vāranakṣatrayogataḥ
nakṛṣṇapakṣegrahaṇenacanāstikasaṃ nidhau
pūrvoktalakṣaṇopetaṃ purāṇaṃ śṛṇuyāditi
śuddhagehe'thavāśuddhavedikāyāṃ maṭhethavā
nadītīredevagehesabhāmaṇḍapa eva ca
rathyāmaṭhethavāramyepuṇyaśālāsurāghava
svayaṃ namasyavipreṃ drānpurāṇajṣaṃ viśeṣataḥ
āsanaṃ kalpitaṃ kuryyādūrdhvaṃ sarva viśeṣitam
vyākhyātāraṃ purāṇasyavastrādyaiḥ paripūjayet
śubhānidatvāvastrāṇisūkṣmāṇicanavānica
karakaṃ ṭhavibhūṣādipātramāsanam eva ca
gandhapuṣpākṣataiḥ pūjyatāṃ būlaṃ vinivedyaca
śuklāmbaradharaṃ viṣṇuṃ śaśivarṇaṃ caturbhujam
sabhāsadaś ca sampūjyagaṇeśaṃ pārthayettataḥ
auṃ nametyādimantreṇapūjanaṃ bhāratīnutiḥ
prātaḥ kālepurāṇasyaprakramaṃ prārabhediti
upakramadinerāmatripaṣcadaśavāśubhāḥ
ślokādvitīyedivasetatodviguṇitāḥ śubhāḥ
tṛtīyedivaserāmatataścādhikamiṣyate
dinānāmavyavacchedādvyākhyānaṃ śravaṇaṃ tathā
vyavasthitiryadājātātadāpaurāṇikaṃ gurum
tāṃ būlādipradāyāthaparedyuḥ śṛṇuyādapi
purāṇamevaṃ śrotavyaṃ dainaṃ dinamitiśrutiḥ
vratarūpeṇayaḥ kaścitpurāṇaṃ śṛṇuyānnaraḥ
yadaivaṃ tatpurāṇaṃ tu tatra yāti na saṃśayaḥ
purāṇaṃ śrotukāmenaślokaś ca ikopicecchrutaḥ
taddinetukṛtaṃ pāpaṃ nāśayettu na saṃśayaḥ
evaṃ purāṇaṃ śṛṇuyāccayastusabrahmahatyākṛtapāpabandhāt
surāpītiḥ svarṇaharaś ca rāmagurvaṃ ganāgaś ca vimuktimeti
pāpānicānyānikṛtānipuṃ bhiḥ sarvāṇinaśyanti purākṛtāni
ihāpiyānyabdaśatārjitāniśroturvinaśyanti tathā cavaktuḥ
viguṇāpitatovyākhyāphaladādānakarmavat
purāṇānāmabhiprāyaṃ vyāsovedanacāparaḥ
ahaṃ vedmiviśeṣeṇavyāsādapividherapi
phalanti na tathā tiṣyepurāṇaśravaṇaṃ yathā
nāśamāpnotyasandehaḥ śrīśailevartanādiva
atoguruḥ purāṇajṣaḥ śrotṛvaṃ dyo'ghanāśanaḥ
mantreṣu guravoyecavedaśāstreṣu yematāḥ
neśate sarva vijñānaṃ dātuṃ tasmānnabodhakāḥ
piśācāḥ prāyaśorāmabrahmarākṣasanāminaḥ
purāṇajṣohitastasmātpāpanāśakaraḥ prabhuḥ
tatpūjā sarva pūjāsyāt sarva drohosyapīḍanam
yathā samastadānānāṃ vidyādānaṃ praśasyate
rāma uvāca
kiṃ vāpaurāṇikedeyaṃ kiyatkīdṛśam eva ca
purāṇaṃ kīdṛśaṃ varjyaṃ varjyaḥ kīdṛkpurāṇavit
śambhur uvāca
ṣaḍrasānannapānānisnehadravyāṇiyānica
gṛhaṃ sopaskaraṃ rāmapurāṇajṣāyadāpayet
paryāptānyevasarvāṇiadhikāniphalādhikāt
dadyāddravyamatobhūyaḥ sacailaṃ śobhitaṃ mṛdu
bhūṣaṇāni yathā rhāṇisvaśaktyāpratipādayet
kevalaṃ ca tathā puṣpaṃ phalakālephalānyapi
tāṃ būlaṃ ca tathā dadyānnamaskuryāccabhaktitaḥ
purāṇasyasamāptautudadyāddānādikaṃ tathā
adhikaṃ tu tathā deyaṃ bhūhiraṇyādikaṃ nṛpa
nacatūṣṇīmupakramyaśrotumarhatikaś ca na
sabhāsadbhiḥ kṛtācaivayāpūjaikenavākṛtā
devasthāne yathā śakti sarva iḥ pūjanamiṣyate
tīrthepica yathā rāmapuṇyeṣvāyataneṣu ca
svaśaktyāpūjanaṃ kuryātpurāṇajṣāyarāghava
śrotustulakṣaṇaṃ pūrvaṃ mayoktaṃ tubhavennṛpa
paurāṇikasya sarva syalakṣaṇaṃ kathayāmite
kulahīnomahāvyādhirmahāpāpītiraskṛtaḥ
śaucācāravihīnaś ca vedasmṛtivivarjitaḥ
anyadevaḥ pūtivacovyaṃ gaścāpyadhikāṃ gavān
parapūrvāpatiḥ stenaḥ prāṇihaṃ tānirākṛtiḥ
athavarjyaṃ purāṇaṃ tekathayāminṛpottama
pūrvajṣairucyamānaṃ cayatproktaṃ munibhiḥ paraiḥ
purāṇasthaṃ paṭhedgranthaṃ vyākhyāyetavicārayan
yayākayāpivārāmabhāṣayādeśabhāṣataḥ
nadeśabhāṣāracitaṃ graṃ thaṃ śrutvāphalaṃ labhet
vyākhyāyākāpikākutsthapurāṇasyahitāhisā
tasmāttvaṃ devayācasvavyākhyāsyeyatpurāṇakam
śambhur uvāca
evaṃ paurāṇikenoktaṃ śrutavānapigautamaḥ
svayaṃ vastratrayaṃ prādādbrāhmaṇāyamahātmane
kaurmaṃ purāṇaṃ prathamaṃ śrutavānitinaḥ śrutam
dattavānsvarṇamadhikaṃ vastrāṇicaśubhānica
athalaiṃ gaṃ caśuśrāvavaiṣṇavaṃ vāmanaṃ tathā
pādmaṃ cagāruḍaṃ caivasauraṃ brāhmamathaivaca
evamaṣṭasaśuśrāvapurāṇānisagautamaḥ
atharāmāyaṇaṃ caivakaurmamevapunaś ca saḥ
śivanārāyaṇetyevaṃ japaṣcakresadaivahi
brahmāsampūjyataṃ vipraṃ viṣṇulokamathāgamat
viṣṇunāpūjitaḥ so'thajagāmaśivamaṃ diram
bhārataśravaṇecāpi niyamāyemayeritāḥ
purāvyāsenamuninātrivarṣādyatkṛtaṃ śubham
śravaṇāt tasya kṛtsnasyavyākartābhāra tasya yaḥ
sarveṣāmevavaṃ dyosaubhārataṃ vyākarotiyaḥ
yomahābhārataṃ nityaṃ vyākhyāsyatipaṭheccavā
suvarṇaṃ ca yathā śaktisabhāparvaṇivāsasī
ānuśāsanikāraṇyasvargāroheṣu parvasu
ādiparvaṇipūjāyāsāpūjānṛpapuṅgava
karṇāśvamedhavairāṭaśalyadroṇeṣu parvasu
sūkṣmavastratrayaṃ śuddhaṃ niṣkadvayamathāpivā
rāmāyaṇasyaśravaṇekāṇḍekāṇḍeprapūjayet
kṣetraṃ paryāptamathavāsuvarṇamapidāpayet
vyākhyāturgaruvāk yasya sarva kalmaṣanāśanaḥ
arthodharmaś ca kāmaś ca mokṣaś ca nṛpasattama
brahmahatyādipāpānāṃ sarveṣāmapināśanam
ekenaśravaṇenāsyakiṃ narairnaśrutaṃ bhuvi
vyākhyātāraṃ yataḥ pāpasandohasyavināśanam
anyānyapipurāṇānimuniproktānitānyapi
śrotṝṇāṃ pāpanāśāyavaktuścāpi viśeṣataḥ
yaś ca sarva purāṇāniṣaṭtriṃ śattuprakīrtayet
śṛṇotivānatasyāsticittacchedaḥ kadācana
brāhmaṃ purāṇaṃ prathamaṃ dvitīyaṃ pādmamucyate
tṛtīyaṃ vaiṣṇavaṃ caivacaturthaṃ śaivamucyate
atha bhāgavataṃ proktaṃ paṣcamaṃ ṣaṣṭham ucyate
bhaviṣyaṃ nāradīyaṃ ca saptamaṃ parikīrtitam
mārkaṇḍeyam iti proktam aṣṭamaṃ navamaṃ tathā
laiṅgaṃ ca vāmanaṃ caiva skāndaṃ mātsyam athaiva ca
kaurmaṃ vārāham uditaṃ gāruḍaṃ vātha kīrtitam
brahmāṇḍam ity aṣṭādaśa purāṇāni vidur budhāḥ
tathā copapurāṇāni kathayiṣyāmy ataḥ param
ādyaṃ sanatkumārākhyaṃ nārasiṃham ataḥ param
tṛtīyam āṇḍam uddiṣṭaṃ daurvāsasam athaiva ca
nāradīyam athānyaṃ ca kāpilaṃ mānavaṃ tathā
tadvad auśanasaproktaṃ brahmāṇḍaṃ ca tataḥ param
vāruṇaṃ kālikāhvānaṃ māheśaṃ sāmbam eva ca
sauraṃ pārāśaraṃ caiva mārīcaṃ bhārgavāhvayam
kaumāraṃ ca purāṇāni kīrtitāny aṣṭa vai daśa
aṣṭādaśapurāṇānāṃ vyākartā tu bhaven manuḥ
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe pātālakhaṇḍe śivarāghavasaṃvāde
purāṇamāhātmyakathanaṃ nāma
paṣcadaśottaraśatatamo'dhyāyaḥ
ṣoḍaśottaraśatatamo'dhyāyaḥ
sūta uvāca
sandhyāvaṃ danakarmakriyatāmitirāmomunimācaṣṭāyam
hāhāhūhūkṛtasaṅgītirbaṃ dīpramukhaprastutakīrtiḥ
jāṃ bavatkṛtakarāvalambanaḥ prāpaduttamanadīṃ tugautamīm
karadvayedhṛtakuśaḥ sarāghavaḥ prāgamadvaruṇadiśāmathottamām
datvātato'rghatritayaṃ yathā vidhiprahṛṣṭaromāthajajāpasoṃ 'tare
samprārthayitvāvaruṇaṃ yathā kramaṃ śambhuṃ vasiṣṭhaṃ praṇanāmarāghavaḥ
tābhyāṃ kṛtāśīragamanmanaḥ padaṃ hanūmatākṣālitapādapaṃ kajaḥ
juhāvavahnīnathabaṃ dimāgadhaiḥ saṃ stūyamāno'thaviniryayaubahiḥ
nānāsanasamopetaṃ sabhāsthānaṃ yayaunṛpaḥ

śuśrūṣāmi kathaṃ mahādbhutatayāsvātmāśrayāman yathā
rakṣobādhanavādinīmathanṛpaḥ kiṃ tvetadityāhaca
kuṃ bhaśrotravadhaḥ purāsamajaniprāptodaśāsyovadhaṃ
paścādityayaman yathā viracitaṃ rāmāyaṇaṃ bhāṣate
ko'yaṃ vipravaraḥ samastajanatānāstikyasampādako rājṣāṃ sthānamupetyavaktisamayādaṇḍyo'thapūjyo'thavā
athāhajāṃ bavānamuṃ raghūttamaṃ kathāṃ prati

śrīrāma uvāca
kīrtayapurāṇaṃ meśuśrūṣuḥ kutūhalādahaṃ praṇītaṃ tatkenacavijṣātam
jāṃ bavānathababhāṣehividhātrenamonamas tathaiva vidhubhūṣaṇakeśavābhyām
athapurātanaṃ rāmāyaṇaṃ kathayāmi
atha tathā pidaśarathodaśarathasamānarathīmahīyasābalenasumānasanāmanagarajigīṣayāpaṃ keruhasutasutaṃ vasiṣṭhamāhūyanamaskṛtvāmunidattānujṣaḥ śatākṣauhiṇīsenayāsahāruhyaturaṃ gamaṃ caṃ drasamānaśarīramatiroṣasamāviṣṭoviṣṭaraśravasamārādhyadaṇḍayātrāṃ cakāra
sādhyonāmasvīyayāsenayāvṛtodaśarathābhimukhamāyayauyoddhuṃ yuddhaṃ cānyonyamabhūt

athasādhyasūnurbhūṣaṇonāmālpaparivāroyuyudhedaśarathena

etatsamānavarṇavayāetādṛśaḥ subhagaḥ paramaprītivarddhanonāmaputrobhallūkabhakṣitomṛtaḥ smṛti
sādhyo'pisakalamokṣamārgaṃ kṣitīśāyādiśat
harīśānausahārādhya sarva ikādaśīrupoṣyadvādaśīṣubrāhmaṇānārādhyatattatkālabhavaṃ phalapūrvamannādyaṃ vyaṃ janaṃ puṣpaṣcanyāyenasampādyakapilāghṛtenakeśavaṃ snāpayitvāmudgacūrṇenasaṃ lipyasvādūdakenasnāpayitvāsurabhipāṭīraṃ svayamudghṛṣṭaṃ mṛganābhyāgurusāreṇavāsametaṃ devāṃ gaṃ sarvam upalipyatulasīdalairyūthikākaravīranīlotpalakamalakokanadadroṇakusumamaruvadamanakagirikarṇikāketakīdalapūrvair yathā sambhavamabhyarcya dvādakṣareṇapuruṣasūktenavānāmnā ṣoḍaśopacāreṇavārādhyapraṇamyanṛtyaṃ kṛtvādevaṃ kṣamāpayet

vṛddhimīyuḥ
athapādasaṃ cāriṇaṃ bālacaṃ drasaṃ kāśadarśanaṃ bimbādharamunnatatilaprasūnanāsampuraścūlikālambamānaratnapatrakaṃ śravaṇalolalambamānakuṇḍalaṃ vakṣaḥ sthalavicalitasthūlamuktāhāraṃ vilasatkārtasvarobahuvalayaṃ siṃ janmaṇikaṃ kaṇaratnāṃ gulīyakaṃ hemamaṇiracitaśroṇisūtraṃ siṃ jannūpuropaśobhitapādamaṃ gulīyopaśobhitapādamadhyāṃ gulīyakaṃ vajrāṃ kuśasarojalāṃ chanaśobhitorupādatalaṃ tūṇīrasadṛśajaṃ ghaṃ karikarasadṛśoruṃ vistṛtajaghanaṃ sūkṣmamadhyaṃ vartulāvartakaṃ gaṃ bhīranābhimiṃ dranīlaśilāviśālavakṣaḥ sthalaṃ kaṃ bugrīvaṃ caṃ drabimbasadṛśavadanamarddhacaṃ drasadṛśalalāṭaṃ nīlakuṭilakuṃ talaṃ kroḍāsaktaṃ dhūlibhirāpāṇḍuraṃ phullapadmadalāraktavilolalocanaṃ maheśvaramivoddhūlitabhūtiṃ maheśvaramivadigaṃ baraṃ rāmaṃ kumāraṃ rājādaśarathodṛṣṭvā harṣaparipūrṇahṛdayaḥ putramāliṅgya cuṃ bitvāvakṣasyāliliṅgadṛḍham

brahmapaṣcamaśiroharaṇapārvatīvallabha nāradopagīyamānaśubhacaritaśarvatrinetra triśūladharapinākapāṇekapardinnanekarūpadharavṛṣabhavāhanaśuddhasphaṭikasaṃ kāśacaturbhujanānāyudhadakṣiṇāmūrteīśvaradevapategaṅgādharatripuraharaśrīśailanivāsakāśīnāthakedāreśvarabhūṣaṇasiddheśvaragokarṇeśvarakanakhaleśvaraparvateśvaracakrapradabāṇacintāpādakamuraharapūjitacaraṇakamalasomasomabhūṣaṇa sarva
abhayavānathapunaḥ padmāsanāsīnamumādhiṣṭhitāṃ kamīśamāmuktasarvābharaṇaṃ sukāṃ tikirīṭinaṃ haimavatīkaṭisparśaṅkaradvayenābhayavarapradantar aṃ gitānekadiśābhiḥ
pūrṇatejasvinaṃ hāsamukhaṃ prasannavadanaṃ dadarśarāmaḥ
parameśitāraṃ nanāmabaddhāṃ jaliḥ punaś ca daṇḍavatpapāta
rāma uvāca
laṃ kāṃ gamiṣyāmisamudrataraṇeupāyamekaṃ mamadehiśambho
śambhur uvāca
tadāruhyasamudraṃ tīrtvālaṃ kāmāpnuhi
āgataṃ dhanustataś ca rāmo'pūjayat
athaharodhanurādāyarāmāyadattavān
āruruhuḥ sarvevānarārāmalakṣmaṇaucaṣaṣṭiparārddhaṃ teṣāmasaṅkhyeṣu vānareṣu dhanurārūḍheṣu nikāmaṃ yayau
dhanustaṭaṃ vānarāścatatastatogatvānirīkṣayāmāsuḥ
athātikāyonāmarakṣaḥ kapibalamālokyarāvaṇāyoktavān
rāvaṇo'pikiṃ kapibhiḥ śākhāmṛgaiḥ kiṃ vāmānuṣābhyāṃ rāmalakṣmaṇābhyāṃ kimāyātaṃ daivāgatamasakaṃ bhojanamity uvāca
atha sugrīvaḥ paścimāvalambinibhāsvatihanūmajjāṃ bavadādimahābalaiścātikāyairasaṅkhyātairlaṃ kāpārśvaṃ gatvāupavanaṃ pravaiśyanānāphalānikhāditvā payaḥ pītvopavanarakṣirākṣasānvidrāvya sarva vipinamekaikaśogṛhītvāprādravanlaṃ kāṃ gopuraṃ cagatvāsamāruhyaprāsādaṃ caviśīryaikaikaśaḥ kecitstaṃ bhamādāyarakṣobhiryuyudhuḥ
ekecaśālāṃ babhaṃ jurgṛhāṇicūrṇayāmāsurbālavṛddhastrījanādikaṃ sarvam evanijaghnuḥ
athaikaṃ prākāraṃ nirjitamājṣāyarāvaṇa iṃ drajitaṃ sandideśa
iṃ drajitācayuddhaṃ vānarāḥ kṛtvābhītāḥ palāyitāśca
athahanūmānakhilaṃ nirgatamājṣāyarāvaṇaṃ jṣātvāvānarānāhūyanirbhartsyasenāṃ mahatīṃ kārayitvā
daśamukhaṃ kalpayitvāmodayāmāsa
athakhasthaeveṃ drajidyuyudhenacavānarāstaṃ dṛṣṭavantaḥ
atha bhuvi papātataṃ lakṣmaṇaś ca yamalokagāminaṃ cakāra
athātikāyamahākāyauvānarasainyaṃ bahuśohatvālakṣmaṇaṃ pīḍayitvārāmeṇasaṃ yudhyasugrīvaṃ kṛtvāhanūmajjāṃ bavadbhyāṃ yuyudhāteparājitaugṛhītvātaucayoddhārāvādāyarāmasamīpaṃ gatvārāmāyanyavedayatām
atikāyamabhāṣatarāmaḥ
rāvaṇasyamamayuddhaṃ brūhisacivānāmanyeṣāṃ mahābhayānāṃ ca
atikāya uvāca
niścitam idaṃ purāsmābhiḥ kāryaṃ senāṃ vibhāgaśaḥ kṛtvā vidyunmālīnāmarākṣasomahābalovicitrayodhīdarśanādarśanayodhīvānaraiḥ sarva irekaevayudhyate
aparecabalinomahāntaḥ śikṣitāstrāścāgatāāvāṃ cayuvābhyāṃ yudhyāvorāvaṇaḥ puṣpakamāruhyāparabhāgenatvāmevanihaniṣyati
anyecarākṣasāḥ kuṃ bhakarṇamukhāścātmarūpaṃ kṛtvātvāṃ parivāryagṛhītvāsītāyaidarśayitvātatsaṃ nidhāvevahaniṣyati
rāmaḥ prāhaahobalavatāṃ kimasādhyamevaṃ bhavatidaivagatiḥ kuṭilāsugrīvo'tikopanaḥ
sakrodhaṃ dṛṣṭvā rāmam uvāca
rāmaḥ prāhāvadhyaumocanīyāvetauvasanānibhūṣaṇānyānayetyuktamātrehanūmatātānyānītānirāmastābhyāṃ dattavān
natvāyadetallaṃ kādvāredṛśyatedārupaṣcavaktraṃ śukreṇoktametenacchinnenarāvaṇohanyate
athacadārucchedanasamanantaraṃ pātālaṃ gaṃ tavyamitibhārgavabhāṣitaṃ śāsanaṃ likhitam
tasmāttvam idaṃ dārvekaprayatnaikabāṇanipātenapaṣcadhāicaṃ chadhitatastavaśaktiṃ jṣātvāyuddhamatidṛḍhaṃ kurvīmahi
athabhārgavavacovijṣāyarāmaḥ pūrvakoṭyāṃ sparśamātreṇasajyaṃ kṛtvādhanuṣibāṇaṃ saṃ yojyarakṣobhyāṃ hanūmatāśrāvayannevabāṇaṃ mumoca
bāṇaṃ dhanuṣaś ca litaṃ taurākṣasaubāṇamārgaṃ nirīkṣamāṇaudārubāṇenapaṣcadhācchinnaṃ nirīkṣyarāmaṃ vyajṣāpayatāmāvayoḥ śiśavorakṣaṇīyāstvayetitathetyāharāmaḥ
rākṣasaulaṃ kāṃ praviṣṭau
athaprākārayuddhaṃ kartuṃ vānarāgatvā sarva tovaraṇamātraṃ hipārṣṇibhiḥ pādairjānubhiḥ karaiḥ pṛṣṭhaiścatalasamaṃ kṛtvādvitīyaprākāraṃ gatāstadācarāvaṇaḥ samāgatyasarvāneveṣu bhirdrāvayitvātadanugacchanarāmamagāt
atharāmodaśabhirbāṇairāvaṇaṃ savraṇaṃ cakāra
rāvaṇodaśabhirbāṇairvivyādha
atha rāmabāṇaiśca kṣataśarīro rākṣasaḥ palāyanaparo'bhavat
vānarā lakṣmaṇaś ca koṭikoṭirākṣasānaghnan
atha parasminnahani vibhīṣaṇo rāvaṇaṃ vicāryedam uvāca
tṛtīyopāyakālo'yaṃ caturthaṃ na vicāraya
caturtho viparīto na śastaḥ śastārthakāriṇaḥ
parasya cā''tmanaḥ śaktiṃ viditvā cā''tmano'dhikām
tadā yuddhaṃ praśastaṃ syādviparītaṃ vināśakam
ekeṣu vālihantā'sau vālirjṣātastvayā purā
mārīcamekabāṇena bhavānapi palāyitaḥ
nihatā rākṣasāḥ śūrā indrajicca suto hataḥ
dāsabhāvamatho vā'pi dattvā sītāmathā'pnuhi
gopurasthaṃ tathā dāru paṣcavaktramatheṣu ṇā
ciccheda paṣcadhā tena rāmastvāṃ mārayiṣyati
tvadarthaṃ bahavo naṣṭā nāśameṣyanti cāpare
eko nyāyaḥ sukhārthāya na ca mauḍhyaṃ sahodara
mānuṣīṃ mṛtyusaṃ yuktāmanicchantīṃ pativratām
patnīṃ balavataścāpi pūjayitvā visarjaya
viraktiratha cejjātā duḥkhāyākāryavartanam
ātmano maraṇaṃ vyarthaṃ tasyāścādya samāgame
tyāgo vā maraṇaṃ tāta dharmapatnyās tathā bhavet
anyadākhyāmi te vākyaṃ sarveṣāṃ ca priyaṃ hitam
gatvā rāmāntikaṃ natvā stutvā vijṣāpya rāghavam
kṣama rāma mahāvīra śaraṇāgatavatsala
tāmasā rākṣasāḥ sarve vayamete supāpinaḥ
sītāpahārajaṃ doṣaṃ tyaktvā putrānavehi naḥ
tvadadhīnā vayaṃ rāma rakṣa vā mārayecchayā
sthirāyuṣo bhaviṣyāmaḥ sthirarājyā daśānana
athā''ha rāvaṇo vākyamaho no rākṣaso bhavān
na śūro rājadharmaṃ ca na ca jānāsi śāśvatam
śūrāṇāmuttamo dharmo na ṣaṇḍhānāṃ bhavādṛśām
śatrupakṣaṃ samāliṅgya nirgacchecchā hi cennṛpa
atha bibhīṣaṇo mandiraṃ gatvā rāmāntikaṃ gatvā taṃ śaraṇamabhajat
atha rāvaṇaḥ purānnirgatya rāmeṇa lakṣmaṇavānarai rākṣasā api yuyudhire
atha rāvaṇaṃ mahābalaṃ hantumaśaktorāmo vibhīṣaṇamukhamavalokya tad ukta cihnapadaṃ bāṇena nirbhidyāmārayat
atha kumbhakarṇo mahāgadām ādāya sarvaṃ niṣpādya vānarān anekaśo bhakṣayitvā rāmottamāṅgaṃ gadayāhan
atha rāmo niśitabāṇaśatena tamahanmamāra kumbhakarṇaḥ
atha vibhīṣaṇena rāvaṇādeḥ śrāddhādikaṃ kārayitvā śivālayaṃ tannāmnā kārayitvā tameva laṅkārājye vibhīṣaṇamabhiṣicya sītāmagnipraveśaśuddhāmumāmaheśvarābhyāṃ namayitvā purahareṇa dattākhilāmṛtabalāyuṣyaḥ supuṣpakamāruhya jaladhimuttīrya pārāvārataṭe senāṃ samavasthāpya śivapratiṣṭhāṃ tatra kṛtvā munibhirdevairabhyarcito'yodhyāmagamat
ātmanā''gatānindrādidevānāsanādinā'bhyarcya vānarānsampūjyamuktajaṭo'bhiṣikto rājye rāvaṇavadhaharṣitā devā rāmam ūcuḥ
tvayā''tmarājye sthāpitā vayaṃ naḥ sarva dā paripālaya tvamādinārāyaṇo devonikhiladuṣṭanigrahārthamavatīrṇo rāvaṇaṃ sabāndhavaṃ hatvā lokatrayarakṣako'si śriyā saha sukhī bhavetyudīrya svargaṃ gatāḥ
athāyodhyāvāsino rāmaṃ praharṣitā ūcuḥ
hatvā śatrūnsamāyāto dṛṣṭvā prāpto'si vai śivam
diṣṭyā tvaṃ rājase rāma diṣṭyā pālayase prajāḥ
tvayāyajṣāḥ kariṣyaṃ te tvayā dharmovivardhate
itipauravacaḥ śrutvārāmo rājīvalocanaḥ
munīn uvācadharmātmāpūjayitvākhilairjanaiḥ
kaccittapaḥ samṛddhaṃ vaḥ kaccidyajṣaḥ svanuṣṭhitaḥ
kaccitsvadāraniratāḥ kaccidīśobhipūjyate
munaya ūcuḥ
gacchāmahepadamitaḥ kiṃ vātvaṃ manyasenṛpa
rāma uvāca
athetyuktvāmunigaṇāḥ kṛtvābhojanamuttamam
abhivardhyatamāśīrbhirhṛṣṭāḥ svaṃ svaṃ padaṃ yayuḥ
rāmo'piparamaprītaḥ sabhāryaś ca sahānujaḥ
akaṃ ṭakaṃ sakṛtavānrājyaṃ sarva janapriyaḥ
śṛṇotyetadupākhyānaṃ yaḥ kaścidapipātakī
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe pātālakhaṇḍe śivarāghavasaṃvāde purākalpīyarāmāyaṇa
kathanaṃ nāmaṣoḍaśottaraśatatamo'dhyāyaḥ
saptadaśādhikaśatatamo'dhyāyaḥ
sūta uvāca
bhāradvājagṛhebhuktvārāmacaṃ draḥ prasannadhīḥ
munīṃ draviṣṇusahitovānararkṣasamanvitaḥ
meghacchanne tathā kāśemaṃ daṃ caratimārute
aṣṭāpadastaṃ bhayutaṃ hemapaṭṭikakalpitam
pāṭīracaṃ drakastūrīkuṃ kumaiḥ surabhīkṛtam
caṃ drajotsnāgamaṃ sūryyānirīkṣyamadhyabhittikam
gṛhāntarbhūtalaṃ kṛtsnaṃ caṃ drapuṣparasokṣitam
digudīcī tathā kṛtsnābhittikalpanavarjitā
śatahastāṃ gaṇaṃ tasya sphaṭikoparikalpitam
gṛhāṃ gaṇādhikacchāyaḥ pārijātamahīruhaḥ
kṛtsnaprāvṛtikaṃ tatra nibiḍaṃ kadalīvanam
kadalīvanasaṃ yuktaṃ ketakīvanasaṃ vṛtam
pārāvatagaṇadhvānaṃ nānopavanaśobhitam
prāsādaśatasambādhaṃ mattakokilanāditam
śākhālambimahāratnaśobhitānekapādapam
kinnarīvanitāgītanādapūritadiṅmukham
bhāradvājagṛhaṃ puṇyamanaṃ taguṇasevitam
ratikaṃ darpasaṃ kāśadāsīdāsaśatānvitam
nānopakaraṇopetaṃ bhāradvājagṛhaṃ śubham
tasya cāntargataḥ saudhastatrāntargṛhavāṭikāḥ
caturdikṣumahādevagṛhaprāsādaśobhitam
svargasthitavarastrīṇāṃ viśrāmāyaivakalpitam
bhāradvājagṛhādrāmonirgatyāśeṣasaṃ yutaḥ
tadantar ācchāditakaṃ balaṃ tadāpṛthaksthavastrāsanasaṃ yutaṃ ca
siṃ hāsanaṃ madhyagataṃ tathaikaṃ munyāsanānekagataṃ viveśa
paurāṇikasyānupamāsanāntaraṃ bhūpālaharyṛkṣavarāsanaṃ ca
paurāṇikaṃ pūrvamathopaveśyatatovasiṣṭhaṃ munipuṅgavāṃ śca
nārāyaṇaṃ bhūmipatīnkapīṃ ścanīcāsanaṃ casvayamāsasāda
meghāvṛtaṃ vyomadiśaḥ prasannāḥ supuṣpamurvītalamuptabījam
tadaṃ gaṇaṃ noṣṇamahonaśītalaṃ saṃ tānapuṣpaṃ damapuṣpagandhi
śambhuṃ vilokyāthavacobabhāṣerāmaḥ kathāṃ kīrtayaśaṅkarasya
tṛptirnajātāmunivaryyaśṛṇvatomāheśamākhyānamaghaughanāśanam
cakārakiṃ vānanugautamāśramemaheśvarodevagaṇādhisaṃ vṛtaḥ
śiva uvāca
mahāvipaṣcīmavalambyaniṣṭhitaḥ savāyusūnuḥ śivamanvapṛcchat
nyāyārjitairevahipūjanevibhoḥ kīdṛgbhaveccānayajaiḥ phalaṃ vada
atheśvarovānaramābabhāṣevadāmi sarvaṃ tavadhyānataḥ śṛṇu
nyāyārjitaiḥ pūjyasadāśivaṃ tvajaṃ samprāpacaiśvaryam idaṃ higautamaḥ
purādvijomaṃ kaṇasūnurākathaḥ suśobhanāmāpasatīṃ dvijanmā
draridraekaḥ karuṇāsamanvitaḥ ṣaṣṭhāhabhojīpitṛvarjitaś ca
upoṣyapaṣcāhamathāpibhoktuṃ pravṛttaevāthasamāpatadyatiḥ
yatirbabhāṣemadhuraṃ tadā kathaṃ māsopavāsītavabhoktumāgataḥ
tiṣṭhāmibhuṃ jeyadicāstitemunenamebubhukṣānyagṛhādvibhoktum
ākatha uvāca
namebhujiḥ paṣcadinaṃ dvijeṃ draṣaṣṭhedinemebhujirāgataś ca
tadāmayākāryamacintanīyaṃ prakṣālayāmyehitavādyapādau
athākathovīkṣyamuniṃ sutuṣṭaṃ tutoṣabhāryāsahitastapasvī
gato'thabhuktvāpiyatiḥ sacākathaḥ saṃ tuṣṭacitto'thajapaṣcakāra
pīṭhe'thakṛtvātamumāpatiṃ śivaṃ liṅgesamārādhyasamanvitaṃ gaṇaiḥ
liṅgaṃ nidhāyāthanirīkṣamāṇodadarśacājṣātakṛśākṛtiṃ dvijam
digaṃ baraṃ pādavihīnametaṃ kāṇaṃ kuṇiṃ karṇavihīnakaṃ prabhum
sāmodgiraṃ taṃ bahuśāstrapāragaṅgṛhaṃ samāyāntamathodadarśa
athākathobhāryāṃ suśobhanāmidam uvāca
ayaṃ hivikṛtaveṣobrāhmaṇaḥ samāyāti
sāśobhanovāca
āyurlalāṭelikhitaṃ nāntarānaśyati
ākathaāha
yathā baddhāyuṣo'piyajṣasyavīrabhadreṇacchinnaṃ śiraajasrātmanaḥ kimutanuyāṇāṃ pāpātmanāmititadenaṃ parihṛtyatvayābhujyate yaditvetasmaimayānnaṃ dīyate
bhāryāprāhakathamahaṃ bhokṣyetvayyabhuktemayākiṃ pūrvaṃ bhuktamidamaparaṃ śṛṇu
annaṃ hiprāṇināṃ prāṇāḥ pratyakṣaṃ sarva dehinām
annādbhūtānijāyaṃ tevarddhaṃ tetānivaiyataḥ
tasmādannādhikaṃ kiṃ cinnāsyadānaṃ mahāphalam
paralokasahāyohidharmobhāryānabāṃ dhavāḥ
bhāryāvāpitarauputrāyāvadāyurnabāṃ dhavāḥ
dharmaṃ dharmabhṛtāṃ śreṣṭhaṃ bhuṃ ktecānyekimāvayoḥ
itibhāryāvacaḥ śrutvāākathaḥ karuṇānidhiḥ
ayaṃ saśaṅkarodevonānākaraṇamāgataḥ
itiniścityamanasātasyāṃ gaṃ pāpanāśanam
ājānupādaṃ prakṣālyaparājaṃ ghamataḥ param
athākatho'pipatsandhiṃ gṛhāṃ gaṇamupānayat
unmucyapādasandhiṃ saniṣasādārpitāsane
pādasandhimathādāyagṛhabāhyamupānayat
athādahaccatadgehaṃ daṃ patīcāpyatāḍayat
ākathastāḍitoviprodahyamānaṃ gṛhaṃ tadā
viveśadevamīśānamādātuṃ tūrṇamevavā
athādāyamaheśānaṃ dagdhapūjaṃ dvijottamaḥ
nirgatyacatatodṛṣṭvāmukhasaṃ tāpam eva ca
dagdhapūjāṃ tiraskṛtyavīkṣyadagdhāṃ gamapyuta
bhāryām uvācadharmātmā yathā pūjāmaheśituḥ
vyaṃ ga uvāca
paścādapikṛtāpūjāsaphalātebhaviṣyati
yathā nyadravyadahanetādṛśaṃ dīyatejanaiḥ
pūjāyādahanetadvatpūjāsyakriyatāmiti
ākatha uvāca
nacānyāyārjjitairvipraśambhoḥ pūjāśubhapradā
ityuktvācākathastūrṇaṃ svāṃ gaṃ dagdhumupākramat
dagdhaṃ liṅgaṃ tadonmattogṛhītvāntardadhekṣaṇāt
athavyaṃ goharobhūtvāvārayāmāsacākatham
ākatho'pivibhoḥ pādebhaktiṃ vavresuniścalām
sūta uvāca
etāṃ śrutvākathāṃ rāmaḥ prahṛṣṭomunibhirvṛtaḥ
bhāradvājaṃ namaskṛtyaprayāṇājṣāmayācata
athobharadvājamuniḥprasannaḥ śambhuṃ vasiṣṭhaṃ munipuṅgavaṃ ca
nārāyaṇaṃ carṣigaṇāṃ ścanatvāvyasarjayatte'piyayuḥ praṇamya
naimiṣīyā ūcuḥ
gatvāyodhyāṃ mahātejāḥ samastamunisaṃ yutaḥ
kiṃ cakāratatorāmaḥ sacaśambhurmahāyaśāḥ
sūta uvāca
kausalyāmāsikaśrāddhamapare'hanirāghavaḥ
śambhuṃ samas tattvajṣaṃ nāradaṃ romaśaṃ bhṛgum
bhūmausukhāstṛtāyāṃ casuṣvāpāvyākulendriyaḥ
annaṃ śākādikaṃ śuddhaṃ janairevānvakārayat
nānānnānivicitrāṇicoṣyādyāni tathaiva ca
vaṭakādīṃ tathā bhakṣyānaṣṭatriṃ śadakalpayat
pāyasaṃ ṣaḍvidhaṃ caivapakvaśākaśatadvayam
apakvamiśrakāṇāṃ caśa tatra yamakalpayat
kālaśākādikaṃ śākaṃ phalānivividhānica
mūlānicaikakaṃ dānivalkalānicarāghavaḥ
kārayitvānadīṃ gatvāsahabhrātṛpurohitaḥ
sarayūsalilesnātvāhutvāgniṃ svāgatāndvijān
uktvātusvāgataṃ tāṃ stukṛtadevārcanonṛpaḥ
prāṇānāyamyasaṃ kalpyakṣaṇaṃ caivapradattavān
romaśaṃ nāradaṃ rāmovaiśvadevenyamantrayat
śambhuṃ bhṛguṃ kauśikaṃ camātṛsthānenyamantrayat
gomayenatataḥ kṛtvāmaṇḍalaṃ pūjyacārhataḥ
pādaprakṣālanaṃ cakresītādattodakenaca
ācāmayitvātānviprāngṛhaṃ gantum athodyataḥ
abhyāgataḥ samāyātaḥ sthavirovikṛtākṛtiḥ
kṛśaḥ sampracaladgātrovepitāṃ ghriśirās tathā
lambamānatvagutkarṣacchvāsakāsādipīḍitaḥ
dūṣikāklinnagaṇḍaś ca lālāsampṛktakūrcakaḥ
uvācarāmaṃ rājānamahamekodvijaḥ sthitaḥ
rāmo'pitadvacaḥ śrutvālakṣmaṇaṃ vākyamabravīt
śrāddhadharmaṃ najānīṣemaharṣigaṇasevitam
mamāvamānataḥ sarva viprāṇāmavamānanam
śrāddhaṃ vihanyatecāpi narakaṃ cagamiṣyasi
atharāmaḥ svayaṃ viprapādauprākṣālayattadā
ācāmayitvātaṃ vipraṃ gṛhaṃ prāveśayattataḥ
ācāntaś ca svayaṃ rāmoviṣṭaraṃ dattavānatha
āsīneṣu cavipreṣu prāṇavāyuṃ nirudhyaca
svakarmakaraṇānujṣāṃ labdhvā'thasatilaṃ jalam
udīratāmiti tathā pitṛpātrasthalekṣipet
gāyatryācākṣatajalaṃ devapātrasthalekṣipet

viśvedevārcanaṃ kuryādyavairvātaṇḍulairatha
mūlāgrayojitaudarbhaugṛhītvāsākṣatāvatha

itidattvā''sanaṃ teṣāṃ śrāddhadaḥ prārthayetkṣaṇam
arghaṃ kṛtvātataḥ paścāduttarāgrakuśeṣvatha

pitṝṇāmarcanaṃ kuryādevamevāpasavyakam

arcanaṃ tutadāteṣāmapasavyaṃ tupūvarvat
prakṣālyabhājanaṃ svarṇaṃ devānāṃ parikalpayet
pitṝṇāṃ rājataṃ kuryād yathā sambhavamevavā
tadabhāvetukāṃ syaṃ syādananyāśitamuttamam
pātrāṇitadabhāvesyuḥ pālāśāninamadhyamam
rambhāṇicūtapatrāṇijambūpuṃ nāgakānica

darvyāmannamathā''dāyakarābhyāmājyam eva ca

pariviṣyopavītīsyādabhighāryasamāharet
dvitīyāmāhutiṃ hutvācābhighāryākṣataṃ tataḥ
mekṣaṇenatato'bhīkṣṇaṃ pātayetpitṛpātrake

bhakṣyāṇibhojyaśākānisarvāṇyevasadattavān
athātithirmahāvṛddhovīkṣamāṇastatastataḥ

etāvaddātumaśaktaḥ kathaṃ śrāddhakriyodyataḥ
mamaikasyapradānetvamaśaktorāmakiṃ vṛthā

kathaṃ medīyatebhuktiḥ kathameṣāṃ tathā vada
rāmastamabravīdvīrobhuṃ kṣvatvaṃ hi yathā sukham
athaśambhuṃ samāhūyaprāhatvaṃ pariveṣaya
tvaṃ pitāpārvatīmātāśivādevītimematiḥ
annapūrṇeśvarīdevībhavānyevetimematiḥ
sāśāṃ bhavīvacaḥ prāhatatparyāptaṃ dadāmyaham
athomākāṃ syamādāyabhiḥ sāpūrṇamalaṃ kṛtam
svarṇadarvyāsamādāyapāyasaṅgandhakāntimat

dvijasyadakṣiṇehastesā'dadātsatkṛtaṃ mudā

prasāritakaraścā''sīdgṛhītvāpāyasaṃ kare

śambhupatnībabhāṣetaṃ karebhuṃ kṣvatatodade
tadakṣayamathajṣātvāprāsārayadathetaram
anyeṣāmapiviprāṇāṃ pakvākṣayyamadātsatī
athapāṇidvayagataṃ vijṣāyākṣayyapāyasam
dṛṣṭvākarāntaramathoprāsārayatasadvijaḥ

śambhur uvāca
rāmeṇasītayādattaṃ mayādattaṃ hi yatra ca
itaḥ paraṃ hikiṃ deyaṃ pūrṇaṃ vātvaṃ vadasvame
niṣaṇṇohiciraṃ dadhyau kathaṃ mekevalaḥ karaḥ
tṛptānathadvijāṣjṣātvārāghavaḥ paramārthavit

āhātithirbahiḥ kāryaṃ mayā''camanaṃ viṭpate

tathā purvismayaṃ viprānaravānararākṣasāḥ

yadikāmaṃ prayacchethāmanaś ca parapūruṣāt

śrīpadmapurāṇam
atha śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe ṣaṣṭham uttarakhaṇḍaṃ prārabhyate
jālandharopakhyānaḥ
auṃ śrīviṣṇave namaḥ
auṃ śrīvedavyāsāya namaḥ
auṃ nārāyaṇaṃ namaskṛtya naraṃ caiva narottamam

sūta uvāca
śṛṇudhvaṃ munayaḥ sarve yad uktaṃ śaṅkareṇa hi

gato’drimandaraṃ śambhuṃ praṣṭuṃ kiṃcin manogatam
tatrāsīnam umānāthaṃ praṇipatya śivājṣayā
upaviṣṭaḥ samādiṣṭa āsane’bhimukho vibhoḥ
nārada uvāca
papraccha idam eveśaṃ yan māṃ pṛcchatha sattamāḥ
śiva uvāca
śṛṇu nārada vakṣyāmi purāṇaṃ vedasaṃmitam
jālandharaṃ tathākhyānaṃ śrīśailākhyaṃ tataḥ param
haridvārasya vyākhyānaṃ viṣṇupādodbhavāṃ tathā
prayāgatīrthaṃ te vakṣye daśāśvamedhikaṃ ca tat
dvārakāyās tathākhyānaṃ mahotsavavidhis tataḥ
taḍākajaṃ tathā puṇyaṃ vāpīkūpaprapādikam
gāṇapatyaṃ tato vakṣye vaiṣṇavāgamam eva ca
jīrṇoddhārasya māhātmyaṃ mandākinīsamāgamam
sābhramatyāstumāhātmyaṃ māhātmyaṃ tīrajaṃ tathā
strīśūdrāṇāṃ tathādharmaṃ tathātyājyaiś ca dhāraṇam
umāmaheśasaṃvāde proktaṃ nāmasahasrakam
kailāsāttatsamānītaṃ nāradenāgrajanmanā
lokānāṃ brāhmaṇānāṃ cakṣatriyāṇāṃ viśeṣataḥ
strīśūdrāṇāṃ viśeṣeṇapaṭhitavyaṃ samāhitaiḥ
idaṃ pavitraṃ paramaṃ puṇyamāyuṣyavardhanam
paṭhitavyaṃ viśeṣeṇa viṣṇoḥ sāyujyam āpnuyāt
viṣṇor nāmasahasraṃ tatpāvanaṃ bhuviviśrutam
caturviṃśatimūrtīnāṃ sthānakānīha saṃvadet
teṣāṃ ca mātāpitarāv antaraṃ ca bravīmy aham
gotraṃ vedāṃś ca teṣāṃ vai karmāṇīha tathaiva ca
striyas teṣāṃ pravakṣyāmi yathā vijñānadarśanāt
caturviṃśaty ekādaśīnāṃ dvādaśīnāṃ prabhāvatām
godāvaryāś ca māhātmyaṃ śaṅkhacakrādidhāraṇam
brāhmaṇānāṃ viśeṣeṇa dhāraṇaṃ vidhipūrvakam
yamunāyāś ca māhātmyaṃ gaṇḍikāyās tathā mune
vetravatyās tu māhātmyaṃ vacmy ahaṃ te na saṃśayaḥ
gillitīrthodbhavaṃ puṇyaṃ śilākṣetraṃ mahac ca yat
tat sarvaṃ sampravakṣyāmi khaṇḍe uttarasaṃjṣake
arbudeśvaramāhātmyaṃ tatra tīrthādikaṃ ca yat
sarasvatyāś ca māhātmyaṃ siddhakṣetrādikaṃ ca yat
gopīcandanamāhātmyaṃ paṭṭapūjāṃ tathaiva ca
niraṣjanasya māhātmyaṃ tathā vijñānadarśanam
tatra dīpapradānaṃ ca dhūpadānaṃ viśeṣataḥ
kārttikasyātha māhātmyaṃ māhātmyaṃ māghajaṃ tathā
sarveṣāṃ ca vratānāṃ ca māhātmyaṃ vidhipūrvakam
śṛṇu nārada vakṣyāmi jagannāthākhyam uttamam
yaṃ dṛṣṭvā mucyate loko brahmahatyādipātakāt
brāhmaṇāyatra bhuṣjanti vedaśāstra viśāradaḥ
anyeṣāṃ caiva lokānāṃ kākathā caiva suvrata
paṣcaviṃśatyatranāgānartakyovividhās tathā
brahmahatyābālahatyāgavāṃ hatyātathaiva ca
tāḥ sarvāvilayaṃ yānti jagannāthasyadarśanāt
viṣṇoḥ pūjanakaṃ puṣpais tanmāhātmyamapibruve
parvatānāṃ varṇanaṃ cadeśānāṃ varṇanaṃ tathā
gopūjanādimāhātmyaṃ siddhānāṃ caiva pūjanam
kadalīgarbhadānaṃ cavṛkṣadānaṃ tataḥ param
aśvadānaṃ hastidānaṃ japamāhātmya muttamam
mantradīkṣāgamaṃ caiva gurorlakṣaṇam eva ca
śiṣyasyalakṣaṇaṃ proktaṃ yathāpaurāṇikāviduḥ
caraṇodakamāhātmyaṃ pitṛśrāddhādikaṃ ca yat
pitṛkṣayāhadānaṃ canīlotsargavidhis tataḥ
śālagrāmasyadānasya māhātmyaṃ mālyagandhayoḥ
daśamyaikādaśīvedhaṃ dvādaśīharivāsaram
teṣāṃ caiva tumāhātmyaṃ rudranāmādikaṃ ca yat
mathurāyāś ca māhātmyaṃ kurukṣetrādikaṃ tathā
setubandhasyacākhyānaṃ śrīrāmeśvarajaṃ tathā
tryaṃ bakasyacamāhātmyaṃ paṣcavaṭyāśca yatphalam
daṇḍakāraṇyamāhātmyaṃ śṛṇuvāḍavasattama
daṇḍakāraṇyamāhātmyaṃ nṛsiṃ hotpattikāraṇam
gītāyāś caiva māhātmyaṃ tathā bhāgavatasya ca
kāliṃ dyāś caiva māhātmyamindraprasthasyavarṇanam
rukmāṃ gadacaritraṃ tumahimāvaiṣṇavasyaca
vaiṣṇavehyekabhukte tu śṛṇuvāḍavasattama
sasāgarāṃ capṛthivīṃ dattvā caiva tuyatphalam
sātvikāḥ sattva sampannārājasāḥ kāmukāḥ smṛtāḥ
tāmasāadhamāḥ proktāvaiṣṇavānāṃ tulakṣaṇam
brāhmaṇāvaiṣṇavāyetuvedadharmaparāyaṇāḥ
teṣāṃ māhātmyaṃ vakṣyāmi yathoktaṃ caiva nārada
teṣāṃ pāpaṃ tuvakṣyāmisāṃ prataṃ ṛṣisattama
jvālāmukhyās tathākhyānaṃ himaśailekṣaṇaṃ tathā
kāyasthānāṃ samutpatirgayāvyākhyānam eva ca
eteṣāṃ caiva māhātmyaṃ pādmedṛṣṭaṃ tathāśrutam
rāmagayāyāmāhātmyaṃ tathāpretaśilābhavam
brahmaṇaśca tathākhyānaṃ śilākhyānaṃ vadāmy aham
maheśvarakṛtāmbhaktiṃ viṣṇunācamahātmanā
adyāpikāśyāṃ japatimahārudrohyanāmayam
māhātmyaṃ ca tatovakṣyesāgarasyahinārada
tilatarpaṇajaṃ puṇyaṃ yavajaṃ puṇyam eva ca
tulasīdala saṃyuktaṃ tarpaṇaṃ devajaṃ tathā
tanmāhātmyaṃ pravakṣyāmi yathoktaṃ brahmaṇāmama
śaṅkhanādasya māhātmyaṃ puṇyaṃ cā saṃkhya saṃjṣakam
ravervārasya māhātmyaṃ yogasyaviṣṇu saṃjṣinaḥ
vaidhṛtasyacamāhātmyaṃ vyatīpātasyavaitathā
annadānaṃ vastradānaṃ bhūmidānaṃ tathaiva ca
śayyādānaṃ cagodānaṃ tathāvṛṣabham eva ca
janmāṣṭamyāś ca māhātmyaṃ matsya māhātmyam eva ca
kūrmamāhātmyaṃ tat proktaṃ vārāhasya tathaiva ca
māhātmyaṃ ca gavādīnāṃ dānānāṃ pravadāmy aham
tanmāhātmyaṃ tatovakṣyeśṛṇudevarṣisattama
prahareṣu pṛthakpūjāphalaṃ devarṣisattama
parśurāmasyacākhyānaṃ reṇukāyāvadhas tathā
brāhmaṇānāṃ bhūmidānaṃ rāmeṇaivaca yatkṛtam
rāmasyāśramajaṃ puṇyaṃ vadāmy ahamaśeṣataḥ
narmadāyās tathākhyānaṃ puṇyapūjanayos tathā
dānaṃ vedapurāṇānāmāśramāṇāṃ nirūpaṇam
hiraṇyadānapuṇyaṃ cabrahmāṇḍadānam eva ca
padmapurāṇadānaṃ cakhaṇḍānāṃ vyaktayas tathā
prathamaṃ sṛṣṭikhaṇḍaṃ cadvitīyaṃ bhūmikhaṇḍakam
svargakhaṇḍaṃ tṛtīyaṃ caturyaṃ pātāla saṃjṣakam
uttaraṃ paṣcamaṃ proktaṃ khaṇḍānyanukrameṇavai
etatpadmapurāṇaṃ tuvyāsenatumahātmanā
kṛtaṃ lokahitārthāyabrāhmaṇaśreyasetathā
śūdrāṇāṃ puṇyajananaṃ tīvradāridryanāśanam
mokṣadaṃ sukhadaṃ cāśukalyāṇapradamavyayam
śrutvādānaṃ tathākuryādvidhinātatranārada
iti śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe paṣcapaṣcāśatsahasrasaṃhitāyām
uttarakhaṇḍe maheśanāradasaṃvāde bījasamuccayo nāma
dvitīyo’dhyāyaḥ
maheśa uvāca
ekalakṣaṃ paṣcaviṃśatsahasrā parvatās tathā
teṣāṃ madhye mahatpuṇyaṃ badrikāśramam uttamam
naranārāyaṇodevoyatra tiṣṭhatinārada
tasyasvarūpaṃ tejaśca vakṣyāmīhacasāṃ patam
himaparvataśṛṃ gecakṛṣṇākāratayādvija
śvetaekastupuruṣaḥ kṛṣṇohyekatamaḥ punaḥ
tenamārgeṇayeyānti himācalakṛtodyamāḥ
piṃ galaśvetavarṇaścajaṭādhārīmahāprabhuḥ
kṛṣṇonārāyaṇohyeṣajagadādirmahāprabhuḥ
caturbāhurmahānśrīmānvyakto’vyaktaḥ sanātanaḥ
uttarāyaṇemahāpūjājāyatetatrasuvrata
ṣaṇmāsādikaparyaṃ taṃ pūjānaivacajāyate
himavyāptaṃ tadājātaṃ yāvadvaidakṣiṇaṃ bhavet
ataetādṛśodevonabhūtonabhaviṣyati
tatradevāva santīhaṛṣīṇāṃ cāśramās tathā
agnihotrāṇivedāścadhvaniḥ praśrūyatesadā
tasyavaidarśanaṃ kāryaṃ koṭihatyāvināśanam
alakanaṃ dāyatragaṅgātatrasnānaṃ samācaret
kṛtvāsnānaṃ tuvaitatramahāpāpāt pramucyate
yatraviśveśvarodevastiṣṭhatyevana saṃśayaḥ
tadānārāyaṇodevobhaktānāṃ hikṛpākaraḥ
avyayaḥ puruṣaḥ sākṣādīśvarogaruḍadhvajaḥ
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
tvaṃ kailāsavibhuḥ sākṣādrudrovaiviśvapālakaḥ
tavaprasādāddeveśamuktidātābhavāmy aham
yelokāmāṃ bhajiṣyanti teṣāṃ dātāna saṃśayaḥ
iti śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe paṣcapaṣcāśatsahasrasaṃhitāyāṃ
nāradomāpatisaṃvāde badarīnārāyaṇamāhātmye
rudraprasādo nāma dvitīyo’dhyāyaḥ
tṛtīyo’dhyāyaḥ
sūta uvāca
ekadānāradodraṣṭuṃ pāṇḍavānduḥkhakarśitān
athanatvāmuniśreṣṭhaṃ yudhiṣṭhirauvācaha
tamuvācaṛṣirduḥkhaṃ tyajatvaṃ pāṇḍunandana
sukhaduḥkhasamāhāre saṃsārekaḥ sukhīnaraḥ
īśvaropihinasthāyīpīḍyatedeha saṃcayaiḥ
naduḥkharahitaḥ kaściddehīduḥkhasahoyataḥ
śarīraṃ savituryasmādrāhustadgrasatebalī
rāhorapiśiraiśchannaṃ śauriṇāmṛtabhojane
so’piśārṅgadharodevaḥkṣiptaḥ sāgaragahvare
jālandhareṇavīreṇanihataḥ so’piśambhunā
yudhiṣṭhira uvāca
kathaṃ jālandharaṃ saṃkhyehatavānvṛṣabhadhvajaḥ
rājṣāsaevam uktastukathayāmāsanāradaḥ
nārada uvāca
śṛṇubhūpakathāṃ divyāmaśeṣāghaughanāśinīm
īśānasindhusūnvośca saṃgrāmaṃ paramādbhutam
ekadāgiriśaṃ stotuṃ prayayaupākaśāsanaḥ
apsarogaṇa saṃkīrṇodevairbahubhirāvṛtaḥ
gandharvairāvṛtodevastaṃ trīśikṣāsukovidaiḥ
raṃ bhātilottamārāmākarpūrākadalītathā
madanābhāratīkāmāsarvābharaṇabhūṣitāḥ
nartakyaśca tathācānyāḥ samājagmuḥ surānti kam
kinnarāmuhurājagmus tathākiṃ narayoṣitaḥ
yamaścāgnirnirṛtiścayecānyedevatāgaṇāḥ
vimāna saṃsthomaghavāvimānasthāḥ surāṃ ganāḥ
svavāhanagatādevāḥ kailā samprayayurjavāt
mahīdharāṇāṃ sarveṣāṃ pṛthivyāivamaṇḍanam
yatravṛkṣāḥ kalpavṛkṣāḥ pāṣāṇāścinti tapradāḥ
aśokaiḥ pāṭalaiścūtairmandāraiḥ śobhitogiriḥ
paṅgutvaṃ bahucāreṇayānti temalayānilāḥ
vāpyaḥ sphaṭikasopānāhyagādhavimalodakāḥ
vaiḍūryanāla saṃsaktasauvarṇanibhapaṃ kajāḥ
kahlāraiḥśaubhitāvāpyaḥ pinaddhāḥ padmarāgavat
harinmaṇinibaddhāścagomedaiḥ sarvatovṛtāḥ
padmarāgaśilābaddhānānādhātuvicitritāḥ
dadṛśuḥ sundarataraṃ nākādhikavinirmitam
kailā samparvataśreṣṭhaṃ dṛṣṭvātevismayaṃ gatāḥ
vimānādavatīrṇāścamaghavādevatāścatāḥ
dvārapālamathāgamyanaṃ dinaṃ vākyamabruvan
bho bho gaṇavaraṣṭha śṛṇu me vākyam uttamam
samājṣāpaya śīghraṃ tvaṃ nṛtyārtham iham āgatam
īśvaraṃ prati deveśaṃ sarvadevaiḥ samāvṛtam
nṛtyārthamathataṃ prāhānaya śīghraṃ śacīpatim
praveśayāmāsa tadā nandī taiḥ saha vāsavam
sa dṛṣṭvā giriśaṃ devaṃ tuṣṭāva vṛṣabhadhvajam
mṛdaṃ gavīṇāvāditraiḥ mudānāṭyaṃ pracakrire
kāṃsyavādyānpragṛhyānyāvaṃ śatālānsakāhalān
cakrustānṛtya saṃraṃ bhaṃ svayaṃ devaḥ purandaraḥ
īśvarastoṣamāpannovāsavaṃ vākyamabravīt
prasanno’haṃ suraśreṣṭhajātastevriyatāṃ varaḥ
pratyuvāca haraṃ vākyaṃ saṃgrāmaḥ savṛtomayā
gaṇāmeśrūyatāṃ vākyaṃ devarājo’tigarvitaḥ
āvirāsīttataḥ krodhomūrttimānpurataḥ sthitaḥ
ghanāndhakārasadṛśomṛḍaṃ krodhas tato’bravīt
īśānakalpejāte tu kāmenārṇava saṃgame
nākasindhustadāmattāsvayauvanabharoṣmaṇā
tāṃ dṛṣṭvāsindhurājaścajalakallolavānabhūt
tadābabhūvarājendragaṅgāsāgara saṃgamaḥ
sūnustasyāṃ mahānadyāṃ samudrādabhavadbalī
mahārṇavatanūjenajātamātreṇapārthiva
rudatotkaṃ pitāpṛthvītrilokīnāditābhavat
atrāṃ tareparitrastāṃ tāṃ saṃvīkṣyajagattrayīm
dhātāsurendravākyenaprajagāmamahārṇavam
āścaryamiti saṃciṃ ty ahaṃ sārūḍhojavādyayau
brahmāṇamāgataṃ vīkṣyasaparyāṃ vidadhe’rṇavaḥ
tamuvāca tatobrahmākiṃ garjasivṛthāṃ budhe
śiśorvaikururakṣāṃ cadurlabhaṃ tavadarśanam
saṃdṛśyatāṃ catanayobhāryāṃ prāhātiśobhanām
yayausābharturādeśātsaputrābrahmaṇonti ke
vidhāya putraṃ caraṇau nanāma
dṛṣṭvā vidhātuḥ kila vismayo’bhūt
gṛhītakūrcasyaśiśoḥ karaṃ cayadāviriṃ cirnaśaśākamocitum
tadāsamudraḥ prahasanprayātaḥ kūrcaṃ pragṛhyārbhakaraṃ vimocayan
tādṛśaṃ tasyabālasyadṛṣṭvāvikramamātmabhūḥ
prītyājālandharetyāhanāmnājālandharo’bhavat
pātālasahitaṃ nākaṃ matprasādena bhokṣyati
iti śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe paṣcapaṣcāśatsahasrasaṃhitāyāṃ
yudhiṣṭhiranāradasaṃvāde uttarakhaṇḍe
tṛtīyo’dhyāyaḥ
nārada uvāca
krameṇavarddhamāno’saubālyabhāvesabālakaḥ
ānīyacakresacapaṃ jarasthānkrīḍāparaḥkesariṇāṃ kiśorān
tasmādākāśamutpatyakhecarānpātayedbhuvi
garjitairbhīṣayāmāsasvargaṃ hisahasāgaram
samudrāṃ targataṃ sarvaṃ satvajātaṃ tupārthiva
dṛṣṭvāniḥ satvakaṃ toyaṃ tadbhayādvaḍavānalaḥ
sabālatvaṃ parityajyakrameṇārṇavanandanaḥ
mannivāsocitaṃ sthānaṃ dehitātātivistṛtam
saṃbuddhyavacanaṃ sūnoḥ sajagādamahārṇavaḥ
kṛtāṃ jalipuṭobhūtvāvyājahārārṇavaḥkavim
diṣṭyātavātrāgamanaṃ vadakiṃ karavāṇy aham
tadādaityakulācāryaḥ prāhataṃ sāgaraṃ kaviḥ
kiṃ tenajātujātenamāturyauvanahāriṇā
jambūdvīpemahāpīṭhaṃ yoginīgaṇasevitam
āplāvitaṃ tvayedānīṃ muṃ cajālandharālayam
evam ukto’rṇavaḥ prītyābhārgaveṇāthalīlayā
śatayojanavistīrṇamāyataṃ caśatatrayam
deśaṃ jālandharaṃ puṇyaṃ tasyanāmnaivaviśrutam
daityavaryaṃ samāhūyamayaṃ provācasāgaraḥ
puraṃ jālandharepīṭhekurujālandharāyavai
prākāragopuradvāraṃ sopānagṛhabhūmikam
menire jaladodyogaṃ tāṇḍavasthāḥ śikhaṇḍinaḥ
yatrapravālamāṇikyabhavanotthāmarīcayaḥ
sevyaṃ teśakunaiścūtarucirāṃ kuraśaṃ kayā
yatrakāṃ canaharmyeṣu tviṣovahniṣukātarāḥ
vilokyaprapalāyaṃ tedāvaśaṃ kāḥ śikhaṇḍinaḥ
yatrasphaṭikaśālotthaprabhā saṃmiśritādiśaḥ
vibhānti mandarodbhrāṃ tāḥ saphenārṇava saṃnibhāḥ
yatramohaṃ svaharmyeṣu vibhātāloka saṃsthitāḥ
cakrirelalanāḥ pūrṇasāṃ dhyacandropamānanāḥ
yatrendranīpakādaṃ bapavanodyānamoditāḥ
cittaṃ viśaṃ tyonārīṇāṃ cakriremohanajvaram
yatralekhyagataṃ nṝṇāṃ vilokyasurataṃ janaḥ
saṃyātidviguṇaṃ nūnaṃ nijakāṃ tāratodyamaḥ
yatravātāyanoddhūtadhūpadhūmasyalekhayaḥ
nabhobabhūvatadgaṅgākāliṃ dī saṃgamopamam
yatrānekagṛhodbhūtaprabhayāsakalaṃ nabhaḥ
vibhātīndrāyudhākīrṇaṃ śaranmeghaivonnataḥ
yatrāniśambhramabhrāṃ tāḥ sūryavāhāḥ prapīḍitāḥ
viśrāmaṃ yānti madhyāhneprāsādaśirasisthitāḥ
rātrau saṃbhūtanakṣatrāivarejurvarāṃ ganāḥ
yatrahāṭakahiṃ dolaśṛṃ khalāgharṣaṇodbhavaḥ
cakārasundarīṃ śabdaḥ sphuṭaṃ merubhuvobhuvam
sākaṃ saridbhiḥ putrasyośanasāsahasāgaraḥ
yāḥ skaṃ dasyajagādatārakajayedevaḥ svayaṃ bhūḥ svayaṃ svaḥ sāmrājyamahotsave’picaśacīkāṃ tasyavācaspatiḥ
tābhiścitraviṃ riṃ civaktrasarasīhaṃ sībhirāśāsmahevāṇībhirvasudhā
jālandharāyaputrāyadadaubhīmaṃ mahodadhiḥ
jālandharāyaśukro’piprītyāvidyāṃ nijāṃ dadau
mṛta saṃjīvanīṃ nāmnāmāyāṃ rudravimohinīm
śastrāstravidyāanyāścavidhināabdhisūnave
svasthānaṃ divyadehenanadībhiḥ parivāritaḥ
dṛṣṭvājālandharodivyapuraṃ gopuramaṇḍitam
etasminnaṃ taredaityāḥ pātālasthāmahābalāḥ
prāptājālandharaṃ sarvekālanemipurogamāḥ
tato mahābalāvīrābalaṃ kṣīroda saṃnibham
balaṃ svavaśagaṃ kṛtvā kṛtvābhuvisthiraṃ jalam
jālandharastadārājyaṃ pitṛdattaṃ cakārasaḥ
atrāṃ tare’psarāḥkācitsvarṇetyāsītpurādivi
tasyāḥkrauṃ caprasādenavṛndānāmasutābhavat
dhātrāvibhava saṃyuktaṃ sauṃ daryaṃ yatkṛtaṃ pṛthak
tattadekagatandraṣṭuṃ vṛndāgātraṃ vinirmitam
tāṃ vṛndāmaticārvaṃ gīṃ pramadāṃ janamohinīm
svarṇājālandharasyārthedadauśukrāyayācate
śukra uvāca
kaṃ darpasyajagannetraśastreṇāścaryakāriṇā
rūpeṇānenaraṃ bhorudīrghāyuḥ sukhinībhava
nirmāyasvayamevavismitamanāḥ sauṃ daryasāreṇa yaṃ
svavyāpārapariśramasyakalaśaṃ vedhāḥ samāropayat
kaṃ darpaṃ puruṣaṃ striyovidadhateyasminnadṛṣṭesatidraṣṭavyāvadhi
rūpamāpnuhipatiṃ taṃ dīrghanetraṃ bhaṭam
upayemevivāhenagāṃ dharveṇārṇavātmajaḥ
vṛndāntaudaṃ patījātaujanānaṃ dakaraunṛpa
kadācitsasabhāsīnodṛṣṭvārāhuṃ śirohṛtam
kasmātkāyārddhaśeṣo’yaṃ itipapracchabhārgavam
satasyakathayāmāsapūrvavṛttāṃ tamāditaḥ
yathānirmathitodevaiḥkṣīrodo’mṛtakāraṇāt
prasādasumukhorāhuṃ kāmarūpo bhavādhunā
itiśukrasyamaṃ treṇasindhusūnuḥ pratāpavān
iti śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe paṣcapaṣcāśatsahasrasaṃhitāyām uttarakhaṇḍe
nāradayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde jālandharopākhyāne
vṛndāvivāho jālandharābhiṣeko nāma
paṣcamo’dhyāyaḥ
yudhiṣṭhira uvāca
kaḥ pitṛvyaḥ sindhusūnoḥ kiṃ vṛttaṃ tasyavigrahe
nārada uvāca
śṛṇutvaṃ nṛpaśārdūlapitṛvyaḥ kṣīrasāgaraḥ
śrīcandrāmṛtanāgāśvapūrvaṃ tasyasurāsuraiḥ
kadācitpreṣayāmāsadūtaṃ durvāraṇaṃ balī
praveṣṭukāmo bhavanaṃ dvārasthairdvārinivāritaḥ
dūta uvāca
jālandharasyadūto’haṃ āgataḥśakra saṃnidhau
gatvātatrabhavaṃ tomāṃ vijṣāpayitumarhatha
gatvācapraṇipatyāhadūtodevāgatobhuvaḥ
hastegṛhītvātaṃ dūtaṃ vāsavānti kamānayat
hariṃ devais tuyastriṃśatkoṭibhiḥ pariveṣṭitam
svarṇasiṃ hāsanaṃ divyaṃ cāmarānilasevitam
durvāraṇo’thadeveśaṃ vilokyaguruṇāsaha
nirdiṣṭamāsanaṃ bhejedūtojālandharasyasaḥ
kasyatvaṃ kenakāryeṇaprāptaḥ prāhetitaṃ hariḥ
sarājāsarvalokānāṃ tasyājṣāṃ śṛṇumanmukhāt
mandarādrividhānenahṛtaṃ kośaṃ mahādhanam
śrīcandrāmṛtanāgāśvaṃ tanmaṇiṃ vidrumādikam
taṃ kṣamāpayabhūpālayadijīvitum icchasi
śṛṇudūtasamāsenasindhormathanakāraṇam
purāhimavataḥ sūnurmainākonāmameripuḥ
dagdhaṃ carācaraṃ yenavahnināhayarūpiṇā
sacāpividhṛtastenasāgareṇadurātmanā
dharmadviṣāṃ dānavānāmasauvaiāśrayaḥ prabhuḥ
nityaṃ dadhighṛtaṃ kṣīraṃ dānavebhyaḥ prayacchati
ataevāyamasmābhiḥdurvāraṇaviloḍitaḥ
daṇḍitaścagataśrīkodevairathapurātanaiḥ
śṛṇudūtasabandhenamamavipreṇaśoṣitaḥ
āgamiṣyativaināśaṃ gamiṣyatitadaivahi
śaśaṃ sacāgatyasamudrasūnordeveśvareṇoktamaśeṣamāditaḥ
nārada uvāca
samudrasūnuḥ saṃkruddhaḥ sarvaṃ sainyaṃ samāhvayat
rasātalasthitādaityāḥ ye ca bhūtalavāsinaḥ
āyayuḥ sabalās tatrajālandharamathājṣayā
sphuṭanti nabhasorājanpātālamakhilādiśaḥ
hayanāgoṣṭravadanābiḍālamukhabhīṣaṇāḥ
vyāghrasiṃ hākhuvadanāvidyutsadṛśalocanāḥ
sarpakeśāmahādehāḥ kecitkhaṅgatanūruhāḥ
śatayojanavistīrṇaṃ vimānaṃ haṃ sakoṭibhiḥ
khaṇḍitaṃ śibikāvāhairdalitaṃ bhūrikuṃ jaraiḥ
athadaityādhipairbhagnaṃ khāṇḍavaṃ nandanaṃ vanam
śikharāṇiviśīrṇānimerordānavapuṃ gavaiḥ
santānakeṣu vṛkṣeṣu baddhāhiṃ dolamaṃ cakān
siddhāṃ ganābhiḥ sahitāremiredaityapuṃ gavāḥ
kucakuṃ kumatāmbūlacandanāgarubhūṣaṇaiḥ
keśapāśacyutaiḥ puṣpaiḥ meroḥ sampūritānadī
dakṣiṇaṃ carathaiśceruruttaraṃ paścimaṃ bhaṭaiḥ
athaprasthāpayāmāsadaityāṣjāladharo’suraḥ
rājarājapurīṃ bhaṃ ktvāyamasyavaruṇasyaca
anyeṣāṃ lokapālānāmāyayuste’marāvatīm
athotpātābhavannākedivyabhaumāṃ tarikṣagāḥ
tadāpapātakuliśaṅkarādindrasyaniṣprabham
dṛṣṭvānimittānibhayāvahāninākemahendrogurumity uvāca
kiṃ kurmahekaṃ śaraṇaṃ cayāmastaṃ paśyayuddhaṃ samupasthitaṃ ca
caraṇaupāhiśaraṇaṃ viṣṇor vaikuṇṭhavāsinaḥ
ity uktoguruṇādevaiḥ sākaṃ vaikuṇṭhamandiram
jagāmākhaṇḍalaḥśīghraṃ śaraṇaṃ kaiṭabhadviṣaḥ
śaśaṃ savāsudevāyavijayodvārapālakaḥ
jālandharabhayatrastāḥ sarvedevāḥ samāgatāḥ
śrīr uvāca
śāpitodevamatprītyā vadhārhonabhaviṣyati
iti śrīvacanaṃ śrutvāviṣṇustrailokyapālakaḥ
athārurohagaruḍaṃ pakṣakṣepāvṛtāmbaram
vaikuṇṭhabhavanāttūrṇaṃ nirgatastridaśānhariḥ
dadṛśustesurāḥ sarvehariṃ sāndraghanopamam
śārṅgaśaṅkhagadāpadmavibhūṣitacaturbhujam
stotraṃ paṭhitvāpurataḥ prāhendraḥ saritāṃ pateḥ
athānītaṃ mātalinārathamāruhyavāsavaḥ
vāsudevasyapurataḥ prayayauvidhṛtāśaniḥ
vāmatastridaśāḥ sarvesavyataścasamāyayau
svāhāpriyodakṣiṇataḥ sacameṣaṃ samāsthitaḥ
āruhyairāvataṃ nāgaṃ jayaṃ taḥ śakranandanaḥ
dhātāryamācamitraścavaruṇoṃ śobhagas tathā
indrovivasvānpūṣācaparjanyodaśamaḥ smṛtaḥ
tatas tvaṣṭātatoviṣṇūrejedhanyojaghanyajaḥ
ityete dvādaśādityāindrasyapurataḥ sthitāḥ
vīrabhadraścaśambhuścagiriśaścamahāyaśāḥ
ajaikapādahirbudhnyaḥ pinākīcāparājitaḥ
bhuvanādhīśvaraś caiva kapālīcaviśāṃ pate
sthāṇurbhagaścabhagavānarudrāekādaśasmṛtāḥ
śvasanaḥ sparśanovāyuranilomārutas tathā
prāṇāpānausajīvaucamaruto’ṣṭautadagrataḥ
dhanadaḥśibikārūḍhaḥkiṃ nareśoyayautadā
rudrāścavṛṣabhārūḍhāmārutomṛgavāhanaḥ
yayuḥ sainyasyapurataḥtriśūlaparighāyudhāḥ
gandharvāścāraṇāyakṣāḥ piśācoragaguhyakāḥ
pūrvāparautoyarāśīsamākrāntaucasainikaiḥ
tasminsasārabhūmirāṭvarāhavapuṣāhariḥ
āśrityadakṣiṇaṃ bhāgaṃ tūrṇaṃ kanakaśṛṃ gataḥ
ahorātreṇavihitāvarṣetasminnilāvṛte
tatrātmajayadāṃ bhūmiṃ kaviproktāṃ mudāyutāḥ
jagmustedānavāstūrṇaṃ guruproktāṃ yayuḥ surāḥ
aśvairanaṃ tairgaruḍāgragāmibhiḥ padātibhiḥ sāraṇabhūrbhṛtābabhau
kolāhalaścavīrāṇāmanyonyamabhigarjatām
athadānavadevānāṃ saṃgrāmo’bhūdbhayāvahaḥ
bhayakrāntāmahāśrāṃ tāśrutirvilapatīmuhuḥ
svarathākārarahitaṃ śaraiḥ sampūritaṃ tadā
raudrair vihaṃ gamārāvais trāsādākraṃ datīvahi
devendreṇatadājṣaptāmeghāḥ saṃvartakādayaḥ
devānāmaśvārohāścajātāgandharvakinnarāḥ
rathinaḥ sādhyasiddhāścagajinoyakṣacāraṇāḥ
padātinaḥkiṃ puruṣāḥ pannagāḥ pavanāśanāḥ
rogāṇāmadhiporājanyakṣmācayamanāyakaḥ
tatra dānava rogāṇāṃ saṃgrāmo’bhūt sudāruṇaḥ
patitāluluṭhurbhūmaudaityāḥśūlajvarāmayaiḥ
dānavairnihatārogāḥ petuḥ samaramūrddhani
auṣadhyas tatrasahajāvaiśalyakaraṇīmukhāḥ
tābhirviśalyāḥ sainyeṣu yuyudhuryamakiṃ karāḥ
dānavairnihatāḥ sarveśaramudgarapaṭṭiśaiḥ
padātayaḥ pattigaṇaiḥkhaṅgais tīkṣṇaiḥ paraśvadhaiḥ
koṭiśojaghnuranyonyaṃ rudhirāruṇavigrahāḥ
aśvacārāhayais tūrṇaiścikṣipurgagane tadā
saṃśliṣyajaghnuranyonyaṃ rudhirāruṇavigrahāḥ
samūhorathināṃ bhīmorathaughaiśchādyamedinīm
madakṣīṇakapolāṃ gāḥkarairbaddhākarāndṛḍham
gajānpratigajāḥkruddhāḥ pātayanti mahītale
aśvacārānhayānnāgānpātayāmāsabhūtale
skaṃ dhegṛhītvātarasāyayaujālandharaṃ prati
kakṣayorvaigajaugṛhyatṛtīyaṃ jaṭharopari
utpāṭyakośataḥ khaṅgaṃ vidhūyavimalāṃ baram
yayausahasraśodevānpātayitvāraṇe’suraḥ
kācitpīnastanītanvīkhecarīratilaṃ paṭā
āgatyagaganāttūrṇaṃ ninyedaityaṃ raṇāṃ gaṇāt
cucuṃ basātadvadanaṃ tīkṣṇanārācakīlitam
yamodurvāraṇaṃ vīraṃ svarbhānuścandrabhāskarau
ketuṃ vaiśvānarodevoyayauśukraṃ bṛhaspatiḥ
saṃhrādaṃ śakraputraścanirhrādaṃ dhanadoyayau
niśuṃ bhaścāvṛtorudraiḥśuṃ bhovasubhirāhave
meghākāraṃ sthitaṃ jaṃ bhaṃ viśvedevāḥ samāyayau
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe paṣcapaṣcāśatsahasrasaṃhitāyām uttarakhaṇḍe
yudhiṣṭhiranāradasaṃvāde devadānavayuddhaṃ nāma
paṣcamodhyāyaḥ
ṣaṣṭho’dhyāyaḥ
nārada uvāca
evaṃ dvaṃ dveṣu yuddheṣu sampravṛtteṣvanekaśaḥ
vihāyamūrcchāṃ saṃcityaviṣṇuṃ bāṇairjaghānasaḥ
tataḥ kruddhenahariṇāsakṣitaupātitovyasuḥ
rājanjaghāna saṃciṃ tyarāhuṃ khaṅgena ca ndramāḥ
sahasrāśuṃ raṇejitvārāhuścandramadhāvata
saiṃ hikeyāṃ gakāṭhinyātkhaṅgaṃ cūrṇamabhūttadā
jaghānamuṣṭināgāḍhaṃ kaṭhinenavidhuṃ tudaḥ
candramutthāpyataṃ kaṇṭhedhṛtvāvegānmahāmṛdhe
gilitvārāhuṇācandropyudgīrṇaśca tataḥ punaḥ
sauccaiḥśrava saṃgṛhyahayaratnaṃ vidhuṃ tudaḥ
durvāraṇoraṇekruddhastaṃ yamaṃ gadayāhanat
niśitairmārgaṇair bhinnaḥśakraputreṇacāhave
dhṛtvājayaṃ taṃ saṃhrādaḥ parighāghātamūrcchitam
hatavāṃś caiva gadayānihrādaṃ dhanadoraṇe
rudrāstriśūlanirghātairniśuṃ bhaṃ jaghnurojasā
niśuṃ bhobāṇajālaiścapīḍayāmāsatānati
śuṃ bhāsurodevagaṇānpūrayāmāsamārgaṇaiḥ
mṛtyuṃ māyāmayamayobaddhvāpāśairnināyatam
baddhvācanamuciṃ pāśair vāsavo’pirasātalam
balāṃ garociṣobhānti diśodaśaraveriva
sarvāṇyastrāṇiśakrasyaśīrṇānyaṃ gebalasyaca
tasyāṃ gasyābhilāṣeṇanayuddhamakarottadā
tuṣṭāvavāsavo’tyarthaṃ taṃ balaṃ balasāgaram
varaṃ vṛṇusuraśreṣṭhetyuktaḥ prāhabalaṃ prati
tadindravacanaṃ śrutvābhittvāśastrairgṛhāṇamām
gīrivaśrotrahīnasyalolākṣīvavicakṣuṣaḥ
pareṣu puṣpamālevaśrīḥkadaryasyaniṣphalā
mahātmānonagṛhṇanti hiṃ samānānripūnapi
sapatnīḥ prāpayaṃ tyabdhiṃ sindhavonaganimnagāḥ
avaśiṣyatehimāṃ śoḥ saivakalāśirasiyāśambhoḥ
tesādhavobhuvanamaṇḍalamaulibhūtāyesādhutāmanupakāriṣu darśayanti
ātmaprayojanavaśātkṛtachinnadehāḥ pūrvāpakāriṣukhalopihitānuraktaḥ
nabibhedatadādehaḥśakraściṃ tāmavāpaha
sasmāritomātalināvajreṇāṃ gaṃ jaghānatat
tenavajraprahāreṇabalāṃ gaṃ tadvyaśīryata
vajrākarepapātāṃ śaḥṣaṣṭhaścavijagajaḥ
kāyasyāvayavāḥ sarveratnabījatvamāgatāḥ
vajrādasthikaṇāḥkīrṇāḥṣaṭkoṇāmaṇayo’bhavan
akṣibhyāmindranīlāvaimāṇikyaṃ śruti saṃbhavam
kṣatajātpadmarāgāḥ syuḥmedasomarakatās tathā
pravālānicajihvātodaṃ tāmuktās tathābhavan
kāṃsyaṃ purīṣaṃ rajataṃ vīryaṃ tāmraṃ camūtrajam
aṃ gasyodvartanājjātaṃ pittalaṃ brahmavītikāḥ
nādādvaidūryamutpannaṃ ratnaṃ cārutaraṃ tathā
medasaḥ sphaṭikaṃ jātaṃ pravālaṃ māṃ sa saṃbhavam
atrāṃ tarehataṃ śrutvābalaṃ maghavatāmṛdhe
prabhāvatīnāmarājṣīyayautaccaraṇānti kam
vilalāpapatiṃ dṛṣṭvāvikīrṇāvayavaṃ raṇe
prabhāvatyaśrupūrṇākṣīmuktakeśīghanastanī
māṃ tvaṃ vihāyakiṃ cātrakaivalyaṃ gatavānasi
jarākuṣṭhādibhirvyāptaṃ buddhvādehaṃ tyajanti na
dehino’nyeparaṃ kāṃ taṃ tvayādehovṛthojjhitaḥ
raṇotsukena bhavatāyāveṇīgrathitāmama
tāmudgrathayavaidhavyaduḥkhārttāyāḥ svayaṃ priya
evaṃ vilapatīṃ vīkṣyabalarājṣīṃ samudrajaḥ
duḥkhitaḥśukramityāhabalaṃ jīvayabhārgava
śukra uvāca
icchayāmaraṇaṃ prāptaṃ taṃ kathaṃ jīvayāmy aham
jālandhareṇaivamuktaḥkṣaṇaṃ dhyānaparo’bhavat
prabhāvatīṃ prativyaktaṃ vādyabhāṇḍādivotthitaḥ
prabhāvatisvadehaṃ tvaṃ mamāṃ geṣu layaṃ naya
ititasyavacaḥ śrutvānadījātāprabhāvatī
balāṅgeṣvevalīnāsāsumeroḥ pūrvavāhinī
yasyāstoyena saṃjātāratnānāṃ kānti ruttamā
iti śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe paṣcapaṣcāśatsahasrasaṃhitāyām uttarakhaṇḍe jālandharopākhyāne baladaityasvargārohaṇaṃ nāma
ṣaṣṭho’dhyāyaḥ
nārada uvāca
ity uktvātaṃ śatamakhaṃ sindhusūnuḥ pratāpavān
sasūtāśvadhvajarathaṃ chādayāmāsamārgaṇaiḥ
papātamūrcchitaḥśakrorathopariśaraiḥkṣataḥ
dṛṣṭvātaṃ patitaṃ śakraṃ jagarjārṇavanandanaḥ
tadādridalanaṃ hastegṛhītvāsindhu saṃbhavaḥ
vajraṃ kakṣāpuṭedhṛtvārathāduttīryasatvaram
yaṃ tāraṃ mātaliṃ kṛtvāyayauprāptamanorathaḥ
jālandharomahābāhuḥ svayaṃ cāṃ budharoyathā
tataḥ sakopātpuruṣottamaḥ svayaṃ khaṅgaṃ samudyamyacanaṃ dakaṃ raṇe
rathānhayānkuṃ jarapatti saṃghānsapātayāmāsabalātsahasraśaḥ
janārdanaḥkaśyapasūnu saṃvṛtaścakāra saṃkhye ca ritaṃ bhayāvaham
keśāsthimajjārudhiraughavāhinīṃ piśācavetālavihaṃ gasevitām
karorujaṃ ghāyudhaśastrapūritāṃ sudustarāṃ vyāghragajendrasevitām
raktāṃ trahārāṃ gadabhūṣitāṃ tāṃ vighūrṇanetrotsavakānti vāsasam
viṣṇunānihataṃ sainyaṃ dṛṣṭvādānavapuṃ gavāḥ
daityāstetatrabāṇaughānvarṣamāṇāyathāṃ budāḥ
yathādvirephāḥkamalaṃ parvataṃ jaladāiva
cūtaṃ yathāpakṣigaṇāgaganaṃ dhūpa saṃcayaḥ
nadṛśyo’bhūttadāviṣṇurnatārkṣyoraṇa saṃkaṭe
sarveterathamārūḍhāsarvaśastrairmahāsurāḥ
vaikuṇṭhādhipatiṃ jaghnurgarjaṃ tobhīmanisvanaiḥ
tānsarvānbhīmarūpeṇadaityāriḥkupitastadā
raṇenipātayāmāsavāyuḥ parṇacayaṃ yathā
śailaromātatoviṣṇuṃ daityaḥ kopādadhāvata
harerapiśarāstasyaśarīreśīrṇatāṃ gatāḥ
śailaromācadaityāriśarīraṃ cāhanaccharaiḥ
hariḥkhaṅgaṃ vinirdhūyaśirastasyajahāraha
śailaromābhujābhyāṃ catārkṣyaṃ jagrāhapakṣayoḥ
śiraścotpatyatarasāvilagnaṃ skaṃ dhayordṛḍham
tatas tatrāsyayuddhenahṛṣīkeśo’pivismitaḥ
punaścotpatyavegenaśiraḥ sthānaṃ samāśrayat
śailaromātatoviṣṇuṃ jahāragaruḍādbalī
tatojālandharaḥ sūtaṃ khaṅgaromāṇamabravīt
dṛṣṭvātaṃ puratoviṣṇumuvācārṇavanandanaḥ
niḥśaṃ kaṃ jahimāṃ viṣṇonāhaṃ tvāhanmimādhava
nārāyaṇaḥ prāṇaharaiḥśarairenamapūrayat
viṣṇunācavibhinnāṃ go’rṇavasūnuḥ pratāpavān
hariṃ sampūrayāmāsamārgaṇaughairniraṃ taram
nārāyaṇaḥ prāṇaharaiḥśarairenamapūrayat
garuḍaṃ patitaṃ dṛṣṭvāsindhusūnoḥśarairbhuvi
rathaṃ saṃsmārayāmāsavaikuṇṭhasthaṃ janārdanaḥ
aśvairyutaṃ rathaṃ dṛṣṭvāvismitobhagavānraṇe
sadhṛtvāmukuṭaṃ mūrdhnikaustubhaṃ hṛdayemaṇim
puruṣārthānhayānkṛtvāyayaujālandharaṃ hariḥ
medinīṃ rathacakreṇadārayaṃ ścasuraiḥ saha
jaghānatarasābāṇairdānavānāṃ cavāhinīm
devarājena saṃdiṣṭovītihotroraṇāṃ gaṇe
dadāhadānavānīkaṃ samīraṇasamanvitam
jālandharaḥ svalpaśeṣaṃ dadhyaudṛṣṭvābalaṃ svakam
athāhabhārgavaṃ rājāmatsainyaṃ nihataṃ suraiḥ
kiṃ tayāvidyayābrahmankṣatreṇāthabalena ca
yānarakṣatirogārtānyadbalaṃ śaraṇāgatān
jālandharavacaḥśrutvābhārgavastamabhāṣata
paśyarājanmamabalaṃ brāhmaṇasyaraṇāṃ gaṇe
ity uktvāvāriṇāspṛṣṭāhuṃ kāreṇaprabodhitāḥ
utthāpitāstekavināśaraughaiḥ prāṇahārakaiḥ
devāhatāraṇepetuḥ samaṃ tātsindhusūnunā
bāṇairjarjaradehāstedhṛtaprāṇānarādhipa
namṛtāstvamaratvāccabāṇair bhinnāścasattama
tatonārāyaṇodevobṛhaspatimabhāṣata
dhiṣaṇastujagannāthamuvācatvaritaṃ tadā
oṣadhībhirahaṃ svāminjīvayiṣyāminirjarān
ity uktvādhiṣaṇaḥ so’piyayaukṣīrārṇavasthitam
droṇamadriṃ tadāgatvāsukhaṃ gṛhyauṣadhīḥ svayam
gurustāsāṃ cayogenajīvayāmāsanirjarān
devānsamutthitāndṛṣṭvābabhāṣesindhujaḥkavim
itidaityoktamākarṇyaśukraḥ prāhārṇavātmajam
kṣīrasāgaramadhyasthodroṇonāmamahāgiriḥ
auṣadhyas tatratiṣṭhanti jīvayanti cayāmṛtān
tatragatvāsurācāryogṛhītvoṣadhi saṃcayam
bhārgavoktamathākarṇyasainyabhāraṃ mahābalaḥ
athapraviṣṭaḥkṣīrābdhauveśmadivyaṃ mahāprabham
praviśyatatrakṣīrābdheḥkrīḍāsthānaṃ dadarśasaḥ
noṣṇonaśītalovāyurnatamoyatradṛśyate
supīnastanabhārāḍhyāḥkṛśodaryaḥ sudanti kāḥ
aṃ gaiḥ saṃmohanairamyairbāhuvallīvicālanaiḥ
cāmarāṃ dolalīlābhiḥ sragbhiḥ smitavilokitaiḥ
krīḍaṃ taṃ tatradugdhābdhiṃ saṃvīkṣyasamarotsukaḥ
athāhapraṇipatyāsaukṣīrābdhiṃ tātahaṃ simām
droṇācalauṣadhīrvyājādaṃ bubhiḥ plāvayasvataḥ
kṣīrasāgara uvāca
taṃ prāptaṃ śaraṇaṃ putraplāvayāmyūrmibhiḥkatham
munīndrāstaṃ naśaṃ santiyastyajeccharaṇāgatam
pitṛvyavacanaṃ śrutvā saṃkrodhāt santataṃ girim
talapraharaṇenaiva tāḍayāmāsadaityarāṭ
tatodroṇagirīrājanbhītojālandharādbhṛśam
athājagāmarūpeṇaprāhajālandharaṃ prati
tavāhamabhavaṃ dāsorakṣamāṃ śaraṇāgatam
rasātalaṃ mahābāhoyāsyāmitavaśāsanāt
yāvattvaṃ kuruṣerājyaṃ tāvatsthāsyāmy ahaṃ prabho
oṣadhīnāṃ virāveṇasiddhānāṃ rodanena ca
rasātalaṃ jagāmādriḥ sindhusūnoḥ prapaśyataḥ
tatojālandharovīraājagāmamahāraṇam
rathasthaṃ mādhavaṃ dṛṣṭvājahāsoccairnadīsutaḥ
tāvattvanti ṣṭhaśakaṭeyāvaddhanyāmarīnaham
evam uktvājaghānāśuśarais tāṃ devavāhinīm
bāṇair vidāritādevāstrāhītyūcurbṛhaspatim
tatobṛhaspatiḥśīghramagamatkṣīrasāgaram
adṛṣṭvātaṃ tatodroṇamabhūccintāparonṛpa
athāgatyaraṇaṃ tūrṇamamarānprāhagīṣpatiḥ
palāyadhvaṃ surāḥ sarvedroṇādriḥkṣayamāgataḥ
yajṣopavītaṃ keśāṃś cabāṇais tīkṣṇairhasansurān
tatodudrāvavegenaguruḥ prāṇabhayārditaḥ
devāḥ sarveraṇaṃ hitvāpalāyāṃ cakrirenṛpa
hṛṣīkeśo’pidaityeśamanvadhāvadraṇotsukaḥ
durddharṣaṇobāṇajālaiḥ plāvayāmāsakeśavam
tānbāṇānkhaṇḍaśaḥkṛtvāpūrayitvāśarairmahān
vāsudevosuraṃ bāṇairjālandharamapīḍayat
jālandharorathaṃ tyaktvāśarapīḍitavigrahaḥ
tamāyāṃ taṃ raṇedṛṣṭvāharirvivyādhasāyakaiḥ
bāṇānaṃ gesahadviṣṇoḥ prāpto’sauratha saṃnidhau
bhrāmayitvāṃ bareśaśvatśvetadvīpenyapātayat
raṇamāgatyadaityeśanti ṣṭhatiṣṭhetyabhāṣata
dṛṣṭvā tam āgataṃ bhūyaḥ keśavaṃ samarapriyaḥ
pūrayanmārgaṇairbhūmiṃ jagarjārṇavanandanaḥ
vivyādhadaityaṃ harirāśuśaktyā hṛdisphuraṃ tyāsatataḥ papāta
premṇāśriyastaṃ najaghānadānavaṃ svayaṃ haristasyaśaraiḥ papāta
tatonirīkṣyagovindaṃ patitaṃ dharaṇītale
tatas tamiṃ dirāprāptārudaṃ tīviṣṇuvallabhā
patitaṃ tupatiṃ vīkṣyalakṣmīḥ prāhārṇavātmajam
śṛṇuṣva vacanaṃ bhrātarjitoviṣṇurdhṛtastvayā
jālandharomahābāhuḥ svasrebhaktyā nanāmaca
vavaṃ decaraṇauviṣṇoḥ svasuḥ snehāttadāṃ jasā
viṣṇurjālandharaṃ prāhatuṣṭo’smitavakarmaṇā
yaditvaṃ mamatuṣṭo’siśauryeṇānenakeśava
tathetyuktvāca saṃsmṛtyagaruḍaṃ dharaṇīdharaḥ
āruhyacajagannāthaḥkṣīrābdhiṃ priyayāsaha
tadāprabhṛtikṛṣṇasyavāsaḥśvaśuramandire
abdhauvasatideveśolakṣmyāḥ priyacikīrṣayā
iti śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe paṣcapaṣcāśatsahasrasaṃhitāyām uttarakhaṇḍe yudhiṣṭhiranāradasaṃvāde
aṣṭamo’dhyāyaḥ
yudhiṣṭhira uvāca
devānviklāvyasamareviṣṇuṃ sthāpyātmamandire
jālandhareṇābdhijenayatkṛtaṃ brūhinārada
nārada uvāca
śuṃ bhādīnāṃ tuvīrāṇāṃ dattvādānaṃ prasādajam
hiraṇyavarṣeṇajanānbhūṣayaṃ taṃ dinedine
puṣpakarpūratāmbūlakastūrīkuṃ kumānica
varṣāsugṛhadānenaśiśire’gnipradānataḥ
vāditrāṇicasarvāṇivādayanti śivālaye
sārikāśukahaṃ sāścabhramadbhramarakokilāḥ
kurvaṃ todūtakāryāṇiyacchaṃ tepriya saṃgamam
suṣamāsundarīyatraghṛtācīpuṃ jikasthalī
sukeśīsumukhīrāmāmaṃ jughoṣācamālinī
mṛgodbhavācasukhadādhanadaṃ ṣṭrātilaprabhā
vājimedhaphalagrāhārājasūyaphalanti yāḥ
koṭiśoyatraniḥṣpāpāḥkrīḍaṃ tyapsarasonṛpa
śuṃ bhaṃ prāṇa samandaityaṃ niśuṃ bhaṃ yuvarājake
svayaṃ jālandharepīṭhesvargādāgatyasindhurāṭ
varṣārbudadvayaṃ rājyaṃ cakārātmabalena ca
yudhiṣṭhira uvāca
tataḥ kimakarodrājāsindhusūnuḥ pratāpavān
tanmamācakṣvadevarṣeśrotukāmasyavistarāt
nārada uvāca
śṛṇurājanyathātathyaṃ kṛtasāgarasūnunā
sadevānsamarejitvārājyaṃ cakrehyakaṇṭakam
gandharvāścitrasenādyāḥ sevaṃ tecāsureśvaram
yajṣabhāgāṃś cayobhuṅkte sarveṣāmasureśvaraḥ
kṣīrasāgaratodevairhṛtaṃ ratnādikaṃ ca yat
nakaliḥ praṇayādanyonabhogādaparaḥkṣayaḥ
navaṃ dhyādurbhagānārīnālaṃ kārair vivarjitā
kurūpādurgatāduṣṭā’yaśasyāna ca dṛśyate
rūpayauvanaśālinyaḥ sīmanti nyogṛhegṛhe
gokṣīraṃ dadhisarpiśca yatranirjarasojanāḥ
śareṇana ca hiṃ sāstinakaścitkenabādhyate
ṛṇaṃ nadṛśyaterājandhaninaḥ santisarvataḥ
santuṣṭāḥ sarvasasyāḍhyāḥ prajāḥ sarvatrapārthiva
kelīkṣudaṇḍaprabhavaścadugdharaso’tisusvādutarogṛhenṛṇām
śuśrāvanārīnarayorhitaṃ vaconacāpahartādhvanigacchatāṃ sadā
pataṃ tyakhaṇḍānabhasoyatas tatodhārāścakarmāravimiśrasarpiṣaḥ
saṃmiśritāḥśarkarayāpariśrutāḥ samudrasūnoḥ smaraṇānmukhenṛṇām
iti śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe paṣcapaṣcāśatsahasrasaṃhitāyāṃ uttarakhaṇḍe
yudhiṣṭhiranāradasamvāde jālandharasaurājyavarṇanaṃ nāma
aṣṭamo’dhyāyaḥ
navamo’dhyāyaḥ
yudhiṣṭhira uvāca
nārada uvāca
athatyaktvādivaṃ devāḥ prāpustedurdaśāṃ ciram
napīyūṣaṃ naivayajṣāḥyayuḥ sthānaṃ svayaṃ bhuvaḥ
dadṛśurbrāhmabhuvanebrahmāṇaṃ parameṣṭhinam
prāṇāyāmenayuṃ jānaṃ manaḥ svaṃ paramātmani
te tu ṣṭuvuḥ surāḥ sarvevāgbhis tathyābhirādṛtāḥ
tataḥ prasannobhagavānkiṃ karomīticābravīt
tatonivedayāṃ cakruḥbrahmaṇevibudhāḥ punaḥ
kṣaṇaṃ dhyātvāyayaubrahmākailā santridaśaiḥ saha
tasyaśailasyapārśvete vai citryeṇasamākulāḥ
sthitāḥ santuṣṭuvurdevābrahmaśakrapurogamāḥ
namo bhavāyaśarvāyanīlagrīvāya te namaḥ
namaḥ sthūlāyasūkṣmāyabahurūpāya te namaḥ
itisarvamukhobhūtvāvāṇīmākarṇyaśaṅkaraḥ
śrutvāśambhorvacodevāāhūtānaṃ dinādrutam
praviśyāṃ taḥ puredevādadṛśurvismitekṣaṇāḥ
tatrāsanesamāsīnaṃ śaṅkaraṃ lokaśaṅkaram
gaṇaiḥkoṭisahasrais tusevitaṃ bhaktiśālibhiḥ
narvirūpaiḥkuṭilairjaṭilairdhūlidhūsaraiḥ
praṇipatyāgrataḥ prāhasahadevaiḥ pitāmahaḥ
sukharogoyathāsyāsīcchakraḥ so’yaṃ vṛthāgataḥ
kṛpāṃ kurumahādevaśaraṇāgatavatsala
tatauccair vibhorhāsyaṃ śrutvābrahmāpinākinaḥ
uvācadevadeveśaṃ paśyāvasthāṃ divaukasām
śakrasyamānabhaṅgaṃ cadevārtheparameśvaraḥ
premṇābhavānyāvijṣaptonṛpaprāhavacoharaḥ
viṣṇunānahatoyo’riḥ sakathaṃ hanyatemayā
pūrvasṛṣṭānyāyudhānivajrādīnipitāmaha
hetibhiḥ pūrva saṃsṛṣṭaiḥ samayāpinahanyate
devāḥkurvaṃ tuśastraṃ himamaprāṇasahaṃ dṛḍham
śambhority uttaraṃ śrutvābrahmovācāthaśaṅkaram
ititasyavacaḥśrutvāpratyuvācamaheśvaraḥ
devāścamumucuḥ sarvesakrodhaṃ tejasāṃ cayam
atrāṃ taresmṛtaḥ prāptohareṇamadhusūdanaḥ
kiṃ karomītitenoktaḥśivaḥ prāhajanārdanam
viṣṇojālandharaḥkasmānnahataḥ saṃgaretvayā
kathaṃ surānparityajyakṣīrābdhiṃ śayituṃ gataḥ
śrīviṣṇur uvāca
yaditaṃ hanmideveśaśrīḥkathaṃ mamavallabhā
tasmāt tvaṃ pārvatīkānta jahi jālandharaṃ raṇe
tejastvaṃ krodhajaṃ muṃ cetyaktaḥśarveṇakeśavaḥ
tejaḥ pravṛddhaṃ taṣṭvāvyāpakaṃ prāhakeśavam
śaṅkara uvāca
etenatejasāśīghraṃ mamāstraṃ kartumarhatha
viśvakarmādayastaccaśrutvāśaṅkarabhāṣitam
nirīkṣyacatadā’nyo’nyaṃ kiṃ kurmaitiśaṃ kitāḥ
dṛṣṭvātūṣṇīṃ sthitāṃ stāṃś cajṣātvātanmanasisthitam
tadāhabhagavānbrahmāanālokyaṃ hidaivataiḥ
soḍhuṃ naśaktāstetejodhartuṃ kena ca śakyate
vāmāṃ ghripāṣṇināśambhurnanartabhramarīcayam
nṛtyamānaṃ tadādṛṣṭvāmudāvādyānyavādayan
śarvāṃ ghrikaṣaṇāttasyatejasonisṛtāḥkaṇāḥ
viśvakarmācatenāstraṃ vimānānicanir mame
tatas tenirjjarābhītyādṛṣṭvācakraṃ sudarśanam
trāhitrāhītideveśaṃ pratyūcustesurānnṛpa
pṛthvīkāṭhinyamādāyalohānāmapitejasām
yadviśvakarmaṇākośaṃ kṛtaṃ bhasmīkṛtaṃ ca tat
sṛṣṭenatena ca kreṇadagdhaḥkālo’patatkṣitau
cakrārcirnicayaiḥkūrcaṃ dṛṣṭvādagdhamumāpatiḥ
hasitvābrahmaṇohastādgṛhītvāsatvaraṃ śivaḥ
dadhaukakṣāpuṭecakraṃ nidhānaṃ nirdhanoyathā
tatonadṛśyatecakraṃ śivakakṣāpuṭesthitam
mahāmūrkhasya yaddattaṃ dānaṃ tasyaphalaṃ yathā
iti śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe paṣcapaṣcāśatsahasrasaṃhitāyāṃ uttarakhaṇḍe
yudhiṣṭhiranāradasaṃvāde jālandharopākhyāne
navamo’dhyāyaḥ
daśamo’dhyāyaḥ
nārada uvāca
tvāṃ haṃ tusarvavīreśapratijṣāśambhunākṛtā
tanmamācakṣvasakalaṃ nāstiyuddhaṃ nirāmiṣam
nārada uvāca
bhūtirgātrevṛṣojīrṇaḥ phaṇinoṃ gegaleviṣam
bhikṣāpātraṃ kareputraugajānanaṣaḍānanau
tanayāgirirājasyaviśālāhyunnatastanī
nṛtyāngāyaṃ ścatāṣchaṃ bhuḥ svayaṃ bhavatihāsakaḥ
vṛndā varāṅganā rājan nimāś cāpsarasaḥ śubhāḥ
na cāpnuvanti pārvatyāḥ ṣoḍaśīm api tāṃ kalām
ity uktvāhaṃ mahīpāla jālandharam amarṣaṇam
paśyatāṃ sarvadaityānām antardhānaṃ gataḥ kṣaṇāt
atha sa preṣayad dūtaṃ sindhujaḥ siṃhikāsutam
kṣaṇe nāsādya kailāsaṃ devāvāsam apaśyata
jagāmālakṣitas tūrṇaṃ kṣīrābdhiṃ bhedaśaṅkayā
dadarśa rāhur bhavanaṃ śaṅkarasyātidīptimat
ātmānam ātmanā vīkṣya kim ity āha suvismitaḥ
yatnavān saniṣiddho’pi tadā te prodyatāyudhāḥ
tān nivārya gaṇān nandī vyājahāra vidhuntudam
kas tvaṃ kasmād ihāyātaḥ kiṃ kāryaṃ tava barbara
brūhi kāryaṃ gaṇā yāvat tvāṃ na hanyur bhayāvahāḥ
rāhur uvāca
dūtojālandharasyāhaṃ tvaṃ māṃ śarvānti kenaya
naṃ dīdūtoktamākarṇyanīlalohitamāyayau
daṇḍavatpraṇipatyāgresthitvāśaṅkaramabravīt
saiṃ hikeyomahārājadvāretiṣṭhatikāryataḥ
saprayātvathavāyātubhavānājṣaptumarhati
suptāmaṃ taḥ purāddevīṃ prasthāpyacasakhīvṛtām
paścādvāsthaṃ jagādāthanaṃ dindūtaṃ praveśaya
tatohastepragṛhyāmuṃ dūtaṃ naṃ dīmahābalaḥ
ānayāmāsadevānāṃ madhyeśambhumadarśayat
taṃ dadarśatadārāhurjaṭilaṃ nīlamātmani
paṣcavaktraṃ daśabhujaṃ nāgayajṣopavītinam
sarvadevagaṇopetaṃ sevitaṃ gaṇakoṭibhiḥ
prāptaṃ jṣātvātatodūtaṃ śambhurālokyacāgrataḥ
rāhur uvāca
tavanāstipitāmātāvasugotrādivarjitaḥ
purāṇapuruṣaḥkāmīvṛṣārūḍhaḥkathaṃ bhavān
heraṃ bavāhanasyākhoḥ pucchaṃ grastamathāhinā
atrāṃ tareskaṃ davāhaṃ kṣubdhaṃ vīkṣyamahāsvaram
athāruhyaharasyāṃ gaṃ galamāveṣṭya saṃsthitaḥ
tasyaniśvāsapavanairathajātohutāśanaḥ
tasyoṣmaṇācandralekhājaṭājūṭāṭavīsthitā
sārdratāṃ tutadāsāyātplāvitaṃ tadvapuryathā
tasyāhyamṛtadhārābhirbrahmamastakamālikā
haramaulikapālānāmabhūt saṃjīvitātadā
śrutvāparasparādhītaṃ vivadanti śirāṃ syatha
ahaṃ sraṣṭāahaṃ pātetyutsukāniparasparam
śocaṃ tyetāninodattaṃ nobhuktaṃ nahutaṃ mayā
atheśvarajaṭājūṭādāvirāsīdgaṇomahān
taṃ dṛṣṭvāsākapālālībhayāttasthaumṛtevasā
tadoktaḥśaṅkareṇāhobhakṣayatvaṃ raṇehatān
kṣaṇaṃ vicāryasagaṇaḥkvāpyadṛṣṭvāraṇaṃ tadā
brahmāṇaṃ bhakṣituṃ prāptaḥśaṅkareṇanivāritaḥ
tataḥ kīrtimukhenāthasvāṃ gaṃ sarvaṃ cabhakṣitam
tatsāha santadādṛṣṭvābhaktiṃ kīrttimukhasyaca
tamuvāceśvaraḥ prītaprāsādetiṣṭhamesadā
sapatiṣyatiśīghraṃ hītyuktaḥ soṃ tarhito’bhavat
śambhormūidhnatadādevāvavṛṣuḥ puṣpavṛṣṭibhiḥ
evamatyadbhutaṃ dṛṣṭvāsabhāyāṃ tutriśūlinaḥ
svarbhānurapideveśaṃ punaḥ provācavismitaḥ
spṛśanti tvāṃ kathaṃ bhāvaṃ ḥ svādhīnaṃ yoginaṃ balāt
indriyaiḥ pūjyasetvaṃ hiprāpyo’yaṃ viṣayaiḥkatham
brāhmādilokapālānāṃ pūjāṃ gṛhṇāsisarvataḥ
natvaṃ paśyasikaṃ devaṃ tvaṃ pūjayasikaṃ cana
īśvaro’sikathaṃ lokebhikṣābhojīpratiṣṭhitaḥ
skaṃ dalaṃ bodarābhyāṃ tvaṃ putrābhyāṃ sahito’dhunā
bhikṣāpātraṃ gṛhītvātubhramanityaṃ gṛhegṛhe
evaṃ bahuvidhaṃ tatrarāhurāheśvaraṃ prati
atheśaṃ mauninaṃ tyaktvārāhurnaṃ dinamabravīt
tvamaṃ trīhyasisenānīrvikaṭānanabiṃ badhṛk
evamācaritabhraṣṭaṃ tvaṃ śikṣayitumarhasi
ityākarṇyavacastasyanaṃ dīvijṣāpyaceśvaram
bhrū saṃjṣayaivasatadāmatamājṣāyaśūlinaḥ
sampūjyapreṣayāmāsarāhuṃ naṃ dīgaṇāgraṇīḥ
athajālandharaṃ gatvākathayāmāsavistarāt
svarbhānustasyavṛttāṃ taṃ gaurīrūpaṃ manoharam
iti śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe paṣcapaṣcāśatsahasrasaṃhitāyām uttarakhaṇḍe
yudhiṣṭharanāradasamvāde jālandharopākhyāne
kailāsād rāhupratyāgamanaṃ nāma
daśamo’dhyāyaḥ
ekādaśo’dhyāyaḥ
nārada uvāca
athajālandharodūtavacaḥśrutvāpratāpavān
sarvasainyaṃ samāhūyaprayāṇamakarottadā
tatas tataḥ sametānāṃ sainyāśrūyatedhvaniḥ
sihānāṃ ca tatīrvyamuṃ catapuraḥ paṃ thānamevaṃ vidhastrai
tatoduṃ dubhinādo’bhūtpīṭhejālandharanṛpa
tanninādenaśūrāṇāṃ priyeṇamahatātadā
kaṃ panti girayas tu ṃ gāṃ ḥ prāsādāvicalanti ca
saptasāgaragarbhebhyo niḥ sṛtādaityadānavāḥ
sannaddhāścātigarjanti nānāvāhana saṃyutāḥ
heṣāyayaumahānādāvājināṃ bāhyataḥ puraḥ
ragenātha saṃhṛṣṭādharāṃ saṃcalate’thavā
cālitairgajayūthaiścapṛthvīruddhāsakānanā
rarāja sainyalakṣaikaṃ rathināṃ sapatākinām
parārddhanavatiḥkoṭyaḥdṛśyante mukhyanāyakāḥ
nirjagāmamahāsainyaṃ chatraiḥ saṃchādyabhāskaram
āsītiṃ pajarapāṇḍupaṃ kajavanaṃ śvetātapatraiḥkvacit
māyūrātapavāraṇaiḥkvacidabhūtadunnīlanīlotpalam
sadvīcikvacidaṃ baraṃ saraivotsarpatpatākāpaṭaiḥ
tatojālandharodaityaḥ prayāṇāyasamutsukaḥ
skaṃ dhecāropayanśaktiṃ nānāratnavibhūṣitām
ājagāmamahāviṣṇupraṣṭuṃ sāgaravāsinam
bhogārthāṃ kiṃ prayacchāmitubhyaṃ bhāvukakathyatām
śrutvānārāyaṇovākyamadbidhajasyamudānvitaḥ
ity uktaḥ saprahṛṣṭo’thahariṃ provācasatvaraḥ
yāmiyoddhuṃ raṇe’haṃ tvaṃ sukhītiṣṭhehasāgare
lakṣmyā dattā kṣatas tatra keśavenātha pūjitaḥ
sanirgatyahareḥ sthānātsamudraṃ praṣṭumāgataḥ
so’rṇavaṃ praṇipatyāhatātayāsyāmidūrataḥ
nīlakaṇṭhaṃ raṇejetumanujṣāṃ dātumarhasi
prutrasyavacanaṃ śrutvāyiyāsoḥśaṅkaraṃ prati
bhuṃ kṣvarājyaṃ mayādattaṃ tāpa santyajadūrataḥ
svargādādhikyatāṃ nītaṃ tvayāvatsadharātalam
mamānti kaṃ vatsavasaśaṅkaraṃ bhikṣukaṃ tyaja
pitṛvākyamavijṣāyaāgatyasvabhaṭānsvakān
sajjībhūtaṃ tuyuddhāyavṛndājālandharaṃ jagau
vṛṃ dovāca
manonivartyatāṃ paśyapravṛttaṃ pārvatīṃ prati
gaurīṃ tvaṃ vāṣchasikasmātpārvatīkiṃ mamādhikā
tapasvinīnirālaṃ bā saṃsaktāsthāṇavesadā
sutānurāgiṇīvaṃ dhyātataḥ kṛtrimaputrikā
vṛthāstutānāradenatāṃ tyajasvabhajasvamām
itivṛndāvacaḥśrutvāpratyuvācārṇavātmajaḥ
adṛṣṭvāpārvatīrūpaṃ maccetonanivartate
vṛṃ detvayājanapadorājadhānīprapālyatāṃ
smartavyo’haṃ sadā caṇḍi yadi māṃ hanti śaṅkaraḥ
iti bhartṛvacaḥ śrutvā vṛndā hāsasamanvitā
jagāma śibikārūḍhā pīṭhaṃ jālandharaṃ tadā
nārada uvāca
mahāpadmasahasrāṇāṃ ṣaṣṭyāsainyena saṃvṛtaḥ
atrāṃ tareparityajyakailāṃ saṃśaṅkarogataḥ
gaṇaputrapriyāyuktaḥkailā saṃmānasottaram
senāḥ saṃsthāpyakailāsaālokanakutūhalī
divyakesaramandārarajaḥ puṃ japariśritāḥ
śītāmbuśīkarāsāraiḥ prabhugnāvānti vāyavaḥ
yatrasiddhāṃ ganāpīnastanottuṃ gataraṃ giṇaḥ
mandāramakaraṃ dāḍhyāḥ sundarāvānti vāyavaḥ
yatrāśokarucisnigdhapādanyā saṃcayoṣitām
prāpnuvanti surāḥ prītiṃ svabiṃ vālokaharṣitāḥ
yatrakinnarakāṃ tānāṃ suratavyaṃ jitaprabhāḥ
vibhānti sarvatas tatramandārāḥśīrṇapallavāḥ
yatraśambhugaṇākrāntānānāvelākuladrumāḥ
bhānti manmathabhūpālayaśasāsudhṛtāiva
vibhānti dagdhakaṃ darppanirvāṇāṃ gārasannibhāḥ
kvaciddalitakokilākulitanūtnacūtāṃ kuraṃ kuraṃ gakulasevitaṃ prabalaśālimūlaṃ kvacit
vicitraṃ cāpikailā saṃsarvaratnasamāśrayam
kasmāttaṃ tāpa santātapravadanti bhavādṛśāḥ
tādṛśīyasyasābhāryāgṛhamīdṛśmanoharam
tatrādṛṣṭvāvadacchaṃ bhuṃ haraḥkutragataḥ kave
kathaṃ mamabhayāccetipṛṣṭaḥ provācabhārgavaḥ
itikāvyavacaḥśrutvāprāhadaityomahābalaḥ
ahaṃ yāsyāmideveśaṃ tvaṃ purāgacchabhārgava
tasyaṣaṣṭisahasrāṇiyojanānāṃ samucchrayaḥ
saśailomānasorājandaityasainyaiḥ samāvṛtaḥ
chatrāṃ dhakāraṃ paryāsītvādyanādenavepathuḥ
sainyakolāhalasteṣāṃ pūrayāmāsarodasī
nārada uvāca
athaivamāgataṃ dṛṣṭvādaityasainyaṃ mahattadā
atyuccesagireḥśṛṃ gesthāpyagaurīṃ sakhīvṛtām
triṃ śanmahābjasāhasraiḥ pramathānāṃ vṛtaḥśivaḥ
uvācanaṃ dinaṃ śambhurgaṇānāmadhipaṃ tvayā
mahākālādibhiḥśūrairyāhitvaṃ parivāritaḥ
itiśambhorvacaḥśrutvāsacasārathimabravīt
kākatuṇḍarathaṃ me’dyasamānayamahāmate
naṃ dinovacanaṃ śrutvāsopisyaṃ danamāharat
dvātriṃ śadaśva saṃyuktaṃ cakraṣoḍaśa saṃyutam
ṣaṣṭidhvajasamopetaṃ dvātriṃ śadyojanāyutam
sarvaśastraiśca sampūrṇaṃ prāptaṃ grāmikaṃ ratham
naṃ dinaścakrarakṣārthaṃ putraudavināyakau
samādiṣṭauśaṅkareṇasannaddhautausvavāhanau
gaṇaiḥ parivṛtonaṃ dīvāgbhiḥ sampūjyaṃ ceśvaram
naṃ dīrathaṃ samāruhyaniryayaudānavānprati
yāvatsaniryayaunaṃ dītāvattedānavāḥ puraḥ
śailoparisamārūḍhādānavāghoradarśanāḥ
gaṇānāmāyudhais tīkṣṇaiḥnihatāḥ patitābhuvi
jaghnurdaityānśitaiḥśastrairgaṇārājanmahābalān
amarairācitaṃ dṛṣṭvārurudhurdaityasainikāḥ
tataḥ samabhavadyuddhaṃ gaṇānāṃ dānavaiḥ saha
śaravarṣamathātyugraṃ dānavānāṃ divaukasām
tataḥ samastānmātaṃ gāṣjaghnuḥśikhimukhāraṇe
rathānhayānpadātīṃ ścakākatuṇḍāmahābalāḥ
hatānāṃ daitya saṃghāṃ nāṃ saṃgarebhṛśamāyinām
muktakeśāruṇamukhairbhīmadaṃ ṣṭrāvilocanaiḥ
siṃ haiḥkabandhajaṃ ghorukaṭipṛṣṭhanikṛṃ tanaiḥ
tatovirāvaḥ sumahānbabhūvadaityeśvarāṇāṃ dhvajinīṣudhāvatām
śambhor gaṇaiḥ pātitasainikānāṃ
yathārṇavānāṃ nadatāṃ yugakṣaye
iti śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe paṣcāśatsahasra saṃhitāyām uttarakhaṇḍe
nāradayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde jālandharopākhyāne
ekādaśo’dhyāyaḥ
dvādaśo’dhyāyaḥ
nārada uvāca
daityasainyaṃ hataṃ dṛṣṭvāgaṇairnaṃ dipurogamaiḥ
kruddhāḥśuṃ bhādayodaityāḥ samājagmurgaṇānprati
mahākālaṃ niśuṃ bho’thakālolokeśvaraṃ raṇe
puṣpadaṃ taṃ śailaromāmālyavaṃ taṃ mahābalaḥ
kolāhaloraṇerājanprāptomāyābalena ca
caṇḍaṃ bhayānakonāmarāhuḥ skaṃ damadhāvata
kūṣmāṇḍaṃ sarparomācaghargharomadanaṃ tathā
hā sampātālaketuścabhṛṃ gīśaṃ romakaṇṭakaḥ
yuyudhuḥkoṭiśorudragaṇadaityāḥ parasparam
dṛḍhaprahāriṇojaghnurgaṇādaityāḥśarairatha
naṃ dīmumocatānbāṇānmahāsāroyathānage
tataḥ sampūrayāmāsamukhaṃ śuṃ bhasyapatribhiḥ
śuṃ bho’thakārmukaṃ tyaktvārathāttaṃ pratyadhāvata
utpāṭyacagiriṃ tenajaghānahṛdinaṃ dinaḥ
naṃ dinohṛdayaṃ bhittvācūrṇayitvārathaṃ raṇe
mūrcchāṃ prāpyakṣaṇāt saṃjṣāṃ vegavānsapalāyitaḥ
mahākāloniśuṃ bhenamudgareṇahatohṛdi
tatprahāramaciṃ tyāthaniśuṃ bho’pimahābalaḥ
taṃ gṛhītvācaraṇayormahākālaṃ mahābalaḥ
satadvaktrānilaṃ pītvānanādarudhirāruṇaḥ
puṣpadaṃ taḥśailaromṇācāhatomuṣṭināmukhe
gadayāśailaromāṇaṃ hatvābhūmaunyapātayat
taṃ dṛṣṭvāpatitaṃ bhūmaugiriketurmahābalaḥ
puṣpadaṃ taṃ mahābhīmaṃ mudgareṇavyapothayat
gṛhītvācarmakhaṅgaṃ cagiriketoradhāvata
śirastaṃ prāhakiṃ yāsimāṃ tyaktvāsamarārthinam
vidhṛtaḥ puṣpadaṃ taścakukṣautīkṣṇāsinācchit
niścakrāmāsuraḥkukṣeḥśataśīrṣomahābalaḥ
dviśatākṣisamāyuktaḥśatadvayabhujākulaḥ
puṣpaṃ daṃ tastadātatradvābhyāṃ rājanvimarditaḥ
jvareṇatena ca kliṣṭoduḥ sahenātiveginā
tyaktvāśivagaṇaḥ saṃkhyaṃ kaṃ pamānogiriṃ yayau
kolāhalomahādhanvīmālyavaṃ taṃ śarais tribhiḥ
vivyādhaskaṃ dhayorbhālemālyavāṃś ca tato’suram
bāṇāhatomālyavatāśastrairnānāvidhaiḥśitaiḥ
kolāhalaḥ prahṛtavāndarśayannātmalāghavam
so’pihetivyathāṃ tyaktvāmālyavāṃś cagaṇāgraṇīḥ
giriṃ gṛhītvātenājaukolāhalamathāhanat
niścakrāmajvarastasmājjvalanonāmabhīṣaṇaḥ
triśīrṣonavahastaścanavapādo’tipiṃ galaḥ
sajvaromohayāmāsamālyavaṃ taṃ svatejasā
mālyavānsamaraṃ tyaktvāparātogiriṃ yayau
caṇḍirbhayānakenājaupāśenahṛdayehataḥ
kārttike yo raṇe rāhuṃ śitair bāṇaiḥ samāhanat
ācchādyaśarajālaiścaśīghraṃ śaktiṃ mumocaha
āpataṃ tīṃ mahāśaktiṃ jvalaṃ tīmivatejasā
dṛṣṭvārāhuḥkhamutpatyakarābhyāṃ jagṛhedrutam
satāṃ śaktiṃ gṛhītvātuvinadyoccaiḥ punaḥ punaḥ
kathaṃ citsānadīruddhāsamaṃ pūrogiriṃ yayau
śrutvārṇavajojvarataḥ kaṭakakadaṃ basyakarkaśaṃ virutam
śaraiḥkiraṃ taṃ dahanamasinābarbaro’vadhīt
kūṣmāṇḍonihatomūrdhnisarparomṇāthamuṣṭinā
pātālaketunāhāsomudgareṇasamāhataḥ
śuṇḍāyāṃ muṣṭighātenahataḥ pātālaketunā
āyudhairjarjaraṃ cakrebhṛṃ gīśaṃ romakaṇṭakaḥ
bhṛṃ gīśo’piraṇādbhītastvarannevagiriṃ yayau
gaṇaṃ gilitavāndaityomahākāyomahānanaḥ
hāhākāromahānāsīdgiliteketunāraṇe
jṛṃ bhasyaniśitair vāṇaiiśchannāṃ go’thavināyakaḥ
śuṇḍādaṇḍaṃ paraśunātasyacicchedadanti naḥ
jṛṃ bhāsurojaghānāthaśaktyā laṃ bodarodaram
mūṣako’piśarair bhinnaḥ praviveśaguhāmukham
vināyakaḥ prahārārttovilalāpākuloraṇe
hāmātastātahābhrātarhāmūṣakamamapriya
gaṇeśakraṃ ditaṃ śrutvābhagavatyātayātadā
sametyakūṭādanyasmātpārvatyoktaḥśivastadā
śivakiṃ krīḍaseśailerakṣaputraugaṇānapi
sadāśūlādiśastrāṇāṃ dhṛtānāmadyavaikṣaṇaḥ
athagauryāvacaḥśrutvāvīrabhadraṃ śivo’bravīt
vṛṣaḥ sajjīyatāṃ śīghramity uktesatadākarot
kaṇṭheghaṇṭāśataṃ baddhvākarṇayordarpaṇaudhṛtau
skaṃ dhecakiṃ kiṇījālaṃ caraṇenūpuraṃ mahat
pucchecāmarasāhasraṃ tasyapāśāṣṭakaṃ mukhe
kalyāṇīcatadādevīśarvapārśvevyasthitā
pāśāṣṭakena saṃyuktātatrakhaṅgadharāṃ bikā
nyastānisarvaśastrāṇisavṛṣaḥ sajjitobabhau
pārvatyābhūṣitaḥ so’thanijayāghaṇṭamālayā
kṛtaṃ catilakaṃ devyāproktaḥ satkṛtipūrvakam
harastvayānamoktavyovṛṣendraraṇa saṃkaṭe
āgantavyamarīnjitvāśambhunāsaha saṃgare
iti śrutvāvacodevyāharovṛṣamathāruhat
dhṛtvāyudhasahasraṃ tunijālaṃ kārabhūṣitaḥ
raṇaṃ gacchāmitāṃ prāhapārvatīṃ pratisādaram
īśvara uvāca
tvanti ṣṭhasisvarūpāṇiekākinyapisaspṛhā
bhāminīdurabhiprāyādānavāhisamāgatāḥ
tasmāttvayātmanaivātmārakṣaṇīyovarānane
ity uktvāvṛṣabhārūḍhoyayaurudroraṇāṃ gaṇam
triṃ śanmahābjasāhasraiḥ pramathānāṃ vṛtaḥśivaḥ
vāmapārśvaṃ maheśasyaśūrorakṣatipārthiva
dakṣiṇaṃ dhūrjaṭeḥ pārśvaṃ saṃrakṣatidhanurddharaḥ
tuṃ gāduttīryaśailendrādraṇaṃ prāptogaṇaiḥ saha
dṛṣṭvājagarjustedaityāmaheśānaṃ vṛṣasthitaṃ
tatonaṃ dīmahākālaḥkālaskaṃ daumahābalaḥ
mālyavānpuṣpadaṃ taścavṛṣalīsvarṇadanti kaḥ
caṇḍīśomadanaḍaḥkūṣmāṇḍoguptalomakaḥ
yeyepūrvaṃ raṇebhagnāḥ prāptāsteraṇa saṃkaṭam
gaṇadānavayodhānāṃ saṃgrāmo’bhūdbhayāvahaḥ
tatogaṇānāṃ vidrāvyasainyaṃ tecamahābalāḥ
raṇe saṃbeṣṭayāmāsuḥśaraughaiḥ sarvataḥ śivam
śūlaiḥkuṃ tairgadābhiścamudgaraiḥ parighair api
indriyāṇiyathātmānaṃ viṣayaiḥ paṣcapaṣcabhiḥ
jaghānātharaṇedaityāṣchaṃ bhurbāṇaiḥ sudāruṇaiḥ
yathāśumāghaḥ pāpānihanti snānenatatkṣaṇāt
iti śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe paṣcapaṣcāśatsahasrasaṃhitāyām uttarakhaṇḍe
nāradayudhiṣṭhirasamvāde jālandharopākhyāne
śrīmahādevaraṇam āgamanaṃ nāma
dvādaśo’dhyāyaḥ
trayodaśo’dhyāyaḥ
nārada uvāca
tatojālandharaḥśrutvādaityakolāhalaṃ raṇe
ājagāmarathārūḍhoyatradevaḥ sadāśivaḥ
sārathiṃ khaṅgaromāṇaṃ kopātsatvaramabravīt
hanmitaṃ tāpa saṃśauryājjaṭābhasmāsthibhūṣitam
vṛṣārūḍhasyakāśaktiḥ paṅgoryuddhemayāsaha
nārada uvāca
ity uktvākhaṅgaromāṇamābhāṣyaca tathoddhataḥ
gṛhītvākārmukaṃ ghoraṃ rathenādhāvatadrutam
taṃ rurodhatadāyāṃ taṃ vīrabhadraḥśitaiḥśaraiḥ
nirucchvāsīkṛtenāpisakāyenaśarair vṛtaḥ
tathāpikiṃ kapālānitulāṃ yānti kalānidheḥ
pāśena maṇibhadraṃ tu hatvovāceśvaraṃ vacaḥ
tvaṃ māṃ praharanatvāhamādauhanmijaṭādharam
itibruvaṃ taṃ taṃ garvādvīrabhadro’thasāyakaiḥ
pūrayāmāsa saṃkruddhoyathāpadmaṃ raviḥkaraiḥ
gajoparigajaṃ hatvāpātayāmāsabhūtale
raktapaṃ kāruṇābhūmiḥ saṃjātādurgamākṣaṇāt
śailāccagaṇamukhyāścadānavāṣjaghnurāhave
patanti dānavāḥśūrāgataprāṇāmahītale
ruṇḍadordaṇḍamuṇḍaiścakaripṛṣṭhakarorubhiḥ
patanti dānavāḥśūrāpūritāvasudhānṛpa
nārada uvāca
evaṃ vidhaṃ raṇedṛṣṭvāharamatyaṃ tadurjayam
bhuvaneca tathānyānidṛṣṭavāṃ ṃ llakṣaṇānisaḥ
tejo’nyadevanakṣatraśaśāṃ kasakalādiṣu
nadṛṣṭāsāmayāgaurīyāṃ māmāhātināradaḥ
sāṃ prataṃ śāśvatesthānekathandrakṣyāmyumāṃ sthitām
tāṃ hidraṣṭuṃ vrajāmyādaupaścādyotsyāmiśambhunā
ciṃ tayitvetimanasādaityaṃ prāhārṇavātmajaḥ
śuṃ bhaṃ caṇḍajayevīramamatulyaparākrama
dhṛtvāmatsadṛśaṃ rūpaṃ saṃgrāmaṃ kartumarhasi
ahaṃ yāsyāmitāndraṣṭuṃ gaurīṃ maccittahāriṇīm
ity uktvāthadadautasmaisvāṃ gāduttāryamaṇḍanam
varmaśastrādikaṃ datvārathaṃ sārathi saṃyutam
alakṣitas tatogatvāguhāṃ guptāṃ tupārthiva
mānasottaraśailasyahararūpaṃ dadhārasaḥ
dhṛtvādurvāraṇerūpaṃ naṃ dinaḥ sadṛśaṃ tathā
athāruruhatuḥśailaṃ chadmaśaṅkaranaṃ dinau
yatrāstiśikharegaurīsakhibhiḥ sahitānṛpa
tamāyāṃ taṃ śarair bhinnaṃ skaṃ dhamālambyanaṃ dinaḥ
raktāktamaṃ baraṃ dṛṣṭvābhavānīvismitābhavat
sakhyastasyājayādyāstāḥjagmustaṃ saṃbhramānvitāḥ
