śrīmannārāyaṇaścāhaṃ devatāsamudāhṛtaḥ
chaṃ dastudevīgāyatrīpaṣcaviṃ śākṣarātmikā
dviḥ saptaṣaṭtripaṣcadviṣaḍaṃ gāniniyojayet
lakṣmyāmadanapāyinyāmāṃ dhyāyedviśvarūpiṇam
cakraśaṅkhagadāpadmapāṇinaṃ divyarūpiṇam
vāmāṃ kasthaśriyāsārdhaṃ pūjayetprayataṃ śuciḥ
sakṛtsampūjyamāno'pisaṃ tu ṣṭosmiprajāpate
pitātvaṃ sarvalokānāṃ mātātvaṃ gurur eva ca
tvaṃ casvāmīsakhābhrātāgatistvaṃ śaraṇaṃ suhṛt
ahantutavadeveśadāsaśśiṣyas tathā suhṛt
adhunāmantraratnasyadīkṣāṃ samyagvidhānataḥ
brūhisarvatratatvenalokānāṃ hitakāmyayā
śrībhagavān uvāca
śaṇuvatsapravakṣyāmimantradīkṣāvidhiṃ param
ācāryaṃ saṃ śrayetpūrvaṃ madāśrayaṇasiddhaye
mantrajṣomantrabhaktaścasadāmantrāśrayaḥ śuciḥ
brāhmaṇovītarāgaścakrodhalobhavivarjitaḥ
sadvṛttauśāsitācaiva mumukṣuḥ paramātmavit
evamādiguṇepetaācāryaḥ samudāsuhṛt
ācārāṣśāsayedyastusaācāryaṃ itīritaḥ
yastvācāryaparādhīnaḥ sadvṛttauśāsyateyadi
śāsanesthiravṛttaścaśiṣyaḥ sadbhirudāhṛtaḥ
evaṃ lakṣaṇasaṃ yuktaṃ śiṣyaṃ sarvaguṇānvitam
dvādaśyāṃ śravaṇevāpikarhicidvaiṣṇavedine
sadācāryopasamprītau tatra dīkṣāṃ samācet
sudarśanaṃ pāṣcajanyaṃ suvarṇena prakārayet
raupyeṇa vāpi tāmreṇa kāṃsyenāpi prakārayet
ācāryojuhuyādājyaṃ mantreṇāthadvijottamaḥ
aṣṭottarasasahasraṃ vāśatamaṣṭottaraṃ tu vā
mantraiḥ puruṣasūktādyairjuhuyāghṛtapāyasam
ṣaḍakṣareṇajuhuyādājyaṃ viṃ śatisaṃ khyayā
śaṃ khenaivāṃ kanaṃ kuryādvāhvordakṣiṇasavyayoḥ
homaśeṣaṃ samāpyāthapunaḥ pūjāṃ samācaret
ūrddhapuṇḍradharaṃ śiṣyaṃ mantramadhyāpayedguruḥ
mantrārthaścapravaktavyovṛttiś caiva viśeṣataḥ
labdhamantras tadācāryaṃ pūjayed bhūṣaṇādibhiḥ
anenavidhināmantraṃ yo'dhītevaiṣṇavādguroḥ
tataḥ savaiṣṇavaṃ yātinān yathā surasattama
nārada uvāca
evamukttvāvidhātāraṃ devadevohariḥ pitā
tasmādyūyaṃ muniśreṣṭhādhārayitvāsudarśanam
nārāyaṇapadaṃ dvaṃ dvaṃ gacchadhvaṃ śaraṇaṃ dvijāḥ
vasiṣṭha uvāca
ity uktvā munayaḥ sarvenāradenasurarṣiṇā
dvayādhikāriṇaḥ sarveyātāviṣṇoḥ paraṃ padam
tasmāttvamapirājarṣeviṣṇusāyujyamicchasi
dīkṣāmārgavidhānenadhārayitvāsudarśanam
nārāyaṇapadadvaṃ dvaṃ tadekaṃ śaraṇaṃ vraja
sarvalokeśvaraḥ sākṣādbrahmātribhuvaneśvaraḥ
śaunakādimaharṣīṇāṃ naimiṣāraṇyavāsinām
nāradaḥ pradadau mantraṃ prapattiṃ śaraṇāgatim
devātāścanajānanti siddhāsādhyāścadānavāḥ
mayāpiprāpitomantraṃ śaktiputraḥ parāśaraḥ
ihaṃ rahasyaṃ paramaṃ lakṣmīnārāyaṇaṃ dvayam
rājaṃ stavāpivakṣyāmiprapattiśaraṇāgatim
asmātparataraṃ dharmmaṃ nāstilokeṣukiṃ cana
satyaṃ satyaṃ punaḥ satyaṃ brahmaṇākathitaṃ purā
nārāyaṇātparodevonāstimuktipradonṛṇām
iti śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe paṣcapaṣcāśatsāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyām uttarakhaṇḍe
vasiṣṭhadilīpasaṃvāde vidyopadeśo nāma
dilīpa uvāca
śṛṇvato naiva tṛptir me viṣṇubhaktiṃ sukhāvahām
tāpatrayamahājvālāvahnibhiḥ satataṃ nṛṇām
santaptānāṃ muniśreṣṭha viṣṇubhaktisudhārṇavam
vinākim anyaccharaṇaṃ bhavāraṇye bhayānake
ācakṣva vistareṇātha bhaktibhedān mahāmune
upāsyamānān satataṃ munibhiḥ paramātmanaḥ
vasiṣṭha uvāca
sādhu pṛcchasi rājendra saṃsārottāraṇaṃ nṛṇāṃ
imam evaṃ mahāpraśnaṃ kailāsaśikhare purā
papraccha girijā devī śaṅkaraṃ lokapūjitam
pārvaty uvāca
viṣṇubhaktiṃ mamācakṣva muktidāṃ sarvadehinām
upāsyabhedān mantrāṃś ca tasya pūjāvidhīṃs tathā
tasya viṣṇoḥ svarūpaṣ ca tadvibhūtir guṇādikam
prāpnuvanti narāḥ pāpā viṣayāsaktacetasaḥ
vistareṇa mayi prītyā brūhi sarvam aśeṣataḥ
vasiṣṭha uvāca
iti pṛṣṭo mahādevyā haras tripurahātadā
sādhu pṛcchasi māṃ devi śrīśamāhātmyam uttamam
dhanyāsi kṛtapuṇyāsi viṣṇubhaktāsi pārvati
parituṣṭo'smi te bhadre śīlarūpaguṇaiḥ sadā
tanmantrāṇāṃ vidhānaṃ ca svarūpaṃ tasya śārṅgiṇaḥ
tattvaṃ nārāyaṇo viṣṇur vāsudevaḥ sanātanaḥ
paramātmā paraṃ brahma paraṃ jyotiḥ parātparaḥ
acyutaḥ puruṣaḥ kṛṣṇaḥ śāśvataḥ śiva īśvaraḥ
nityaḥ sarvagataḥ sthāṇū rudraḥ sākṣī prajāpatiḥ
yajṣo yajṣapatiḥ sākṣād brahmaṇaḥ patir eva ca
akāravācyo bhagavān śrībhūnīlāpatiḥ prabhuḥ
sahasram ūrdhā viśvātmā sahasrākṣaḥ sahasrapāt
sabhūmiṃ sarvataḥ spṛṣṭvā hy atyatiṣṭhad daśāṅgulam
anantaḥ śrīpatī rāmo guṇabhṛn nirguṇo mahān
sarvalokeśvaraḥ śrīmān sarvajṣaḥ sarvatomukhaḥ
aśakyaṃ tan mayā vaktuṃ brahmaṇā saha daivataiḥ
tasyopāsanabhedāṃś ca śṛṇu vacmi punaḥ pṛthak
ādyaṃ tu vaiṣṇavaṃ proktaṃ śaṅkhacakrāṅkanaṃ hareḥ
dhāraṇaṃ cordhvapuṇḍrāṇāṃ tanmantrāṇāṃ parigrahaḥ
arcanaṃ ca japo dhyānaṃ tannāmasmaraṇaṃ tathā
kīrtanaṃ śravaṇaṃ caiva vandanaṃ pādasevanam
tadīyānāṃ ca sevāṃ ca dvādaśīvrataniṣṭhitam
tulasīropaṇaṃ viṣṇor devadevasya śārṅgiṇaḥ
sarveṣām eva devānāṃ mamāpi puruṣottamaḥ
pūjanīyo harir nityaṃ brāhmaṇānāṃ viśeṣataḥ
taccihnair aṅkitaḥ śrīśapadaṃ prāpnoty asaṃśayam
śaṅkhacakrāṅkanaṃ kuryād brāhmaṇo bāhumūlayoḥ
cakraṃ vāśaṅkhacakre vā tathā paṣcāyudhāni vā
tyaktvā yamapuraṃ ghoraṃ yāti viṣṇoḥ paraṃ padam
tatsarvaṃ viphalaṃ yātipūjāmantrajapādikam
agnitaptenacakreṇabrāhmaṇobāhumūlayoḥ
aṃ kayitvājapanmantraṃ saṃsārānmokṣamāpnuyāt
viṣṇucakravihīnaṃ tu yaśrāddhebhojayiṣyati
vyarthaṃ bhavatitatsarvaṃ nirāśāḥ pitarogatāḥ
viṣṇucakrāṃ kitaṃ vipraṃ pūjayecchrāddhakarmaṇi
dadyādgobhūhiraṇyādicakrāṃ kitabhujāyavai
agnitaptenacakreṇabāhumūletulāṣchitāḥ
sarvapāpavinirmuktāyānti viṣṇoḥ paraṃ padam
tasya tīrthāniyajṣāścasamprāptā nātra saṃśayaḥ
adhṛtvāvidhinācakraṃ brāhmaṇaḥ prākṛtobhavet
na tasya kiṃ cidaśnīyādapikratusahasriṇaḥ
adhṛtvāvidhinā cakraṃ brāhmaṇojñānadurlabhaḥ
sarvavedavidovāpisarvaśāstraviśāradaḥ
adhṛtvāvidhinācakraṃ brāhmaṇaḥ patitobhavet
ūrddhapuṇḍravihīnastu śaṅkha cakravivarjitaḥ
tathaiva brāhmaṇodeviviṣṇucakreṇacihnitaḥ
prataptaṃ bibhṛyāccakraṃ śaṅkhaṃ cabhujamūlayoḥ
strīśūdrāṇāṃ sadādhāryyecandanenasugandhinā
taptenaivāṃ kanaṃ kuryādbrāhmaṇasyavidhānataḥ
hareḥ pūjādhikārārthaṃ cakraṃ dhāryāṃ vidhānataḥ
pratapec cakraśaṅkhābhyāṃ hutvā homaṃ vidhānataḥ
anyair na dāhayed gātraṃ brāhmaṇo harilāṣchanāt
śaṅkhacakragadākhaḍgaśārṅgād anyair harer api
acakradhāriṇaṃ vipraṃ dūrataḥ parivarjayet
tasmāttuvidhinācakraṃ dhāryaṃ vipraiḥ śubhānane
aprākṛtāmahātmānoviṣṇucakreṇalāṃ cchitāḥ
viṣṇucakravihīnāstubrāhmaṇāḥ prākṛtāḥ smṛtāḥ
sarvāśrameṣuvasatāṃ brāhmaṇānāṃ viśeṣataḥ
vidhināvaiṣṇavaṃ cakraṃ dhāryaṃ hiśrutinodanāt
vāmetuśaṅkhaṃ bibhṛyāditibrahmavidoviduḥ
tavasāmniyajuṣiṛciproktaṃ śubhānane
prateviṣṇoabjacakrepavitrejanmāmbhodhiṃ tartavecarṣaṇīndrāḥ
mūlebāhvordadhate'nyepurāṇāliṅgānyenyetāvakānyarpayanti
caraṇaṃ pavitraṃ vitataṃ purāṇaṃ vāṅmayaṃ śubham
pavitraṃ brāhmaṇaspatyaṃ jagadvyāptaṃ hareḥ sadā
te nātaptatanūryeṣāṃ nateyāntiparaṃ padam
tenataptātanūryeṣāṃ teprayānti paraṃ paradam
sahasrāraṃ prākṛtaghnaṃ lokadvāraṃ mahaujasam
nāmāniviṣṇucakrasyaparyāyeṇanibodhame
yenadevāḥ pavitreṇaātmānaṃ punatesadā
tenasahasradhāreṇapāvamānyaḥ punaṃ tu mām
prajāpatyaṃ pavitraṃ tu śatodyāmaṃ hiraṇmayam
tasmādvaividhivaddhāryāḥ śaṅkhacakrādihetayaḥ
brāhmaṇānāṃ viśeṣeṇavaiṣṇavānāṃ viśeṣataḥ
dhṛtorddhvapuṇḍraḥ kṛtacakradhārīviṣṇoḥ padaṃ dhyāyatiyo mahātmā
svareṇamantraiṇasadāhṛdisthaṃ parātparaṃ yātiviśuddhacetāḥ
yekaṇṭhalagnatulasīnalinākṣamālāyebāhumūlaparicihnitaśaṅkhacakrāḥ
yevālalāṭaphalakelasadūrdhvapuṇḍrāstevaiṣṇavābhuvanamāśupavitrayanti
divaspateḥ suvitataṃ pavitraṃ ye tu rakṣiṇaḥ
mūle tu bāhvoḥ paramātmano hareḥ
aṅkayet taptacakrādyair ātmano bāhumūlayoḥ
kalatrāpatyabhṛtyeṣu paśvādiṣu ca aṅkayet
ity evaṃ śrutayaḥ sarvāḥ kathayanti varānane
dvividhaṃ vaiṣṇavaṃ proktaṃ bāhyam ābhyantaraṃ tathā
śaṅkhacakrādibhir bāhyam āntaraṃ vītarāgatā
bāhyābhyantarasāmyaṃ yat tad vaiṣṇavam udāhṛtam
tasmāc cakrādicihnaṃ tu prathamaṃ vaiṣṇavaṃ smṛtam
āntaraṃ smaradoṣādivimuktaṃ svātmadarśanam
sarvabhūtadayāśāntir indriyārtheṣv alolatā
putradārādyasaṅgatvaṃ yogābhyāsaratis tathā
tasmāc cakrādihetīnām aṅkanaṃ vaiṣṇavaṃ smṛtam
iti śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe paṣcapaṣcāśatsāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyām
uttarakhaṇḍe umāmaheśvarasaṃvāde
sudarśanādimāhātmyaṃ nāma
paṣcaviṃśatyadhikadviśatatamo'dhyāyaḥ
śaṅkara uvāca
ūrdhvapuṇḍrasya māhātmyaṃ vakṣyāmi śubhadarśane
lakṣmyā sārdhaṃ samāsīno devadevo janārdanaḥ
tasmād yasya śarīre tu ūrdhvapuṇḍraṃ dhṛto bhavet
sa snātaḥ sarvatīrtheṣu sarvayajṣeṣu dīkṣitaḥ
dhārayed vordhvapuṇḍraṃ yo mṛdā śubhreṇa vaiṣṇavaḥ
ūrdhvapuṇḍradharo vipraḥ sarvalokeṣu pūjitaḥ
vimānavaram āruhya yāti viṣṇoḥ paraṃ padam
sarvapāpaviśuddhyartham iṣṭāpūrtaphalāptaye
ūrdhvapuṇḍraṃ dharaṃ dṛṣṭvā sarvapāpaiḥ pramucyate
ūrdhvapuṇḍradharaṃ vipraṃ yaḥ śrāddhe bhojayiṣyati
ākalpakoṭipitaras tasya tṛptā na saṃśayaḥ
ūrdhvapuṇḍraṃ dharo yas tu kuryāc chrāddhaṃ śubhānane
kalpakoṭisahasrāṇi gayāśrāddhaphalaṃ labhet
yajṣadānatapaścaryājapahomādikaṃ ca yat
iṣṭāpūrtādikaṃ sarvaṃ niṣphalaṃ syān na saṃśayaḥ
yac charīraṃ manuṣyāṇām ūrdhvapuṇḍravivarjitam
draṣṭavyaṃ naiva tat kaṃcit śmaśānasadṛśaṃ bhavet
ūrdhvapuṇḍravihīnas tu sandhyākarmādikaṃ ca yat
tat sarvaṃ rākṣasair nītaṃ narakaṃ cāvagacchati
ūrdhvapuṇḍradharo vipro mṛdā śubhreṇa vaidikaḥ
viprāṇām ūrdhvapuṇḍraṃ syāt tilakaṃ tu mahībhṛtaḥ
paṭṭākāraṃ tu vaiśyānāṃ śūdrāṇāṃ vai tripuṇḍrakam
ūrdhvapuṇḍraṃ mṛdā kāryaṃ kastūryās tilakaṃ tathā
paṭṭākāraṃ tu gandhena bhasmanaiva tripuṇḍrakam
ūrdhvapuṇḍraṃ tu sarveṣāṃ na niṣiddhaṃ kadācana
viprāṇāṃ naiva kāryaṃ syāt tiryakpaṭṭādidhāraṇam
nārāyaṇāt pareśānād anyeṣām arcanaṃ na tu
varjayet tādṛśaṃ devi madyocchiṣṭaṃ ghaṭaṃ yathā
tripuṇḍraṃ śūdrakalpānāṃ śūdrāṇāṃ ca vidhis tathā
tripuṇḍradhāraṇād vipraḥ patitaḥ syān na saṃśayaḥ
ekāntino mahābhāgāḥ sarvabhūtahite ratāḥ
sāntarālaṃ prakurvīran puṇḍraṃ haripadākṛtim
hareḥ pādākṛtiṃ kuryād ūrdhvapuṇḍraṃ vidhānataḥ
ūrdhvapuṇḍram ṛjuṃ saumyaṃ supārśvaṃ sumanoharam
daṇḍākāraṃ suśobhāḍhyaṃ madhye cchidraṃ prakalpayet
tasmāc chidrānvitaṃ puṇḍraṃ daṇḍākāraṃ suśobhanam
viprāṇāṃ satataṃ kāryaṃ strīṇāṃ ca śubhadarśane
sāntarāle samāsīno harir asti śriyā saha
nirantarālaṃ yaḥ kuryād ūrdhvapuṇḍraṃ dvijādhamaḥ
acchidram ūrdhvapuṇḍraṃ tu ye kurvanti dvijādhamāḥ
teṣāṃ lalāṭe satataṃ śunaḥ pādo na saṃśayaḥ
tasmāc chidrānvitaṃ puṇḍraṃ saharidraṃ śubhānvitam
ādāya parayā bhaktyā veṅkaṭādrau hṛde mṛdam
dhārayed ūrdhvapuṇḍrāṇi harisāyujyasiddhaye
śrīkṛṣṇatulasīmūle mṛdam ādāya bhaktimān
dhārayed ūrdhvapuṇḍrāṇi haris tatra prasīdati
dvāravatyāṃ śubhe ramye vāsudevahrade tathā
tatrodbhavāṃ mṛdaṃ ramyām ādāya dvijasattamaḥ
dhārayed ūrdhvapuṇḍrāṇi sarvakāmaphalāptaye
ādāya parayā bhaktyā gaṅgātīrodbhavāṃ mṛdam
tathā dhṛtordhvapuṇḍrāṇi sarvayajṣaphalaṃ labhet
sarvavaśyakaraṃ proktam ūrdhvapuṇḍrasya dhāraṇāt
parvatāgre nadītīre bilvamūle jalāśaye
sindhutīre ca valmīke harikṣetre viśeṣataḥ
viṣṇoḥ snānodakaṃ yatra pravāhayati nityaśaḥ
puṇḍrāṇāṃ dhāraṇārthāya gṛhṇīyāt tatra mṛttikām
śrīraṅge veṅkaṭādrau ca śrīkūrme dvārake śubhe
prayāge nārasiṃhādrau vārāhe tu lasīvane
gṛhītvā mṛttikāṃ bhaktyā viṣṇupādajalaiḥ saha
dhṛtvā puṇḍrāṇi cāṅgeṣu viṣṇusāyujyam āpnuyāt
yasmin kasmin mahābhāgā vaiṣṇavā dhārayanti vai
tasmin vai mṛttikā grāhyā ūrdhvapuṇḍrasya dhāraṇe
śyāmaṃ śāntikaraṃ proktaṃ raktaṃ vaśyakaraṃ tathā
śrīkaraṃ pītam ity āhuḥ śvetaṃ mokṣakaraṃ śubham
vakraṃ virūpaṃ baddhāgraṃ chinnamūlaṃ padacyutam
aśubhaṃ rūkṣam āsaktaṃ tathā nāṅgulikalpitam
ārabhya nāsikāmūlaṃ lalāṭāntaṃ likhen mṛdā
antarālaṃ dvyaṅgulaṃ syāt pārśvāv aṅgulimātrakau
mṛdā śubhreṇa vilikheta puṇḍram ṛjutaraṃ śubham
lalāṭe keśavaṃ dhyāyen nārāyaṇam athodare
vakṣaḥsthale mādhavaṃ ca govindaṃ kaṇṭhakūpake
viṣṇuṃ ca dakṣiṇe kukṣau bāhau ca madhusūdanam
trivikramaṃ kandhare tu vāmanaṃ vāmapārśvake
śrīdharaṃ bāhuke vāme hṛṣīkeśaṃ tu kandhare
pṛṣṭhe vai padmanābhaṃ ca kaṭyāṃ dāmodaraṃ nyaset
lalāṭe bhujayugme tu pṛṣṭhayoḥ kaṇṭhakūpake
dhārayed ūrdhvapuṇḍraṃ tu caturaṅgulamātrataḥ
kukṣau tatpārśvayoḥ proktam āyataṃ tu daśāṅgulam
bāhvor vakṣaḥsthale puṇḍraṃ maṣṭāṅgulam udāhṛtam
evaṃ dvādaśapuṇḍrāṇi brāhmaṇaḥ satataṃ dharet
tattatpuṇḍrāṇi tanmūrtīr dhyātvā mantreṇa dhārayet
antarāleṣu sarveṣu haridrāṃ dhārayec chriyām
catvāri bhūbhṛtām āhuḥ puṇḍrāṇi dve viśāṃ smṛte
ekapuṇḍraṃ tu nārīṇāṃ śūdrāṇāṃ ca vidhīyate
lalāṭe hṛdi bāhvoś ca catuḥpuṇḍrāṇi dhārayet
lalāṭe hṛdaye dve tu phāle tv ekaṃ vidhīyate
ūrdhvapuṇḍraṃ lalāṭe tu sarveṣāṃ prathamaṃ smṛtam
lalāṭādikrameṇaiva dhāraṇaṃ tu vidhīyate
mūrtīs tu vāsudevādyāś catuḥpuṇḍreṣu dhārayet
dvayor govindakṛṣṇau tu ekaṃ nārāyaṇaṃ dharet
evaṃ puṇḍravidhiḥ proktaḥ sarveṣāṃ girije mayā
aśvatthapatrasaṅkāśo veṇupatrākṛtis tathā
padmakuḍmalasaṅkāśo mohanaṃ tritayaṃ smṛtam
mahābhāgavataḥ śuddhaḥ puṇḍraṃ haripadākṛtim
daṇḍākāraṃ tu vā devi dhārayed ūrdhvapuṇḍrakam
sudarśanenāṅkitabāhumūlās
tathordhvapuṇḍrāṅkitasarvagātrāḥ
mālāravindākṣadharā viśuddhā
iti śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe paṣcapaṣcāśatsāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyām
uttarakhaṇḍe umāmaheśvarasaṃvāde ūrdhvapuṇḍraṃ māhātmyaṃ nāma paṣcaviṃśatyadhikadviśatatamo'dhyāyaḥ
ṣaḍviṃśatyadhikadviśatatamo'dhyāyaḥ
śaṅkara uvāca
avaiṣṇavopadiṣṭena mantreṇa na parā gatiḥ
avaiṣṇavopadiṣṭaṃ cet pūrvamantravaraṃ dvayam
punaś ca vidhinā samyak vaiṣṇavād grāhayed guroḥ
sahasraśākhādhyāyī vā sarvayajṣeṣu dīkṣitaḥ
kule mahati jāto'pi na guruḥ syād avaiṣṇavaḥ
ācāryaṃ saṃśrayitvātha vatsaraṃ sevayed dvijaḥ
kṛtvā tāpādisaṃskārān paścān mantram udīrayet
tāpaṃ puṇḍraṃ tathā nāma kṛtvā vai vidhinā guruḥ
paścād adhyāpayen mantraṃ śiṣyaṃ nirmalacetasam
puṇḍram ūrdhvaṃ tathā proktaṃ nāma vaiṣṇavam ucyate
nyāsam aṣṭākṣaraṃ mantram anyaṃ vā vaiṣṇavaṃ manum
nyāsam evātra paramaṃ vaiṣṇavānāṃ śubhānane
nyāsavidyāparo yas tu brāhmaṇaḥ śreṣṭha ucyate
nyāsāt parataraṃ nāsti mantraṃ satyaṃ bravīmi te
nyāsaṃ dvayaṃ prapattiḥ syāt paryāyeṇa nibodha me
śrīmadaṣṭākṣaraṃ samyag abhyased dvijasattamaḥ
mantram aṣṭākṣaraṃ proktaṃ praṇavasyaiva saṅgrahāt
pūrvaṃ tu sarvamantrāṇāṃ yojayet praṇavaṃ śubham
oṅkāraḥ praṇavaṃ brahma sarvamantreṣu nāyakaḥ
ādau sarvatra yuṣjīta mantrāṇāṃ tu śubhānane
om ity ekākṣaraṃ pūrvaṃ dvyakṣaraṃ nama ity atha
tato nārāyaṇāyeti paṣcārṇāni yathā kramam
evam aṣṭākṣaro mantro jṣeyaḥ sarvārthasādhakaḥ
sarvaduḥkhaharaḥ śrīmān sarvamantrātmakaḥ śubhaḥ
ṛṣir nārāyaṇas tasya devatā śrīśa eva ca
nityānapāyinī devī śaktiḥ śrīr ucyate manoḥ
tṛtīyaṃ nārāyaṇāyeti padatrayam udāhṛtam
akāraś cāpy ukāraś ca makāraś ca tataḥ param
vedatrayātmakaṃ proktaṃ praṇavaṃ brahmaṇaḥ padam
akāreṇocyate viṣṇuḥ śrīr ukāreṇa cocyate
makāras tv anayor dāsaḥ paṣcaviṃśaḥ prakīrtitaḥ
vāsudevasvarūpaṃ tadakāreṇocyataibudhaiḥ
ukāreṇaśriyodevyārūpaṃ munibhir ucyate
makāreṇocyate jīvaḥ paṣcaviṃ śoditaḥ pumān
bhūtāni ca kavargeṇa cavargeṇendriyāṇi ca
ṭavargeṇa tavargeṇa jñānaṃ dhādayas tathā
manaḥ pakāreṇaivoktaṃ phakāreṇa tv ahaṅkṛtiḥ
bakāreṇa bhakāreṇa mahān prakṛtir ucyate
ātmā tu sa makāraḥ syāt paṣcaviṃśaḥ prakīrtitaḥ
avadhāraṇavācy evam ukāraḥ kaiścid ucyate
śrīś ca tatpakṣapātitvād akāreṇaiva cocyate
ākāreṇocyate viṣṇuḥ kalyāṇaguṇasāgaraḥ
śrīśaḥ sarvātmanāṃ śeṣo jagadbījaṃ paraḥ pumān
jagatkartā jagadbhartā īśvaro lokabāndhavaḥ
jagatām īśvarī nityā viṣṇor anapagāminī
mātā sarvasya jagataḥ patnīviṣṇor manoramā
jagadādhārabhūtā śrīr ukāreṇātra cocyate
makāreṇa tayor dāsaḥ kṣetrajṣaḥ procyate budhaiḥ
jṣānāśramo jñānaguṇaś cetanaḥ prakṛteḥ paraḥ
na jaḍo nirvikāraś ca ekarūpasvarūpabhāk
aṇur nityo vyāptiśīlaś cidānandātmakas tathā
aham artho'vyayaḥ kṣetrī bhinnarūpaṃ sanātanaḥ
evam ādiguṇopetaḥ śeṣabhūtaḥ parasya vai
makāreṇocyate jīvaḥ kṣetrajṣaḥ paravān sadā
vivṛtiḥ praṇavasyārthamantraśeṣeṇa vai śubhe
ahaṅkṛtir makāraḥ syān nakāras tanniṣedhakaḥ
namasā sarvasiddhiḥ syād anyathā nāśam āpnuyāt
ahaṅkāravimūḍhātmā andhe tamasi majjati
paramātmāhariḥ svāmīsvamahaṃ tasya sarvadā
athanārāyaṇapadaṃ vakṣyāmigirajeśubhe
nārāityātmanāṃ saṅghāsteṣāṃ gatirasaupumān
taevacāyanaṃ tasya tasmānnārāyaṇaḥ smṛtaḥ
yo’sau vyāpyasthito nityaṃ savainārāyaṇaḥ smṛtaḥ
nārāścetisarvapuṃ sāṃ samūhāḥ parikīrtitāḥ
gatirālaṃ banaṃ teṣāntasmānnārayaṇaḥ smṛtaḥ
narājjātānitatvāninārāṇītividurbudhāḥ
tānyevacāyanaṃ tasya tenanārāyaṇaḥ smṛtaḥ
punaḥ saṃ sṛjyateyenasavainārāyaṇaḥ smṛtaḥ
carācaraṃ jagatkṛtsnaṃ nāraity abhi dhīyate
tasya vāsaṅgatiryenatenanārāyaṇaḥ smṛtaḥ
nāronarāṇāṃ saṅghātastasyāsāvayanaṃ gatiḥ
tenāsaumunibhirnityaṃ nārāyaṇaitīritaḥ
punaryasmātpralīyantetasmānnārāyaṇaḥ smṛtaḥ
īśaḥ sarvasyajagataḥ savainārāyaṇaḥ smṛtaḥ
nārāyaṇaḥ paraṃ brahmatatvaṃ nārāyaṇaḥ param
yaccakiṃ cijjagat yasmin dṛśyateśrūyate'pivā
antar baṃ hiścatatsarvaṃ vyāpya nārāyaṇaḥ sthitaḥ
apahatapāpmāpuruṣaḥ sarvabhūtāntarasthitaḥ
divyaekaḥ sadānityoharirnārāyaṇo'cyutaḥ
yastudraṣṭācadraṣṭavyaṃ śrotāśrotavyam eva ca
sapraṣṭācasparśitavyaścadhyātādhyātavyam eva ca
vaktācavācyaṃ jṣātācajṣātavyaṃ cidacijjagat
taccasarvaṃ hariḥ śrīśonārāyaṇaudāhṛtaḥ
sahasraśīrṣāpuruṣaḥ sahasrākṣaḥ sahasrapāt
salokānsarvatovyāpyaatyatiṣṭhaddaśāṅgulam
yadbhūtaṃ yaccabhavyaṃ tatsarvaṃ nārāyaṇohariḥ
utāmṛtatvasyeśānoyadannenavirāṭpumān
hiraṇmayo'thabhagavānso'mṛtaḥ śāśvataḥ śivaḥ
hiraṇyagarbhāḥ savitāananto 'saumaheśvaraḥ
īśvarobhagavānviṣṇuḥ paramātmājagatsuhṛt
śāstācarācarasyaikoyatīnāṃ paramāgatiḥ
yovedādausvaraḥ proktovedāṃ tecapratiṣṭhitaḥ
tasya prakṛtilīnasyayaḥ paraḥ samaheśvaraḥ
yosāvakārovaiviṣṇuryo’sau nārāyaṇohariḥ
sa eva puruṣonityaḥ paramātmāmaheśvaraḥ
nirupādhīśvaratvaṃ hivāsuṃ devepratiṣṭhitam
ātmeśvaraiti proktovedavādaiḥ sanātanaiḥ
asautripādvibhūtestulīlayāapiceśvaraḥ
śrībhūnīlāpatiryosāvīśvaraḥ saudāhṛtaḥ
asauyajṣeśvaroyajṣoyajṣabhukyajṣakṛdvibhuḥ
yajṣabhugyajṣapuruṣaḥ sa eva parameśvaraḥ
tatsaṃ nidhānādapayānti sadyorakṣāṃ syaśeṣāṇyasurāścasarve
yo’sau virāṭtvamāpannoharirbhūtojanārdanaḥ
yenapūrṇenahaviṣādevāyajṣamatanvata
tasmādyajṣātsamutpannāyekecobhayādataḥ
tasmādyajṣātsarvahutaṛcaḥ sāmānijajṣire
tasmādaśvāajāyaṃ tagāvaścapuruṣādayaḥ
mukhabāhūrupādāḥ syus tasya varṇā yathā kramam
padbhyāṃ tu pṛthivī tasya śirasādyaurajāyata
manasaścandramājātaścakṣuṣaścaprabhākaraḥ
mukhādagniḥ sahasrākṣovāyuḥ prāṇātsadāgatiḥ
yasmātsarvaṃ samudbhūtaṃ jagadviṣṇoḥ sanātanāt
tasmātsarvamayoviṣṇurnārāyaṇaitīritaḥ
evaṃ sṛṣṭvājagatsarvaṃ punaḥ saṅgrasatehariḥ
nijalīlāsamudbhūtaṃ tāntavaṃ corṇanābhivat
brahmāṇamindraṃ rudraṃ cayamaṃ varuṇam eva ca
asāvekārṇavībhūtemāyāvaṭatalepumān
jagatsvajaṭharekṛtvāśete tasmin sanātanaḥ
āsīdekohibaicātraviṣṇurnārāyaṇo'cyutaḥ
nanakṣatrāṇilokāścanacāṇḍaṃ mahadāvṛtam
yasmājjagadvṛtaṃ tenasakalaṃ hariṇāśubhe
sṛṣṭaṃ punas tathā sargetasmānnārāyaṇaḥ smṛtaḥ
iti śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe paṣcapaṣcāśatsāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyām
uttarakhaṇḍe umāmaheśvarasaṃvāde mantrārthopadeśo nāma
ṣaḍviṃśatyadhikadviśatatamo'dhyāyaḥ
pārvaty uvāca
īśvarasya svarūpaṣ ca tadvibhūtiguṇāṃs tathā
tad viṣṇoḥ paramaṃ dhāma vyūhabhedāṃs tathā hareḥ
īśvara uvāca
śṛṇu devi pravakṣyāmi svarūpaṃ paramātmanaḥ
vibhūtiguṇasaṅghātaṃ tadavasthātmakaṃ hareḥ
yaḥ paraḥ puruṣo viṣṇur nārāyaṇa udāhṛtaḥ
sa īśvaraś ca jagatāṃ paramātmā sanātanaḥ
viśvataḥ pāṇipādaś ca cakṣuṣmān viśvataḥ prabhuḥ
viśvāni bhuvanān yasmin dhāmāni paramāṇi vai
dhārayan so'py atyatiṣṭhen manāṃsi ca manīṣiṇām
evaṃ bahusvarūpaḥ saṣ chrīpatiḥ puruṣottamaḥ
īśvararyā saha bhogārthaṃ divyamaṅgalarūpavān
bṛhaccharīro'gnisamānarūpo
reme śriyāsau jagatāṃ jananyā
svajyotsnayā candra ivāmṛtāṃśuḥ
ayaṃ ca jagadīśvaryyā kumāro nityayauvanaḥ
bhogena krīḍayā viṣṇor vibhūtidvayasaṃsthitiḥ
tripādvyāptiḥ pare dhāmni pādo’syehābhavat punaḥ
tripādvibhūtir nityā syād anityaṃ pādam aiśvaram
nityaṃ tadrūpam īśasya pare dhāmni sthitaṃ śubham
acyutaṃ śāśvataṃ divyaṃ sadā yauvanam āśritam
nityaṃ sambhogam īśvaryā śriyā bhūmyā ca saṃvṛtam
nityaiveṣā jaganmātā viṣṇoḥ śrīr anapāyinī
yathā sarvagato viṣṇus tathā lakṣmīḥ śubhānane
īśānā sarvajagato viṣṇupatnī sadā śivā
sarvataḥ pāṇipādāntā sarvato'kṣiśiromukhī
nārāyaṇī jaganmātā samastajagadāśrayā
yadapāṅgāśritaṃ sarvaṃ jagatsthāvarajaṅgamam
sarvasyādyā mahālakṣmīs triguṇā parameśvarī
lakṣyālakṣyasvarūpā sā vyāpya kṛtsnaṃ vyavasthitā
śūnyaṃ tad akhilaṃ viśvaṃ vilokyaparameśvarī
śūnyaṃ tad akhilaṃ svena pūrayāmāsa tejasā
sā lakṣmīr dharaṇī caiva nīlā devīti viśrutā
ādhārabhūtā jagataḥ pṛthivīrūpam āśritā
lakṣmīrūpatvam āpannā dhanavāgrūpiṇī hi sā
evaṃ devīsvarūpā sā jagataḥ śrīḥ śrītā harim
samastavidyābhedāḥ syur lakṣmīrūpā varānane
śrīrūpam akhilaṃ sarvaṃ tasyā hi vapur ucyate
saundaryaṃ śīlavṛttaṃ ca saubhāgyaṃ strīṣu saṃsthitam
tasyā rūpaṃ ca girije sarvāsāṃ mūrdhni yoṣitām
yasyāḥ kaṭākṣāyatamogradṛṣṭyā
lakṣmīḥ śrīḥ kamalā vidyā mātā viṣṇupriyā satī
padmālayā padmahastā padmākṣī lokasundarī
bhutānām īśvarī nityā sahyā sarvagatā śubhā
viṣṇupatnī mahādevī kṣīrodatanayā ramā
anantālokamātā bhūr nīlā sarvasukhapradā
rukmiṇī ca tathā sītā sarvavedavatī śubhā
satī sarasvatī gaurī śāntiḥ svāhā svadhā ratiḥ
nārāyaṇī varārohā viṣṇor nityānapāyinī
etāni puṇyanāmāni prātar utthāya yaḥ paṭhet
hiraṇyavarṇāṃ hariṇīṃ suvarṇarajataḥ srajām
candrāṃ hiraṇmayīṃ lakṣmīṃ viṣṇoranapagāminīm
gandhadbārāṃ durādharṣāṃ nityapuṣṭāṃ karīṣiṇīm
īśvarīṃ sarvabhūtānāṃ tāmihopahvayeśriyam
evaṃ ṛksaṃhitāyāmtustūyamānāmaheśvarī
sarvaiśvaryasukhaṃ prādācchivādīnāṃ divaukasām
asyeśānāhijagatoviṣṇupatnīsanātanī
yadapāṅgāśritaṃ sarvaṃ jagatsthāvarajaṅgamam
yasya vakṣasisādevīprabhāgnāvivatiṣṭhati
savaisarveśvaraḥ sākṣādakṣaraḥ puruṣo'vyayaḥ
savainārāyaṇaḥ śrīmānvātsalyaguṇasāgaraḥ
svāmīsuśīlaḥ subhagaḥ sarvajṣaḥ sarvaśaktimān
nityaṃ sampūrṇakāmaścanaisargikasuhṛtsakhā
kṛpāpīyūṣajaladhiḥ śaraṇaṃ sarvadehinām
svargāpavargasukhado bhaktānāṃ karuṇākaraḥ
śrīmate viṣṇave tasmai dāsyaṃ sarvaṃ karomy aham
deśakālādyavasthāsu sarvāsu kamalāpateḥ
iti svarūpasaṃsiddhaṃ sukhaṃ dāsyam avāpnuyāt
śrīmannārāyaṇaḥ svāmī jagatāṃ prabhur īśvaraḥ
mātāpitāsutobandhurnivāsaḥ śaraṇaṃ gatiḥ
kalyāṇaguṇavānśrīśaḥ sarvakāmaphalapradaḥ
yo’sau nirguṇaity uktaḥ śāstreṣujagadīśvaraḥ
atrāpiprākṛtaṃ rūpamaṇḍasyaivavināśanam
prākṛtānāṃ hirūpāṇāmanityatvaṃ tathocyate
kīḍārthaṃ devadevasyaviṣṇorlīlādhikāriṇaḥ
lokaiścaturbhirdaśabhiḥ sāgarairdvīpasaṃyutaiḥ
paripūrṇamidaṃ ramyamaṇḍaṃ prakṛtisambhavam
daśottaraguṇopetaṃ saptāvaraṇasaṃ vṛtam
kalākāṣṭhādirūpeṇayaḥ kālaṃ parivartate
tāvanti rātrivarṣāṇibrahmaṇo'vyaktajanmanaḥ
aṇḍamaṇḍagatālokādahyaṃ tekālavahninā
sarvātmānas tathā viṣṇoḥ prakṛtauviniveśitāḥ
aṇḍāvaraṇabhūtāniprakṛtaulayamāpnuyuḥ
sāsarvajagadādhārāprakṛtirharisaṃ śritā
krīḍārthaṃ devadevenasṛṣṭāmāyājaganmayī
avidyāprakṛtirmāyāguṇatrayamayīsadā
sargasthitilayānāṃ sāhetubhūtāsanātanī
yoganidrāmahāmāyāprakṛtistriguṇānvitā
avyaktācapradhānaṃ caviṣṇorlīlāvikāriṇaḥ
asaṃ khyaprakṛteḥ sthānaṃ nibiḍadhvāntamavyayam
ūrdhvaṃ tu sīmnivirajāniḥ sīmādhaḥ sanātanī
tayādṛtaṃ jagatsarvaṃ sthūlasūkṣmādyavasthayā
evaṃ sarvāṇibhūtāniprakṛtyantar gatānivai
tataḥ śūnyamidaṃ sarvaṃ prakṛtyantar gataṃ mahat
evaṃ prakṛtirūpāyāvibhūterūpamuttamam
tripādvibhūtirūpaṃ tu śṛṇubhūdharanandini
vedāṃ gasvedajanitatoyaiḥ prasrāvitāśubhā
tasyāḥ pāreparevyomnitripādbhūtiḥ sanātanī
amṛtaṃ śāśvataṃ nityam anantaṃ paramaṃ padam
śuddhaṃ satvamayaṃ divyamakṣaraṃ brahmaṇaḥ padam
evamādiguṇopetaṃ tadviṣṇoḥ paramaṃ padam
natadbhāsayatesūryonaśaśāṃ konapāvakaḥ
tadviṣṇoḥ paramaṃ dhāmaśāśvataṃ nityamacyutam
na hi varṇayituṃ śakyaṃ kalpakoṭiśatair api
hareḥ padaṃ varṇayituṃ na śakyaṃ mayā ca dhātrā ca munīndrasaṅghaiḥ
yadakṣaraṃ vedaguhyaṃ yasmin devāadhiviśveniṣeduḥ
tad viṣṇoḥ paramaṃ dhāma sadā paśyanti sūrayaḥ
akṣaraṃ śāśvataṃ divyaṃ devi cakṣur ivātatam
jṣānena śāstramārgeṇa vīkṣyate yogipuṅgavaiḥ
ahaṃ brahmā ca devāś ca na jānanti maharṣayaḥ
sarvopaniṣadām arthaṃ dṛṣṭvā vakṣyāmi suvrate
viṣṇoḥ pade hi parame pade tatsaśubhāhvayeḥ
yatra gāvobhūri śṛgāāsatesusukhāḥ prajāḥ
atrāha tat paraṃ dhāma gopaveṣasya śārṅgiṇaḥ
ādhāro brahmaṇo lokaḥ śuddhasattvas sanātanaḥ
sāmānyāvibhite bhūmiṃ te'smin śāśvate pade
tasthatur jāgarūke’smin yuvānau śrīsanātanau
yataḥ svasārau yuvatībhūnīle viṣṇuvallabhe
atra pūrve ye ca sādhyā viśvedevāḥ sanātanāḥ
te ha nākaṃ mahimānaḥ sacante śubhadarśanāḥ
tatra vijṣānino viprā jāgṛvāṃsaḥ samindhate
tat padaṃ jṣānino viprā yānti saṃvāsam icchavaḥ
tad viṣṇoḥ paramaṃ dhāma mokṣa ity abhidhīyate
tat prāpya na nivartante tasmān mokṣa udāhṛtaḥ
mokṣaṃ paraṃ padaṃ divyam amṛtaṃ viṣṇumandiram
akṣaraṃ paramaṃ dhāma vaikuṇṭhaṃ śāśvataṃ padam
nityaṃ ca paramaṃ vyoma sarvotkṛṣṭaṃ sanātanam
tasya tripādvibhūtes tu rūpaṃ vakṣyāmi vistarāt
iti śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe paṣcapaṣcāśatsāsryāṃ saṃhitāyām uttarakhaṇḍe
umāmaheśvarasaṃvāde tripādvibhūtikathanaṃ nāma
aṣṭāviṃśatyadhika dviśatatamo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīmahādeva uvāca
tripādvibhūterlokāstuasaṃ khyātāḥ prakīrtitāḥ
śuddhasatvamayāḥ sarvebrahmānandasukhāhvayāḥ
sarvenityānirvikārāheyarāgādivarjitāḥ
sarvehiraṇmayāśśuddhāḥ koṭisūryasamaprabhāḥ
sarvevedamayārdivyāḥ kāma krodhavivarjitāḥ
nārāyaṇapadāmbhojabhaktyekarasasevitāḥ
nirantar aṃ sāmagānaparipūrṇasukhaṃ śritāḥ
sarvevedamayairdivyaiḥ puruṣaiḥ strībhirāvṛtāḥ
vedaikarasatoyāḍhyaiḥ sarobhirupaśobhitāḥ
śrutismṛtipurāṇādirūpasthāvarasaṃyutāḥ
sarvaṃ varṇayituṃ śakyaṃ namayālokavistṛtam
niḥśreyasaṃ canirvāṇaṃ kaivalyaṃ mokṣaucyate
śrīśāṃ ghribhaktisevaikarasabhogavivardhitāḥ tam
mahātmāno mahābhāgābhagavatpādasevakāḥ
nānājanapadākīrṇaṃ vaikuṇṭhaṃ taddhareḥ padam
maṇikāṃ canacitrāḍhyaprākāraistoraṇairvṛtā
caturdvārasamāyuktāratnagopurasaṃ vṛtā
caṇḍādidvārapālaiścakumudādyaiścarakṣitā
caṇḍapracaṇḍau prāgdvāri yāmye bhadrasubhadrakau
vāruṇyāṃ jayavijayau saumye dhātṛvidhātarau
kumudaḥ kumudākṣaś ca puṇḍarīko'thavā manaḥ
śaGkukarṇaḥ sarvanetraḥ sumukhaḥ supratiṣṭhitaḥ
ete dikpatayaḥ proktāḥ puryyām atra śubhānane
koṭivaiśvānaraprakhyagṛhapaṅktibhirāvṛtā
maṇiprākārasaṃ yuktaṃ ratnatoraṇaśobhitam
divyāpsarogaṇaiḥ strībhiḥ sarvataḥ samalaṃ kṛtam
madhyetumaṇḍapaṃ divyaṃ rājasthānaṃ mahocchrayam
māṇikyastaṃ bhasāhasrajuṣṭaṃ ratnamayaṃ śubham
divyairmuktaiḥ samākīrṇaṃ sāmagānopaśobhitam
dharmmajñānamahaiśvaryavairāgyaiḥ pādavigrahaiḥ
ṛgyajuḥ sāmacātharvairūpairnityaṃ vṛtaṃ kramāt
śaktirādhāraśaktiścacicchaktiścasadāśivā
dharmādidevatānāṃ caśaktayaḥ parikīrtitāḥ
kūrmaścanāgarājaścavainateyastrayīśvaraḥ
chaṃ dāsisarvamantrāścapīṭharūpatvamāsthitāḥ
sarvākṣaramayaṃ divyaṃ yogapīṭhamitismṛtam
tanmadhyekarṇikāyāṃ tu sāvitryāṃ śubhadarśane
īśvaryyāsahadeveśastatrāsīnaḥ paraḥ pumān
indīvaradalaśyāmaḥ koṭisūryaprakāśavān
yuvākumāraḥ snigdhaścakomalāvayavairvṛtaḥ
prabuddhaḥ puṇḍarīkākṣaḥ subhrūlatāyugāṅkitaḥ
sunāsaḥ sukapolāḍhyaḥ suśrotramukhapaṅkajaḥ
muktāphalābhadantāḍhyaḥ sasmitādharavidrumaḥ
paripūrṇedusaṃ kāśaḥ susmitānanapaṅkajaḥ
taruṇādityavarṇābhyāṃ kuṇḍalābhyāṃ virājitaḥ
mandārapārijātāḍhyakabarīkṛtakeśavān
hārasvarṇasragāsaktakambugrīvovirājitaḥ
siṃ haskaṃ dhanibhaiḥ proccaiḥ pīnairaṃ sairvirājitaḥ
pīnavṛttāya tabhujaiścaturbhirupaśobhitaḥ
aṅgulīyaiścakaṭakaiḥ keyūraiḥ parimaṇḍitaḥ
bālārkakoṭisaṃ kāśaiḥ kaustubhādyaiḥ subhūṣaṇaiḥ
virājitamahāvakṣovanamālāvibhūṣitaḥ
vidhātṛjananasthānanābhipaṅkajaśobhitaḥ
bālātapanibhaślakṣṇapītavastrasamanvitaḥ
nānāratnavicitrāṃ ghriḥ kaṭakābhyāṃ virājitaḥ
divyacandanaliptāṃ godivya mālāvibhūṣitaḥ
gṛhītaśaṅkhacakrābhyāmudvāhubhyāṃ virājitaḥ
vāmāṅkesaṃsthitādevīmahālakṣmīrmaheśvarī
hiraṇyavarṇāhariṇīsuvarṇarajatasrajā
sarvalakṣaṇasampannāyauvanāraṃ bhavigrahā
ratnakuṇḍalasaṃ yuktānīlācitaśīrṣajā
divyacandanaliptāṃ gīdivyapuṣpopaśobhitā
maṃ dāraketakījātīpuṣpāṣcitasukuṃ talā
subhrūḥ sunāsāsuśroṇīpīnonnatapayodharā
paripūṃ rṇeṃ dusaṃ kāśāsusmitānanapaṅkajā
taruṇādityavarṇābhyāṃ kuṇḍalābhyāṃ virājitā
taptakāṃ canavarṇābhātaptakāṃ canabhūṣaṇā
hastaiścaturbhiḥ saṃ yuktākanakāṃ bujabhūṣitā
nānāvicitraratnāḍhyākanakāṃ bujamālayā
hārakeyūrakaṭakairaṅgulīyaiścaśobhitā
gṛhītamātuluṃ gākhyajāṃ būnadakarāṣcitā
evaṃ nityānapāyinyāmahālakṣmyāmaheśvaraḥ
pārśvayordharaṇīnīlesamāsīneśubhāsane
aṣṭadikṣudalāgreṣuvimalādyāścaśaktayaḥ
vimalotkarṣiṇījṣānākriyāyogā tathaiva ca
prahvīsatyātatheśānāśaktayaḥ paramātmanaḥ
gṛhītvācāmarāndivyānsudhākarasamaprabhān
divyāpsarogaṇāḥ paṣcaśatasaṃ khyāścayoṣitaḥ
antaḥ puranivāsinyaḥ sarvābharaṇabhūṣitāḥ
padmahastāścatāḥ sarvāḥ koṭivaiśvānaraprabhāḥ
sarvalakṣaṇasampannāḥ śītāṃ śusadṛśānanāḥ
tābhiḥ parivṛtorājāśuśubheparamaḥ pumān
anantavihagādhīśasenānyādyais sureśvare
tadvyūhabhedāṃ ṃ llokāṃś cavakṣyāmigirijeśubhe
āgneyyāṃ lakṣmyālokastuyāmyāṃ saṅkarṣaṇālayaḥ
sārasvatastunairṛtyāprādyumnaḥ paścime tathā
ratilokastuvāyavyāmudīcyāmaniruddhabhūḥ
śānyāṃ śāntilokaḥ syātprathamāvaraṇaṃ smṛtam
keśavādicaturviṃśatyamīlokāstataḥ kramāt
dvitīyāvaraṇaṃ proktaṃ vaikuṇṭhasyaśubhāhvayam
matsyakūrmādilokāstutṛtīyāvaraṇaṃ śubham
satyācyutānantadurgāviṣvaksenagajānanāḥ
śaṅkhapadmanidhī lokāś caturthāvaraṇaṃ śubham
ṛgyajuḥsāmātharvāṇo lokādikṣu mahatsu ca
paṣcamāvaraṇaṃ proktam akṣayaṃ sarvavāṅ mayam
śaṅkhacakragadāpadmakhaḍgaśārṅgahalaṃ tathā
mauśalaṃ ca tathā lokāḥ sarvaśastrāstrasaṃyutāḥ
ṣaṣṭhamāvaraṇaṃ proktaṃ mantrāstramayamakṣaram
aindrapāvakayāmyāni nairṛtaṃ vāruṇaṃ tathā
vāyavyaṃ saumyam aiśānaṃ saptamaṃ munibhiḥ smṛtam
sādhyā marudgaṇāś caiva viśvedevās tathaiva ca
te vai prākṛtaloke’sminn anityās tridaśeśvarāḥ
te ha nākaṃ mahimānaḥ sacanta iti vai śrutiḥ
divyābhirmahiṣībhiścarājatevibhurīśvaraḥ
natadbhāsayatesūryonaśaṃ śāṃ konapāvakaḥ
yadgatvānanivartaṃ teyoginaḥ saṃ śitavratāḥ
tadgamyaṃ śāśvataṃ sthānaṃ prapattyāvaisanātanam
pārvaty uvāca
sādhūktaṃ paramaṃ svargasvarūpaṃ bhavatāprabho
tripādvibhūtaubhagavānīśvaryyāparameśvaraḥ
tamīśvaraṃ mahāmāyāprakṛtirjagadāśrayā
kṛtāṃ jalipuṭābhūtvātuṣṭāvaparameśvaram
mahāmāyovāca
śrībhūlīlādhipataye namo nārāyaṇāya ca
namo bhagavate tubhyaṃ vāsudevāya śārṅgiṇe
sarvadevasvarūpāya viṣṇave jiṣṇave namaḥ
acyutāyāvikārāya śuddhasattvasvarūpiṇe
namo hiraṇyagarbhāya jṣānāya paramātmane
sarvabhūtātmane tubhyaṃ sarvabhūtāśrayāya ca
brahmaṇe jyotiṣe tubhyaṃ namas te viśvarūpiṇe
namaḥ śuciṣade tubhyaṃ haṃsāya paramāya ca
saṅkarṣaṇāya rudrāya sarvabhūtadharāya ca
hayagrīvāya dīptāya kālāya haraye namaḥ
brahmaṇeviṣṇavetubhyaṃ namas te śaṃ kārāyaca
avyaktāya namas tasmaiviṣṇavelokasākṣiṇe
nārāyaṇāyaśrīśāyapūrṇaṣāḍguṇyamūrttaye
anantaguṇapūrṇāya namaḥ sarvārthadāyine
namas te vāsudevāyapaṣcāvasthasvarūpiṇe
namaḥ paṣcanavavyūhabhedarūpāya te namaḥ
avikārāyaśuddhāyaheyapratibhaṭāyaca
namorāmāyakṛṣṇāyanarasiṃ hāya te namaḥ
keśavāya namas tubhyaṃ jagatāṃ kleśahāriṇe
tvamevasarvalokanāmāśrayaḥ puruṣottamaḥ
matsaṃsthāścetanāḥ sarvenirādhārānirāśrayāḥ
hīnadehānirākārāḥ sarvendriyavivarjitāḥ
sarvānuṣṭhānarahitāḥ satataṃ duḥkhabhoginaḥ
teṣāṃ lokāṃś cadehāṃś cadātumarhasikeśava
līlāvibhūtiṃ sarvajṣa yathā pūrvaṃ prakalpaya
mayāsaṃ mohitaṃ paśyalīlārthaṃ parameśvara
prākṛtāṇḍaṃ mayāsārdhaṃ sṛjasvapuruṣottama
māmadhiṣṭhāyalīlāṃ vaikartumarhasimāciram
śrīmahādeva uvāca
evamuktastayādevyāmāyayāparameśvaraḥ
tasyāṃ niveśyamāyāyāṃ jagatsraṣṭuṃ pracakrame
sa eva bhagavānviṣṇuḥ prakṛtyāṃ praviveśaha
asṛjatprakṛtaubrahmabhūtādimahadāśrayam
mahataḥ puruṣādasmādahaṃ kāro'bhyajāyata
ahaṃ kārāttuvaitasmādguṇatrayamajāyata
tribhyoguṇebhyastanmātrāmasṛjadviśvabhāvanaḥ
tanmātrebhyo'bhyajāyaṃ tamahābhūtānitatkṣaṇāt
oṃ kāraḥ prathamaṃ jātobrahmaṇastriguṇātmanaḥ
ākāśādabhavadvāyurvāyoragnirajāyata
agnerāpaḥ samudbhūtāadbhyaścapṛthivīmatā
ākāśādīnibhūtānisṛṣṭānyekottarāṇivai
śabdasparśaścarūpaṣcarasogandhaścatadguṇāḥ
ekottaraguṇānsṛṣṭvātānādāyamahāprabhuḥ
teṣāṃ vimiśraṇaṃ kṛtvājagadaṇḍaṃ mahattaram
brahmāditridaśāṃ tasmin nasṛjatpuruṣottamaḥ
tathā sṛṣṭo mahāsargantenavaijalajekṣaṇe
tatra karmānurūpeṇatridaśādiṣuyoniṣu
saṃsthitāḥ prakṛtaupūrvaātmanaḥ prabhavanti hi
iti śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe
paṣcapaṣcāśatsāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyām uttarakhaṇḍe
paramavyomādivarṇanaṃ nāma
aṣṭāviṃśatyadhikadviśatatamo'dhyāyaḥ cha
pārvaty uvāca
brahmāditridivaśreṣṭhāḥ kathaṃ jātāḥ sanātanāḥ
īśvarasyāvatārāṃś cavistareṇatadasvame
ākāśānilatejoṃ bubhuvaḥ sṛṣṭā yathā kramam
tāsāṃ madhye'sṛjadbrahmāagādhajalamarṇavam
asminnekārṇavībhūtejalamāyāvaṭacchade
ādāyasarvabhūtāniyoganidrāṃ yayauhariḥ
tayāremeciraṃ kālaṃ māyayā madhusūdanaḥ
tasyāṃ tu janayāmāsakālātmānamanuttamam
kalākāṣṭhādibhūtāyepakṣamāsādirūpiṇaḥ
tasmin kāleharernnābhipaṅkajaṃ mukulākṛti
tuṣṭāvayoganidrāyāṃ śayānaṃ parameśvaram
jagadbhūṣaṇabhūṣāyaśrīmateviśvarūpiṇe
jagaddhitāyakṛṣṇāyagovindāya namo namaḥ
pradhānakālarūpāyapuruṣāyeśvarāyaca
namaḥ prapaṣcarūpāyaniṣprapaṣcasvarūpiṇe
nārāyaṇāyaviśvāyaviśveśāya namo namaḥ
śrībhūlīlādhipatayebrahmaṇeparamātmane
namostuvāsudevāyaviśvarūpāyaśārṅgiṇe
trayīnāthāyaharayeviśvanāthasvarūpiṇe
anantakalyāṇaguṇaparipūrṇāya te namaḥ
vṛtaṃ sarvaṃ jagannāthaprapaṣcesacarācaram
tvamevakāraṇaṃ karttākāryaṃ catriguṇodbhavam
sraṣṭādhyātāvidhātācatvamevaparameśvaraḥ
devatvayi sthitālokāḥ samādhiṣṭhāḥ sanātanāḥ
śiva uvāca
evamuktohṛṣīkeśobrahmaṇāparameśvaraḥ
niyamyayoganidrāṃ tāṃ jagatsraṣṭuṃ pracakrame
lokānsarvāṃs tadāhyapsugatamaṇḍaṃ hiraṇmayam
saptadvīpānsamudrāṃ tānmedinībhūdharairyutān
sahaikāṇḍakaṭāhenanābhipadme'sṛjatprabhuḥ
tadaṇḍamadhyecāsthānamīśvaraḥ kṛtavānhariḥ
athanārāyaṇaṃ kastudadhyāvadhyātmacetasā
dhyānāṃ te tasya bhālāttusvedabiṃ durajāyata
sabiṃ durbudbudākāraḥ pṛthivyāmapatatkṣaṇāt
tryakṣastriśūlahasto'haṃ jaṭāmukuṭamaṇḍitaḥ
kiṃ karomītideveśamavocaṃ vinayānvitaḥ
tatonārāyaṇodevomāmityāhamudānvitaḥ
karttāsijagatorudrasaṃ hāraṃ bhīmadarśanam
sākṣātsaṅkarṣaṇāṃ śenasaṃ hārārthevarānane
tasmānnārāyaṇāddeviutpannosmibhayaṃ karaḥ
niyojyamāṃ tu saṃ hārepunarevajanārdanaḥ
netrābhyāmasṛjaccandrasūryaudhvāṃ tāpahāriṇau
vāyuṃ diśaścaśrotrābhyāmindrāgnīmukhato'sṛjat
nāsābhyāṃ varuṇaṃ mitramasṛjatpaṅkajekṣaṇaḥ
bāhubhyāmakhilāndevānsasādhyānsamarudgaṇān
tvaciśailānsamudrāṃś cagavādyāḥ paśavas tathā
mukhatobrāhmaṇaḥ sṛṣṭobāhubhyāṃ kṣatriyas tathā
ūrvvorvaiśyastataḥ padbhyāṃ śūdraś caiva majāyata
viśvarūpeṇadeveśoyasyāntaramadhiṣṭhitaḥ
tasmātsarvajagatprāṇoviṣṇurevasanātanaḥ
saevāvyaktarūpaḥ sanparamātmāvyavasthitaḥ
ṣāḍguṇyaparipūrṇo'sauvāsudevaḥ sanātanaḥ
triguṇādātmanorūpaṣcaturddhākurutejagat
vidheḥ prajāpatīnāṃ cakālasya cajanasyaca
pradyumnasyāṃśabhāgo'saubrahmālokapitāmahaḥ
manūnāṃ pārthivānāṃ cakālasyacajanasyaca
saṅkarṣaṇo mahāviṣṇurvidyābalasamanvitaḥ
matsyaḥ kūrmo varāhaś ca narasiṃho'tha vāmanaḥ
rāmo rāmaś ca kṛṣṇaś ca buddhaḥ kalkī ca te daśa
etetuvibhavāvasthābrahmaṇaḥ paramātmanaḥ
nṛsiṃ hārāmakṛṣṇeṣuṣāḍguṇyaṃ parikīrtitam
sāhyavasthāharerasyaśṛṇuṣvagirijeśubhe
vaikuṇṭhaṃ paramaṃ lokaṃ viṣṇulokamanuttamam
śvetadīpaṃ svarūpaṃ tu kṣīrasāgaramuttamam
jalāvaraṇamadhyetuvaikuṇṭhaṃ kāraṇaṃ śubham
nānāmaṇimayaṃ divyaṃ vimānakoṭibhiryyutam
yaduktaṃ paramaṃ dhāmatādṛklakṣaṇasaṃsthitam
caturdvārasamāyuktaṃ hemaprākāratoraṇam
caṇḍādidvārapālādyaiḥ kumudādyaiścarakṣitam
nānāmaṇimayairdivyairgṛhaiḥ paṅktibhirāvṛtam
sahasrayojanottuṃ gaiḥ prāsādaiḥ koṭibhirvṛtam
ārūḍhayauvanairddivyaiḥ puṃ bhistrībhiścaśobhitam
striyaścapuruṣāścāsminsarvalakṣaṇaśobhitāḥ
samarūpāścaśrīviṣṇoḥ sarvālaṅkārabhūṣitāḥ
mantrāṣṭākṣarasaṃsiddhā bhaktyā ṣoḍaśarūpayā
gatvāsmin na nivartante viṣṇunā saha saṃsthitāḥ
avicchinnātmanātevaiviṣṇunāsaṅgatāḥ śubhāḥ
tatsamānasukhaṃ nityaṃ prāpnuvanti manīṣiṇaḥ
yathā saumitribharatau yathā saṅkarṣaṇādayaḥ
viṣṇor anucaratvaṃ hi mokṣayāhur manīṣiṇaḥ
sarvabandhananirmuktā haridāsā nirāmayāḥ
ābrahmabhuvanāṃ ṃ lokāḥ punarāvṛttilakṣaṇāḥ
bahvāyāsaphalādevijanināśakahetavaḥ
sukhabhogastuyannṝṇāṃ viṣamiśrāśanaṃ yathā
svargasaṃsthānnarāndṛṣṭvākṣīṇekarmmaṇidevatāḥ
kupitāḥ pātayantyevasaṃ sṛtaukāryabandhane
anityaṃ kuṭiduḥkhamiśraṃ yogīparityajet
satataṃ saṃ smaredviṣṇuṃ sarvaduḥkhaughanāśanam
nāmoccāraṇamātreṇaprāpnuvanti paraṃ padam
tasmāttuvaiṣṇavaṃ lokaṃ gaurisamprārthayetsudhīḥ
sasarvajñānaguṇavānarakṣatyevana saṃśayaḥ
tasmād aṣṭākṣaraṃ mantraṃ japtvā sukhataraṃ śubham
samprāpnoti paraṃ lokaṃ vaiṣṇavaṃ sarvakāmadam
vimāne śuśubhe divye saṃsthito bhagavān hariḥ
tatra cādhāraśaktyādi dhṛte pīṭhe hiraṇmaye
karṇikāyāṃ suramyāyāṃ lakṣmībījaśubhākṣare
divyenārāyaṇaḥ śrīmānāsīnaḥ paṅkajāsane
tasya dakṣiṇakepārśvejaganmātāhiraṇmayī
gṛhītvācāmarāndivyān divyamālyavibhūṣaṇā
vasupātraṃ mātuluṃ gaṃ svarṇapadmaṃ dhṛtaṃ karaiḥ
vāmataḥ pṛthivīdevīnīlotpaladaladyutiḥ
nānābharaṇasaṃ yuktāvicitrāṃ barabhūṣitā
itarābhyāṃ dhṛtaṃ devyādhānyapātrayugaṃ tathā
gṛhītvācāmarāndivyānśaktayovimalādikāḥ
dalāgreṣusamāsīnāḥ sarvalakṣaṇaśobhitāḥ
tāsāṃ madhyesamāsīnobhagavānacyutohariḥ
śaṅkhacakragadāpadmapāṇibhirdivyabhūṣaṇaiḥ
keyūrāṃ gadahārādyairbhūṣaṇairūpaśobhitaḥ
prātarudyatsahasrāṃ śukuṇḍalābhyāṃ virājitaḥ
śrīmadaṣṭākṣaraṃ mantraṃ siddhānāṃ vai manīṣiṇām
gamyaṃ tad vaiṣṇavaṃ lokaṃ netareṣāṃ kathaṣcana
ity evaṃ prathamaṃ vyūhaṃ kathitaṃ te varānane
dvitīyaṃ vaiṣṇavaṃ lokaṃ śṛṇuvakṣyāmisuvrate
yo'yaṃ nityaitikhyātolokāgryovaiṣṇavaḥ smṛtaḥ
taṃ lokaṃ vipulaṃ puṇyaṃ śuddhaṃ satvamayaṃ śubham
madhyāhnasūryasāhasrayugapadbhāsitaṃ tadā
mamabrahmādidevānāṃ nadraṣṭumapiśakyate
sarvaṃ kalpadrumavanaiḥ paripūrṇaṃ samaṃ tataḥ
nirantar aṃ sāmabhiścakūjitaiḥ kokilādibhiḥ
ūhyamānairgandharvṛkṣaiḥ puṣpakairapiśobhitam
ūnaṣoḍaśavarṣābdairdivyanārīnarairvṛtam
sarvalakṣaṇaśobhāḍhyairdivyakalpavibhūṣaṇaiḥ
gāyanti paramānandaṃ kṛṣṇasyacaritaṃ mahat
padmekṣaṇāḥ padmahastāḥ padmayāsadṛśaḥ śubhāḥ
divyasragvasanopetāḥ krīḍanti smasuyoṣitaḥ
śaṅkhacakragadāpadmadharābhūṣaṇabhūṣitāḥ
sragviṇaḥ pītavasanāḥ puruṣās tatra saṃsthitāḥ
ananyasparśanāt tatra strīpuṃ soḥ krīḍamānayoḥ
nānāpuṣpavimānādyaiḥ sarvataḥ samalaṃ kṛtam
tanmadhyekalpavṛkṣasya cchāyāyāṃ kamalāsane
vicitraślakṣṇaparyaṃ keśubhāstaraṇasaṃ vṛte
divyagandhasuśobhāḍhyairnānāpuṣpaparicchadaiḥ
īśvaryyāsahadeveśovāsudevaḥ sanātanaḥ
sudhāṃ śukoṭisaṃ kāśodivyābharaṇabhūṣitaḥ
suvarṇaśubhrayugalaślakṣṇanāsāṃ citānanaḥ
snigdhāyatasulāvaṇyakapolābhyāṃ virājitaḥ
nīlakuṃ citakeśāḍhyoraktābjadalalocanaḥ
maṃ dāraketakījātīkairavīkṛtaśekharaḥ
snigdhabimbaphalābhauṣṭhaḥ susmitānanapaṅkajaḥ
anarghyamauktikābhāsadaṃ tāvalivirājitaḥ
haricandanaliptāṃ gaḥ kastūrītilakāṃ kitaḥ
japākusumasaṃ kāśakarapallavaśobhitaḥ
śrīvatsakaustubhābhyāṃ caśobhitaḥ pṛthuvakṣasā
muktāmayaiḥ suśobhāḍhyairdivyasragbhiralaṃ kṛtaḥ
bālārkasadṛśajyotsnāpītavastreṇaveṣṭitaḥ
raktotpalanibhaślakṣṇaśubhrāṃ ghrikarapaṅkajaḥ
pāṃ cajanyarathāṃ gābhyāṃ bāhuyugmavirājitaḥ
itarābhyāṃ śriyogātramāśliṣyannijavakṣasi
śliṣyadvidyullatodgīthaśitābhraivarājate
saptajāṃ būnadaślakṣṇaśubhāṃ ghriyugapaṃ jakaḥ
atrakrīḍatideveśovāsudevaḥ sanātanaḥ
taptakāṃ canasaṃ kāśāsarvābharaṇabhūṣitā
maṃ dārapārijātādidivyapuṣpavirājitā
karṇāvataṃ saśobhāḍhyācikurāṃ tālisannibhā
pīnonnatastanābhyāṃ capīḍanti harivakṣasi
keyūrāṃ gadahārādyairbhūṣaṇairupaśobhitā
ārūḍhayauvanānityaṃ sarvalokeśasundarī
krīḍatesarvalokesminsarvakāmapradonṛṇām
atrāṣṭaśaktayolakṣmyāstanavaḥ paritaḥ sthitāḥ
ramā ca rukmiṇī sītā padmā padmālayā śivā
sulakṣaṇā suśīlā ca ratikāmapradāś ca tāḥ
śaṅkhacakragadāpadmaśārṅgādyairhetibhis tathā
paritaḥ puṣkarākāraistaṃ lokaṃ parirakṣate
evaṃ dvitīyarūpaṃ ca samyak te śubhadarśane
saṃkṣepato mayā proktaṃ na śakyaṃ vistareṇa hi
te prāpnuvanti satataṃ śāśvataṃ śubham akṣayam
na prāpyaṃ vaiṣṇavaṃ lokaṃ vinā dānena kutracit
tasmād dāsyaṃ harer bhaktaṃ bhajetānanyamānasaḥ
tṛtīyaṃ tu paraṃ vyūhaṃ śṛṇu vakṣyāmi pārvati
toyābdher uttaraṃ kūlaṃ śvetadvīpe mahāmate
sandarśanāya yogānāṃ sanakādimahātmanām
sanakaś ca sanandaś ca tṛtīyaś ca sanātanaḥ
sanatkumārajātāś ca voḍhuḥ paṣcaśikhas tathā
viraktāḥ sarvabhogeṣu śuddhāḥ satvaguṇāḥ sadā
naranārāyaṇādyāścaśvetadvīpevasanti ye
teṣāṃ samdarśanārthāya tatra saṃ nihitohariḥ
śubhrāṃ śukoṭisaṃ kāśenānāratnamayojjvale
tatrodyānāniramyāṇipārijātasamānivai
saṃ tānakalatākīrṇaṃ candanadrumamaṇḍitam
tanmadhyenagarīramyānāmnācairāvatīśubhā
divyastrīpuṃ bhirākrāṃ tābahuprāsādasaṃ kulā
bālasūryanibhaistuṃ gaiḥ prāsādairbahubhirvṛtam
tanmadhyemaṇḍapaṃ divyaṃ maṇikāṃ canaśobhitam
candanāgurukarpūrakuṃ kumāmodavāśitam
nānākusumaśobhāḍhyairvitānaiḥ samalaṃ kṛtam
divyāpsaraḥ samākīrṇaṃ sāmagānopaśobhitam
tanmadhyekarṇikāyāṃ tu samāsīnojanārdanaḥ
śuddhajāṃ būnadaprakhyomuktāhāravibhūṣitaḥ
śaṅkhacakragadāpadmaśaktihastacatuṣṭayaḥ
hārakeyūrakaṭakairaṅgulīyaiścaśobhitaḥ
saṃ tānakanibhaiḥ śubhrairnakhapaṅktivirājitaḥ
ṣoḍaśābdavayorūpayauvanenavirājitaḥ
viśālabhāladeśetukuṃ kumenasugandhinā
racitenordhvapuṇḍreṇasīmaṃ tenopaśobhitaḥ
mathitāmṛtaphenābhaśuklavastrasuveṣṭitaḥ
muktāmayābhyāṃ śubhrābhyāṃ kuṇḍalābhyāṃ virājitaḥ
vāmāṃ kesaṃsthitādevī tasya divyasvarūpiṇī
tasya ivasadṛśīlakṣmīḥ śīlasuṣṭuguṇādibhiḥ
padmakiṃ jalkasaṃ kāśāyauvanāraṃ bhaśobhitā
sarvalakṣaṇasampannātaptakāṃ canabhūṣaṇā
caturbhujairvirājantīkeyūrāṅgadabhūṣitā
muktāhārrvirājantīmaṃ dārāṃ citaśīrṣajā
ślakṣṇanāsāpuṭayutālasaddanti varājitā
kastūrītilakopetānāsāgrāṃ cita mauktikā
divyakuṃ kumaliptāṃ gīpadmamālopaśobhitā
vastrapātraṃ mātuliṅgaṃ darpaṇaṃ hemapaṅkajam
karapadmadhṛtādevīcetasābhīṣṭadāyinī
tasya itāḥ sadṛśās tatra śaktayaḥ paritohareḥ
īśāvāsyāmahādevījāhnavīkamalālayā
sāvitrīsarvagāpadmāśaktayaḥ parikīrtitāḥ
śraddhāmedhādhṛtiḥ prajṣādhāraṇāśāntir eva ca
śrutismṛtirdhṛtirmedhāvṛddhirbuddhirmanīṣiṇī
dāsyastetāḥ śriyaḥ proktāḥ sarvakār yasya kārikāḥ
sādhyāmarudgaṇāś caiva sevaṃ tenityadevatāḥ
prāsādeṣuvimāneṣuvaneṣunagareṣuca
tatprasādopalabdheṣubhogeṣvatrānuraṃ jitāḥ
krīḍaṃ tīsatataṃ nityāheyaniṣphalavarjitāḥ
yeviṣṇumantrajaptāraḥ satataṃ śraddhayānvitāḥ
prāptuṃ caśakyaṃ girijeviṣṇulokaṃsanātanam
bhaktyācānanyayāprāptuṃ śakyaṃ viṣṇupadaṃ nṛṇām
kīrtanaṃ nāmamātraṃ cadhyāyanmantraṃ japetsadā
evamuktaṃ tṛtīyaṃ tu vyūhantuparamātmanaḥ
svarūpaṃ tavasuśroṇi yathā proktaṃ purātanaiḥ
divaukasāṃ rakṣaṇārthaṃ dugdhābdhauparameśvaraḥ
sudhāṃ śukoṭiśaṃ kāśaḥ sahasrākṣeṇaśobhite
divyāsanasamāsīnaḥ padmanābho'cyutohariḥ
nīlajīmūtasaṃ kāśaḥ padmapatrāyatekṣaṇaḥ
vivasvatkoṭisaṃ kāśakirīṭenavirājitaḥ
nānāratnojjvaladdivyaṃ kuṇḍalābhyāṃ virājitaḥ
bālārkasadṛśajyotsnāpītavastreṇaveṣṭitaḥ
sphuradraktāraviṃ dābhahastāṃ ghritalaśobhitaḥ
hārakeyūrakaṭakairaṅgulīyairvirājitaḥ
śaṅkhacakragadāśārṅgakhaḍgahastairvibhūṣitaḥ
supuṣpaphalaśākhāḍhyakalpavṛkṣairvirājitaḥ
viśvasyajanmamaraṇanābhipaṅkajaśobhitaḥ
haricandanaliptāṃ gaḥ sarvābharaṇabhūṣitaḥ
maṃ dārapārijātādidivyapuṣpairmanoramaiḥ
susnigdhanīlakuṭilakavarīkṛtakeśavān
ślakṣṇonnatasunāsāṃ sajānuyugmavirājitaḥ
maṇividrumaśākhāḍhyanūpurāṅghrivirājitaḥ
aśokapuṣpasaṃ kāśaraktoṣṭhamukhapaṅkajaḥ
ārūḍhayauvanaḥ śrīmānkomalāvayavojjvalaḥ
śaraṇyaḥ sarvalokānāṃ sarvalokaphalapradaḥ
sadṛśī tasya devīturūpaśīlaguṇādibhiḥ
taptakāṃ canasaṃ kāśātaptakāṃ canabhūṣaṇā
taruṇīrūpalāvaṇyākāntiśīlaguṇānvitā
dugdhābdhiphenasaṃ kāśaśubhavastreṇaveṣṭitā
maṃ dāraketakījātīpuṣpārcitaśiroruhā
kastūrītilakopetāratnasīmaṃ taśobhitā
nānāvarṇasuśobhāḍhyākarṇabhūṣaṇabhūṣitā
pravālasadṛśajyotsnāraktadhārasuvismitā
tanumadhyāviśālākṣīpīnonnatapayodharā
caturhastairvirājantīsarvābharaṇabhūṣitā
udvāhubhyāṃ dhṛtādevīhemapadmayugaṃ śubham
itarābhyāṃ samāśliṣyabhartāraṃ nibiḍaṃ sthitā
ālokayaṃ tīsatataṃ tridaśāṃś cakaṭākṣakai
nirīkṣitāstayādevyādhanyāstesatataṃ śive
tatredevāvimānasthāḥ siddhacāraṇakinnarāḥ
gāyanti satataṃ devīmānaṃ dāśrupariplutāḥ
saṃstūyamānastatreśodevānāmabhayaṃ dadau
devānāmabhayaṃ dattvāsarvadeveśvarohariḥ
rākṣasānhantumārebhejagatsaṃ rakṣaṇāyavai
dhanyāsikṛtakṛtyāsibhaktāsipuruṣottame
iti śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe paṣcapaṣcāśatsāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyām uttarakhaṇḍe viṣṇuvyūhabheda
varṇanaṃ nāmaekonatriṃśadadhikadviśatatamo'dhyāyaḥ
triṃśadadhika dviśatatamo'dhyāyaḥ
pārvaty uvāca
bhagavan yatra deveśorākṣasānmadhusūdanaḥ
vistareṇasamākhyāhimamaprītyāmaheśvara
mahādeva uvāca
śṛṇudevipravakṣyāmivaibhavaṃ svasthamānasā
matsyakūrmādiyadrūpam avatārātmakaṃ hareḥ
dīpādutpādyatedīpo yathā vattadbhaviṣyati
parāvasthāpareśasyasavyūhāvibhavādayaḥ
uktādevāvatārāstuvividhākārakāḥ śubhāḥ
arccāvatārādevasyavaibhavāḥ paramātmanaḥ
bhṛguṃ marīcimatriṃ cadakṣaṃ karddamam eva ca
marīcirbhagavāṃ tatra janayāmāsakaśyapam
kaśyapasyābhavaṣjāyāścacatasraḥ śubhadarśane
aditirjanayāmāsadevāṃs tu śubhadarśanān
ditiścarākṣasānputrāṃs tāmasānsumahāsurān
śambūkas tu hayagrīvo hiraṇyākṣo mahābalaḥ
hiraṇyakaśipur jambho mayādyāḥ sumahātapāḥ
brahmāṇaṃ mohayitvā'sauvedāṣjagrāhavīryavān
grasitvācaśrutiṃ so'thapraviveśamahārṇavam
nādhītaṃ navaṣaṭkāraṃ varṇāśramavivarjitam
tataḥ prajāpatirdevaḥ sarvadevagaṇairvṛtaḥ
gatvādugdhāṃ budhiṃ devaṃ tu ṣṭāvaśaraṇaṃ gataḥ
tvamevasarvalokānāmāśrayaḥ puruṣottamaḥ
bhūtādistvaṃ mahadbhūtaṃ bhūtasaṅghasyakāraṇam
tvamevakāraṇamāśrityaramatedhāmaātmavān
tvamādibhūtaścāntastvaṃ tvaṃ vāyuḥ sarvago mahān
tvamāpaḥ sarvajagatāṃ jīvanaṃ parameśvaraḥ
tvaṃ bhūmirjagadādhārobhūdharastvaṃ mahāmate
tvayaivapreritālokāśceṣṭaṃ tesādhvasādhuṣu
daityenopadrutāvedāḥ praviṣṭāmahadarṇavam
vedāś caiva hisarveṣāṃ dharmāṇāṃ paritaḥ sthitiḥ
vedeṣusarvadevānāṃ nityatṛptirbhaviṣyati
tasmādvedānsamānetuṃ tvamevārhasikeśava
śrīmahādeva uvāca
evamuktohṛṣīkeśobrahmaṇāparameśvaraḥ
taṃ daityaṃ sumahāghoraṃ mākaraṃ rūpamāsthitaḥ
tuṇḍāgreṇa vidāryātha jaghānāmarapūjitaṃ
taṃ hatvā sarvavedāṃś ca sāṅgopāṅgasamanvitān
anyonyamiśritā vedā grasitās tena rakṣasā
vyaktā bhagavatā tena vyāsarūpeṇa dhīmatā
pṛthagbhūtā samaṃ vedā vyāsenaiva mahātmanā
evaṃ matsyāvatāreṇa rakṣitāḥ sarvadevatāḥ
kṛtvā nirātaṅkam aho ramādhavaḥ
saṃstūyamānaḥ surasiddhasaṅghair
iti śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe paṣcapaṣcāśatsahasrasaṃhitāyām
uttarakhaṇḍe umāmaheśvarasaṃvāde
matsyāvatāravarṇanaṃ nāma
triṃśadadhikadviśatatamo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīrudra uvāca
tadvakṣyāmiprisamyakśṛṇuṣvekāgracetasā
atriputro mahātejādurvāsāitiviśrutaḥ
pracaṇḍaḥ sarvalokānāṃ kṣobhakārīmahātapāḥ
mamāṃśabhūtobrahmarṣiḥ sarveṣāṃ bhayadaḥ sadā
uṣitas tatra varṣaṃ tu kinnarībhiḥ sa pūjitaḥ
tasmin kālemahātejāgajārūḍhaṃ maheśvaram
dadarśa sarvadevais taṃ pūjyamānaṃ śacīpatim
tac ca dṛṣṭvā sa hṛṣṭātmā durvāsā sumahātapāḥ
ādāyadevatādhīśastāṃ srajaṃ gajamūrddhani
kareṇādāyatāṃ mālāṃ madodriktastatogajaḥ
pīḍayitvāthacikṣepasaṃsthitāṃ dharaṇītale
tataḥ kruddho mahātejādurvāsāraktalocanaḥ
durvāsā uvāca
tasmāttrailokyaśrīrnaṣṭābhavatvevana saṃśayaḥ
itiśaptastataḥ śakrojagāmasvapuraṃ punaḥ
tataḥ śrīrjagatāṃ dhātrīkṣaṇādantar dadhesvayam
antar ddhānaṃ gatālakṣmīs tadānaṣṭaṃ jagattrayam
yadapāṃ gāśritaṃ sarvaṃ jagatsthāvarajaṅgamam
tasyāmantar ddhānavatyāṃ sarvaṃ naṣṭataraṃ bhavat
brahmāditridaśāḥ sarvegandharvāyakṣakinnarāḥ
daityāścadānāvānāgāmanuṣyārākṣasās tathā
paśavaḥ pakṣiṇaḥ kīṭāḥ sarvesthāvarajaṅgamāḥ
tayālakṣmyājaganmātrātesarvenāvalokitāḥ
kṣutpipāsārditādevāścukruśurgatacetasaḥ
navavarṣajaladharaḥ sarveśuṣkājalāśayāḥ
sarvetepādapāśuṣkāḥ phalapuṣpavivarjitāḥ
tadādevāḥ sagandharvā daityadānavarākṣasāḥ
kṣutpipāsārdditājagmuḥ brahmāṇamamitaujasam
devā ūcuḥ
bhagavanakṣutpipāsābhyāṃ pīḍitaṃ hijagattrayam
kṣutpipāsārdditāḥ sarvedevadānavamānavāḥ
trātāraṃ sarvalokeśaṃ bhavaṃ taṃ śaraṇaṃ gatāḥ
trātumarhasideveśakṣutpipāsārditāṣjanān
ititeṣāṃ vacaḥ śrutvāsarvalokapitāmahaḥ
uvācaparamaprītastānsarvānpratimānadaḥ
śṛṇudhvaṃ devatāḥ sarve daityagandharvamānavāḥ
durvāsāḥ sumahātmātuyataḥ krodhamavāptavān
tasmātkrodhenatenedaṃ naṣṭaṃ lokatrayaṃ surāḥ
asauroṣaparītātmākrodhenakaluṣīkṛtaḥ
jagattrayaṃ caśrīnaṣṭaṃ bhavatvityāhadurmatiḥ
tacchāpājjagatāṃ dhātrīlakṣmīrnnārāyaṇapriyā
antar ddhānaṃ gatādevījaganmātāmaheśvarī
yadapāṅgekṣitālokābhavanti sukhitās tathā
nālokitājaganmātrāduḥkhabhāginaevahi
tatra nārāyaṇaṃ devamarccayāmaḥ sanātanam
bhṛgvādimunibhiḥ sārdhaṃ prayayaukṣīrasāgaram
kṣīrābdhāvuttarataṭebrahmarudrādidevatāḥ
viṣṇuṃ samarccayāmāsuḥ pauruṣeṇavidhānataḥ
japann aṣṭākṣaraṃ mantraṃ pauruṣaṃ sūktam eva ca
teṣāṃ samdarśanetasthaustūyamānomaharṣibhiḥ
taṃ dṛṣṭvājagatāmīśaṃ śaṅkhacakragadādharam
pītavastraṃ caturbāhuṃ puṇḍarīkanibhekṣaṇam
śrīvatsakaustubhoraskaṃ vanamālāvibhūṣitam
kirīṭahārakeyūranūpurairupaśobhitam
tataḥ provācabhagavānkṛpayāsarvadevatāḥ
varadosmivaraṃ devāvṛṇīdhvamiticābravīt
iti śrutvātadāsarvedevābrahmapurogamāḥ
ūcuḥ prāṣjalayodevamidaṃ vacamīśvaram
devāūcaḥ
kṣutpipāsārditaṃ sarvaṃ sadevāsuramānuṣam
tasmādbhavaṃ taṃ śaraṇaṃ yātāḥ smapuruṣottama
śrībhagavān uvāca
atrisūnormuneḥ śāpādantar ddhānaṃ gatāramā
kaṭākṣadarśanāttasyājagadaiśvaryyasaṃyutam
tasmādyūyaṃ surāḥ sarveśivabrahmapurogamāḥ
utpāṭyamaṃ daraṃ śailaṃ nidhāyakṣīrasāgaram
maṃ daraṃ ghargharaṃ kṛtvāsarpparājenaveṣṭitam
utpadyate casālakṣmīrjagatsaṃ rakṣaṇāyavai
tayāhṛṣṭāmahābhāgābhaviṣyathana saṃśayaḥ
dhārayāmy ahamevādriṃ kūrmarūpeṇasaṃ vṛtaḥ
mamaśaktyāsurānsarvānpraviśyacabalīyasaḥ
ity uktādevatāḥ sarvāhariṇākāmalakṣaṇe
sādhusādhvitideveśamūcurbrahmapurogamāḥ
saṃstūyamānobhagavānacyutaḥ surasattamaiḥ
antar dadhetataḥ śrīmānsarvalokanamaskṛtaḥ
iti śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe paṣcapaṣcāśatsāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyām uttarakhaṇḍe
umāmaheśvarasaṃvāde durvāsasaḥ śāpakathanaṃ nāmaekatriṃśadadhikadviśatatamo'dhyāyaḥ
dvātriṃ śadadhi dviśatatamo'dhyāyaḥ
śaṅkara uvāca
tataḥ suragaṇāḥ sarvedānavādyāmahābalāḥ
utpāṭyamaṃ daraṃ śailaṃ cikṣipuḥ payasāṃ nidhau
tatonārāyaṇaḥ śrīmānbhagavānbhūtabhāvanaḥ
kūrmarūpeṇataṃ śailaṃ dadhārāmitavikramaḥ
anādimadhyāntavapurviśvarūpaḥ sanātanaḥ
adhārayadgirivaraṃ sampūjyojagadīśvaraḥ
tatodevāsurāḥ sarvemamaṃ thuḥ kṣīrasāgaram
sarpparājenasaṃ veṣṭyaghargharaṃ maṃ darācalam
utpādanārthaṃ lakṣmyāścasarvaevamaharṣayaḥ
upoṣyaniyamaṃ kṛtvājepuḥ śrīsūktam eva ca
ekādaśyāṃ tu śuddhāyāṃ mathyamānemahāṃ budhau
upoṣyaṛṣayaḥ sarvejaptaṃ śrīmantramuttamam
kāṃ kṣamāṇāścayejaptuṃ lakṣmīnārāyaṇaṃ harim
dhyātvā samarccayāmāsurdvijāgryāmunisattamāḥ
samabhūt tatra prathamaṃ kālakūṭaṃ mahāviṣam
mahāpīḍaṃ mahāghoraṃ saṃ vartāgnisamaprabham
dṛṣṭvāpradudruvuḥ sarvebhayārtādevadānavāḥ
tatastānvidrutāndṛṣṭvābhayārttānsurasattamān
tatastānabruvaṃ vākyamahaṃ tatra śubhekṣaṇe
ahamāhārayiṣyāmikālakūṭaṃ mahāviṣam
sādhusādhvitivākyairmāṃ tu ṣṭabuḥ praṇatābhṛśam
tadṛṣṭvāmeghasaṃ kāśaṃ prādurbhūtaṃ mahāviṣam
dhyātvānārāyaṇaṃ devaṃ hṛdayegaruḍadhvajam
udayādityasaṃ kāśaṃ śaṅkhacakragadādharam
śrībhūmisahitaṃ devaṃ taptakāṃ canakuṇḍalam
nāmarūpaṃ mahāmantraṃ japtvālakṣmyāsamanvitam
viṣaṃ tadabhavajjīrṇaṃ lokasaṃ hārakārakam
tasya mṛtyubhayaṃ nāstiviṣarogāgnijaṃ mahat
kālamṛtyubhayaṃ cāpi tasya nāstikimanyataḥ
itināmatrayeṇaivapītaṃ devimayāviṣam
tataḥ prahṛṣṭāstridaśāstuṣṭuvurmāṃ suvismitāḥ
māṃ praṇamyapunardevāmamaṃ thuḥ kṣīrasāgaram
jyeṣṭhādevīsamutpannāratnasragvāsasāvṛtā
tāmabruvaṃ stutedevīṃ sarvadevagaṇābhṛśam
devā ūcuḥ
yeṣāṃ gṛhāntareramyekalahaḥ sampravartate
tattesthānaṃ prayacchāmovasa tatrāśubhānvitā
paruṣaṃ bhāṣaṇannityaṃ vadaṃ tyanṛtavādinaḥ
samdhyākāletuyepāpāḥ svapanti malacetasaḥ
teṣāṃ veśmanisanti ṣṭhaduḥkhadāridryadāyinī
kapālakeśabhasmāsthituṣāṃ gārāni yatra tu
tatra tesatataṃ sthānaṃ bhaviṣyatina saṃśayaḥ
tatra vasāśubhenityaṃ kalināsahanityaśaḥ
akṛtvāpādayoḥ śaucaṃ yastvācāmatidurmmatiḥ
taṃ bhajasvamahādevikaluṣeṇabhṛśaṃ vṛtam
tuṣāṃ gāraka pālāśmavālukāvastracarmmabhiḥ
dantadhāvanakartārobhaviṣyanti narādhamāḥ
ramasvakalinādeviteṣāṃ veśmasunityaśaḥ
tilapiṣṭaṃ kalaṃ jaṃ cakaliṅgaṃ śigrugṛṃ janam
chatrākaṃ viḍvarāhaṃ cabilvaṃ kośātakīphalam
alābuṃ capalāṇḍuṃ cayekhādanti narādhamāḥ
teṣāṃ gehehyavasthānaṃ devīdāridryadesadā
ityādiśyasurāḥ sarvejyeṣṭhāṃ cakalivallabhām
punaścamaṃ thanaṃ cakruḥ kṣīrābdhiṃsusamāhitāḥ
tataścavāruṇīdevīsamutpannāśubhānane
ananto nāgarājo'thatāṃ jagrāhasulocanām
tataḥ surāsamutpannāsarvābharaṇabhūṣitā
vainate yasya bhāryābhūtsarvalakṣaṇaśobhitā
tato'psarogaṇādivyāgandharvāścamahaujasaḥ
jajṣirerūpasampannāmadhugāyanatatparāḥ
etānsarvānsahasrākṣojagrāhaprītamānasaḥ
tataḥ prahṛṣṭavadanaistūyamānāmaharṣibhiḥ
utpannāśrīrmahālakṣmīsarvalokeśvarīśubhā
bālārkakoṭisaṃ kāśākanakāṃ gadabhūṣitā
hemāṃ bujasamāsīnāsarvalakṣaṇaśobhitā
padmapattraviśālākṣīnīlakuṃ citamūrddhajā
divyacandanaliptāṃ gīdityapuṣpairalaṃ kṛtā
caturhastāviśālākṣīpūrṇeṃ dusadṛśānanā
vasupātraṃ mātuluṃ gaṃ svarṇapadmayugaṃ śubham
vibhrāṇāhastakamalaiḥ sarvābharaṇabhūṣitaiḥ
amlānapaṅkajāṃ mālāṃ dhārayaṃ tīhyuraḥ sthale
dadṛśustāṃ mahādevīṃ sarvalokahitaiṣiṇīm
īśvarīṃ sarvabhūtānāṃ mātaraṃ padmamālinīm
nārāyaṇīṃ jagaddhātrīṃ nārāyaṇahṛdālayām
tāṃ vilokyamahālakṣmīṃ prahṛṣṭāḥ sarvadevatāḥ
avādayantaḥ paṭahān dividevagaṇābhṛśam
vavarṣuḥ puṣpavarṣāṇivanadevyonirantaram
jagurgandharvapatayonanṛtuścāpsarogaṇāḥ
vavuḥ puṇyās tathā vātāḥ suprabho'bhūddivākaraḥ
jajabaluścāgnayaḥ śāṃ tāḥ prasannāścadiśodaśa
anantar aṃ śītaraśmirudabhūtkṣīrasāgare
sudhāmaykhavānsomomāturbhrātāsukhāvahaḥ
nakṣatrādhipatiścābhūccandrovailokamātulaḥ
tatojāyāhareḥ puṇyātulasīlokapāvanī
samutpannājagaddhātrīpūjārthaṃ śārṅgiṇohareḥ
tataḥ prahṛṣṭamanasaḥ sarvedevādivaukasaḥ
taṃ śailaṃ pūrvavatsthāpyaparipūrṇamanorathāḥ
stutvānāmasahasreṇajepuḥ śrīsūktasaṃ hitāḥ
tataḥ prasannāsādevisarvāndevān uvācaha
śrīr uvāca
varaṃ vṛṇīdhvaṃ bhadraṃ vovaradāhaṃ surottamāḥ
ūcuḥ prāṣjalayodevāḥ śriyaṃ namrātmamūrtayaḥ
devā ūcuḥ
viṣṇorvakṣasthaledevibhavanityānapāyinī
trailokyaṃ pālayādevīnityātvaṃ parameśvarī
yadapāṃ gāśritaṃ sarvaṃ jagatsthāvarajaṅgamam
mātārudrādidevānāmaiśvaryaṃ tvatkaṭākṣataḥ
ity uktādaivataiḥ sarvairlokamātāmaheśvarī
evamastvititāndevānprāhanārāyaṇapriyā
tatonārāyaṇaḥ śrīśaḥ śaṅkhacakragadādharaḥ
tathaivāvirabhūdbrahmāpūrvavatkṣīrasāgare
tataḥ pratuṣṭuvurdevānamaskṛtvājanārdanam
ūcuḥ prāṣjalayaḥ sarveprahṛṣṭavadanāḥ śubhāḥ
devā ūcuḥ
gṛhāṇadevīṃ sarveśamahirṣītavavallabhām
jagatsaṃ rakṣaṇārthāyalakṣmīmanapagāminīm
nānāratnamayedivyepīṭhebālārkasaṃ nibhe
niveśyadevīṃ devaṃ caānaṃ dāśrupariplutāḥ
divyāmbarairdivyamālyairnānāratnavibhūṣitaiḥ
lakṣmyāsahasamāsīnamarcayāmāsuracyutam
aprākṛtaiḥ phalairdivyairarcayāmāsurīśvarīm
amṛtādutthitādevītulasīkomalāśubhā
tayāśrīpādayugalamarccayāmāsuraṃ jasā
pradakṣiṇatrayaṃ kṛtvānamaskṛtvā muhur muhuḥ
taṣṭuvustutibhirddevāharṣapūrṇāśruviklavāḥ
abhīṣṭānpradadautebhyovarāndevyāsahaprabhuḥ
tataḥ suhṛṣṭāḥ suramānuṣādyālakṣmīkaṭākṣārppitadṛṣṭipūtāḥ
prabhūtadhānyārthayutānirantar aṃ sukhaṃ paraṃ prāpuranāmayābhṛśam
iti śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe paṣcapaṣcāśatsāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyām uttarakhaṇḍe umā
maheśvarasaṃvāde lakṣmyutpattirnāmadvātriṃśadadhikadviśatatamo'dhyāyaḥ cha
śaṅkara uvāca
tataḥ provācabhagavānsurāṃś caiva mahāmunīn
devyāsahaprahṛṣṭātmāsarvalokahitāyavai
śrībhagavān uvāca
śṛṇudhvaṃ munayaḥ sarvedevatāścamahāvalāḥ
ekādaśīmahāpuṇyāsarvopadravanāśinī
lakṣmīsamdarśanārthāyabhavadbhiḥ samupoṣitā
tasmāttusarvadāpuṇyādvādaśīmamavallabhā
adyaprabhṛtiyelokāuṣitāḥ pūrvavāsare
dvādaśyāmuditebhānauśraddhayāparayāyutāḥ
yepūjayanti māṃ bhaktyātulasyācaśriyāsaha
nārccayanti cayevaimāṃ dvādaśyāṃ puruṣottamam
tenarāḥ pāpakarmāṇomamamāyāvimohitāḥ
yenārcayanti pāpiṣṭhānarānarakagāminaḥ
tānpāpānviṣayrvaddhānmamapūjāparāṅmukhān
kṣipatyajasraṃ saṃsāremāyāmamaduratyayā
evamuktvātubhagavānparamātmāsanātanaḥ
kṣīrābdhauśeṣaparyyaṅkevimānesūryasannibhe
devyāsahaviśālākṣyāramayāparameśvaraḥ
darśanārthaṃ surāṇāṃ ca tatra sannihito'bhavat
tataḥ suragaṇāḥ sarvekūrmmarūpaṃ sanātanam
bhaktyāsampūjayitvāthatuṣṭuvurhṛṣṭamānasāḥ
tataḥ prasannobhavagānkūrmmarūpījanārddanaḥ
bhagavān uvāca
varaṃ vṛṇīdhvaṃ deveśāyadvomanasivartate
tatodevagaṇāḥ sarvekūrmmarūpaṃ janārdanam
ucuḥ prāṣjalayaḥ sarveharṣanirbharamānasāḥ
devā ūcuḥ
śeṣasyadiggajānāṃ casahāyārthaṃ mahābala
evamastvitihṛṣṭātmābhagavālaṃ ṃ lokabhāvanaḥ
dhārayāmāsadharaṇīṃ saptadvīpasamāvṛtām
tatodevāḥ sagandharvādaityadānavamānuṣāḥ
maharṣibhiranujṣātāḥ svarlokānpratipedire
siddhāyemānuṣāś caiva yoginomunisattamāḥ
viṣṇorājṣāṃ puraskṛtyabhaktyāparamayā yutāḥ
ekādaśyāmupoṣyāthabhaktyācaiva janārdanam
iti śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe paṣcapaṣcāśatsāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyām uttarakhaṇḍe umāmaheśvarasaṃvāde ekādaśy upavāsakathanaṃ nāma
pārvaty uvāca
bhagavaṣ chrotum icchāmi dvādaśyāś ca vidhānakam
viṣṇoḥ pūjāvidhānaṃ ca kartavyaṃ tatra vai prabho
ekādaśyāḥ prabhāvaṃ ca sarvapāpaharaṃ nṛṇām
ācakṣva vistareṇaiva mayi prītyā maheśvara
mahādeva uvāca
śṛṇu devi pravakṣyāmi dvādaśyāś ca vidhānakam
tasyāḥ smaraṇamātreṇa santuṣṭaḥ syāj janārdanaḥ
ekādaśyāṃ tu prāptāyāṃ samupoṣyeha mānavaḥ
sarvapāpavinirmuktā yānti viṣṇoḥ paraṃ padam
saptajanmārjitaṃ pāpaṃ jñānato'jñānataḥ kṛtam
kṣaṇād eva layaṃ yāti dvādaśyāṃ haripūjanāt
aśvamedhasahasrāṇi vājapeyaśatāni ca
ekādaśyupavāsasya kalāṃ nārhanti ṣoḍaśīm
dharmadā hy arthadā caiva kāmadā mokṣadā kila
sarvakāmadughā nṝṇāṃ dvādaśīvaravarṇinī
ekādaśīsamaṃ kiṃcit pāpatrāṇaṃ na vidyate
ekādaśīsamaṃ kiṃcid vrataṃ nāsti śubhekṣaṇe
sa karasthaṃ mahārājyaṃ tyaktvā bhaikṣyaṃ tu yācate
ekādaśendriyaiḥ pāpaṃ yat kṛtaṃ bhavati priye
raṭantīha purāṇāni bhūyo bhūyo varānane
abhakṣyaṃ sarvadā proktaṃ kiṃ punaḥ śuklakṛṣṇayoḥ
varṇānām āśramāṇāṃ ca sarveṣāṃ varavarṇinī
ekādaśyupavāsas tu kartavyo nātra saṃśayaḥ
ekādaśyāṃ ca prāptāyāṃ mātāpitror mṛte'hani
dvādaśyāṃ tu pradātavyaṃ nopavāsadine kvacit
garhitānnaṃ na vāśnanti pitaraś ca divaukasaḥ
ekādaśyāṃ na bhoktavyaṃ surāṃ vā na pibet kvacit
tasmād ekādaśīṃ śuddhām upavāsaṃ samācaret
daśamīmiśritāṃ tāṃ tu prayatnenavivarjjayet
aruṇodayavelāyāṃ daśamīmiśritābhavet
tāṃ tyaktvādvādaśīṃ śuddhāmupoṣyehāvicārayan
kalāyāṃ vidyamānāyāṃ sūryasyodayanaṃ prati
trayodaśyāṃ tathā devidvādaśīparividyate
tathā cadvādaśīśuddhāpavāsevidhīyate
aruṇodayavelāyāṃ kṛtyaṃ sarvaṃ samācaret
kalāyāmapidvādaśyāṃ pāraṇaṃ tatra coditam
śuddhāmekādaśīṃ cāpityajedatrana saṃśayaḥ
kalāpyekādaśī yatra dvādaśyāmuditeravau
sarvāmekādaśīṃ tyaktvā tatra ivopavaseddvijaḥ
sāyamādyaṃ tayorahnoḥ sāyaṃ prātastumadhyame
daśamyāmekabhaktastunārīsaṅgamavarjitaḥ
dhātrīphalānuliptāṃ gaḥ snānaṃ samdhyāṃ samācaret
pākhaṇḍinaṃ vikarmasthaṃ patitaṃ śvapacaṃ tathā
nāvalokennasambhāṣennaspṛśet tatra vaiṣṇavaḥ
avaiṣṇavas tu yo vipraḥ sa pāṣaṇḍaḥ prakīrtitaḥ
śikhopavītatyāgī ca vikarmastha itīritaḥ
mahāpāpopapāpābhyāṃ yuktaḥ patitaucyate
rātrausampūjyadeveśaṃ jāgaraṃ casamācaret
gandhaiḥ puṣpais tathā dīpairvastrairābharaṇaiḥ śubhaiḥ
pūjajjagatāmīśaṃ lakṣmyāsahajanārdanam
dīpānnīrājayet tatra vāramaṣṭottaraṃ śatam
śatapatrakṛtāṃ mālāṃ tābhyāṃ samyaṅnivedayet
dhūpaṃ dīpaṣcanaivedyaṃ tāmbūlaṃ casamarppayet
śarkarāsahitaṃ divyaṃ pāyasānnaṃ samarpayet
karpūreṇacasaṃ yuktaṃ tāmbūlaṃ canivedayet
pradaṃ kṣiṇenamaskāraṃ kṛtvā bhaktyāsamanvitaḥ
ājyenajuhuyādvahnauśatamaṣṭottaraṃ tathā
pratyṛcaṃ puruṣasūktenalakṣmīsūktenapāyasam
brāhmaṇānbhojayed bhaktyāsvayaṃ bhuṃ jītavāgyataḥ
purāṇādiprapāṭhenakṣapayettaddinaṃ mahat
kṣitiśāyībrahmacārītasyāmevaniśisvapet
evaṃ sampūjyamānaṃ sa dvādaśyāṃ kamalāpatiḥ
kṣaṇāt prasanno bhagavān sarvābhīṣṭaprado dhruvam
iti śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe paṣcapaṣcāśatsāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyām
uttarakhaṇḍe umāmaheśvarasaṃvāde dvādaśīmāhātmyaṃ nāma
paṣcatriṃśadadhikadviśatatamo’dhyāyaḥ
śrīpārvaty uvāca
pāṣaṇḍānāṃ ca saṃvādaṃ varjayed iti yat tvayā
teyādṛśāḥ samākhyātāḥ kairliṃ ṅgaiścihnitābhuvi
ye'nyaṃ devaṃ paratvena vadanty ajñānamohitāḥ
nārāyaṇāj jagannāthāt te vai pāṣaṇḍinaḥ smṛtāḥ
ṛte vanasthāśramāc ca jaṭāvalkaladhāriṇaḥ
avaidikakriyopetās te vai pāṣaṇḍinas tathā
rahitā ye dvijā devi te vai pāṣaṇḍinaḥ smṛtāḥ
śrutismṛtyuditācāraṃ yas tu nācarati dvijaḥ
sa pāṣaṇḍīti vijṣeyaḥ sarvalokeṣu garhitaḥ
vinā vai bhagavatprītyā te vai pāṣaṇḍinaḥ smṛtāḥ
sa pāṣaṇḍīti vijṣeyaḥ svatantraḥ sarvakarmasu
yas tu nārāyaṇaṃ devaṃ brahmarudrādidaivataiḥ
samam anyair nirīkṣeta sa pāṣaṇḍī bhavet sadā
vāsudevaṃ na jānāti sa pāṣaṇḍī bhaved dvijaḥ
kim atra bahunoktena brāhmaṇā ye’py avaiṣṇavāḥ
na te praṣṭavyā na vaktavyā na draṣṭavyāḥ kadācana
pārvaty uvāca
mayiprītyāsamācakṣvasaṃ śayovartatebhṛśam
strīcāpalyenadeveśapṛcchāmitvāṃ mahāmate
vasiṣṭha uvāca
śiva uvāca
śṛṇudevipravakṣyāmiyadguhyaṃ paramādbhutam
namucyādyāmahādaityāḥ purāsvāyaṃ bhuveṃ tare
mahābalāmahāvīryāmahāvīrāmahaujasaḥ
sarveviṣṇuratāḥ śuddhāḥ sarvapāpavivarjitāḥ
trayīdharmavṛtāḥ sarvebhagnāindrapurogamāḥ
viṣṇoḥ samīpamāgamyabhayārttāṃ ḥ śaraṇaṃ gatāḥ
devā ūcuḥ
ajeyānsarvadevānāntaponirddhūtakalmaṣān
mahādeva uvāca
ityākarṇyaharirvākyaṃ devānāṃ cabhayānakam
tānsamāśvāsyadikpālānmāmāhapuruṣottamaḥ
śrībhagavān uvāca
tvaṃ hirudramahābāhomohanārthesuradviṣām
pāṣaṇḍācaraṇaṃ dharmaṃ kuruṣva surasattama
tāmasānipurāṇānikathayasvacatānprati
mohanāni caśāstrāṇikuruṣvacamahāmate
kāṇādaṃ gautamaṃ śaktimupamanyuṃ cajaiminim
kapilaṃ caiva durvāsaṃ mṛkaṇḍuṃ cabṛhaspatim
bhārgavaṃ jāmadagnyaṃ cadaśaitāṃs tāmasānṛṣīn
bhāvaśaktyāsamāviśyakurvatājagatośivam
tvacchaktyācaniviṣṭāstetamasodriktayābhṛśam
tāmasāstebhaviṣyanti kṣaṇādevana saṃśayaḥ
purāṇāni caśāstraṇitvayāsatvenabṛṃ hitāḥ
tathā pāśupataṃ śāstraṃ tvamevakurusatkṛtaḥ
kaṃ kālaśaivapāṣaṇḍamahāśaivādibhedataḥ
alakṣyaṃ ca mataṃ samyagvedabāhyaṃ narādhamāḥ
tvāṃ paratvena vakṣyanti sarvaśāstreṣu tāmasāḥ
teṣāṃ matam adhiṣṭhāya sarve daityāḥ sanātanāḥ
bhaveyus te madvimukhāḥ kṣaṇād eva na saṃśayaḥ
tāmasānāṃ mohanārthaṃ pūjayāmi yuge yuge
mahādeva uvāca
tasmān nāśāya me nātha bhaviṣyati na saṃśayaḥ
tatra śakyaṃ mayā kartuṃ tat kṛtyaṃ hare'dhunā
tvadājṣāpi ca nollaṅghyā etad duḥkhataraṃ mahat
evamuktetatodevisamāśvāsyacamāṃ punaḥ
ātmanāśāyatenātrabhavatvityāhamāṃ hariḥ
devatānāṃ hitārthāyakuruṣvavacanaṃ mama
hṛdayemāṃ samādhāyajapamantraṃ mamāvyayam
ṣaḍakṣaraṃ mahāmantraṃ tārakaṃ brahmaucyate
yejapanti himāṃ bhaktyāteṣāṃ muktirna saṃśayaḥ
śaṃ khāṃ gaśārṅgeṣudharaṃ sarvābharaṇabhūṣitam
bhasmāsthidhāraṇādyattusambhūtaṃ kilbiṣaṃ tvayi
maṅgalaṃ tadabhūtsarvaṃ manmantroccāraṇācchubhāt
tarpitonāśayiṣyāmipāpaṃ sarvaṃ surottama
manasaivārccayahṛdimāṃ nāthaṃ puruṣottamam
madājṣāṃ kurumatprītyāsarvametacchubhaṃ tava
visṛṣṭāstetatodevānivṛttāḥ svāśramaṃ yayuḥ
tatomāṃ prārthayāmāsurdevāindrapurogamāḥ
indrādaya ūcuḥ
śīghraṃ kuruhitaṃ devayathoktaṃ hariṇādhunā
mahādeva uvāca
devatānāṃ hitārthāyavṛttiṃ pākhaṇḍināṃ śubhe
kapālacarmabhasmāsthidhāraṇaṃ tatkṛtaṃ mayā
tāmasānipurāṇāniyathoktaṃ viṣṇunāśubhe
pāṣaṇḍaśaivaśāstrāṇi yathoktaṃ kṛtavān aham
vedabāhyāniśāstrāṇisamyaguktaṃ mayānaghe
imaṃ matamavaṣṭabhyaduṣṭāḥ sarvecarākṣasāḥ
bhagavadvimukhāḥ sarvebabhūvustāmasāvṛtāḥ
bhasmādidhāraṇaṃ kṛtvāmahogratapasāvṛtāḥ
māmevapūjayāṃ cakrurmmāṃ sāsṛkcandanādibhiḥ
atyaṃ taviṣayāsaktāḥ kāmakrodhasamanvitāḥ
satvahīnāstunirvīryyājitādevagaṇais tadā
sarvadharmmaparibhraṣṭāḥ kāleyāṃ tyadhamāṃ gatim
viṣṇorājṣāṃ puraskṛtyakṛtaṃ bhasmāsthidhāraṇam
bāhyacihnam idaṃ devi mohanārthāya vidviṣām
athāntarhṛdaye nityaṃ dhyātvā devaṃ janārdanam
sahasranāmasadṛśaṃ viṣṇor nārāyaṇasya tu
ṣaḍakṣaraṃ mahāmantraṃ raghūṇāṃ kulavardhanam
etat te sarvam ākhyātaṃ tvayā pṛṣṭaṃ śubhānane
iti śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe paṣcapaṣcāśatsāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyām
uttarakhaṇḍe pāṣaṇḍotpattivarṇanaṃ nāma
paṣcatriṃśadadhikadviśatatamo'dhyāyaḥ
ṣaṭtriṃśadadhikadviśatatamo'dhyāyaḥ
pārvaty uvāca
tāmasāni ca śāstrāṇi samācakṣva mamānagha
teṣāṃ nāmānikramaśaḥ samācakṣvasureśvara
śṛṇu devi pravakṣyāmi tāmasāni yathā kramam
teṣāṃ smaraṇamātreṇa mohaḥ syāj jṣāninām api
prathamaṃ hi mayaivoktaṃ śaivaṃ pāśupatādikam
macchaktyā veśitair vipraiḥ proktāni ca tataḥ śṛṇu
kaṇādena tu samproktaṃ śāstraṃ vaiśeṣikaṃ mahat
dhiṣaṇena tathā proktaṃ cārvākamatigarhitam
daityānāṃ nāśanārthāya viṣṇunā buddharūpiṇā
mayaiva kathitaṃ devi kalau brāhmaṇarūpiṇā
apārthaṃ śrutivākyānāṃ darśayan lokagarhitam
pareśajīvapāraikyaṃ mayā tu pratipādyate
brahmaṇo’sya svayaṃ rūpaṃ nirguṇaṃ vakṣyate mayā
vedārthavan mahāśāstraṃ māyayā yad avaidikam
mayaiva kalpitaṃ devi jagatāṃ nāśakāraṇāt
madājṣayā jaimininā pūrvaṃ vedam apārthakam
nirīśvareṇa vādena kṛtaṃ śāstraṃ mahattaram
śāstrāṇi caiva girije tāmasāni nibodha me
purāṇāni ca vakṣyāmi tāmasāni yathā kramāt
brāhmaṃ pādmaṃ vaiṣṇavaṃ ca śaivaṃ bhāgavataṃ tathā
tathaiva nāradīyaṃ tu mārkaṇḍeyaṃ tu saptamam
āgneyam aṣṭamaṃ proktaṃ bhaviṣyaṃ navamaṃ tathā
daśamaṃ brahmavaivartaṃ liṅgam ekādaśaṃ smṛtam
dvādaśaṃ ca varāhaṃ ca vāmanaṃ ca trayodaśam
kaurmaṃ caturdaśaṃ proktaṃ mātsyaṃ paṣcadaśaṃ smṛtam
ṣoḍaśaṃ gāruḍaṃ proktaṃ skandaṃ saptadaśaṃ smṛtam
aṣṭādaśaṃ tu brahmāṇḍaṃ purāṇāni yathā kramam
mātsyaṃ kaurmaṃ tathā laiṅgaṃ śaivaṃ skāndantathaiva ca
āgneyaṃ ca ṣaḍ etāni tāmasāni nibodha me
vaiṣṇavaṃ nāradīyaṃ ca tathā bhāgavataṃ śubham
gāruḍaṃ ca tathā pādmaṃ vārāhaṃ śubhadarśane
sāttvikāni purāṇāni vijṣeyāni śubhāni vai
brahmāṇḍabrahmavaivartaṃ mārkaṇḍeyaṃ tathaiva ca
bhaviṣyaṃ vāmanaṃ brāhmaṃ rājasāni nibodha me
sāttvikā mokṣadāḥ proktā rājasāḥ sarvadāśubhāḥ
tathaiva smṛtayaḥ proktā ṛṣibhis triguṇānvitāḥ
sāttvikā rājasāś caiva tāmasā śubhadarśane
vāsiṣṭhaṃ caiva hārītaṃ vyāsaṃ pārāśaraṃ tathā
bhāradvājaṃ kāśyapaṃ ca sāttvikā muktidāḥ śubhāḥ
yājṣavalkyaṃ tathātreyaṃ taittiraṃ dākṣame vaca
kātyāyanaṃ vaiṣṇavaṃ ca rājasāṃ svargadāḥ śubhāḥ
gautamaṃ bārhaspatyaṃ ca sāṃvartaṃ ca yamaṃ smṛtam
sākhyaṃ cauśanasaṃ ceti tāmasā nirayapradāḥ
tāmasānarakāyaivavarjayettānvicakṣaṇaḥ
śeṣāṃ caprabhavāvasthāṃ harervakṣyāmiteśṛṇu
iti śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe paṣcapaṣcāśatsāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyām uttarakhaṇḍe tāmasaśāstra
kathanaṃ nāmaṣaṭtriṃśadadhikadviśatatamo'dhyāyaḥ cha
śrīrudra uvāca
hiraṇyakahiraṇyākṣaukāśyapeyaumahābalau
tasmin praviṣṭayogīndrānsanakādīnmahābalau
sanakādaya ūcuḥ
iti śāpaṃ tayordattvā tatra tasthurmunīśvarāḥ
devastamarthaṃ jṣātvācatānāhūyacatāvapi
taucotthāyābravīt tatra bhagavānbhūtabhāvanaḥ
bhagavān uvāca
kṛtavaṃ taumahāvīryyāvaparādhaṃ mahātmanām
nātikramaṇīyamidaṃ bhavadbhyāṃ dvārapālakau
ity uktautaumahāvīryyāvabrūtāṃ parameśvaram
jayavijayāvūcatuḥ
cirakālaṃ mahīṃ gaṃ tu ṃ nasamarthausva mānada
tasmādvairāyajanmānividdhivāṃ cavrajāvahe
ity uktvā dvārapālau taupūrvaṃ jātaumahābalau
hiraṇyakaśipurjyeṣṭhohiraṇyākṣaḥ kaniṣṭhakaḥ
apramāṇaśarīraḥ sahiraṇyākṣomahoddhataḥ
utpāṭyabāhusāhasraiḥ pṛthivīṃ samahīdharām
sasāgarāṃ dvīpayutāṃ sarvaprāṇisamanvitām
utpāṭyaśirasākṛtvāpraviveśarasātalam
tatodevagaṇāḥ sarvecukruśurbhayapīḍitāḥ
śaraṇaṃ prayayurdevaṃ nārāyaṇamanāmayam
tatastadadbhutaṃ jṣātvāśaṅkhacakragadādharaḥ
vārāharūpam āsthāya viśvarūpaṃ janārdanaḥ
viśvataḥ pāṇipaccakṣurmahādaṃ ṣṭro mahābhujaḥ
daṃ ṣṭraikayātutaṃ daityaṃ jaghānaparameśvaraḥ
saṃ cūrṇitamahāgātromamāraditijādhamaḥ
patitāṃ dharadṛṣṭvādaṃ ṣṭrayoddhṛtyapūrvavat
saṃsthāpyadhārayāmāsaśeṣekūrmmavapus tadā
taṃ dṛṣṭvādevatāḥ sarvekroḍarūpaṃ mahāharim
devā ūcuḥ
namaḥ sthitisvarūpāyasarvayajṣasvarūpiṇe
kalākāṣṭhānimeṣāya namas te kālarūpiṇe
auṃ kārāya namas tubhyaṃ yajurvedasvarūpiṇe
namas te vedavedāṅgasāṅgopāṃ gāya te namaḥ
namas te vedaviduṣeviśiṣṭaikasvarūpiṇe
śrībhūlīlādhipatayejagatpitrenamo namaḥ
ity ādistutibhiḥ stutvā devaṃ vārāharūpiṇam
arccayāmāsurātmeśaṃ gandhapuṣpādibhirharim
samarcyamānastairdevaisteṣāmiṣṭaṃ varaṃ dadau
īpsitāṃ labhate bhūmiṃ ciraṃ sasyaphalānvitām
etat te sarvam ākhyātaṃ vārāhavaibhavaṃ haraiḥ
nārasiṃ haṃ tathā vakṣyeśṛṇudevivarānane
iti śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe paṣcapaṣcāśatsāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyām
uttarakhaṇḍe varāhāvatārakathanaṃ nāma
aṣṭatriṃśadadhikadviśatatamo'dhyāyaḥ
bhrātaraṃ nihataṃ jṣātvā hiraṇyakaśipus tataḥ
tapas tepe mahādaityo meroḥ pārśve ca māṃ prati
divyavarṣasahasrāṇi vāyubhakṣo mahābalaḥ
japan paṣcākṣaraṃ mantraṃ pūjayāmāsa māṃ śubhe
tataḥ prahṛṣṭamanasā tam avocaṃ mahāsuram
tataḥ provāca daiteyo māṃ prasannaṃ śubhānane
hiraṇyakaśipur uvāca
devāsuramanuṣyāṇāṃ gandharvoragarakṣasām
paśupakṣimṛgāṇāṃ ca siddhānāṃ vai mahātmanām
yakṣavidyādharāṇāṃ ca kinnarāṇāṃ tathaiva ca
sarveṣām eva rogāṇām āyudhānāṃ tathaiva ca
sarveṣām ṛṣimukhyānām avadhyatvaṃ prayaccha me
sarvāṃś ca yajṣabhāgāṃś ca svayam evāgrahīd balāt
trātāraṃ nādhigacchanti devatās tena nirjitāḥ
tasya iva kiṅkarāḥ sarve gandharvā devadānavāḥ
yakṣāś ca nāgāḥ siddhāś ca sādhyāś ca vaśavartinaḥ
uttānapādasya sutāṃ kalyāṇīṃ nāma kanyakām
tasyāṃ jāto mahātejāḥ prahlādo daityarāṭ śubhe
sarvāvasthāsu kṛtyeṣu manovākkāyakarmabhiḥ
nānyaṃ jānāti deveśāt prasannātmā sanātanāt
adhītya sarvavedāṃś ca śāstrāṇi vividhāni ca
taṃ pariṣvajya bāhubhyāṃ tanayaṃ śubhalakṣaṇam
hiraṇyakaśipur uvāca
prahlāda cirakālaṃ tvaṃ gurugehe niveśitaḥ
yad uktā guruṇā vidyā tan mamācakṣva suvrata
iti pṛṣṭaḥ svapitrā vai prahlādo janmavaiṣṇavaḥ
prāha daityeśvaraṃ prītyā vacanaṃ kaluṣāpaham
prahlāda uvāca
yo vai sarvopaniṣadām arthaḥ puruṣa īśvaraḥ
taṃ vai sarvagataṃ viṣṇuṃ namaskṛtvā bravīmi te
iti viṣṇustutiṃ śrutvā daityarāḍ vismayānvitaḥ
uvāca taṃ guruṃ roṣāt kiṃ tvayoktaṃ mamātmaje
kim artham uktavān jāḍyam akāryaṃ brāhmaṇocitam
aśrāvyaṃ madamitrasya stavam etaṃ mamāgrataḥ
bālenāpi kṛtaṃ tv etat tvatprasādād dvijādhama
ity uktvā parito vīkṣya daityarāṭ krodhamūrcchitaḥ
iti rājavacaḥ śrutvā sa babandha bhṛgoḥ sutam
badhyamānaṃ guruṃ dṛṣṭvā prahlādo brāhmaṇapriyaḥ
uvāca pitaraṃ tāta idaṃ me noktavān guruḥ
śrotā mantā tathā vaktā draṣṭā sarvaga īśvaraḥ
harir evākṣayaḥ kartā niyantā sarvadehinām
iti putravacaḥ śrutvā hiraṇyakaśipus tataḥ
taṃ brāhmaṇaṃ mocayitvā svasutaṃ prāha vismayāt
ko viṣṇuḥ kiṃ tu tadrūpaṃ kutrāsau saṃsthito hariḥ
mām evārcaya govindaṃ tyaja śatruṃ durāsadam
athavā śaṅkaraṃ devaṃ rudraṃ lokaguruṃ prabhum
arcayasvāsurādhyakṣaṃ sarvaiśvaryapradaṃ śivam
tripuṇḍradhāraṇaṃ kṛtvā bhasmanā daityapūjitam
pūjayitvā mahādevaṃ pāśupatyoktamārgataḥ
purohitā ūcuḥ
pitā tavāpi tasyaiva prasādād īśvaro'bhavat
iti teṣāṃ vacaḥ śrutvā prahlādo janmavaiṣṇavaḥ
prahlāda uvāca
aho bhagavataḥ śreṣṭhā yan māyāmohitaṃ jagat
aho vedāntaviduṣaḥ sarvalokeṣu pūjitāḥ
brāhmaṇā api cāpalyād vadanty evaṃ madānvitāḥ
nārāyaṇaḥ paraṃ brahma tattvaṃ nārāyaṇaḥ param
nārāyaṇaḥ paro dhyātā dhyānaṃ nārayaṇaḥ param
gatir viśvasya jagataḥ śāśvataṃ śivam acyutaḥ
dhātā vidhātā jagato vāsudevaḥ sanātanaḥ
hiraṇmayavapur nityaḥ puṇḍarīkanibhekṣaṇaḥ
śrībhūlīlāpatiḥ saumyo nirmalaḥ śubhavigrahaḥ
tasyaivājṣāṃ puraskṛtya vartete brahmaśaṅkarau
bhīṣāsmād vāti pavano bhīṣodeti divākaraḥ
bhīṣāsmād agniś candro'tha mṛtyur dhāvati paṣcamaḥ
āsīd eko harir divyo devo nārāyaṇaḥ paraḥ
na vādyā vāpṛthivyau ca nakṣatrāṇi divaukasaḥ
tasya viṣṇoḥ paraṃ dhāma sadā paśyanti sūrayaḥ
evaṃ sarvopaniṣadām arthaṃ hitvā dvijottamāḥ
rāgāl lobhād bhayād vāpi kiṃ bravītha mamāgrataḥ
taṃ sarvarakṣakaṃ devaṃ tyaktvā sarveśvaraṃ harim
kathaṃ pāṣaṇḍam āśritya pūjayāmi ca śaṅkaram
indīvaradalaśyāmaṃ padmapatrāyatekṣaṇam
śrīvatsalakṣitoraskaṃ sarvābharaṇabhūṣitam
sadā kumāraṃ sarveśaṃ nityānandasukhapradam
kṛṣṇaṃ dadhyur mahātmāno yoginaḥ sanakādayaḥ
yam arcayanti brahmeśaśakrādyā devatāgaṇāḥ
yasya patnyāḥ kaṭākṣārdhadṛṣṭyā dṛṣṭā divaukasaḥ
muktir bhavati jantūnāṃ brahmādīnāṃ sudurlabhā
sa evaṃ rakṣakaḥ śrīśo devānām api sarvadā
tam eva pūjayiṣyāmi lakṣmyā saṃyutam acyutam
iti tasya vacaḥ śrutvā hiraṇyakaśipus tataḥ
krodhena mahatā viṣṭo jajvālāgnir ivāparaḥ
hiraṇyakaśipur uvāca
bhīṣaṇaiḥ śastrasaṅghātaiḥ prahlādaṃ pāpakāriṇam
mamājṣayā ghātayadhvaṃ śatrupūjanatatparam
parivārya mahātmānaṃ tasthur daityeśvarājṣayā
prahlādo'pi tathā viṣṇuṃ dhyātvā hṛdayapaṅkaje
japann aṣṭākṣaraṃ mantraṃ tasthau girir ivāparaḥ
taṃ jaghnuḥ parito vīrāḥ śūlatomaraśaktibhiḥ
viṣṇoḥ prabhāvād durdharṣād vajrabhūtam abhūd bhṛśam
tataḥ samprāpya tadgātraṃ mahāstrāṇi suradviṣām
nīlotpaladalānīva petuś chinnāḥ kṣitau śubhe
alpam apy asya tadgātraṃ bhettuṃ daityā na ca kṣamāḥ
vismitā vāṅmukhās tasthur daityarājāntike bhaṭāḥ
tādṛg vidhaṃ mahātmānaṃ dṛṣṭvā putraṃ mahābalam
vismayaṃ paramaṃ gatvā daityarāṭ krodhamūrcchitaḥ
ādideśa tataḥ sarvān dandaśūkān mahāviṣān
vāsukiprabhṛtīn bhīmān khādayadhvam iti krudhā
ādiṣṭās tena rājṣātha tenāgāḥsu mahābalāḥ
jvalitāsyā mahābhīmās taṃ cakhādur mahābalam
garuḍadhvajabhaktaṃ taṃ vidaśya garalāyudhāḥ
nirviṣāś chinnadaśanā babhūvur anilāśanāḥ
vainateyasahasreṇa chinnagātrāḥ suvihvalāḥ
tādṛgvidhān mahāsarpān dṛṣṭvā daityapatis tadā
ādideśa tataḥ kruddho diggajān sumadānvitān
nirdiṣṭās tena rājṣātha diggajāś ca madoddhatāḥ
parivāryātha taṃ jaghnur dantaiḥ pṛthutarair bhṛśam
dantair vinākṛtā nāgā bhayārtā vai pradudruvuḥ
tān dṛṣṭvātha mahānāgān daityendraḥ kupito balī
prajvālya ca mahāvahniṃ cikṣepa sutam ātmanaḥ
jalaśāyipriyaṃ dṛṣṭvā prahlādaṃ havyavāhanaḥ
na dadāha ca taṃ dhīraṃ suśītaḥ samabhūc chikhī
adahyamānaṃ taṃ bālaṃ dṛṣṭvā rājā suvismitaḥ
prādāt tasmai viṣaṃ ghoraṃ sarvabhūtahitaṃ tadā
tasya viṣṇoḥ prabhāvāc ca viṣamasyāmṛtaṃ bhavet
arpaṇāt tasya devasya viṣaṃ cāmṛtam aśnute
evam ādyair vadhopāyair ghorarūpaiḥ sudāruṇaiḥ
mohayitvātmajaṃ rājā tasyāvadhyatvam īkṣya ca
tataḥ sāmnā sutaṃ prāha daityarāḍ vismayākulaḥ
hiraṇyakaśipur uvāca
tvayā viṣṇoḥ paratvaṃ ca samyag uktaṃ mamāgrataḥ
vyāpitvāt sarvabhūtānāṃ viṣṇur ity abhidhīyate
aiśvaryaśaktitejāṃsi jñānavīryabalāni ca
parasya tasya paramaṃ rūpaṃ guṇavibhūtayaḥ
samyag dṛṣṭvā prayatnena viṣṇuṃ manye divaukasām
īśānavaradānena sarvabhūteṣv avadhyatām
prāptavān sarvabhūtānāṃ durjayatvaṃ ca mānada
īśvaratvaṃ labhed viṣṇur māṃ jitvā balavīryataḥ
iti tasya vacaḥ śrutvā prahlādaḥ prāha vismitaḥ
prahlāda uvāca
yo’sau nārāyaṇaḥ śrīmān paramātmā sanātanaḥ
sarvasyāpi jagaddhātā viṣṇur ity abhidhīyate
tripādvyāptiḥ paraṃ vyomni pādavyāptikalādbhutā
yo’sau cakragadāpāṇiḥ pītavāsā janārdanaḥ
yogibhir dṛśyate bhaktyā nābhaktyā dṛśyate kvacit
draṣṭuṃ na śakyo roṣāc ca matsarād vā janārdanaḥ
devatiryaṅmanuṣyeṣu sthāvareṣv api jantuṣu
uvāca roṣatāmrākṣo bhartsayaṃś ca sutaṃ muhuḥ
hiraṇyakaśipur uvāca
pratyayaṃ darśayasvādya bahubhiḥ kiṃ ca lāpitaiḥ
mahādeva uvāca
ity uktvā sahasā daityaḥ prāsādastambham ātmanaḥ
tāḍayāmāsa hastena prahlādam idam abravīt
hiraṇyakaśipur uvāca
anyathā tvāṃ vadhiṣyāmi mithyāvākyapralāpinam
ity uktvā sahasā khaḍgam ākṛṣya ditijeśvaraḥ
prahlādorasi cikṣepa hantuṃ khaḍgena taṃ ruṣā
tasmin kṣaṇe mahāśabdaḥ stambhe saṃśrūyate bhṛśam
saṃvartāśanisaṃrāvaiḥ kham iva sphuṭitāntaram
sarve nipātitā bhūmau chinnamūlā iva drumāḥ
tataḥ stambhe mahātejā niṣkrānto vai mahāhariḥ
tena nādena mahatā tārakāḥ patitā bhuvi
nṛsiṃhavapur āsthāya tatra ivāvirabhūd dhariḥ
anekakoṭisūryāgnitejasā sa samāvṛtaḥ
mukhe paṣcānanaprakhyaḥ śarīre mānuṣākṛtiḥ
daṃṣṭrākarālavadanaḥ sphurajjihvāmbaroddhataḥ
jvālāvalitakeśāntas taptālātekṣaṇo vibhuḥ
vṛto merur ivābhāti bahuśākhānagānvitaḥ
divyamālyāṃ varadharo divyābharaṇabhūṣitaḥ
tasthau nṛkesarīrūpaḥ saṃhartuṃ sarvadānavān
taṃ dṛṣṭvā ghorasaṃkāśaṃ narasiṃhaṃ mahābalam
dagdhākṣipakṣmo daityendro vihvalāṅgaḥ papāta ha
prahlādo'tha tadā dṛṣṭvā nārasiṃhopamaṃ harim
dadarśa tasya gātreṣu nṛisiṃhasya mahātmanaḥ
lokān samudrān sadvīpān suragandharvamānuṣān
ajāṇḍānāṃ sahasraṃ tu saṭāgre tasya dṛśyate
dṛśyante tasya netreṣu somasūryādayas tathā
karṇayor aśvinau devau diśaś ca vidiśas tathā
indrāgnī tasya vaktrāṃ te jihvāyāṃ tu sarasvatī
daṃṣṭrāsu siṃhaśārdūlāḥ śarabhāś ca mahoragāḥ
kaṇṭhe ca dṛśyate meruḥ skandheṣv api mahādrayaḥ
devatiryaṅ manuṣyāś ca bāhuṣv api mahātmanaḥ
nābhau cāsyāntarikṣaṃ ca pādayoḥ pṛthivī tathā
romasvoṣadhayaḥ sarvāḥ pādapānakhapaṅktiṣu
niḥśvāseṣu ca vedāś ca sāṅgopāṅgasamanvitāḥ
ādityā vasavo rudrā viśvedevā marudgaṇāḥ
sarvāṅgeṣu pradṛśyanta te gandharvāpsarasaś ca ye
itthaṃ vibhūtayas tasya dṛśyaṃ te paramātmanaḥ
śrīvatsakaustubhoraskaṃ vanamālāvibhūṣitam
śaṅkhacakragadākhaḍgaśārṅgādyair hetibhir yutam
sarvopaniṣadām arthaṃ dṛṣṭvā daityeśvarātmajaḥ
harṣāśrujalasiktāṅgaḥ praṇanāma muhur muhuḥ
daityendras tu hariṃ dṛṣṭvā krodhān mṛtyuvaśe sthitaḥ
atha daityagaṇāḥ sarve labdhasaṃjṣā mahābalāḥ
svāny āyudhāni cādāya hariṃ jaghnus tvarānvitāḥ
palālakāṇḍāni yathā vahnau kṣiptāny anekaśaḥ
tāny anīkāni daityānāṃ dṛṣṭvā naraharis tadā
saṭair dadāha ca jvālāmālā viracita sphuṭaiḥ
nṛkesarisaṭodbhūtavahninā dānavā bhṛśam
nirbhasmitā gaṇāḥ sarve niḥśeṣaṃ tad abhūd balam
prahlādaṃ sānugaṃ hitvā bhasmite vīkṣya tadbale
krodhād daityapatiḥ khaḍgam ākṛṣyābhiprapadyata
pātayāmāsa deveśo yathā śākhāṃ mahānilaḥ
gṛhītvā patitaṃ bhūmau mahākāyaṃ nṛkesarī
svotsaṅge sthāpayāmāsa dadarśāsau mukhaṃ hareḥ
viṣṇunindākṛtaṃ pāpaṃ tathā vaiṣṇavadoṣajam
nṛsiṃhasparśanād eva nirbhasmitam abhūt tadā
atha daityeśvarasyātha mahad gātraṃ nṛkesarī
nakher vidārayāmāsa tīkṣṇair vajranibhair ghanaiḥ
sanirmmalātmā daityendraḥ paśyan sākṣān mukhaṃ hareḥ
nakhanirbhinnahṛdayaḥ kṛtārtho vijahāv asūn
tadgātraṃ śatadhā bhittvā nakhais tīkṣṇair mahāhariḥ
ākṛṣyāntrāṇi dīrghāṇi kaṇṭhe saṃsaktavān priyān
atha devagaṇāḥ sarve munayaś ca tapodhanāḥ
mātaraṃ jagatāṃ dhātrīṃ cintayāmāsur īśvarīm
hiraṇyavarṇāṃ hariṇīṃ sarvopadravanāśinīm
viṣṇor nityānavadyāṅgīṃ dhyātvā nārāyaṇīṃ śubhām
devīsūktajapair bhaktyā namaścakruḥ sanātanīm
taiś cintyamānā sā devī tatraivāvirabhūt tadā
caturbhujā viśālākṣī sarvābharaṇabhūṣitā
dukūlavastrasahitāṃ divyamālānulepanām
tāṃ dṛṣṭvā devadevasya priyāṃ sarve divaukasaḥ
ūcuḥ prāṣjalayo devīṃ prasannaṃ kurute priyam
trailokyasyābhayaṃ svāmī yathā dadyāt tathā kuru
ity uktāsahasādevīpriyaṃ prāpyajanārdanam
tāṃ dṛṣṭvāmahiṣīṃ svasyapriyāṃ sarveśvarohariḥ
rakṣaḥ śarīrajaṃ krodhaṃ tatyājaprītavatkṣaṇāt
aṃ kamādāyatāṃ devīṃ samāśliṣyadayānidhiḥ
kṛpāsudhārdradṛṣṭyāvainiraikṣata surānhariḥ
taddayādṛṣṭidṛṣṭānāṃ sānandaḥ sambhramo'bhavat
tatodevagaṇāḥ sarveharṣanirbharamānasāḥ
ūcuḥ prāṣjalayodevaṃ namaskṛtyajagatpatim
devagaṇā ūcuḥ
atyadbhutamidaṃ rūpaṃ bahuvāhupadāṃ kitam
jagattrayasamākrāntaṃ tejastīkṣṇataraṃ tava
draṣṭuṃ sthātuṃ naśaktāḥ smaḥ sarvaevadivaukasaḥ
mahādeva uvāca
upasaṃ hṛtyadeveśobabhūvasukhadarśanaḥ
śaratkoṭīṃ dusaṃ kāśaḥ puṇḍarīkanibhekṣaṇaḥ
sudhāmayasaṭāpuṃ javidyutkoṭinibhaḥ śubhaḥ
nānāratnamayairdivyaiḥ keyūraiḥ kaṭakānvitaiḥ
bāhubhiḥ kalpavṛkṣasyaśākhaughairivasatphalaiḥ
japākusumasaṃ kāśaiḥ śobhitaḥ karapaṅkajaiḥ
śaṅkhacakragṛhītābhyāmudbāhubhyāṃ virājitaḥ
varadābhayahastābhyāmitarābhyāṃ nṛkesarī
śrīvatsakaustubhoraskovanamālāvibhūṣitaḥ
udyaddinakārābhyāṃ cakuṇḍalābhyāṃ virājitaḥ
hārakeyūrakaṭakairbhūṣaṇaiḥ samalaṃ kṛtaḥ
savyāṃ gasthaśriyāyuktorājatenarakesarī
lakṣmīnṛsiṃhaṃ taṃ dṛṣṭvādevatāḥ samaharṣayaḥ
ānandāśrujalaiḥ siktāharṣanirbharacetasaḥ
arcayāmāsurātmeśaṃ divyapuṣpasamarpaṇaiḥ
ratnakuṃ bhaiḥ sudhāpūrṇairabhiṣicyasanātanam
tataḥ prasannolakṣmīśasteṣāmiṣṭānvarāndadau
prahlādaṃ sarvadaityānāṃ cakrerājānamavyayam
āśvāsyabhaktaṃ prahlādamabhiṣicyasurottamaiḥ
dadautasmaivarāniṣṭānbhaktiṃ cāvyabhicāriṇīm
tatodevagaṇaiḥ sarvaiḥ stūyamānonṛkesarī
tataḥ suragaṇāḥ sarvesvaṃ svaṃ sthānaṃ prapedire
punaścayajṣabhāgānsvānbubhujuḥ prītamānasāḥ
tatodevāḥ sagandharvānirātaṃ kābhavaṃ tadā
prahlādastutadācakrerājyaṃ dharmeṇavaiṣṇavaḥ
hareḥ prasādāllabdhanturājyaṃ vaiṣṇavasattamaḥ
etat prahlādacaritaṃ ye tu śṛṇvanti nityaśaḥ
etat te kathitaṃ devi nṛsiṃhaṃ vaibhavaṃ hareḥ
śeṣāṃ ca vaibhavāvasthāṃ śṛṇu devi yathā kramam
iti śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe paṣcapaṣcāśatsāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyām uttarakhaṇḍe umāmaheśvarasaṃvāde nṛsiṃhaprādurbhāvo nāma
aṣṭatriṃśadadhikadviśatatamo'dhyāyaḥ
satudharmavidāṃ śreṣṭhaḥ satyasamdhojitendriyaḥ
sajitvāsakālāndevānsendrāṃś casamarudgaṇān
trīlloṃ ṃ kānsvavaśesthāpyarājyaṃ cakremahābalaḥ
akṛṣṭapacyāpṛthivībahusasyaphalapradā
gāvaḥ pūrṇadughāḥ sarvāḥ pādapāḥ phalapuṣpitāḥ
svadharmmaniratāḥ sarvenarāḥ pāpavivarjitāḥ
arcayanti hṛṣīkeśaṃ satataṃ vigatajvarāḥ
evaṃ cakāradharmeṇarājyaṃ daityapatirbalī
indrāditridaśās tasya kiṃ karāḥ samupasthitāḥ
bhraṣṭarājyaṃ sutaṃ dṛṣṭvātasyāpihitakāmyayā
arcayāmāsadeveśaṃ padmanābhaṃ janārdanam
taṃ dṛṣṭvāpuṇḍarīkākṣaṃ śaṅkhacakragadādharam
indranīlamaṇiśyāmaṃ sarvābharaṇabhūṣitam
sphuratkirīṭakeyūrahārakuṇḍalaśobhitam
śriyāsahasamāsīnaṃ maṇḍalendremahātmani
taṃ dṛṣṭvājagatāmīśaṃ harṣanirbharacetasā
patnyāsahanamaskṛtvātuṣṭāvadvijasattamaḥ
kaśyapa uvāca
namo namas te lakṣmīśasarvajṣajagadīśvara
sarvātmansarvadeveśasṛṣṭisaṃ hārakārakaḥ
anādinidhanānantavapuṣe viśvadhāriṇe
kalyāṇaguṇapūrṇāya yogidhyeyātmane namaḥ
namo yuvakumārāya śrībhūlīlādhipāya ca
paṣcamātmakaniṣṭhaistuyogibhiḥ pūjyasesadā
paṣcārthatatvaviduṣāṃ paṣcasaṃ skārasaṃsthitaḥ
paṣcāparaṃ svarūpaṃ tevijṣeyaṃ satataṃ hare
caturdhāparipūrṇātmanniyataṃ kavayoviduḥ
trayīmayāḥ karmmaniṣṭhāyedvijābhaktavatsalāḥ
teṣāṃ dayekṣaṇādevabhavabandhavimuktaye
dhātrevidhātreviśvāyaviśvarūpāya te namaḥ
nārāyaṇāyakṛṣṇāyavāsudevāya śārṅgiṇe
viṣṇavejiṣṇavetubhyaṃ śuddhasatvāya te namaḥ
mahādeva uvāca
ityādistutibhiḥ samyakstūyamānomaharṣiṇā
prāhagambhīrayā vācā parituṣṭojanārdanaḥ
śrībhagavān uvāca
saṃ tu ṣṭo'haṃ dvijaśreṣṭhatvayābhaktyāsamarccitaḥ
varaṃ vṛṇīṣvabhadraṃ tekaromitavavāṃ chitam
mahādeva uvāca
tataḥ prāhahṛṣīkeśaṃ bhāryyayāsahakaśyapaḥ
kaśyapa uvāca
trailokyaṃ mamaputrāyadahiśakrāyaśāśvatam
mahādeva uvāca
tasmin kālebaliryāgaṃ dīrghasatraṃ mahātapāḥ
aṣṭamaharṣibhi sārdhamārebhetadvidhānataḥ
iti śrīpādme mahāpurāṇe paṣcapaṣcāśatsāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyām uttarakhaṇḍe umāmaheśvara
saṃvāde vāmanaprādurbhāvonāmaikonacatvāriṃ śadadhikadviśatatamo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīmahādeva uvāca
aditirjanayāmāsavāmanaṃ viṣṇumacyutam
śrīvatsakaustubhoraskaṃ pūrṇeṃ dusadṛśadyuiṃ tam
sundaraṃ puṇḍarīkākṣamatikharvatanuṃ harim
vaṭuveṣadharaṃ devaṃ sarvavedāṃ gagocaram
mekhalājinadaṇḍādicihnair aṅkitam īśvaram
taṃ dṛṣṭvā devatāḥ sarve śatakratupurogamāḥ
vāmana uvāca
kiṃ kartavyaṃ mayā cādya tad bravītha surottamāḥ
śrīśaṅkara uvāca
tataḥ prahṛṣṭās tridaśāstam ūcuḥ parameśvaram
devā ūcuḥ
śaṅkara uvāca
ity uktāstridaśaiḥ sarvairājagāmabaliṃ hariḥ
yāgadeśesamāsīnamṛṣibhiḥ sārdhamaṣṭabhiḥ
abhyāgataṃ tu taṃ dṛṣṭvāsahasotthāyadaityarāṭ
abhyāgataḥ svayaṃ viṣṇuritihāsasamanvitaḥ
pūjayāmāsavidhināniveśyakusumāsane
tatprayacchāmiteśīghraṃ brūhivedavidāṃ vara
śaṅkara uvāca
tataḥ prahṛṣṭamanasātam uvācamahīpatim
vāmana uvāca
śṛṇurājendravakṣyāmimamāgamanakāraṇam
sarveṣām evadānānāṃ bhūmidānamanuttamam
yodadātimahīṃ rājāviprāyākiṃ canāyavai
aṃ guṣṭhamātrāmapivāsabhavet pṛthivīpatiḥ
bhūmiṃ yaḥ pratigṛhṇātibhūmiṃ yaścaprayacchati
tasmādbhūmiṃ mahārājaprayacchatripadīṃ mama
etadalpāṃ mahīṃ dātuṃ māviśaṃ kamahīpate
śaṅkara uvāca
tataḥ prahṛṣṭavadanastathetyāhamahīpatiḥ
tasmaimahīpradānaṃ tu kartuṃ menevidhānataḥ
taṃ dṛṣṭvādaityarājānaṃ tadā tasya purohitaḥ
uśanāhyabravīdvākyaṃ mārājandīyatāṃ mahīm
śukra uvāca
eṣaviṣṇuḥ pareśo'thadevaiḥ samprārthitonṛpa
vaṃ cayitvāmahīṃ sarvāṃ tvattaḥ prāptumihāgataḥ
tasmānmahīnadātavyātasmairājanmahātmane
śrīśaṅkara uvāca
tataḥ prahasyarājāsautaṃ guruṃ prāhadhairyyataḥ
prītayevāsudevasyasarvaṃ puṇyaṃ kṛtaṃ mayā
śrīśaṅkara uvāca
vāṃ cchitāṃ pradadaubhūmiṃ vāri pūrvaṃ vidhānataḥ
pariṇīyanamaskṛtyadatvāvaidakṣiṇāṃ vasu
provācataṃ punarvipraṃ prahṛṣṭenāntarātmanā
yatheṣṭātavaviprendratadgṛhāṇamahīmimām
śrīśaṅkara uvāca
tam uvācanṛpaṃ viṣṇūrājaṃ stavasamīpataḥ
māpayāmipadenādyapṛthivīṃ tavapaśyataḥ
ity uktvā kharvarūpaṃ tadvihāyaparameśvaraḥ
trivikramavapurbhūtvājagrāhapṛthivīmimām
paṣcāśatkoṭivistīrṇasasamudramahīdharām
sasāgarāṃ casadvīpāṃ sadevāsuramānuṣām
uvācadaityarājendrakiṃ karomītiśāśvataḥ
hitārthamapidevānāmṛṣīṇāṃ camahātmanām
nadṛṣṭamapiśakyaṃ syādbrahmaṇaḥ śaṅkarasyaca
