icchetpātuṃ madhūn yatra kā''jṣātetiṣṭhatipriye
tvaccārugātrasaṃ sparśāccharaistudatimāṃ smaraḥ
trāhitrāhipriyetrāhitavāsmiśaraṇaṃ gataḥ
itibruvaṃ taṃ taṃ mūḍhamabhivīkṣyavarāṃ ganā
śokāgnitaptasarvāṅgīcintayāmāsacetasā
ayaṃ mūḍho duṣṭaceṣṭaḥ praceṣṭonāmavedhasā
likhitaḥ kiṃ lalāṭemeyanmayā hāhatāsmy aham
kvamātākvacametātaḥ kvacavidyādharovaraḥ
anenāhaṃ samānītādhigastughaṭanāṃ vidheḥ
vetticchetuṃ garvavṛkṣaṃ vidhātāghaṭanāsinā
upāyāśceticatvāraḥ praśasyādīrghadarśibhiḥ
ityālokyahṛdākanyāvacobhiḥ komalākṣaraiḥ
praceṣṭaṃ pratyuvācāsausarvakāryavicakṣaṇā
dṛḍhaṃ kurumanovīrakanyāhamavivāhitā
māṃ samāliṅgyamohame kathaṃ yāsyasi durmate
śāstroktavidhināvīravivāhenagṛhāṇamām
tavasevāṃ kariṣyāmidāsīvatko'trasaṃśayaḥ
tvaṃ meprāṇāścamitraścabhūṣaṇaṃ bāndhavas tathā
vivāhayogyavastūnivivāhārthaṃ samānaya
matpāṇigrahaṇaṃ śīghraṃ kurujāḍyaṃ gṛhītica
antar dṛḍhaṃ bahiḥ ślakṣṇaṃ vadarīphalavadvacaḥ
ākarṇyatasyāmūḍho 'sauparamāṃ prītimāyayau
turaṃ gamaṃ catāṃ kanyāṃ saṃ sthāpyaikatradurmatiḥ
karakaṃ kaṇamādāyatasyāstatpuramāyayau
tataḥ sācintayāmāsavidhiṃ nūnaṃ praśasyatam
yata āvāṃ parityajyamūḍho 'sauharṣitoyayau
kiṃ kartavyaṃ kvagaṃ tavyaṃ kvasthātavyaṃ mayādhunā
yadāhamatratiṣṭhamikiṃ vadiṣyanti tetadā
puṇyatīrthaṃ samāsādyaparatra janmakāmyayā
paṣcatāṃ pratiyāsyāmisāpiśreyaskarīyataḥ
madviyogādayaṃ mūḍho navidyādharamādhavau
mayisthitāyāmeteṣāṃ bhavejjīvanarakṣaṇam
mṛtāyāmapiyāsyanti trayo'pyetetupaṣcatām
māmuddiśyayadāprāṇāḥ yakṣyaṃ tete'tramejanāḥ
bhaviṣyāmitadānūnamahaṃ tadvadhabhāginī
idānīṃ puṇyatīrtheṣuyaṣṭavyobhagavānhariḥ
prāṇeṣu ca vinaṣṭeṣusarvam evavinaśyati
niśāvaśiṣṭānalinīhimākaredūrīkṛtecaṇḍakareṇabhāsvatā
hṛdāvicintyetivarāṃ ganāsāsaptiṃ samāruhyamahājavaṃ tam
taptuṃ tapaḥ sāgaraviṣṇupatnyorjagāmavijṣottamasaṅgamāya
tasmin akṣetravarepuṇyegaṅgāsāgarasaṅgame
vasedrājāsuṣeṇākhyaḥ somavaṃ śasamudbhavaḥ
gantuṃ tasya sabhāṃ rājṣaścetasāsāvyacintayat
mayāyuvatyākartavyaṃ kathaṃ bhūpāladarśanam
adhivāsanasūtrāṇisadūrvāṇibhujemama
kanyāhaṃ turagārūḍhāyuvatīsaṅgavarjitā
cāritraṃ māmakaṃ nūnaṃ manovismayakārakam
ātmānaṃ gopayitvāhaṃ yāsyāminṛpateḥ sabhām
indrajālaprabhāveṇasābhūtvāpuruṣākṛtiḥ
praviveśasabhāṃ rājṣaḥ sudharmāmivajaimine
taṃ sapannamivāyāntaṃ śaktihastaṃ hayāsanam
svayaṃ papracchabhūpālaḥ kastvaṃ kutaihāgataḥ
tasya itadvacanaṃ śrutvāsākanyāpuruṣākṛtiḥ
praṇamyovācarājānaṃ suhṛdaṃ sajjanāśrayam
devavīravaronāmaputro'haṃ pṛthivīpateḥ
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe kriyāyogasāre
vīravarapradarśo nāma paṣcamo'dhyāyaḥ
ṣaṣṭho'dhyāyaḥ
rājovāca
tiṣṭhātraivamahābāhomamarājyesuśobhane
kartavyātemayāvṛttiḥ saṃśayonātravidyate
bhīmanādonāmakhaṅgaḥ kṣobhayāmāsasantatam
tadvadhāyatatorājāpreṣayāmāsataṃ ruṣā
tato'saugaṃ ḍakaṃ haṃ tuyayauvīravarojanaiḥ
dadarśaparvatākāraṃ suptaṃ taṃ dharaṇītale
daṃ ṣṭrākarālavadanaṃ khaṅginaṃ taṃ saśaktidhṛk
khaṅginaṃ tamiti prāha meghagaṃ bhīrayāgirā
upārjitāstvayāyeyedurātmanpāpapādapāḥ
babhūvuḥ phalinasteteṛtuṃ prāpya yathā drumāḥ
khāditāḥ prāṇinoyeyerājye'sminpāpinātvayā
muṃ canidrāmareduṣṭamāṃ paśyāntakaraṃ nijam
bhīmanāda uvāca
garvaṃ mākurudurbuddhetavāyuḥ śeṣatāṃ gatam
jvaladagniśikhāśreṇīṃ praviśecchalabho yathā
itibruvaṃ taṃ tandraṣṭuṃ śaktyāniśitayātayā
sajajvālamahākopātkṛtvāhuṃ kāraniḥsvanam
sapapātamahīpṛṣṭhegatāyurgaṃ ḍakastataḥ
cālayanpṛthivīṃ sarvāṃ svanitaughapariplutaḥ
khaṅginaṃ patitaṃ dṛṣṭvāgaṅgābdhirodhasidvija
viṣṇudūtagaṇair yuktaṃ tulasīmālyabhūṣitam
divyāmbaradharaṃ divyaṃ rathārūḍhaṃ smitānanam
puruṣa uvāca
kanyevidhṛtapuṃ veśemadvṛttāntaṃ niśāmaya
ahamāsampurārājācauravaṃ śavanānalaḥ
mayāyajṣāḥ kṛtāḥ sarvedānānisakalānica
caturvarṣasahasrāṇipālitācavasundharā
pākhaṇḍajanavākyenamayā bhūmir dvijanmanaḥ
laṃ ghitākopamāsādyadoṣitā na hi kutra cit
jahāratatkṣaṇādevasarvāṃ rājaśriyaṃ ruṣā
athāhaṃ gatasampattiḥ śokāgnidagdhamānasaḥ
māṃ dṛṣṭvācitraguptenatatkarmaprakaṭīkṛtam
uktaścabhāskarir devaścāruhāsagatiḥ prabhuḥ
dharmabuddhirayaṃ rājākṛtapuṇyakriyaḥ sadā
pākhaṇḍair bodhito'yaṃ tujahāradvijaśāsanam
tasmād ayaṃ pāpakarmāṃ brahmahāpṛthivīpatiḥ
ātmadattāṃ hared yas tu paradattāṃ ca medinīm
na tasya niṣkṛtir dṛṣṭākalpakoṭiśatāvadhi
sakoṭiguṇamāpnotipuṇyaṃ dātṛguṇādapi
tato'haṃ śamanādeśādbhuktvāvaipūtimṛttikām
kalpayonauprāṇihiṃsāsarva daivamayākṛtā
gāvaścabrāhmaṇāś caiva tathaivānye'pijīvinaḥ
mayāduṣṭenanihatāḥ koṭikoṭisahasraśaḥ
kālenapreritāsādhvimāṃ sarvakṣayitāśrayam
gacchasuśroṇibhadraṃ tebhaviṣyati na saṃśayaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
rājācataṃ mṛtaṃ śrutvākhaṅginaṃ bhīmavikramam
jayantī ṃ tāṃ samādāyasākanyāpuruṣākṛtiḥ
tapastaptuṃ manaścakregaṅgāsāgarasaṅgame
gītair vādyaiścanṛtyaiścayajennārāyaṇaṃ prabhum
nirāmiṣaṃ haviṣyaṃ caphalāhāraṃ dvijottama
kadācidupavāsaṃ sākurute cavarāṅganā
ekākinīṃ samālokyako'grahīdatrabhūtale
māṃ nīcamitimatvāsausamāruhyacavājinam
bhūya evanijaṃ rājyaṃ sājagāmavarāṅganā
mṛtāsārājatanayāyato'nyaṃ nabhajatyapi
tasyāṃ mṛtāyāṃ bhṛtyo'saunirjagāmayadṛcchayā
jagāmamaraṇārthāyagaṅgāsāgarasaṅgamam
gaṅgābdhisaṅgamesnātvātulasīmṛdvibhūṣitaḥ
kṛtāṣjaliriti prāha praceṣṭobhīṣmamātaram
sulocanāmekāṃ tāsyād yathā tattvaṃ kariṣyasi
bhūyobhūyobruvaṃ taṃ tamititasyāścakiṃ karāḥ
badhvāpāśenataṃ ninyurniruktāntatsabhāṃ prati
taptāvīravarādeśākakarāstesudāruṇāḥ
kārāyāṃ sthāpayāmāsuḥ praceṣṭamanuvihvalam
tasmin nevakāletudṛṣṭvātatkāryamadbhutam
hāhākāromahānāsīttadrājyedvijasattama
etacchrutvādbhutaṃ karmasacarājāguṇākaraḥ
niṣaṃ giṇaścarathinaścarmiṇaḥ khaṅginas tathā
dhānuṣkāścakauṃ takāścakoṭikoṭisahasraśaḥ
tenājṣaptāstataḥ sarveyoddhāro'mitavikramāḥ
satvarāḥ patirakṣāsutasthus tasmin pureruṣā
gītānigāyakaiḥ sarvair nṛtyāninartakais tathā
vādyānivādakaiś caiva tatra tyaktānisādhvasaiḥ
tataḥ sarājāviprarṣesamāhūyasvamantriṇaḥ
mantriṇa ūcuḥ
devādbhutamidaṃ karmanadṛṣṭaṃ naśrutaṃ kvacit
etāvatāṃ nṛṇāṃ madhyepaśyatāṃ kvajagāmasā
ko'pijalpatisālakṣmīḥ śāpenāgatyabhūtale
māyāmayīsāramaṇīmāyayātvadgṛhesthitā
māyāṃ svakīyāṃ darśitvāgatetyanyevadanti vai
kecidvadanti ramaṇīsarvalakṣaṇasaṃ yutā
āgamiṣyatibhūyo'pibhagāṅgomaghavāyataḥ
vadanti ke'pisākanyāsadguṇādīrghavāsanā
bhrāntyācandramasāgrastāpūrṇacandranibhānanā
viṣadaṇḍaprahastācanīrajākalikākucā
kecidvadanti sṛṣṭvāsāsraṣṭumanyāṃ striyaṃ nṛpaṃ
tadrūpādarśanālokyenītārūpaguṇāsthitā
kecidvadanti bhūpālatvayāsarvadiśojitāḥ
rūpair daivāṃ ganājetuṃ gatāsātridivaṃ prati
stabdhāivābhavansarvenirutsāhāḥ sasādhvasāḥ
ityuktvāsamahīpālaḥ pṛthivyāṃ mūrcchito'patat
rājānaṃ patitaṃ dṛṣṭvāśokenamahātātataḥ
dhūlidhūsaratāṃ gantunṛpatiṃ muktakeśakam
tasyāḥ pīṭhaṃ samāliṅgyarurodakaruṇasvanaiḥ
hāpriye caṃ calāpāṅgisuvarṇakusumaprabhe
śokābdhaupātayitvāmāṃ kvagatāsivarānane
mamakiṃ dūṣaṇaṃ dṛṣṭaṃ tvayānir doṣayāpriye
na jīviṣyāmy ahaṃ bhadre kṣaṇamātraṃ tvayā vinā
atomedarśanaṃ datvākriyatāṃ prāṇarakṣaṇam
kiṃ dhanaiḥ kiṃ janaiḥ kiṃ memitraiḥ kiṃ vādhanair gṛhaiḥ
nāpnomiyadibhadretvāṃ prāṇebhyo'pigarīyasīm
etaccānyaccaviprarṣesa kṛtvākaruṇaṃ mahat
śokānmṛtyuṃ viniścintyayayaugaṅgābdhisaṅgamam
nivedyabhāskarāyārghaṃ gaṅgānatvāha mātaram
tyajāmitāṃ yathā bhūyaḥ prāpnomitatkariṣyasi
vidhiṃ vininyuḥ sadṛśaṃ kruddhāvīravarasyaca
tatovīravaraḥ prāhakastvaṃ bhoḥ kutaāgataḥ
tāṃ kathāṃ kathayāmāsaśṛṇvatāṃ vismayapradām
athatvaṃ mūrkhalokānāṃ pravarosi na saṃśayaḥ
gāndharvīrākṣasīvāpipannagīvāpikinnarī
śāpāgatevasākanyātasmād antarhitāsvayam
sādevarūpiṇīkanyādevānāṃ nilayaṃ gatā
kathaṃ tayāsamaṃ bhūyodarśanaṃ tebhaviṣyati
cakorapeyaṃ pīyūṣaṃ gaganerohiṇīpateḥ
kiṃ śaknuvanti taṃ pāpāvāyasābalino'pi ca
kenāpidīyatekanyākanyākenāpigṛhyate
pūrvajanmaniyākanyātāṃ kanyāṃ labhatepatiḥ
putraprayojanābhāryāputrāḥ piṇḍaprayojanāḥ
kurvanti dāragrahaṇamata evamanīṣiṇaḥ
yathehadīyatenāryā tathā nārīsamaśnute
kraṃ danrajanyāmapyeṣabhṛṅgaḥ kumudinīṃ sahet
sadrūpo'pipatiḥ strīṇāṃ santo ṣāyabhaven na hi
nārīṣusatataṃ cittaṃ viṣṇubhaktiṣvanādaraḥ
śokaiḥ kaiścittanutyāgastisraḥ puṃ sāṃ viḍaṃ banāḥ
dārāḥ putrās tathā bhrātādeśāścabāndhavās tathā
mamamātāmamapitābhāryābhrātādhanaṃ mama
niṣphalaṃ yātivaijanmanṛṇāṃ mamatayātayā
tatastugandhinīprītyāhasantī svagṛhaṃ gatā
gatvācamādhavaṃ maṃ cesvapaṃ taṃ sādadarśaha
vivāhakālesākanyābabhūvāntarhitāsvayam
evaṃ tasyāvacaḥ śrutvāsamuttasthausamādhavaḥ
vilalāpākulaḥ śokair mahadbhiḥ kṣmātaleluṭhan
kanyāyādūṣaṇaṃ nāstināstividyādharasyavā
mamaivadūṣaṇaṃ sarvaṃ yatohīnasyasaṅgabhāk
nīcasaṅgekṛtepuṃ sāsukhaṃ yacchatinovidhiḥ
naprāpnoti sukhaṃ kiṣcinnīcaḥ saṅgānmahānapi
pretasaṅgānmahādevonagnobhagnavibhūṣaṇaḥ
praviśyanīlayaṃ nīcaṃ strīdhanādikamīkṣate
kiṣcitprasaṅgamāsādyaṣaḍvaktraḥ saṣaḍānanaḥ
satāṃ śrutvāguṇaṃ nīcaḥ sadya evaviṣīdati
doṣaṃ saṃ śrotumāpnotiśatarūpobhavettadā
kṣaṇamekamapiprājṣonīcebhyo na hi niścayet
viśvāsavacanaṃ nīcaḥ sadya evaviṣīdati
doṣaṃ sāśrotumāpnotiśrotumāyātiyatnataḥ
yadākariṣyatikanyāvivāhaṃ sānṛpātmajā
nābhaviṣyattadāśokaḥ svalpo'pihṛdayemama
svargaṅgatācetsākanyāsarvalakṣaṇasaṃ yutā
nītānīcenaśoko'yaṃ hṛdayeduḥsaho'bhavat
likhitāmivasarvatra tāṃ paśyāmivarānanām
vismartuṃ na hi śaknomijīvatānenacātmanā
nīcakroḍagatāsādhvīnajīviṣyatisākṣaṇam
yathā mātāpitātyaktodeśastatprāptayemayā
tathaiva sampratiprāṇāstyaktavyānātrasaṃśayaḥ
punastatprāptayeprāṇāngaṅgāsāgarasaṅgame
tyakṣyāmītidṛḍhaṃ kṛtyasagantumupacakrame
gaṅgābdhitoyesnātvācapūjayāmāsacācyutam
tulasīpatramālābhirbhūṣitomādhavastadā
mādhava uvāca
bhāvijanmanitāṃ kanyāṃ mahyaṃ dāsyasiśobhanām
ityuktvātāṃ namaskṛtyagaṅgāṃ trailokyamātaram
athavīravaraḥ pṛṣṭhetaṃ vidhṛtyanṛpātmajam
tataḥ samālokyanṛpātmajaṃ taṃ prītiṃ samāsādya aniṃ dyaśobhām
kastvaṃ tyajas yatra kathaṃ śarīraṃ brūhītitaṃ vīravaraṃ jagāda
mādhava uvāca
ahaṃ vikramarājasyaputromādhavasaṃjṣakaḥ
astyekānagaropāṃ tesarasīpadmaśobhanā
nārīmekākinīṃ ramyāmapaśyaṃ tatra kāmukaḥ
sācacandrakalānāmabhāminīmāṃ smarāturam
sulocanāyāḥ prastāvaṃ kathayāmāsabhūtale
tatasturagamārūḍhovilaṅghyasaritāṃ patim
praceṣṭākhyenabhṛtyenagatastasyāḥ puraṃ prati
tathā karṇyamayā tatra preritaṃ sāṅgulīyakam
tathāpy upāyaṃ vakṣyāmiyenaprāpnoti māṃ bhavān
vāmabāhuṃ samuddhṛtyasthitāhaṃ varasaṃ mukhī
yenamāṃ śakyatenetuṃ samebhartā na saṃśayaḥ
tatsaṃ ketaṃ praceṣṭenasaṃ śrutyamamasaṃ mukhe
hayamāruhyasānītātatrāhaṃ nidrayājitaḥ
tadādyajāgaraṃ bhadraśṛṇu ṣvātravidhānataḥ
vihasyāntaḥ puraṃ gatvāsākanyāpuruṣākṛtiḥ
tatovidhṛtyastrīveṣaṃ nānālaṃ kārabhūṣitā
svadāsīṃ preṣayāmāsatamānetuṃ nṛpātmajam
tadājṣayāsamāgatyatatonṛpatinaṃ danaḥ
īkṣāṃ cakrecatāṃ sādhvīṃ lakṣmīṃ mūrtimatīmiva
tatogāndharvavidhināsarājatanayaḥ sudhīḥ
cakrevivāhetāṃ kanyāṃ tatra ivaprāptakautukaḥ
tatpremavāridhārābhiḥ saṃ siktonṛpanaṃ danaḥ
tatra ivatāṃ niśāṃ ninyekurvankeliṃ tayāsaha
athaprabhātevimale sāmṛgīlocanāsatī
āditaḥ sarvavṛttāntaṃ kathayāmāsamādhavam
tataḥ sulocanāsādhvījayantī ṃ tāṃ nṛpātmajām
mādhavaṃ casamādāyasuṣeṇasyasabhāṃ yayau
tāṃ kanyāsanṛpaḥ śrutvāharṣitomādhavāyavai
sulocanāṃ jayantī ṃ cavivāhenadadautataḥ
suprītonijarājyārdhaṃ dadausvarṇaśatānica
tatovicitramāvāsaṃ nirmāyasanṛpātmajaḥ
tatrāntare praceṣṭaṃ taṃ kārāgāranivāsinam
sabhāṃ samānīyatataścintayāmāsamādhavaḥ
ayaṃ pāpam atiḥ krūraḥ svāmiviśvāsaghātakaḥ
śatrūṇāṃ pravaromūḍho rakṣaṇīyomayā na hi
śiraḥ kṛṃ tatitenaivasvāminaṃ prāpyasampadam
nūnamevaprabhuṃ ghnanti vaśagānṛparājayaḥ
itisaṃ cintyamanasātenakṣmāpatisūnunā
praceṣṭonaṣṭaceṣṭo'saunirastodvijasattama
tābhyāṃ strībhyāntadāviprasukhenasanṛpātmajaḥ
tasyāṃ sulocanāyāṃ tumādhavasyamahātmanaḥ
śataṃ putrājayaṃ tyāṃ cadveśatejajṣiresutāḥ
mādhavasyasutāste'piśastraśāstravidottamāḥ
babhūbuḥ sarvalokānāṃ prītayedharmatatparāḥ
janmāntaropārjitayāviṣṇubhaktyācasaṅgataḥ
ekadācintayāmāsamanasāsacamādhavaḥ
ko'haṃ kasmātsamāyātaḥ kasyavākenanirmitaḥ
bhūyaḥ kvacagamiṣyāmi kutra vāsthāsyatemayā
saṃsāre 'smiṣjanaṃ prāpyayenanārādhitohariḥ
ātmaghātīsavijṣeyaḥ sarvadharmavahiṣkṛtaḥ
bhūyobhūyobhavejjanmabhūyobhūyo'pipaṣcatā
saṃsāro'yamataḥ sarvaḥ kleśadobhair avomahān
viṣṇubhaktiṃ vinānasyājjanmamṛtyunivāraṇam
viśvakarmāṇamāhūyasavākyamidamabravīt
mādhava uvāca
viśvakarmanmahābāhomahyaṃ viṣṇoḥ śilāmayīm
tasyādeśāttatovipraśilpināviśvakarmaṇā
pratimāracitātenamahāviṣṇoḥ śilāmayī
navīnanīradaśyāmāpuṇḍarīkanibhekṣaṇā
śaṅkhacakragadāpadmadhāriṇīca caturbhujā
lakṣmīsarasvatīyuktāvanamālāvibhūṣitā
samastalakṣaṇair yuktābhūṣitāsarvabhūṣaṇaiḥ
vicitramaṇḍapetāṃ casaṃ sthāpyapratimāṃ hareḥ
sapūjāṃ kartumārebhekāmadāṃ cakrapāṇinīm
prātaḥ snāyīsvayaṃ bhūtvākuryātsaṃ mārjanādikam
mārgaśobhāṃ caviprarṣetatropalepanaṃ punaḥ
snātvāgaṅgābdhisalilekṛtvāpaṣcamahādhvarān
gaṃ dhair dhūpaiścanaivedyestāmbūlair dhūpadīpakaiḥ
gītavādyaiḥ prabandhaiścastavapāṭhaiḥ suśobhanaiḥ
pradakṣiṇair namaskārair adhvaraiś caiva dakṣiṇaiḥ
nirāmiṣair haviṣyaiścaphalāhāraiścasattama
namonārāyaṇāyetijapetpraṇavapūrvakam
aṣṭākṣaraṃ mahāmantraṃ sarvakāmaphalapradam
evamabdasahasrāṇimahāviṣṇoḥ parātmanaḥ
cakāraparayābhaktyāsapūjāṃ sarvakāmadām
tasyābhaktyātatastuṣṭaḥ sarvadevaśiromaṇiḥ
āvirbabhūvabhagavāṃ stulasīkusumaprabhaḥ
āvirbhūtaṃ hariṃ dṛṣṭvāsadāromādhavastataḥ
śirasābhūmimāliṅgyavavandecaraṇauhareḥ
mādhava uvāca
pareśāyasureśāyanamas te jñānadāyine
namas te bahurūpāyanīrūpāya namo namaḥ
vicintyāyāvicintyāyadṛśyādṛśyāyavai namaḥ
yenatvayoddhṛtāvedāmīnarūpadhareṇavai
yenatvayoddhṛtāpṛthvīsaśailavanakānanā
vārāhamūrtināyenadharaṇīdharaṇīpate
nṛsiṃ hamūrtināyenatvayādaityovidāritaḥ
baliyajṣas tathā dhvastoyenavāmanarūpiṇā
tasmai tubhyaṃ namodevakaśyapādānakāriṇe
pitarastarpitāyenatvayākṣattriyaśoṇitaiḥ
rāvaṇonihatoyenakauśalyāsūnunātvayā
mārīcaḥ kuṃ bhakarṇaścatasmai rāmāyatenamaḥ
kālindībhedinetubhyaṃ tasmai rāmāyatenamaḥ
mlecchāścavihitāyenayugāṃ tekalkimūrtinā
hare viṣṇodaityajiṣṇonārāyaṇakṛpāmaya
saṃsārasāgare ghore patitaṃ māṃ samuddhara
tatoharṣānmādhavo'sauprakṣālyacaraṇauhareḥ
bhumaunipātyasarvāṅgaṃ jagādamādhavoharim
mādhava uvāca
trāhimāṃ pāpinaṃ kṛṣṇayatastvaṃ sarvapāpahā
paramāṃ prītimāsādyatamityāhavacaḥ svayam
śrībhagavān uvāca
brahmatvaṃ vāśivatvaṃ vāśakratvaṃ vākimicchasi
mādhava uvāca
sarvam evamayāprāptaṃ jagadīśa na saṃśayaḥ
daivatair apyadṛśyaṃ tvāṃ paśyāmivaradaṃ prabhum
bhuktiṃ muktiṃ dhanaiśvaryaṃ dātuṃ sarvaṃ bhavānakṣamaḥ
śrībhagavān uvāca
tavaśaktyā'nayāvatsaprīto'haṃ nātrasaṃśayaḥ
sūta uvāca
tamāliṅgitavānviṣṇuḥ pitāputramivadvija
śrībhagavān uvāca
āliṅganaprabhāveṇatavānṛṇyaṃ gato'smy aham
pūjitāmamatenatvāṃ neṣyāmyahaṃ tanuṃ prati
vyāsa uvāca
bhūyaḥ prāṇaiḥ samāliṅgya tatra ivāntaradhīyata
tatastāṃ pratimāṃ viṣṇoḥ sadāromādhavastadā
ārādhayāmāsa bhaktyā kriyāyogair anuttamaiḥ
gaṅgāyāṃ mṛtyum āsādya sadāro mokṣam āptavān
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe kriyāyogasāre
gaṅgāsāgarasaṅgamamāhātmyavarṇanaṃ nāma
ṣaṣṭho'dhyāyaḥ
śrīvyāsa uvāca
bhūya evapravakṣyāmigaṅgāmāhātmyamuttamam
tacchrutvāmānavāḥ sarvesarvānkāmānavāpnuyuḥ
yena nācaritaṃ snānaṃ gaṅgāyāṃ lokamātari
nadṛṣṭāyenasaritāṃ pravarājahnukanyakā
tasyāgrāhyāṇi sarvāṇi annādisalilāni ca
śarīrāṇiparityajyagaṅgāsnānaṃ prakurvatām
gātrāṇyāyānti pāpānigaṅgāsnānamakurvatām
patanti narakemūḍhāgaṅgānāmnisthitesati
śirasāyovahedbhaktyāgaṅgāmbhaḥ kaṇikāmapi
lalāṭedṛśyate yasya gaṅgāsaikatamuttamam
sapuṇyātmājagatsarvaṃ punātinātrasaṃśayaḥ
gaṅgātīrātsamāyāntaṃ yaḥ paśyetparamādaraiḥ
so'śvamedhasahasrāṇiphalaṃ prāpnoti mānavaḥ
gaṅgātīramahaṃ yāmitvamāgacchetivaktiyaḥ
tasya viṣṇuḥ prasannātmāsarvānkāmānprayacchati
karotimānavaḥ snānaṃ gaṅgāsnānaphalaṃ labhet
gaṅgāmmaḥ śīkaraṃ yas tu saṃ mitaṃ sarṣapasyaca
atraivaśṛṇu viprarṣeitihāsampurātanam
yasya śravaṇamātreṇagaṅgādevīprasīdati
āsīttretāyuge viprodharmasvonāmadhārmikaḥ
śāṃ todāntodayāyuktovedavedāṅgapāragaḥ
satyavādīkrodhahīnohiṃsāhīnojitendriyaḥ
sarvabhūtahitaiṣīcayogābhyasarataḥ sadā
saṃsārasāgarantar ttuṃ saviprovaiṣṇavojanaḥ
pūjayāmāsadeveśaṃ kriyāyogenakeśavam
jagāmajāhnavītīraṃ mumukṣuḥ snānahetave
tatra gaṅgāṃ bhasisnātvākṛtvācatarpaṇādikam
gṛhaṃ gantuṃ manaścakregaṅgāṃ bhaḥ kartarīṃ vahan
kṛtvāvāṇijyamāyāntaṃ sakalaiḥ kiṃ karair vṛtaḥ
tasya ikaḥ kiṃ karovipraḥ kālakalpaitismṛtaḥ
daṇḍahastaḥ samāyātovihitākhilapātakaḥ
pathisvapaṃ taṃ taṃ dṛṣṭvākālakalpovṛṣaṃ tataḥ
daṇḍenatāḍayāsabāhudhā'tyantanir ddayaḥ
taddaṇḍaghātajanitakrodhenavṛṣabhenasaḥ
viṣāṇābhyāṃ sutīkṣṇābhyāṃ samutthāyavidāritaḥ
tataḥ karṇātsamādāyatulasīpatramuttamam
gaṅgāmbhaḥ śīkarair divyaiḥ siktosautenadhīmatā
gataprāṇaṃ samālokyasavipraḥ paramārthavit
athagacchanpathiprājṣogaṅgānāmānikīrtayan
yamadūtāndadarśāgrekoṭikoṭisahasraśaḥ
bhagnadaṃ tāḥ ke'pike'pike'pidaṃ tavivarjitāḥ
ke'piśoṇitadhārābhirliptasarvakalevarāḥ
ke'pijarjaritāṃ gāścamahātīkṣṇaiḥ śilīmukhaiḥ
niṣiddhāṃ gulihastāścadṛḍhapāśais tathā pare
kraṃ danto vyathayāke'pipalāyanaparāyaṇāḥ
sakaṃ pahṛdayobhītyātataḥ stabdhaivābhavat
ityapṛcchanmadhurayākirātānyamakiṃ karān
keyūyaṃ vikṛtākārāḥ pāśamudgarapāṇayaḥ
daṃ ṣṭrākarālavadanā aṃ gārasadṛśaprabhāḥ
yūyaṃ sarvemahāvīrajvalatpāvakalocanāḥ
kṛtā tathāpi yuṣmākamiyaṃ kenāpidurgatiḥ
yamadūtā ūcuḥ
yamadūtāvayaṃ sarveyamājṣāhāriṇaḥ sadā
sadaṇḍo'yaṃ dvijāsmākaṃ sumahānkadanodayaḥ
akasmād āgatāyūyaṃ mahābalaparākramāḥ
etāvataiyaṃ kena kathaṃ vādurgatiḥ kṛtā
yamadūtā ūcuḥ
bhayaṃ muṃ cadvijaśreṣṭha vṛttāntaṃ sakalaṃ śṛṇu
yathā smākamidaṃ duḥkhaṃ babhūvātyantaduḥsaham
yo'sauvṛṣeṇaśṛṅgābhyāṃ kālakalpovidāritaḥ
taṃ netuṃ dharmarājenapreritāḥ kiṃ karāvayam
tenājṣaptāvayaṃ sarvesamastāyudhapāṇayaḥ
baddhvātaṃ pāpināśreṣṭhaṃ netumihasamāgatāḥ
athāsauprāptakālaścakālakalpodurāśayaḥ
bṛṣeṇahetubhūtenaviṣāṇābhyāṃ vidāritaḥ
sadayena tathā tatra gaṅgāpānīyasīkaraiḥ
siktaḥ pātakināṃ śreṣṭhogaṅgānāmānijalpatā
baddhvāpāśair dṛḍhaṃ netumudyamaṃ praticakrire
netuṃ tamapideveśaḥ śaraṇāgatapālakaḥ
svadūtānpreṣayāmāsamahābalaparākramān
ke'pidūtāḥ samāgatyatatonārāyaṇājṣayā
viṣṇudūtā ūcuḥ
kebhatomahātmānaḥ kathamenaṃ mahāśayam
baddhvānayathapāśenayūyaṃ vākasyakiṃ karāḥ
vihāyainaṃ mahātmānaṃ palāyadhvaṃ yathā sukham
nacecchirāṃ siyuṣmākaṃ chetsyāmaścakradhārayā
teṣāmetānivākyānigarvitānidvijottama
saṃ śrutyācyutadūtānāṃ te'smābhiratijalpitāḥ
daṇḍapāṇervayaṃ dūtāḥ sarveprāṇādhipasyavai
nītvainaṃ pāpināṃ śreṣṭhaṃ prayāmaḥ śamanālayam
yūyaṃ sarvemahātmānastulasīmālyabhṣitāḥ
sphuṭapadmapalāśākṣābalinogaruḍadhvajāḥ
divyāṃ baradharāyūyaṃ mayūragalasundarāḥ
śaṃ khacakragadāpadmadhāraṇāścacaturbhujāḥ
keyūyamīdṛśāḥ sarvesarvalakṣaṇasaṃ yutāḥ
imaṃ pātakināṃ śreṣṭhaṃ kathaṃ vānetum icchatha
viṣṇudūtā ūcuḥ
vayaṃ sarveviṣṇudūtāḥ puṇyātmānamimaṃ naram
netumatrasamāyātāvaikuṃ ṭhaṃ pratisamprati
muṃ catāśuyamapreṣyāyadijīvitum icchatha
bhūyasteṣāmidaṃ vākyaṃ śrutvāsarvagataṃ dvija
ayaṃ pāpīdurācārobrahmahatyāsahasrakṛt
kṛtaghnaś caiva goghnaścamitraghnaścadurāśayaḥ
merupramāṇahemānihṛtānisubahūnica
paradārāhṛtānityamanenātidurātmanā
koṭikoṭisahasrāṇijaṃ tūnāṃ viṣṇukiṃ karāḥ
kṛtāścabahudhāhatyāḥ strīhatyāca tathaiva ca
ayaṃ nyāsāpaharaṇaṃ svamātṛgamanaṃ tathā
gomāṃ sabhakṣaṇaṃ caiva cakāraprativāsaram
parahiṃsākṛtānenadāhaścaparaveśmanaḥ
sabhāyāṃ paraniṃ dācavidhavāgarbhapātanam
ahananniśitaiḥ khaṅgair niśāyāṃ yavanopamaḥ
etānyanyānipāpānimahāntyagaṇitānica
cakāranīcomūḍho 'saunālpamātraṃ śubhāvaham
tasmād ayaṃ mahāpāpīnīyateyātanāgṛham
jṣeyāhipāpinodaṇḍyādharmarājasyasattamāḥ
tadākathamimaṃ netuṃ pāpināṃ śreṣṭhamicchatha
viṣṇudūtā ūcuḥ
daṇḍyāḥ pātakinaḥ sarvejīvitādhipateḥ sadā
ayaṃ pāpavinirmuktogaṅgāśīkarasecanāt
tāvattiṣṭhanti deheṣupātakāniśarīriṇām
gaṅgāmbhaḥ śīkarāyā vannaspṛśanti sudurlabham
gaṅgāmbhaḥ śīkareṇāpipātakaṃ hanyate tathā
gaṅgānāmānisaṃ smṛtyapāpīmucyetapātakāt
sākṣāttatsalilaṃ dṛṣṭvāmucyate'trakimadbhutam
śītamapyudakaṃ gāṅgaṃ vahnivatpāpakānane
yathā gnivatpadmavaneśītanto yaṃ cadāhakṛt
tasmād ayaṃ puṇyakarmādvitīyaivakeśavaḥ
teṣāṃ keśavadūtānāṃ śrutvāsmābhiridaṃ vacaḥ
bhūya evaniruktaṃ yadvihasyoccaiḥ śṛṇu ṣvatat
gaṅgāmbhaḥ secanādevavimuktaḥ sarvapātakaiḥ
svahastopārjitaṃ karmaśubhaṃ vāyadivāśubham
yamājṣayānetumimaṃ vayaṃ sarvesamāgatāḥ
kasyāyaṃ vacasāsmābhistyajyatepāpināṃ varaḥ
viṣṇudūtā ūcuḥ
yūyaṃ pāpadhiyonūnaṃ vivekaparivarjitāḥ
yuṣmābhirjahnukanyāyānajṣāyaṃ teyatoguṇāḥ
devonārāyaṇaḥ sākṣātsvayaṃ bhūritiśuśruma
yathā viṣṇus tathā gaṅgāgaṅgaivasarvapāpahā
aśubhaṃ vāśubhaṃ karmasvahastaracitaṃ hariḥ
janmāntarārjitaiḥ pāpair gatāyūyamimāṃ gatim
adyāpipāpakarmāṇaḥ kim arthaṃ pāpam icchatha
gaṅgānindākarāyūyaṃ viṣṇuniṃ dākarās tathā
atoyuṣmānhaniṣyāmaḥ pāpinaścakradhārayā
ityuktvāviṣṇudūtāstekopādaruṇalocanāḥ
jīveśadūtāhanyaṃ tāmitiprocuścateruṣā
ityuktvāviṣṇudūtāstesaṅgrāmetyantadāruṇāḥ
sarveśaṃ khānsamādadhmuḥ sahasāhṛṣṭamānasāḥ
kodaṇḍānāṃ cavistārair vyāptaṃ viprajagattrayam
athavṛkṣaiḥ śilābhiśca tathā parvatavṛṣṭibhiḥ
asmābhirviṣṇudūtāstebāṇaiścavidalīkṛtāḥ
ṛṣṭibhirbhiṃ dipālaiścabāṇaiścaparighais tathā
kuṭhāraiśchurikābhiścadaṇḍaiścaśaṃ kubhis tathā
khaṅgaiścaśaktibhiś caiva niśitaiścaśilīmukhaiḥ
gadābhiścakradhārābhirnārācaiścasubhīṣaṇaiḥ
etair anyaiścaviṣamair astraisteviṣṇukiṃ karāḥ
tadāstrajarjarāḥ sarvevayaṃ bhītyāpalāyitāḥ
nipetuḥ ke'pisaṅgrāmegataprāṇāḥ sahasraśaḥ
tato'smāṃ stesamālokya palāyanaparāyaṇān
mudākaṃ būnsamādadhmurbalinoviṣṇukiṃ karāḥ
jagāmaharisālokyaṃ kālakalpo'tipātakī
jñānamāsādya tatra ivaparamaṃ mokṣamāptavān
gaṅgāprabhāvair asmākametadduḥkhaṃ gataṃ prabho
bhūya evasadharmasvaḥ prītogaṅgātaṭaṃ yayau
gaṅgāyāṃ snānam ācarya sarvalokasya mātari
baddhāṣjaliḥ sa vipras tāṃ tuṣṭāva parameśvarīm
naṅgāricārutaramastakapuṣpamāle
kaṃsāricārucaraṇadvayareṇuhartri
mātaḥ samastasukhade pravare nadīnāṃ
vyāsādivipracayagītaguṇe guṇāḍhye
saudāsanāmanṛpatir dvijakoṭihantā
tāṃ tvāṃ namāmi śirasā varade prasīda
nārāyaṇācyutajanārdanakṛṣṇarāma
gaṅgādnāma vadato mama devi mātaḥ
saṃsārapātakanivāriṇi dehapātas
tvannīraśīkaram avāpya surair alabhyāṃ
svāhā tvam eva parameśvari yā svadhā tvaṃ
gīrvāṇavṛndapitṛlokasutṛptihetuḥ
sṛṣṭisthitipralayakāriṇi naumi tāṃ tvām
puṇḍraṃ ca devi tava tīramṛdā sadaiva
pītvā ca vāri tava pātakanāśakāri
smṛtvā ca nāma tava vīcicayaṃ ca dṛṣṭvā
nākaṃ śubhe sumahad uccataraṃ manuṣyāḥ
sopānabhūtam udakaṃ tridivaprayāṇe
pāpāni roganikarāś ca śarīridehe
yasyās tavācyutaviriṣciśivādayo’pi
śaktā na devanikarā vrajituṃ mahimnām
tāṃ tvāṃ vadanti taṭinīm iva ke’pi mohāt
dhatte sadā svaśirasā jagadīśvari tvām
vyāsa uvāca
itistutājagaddhātrītenavipreṇadhīmatā
āvirbabhūvasahasāgaṅgāmūrtimatīdvija
dadarśapuratogaṅgāṃ dvibhujāṃ makarāsanām
kundenduśaṅghadhavalāṃ sarvālaṅkārabhūṣitām
tāṃ dṛṣṭvāpuratogaṅgāṃ gaṅgāgaṅgetikīrtayan
vavandecaraṇautasyāḥ śirasāliṅgyamedinīm
mohayantī smitālokaiḥ suprītāparameśvarī
mayātvandṛśyatesākṣātsādhyaṃ kimaparaṃ mama
tathāpy ekaṃ varaṃ yācetvannīreparameśvari
mayākṛtenastotreṇayastvāṃ stautisadeśvari
gaṅgovāca
anayābhavatobhaktyāsaṃ tuṣṭāsmidvijottama
śīghraṃ tekuśalaṃ sarvaṃ bhaviṣyati na saṃśayaḥ
tvayākṛtamidaṃ stotraṃ trisamdhyaṃ yaḥ paṭhennaraḥ
tasyāhamapisaṃ tuṣṭādāsyāmimuktimuttamām
vyāsa uvāca
kālakalpo'pipāpātmāsiktogaṅgāmbuśīkaraiḥ
prāptavānuttamaṃ mokṣamanyeṣāṃ kākathādvija
anicchayāpigāṅgeyaṃ jalaṃ spṛṣṭvāphalānvitam
gaṅgāsamaṃ nāstitīrthaṃ bhūyobhūyomayocyate
yadambukaṇikāṃ spṛṣṭvāparamandhāmalabhyate
yebhaktibhāvenasaridvarāyāḥ spṛśanti yeṃ 'bhaḥ kaṇikāmapīha
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe kriyāyogasāre
gaṅgāśīkaramāhātmye
aṣṭamo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
gaṅgākathāsudhāpānaṃ kurumuktiṃ yadīcchasi
dānaṃ dattaṃ tenasarvaṃ tenasarvemakhāḥ kṛtāḥ
gaṅgāyāṃ dharmakarmāṇi kriyante yāni kāni ca
akṣayānibhavaṃ yasya tānisarvāṇijaimine
vahaṃ taṃ jalamālokyagāṅgeyānijalāniyaḥ
gaṅgājaleṣvāgateṣuyonotiṣṭhatibhaktitaḥ
paśutāśāśvatī tasya janmajanmanijaimine
gāṅgeyaṃ jalamāsādyayonagṛhṇātibhaktitaḥ
janmakoṭyarjitaṃ puṇyaṃ kṣaṇādevatunaśyati
gaṅgātīraṃ jigamiṣuṃ yas tu vārayatedvija
mūtraṃ vāthapurīṣaṃ vāgaṅgātīrekarotiyaḥ
nadṛṣṭāniṣkṛtis tasya kalpakoṭiśatair api
śleṣmāṇaṃ vāpiniṣṭhīvandūṣikāṃ vāśruvāmalam
gaṅgātīretyajed yas tu sanūnaṃ nārakībhavet
gaṅgārodhasiyaḥ pāpaṃ kurute mūḍhadhīrnaraḥ
tadakṣayabhavennūnaṃ nānyatīrtheṣuśāmyati
anyatīrthe kṛtaṃ pāpaṃ gaṅgāyāṃ ca vinaśyati
gaṅgāyāṃ yat kṛtaṃ pāpaṃ tat kutrāpi na śāmyate
tasmāt pāpaṃ na kartavyaṃ gaṅgāyāṃ śāstrakovidaiḥ
karmaṇāmanasāvācākartavyodharmasaṅgrahaḥ
nadeśānateśailānacatānivanānica
pāpavidhvaṃsinī yatra natiṣṭhetsuranimnagā
bhikṣānnamapibhuktvācasthātavyaṃ jāhnavītaṭe
nacān yatra kṣaṇamapiprāpyabhūpālatāmapi
śrūyatāṃ mānavāḥ sarvebhūyobhūyobramīmyaham
snānaṃ vidhāya gaṅgāyāṃ gamyatāṃ paramaṃ padam
mṛtyukālebhajed yas tu gaṅgāgaṅgetimānavaḥ
mṛtyukālebhaved yas tu gaṅgāmṛtpuṇḍramuttamam
śmaśāne'pidvijaśreṣṭha sagaṅgāmaraṇaṃ labhet
tiṣṭhaty asthīni gaṅgāyāṃ yāvat kālaṃ śarīriṇaḥ
tāvatkalpasahasrāṇiviṣṇulokemahīyate
yasya majjanti gaṅgāyāṃ bhasmāsthīni nakhāni ca
śiroruhāṇyapiprājṣaḥ saviṣṇor bhuvanaṃ vaset
sthiteṣv asthiṣu gaṅgāyāṃ yat karma labhate naraḥ
bravīmitatphalaṃ sarvaṃ śṛṇu nānyamanādvija
ekadābhagavāṣchakronānālaṃ kārabhūṣitaḥ
krīḍāgṛhaṃ yayaukāmīyuvatyāpadmagaṃ dhayā
padmagaṃ dhārasajṣāsāsamprāptanavayauvanā
sapatnyāḥ svarṇaparyaṃ ketasyāḥ śiśumṛgīdṛśaḥ
prītaḥ pādatale jiṣṇuruvāsasmaramohitaḥ
atha tasya isvayaṃ śakronirmāyasvarṇavīṭikām
dadātiparamaprītastadguṇākṛṣṭamānasaḥ
bhūṣaṇair bhūṣitā sarvaiḥ svayaṃ tadgṛhamāyayau
dṛṣṭvā tathā vidhaṃ śakraṃ sarvadevādhipaṃ prabhum
bhṛśaṃ cukopapaulomīprāheticasulakṣaṇā
śacy uvāca
mamadāsīsvarūpāyaidadāsisvarṇavīṭikām
spṛśanti tridaśāḥ sarveśirasācaraṇautava
tvaṃ kathaṃ padmagandhāyādāsyāḥ pādataleprabhoḥ
yācitaścasugandhitvādbhṛṃ gaḥ syānacatadyaśaḥ
tvamīśvarīcaparyaṃ keśakraḥ pādataletava
vyāsa uvāca
tayānirbhair tsatāsādhvīpaulomyābahudhātataḥ
uvācapadmagandhāsākrodhāditivarāṃ ganā
guṇaṃ camamadoṣaṃ casvayaṃ svāmyevavettivai
kenādhikāreṇāgatyatvaṃ māṃ nindasinirguṇe
yathā doṣohilokānāṃ pracarennaguṇaṃ tathā
ādaukalaṃ kaścandrasyadṛśyateguṇavajjanaiḥ
anarthabhāṣiṇīkrūrākumūrtirguṇavarjitā
yadāhaṃ nāsmiguṇinībhajatutvāntadāpatiḥ
vyāsa uvāca
ityuktvāpadmagaṃ dhāsākrodhātkokanadekṣaṇā
priyeprāṇeśvariśreṣṭhemāṃ vihāyakvagacchasi
kāṃ tedāso'smy ahaṃ nūnaṃ dāsakarmakaromite
dāsapatnībhaveddāsīvākyaṃ tvaṃ naśṛṇo'ṣikam
samutthāyatataḥ śakrastanmohākulamānasaḥ
aṃ keniveśayāmāsabhūyastāṃ varasundarīm
śacy uvāca
tvaṃ svāmisubhagānityaṃ durbhagāhaṃ barāṃ ganā
yāvatpuṇyakṣayaṃ krauṃ citatpuṇyaṃ yāsyatekṣayam
krauṃ cavaṃ śasamutpannāduḥkhaṃ bhūyo'pibhokṣyasi
dvandvabhāvaṃ parityajyapraṇamyovācatāṃ satīm
krauṃ cīkathamahaṃ brūhiśrotum icchāmi yatnataḥ
kāhaṃ kutra sthitācāpikathamatrāgatāsatī
kālaiḥ kiyadbhirmatpuṇyaṃ kṣīṇatvaṃ pratiyāsyati
śacy uvāca
amedhyamāmiṣaṃ kīṭānbhakṣayantī kṣitausthitā
tatra nīḍaṃ vinirmāyabhavatyāvasatiḥ kṛtā
ekadākṛṣṇasarpeṇa tasmin nyagrodhapādape
nīḍaṃ praviśyadaṣṭātvaṃ sahasāpaṣcatāṃ gatā
sthitāni tatra ivāsthīninirmāṃ sānivarānane
bhagnaḥ papāta gaṅgāyāṃ samūlo'pi varāṅgane
gaṅgāyāṃ patite tasmin nyagrodhe dharaṇīruhe
gaṅgājalaiḥ plāvitāni tāny asthīni tavottame
yāvad asthīni gaṅgāyāṃ tāvat tiṣṭhanti tāni ca
dhanyātujāhnavīdevīkrauṃ cīyasyāḥ prasādataḥ
tvamaspṛśyāsicāṇḍālair aṃ ksvapiṣivajriṇaḥ
tenāpamānitāsādhvīśakreṇāpipulomajā
parimlānamukhāṃ bhojāsājagāma yathā gatā
śakrāṃ ka evasātasthaupadmagandhāvarāṃ ganā
tadvākyaṃ hṛdayetasyājāgarūkamivasthitam
athaikadāsurādhīśaḥ suprītastadguṇair dvija
varaṃ varayasuśroṇisvayaṃ tāmity uvācaha
tvaṃ sarvadevatādhīśonārīkoṭipatisthatā
tathāpi tvaṃ varaṃ ditsuryadānūnaṃ surottama
karmaṇāmanasāvācāpratijṣāṃ kurumatpuraḥ
ājṣāpayakimetadvaitubhyaṃ dāsyāmisundari
kṛtapratijṣaḥ suśroṇivaraṃ te'haṃ dadāmivai
kiṃ tuduḥkhāniyātānibahūnihṛdayemama
tvāmadṛṣṭvāvarāroheprītirnaprāpyatekṣaṇam
tadākiyaddinanti ṣṭhamayāsahavarāṅgane
varṣāṇāmayutaṃ tasthausādevanilayesatī
ājṣāṃ dehisurādhīśasādhituṃ sumanoratham
krīḍantī padmagaṃ dhāsātasthauvarṣāyu tatra yam
surādhīśaṃ tataḥ setitadāprāhamudānvitā
ādeśaṃ kurugacchāmipṛthivīṃ pratisamprati
jāḍyaṃ jahīhisuśroṇitiṣṭhātraivamayāsaha
tvāṃ tyaktuṃ na hi śaknomiprāṇebhyo'pigarīyasīm
puṇyakṣayesurādhīśayadāyāsyāmyahaṃ bhuvi
tadāgacchapunaḥ śīghramāgamiṣyasisundari
dorbhyāmāliṅgyatāṃ śakrogacchetyāhapriyevadan
tadādeśāttataḥ sādhvīkarmabhūmiṃ samāgatā
jātācahastinīyonaubhūtvājātismarādvija
jagāmajāhnavītīraṃ hastiyonisusambhavā
gaṅgāyāṃ snānam āsādya gaṅgā kardamabhūṣitā
gaṅgā gaṅgeti jalpantī hradaṃ nimnaṃ viveśasā
tasmin gaṅgāhradegatvāhastinīparvatākṛtiḥ
nijāṃ jātiṃ smarantī sājagāmapaṣcatāṃ punaḥ
tasyāḥ sāhasamālokyahastinīṃ sarvadevatāḥ
vavarṣuḥ pārijātādyaiḥ kusumair uttamair mudā
tāmānetuṃ tataḥ śakraḥ sarvadevagaṇair vṛtaḥ
vegāttacciravicchedātkṛṣṇāṃ gīṃ sumanāyayau
puṣpaketāṃ samālokyadivyadehāṃ surādhipaḥ
kathayannijaduḥkhāninijāvāsaṃ jagāmaha
pulomajācaraṃ bhācapramlocācorvaśī tathā
sundaryo'nyāścayuvatīstasyās tyaktvā mudāgatāḥ
śakrasyahṛdayotsāhaṃ tanvantī sāvarāṃ ganā
yasyās tiṣṭhanti gaṅgāyāṃ yāvad asthīni jaimine
kulakoṭiśataṃ tāvattasthāvāsasurālaye
rājānodivirājyeṣuyeyebhūtāstapobalāt
teṣāṃ teṣāṃ snehabhūmirbhavatyamarasundarī
gaṅgāsthimajjanādevajaiminephalamīdṛśam
gaṅgāyāṃ tyajato dehaṃ phalaṃ vaktuṃ na śakyate
mṛtaṃ śarīraṃ gaṅgāyāṃ yāvad asthīni jaimine
kalpakoṭiśataṃ tāvat tasyā vāsaḥ surālaye
mṛtaṃ śarīraṃ gaṅgāyāṃ srotobhiś calitaṃ dvija
dṛśyate dehinas tasya tatphalaṃ śṛṇu jaimine
svarge devāṅganātrastacārucāmaravāyubhiḥ
vījitaḥ svarṇaparyaṃ kesuptastiṣṭhatikautukī
jāhnavīsaikate yasya śarīraṃ dṛśyatemṛtam
divyāṅganābhiḥ sahitodivikrīḍatisarvadā
kākair gṛdhraiścakaṃ kaiścaśakuṃ tair bhīṣmamātari
vapurvidalitaṃ yasya dṛśyatetatphalaṃ śṛṇu
dividivyāṃ ganāpīnaprottuṅgarucirastanaiḥ
śliṣṭavakṣāścaparyaṃ kenidrātinityamevasaḥ
pipīlikābhiḥ kīṭaiścamakṣikābhiścaveṣṭitaḥ
gaṅgāyāṃ yasya dṛśyante asthīni patitāni ca
tasyākṣayaṃ phalaṃ vipravadatomeniśāmaya
praṇamattridaśavyūhaśiromukuṭabhūṣaṇaiḥ
anicchayāpigaṅgāyāṃ yaddehapatanaṃ bhavet
yasyāṃ gārāścadṛśyaṃ tegaṅgāyāṃ calitājalaiḥ
aṅgārasaṅkhyayāsvargetiṣṭhetkalpaśatādhikam
sarveṣām evapuṇyānāṃ kadācitkṣayamīkṣate
gaṅgāyāṃ patitedehebhavetpuṇyakṣayo na hi
gaṅgāyāṃ tyaktadehasyamahimājṣāyate na hi
viṣamaduritarāśīnāśi gāṅganaro yaḥ
spṛśati bhuvi kadācid bhāvuko bhaktibhāvaiḥ
vrajati sapāramapāratuṣṭināvā
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe kriyāyogasāre
gaṅgāmāhātmye'ṣṭamo'dhyāyaḥ
navamo'dhyāyaḥ
bhūya evagurobrūhigaṅgāmāhātmyamuttamam
gaṅgākathāmṛtaṃ pātuṃ mādhuryātpunariṣyate
vyāsa uvāca
tadapyahaṃ bravīmitvāṃ gaṅgābhaktoyatobhavān
taupādausaphalaunṝṇāṃ jāhnavītaṭagāminau
gaṅgākallolaninadaśrāviṇauśravaṇaucatau
sājihvayācajānātisvādubhedaṃ tadambhasaḥ
tallalāṭamiti proktaṃ gaṅgāmṛtpuṇḍradhāriyat
tauhastaujāhnavītīreharipūjāparāyaṇau
śarīraṃ saphalaṃ taccavimalejāhnavījale
samdṛśyahṛṣṭāḥ śaṃ santi vadaṃ taitijaimine
tatpuṇyaṃ kṛtamasmābhiḥ sadgatiprāptayepurā
bhaviṣyaty akṣayaṃ taccayataḥ putro'yamīdṛśaḥ
gaṅgāyāṃ yānidravyāṇidāsyatyasmākamātmajaḥ
asmabhyaṃ tānisarvāṇibhaviṣyanty akṣayāṇivai
vadantīti sutaṃ dṛṣṭvāgacchaṃ taṃ jāhnavītaṭam
kṛtāniyānipāpāninarakakleśadānivai
yāsyanti saṃ kṣayaṃ tāniputrasyāpiprasādataḥ
athaputraprasādenayāsyāmaḥ paramāṃ gatim
yātrāṃ vidhāyayomartyogṛhaṃ mohānnivartate
nirāśāḥ pitaras tasya yānti sarve yathā gatāḥ
āmiṣaṃ maithunaṃ caiva dolāmaśvaṃ gajaṃ tathā
upānahaṃ cātatapatraṃ gaṅgāyātrāsuvarjayet
asatyabhāṣaṇaṃ caiva pākhaṇḍasaṅgam eva ca
atyantahāsyaśokaṃ cagaṅgāyātrāsuvarjayet
maṃ casuptamivātmānaṃ cintayedbhūmiśāyinam
gaṅgānāmasunāmānivadedgacchaṣjanaḥ pathi
māhātmyaṃ jāhnavīdevyāḥ sarvapāpapraṇāśanam
hā kathaṃ sadanaṃ tyaktamāgataṃ vā kathaṃ mayā
svapāmiprāntarebhūmau kathaṃ vāhaṃ samāgataḥ
dhanadhānyādivastūnāṃ kāgatirvāgṛhemama
gaṅgā snānaphalaṃ teṣāṃ sampūrṇaṃ nabhaveddvija
gaṅgegantuṃ pratītīreyātreyaṃ vihitātava
imaṃ mantraṃ samuccāryayātrākāleviśeṣataḥ
nātivegenagaṃ tavyaṃ na tathā caśanaiḥ śanaiḥ
gaṅgāyātrāsukartavyaṃ nānyatkarmavicakṣaṇaiḥ
gaṅgātīreprayāgetuvāṇijyapramukhānica
kāryāṇikurute yas tu tatpuṇyārdhaṃ vinaśyati
janmajanmārjitaṃ pāpaṃ svalpaṃ vādivābahu
gaṅgādevīprasādenasarvaṃ meyāsyatikṣayam
ityuktvāparamaprītaḥ prājṣogaṅgātaṭaṃ vrajet
dṛṣṭvācamātaraṃ gaṅgāmimaṃ mantramudīrayet
sākṣādbrahmasvarūpāṃ tvāmapaśyamiticakṣuṣā
ityuktvāsakalaṃ dehaṃ nipātyapṛthivītale
praṇamejjāhnavīṃ devīṃ bhaktibhāvasamanvitaḥ
tataḥ srotaḥ samīpecabaddhāṣjalirimaṃ punaḥ
gaṅgedevijagaddhātripādābhyāṃ salilaṃ tava
spṛśāmītyaparādhaṃ meprasannākṣaṃ tumarhasi
svargārohaṇasopānaṃ tvadīyamudakaṃ śubhe
ataḥ spṛśāmipādābhyāṃ gaṅgedevi namo namaḥ
tatastumastakedhṛtvāgāṃ geyaṃ vāribhaktitaḥ
snānārthaṃ praviśetsrotaḥ prājṣogaṅgetikīrtayan
mayāsaṃ lipyategātraṃ mātarmeharapātakam
gaṅgākardamaliptāṅgogaṅgāgaṅgetikīrtayan
sarvakalmaṣanāśinyāṃ gaṅgāyāṃ snānamācaret
bhūyaḥ pūrvoktamantreṇagṛhītvāmṛttikāntataḥ
vakṣyamāṇenamantreṇagṛhītvāmṛttikāṃ punaḥ
vakṣyamāṇenamantreṇabhaktitaḥ snānamācaret
tatonijecchayāvipragaṅgāyāṃ lokamātari
snānaṃ samācaretprājṣogaṅgānārāyaṇaṃ smaran
evaṃ snātvātugaṅgāyāṃ gātraṃ vastreṇamārjayet
paridheyāṃ barāṃ būnigaṅgāsrotasinatyajet
nadantadhāvanaṃ kuryādgaṅgāgarbhevicakṣaṇaḥ
kuryāccenmohataḥ puṇyaṃ nagaṅgāsnānajaṃ labhet
prabhāte'n yatra tāṃ kṛtvādaṃ takāṣṭhādikakriyām
rātrivāsamparityajyagaṅgāyāṃ snānamācaret
bāhyabhūmimagatvāyogaṅgāyāṃ snānamācaret
gaṅgāsnānaphalaṃ so'pisampūrṇaṃ calabhen na hi
snātvācagaṅgāmṛtpuṃ ḍraṃ sthānesthānenayedbudhaḥ
tataḥ sthiramanāḥ kuryādvidhinātarpaṇādhikam
gaṅgāyāṃ kurute yas tu pitṛśrāddhaṃ dvijottama
pitaras tasya tiṣṭhanti saṃ tuṣṭāstridaśālayam
samāpyasnānakarmāṇigaṅgāyāṃ samupoṣitaḥ
dānaṃ devārcanaṃ caiva jayo'nyāścakriyās tathā
kṛtāstuyāstugaṅgāyāṃ kṣayastāsāṃ navidyate
samāpyasnānakarmāṇigaṅgāyāṃ samupoṣitaḥ
kṛtapaṣcamahāyajṣogaṅgāpūjāṃ samācaret
gaṅgāyāḥ pratimāṃ devyāḥ śrīviṣṇoḥ pratimāṃ tathā
jāhnavīpratimābhāvānnālikerodakānivai
nikṣipejjāhnavītoyejāhnavīṃ hṛdisaṃ smaran
divyair gaṃ dhaiścadīpaiścaghṛtapūrṇasamujjvalaiḥ
dhūpaiḥ suvāsitaiś caiva nānāpuṣpamanoharaiḥ
pādyārghācamanīyaiścatāmbūlaiḥ khādirānvitaiḥ
stavair nānācanaivedyair gaṅgāṃ viṣṇuṃ capūjayet
tataḥ sampūjitāṃ devīṃ viṣṇuṃ caparameśvaram
aṃ gapradakṣiṇāṃ kuryādbhaktyāvāratrayaṃ budhaḥ
bhokṣyāmijahnutanayeśaraṇaṃ mebhavānaghe
evaṃ saṃ kalpyamatimānkarmaṇāmanasāgirā
rātraujāgaraṇaṃ kuryājjitanidro'tiharṣitaḥ
aśaktyācadvijaśreṣṭha phalāhārobhavedadhaḥ
prātargaṅgāṃ caviṣṇuṃ capunarabhyarcyajaimine
viprāyadakṣiṇāṃ dadyādvibhavasyānurūpataḥ
tataḥ sabandhubhiḥ sārdhaṃ pāraṇaṃ svayamācaret
tīrthopavāsamevaṃ yaḥ kurute jāhnavītaṭe
janmāntarārjitaiḥ pāpair vimuktoviṣṇurūpadhṛk
viṣṇoḥ puraṃ samāsādyaviṣṇunāsahamodate
kalpakoṭisahasrāṇikalpakoṭiśatānica
tatonārāyaṇādeśādbrahmalokaṃ sagacchati
tāvatkālaṃ brahmalokesthitvābrahmakṣayāttataḥ
gāṇapatyamavāpnotikimanyair bahubhāṣitaiḥ
tāvatkālaṃ śivapuresthitvāvaipuṇyavānnaraḥ
tenapuṇyātmanāsārdhaṃ vasedekāsanetataḥ
tatra bhuktvākhilānkāmānkalpakoṭiśatāvadhi
punarāgatyapṛthivīṃ cakravartīnṛpobhavet
pālayitvāciraṃ pṛthvīṃ jitvāvaisakalāinrapūn
āyuṣoṃ 'tecagaṅgāyāṃ sukhaṃ mṛtyumavāpnuyāt
bhūyaḥ sa evamāruhyavimānaṃ sumahāyaśāḥ
paramaṃ jñānamāsādyadurlabhaṃ mokṣamāpnuyāt
jāhnavītīrayātrāyāṃ daivād yasya bhavetpathi
paṣcatāso'piparamandhāmagacchen na saṃśayaḥ
satyadharmonāmarājādhārmikaścapriyaṃ vadaḥ
tretādvāparasamdhaucababhūvakṣitimaṇḍale
vijayānāmamahiṣī tasya bhūmipater abhūt
sundarīśīlayuktāsāpatisevāparāyaṇā
saptavarṣasahasrāṇibhuktvāvasumatīmimām
kādācitprāptakālo'sausadāraḥ paṣcatāṃ gataḥ
taudṛṣṭvādharmarājo'picitraguptam uvācaha
mūlādvicārayāmāsaprāhacetikṛtāṣjaliḥ
etayoḥ sakalaṃ karmaśṛṇu rājanvadāmyaham
śubhaṃ vāpyaśubhaṃ karmayadetābhyāṃ kṛtaṃ bhuvi
kiṃ cidasyānayopāyaṃ vadāmitadahaṃ śṛṇu
ekādātrāsitovyāghraiḥ kaścidekomṛgaḥ prabho
vanājjīvanarakṣārthamāgato'syasabhāṃ prati
tamāyāntaṃ samālokyabhūyo'yaṃ prāptakautukaḥ
jaghānahamṛgaṃ rājāśaraṇāgatamapyamum
tasmāt sadārobhūpo'yaṃ daṇḍanīyastvayāprabho
koṭikoṭikulair yuktānārakīsyān na saṃśayaḥ
śaraṇāgatarakṣāṃ yaḥ prāṇair apidhanair api
kurute yonarojṣānī tasya puṇyaṃ niśāmaya
yamājṣayātatodūtaiḥ sadāro'saumahīpatiḥ
asitulyānipatrāṇiyatasteṣāṃ caśākhinām
asipatravanaṃ prāhuratastadvaimanīṣiṇaḥ
sadāronarakaṃ bhejevyāghrabhakṣyāhvayaṃ tataḥ
bhaveccabhakṣyovyāghreṇavyāghrabhakṣyastataḥ smṛtaḥ
yugakoṭisahasrāṇisthitvā tatra sabhūpatiḥ
sadāro'janipāpāṃ tebhekayoniṃ gataḥ kṣitau
athaikadātenapathāpuṇyāhaṃ prāpyamānavāḥ
gacchanti jāhnavītīraṃ tāṃ staudadṛśaturdvija
varṣāibhvamohādyatsarvaṃ pāpaṃ karmakṛtaṃ mayā
adyāpikarmaṇātenaduḥkhamāvāṃ namuṃ cati
tyaktvā śarīraṃ gaṅgāyāṃ muktāḥ syuḥ pāpino'pi ca
kāyuktirbrūhitāṃ kāṃ tetitīrṣurduḥkhasāgaram
varṣābhvītadvacaḥ śrutvāprāhetivinayānvitā
varṣābhvy uvāca
duḥkhaṃ naśakyatesoḍhuṃ svāminnetadradrutaṃ kuru
tatastaudaṃ patīviprasmṛtvāgaṅgāṃ śubhapradām
sahasācakraturyātrāṃ maraṇāyopaharṣitau
apaśyatpāpakṛtkṣveḍaḥ kālasarpobhayaṃ karaḥ
darduraupāpinauyethāḥ prāptakālauyuvāntataḥ
athanūnaṃ bhakṣitavyaukṣudhitenamayāyuvām
ahamāsampurārājāsatyadharmāhvayaḥ kṣitau
iyaṃ cavijayānāmamahiṣīsaṃ sthitāmama
mayādurātmanāmohānnidṛtaḥ śaraṇaṃ gataḥ
tenaivakarmaṇābhuktaṃ ciraṃ duḥkhaṃ yamālaye
bhoktuṃ svakarmaṇaḥ śeṣaṃ bhekayonaustriyāsaha
so'haṃ yāto'smipāpenakṛtaṃ karmanamuṃ cati
satyamāvāṃ jigāmiṣūparamandhāmapannaga
vrajāvojāhnavītīraṃ śarīratyāgahetave
tyajāvivekatāṃ sarpanarakakleśadāyinīm
āvāṃ saṃ khādyabhavatobhaviṣyati sukhaṃ kiyat
āvayorhṛdayeviṣṇustavāpihṛdayehariḥ
ata evatvayāsārdhaṃ śatrutākābhujaṃ gama
prāṇihiṃsānakartavyākadāpi cavicakṣaṇaiḥ
āyuḥ putrāścadārāścasampadaścayaśāṃ sica
hiṃsāṃ datvāmanuṣyāṇāṃ haredduṣṭovidhiḥ svayam
kiṃ japaiḥ kiṃ tapobhirvākiṃ dānaiḥ kimucādhvaraiḥ
hiṃ setivarṇadvitayaṃ yasyāstihṛdayesadā
yaḥ prāṇihiṃ sakomartyaḥ sa evaharihiṃ sakaḥ
sarvaprāṇiśarīrasthobhagavānkamalāpatiḥ
ātmānaṃ bahudhāsṛṣṭvābhagavānbhūtabhāvanaḥ
saṃsārakautukāgārekrīḍecchiśurivasvayam
śarīriṇaḥ śarīraṃ hinilayaḥ paramātmanaḥ
paramātmāsvayaṃ viṣṇuratohiṃsāṃ vivarjayet
paraprāṇavināśenacātmatuṣṭirvidhīyate
kṣaṇaṃ syādātmanastuṣṭiran yasya prāṇasaṃ kṣayaḥ
dhīmānnātmaparijñānaṃ kadācitkurute na hi
aṃ haviṣṇurasauviṣṇuriticetasibhāvayet
paraduḥkhenayoduḥkhīsukhīyaśca paraśriyā
saṃsāre 'sminsavijṣeyaḥ sākṣādevahariḥ svayam
dhigastutatsukhaṃ nṝṇāṃ mohavaṃ citacetasām
sukhānivāpiduḥkhānidīyaṃ teyānijaṃ tave
acireṇaivatānismalabhaṃ tebhuvimānavāḥ
yadāsyātparahiṃsāyāṃ nūnaṃ menātipātakam
tadākathamahosṛṣṭaivedhasābhakṣyabhakṣakau
kiṃ tusarveṣubhakṣyeṣuhiṃsāsambhāvyate na hi
nārāyaṇoviśvarūpaḥ satyametan na saṃśayaḥ
sṛjatisvayamātmānamātmānaṃ rakṣatisvayam
ātmānaṃ svayamevāttisṛṣṭirevaṃ vidhāhareḥ
śakto'haṃ kiṃ yuvāṃ haṃ tuṃ kālarūpīsvayaṃ vidhiḥ
sampratipreṣayāmāsakāryesminmāṃ svayaṃ hariḥ
yuvāṃ sasarjayodevoyaścarakṣativāṃ sadā
kālarūpīsa evādyahanti hetuṃ vidhāya mām
vyāsa uvāca
gaṅgāgaṅgetijalpaṃ taumahatyākṣudhayāpathi
jāhnavītīrayātrāyāṃ pādepādejanāvimau
aśvamedhākhyayajṣānāṃ prāptavaṃ taumahāphalam
etayoḥ sadṛśonāstiśatakraturahaṃ yataḥ
nijādhikāreṇaivānyamavalaṃ byapuraṃ daraḥ
arghyahastaḥ pādacārīvṛtodevaiḥ samāyayau
atharambhorvaśī caiva sundaryo'nyāścaharṣitāḥ
ayaṃ puṇyātmanāṃ śreṣṭhorasajṣo'tyantasundaraḥ
āyāto'muṃ kariṣyāmisvavaśaṃ sevitaiḥ svakaiḥ
kācitkāṃ cidvadatyetajjānāmisakalāṃ kalām
ata evabhaviṣyāmikāṃ tāhamasyabhūpateḥ
kācitkāṃ ciditibrūyātteśakropivaśomama
kimatracitraṃ vaśagobhūpālo'yaṃ bhaviṣyati
bhartāmamāyaṃ capatirmamāyaṃ svāmīmamāyaṃ mamanātha eṣaḥ
uccāvacaṃ vipraniśamyatāsāṃ jagādakācidguṇinīrasajṣā
saudāsyakāṃ tāṃ nṛpatiḥ svayaṃ yāṃ bhajatyayaṃ kiṃ kalahenanāryaḥ
ājagmurhṛdayotsāhaiḥ sarvābharaṇabhūṣitāḥ
athataṃ nṛpatiśreṣṭhasadāraṃ gatakalmaṣam
pādyādyaiḥ pūjayāmāsuḥ prāheticapuraṃ daraḥ
bherīmṛdaṃ gamadhurīḍiṃ ḍimānakaniḥsvanaiḥ
karakaṃ kaṇanādaiścakaratālasvanais tathā
jayaśabdaiścadevānāṃ nākaḥ śabdamayo'bhavat
devāṅganācāruhastaśvetacāmaramārutaiḥ
vījitaḥ sarathārūḍhaḥ sadārastridivaṃ yayau
dattavānnijāsanārdhaṃ śubhovaikṣayaśaṃ kayā
rathamāruhyavaikuṃ ṭhaṃ yayaubhagavadājṣayā
paramaṃ jñānamāsādyāsadāromokṣamāptavān
jāhnavītīrayātrāyāṃ śarīraṃ tyajataḥ pathi
yadāyadādvijaśreṣṭha gaṅgāyāṃ snānamācaret
tadātadā'kṣayaṃ puṇyaṃ labhatemānavodhruvam
gaṅgāsarvāṇipāpānināśayantīti niścayaḥ
kuryātpunaḥ punaḥ pāpaṃ nacagaṅgāpunātitam
pāpabuddhiṃ parityajyagaṅgāyāṃ lokamātari
yatpuṇyagaṅgāsnānāttumānavānāṃ bhaveddvija
āsārāṇāṃ bhūmireṇoḥ saṃ khyāṃ kartuṃ tuśakyate
bhāgīrathīguṇāstenaśakyāvaktunacadvija
vicāryasarvaśāstrāṇitvadīyānimayocyate
gaṅgābhasisakṛtsnātvāmokṣamāpnotimānavaḥ
snānaṃ kūpajale'pi yas tu kurute gaṅgāṃ vicintyaprabhuṃ devānāṃ sakalārtaśokaduritatrāsaugha
vidhvaṃsinīm
gaṅgāprasādāddvija
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe kriyāyogasāre gaṅgāmāhātmyenavamo'dhyāyaḥ
daśamo'dhyāyaḥ
māhātmyametadgāṅgāyāstvatprasādācchrutaṃ mayā
idānīṃ śrotum icchāmiviṣṇupūjāphaguro
vyāsa uvāca
śṛṇu lakṣmīpater vatsasaparyāphalamuttamam
yacchrutvāmānavāḥ sarvelabhaṃ tejñānamuttamam
vipradvādaśamāseṣumāghādiṣusanātanaḥ
pūjitavyovidhānair yaiḥ śṛṇu tānivadāmyaham
māghemāsisamāyātesarvamāsottameśubhe
āmiṣaṃ maithunaṃ caiva tyājayed vaiṣṇavottamaḥ
prātaḥ śuklāṃ baradharaḥ kṛtapaṣcamahādhvaraḥ
saparyāmārabhedviṣṇoḥ sthiracittohimānavaḥ
īṣaduṣṇajalaiḥ śuddhaiḥ snāpayedviṣṇumavyayam
atiślathaiścaṃ danaiścaviṣṇor aṅgānilepayet
prakṣālitānipātrāṇijalahīnānikārayet
snāpayitvājagannāthamīṣaduṣṇenavāriṇā
salilair īṣaduṣṇaiścaprasnāpayatikeśavam
ihabhuṃ ktesukhaṃ sarvaṃ śeṣeyātiharer gṛham
yatnātprakṣālyapātrāṇikṛtvāśuddhānivāribhiḥ
yaḥ pūjayejjagannāthaṃ tasya puṇyaṃ niśāmaya
aṃ teyugasahasrāṇitiṣṭhetkeśavamandiram
prabhāteviśvasamdhyāyāṃ purataścakrapāṇinaḥ
jvalaṃ taṃ sthāpayedvahniṃ nir dhūmaṃ vaiṣṇavojanaḥ
śī tasya vāraṇārthāyasāyaṃ prātaścavaiṣṇavaḥ
māgheviṣṇvagratovahniṃ jvālayettatphalaṃ śṛṇu
yathaivātmā tathā viṣṇuḥ samdehonātravidyate
svapaṃ taṃ devadeveśaṃ paryaṃ koparikeśavam
ātmanaḥ kurute martyo yathā śītanivāraṇam
kṣīreṇasnāpayed yas tu māghemāsijanārdanam
tasmai devottamoviṣṇuḥ saṃ tuṣṭonadadātikim
tathā śītakṣayaṃ kuryāddivyavastreṇacakriṇaḥ
uddhṛtyakoṭipuruṣānsayāticakriṇaḥ padam
māghemāsecaśuklāyāṃ paṣcamyāṃ dvijasattama
ekādaśyāṃ capaṣcamyāṃ haripūjāviśeṣataḥ
tasya puṇyaphalaṃ vacmiśṛṇu vaiṣṇavajaimine
aṃ teviṣṇupuraṃ gatvāmanvantar acatuṣṭayam
bhuṃ ktemanoramānbhogānprasādāccakrapāṇinaḥ
punarāgatyadharaṇīṃ cakravartīnṛpobhavet
bhuṃ ktecabhogaṃ suciraṃ mṛtoyātiharer gṛham
paṣcamyāṃ vāpisaptamyāmekādaśyāṃ cajaimine
aśaktovaiṣṇavodadyātparamānnaṃ murāraye
kṛṣṇapakṣāddvijaśreṣṭha śuklapakṣeviśeṣataḥ
śuklapakṣetithiṣveṣudadyādannaṃ murāraye
ekāham api yo māghe viṣṇave daityajiṣṇave
sapūpaṃ pāyasaṃ dadyān na tasya durlabho hariḥ
tadakṣayaṃ bhavetpuṃ saḥ ko'pināsty atra saṃśayaḥ
māghemāsikṛtaṃ karmaśubhaṃ vāśubhamevavā
yāvanti svarṇapuṣpāṇidīyaṃ tecakrapāṇaye
tāvadyugasahasrāṇisthīyateviṣṇumandiram
māghemāsiviśeṣeṇapavitraṃ keśavapriyam
phalaṃ caṃ pakapuṣpasyabravīmyahaṃ viśeṣataḥ
ākarṇayadvijaśreṣṭha setihāsamanuttamam
suvarṇonāmabhūpālobalavānsarvaśāstravit
āryāvarteṣusarveṣubabhūvavipravarcasā
rājaśriyāvidyayācavayasācasabhūpatiḥ
pākhaṇḍamantriṇāṃ vākyair vinādoṣair apidvija
dhanalobhāttenarājṣādaṇḍyaṃ tesādhavo janāḥ
anyāyopārjitaṃ vittaṃ gītavādyādibhirvṛtaḥ
samastaṃ nāśayāmāsayajṣadānavivarjitaḥ
nacayācakasaṃ tuṣṭiṃ sarvadāpāpam ohitaḥ
nacakārātitheḥ pūjāṃ sadāpāpaparāyaṇaḥ
yayaucamandirānnityaṃ sabhūpaḥ pāpam aṃ diraḥ
kṛtānitenapāpāniyānyanyānyavivekinām
apivarṣaśataiḥ śaktaḥ saṃ khyātuṃ janitānikim
ekadāsamahīpālaḥ kāmenaparimohitaḥ
jagāmaveśyānilayaṃ niśītheduritāśayaḥ
tamāyāntaṃ tatodṛṣṭvābhūpālamujjvalāhvayā
prakṣālyatatpādayugaṃ bhṛṃ gārasalilaiścasā
maṃ ceniveśayāmāsadorbhyāmāliṅgyataṃ nṛpam
tatpremāmṛtadhārābhiḥ sikto'saupṛthivīpatiḥ
tataḥ sā gaṇikā prītyā hasantī navayauvanā
puṣpamālāpuṣpamekaṃ tasmād bhūpatihastataḥ
papātadharaṇīpṛṣṭhegandhavyāptadigantaram
taccyutaṃ kusumandṛṣṭvāsarājā'tyantasambhramāt
namonārāyaṇāyeti jagādoṅkārapūrvakam
nārāyaṇāyetivākyātsarvāṇipātakānica
svarṇapuṣpapradānena tasya naṣṭānibhūbhujaḥ
grāmīṇā athasarve'pisamāgatyātidurjaye
tasyāmevaniśāyāntaṃ jaghnurveśyāgṛhesthitam
netuṃ tamathabhūpālaṃ sarvapātakināṃ varam
kiṃ karānpreṣayāmāsakruddhovaivasvatobhṛśam
tenājṣaptāstatodūtāḥ pāśamudgarapāṇayaḥ
ativegātsamāyātāḥ krodhasaṃ raktalocanāḥ
udyamaṃ cakrirenetuṃ yamadūtāḥ svamālayam
tatonārāyaṇapreṣyāḥ śaṅkhacakragadādharāḥ
āyātāgaruḍārūḍhāstaṃ netuṃ pṛthivīpatim
pāśeniyaṃ tritaṃ dṛṣṭvātaṃ bhūpaṃ viṣṇukiṃ karāḥ
jaghnuścakrair gadābhiścayamadūtānmahābalāḥ
tathā rājārathārūḍhastulasīmālyabhūṣitaḥ
pītakauśeyavāsāścasvarṇālaṃ kārabhūṣitaḥ
stūyamānomunigarṇair vedavedāṅgapāragaiḥ
viṣṇudūtaiḥ parivṛtohareḥ sālokyamāyayau
athotthāyasvayaṃ viṣṇuścaturbhir dīrghabāhubhiḥ
tamāliṃ gitavānbhūpaṃ proktavāṃ ścadvijottama
śrībhagavān uvāca
nṛpatekuśalaṃ brūhisarvapuṇyātmanāṃ vara
nityaṃ tasyānupālyo'haṃ samebhrātāsamepitā
nārāyaṇetimannāmakadācidyaḥ smerannaraḥ
prakāśayādbhutaṃ tātakiṃ tedāsyāmicādhunā
rājovāca
sarvam evadayāsindhotvayādattaṃ na saṃśayaḥ
pāpināpimayāprāptaṃ tavasthānaṃ sudurlabham
snehānniveśayāmāsabhūpālaṃ tanniśāmaya
tataḥ suvarṇālaṃ kārair viśvakarmavinirmitaiḥ
cakāramaṇḍalaṃ tasya svayamevadayāmayā
toṣitaḥ samahīpāloviṣṇunātisahiṣṇunā
evaṃ pratidinaṃ tasthausarājāviṣṇumandiram
prajānāṃ pālanaṃ cakresarājādharmatatparaḥ
pūjayāmāsasatataṃ bhaktyāparamayāhariḥ
āyuḥ śeṣesabhūpālomaraṇaṃ jāhnavījale
samāsādyayayaumokṣaṃ prasādāccakrapāṇinaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
capaṃ kair harimabhyarcyamuktāḥ syuḥ pāpinojanāḥ
sphuṭacaṃ pakapuṣpeṇapūjitobhagavānhariḥ
te'piyānti paraṃ dhāmavimuktāḥ sarvapātakaiḥ
jagāmamokṣaṃ kṛpayāmurārerviśvārṇavaṃ nimnamimaṃ vitīrya
divyaiḥ sugandhaiḥ kanakaprasūnair nārāyaṇaṃ padmadalāyatākṣam
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe kriyāyogasāre
daśamo'dhyāyaḥ
ekādaśo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
tamahaṃ vacmiviprarṣeśṛṇu vatsasamāhitaḥ
kalyautthāyaparyaṃ kādgṛhītvāpātramaṃ bhasām
bahir deśaṃ vrajetprājṣaḥ śīrṣamācchādyavāsasā
tatrodīcyāṃ diśimaunīyajṣasūtrāṇikarṇayoḥ
kṛtvopaviṣṭaḥ prājṣastumalamūtraṃ visarjayet
devatāyatane mārge goṣṭheṣu ca tvareṣu ca
rathyāyāṃ kṛṣṭabhūmau ca darbhamūle tathāṅgaṇe
taṭinīpuline caityavṛkṣamūle tathā vane
taḍāgavāpīgarbheṣu malamūtraṃ ca na tyajet
raviṃ candramasaṃ caiva dvijāngāścadiśodaśa
malamūtraṃ tyajedyāvattāvatprājṣonapaśyati
khanitāṃ mūṣikādyaiścabilābhyantar avartinīm
phālakṛṣṭāṃ mṛdaṃ caiva nagṛhṇīyācchaucahetave
jalājjalaṃ samānīyaśaucaṃ kuryādvicakṣaṇaḥ
pādaṃ jaleṣuvaidatvānaśaucaṃ kurute budhaḥ
dakṣiṇābhimukhorātraukruryātprājṣobahiḥ kriyām
śiraḥ prāvṛtyavastreṇatataḥ śaucaṃ samācaret
pādayoḥ ṣaṭapadātavyāmṛttikācavicakṣaṇaiḥ
kṛtaśaucakriyaḥ prājṣaḥ kuryāddaṃ tasya dhāvanam
jihvapāmārjanaṃ caiva daśanācchādanādibhiḥ
dakṣiṇābhimukhobhūtvāpaścimābhimukhas tathā
madhyamānāmikābhyāṃ cavṛddhāṃ guṣṭhenacadvija
daṃ tasya dhāvanaṃ kuryānnatarjanyākadācana
aśvatthavaṭavṛkṣāṇāṃ dhātryākaithikayābudhaḥ
nirāśāḥ pitaroyānti tasya devāḥ surarṣayaḥ
daṃ tasya dhāvanaṃ kuryādyomadhyāhnāparāhṇayoḥ
tasya pūjāṃ nagṛhṇanti devatāḥ pitarojalam
snānakālepuṣkariṇyāṃ yaḥ kuryāddantadhāvanam
tatojṣeyaḥ sacāṃ ḍāloyāvadgaṅgāṃ napaśyati
taddaṃ takāṣṭhaṃ pitarobhuktvāgacchanti duḥkhinaḥ
prabhātemārjayeddaṃ tānvāsasārasanāṃ tathā
anenavidhinākṛtvādīrghadarśībahiḥ kriyām
tatodevagṛhadvārecopaviṣṭobudhaḥ śuciḥ
smarennārāyaṇaṃ devamanaṃ taṃ parameśvaram
rāmaśyāmatanoviṣṇonārāyaṇadayāmaya
pītāṃ baradharānaṃ tapadmanābhajaganmaya
vāmanapraṇatasyeśavibhotvaṃ śaraṇaṃ bhava
dāmodarayaduśreṣṭhaśrīkṛṣṇakaruṇārṇava
kamalekṣaṇadevendravāsudevakṛpāṃ kuru
śaṃ khapāṇecakrapāṇepadmahastaharāpadaḥ
lakṣmīvilāsavaikuṃ ṭhahṛṣīkeśasurottama
puruṣottamakaṃ sārekaiṭabhārebhayaṃ hara
śrīpateśrīdharavibhośrīdaśrīkaramādhava
paraṃ brahmaparaṃ dhāmaśaraṇaṃ mebhavāvyaya
itthaṃ kṛtvādvijaśreṣṭha śrīviṣṇusmaraṇaṃ budhaḥ
vaddhāṃ jaliritibrūtepraviśyanilayaṃ gataḥ
īśvaraśrīpatekṛṣṇadevakīnaṃ danaprabho
nidrāṃ tyaktvā salakṣmīkaṃ cintayennijacetasā
tataḥ kṛtacchadaṃ divyaṃ pātraṃ cajalapūritam
mukhaprakṣālanārthāyadadyātkṛṣṇāyavaiṣṇavaḥ
īśvaraṃ vartanārthāyasevatesevakā yathā
yatheśvarasyasabhayāḥ sevāṃ kurvanti ceṭakāḥ
nijecchayānayāviṣṇuṃ nirbhayaḥ pūjayennaraḥ
ata evadvijaśreṣṭha tvarayākamalāpateḥ
kartavyāsarvadāsevāpuṃ sākaivalyamicchunā
nirmālyaṃ rātrivastraṃ cagaṃ dhaṃ paryuṣitaṃ tathā
hareruttārayedaṃ gātprabhātevaiṣṇavojanaḥ
kuryācchanaiḥ śanaiḥ prājṣaḥ saṃ mārjanyāpariiṣkrayām
tāvanmanvantar aśatanti ṣṭhedviṣṇugṛhenaraḥ
sopiyātiparaṃ dhāmakimanyair bahubhāṣitaiḥ
tasmin viṣṇugṛheprājṣaḥ smarennārāyaṇaṃ prabhum
tasya puṇyamahaṃ vacmisaṃ kṣepācchṛṇujaimine
tāvatkalpasahasrāṇitiṣṭhedviṣṇugṛhesukhī
saṃ mārjanaṃ viṣṇugṛhejanaḥ kṛtvopalepanam
tadāviṣṇugṛhecāpidharmapatnīṃ niyojayet
bhrātaraṃ bhaginīṃ vāpidevāgāreniyojayet
hareḥ saparyāvastūnisaptadhā śuddhavāribhiḥ
prakṣālayettridhāvāpisvayamevātiyatnataḥ
amlenatāmrapātrāṇikāṃ syapātrāṇibhasmanā
vahninālohapātrāṇiśudhyanti nātrasaṃśayaḥ
dhanāḍhyolohapātrasthair yaḥ snāpayativāribhiḥ
nārāyaṇaṃ jagannāthaṃ tasya tuṣṭonakeśavaḥ
ajṣānādvāpicettarhigaṅgāsnānenaśuddhyati
sampadibrāhmaṇaśreṣṭhakartavyoniyamaḥ sadā
vipattyāṃ niyamonāstiśāstreṣviti viniścayaḥ
yatnātprakṣālitaḥ śaṅkhoyadābhūmiṃ spṛśetpunaḥ
itthaṃ prakṣālyayatnenapūjādravyāṇicakriṇaḥ
gṛhītvā snānavastūnisnānārthaṃ sarasīṃ vrajet
akṛtvāsnānakarmāṇigṛhamāyātiyaḥ punaḥ
yas tu mohādvjaśreṣṭhasanūnaṃ nārakībhavet
snānārthaṃ sarasīṃ gatvāmalamūtraṃ karotiyaḥ
tataḥ kṛtvāvidhānenasnānaṃ catarpaṇādikam
svakīyaṃ gṛhamāgacchetsmarennārāyaṇaṃ budhaḥ
tataścaprāṃ gaṇevipraprakṣālyacaraṇadvayam
praviśeddevatāgāraṃ śucirbrāhmaṇasattamaḥ
aprakṣālitapādoyaḥ praviśennilayaṃ janaḥ
saṃ vatsarakṛtaṃ puṇyaṃ tasya naśyatitatkṣaṇāt
snānaṃ kṛtvāsamāgatyaprāṃ gaṇeṣuvicakṣaṇaḥ
tasmāt prakṣālyacaraṇaupraviśeddevatāgṛham
upaviśyapādayugmaṃ budhaḥ savyenapāṇinā
yatnātprakṣālayedvipra tathā pāṇidvayaṃ punaḥ
pādenapādaṃ viprendra tathā dakṣiṇapāṇinā
yaścaprakṣālayenmūḍhastaṃ lakṣmīstyajatidhruvam
athopaviṣṭomatimānkeśavārcanamārabhet
mṛgacarmāsaneśuddhavyāghracarmāsane'pivā
puṣpāsanecopaviṣṭaḥ pūjayetkamalāpatim
kāṣṭhāsanedvijovidvānnakuryyādviṣṇupūjanam
viṣṇunātvandhṛtāpṛithvasarvelokāstvayādhṛtāḥ
ityuktvāsanamāstīryavasennārāyaṇārcakaḥ
dakṣiṇābhimukhobhūtvāna kuryād viṣṇupūjanam
śaṅkhekṛtvātupānīyaṃ mantrapūtaṃ suvāsitam
snāpayetkamalākāntaṃ kamalāsahitaṃ prabhum
vipragostrībhrūṇahatyāsurāpānādipātakaiḥ
yadidṛṣṭvāhṛṣīkeśaṃ pūjayenmānavodvija
labhatetattadevāśuprasādātkamalāpateḥ
śaṃ khābhāvetuviprendrasugaṃ dhitoyakaṃ budhaḥ
kṛtvācatulasīṃ pātresnāpayetkeśavaṃ budhaḥ
tatodevaṃ snāpayitvāsaṃ sthāpyacavarāsane
tulasīkāṣṭhapaṃ kecacakriṇodehapālanam
alaṃ kṛtomahāviṣṇuḥ prasannonadadātikim
kṛṣṇorakṣatupūrvasyāmāgneyyāṃ devakīsutaḥ
yāmyāṃ rakṣatudaityārirnair ṛtyāṃ madhusūdanaḥ
vidikṣurakṣatuśrīmānūrdhvaṃ caśrīdharaḥ prabhuḥ
adhorakṣatuviśvātmākūrmamūrtiḥ kṛpāmayaḥ
yevighnakārakāḥ sarvepūjākālebhavanti ha
dūraṃ gacchaṃ tutesarveharināmāstratāḍitāḥ
itthaṃ digbandhanaṃ kṛtvātataḥ prahvaḥ kṛtāṃ jaliḥ
vakṣyamāṇenamantreṇasaṃ kalpaṃ kurute dṛḍham
mayārabdhāmimāṃ pūjāṃ devadevajanārdana
siṃ ddhiṃ prāpayanirvighnāṃ prasīdaparameśvara
aṃ ganyāsādikaṃ kṛtvādhyāyennārayaṇaṃ hṛdā
navīnameghasaṃ kāśaṃ puṃ ḍarīkanibhekṣaṇam
pītāṃ baradharaṃ devaṃ smitacārutarānanam
kadaṃ bapuṣpamālābhirbhūṣitaṃ sumahābhujam
barhirbaśreṇibaddhaśikhaṇḍadhṛtakuṃ ḍalam
vaṃ śīmadhuranādenamohayaṃ taṃ diśodaśa
āvṛtaṃ gopanārībhiścāruvṛṃ dāvanesthitam
evaṃ saṃ cintyadeveśaṃ govindaṃ sarvakāmadam
tataścāvāhanaṃ kuryādbhaktibhāvenavaiṣṇavaḥ
āvāhitāyakṛṣṇāyacaturvargapradāyine
pādyārghyācamanīyāni tatra dadyādvicakṣaṇaḥ
pūjayet sarvadeveśaṃ śrīkṛṣṇaṃ devakīsutam
namo matsyāya kūrmāya varāhāya namo namaḥ
namo rāmāya rāmāya rāmāya baline namaḥ
namo buddhāya śuddhāya sakṛpāya namo namaḥ
nārāyaṇāya kṛṣṇāya govindāya ca śārṅgiṇe
dāmodarāya devāya devadevāya te namaḥ
hṛṣīkeśāya śāntāya vyomapādāya vai namaḥ
mādhavāya sureśāya viṣṇave paramātmane
auṃ namo garuḍāyeti mantreṇaiva vicakṣaṇaḥ
namaḥ śaṃkhāya cakrāya gadāyai ca namo namaḥ
namaḥ padmāya khaḍgāya nandakāya namo namaḥ
iti sampūjya deveśaṃ sadāraṃ ca savāhanam
sāyudhaṃ ca tato mantraṃ japed aṣṭākṣaraṃ budhaḥ
nijabhaktyā tato japtvā mantram aṣṭākṣaraṃ budhaḥ
dhūpaṃ dīpaṃ ca tāmbūlaṃ devadevāya viṣṇave
anyāny apy upahārāṇi pradadyād vaiṣṇavo janaḥ
yas tu dhūpaṃ dvijaśreṣṭha caṃ danāgaruvāsitam
sagacchedviṣṇubhavanaṃ vimuktaḥ pāpakoṭibhiḥ
nārāyaṇāyayodhūpaṃ dadyādgugguluvāsitam
ghṛtenadīpaṃ yodadyāttilatailenavāpunaḥ
nimeṣātsakalaṃ tasya pāpaṃ haratikeśavaḥ
karpūravāsitaṃ yas tu tāmbūlaṃ cakrapāṇaye
ihabhuktvākhilānbhogānaṃ teyātihareḥ padam
ṣaṣṭhīmadhurikāyuktaṃ tathā jāti phalādibhiḥ
tāmbūlaṃ harayedatvāsvargamāpnotimānavaḥ
śaṅkhekṛtvātupānīyaṃ kuryādviṣṇupradakṣiṇām
vakṣyamāṇenamantreṇajaiminevaiṣṇavojanaḥ
mantreṇānenayaḥ kuryānnārāyaṇaprakṣiṇām
tasya puṇyaphalaṃ vacmisaṃ kṣepācchṛṇujaimine
brahmahatyādipāpāniyāniyānimahāṃ tica
tānitānipraṇaśyanti pradakṣiṇa padepade
yāvatpādaṃ narobhaktyāgacchedviṣṇupradakṣiṇe
tāvatkalpasahasrāṇiviṣṇunāsahamodate
haripradakṣiṇeyāvatpadaṃ gacchecchanaiḥ śanaiḥ
pradakṣiṇīkṛtyasarvaṃ saṃsāre yatphalaṃ bhavet
hariṃ pradakṣiṇīkṛtyatasmāt koṭiguṇaṃ phalam
aṃ gaṃ pradakṣiṇīkṛtya yas tu nārāyaṇāgrataḥ
nalaṃ ghayetsomasūtraṃ dhīmāṣśaṃ bhupradakṣiṇe
laṃ ghayitvāyadāviprasāpūjāniṣphalābhat
pradakṣiṇākāratayāvāraikaṃ yohariṃ vrajet
yas tu vāradvayaṃ viprakuryādviṣṇupradakṣiṇām
draṃ padamavāpnotitridinenātrasaṃśayaḥ
viṣṇupradakṣiṇaṃ yas tu kuryādvāradvayaṃ janaḥ
vimuktaḥ sakalaiḥ pāpaiḥ praviśenmādhavīṃ tanum
bhrāmayetsodakaṃ śaṅkhaṃ keśavoparijaimine
pātakaṃ taccharīrasthaṃ bhasmībhavati tatkṣaṇāt
śirasyaṃ jalimādhāyapraṇamedyojanārdanam
bhūmaunipātyasarvāṃ gaṃ hariṃ praṇamatāṃ nṛṇām
puṇyaprabhāvaṃ viprarṣevadatomeniśāmaya
yāvadbhūreṇubhirnṛṇāṃ bhūṣitaṃ syātkalevaram
tataḥ keśavanirmālyaṃ vaiṣṇavebhyaḥ pradīyate
vaiṣṇavāṃ stānpravakṣyāmiśṛṇu sattamajaimine
śukaḥ sūtas tathā vyāsonāradaḥ kapilomuniḥ
prahlādaścāṃ varīṣaśca tathā krūroddhavāvapi
bibhīṣaṇohanūmāṃ ścatathaivānye'pivaiṣṇavāḥ
nirmālyaṃ vāsudevasyagṛhṇaṃ tusarvakāmadam
ityuktvāviṣṇunirmālyaṃ nikṣipedbhuvivaiṣṇavaḥ
tatastuharinirmālyaṃ svayaṃ gṛhṇātibhaktitaḥ
savijṣeyodvijaśreṣṭha sākṣādevahariḥ svayam
durlabhaṃ viṣṇunaivedyaṃ nirmālyaṃ pāpanāśanam
gṛhṇanti tridaśāḥ sarvemanuṣyāṇāṃ cakākathā
tulasīchadanaghrāṇamāghrāyayo'bhinaṃ dati
kṛtāṃ jalistataḥ prājṣaimaṃ mantramudīrayet
yeyaṃ svaśaktyādevendratavapūjākṛtāmayā
tataḥ pādodakaṃ prājṣomahāviṣṇoḥ parātmanaḥ
samastapātakadhvaṃsigṛhṇīyādbhaktibhāvataḥ
kaṇamātraṃ vahed yas tu viṣṇoḥ pādodakaṃ śubham
spṛśetpādodakaṃ viṣṇor gaṅgāsnānaphalaṃ bhavet
gāṃ geyaṃ salilaṃ vipraviṣṇupādodakaṃ yataḥ
akālamaraṇaṃ nāstināstivyādhibhayaṃ tathā
yaḥ spṛśetpādasalilaṃ keśavasyamahātmanaḥ
pāpavyādhivināśārthaṃ viṣṇupādodakauṣadham
viṣṇupādodakaṃ viprayaḥ pibedvaiṣṇavojanaḥ
pātakaṃ taccharīrasthaṃ kṣaṇādevatunaśyati
tathaiva pātakaṃ sarvaṃ viṣṇupādodakenaca
viṣṇupādodakaṃ śuddhaṃ tulasī patrasaṃ yutam
brahmahatyādibhiḥ pāpair vimuktoviṣṇurūpadhṛk
aṃ teviṣṇupuraṃ gatvāviṣṇunāsahamodate
viṣṇupādodakaṃ spṛṣṭvātadbhavedadhikaṃ phalam
aśvakoṭipradānenatatphalaṃ prāpyatejanaiḥ
saptadvīpāṃ mahīṃ datvādvijebhyoyatphalaṃ labhet
tatphalaṃ labhatemartyoviṣṇupādodakaṃ spṛśan
viṣṇupādodakaṃ spṛṣṭvātadbhavedadhikaṃ phalam
dīrghikāśatadānenayatpuṇyaṃ parikīrtitam
tasmād apyadhikaṃ puṇyaṃ labhetpādodakaṃ spṛśan
viṣṇupādodakasparśānmuktobhavati mānavaḥ
viṣṇunaivedyaśeṣaṃ yaḥ sarvapāpavināśanam
bhuṃ jatoharinaivedyaṃ dāsīvavaśagābhavet
acireṇaivataṃ viṣṇurnayatisvāntanuṃ prati
naived yasya mahāviṣṇor guṇaṃ kiṃ kathayāmyaham
vidhihīnāmapiśreṣṭhāṃ pūjāṃ śrīkamalāpateḥ
pūjito'pi na tuṣṭaḥ syād yadi bhaktir na tiṣṭhati
tāvadevaphalāvāptis tasya nāsty atra saṃśayaḥ
abhaktyāyāhareḥ pūjākriyatebhuvimānavaiḥ
sāpūjābrāhmaṇaśreṣṭhapūjākālebhavetkila
jñānamūlaṃ harerbhaktirbhaktimūlaṃ jagatpateḥ
pūjāmokṣadrumotpattaumūlamārādhanaṃ hareḥ
tadakṣayaṃ bhavetsarvaṃ śraddhāyuktākhilākriyā
bhaktyāyaḥ pūjayed viṣṇuṃ vārimātram api dvija
saṃsthānaṃ labhate viṣṇor yato bhaktavaśo hariḥ
sāraṃ hareḥ pūjanameva vipra
tasmān manuṣyo nijamaṅgalaiṣī
bhaktyā yajet kṛṣṇam anantamūrtim
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe kriyāyogasāre
haripūjāvidhir nāma ekādaśo'dhyāyaḥ
dvādaśo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
phālgunebrāhmaṇaśreṣṭhaśrīkṛṣṇaṃ suravanditam
phalaṃ tasya pravakṣyāmiyataḥ samyaṅniśāmaya
aṃ teyātihareḥ sthānaṃ sarvapāpavivarjitaḥ
yugakoṭisahasrāṇibhukttvābhogaṃ harer gṛhe
yas tu yacchatikṛṣṇāyaśiśiregopamūrtaye
yodugdhalaḍḍukāndadyātkeśavāyamahātmane
nirmalāṃ śarkarāyacched yas tu kṛṣṇāyabhaktimān
yas tu yacchatikṛṣṇāyaphalaṃ tasya niśāmaya
aṃ teharer gṛhaṃ yātirathamāruhyaśobhanam
ajṣānādbrāhmaṇaśreṣṭhadadyāccennārakībhavet
phālgunemāsiyodadyāddharayedāḍimīphalam
tatra yāvanti bījānitiṣṭhanti dāḍimīphale
tāvanmanvantar aṃ viṣṇor gṛhetiṣṭhatibhāgyavān
phālgunemāsiyodadyāddharayeguḍapiṣṭakam
savijṣeyodvijaśreṣṭha vājimedhasahasrakṛt
madhunāsnāpayed yas tu nārāyaṇamanāmayam
caitrakejagatāmīśaṃ kṛṣṇanti lakapuṣpakaiḥ
kṛṣṇavaṃ julapuṣpeṇasarvadevaśiromaṇim
vāsantī bhiḥ sugaṃ dhībhirvasaṃ te yas tu pūjayet
taṃ vandatesamutthāyasvayaṃ pīṭhāsanopi ca
acireṇaivalabhatesakalaṃ vāṃ chitaṃ janaḥ
śāṃ ḍilyākhaṇḍapatraiścadhattūraiścārkapuṣpakaiḥ
yo'rcayedviṣṇumīśaṃ casasaṃsārābdhipāragaḥ
śakrādyāstridaśāḥ sarvevandaṃ tetamaharniśam
yodadyāccaitrakemāsibhaktyāgopālarūpiṇe
āmiṣaṃ maithunaṃ tailaṃ viṣṇubhaktaḥ parityajet
prāptaḥ samācaretsnānaṃ mādhavemāsivaiṣṇavaḥ
prabhātepūjayedviṣṇuṃ pūrvoktavidhinādvija
vaiśākhesnāpayedviṣṇuṃ puṣpavāsitavāriṇā
vaiśākhedamanasragbhirlakṣmīpatiralaṃ kṛtaḥ
nakiṃ dadātiviprarṣeprasannaḥ parameśvaraḥ
vaiśākhemāsiyodadyādyavānnaṃ cakrapāṇaye
tasya puṇyānisaṃ khyātuṃ kaḥ samartho'stipaṃ ḍitaḥ
vaiśākhemāsiyaḥ kuryātprapāṃ mādhavatuṣṭaye
ekāhamapiyaḥ pūjāṃ vaiśākhekurute hareḥ
paḍvarṣaṃ hariṃ pūjitvāyatphalaṃ labhatesatat
vaiśākhemāsiyonityaṃ viṣṇumaśvattharūpiṇam
gaṇḍūṣamātratoyena kuryād yo'śvatthasevanam
so'piyātiparaṃ sthānaṃ vimuktaḥ koṭipātakaiḥ
aśvatthamūlaṃ viprarṣeyobadhnātiśilādibhiḥ
so'piyātiparaṃ sthāna māyurbṛddhir na saṃśayaḥ
tatra tīrthānisarvāṇitristrotādīnijaimine
yatrāśvatthatarustiṣṭhedekopiśākhināṃ varaḥ
aśvatthaṃ pūjayed yas tu sa evaviṣṇupūjakaḥ
avajṣānāddvijaśreṣṭha yo'śvatthaṃ hanti mūḍhadhīḥ
aśvatthovṛkṣarājo'yaṃ harimūrtiḥ prakīrtitaḥ
tasmād aśvatthahaṃ tṝṇāṃ trātāko'pinavidyate
aśvatthaṃ paśyatovipraspṛśataḥ paratas tathā
vilokyāśvatthahaṃ tāraṃ yaḥ śaktonanivārayet
tasya jihvāṃ churikayāsvayaṃ kṛṃ tatipretarāṭ
aśvatthaśākhāmekāṃ yaḥ svalpāmapinihanti vai
sakoṭibrahmahatyānāṃ phalamāpnotimānavaḥ
yatpāpaṃ brahmahatyāyāṃ gurustrīgamanenaca
surāpāne tathā steyenyāsāpaharaṇe'pi ca
yatpāpaṃ bhrūṇahatyāyāṃ gohatyāyāṃ dvijottama
strīhatyāyāṃ cayatpāpaṃ parastrīgamane tathā
śaraṇāgata hatyāyāṃ hatyāyāṃ suhṛdas tathā
viśvāsavākyākathanepatihiṃsāvidhaucayat
yatpāpaṃ paraniṃ dāyāṃ harivāsarabhojane
aśvatthacchedanāddhoraṃ tatpāpaṃ prāpyatejanaiḥ
tattulyaḥ pātakīko'pinaśrutaḥ kṣitimaṃ ḍale
vadāmyaśvatthamāhātmyaṃ sarvapāpavināśanam
setihāsamdvijaśreṣṭha śṛṇu vatsasamāhitaḥ
āsīttretāyuge viprasarvaprāṇihiterataḥ
jṣātipūjāratonityaṃ dīpadānerataḥ sadā
mumukṣuḥ sadvijaśreṣṭha sarvadāparameśvaram
pūjayāmāsaparayābhaktyānārāyaṇaṃ prabhum
tasya bhaktiṃ tatojṣātvāmahatīṃ sudṛḍhāṃ prabhuḥ
tathāpi sadvijaśreṣṭha ḥ keśavasyamahātmanaḥ
pūjāmanudinecakrebhaktyāparamayāsudhīḥ
duḥkhenopārjitaṃ vittaṃ vinaṣṭaṃ sakalaṃ dvija
dṛṣṭvāpitenavipreṇaduḥkhenācintyacetasā
mahāviṣṇusaparyāyāṃ dṛḍhaṃ baddhvāmanonijam
bhūyo'pi tasya viprasya bhaktiṃ jṣātvājanārdanaḥ
cakārabandhuvicchedaṃ sudṛḍhaḥ śamadastataḥ
bāndhavās tasya viprasyaviṣṇumāyāvimohitāḥ
pūjayāmāsasatataṃ prītaḥ pracurabhaktitaḥ
bhūya evamahāviṣṇuḥ kautukī tasya jaimine
tathāpi sadvijaśreṣṭha ḥ keśavaṃ kleśanāśanam
pūrvadviguṇayābhaktyānityaṃ viṣṇumapūjayat
tasya patnītatovipraduḥkhaśokātiduḥkhitā
pitṛgehaṃ gatāviṣṇor māyayāparimohitā
athaikākīsabhūdevoviṣṇubhaktiparāyaṇaḥ
ekadāsadvijaśreṣṭha viṣṇubhaktimatāṃ varaḥ
skaṃ dheparaśumādāyakāṣṭhārthaṃ vipineyayau
vanātkāṣṭhaṃ samādāyanityam eva casadvijaḥ
himāgamevastrahīnaḥ kurute śītavāraṇam
jaghānaprāṃ gaṇasthasyaśākhāmaśvatthaśākhinaḥ
atrāntare mahāviṣṇustasmād aśvatthapādapāt
niścakrāmasuraśreṣṭhov yathā vyathitamānasaḥ
dadarśaviṣṇuṃ purataḥ savipraścaturbhujaṃ padmadalāyatākṣam
pītāṃ baraṃ kuḍalinaṃ sukeśaṃ dadhānamabjādinijāyudhāni
vibhāvasuṃ caiva sukhaṃ pareśaṃ
samdṛśyate devagaṇair adṛśyam
harṣāśrudhārā rucirākṣiyugmas
tuṣṭāva vipro mṛdulair vacobhiḥ
brāhmaṇa uvāca
lakṣmīpate keśava keśiśatro
nārāyaṇānanta vibho prasīda
tavāvatāraṃ kim ahaṃ bravīmi
tvayā vinā nāsti bhuvīha ko'pi
kiṃ vā guṇavyāptasamastalokaṃ
kiṃ vā dayāṃ mitraparaikatulyām
datvāsvīyāṃ kasyacid īśaviṣṇobhaktiṃ harasyacyutadehasaṃ sthām
śriyaṃ samādāyamudaṃ pradāsyebhaktiḥ pradattāmahataḥ sudhanyā
manyemahātmānamanaṃ tamūrtepāpātmanāṃ śreṣṭhamivāniśaṃ yat
yadyapyahaṃ duḥkhavatāṃ variṣṭhomanye tathā pīndramivādyaviṣṇo
ātmānamātmājagatāṃ bhavantaṃ sākṣātsamīkṣeyata īkṣaṇābhyām
tathāpi cāgremamamūrtimāṃ stvandṛṣṭosimekeśava ekapūjyaḥ
tvaddarśanāṃ bhomayavṛṣṭisiktaḥ prabho'dyakaivalyaphalaṃ dadhāra
mūrdhāmadīyo'khilalokamūrdhnāṃ śreṣṭhobhavetkeśavaviśvamūrteḥ
vyāsa uvāca
itthaṃ stutvājagannāthaṃ nārāyaṇamanāmayam
kṛtāṃ jaliḥ punaḥ prāhabhaktyātamitisadvijaḥ
brāhmaṇa uvāca
kaśāpraharaṇair etadgātraṃ terudhirokṣitam
sarveṣām evadaityānāṃ yudhivaṃ śāstvayāhatāḥ
tvāṃ haṃ tuṃ kaḥ kṣamaḥ pṛthvyāṃ prabho'dbhutamidaṃ mahat
bhagavān uvāca
vatsasatyamidaṃ proktaṃ tvayānāsty atra saṃśayaḥ
dānavorākṣasovāpimāṃ haṃ tuṃ ko'pinakṣamaḥ
aśvatthamūtirevāhaṃ kuṭhāreṇahatastvayā
vyāsa uvāca
ninindasvayamātmānamātmanābahudhādvijaḥ
trailokyādhipater dātāhṛdayemahatīṃ yathā
sarvapāpaharoviṣṇuḥ samayāvyādhitaḥ kṛtaḥ
etatpāpaṃ mayāpāraṃ kartuṃ naikenaśakyate
yasmiṃs tuṣṭepāpino'pibhavanti suravanditāḥ
prasādayanti yaṃ devābrahmādyā atibhaktitaḥ
ahomayāpāpavatā tasya dattāhṛdiv yathā
kiṃ tapobhirjapaiḥ kiṃ vākiṃ gṛhair jīvanaiścame
dharmārthakāmamokṣāṇāṃ dātaiko'yaṃ yathā turaḥ
ityuktvāsadvijaśreṣṭha tamevaparaśuṃ nije
dātuṃ kaṃ ṭhemanaścakreviṣṇuprīṇanahetave
tasya bhaktiṃ dṛḍhāṃ jṣātvādayāluḥ kamalāpatiḥ
śrībhagavān uvāca
ātmahatyākṛtāṃ puṃ sāṃ tuṣṭosminakadāpyaham
tavabhaktyātituṣṭo'smibhītiṃ mākurusattama
brāhmaṇa uvāca
mātiṣṭhatuśarīreteyācevaramimaṃ prabho
śrībhagavān uvāca
ajṣānādbhavatāvatsakarmedaṃ vihitaṃ dvija
nityaṃ tavānupālyo'smibhaktaśreṣṭhoyatobhavān
vihāyasakalāṃ bhītiṃ vaṃ ravṛṇumamāgrataḥ
brāhmaṇa uvāca
tiṣṭhatāṃ sudṛḍhābhaktirharekimaparair varaiḥ
vyāsa uvāca
śrutvāvākyamidaṃ tasya keśavapraṇayoditam
nijakaṇṭhasthitāṃ mālāṃ prītastasmai dadautataḥ
śrībhagavān uvāca
aśvattharūpaṃ māṃ nityaṃ kriyāyogenasattama
samārādhayasarvaṃ tesādhayiṣyāmivāṃ chitam
ityuktvātaṃ dvijaśreṣṭha ṃ bhūyo'pyāliṅgyakeśavaḥ
abhavatsahasādṛśyas tatra ivakaruṇālayaḥ
viṣṇoḥ kaṇṭhasrajaṃ prāpya sa vipro vaiṣṇavottamaḥ
kṛtakṛtyam ivātmānaṃ matvā tasthau nije gṛhe
svayaṃ vavarṣavittānibahūnikeśavājṣayā
prāsādoracitas tasya śilpināviśvakarmaṇā
nārāyaṇājṣayā tatra vaijayaṃ taivottamaḥ
dāsadāsīsamāyuktonānāvastuvibhūṣitaḥ
gajāśvakoṭisaṃ kīrṇaṃ vibabhau tasya mandiram
babhuvuḥ saṅgatās tasya naṣṭā api cabāndhavāḥ
kṛtāvajṣācatatpatnīsvayaṃ tadgṛhamāyayau
mṛtaputrāpitatpatnīkeśavasyānukaṃ payā
āyuṣoṃ 'teyayaumokṣaṃ sadāroviprasattamaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
sākṣād eva svayaṃ viṣṇur aśvattho vṛkṣasattamaḥ
tadbhaktiṃ kurvatāṃ puṃsāṃ vidyate nāśubhaṃ kvacit
aśvatthaṃ sevate yas tu viṣṇuṃ dhyātvā narottama
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe kriyāyogasāre
aśvatthamāhātmye dvādaśo'dhyāyaḥ
trayodaśo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
jyeṣṭhemāsidvijaśreṣṭha bhagavaṃ taṃ janārdanam
pūjayedbhaktibhāvenajalaiḥ saṃ snāpyaśītalaiḥ
tailaṃ suṃ gaṃ dhaṃ harayegrīṣmakāledinedine
pratyahaṃ kamalākāntaṃ sthāpayejjanamaṃ ḍape
cāmarair vījitaḥ śvetaiḥ sudīrghaiḥ kamalāpatim
jyeṣṭhemāsidvijaśreṣṭha suprītaḥ kiṃ nayacchati
tālavṛṃ takavātenapavitrāṃ baravāyunā
yaigrīṣmevījyateviṣṇustesarvesvargagāminaḥ
grīṣmehariṃ caṃ danaiścasaviśenmādhavīṃ tanum
uṣmāgamedvijaśreṣṭha samuktonātrasaṃśayaḥ
samdhyāyāṃ sthāpayedviṣṇuṃ deśedhīrasamīraṇe
sragbhiḥ pāṭalapuṣpāṇāṃ yenaviṣṇuralaṃ kṛtaḥ
jyeṣṭhemāsisavijṣeyoaśvamedhasahasrakṛt
yas tu muktāvaliṃ dadyādgrīṣmevaiśrīpater janaḥ
yas tu maṇḍayatigrīṣmeśrīkṛṣṇaṃ maṇimālayā
tiṣṭhedviṣṇupuretāvanmaṇimālāvibhūṣitaḥ
kṛṣṇaṃ maṃ ḍayatigrīṣmeso'pitatphalamāpnuyāt
vicitraṃ yas tu paryaṃ kaṃ sagaṇḍūkaṃ prayacchati
grīṣmakālenadeyānigurūṇivasanānica
harayebrāhmaṇaśreṣṭhadeyaṃ tanvaṃ śuṃ kaṃ śuci
aṃ teśakrapuraṃ gatvāsapibedamṛtaṃ mudā
nidāgheharaye yas tu yavāgūmatiśītalām
nānāvyaṃ janasaṃ yuktāṃ śraddhayāvaiṣṇavo janaḥ
āṣāḍhemāsiviprendradevadevaṃ jagadgurum
ārādhayativiprarṣeparāṅgatimavāpnuyāt
kadambapuṣpamālābhirmaṇḍapaṃ jvalanopamam
yas tasya brāhmaṇaśreṣṭhavājimedhaphalaṃ bhavet
sugandhaiḥ ketakīpuṣpaiḥ pūjitaḥ kamalāpatiḥ
sarvaduḥkhaṃ haratyevamānavānāṃ dvijottama
panasānāṃ phalair divyaiḥ supakvair ghṛtamiśritaiḥ
āṣāḍhemāsidadhyannaṃ harayeprativāsaram
kṛṣṇāyanavanītaṃ yodadātivaiṣṇavojanaḥ
śephālikāprasūnaiścayūthikākusumais tathā
arcayansakalaṃ kāmaṃ prāpnoti bhuvimānavaḥ
praphullaiḥ pūjayed yas tu tasya tuṣṭaḥ sadāhariḥ
sair īyakaiścayoviṣṇuṃ prasūpuṣpaiścayo'rcayet
śrāvaṇe caiva yodadyāllājāndhṛtasamanvitān
haraye tasya viprarṣegṛheśrīḥ sarvatomukhī
bhādremāsidvijaśreṣṭha nārāyaṇamanāmayam
śraddhayāpūjayetprājṣaścaturvargapradāyakam
sthāpayetpuṇḍarīkākṣaṃ bhagavaṃ taṃ janārdanam
daṃ śaiścamaśakaiścāpiprakīrṇemakṣikādibhiḥ
hariṃ purātanāgāresthāpayen na hi mānavaḥ
hariṃ nasthāpayetprājṣovarṣāsuparameśvaram
viṣṇvālyedvijaśreṣṭha prakuryād yas tu 'mānavaḥ
daṃ śāścamaśakāś caiva pūjākālenivārayet
maṃ sārikābhiḥ prābṛtyamaṃ caśāyinamacyutam
prāvṛṣisthāpayedviṣṇuṃ niśāyāṃ divyamandire
nabhādreketakīpuṣpaiḥ pūjitavyojanārdanaḥ
yatobhādrapademāsiketakīsyātsurāsamā
saṃ yuktaṃ ghṛtadugdhābhyāṃ pakvatālaṃ murāraye
bhādremāsidvijaśreṣṭha harayetālapiṣṭakam
saghṛtaṃ vaiṣṇavodadyātkevalaprāptihetave
narātraubhojanaṃ kuryānmumukṣurvaiṣṇavojanaḥ
āśvinemāsiviprendrakeśavaṃ kleśanāśanam
yattoyaṃ dīyateviprapūrvāhṇeharayejanaiḥ
pīyūṣamivatattoyaṃ gṛhṇātikamalāpatiḥ
tattoyaṃ raktatulyaṃ syānnagṛhṇātitatohariḥ
ata evadvijaśreṣṭha pūrvāhṇeharimarcayet
samastaṃ labhatekāmaṃ keśavasyānukaṃ payā
kuryādvāpi tathā pūjāṃ nagṛhṇāticakeśavaḥ
adhautenacavastreṇayaḥ pūjāṃ kurute hareḥ
viphalāsācapūjāsyānnacaviṣṇuḥ prasīdati
pūjāphalaṃ nāpnuvanti baligrāhyā ca sā bhavet
asaṃskṛtagṛhe pūjā kriyate jagatīpateḥ
sā pūjā brāhmaṇaśreṣṭha baligrāhyā bhavet khalu
snānaṃ devārcanaṃ caiva dānaṃ capitṛpūjanam
tilakānyagṛhītvāyatpuṇyakarmavidhīyate
śaṅkhacakragadāpadmair aṅkitaṃ yasya dṛśyate
śarīraṃ brāhmaṇaśreṣṭhavijṣeyaḥ so'cyutaḥ svayam
yolikheddakṣiṇebāhauśaṅkhapadmecavaiṣṇavaḥ
savye cakraṃ gadāṃ caiva saviṣṇurnātrasaṃśayaḥ
paṅkajaṃ dakṣiṇebāhauśaṅkhasyopariyolikhet
pātakaṃ sakalaṃ tasya kṣaṇādevatunaśyati
taṃ vandaṃ tedvijaśreṣṭha śakrādyā apinirjarāḥ
murāripādayugmaṃ casvalalāṭelikhedbudhaḥ
pāpātmāpi cataṃ dṛṣṭvāmuktobhavati pātakāt
aṣṭākṣaraṃ mahāmantraṃ matsyaṃ kūrmaṃ cayohṛdi
likhetsavaiṣṇavaśreṣṭhaḥ punātibhuvanatrayam
kṛṣṇāyudhāṃ kitaṃ yasya śarīraṃ syāddinedine
tasya kṛṣṇojagannāthodadātiparamaṃ padam
kṛṣṇāyudhāṃ kitatanuryatkarmakurute naraḥ
śubhaṃ vāpyaśubhaṃ vāpitat sarvamakṣayaṃ bhavet
dānavārākṣasāś caiva bhūtavetālakās tathā
piśācāḥ pannagāścāpiyakṣavidyādharās tathā
kinnarāguhyakāś caiva grahāvālagrahās tathā
kūṣmāṇḍāś caiva ḍākinyas tathā nyevighnakārakāḥ
sarvebhītyāpalāyaṃ tedṛṣṭvākṛṣṇāyudhāṅkitam
dvīpāścadvīpinaś caiva tathā nyevanavāsinaḥ
dṛṣṭvaivaprapalāyaṃ tebhayātkṛṣṇāyudhāṃ kitam
kāmalādyāmahārogādehadehāvapātinaḥ
kṛṣṇāyudhāṃ kitatanuṃ bhaktyāpaśyatiyojanaḥ
kṛṣṇadarśanatul yasya phalaṃ prāpnoti mānavaḥ
āśvinemāsiyodadyāddharaye karkaṭīphalam
dāmodaraṃ devadevaṃ bhaktyāprājṣaḥ prapūjayet
kārtikemāsiviprendraviṣṇuprīṇanahetave
yathoktavidhināprājṣaḥ prātaḥ snānaṃ samācaret
āmiṣaṃ maithunaṃ caiva kārtikemāsiyastyajet
janmāntarārjitaiḥ pāpair muktoyātiparāṅgatim
tulārāśigatesūryeprātaḥ snānaṃ dvijottama
haviṣyaṃ brahmacaryaṃ camahāpātakanāśanam
āmiṣaṃ maithunaṃ caiva kārtikemāsisevate
dvibhojanaṃ parānnaṃ catailaṃ cavaiṣṇavojanaḥ
phalaṃ tasya pravakṣyāmisamāsenaśṛṇu dvija
brahmahatyādibhiḥ pāpair vimuktaḥ kleśadāyakaiḥ
dāmodarapuraṃ gatvātiṣṭhetkoṭiyugāvadhi
dīpaṃ jvalaṃ taṃ nabhasitridaśāvāsavādayaḥ
asaupuṇyātmanāṃ śreṣṭhaḥ keśavārcanatatparaḥ
kārtikemāsiviprendra tasya tuṣṭaḥ sadāhariḥ
dadyādakṣayadīpaṃ yaḥ kārtikeharimandire
paramaṃ mokṣamāpnotiprasādājjagatīpate
yatkiṣcitkārtikemāsiviṣṇumuddiśyadīyate
ghṛtāktaṃ surapatraṃ yaḥ kārtikemāsivaiṣṇave
na dattaṃ tena kiṃ vipra viṣṇave daityajiṣṇave
ekam evāmbujaṃ hṛtvā dadāti kaiṭabhāraye
tasmai kiṃ bhagavān viṣṇur na dadāti śriyaḥ patiḥ
kamalaiḥ kārtike māsi yena nārādhito hariḥ
padmavījāniyodadyātkeśavāyamahātmane
dhanavānbahuputraścakuṭuṃ bānāṃ capoṣakaḥ
yenasampūjyagovindaṃ pāpātmāpi camokṣabhāk
padmapuṣpasyamāhātmyaṃ viśeṣāducyatemayā
setihāsamdvijaśreṣṭha sāvadhānaṃ niśāmaya
āsīdekaḥ prajānāmabrāhmaṇaḥ sarvaśāstravit
haripādāmbuje yasya manobhṛṅgasadāsthitiḥ
devānāṃ brāhmaṇānāṃ cagurūṇāṃ caiva sarvadā
kṛtāpūjādvijaśreṣṭha kāryākāryaśatāny api
paradravyaṃ viṣaṃ caiva parastrīṣusvamātṛvat
kṛtaṃ tenaivayac caiva ṃ tathā mitrecaśātrave
āyāntamatithiṃ dṛṣṭvāsavipraḥ paramārthavit
bhṛśaṃ mānaṃ nacāpnotiyācakaṃ cadvijottamam
sarvayajṣāḥ kṛtāstenavratānisakalānica
saṃsārasāgaraṃ ghoramapāraṃ catitīrṣuṇā
ekadāsadvijaśreṣṭhoharibhaktiparāyaṇaḥ
svamṛtyuṃ canijāṃ jātiṃ cintayāmāsacetasā
ahaṃ pūrvaṃ sthitaḥ kovākiṃ vākarmakṛtaṃ purā
kathaṃ vājanmasamprāptaṃ gamiṣyāmikvavāpunaḥ
vijṣātuṃ pūrvavṛttāntaṃ śivakṣetraṃ jagāmaha
tuṣṭāvaśaṃ karaṃ devaṃ vācāmadhurayāśivam
brāhmaṇa uvāca
namas te jñānarūpāyanamas te jñānadāyine
namas te sarvabhūtānāṃ hṛdambujanivāsine
namaḥ saṃ harākartrecapaśūnāṃ patayenamaḥ
namo'sthimālinetubhyaṃ nīlakaṃ ṭhāyavai namaḥ
namas te paṣcaktrāyanamas te śūlapāṇine
bāṇabhaktyātisaṃ tuṣṭamānasāyanamo’stu te
bahurūpāyavaitubhyaṃ viśvarūpāyavai namaḥ
gaṅgādharāyavaitubhyaṃ dakṣayajṣavināśine
īśānāyanamas tubhyaṃ manīṣāya namo namaḥ
tubhyaṃ namo’stu dṛśyāya adṛśyāya namo namaḥ
tasya stavaṃ samākarṇyaśaṃ karo lokaśaṃ karaḥ
āvirbabhūvasahasāprasannaḥ parameśvaraḥ
bhūyo'pisadvijaśreṣṭhoharṣanirbharamānasaḥ
kṛtāṣjalirmahādevaṃ tuṣṭāvavaradaṃ prabhum
brāhmaṇa uvāca
yaṃ napaśyanti deveśaṃ devā apisavāsavāḥ
paśyāmitamahaṃ sākṣānmahābhāgyamidaṃ mama
dhyānāvasthitacittenayo'dṛśyaḥ parameśvaraḥ
paśyāmitamahaṃ sākṣān sādhyaṃ kimaparaṃ mama
kṛtārtho'smikṛtārtho'smikṛtārtho'smicabhāgyavān
mahādeva uvāca
varaṃ vṛṇumahābhāgavaraṃ ditsurahaṃ khalu
brāhmaṇa uvāca
bhavantaṃ paramātmānamadṛśyaṃ daivatair api
sākṣātpaśyāmyahaṃ nāthakiṃ kāryamaparair varaiḥ
tathāpi tvaṃ mahādevavaraṃ ditsuḥ kṛpāmayaḥ
pṛcchāmiyadahaṃ kiṃ cittadbrūhiparameśvara
ko'haṃ tasthaupurādevakiṃ vākāryaṃ kṛtaṃ purā
punaḥ pāpaprabhāveṇaprāpyateviṣamāgatiḥ
prabhāvaiḥ karmaṇāṃ keṣāṃ janmaprāptamidaṃ mayā
nānāduḥkhapradaṃ nāthaprasannobrūhiśaṃ kara
pāpam ūlamidaṃ janmajanmaduḥkhasyakāraṇam
jṣātum icchāmyahaṃ tasmāt pūrvavṛttāntamātmanaḥ
sthito'haṃ jananīkukṣaujanaṭharānalatāpitaḥ
mūtraviṣṭhāprakīrṇecavipākenacakarmaṇām
kathaṃ mayānubhūtaṃ tatprabhobhaktārtināśana
saṃsāre 'sminmahāghrenānāduḥkhasamanvite
asāremāyayāviṣṇor mohitepātakāśraye
apārejagatāmīśapatito'smi kathaṃ śiva
mahādeva uvāca
aprakāśyaṃ tathāpi tvāṃ bhaktaṃ prativadāmyaham
purātvaṃ brāhmaṇaḥ śreṣṭhaśabarānvayasambhava
daṇḍapāṇiritikhyātaḥ sthitaḥ sallokaduḥkhudaḥ
dasyuvṛttiṃ prapannārtiparamakleśadāyinīm
dasyuvṛttigataṃ dṛṣṭvābhavaṃ tamatinir dayam
teṣāṃ nāmāniviprendrabhātṝṇāṃ nigadāmyaham
yaiḥ sārdhaṃ bhavatāpūrvaṃ bhrātṛbhir dasyutākṛtā
daṇḍīdaṇḍāyudhaś caiva dattavāndattabhūs tathā
suṃ daḍodaṇḍaketuścabhrātaraḥ ṣaṭprakīrtitāḥ
daṇḍenabhavatānityaṃ sarvevyagrīkṛtājanāḥ
araṇyeprāntaroviprahatāḥ śatasahasraśaḥ
hatvācasāyakaistīkṣṇair vanasthenatvayāsadā
gavāṃ kravyāṇibhuktvācamadirābhiḥ sahadvija
gatovartmaśramaśrāntaḥ snānārthaṃ sarasīṃ prati
bhakṣitānimṛṇālānibhrātṛbhistair jalānica
bhuktānipadmapuṣpāṇipraphullānibahūnica
sarvavedāitikhyātas tatra snānārthamāgataḥ
tatra snātvāsadharmātmābhagavaṃ taṃ janārdanam
yaṣṭuṃ tvāmakamaṃ bhojaṃ yayācevinayānvitaḥ
dattaṃ paramayābhaktyāpūjārthaṃ kamalāpateḥ
pūjayāmāsa tatra ivaviṣṇuṃ sakalakārakam
viṣṇupūjāparaṃ dṛṣṭvātaṃ vipraṃ sarvavedasam
viṣṇupūjādarśanenanaṣṭaṃ tesarvapātakam
tenaivakarmaṇātuṣṭobhagavānkaruṇālayaḥ
bhuktaṃ nānāsukhaṃ tatra kṛpayākamalāpateḥ
tataḥ karmāvasānetukarmabhūmimimāṃ dvija
sarvaguṇāśrayālabdhāharibhaktiracaṃ calā
ārādhitomahāviṣṇuḥ kriyāyogaistvayāprabhuḥ
tubhyaṃ dāsyativijñānaṃ jṣānānmuktobhaviṣyati
vyāsa uvāca
kṛtārtho brāhmaṇaḥ so'pi jagāma bhavanaṃ svakam
yatnād ārādhayāmāsa stutyarthaṃ parameśvaram
viṣṇuṃ samārādhya ciraṃ prasuptaḥ
jñānaṃ samāsādya jagāma mokṣaṃ
prasādataḥ śrīgaruḍadhvajasya
anicchayāpi kamalaṃ yacchataḥ phalam īdṛśam
nārāyaṇaṃ ye ca praphullavārijair
ekāham apy utkaṭapāpayuktās
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe kriyāyogasāre trayodaśo'dhyāyaḥ
caturdaśo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
mārgaśīrṣedvijaśreṣṭha mahālakṣmyāsamanvitam
pūjayedavyayaṃ viṣṇuṃ bhaktibhāvenavaiṣṇavaḥ
durgaṃ dhaiścaparivyāptesthāneviṣṇuṃ napūjyet
pākhaṇḍānāṃ samīpecamahāpātakināṃ tathā
asatyabhāṣiṇāṃ caiva na kuryād viṣṇupūjanam
kraṃ datāṃ sannidhaucāpikalahānapi kurvatām
tathopahasatāṃ sthānenakuryātpūjanaṃ hareḥ
pratigraharatānāṃ casthāneviṣṇuṃ napūjayet
kṛpaṇānāṃ gṛhe caiva paravittābhilāṣiṇām
tathā kapaṭavṛttīnāṃ na kuryād viṣṇupūjanam
nārāyaṇārcanevipraparaṃ bhaktiparāyaṇaḥ
hāhākāraṃ caniśvāsaṃ vismayaṃ sadvijottama
pākhaṇḍajanasambhāṣaṃ na kuryād dharipūjanam
cintāgamaśataśrāntaḥ śilācakreṣvapidvija
ananyamānasobhūtvābhaktyāviṣṇuṃ jayedbudhaḥ
tasmānmanodṛḍhīkṛtyapūjayetkamalāpatim
yatnād vihitaśauco'pi viṣṇupūjāparo'pi ca
manaḥśuddhivihīnaś cec cāNḍāla iva gamyate
merupramāṇakaṃ svarṇaṃ brāhmaṇāyakuṭuṃ bine
tasmād ekamanābhūtvābhaktiśraddhāsamanvitaḥ
savāstukādiśākaṃ cadadyātsadasivaiṣṇave
keśavāyadvijaśreṣṭha so'smābhirabhipūjyate
tadevāgrayaṇemāsibhaktyādadyānmurāraye
pauṣemāsisamāyāteśrīkṛṣṇaṃ varadaṃ prabhum
ihabhuṃ ktesukhaṃ sarvaṃ mṛtoyātīkṣusāgaram
yodadyādikṣunaivedyaṃ devadevāyaviṣṇave
datvāmurārayemartyaḥ sarvānkāmānavāpnuyāt
sarvaiḥ purātanaṃ vastraṃ dūrīkṛtyamurāraye
śī tasya vāraṇārthāyadadyādvastraṃ canūtanam
pauṣasaṃ kramaṇeviprasalakṣmīkāyaviṣṇave
dadyānmumukṣurmanujodaśavarṇaṃ capīṭhakam
tasya puṇyaphalaṃ vacmiśṛṇu vatsasamāhitaḥ
agamyāgamanādyaiścavimuktaḥ sarvapātakaiḥ
aṃ teviṣṇupuraṃ gatvāviṣṇunāsahamodate
vnateyāṃ kitāṃ ghaṃ ṇṭāṃ yas tu vādayatehareḥ
pūjākāledvijaśreṣṭha tasya puṇyaṃ vadāmyaham
abhakṣyabhakṣaṇādyaiścavimuktaḥ sarvapātakaiḥ
prayātimandiraṃ viṣṇor athamāruhyaśobhanam
tatra bhuktvākhilānkāmānkalpakoṭiśatāvadhi
punarāgatyadharaṇīṃ caturvedīdvijottamaḥ
tatra bhuktvākhilānkāmānkalpakoṭiśatāvadhi
punarviṣṇupuraṃ gatvāmokṣaṃ prāpnoty anuttamam
vīṇāṃ vādayate yas tu pūjākālejagatpateḥ
paṃ ḍitānāmagraṇīḥ syātsamartyaḥ pratijanmani
mṛdaṃ gavādyakṛd yas tu pūjāyāṃ kaiṭabhadviṣaḥ
ḍamaruṃ ḍiḍimaṃ caiva jharjharīṃ madhurīṃ tathā
paṭahaṃ duṃ dubhiṃ caiva kāhalaṃ siṃ dhuvārakam
kāṃ syaṃ cakaratālaṃ caveṇuṃ vādayatetuyaḥ
pūjākālemahāviṣṇos tasya puṇyaṃ niśāmaya
steyārthaiḥ pātakair muktomandiraṃ yāticakriṇaḥ
kalaśabdaṃ cayaḥ kuryātpūjākālejagadguroḥ
koṭikoṭikulair yuktaḥ prayātimandiraṃ hareḥ
jñānamāsādya tatra ivamokṣamakṣayyamāpnuyāt
sayātibrāhmaṇaśreṣṭhatadviṣṇoḥ paramaṃ padam
yas tu gāyatigītāni bhaktyānārāyaṇāgrataḥ
sanṛpatvamavāpnotigandharvāṇāṃ pureṣu ca
iti śrīpadmapurāṇe kriyāyogasāre
bhagavatpūjāmāhātmyaṃ nāma caturdaśo'dhyāyaḥ
paṣcadaśo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
nārāyaṇasyamāhātmyaṃ punarvacmiśṛṇu dvija
viṣṇvaṃ śabhūtaṃ sakalaṃ jagadetaddvijottama
tasmād viṣṇumayaṃ dhīrāḥ paśyanti paramārthinaḥ
brahmaśaṃ kararudrādyāviṣṇvaṃ śāḥ sakalāḥ surāḥ
tasmāt samastadevārcāviṣṇumekaṃ prapadyate
smaratāṃ viṣṇunāmānisarvapāpaharāṇica
sarvam evadvijaśreṣṭha karmaṇāpāpam ucyate
anapāyiidaṃ viṣṇoḥ smaraṇaṃ pāpanāśanam
svapanbhuṣjanvadaṃ stiṣṭhannuttiṣṭhaṃ ścavrajaṃ tathā
smaredavirataṃ viṣṇuṃ mumukṣurvaiṣṇavojanaḥ
nakālaniyamaḥ proktaḥ sarvaduḥkhavināśanaḥ
nāmaprabhāvaṃ viprarṣekeśavasyamahātmanaḥ
bravīmyahaṃ samāsenasetihāsaṃ niśāmaya
āsītsaparaśurnāmapūrvaṃ kṛtayuge śuciḥ
vaiśyovaiśyakulaśreṣṭhaḥ samastaguṇapāragaḥ
jagāmavaśatāṃ mṛtyoḥ kāsaśvāsagadārditaḥ
jīvantī nāmatatpatnīsumadhyānavayauvanā
sājīvantī dvijaśreṣṭha navayauvanagarvitā
gatiṃ cakārajāreṣubādhyamānāpibāndhavaiḥ
jārānuraktacittāsātatyājyanavayauvanā
aṃ dhīkṛtāsākāmenasuśroṇīpīvarastanī
dharmamārgaṃ dvijaśreṣṭha nakadāciddadarśaha
duḥśīlāṃ caiva tāṃ dṛṣṭvātatpitādharmatatparaḥ
apakīrtibhayādbhīrurityāhātyantakopavān
duṣṭepāpinimadvaṃ śesarvadoṣavivarjite
tātenetiniruktāsākrodhāruṇitalocanā
athasāsvecchayānārībhramantī jārakāṃ kṣayā
veśyāvṛttiṃ samāśrityatasthaulajjāvivarjitā
puliṃ daḥ śabarovāpicāṇḍālovāpitadgṛham
āyātitasyāstenāpimudākrīḍatisā'satī
nacintayāmāsacasāvāranārī yathā kramāt
kadācidbrāhmaṇaśreṣṭhakaścidvyādhastadālaye
śukaśāvaṃ samādāyavikrayārthaṃ samāyayau
sāpivārāṅganātaṃ caśukaśāvakamuttamam
tadyogyāhāradānenavārastrīnityamevasā
śukasyapoṣaṇaṃ cakre tasya jātakutūhalā
vārāṃ ganānapatyāsātamevaśukaśāvakam
so'pipakṣīdvijaśreṣṭha nityamevatadājṣayā
tato'saulabdhabhāvaścaśukogaṇikayātadā
rāmetisatataṃ nāmapāṭhyatesundarākṣaram
rāmoccāraṇamātreṇatayoścaśukaveśyayoḥ
vinaṣṭamabhavatpāpaṃ sarvam evasudāruṇam
kiṃ karānpreṣayāmāsacaṃ ḍādyāndharmarāṭtataḥ
tatastekiṃ karāḥ sarvecaṃ ḍādyāḥ ativeginaḥ
yamājṣayāsamāyātāḥ pāśamudgarapāṇayaḥ
ānetuṃ tausamāyātāḥ sarveviṣṇuparākramāḥ
pāśabaddhaututaudṛṣṭvāpatitauviṣṇukiṃ karāḥ
ūcurvākyamidaṃ kruddhāyamadūtānsurāsadān
viṣṇudūtā ūcuḥ
ahocitramidaṃ vākyaṃ yamadūtāmukhācchrutam
bhaktāvapihareretaudaṇḍyaubhāskarasūnunā
ahocaritraṃ duṣṭānāṃ kadācid api nottamam
yatnādapiyatohiṃsāṃ kurbanti satataṃ satām
duṣṭānāṃ kṛtapāpānāṃ caritramidamadbhutam
niṣpāpam apipaśyantipuṇyātmāno'khilaṃ jagat
śrutvāpuṇyātmanāṃ puṇyamabhitṛpyanti dharmiṇaḥ
tṛpyanti pātakaṃ śrutvāpāpināṃ pāpinojanāḥ
pāpacarcāṃ samākarṇya yathā tṛpyanti pāpinaḥ
natṛpyanti yathā prāpyasvarṇabhāraśatāny api
ahobalavatīmāyāmahāviṣṇor mahātmanaḥ
ātmapīḍākaramapipāpaṃ kurbanti tedvija
vyāsa uvāca
ityuktvāviṣṇudūtāsteviṣṇubhaktiparāyaṇāḥ
tatastuśamanapreṣyāḥ kruddhāstevahnisaṃ nnibhāḥ
vavarṣuḥ sahasā tatra jvaladaṃ gārasaṃ cayān
daṇḍa uvāca
vihitaṃ camayāpyevaṃ śukaṃ veśyāṃ capāpinīm
netuṃ yūyaṃ samāyātāityadbhutamivābhavat
nūnametauyadānetuṃ yūyamicchatasattamāḥ
ityuktvārāmadūtāstebalinovidhṛtāyudhāḥ
siṃ hanādair diśaḥ sarvepūrayāmāsuruddhatāḥ
viṣṇudūtāmahātmānaḥ supratīkādayas tathā
śaṅkhanādaiḥ sulalitaiścakruḥ śabdamayaṃ jagat
yāmyaistatomahādūtair dhanurmuktaiḥ śilīmukhaiḥ
chāditāviṣṇudūtāstesaṅgrāme'tyantadāruṇe
śūlānyadhyakṣipuḥ kecic chaktiṃ kecinmahārṇave
kecic charasahasrāṇikecic cakrāṇiteruṣā
tair muktānimahāstrāṇiviṣṇudūtāmahāmarāḥ
bāṇānvicūrṇayāmāsurgadāpraharaṇādibhiḥ
tatobhāgavatair ertaryāmyānāṃ cakradhārayā
keṣāṃ ciccaraṇāiśchannāḥ keṣāṃ cidvāhavas tathā
atyadbhutakṣatāḥ kecidvyāsyāḥ peturgatāsavaḥ
saṃ tyajyasahasāyāmyāḥ saṅgrāmāccapradudruvuḥ
tānālokyatatodūtānpalāyanaparāyaṇān
praviveśaruṣācaṃ ḍaḥ saṅgrāmandhṛtamudgaraḥ
yamadūtagaṇaśreṣṭhaścaṃ ḍo'tyantapratāpavān
tāḍayāmāsaśataśomudgarair viṣṇukiṅkarān
athabhāgavatādūtāniśitāyudhavarṣaṇaiḥ
vavarṣustarasākruddhāstaṃ caṃ ḍaṃ caṃ ḍavikramam
mudgareṇatataścaṇḍoviṣṇudūtānpṛthakpṛthak
tāḍayāmāsavigaladraktasaṃ siktavigrahaḥ
caṃ ḍenatāḍitāstenadūtābhagavatoyudhi
tyaktasatvāḥ pṛṣṭabhāgaṃ suprakāśasyavaiyayuḥ
suprakāśastataḥ kruddhojapāpuṣpanibhekṣaṇaḥ
praviveśaraṇe yuddhaṃ gadāpāṇirmahābalaḥ
tāḍayāmāsasaṃ kruddhoviṣṇutulyaparākramaḥ
samuttasthaumahābhīṣmaḥ sadhūmaḥ pūtigandhavān
samudgareṇacaṃ ḍenatāḍitas tasya veginā
sphuliṃ gāvarṣaṇaṃ sadyomumocātyantabhītidam
tāḍayāmāsaviprarṣesuprakāśaṃ mahābalam
gadayātāḍayāmāsacaṃ ḍaṃ śamanakiṃ karam
tenapratāḍitaścaṃ ḍas tatra raktaḥ pariplutaḥ
yāmyadūtāstatastecacaṃ ḍamādāyamūrcchitam
hāhākāraṃ prakurvanto yuddhādbhītāḥ pradudruvuḥ
viṣṇudūtāstatoviprasarvecātipraharṣitāḥ
yamadūtāstatastecaśoṇitaughapariplutāḥ
yamadūtā ūcuḥ
sūryaputramahābāhotavājṣākāriṇovayam
tathāpi viṣṇudūtair naḥ kṛtādurgatirīdṛśī
mahāpātakināṃ śreṣṭhauprabhoyadyapitaukhalu
rāmanāmaprabhāveṇagataunārāyaṇālayam
bhavatādaṇḍanīyāyedurātmānaḥ kṛtainasaḥ
te'piviṣṇupuraṃ yānti prabhutvaṃ tavakiṃ tadā
nāsmākaṃ viṣṇudūtsteḥ kṛtaḥ paribhavastvayam
dūtāḥ smaraṃ tautaurāmarāmanāmākṣaradvayam
tadānamedaṇḍanīyautayornārāyaṇaḥ prabhuḥ
saṃsāre nāstitatpāpaṃ yadrāmasmaraṇair api
nayātisaṃ kṣayaṃ sadyodṛḍhaṃ śṛṇu takiṃ karāḥ
yemānavāḥ pratidinaṃ madhusūdanasyanāmānighoraduritaughavināśanāni
govindakeśavaharejagadīśaviṣṇonārāyaṇapraṇatavatsalamādhaveti
bhaktyāvadanti puruṣāḥ satataṃ kṣitauyedaṇḍyānatemamabhaṭā atipāpino'pi
bhaktārtināśanasureśvaradīnabandholakṣmīpatesakalapāpavināśakārin
etadvadāntasatataṃ bhuviyemanuṣyāstepāpino'pinabhaṭāmamadaṇḍanīyāḥ
yeṣāṃ vadanti vadaneṣusadaivaśabdā dūtānamāmyahamapiprativāsaraṃ tān
nārāyaṇasyajagadekapater murāreścarcāsucittamatihārddinṛṇāṃ cayeṣām
teṣāmahaṃ casatataṃ subhaṭāhyadhīnoyetepraphullakamalekṣaṇarūpabhājaḥ
yeviṣṇupūjanaratāharibhaktabhaktā ekādaśīvrataratāḥ kapaṭair vihīnāḥ
yeviṣṇupādasalilaṃ śirasāvahanti tepāpino'pinabhaṭāmamadaṇḍanīyāḥ
yekarṇayoścaśirasicchadanaṃ tulasyānityaṃ bahanti cabhaṭāḥ praṇamāmyahaṃ tān
yekṛṣṇapādakamalārcanatatparāścayebrāhmaṇārcanaratāguṇasevinaśca
yedīnalokahṛdayātisukhapradāścateṣāmahaṃ satatam evabhaṭā adhīnaḥ
yesatyavākyakathaneṣusadānuraktālokapriyāścaśaraṇāgatalokapālāḥ
paśyanti ye casatataṃ viṣavatparasvaṃ temānavāmamabhaṭā na hi daṇḍanīyāḥ
yecānnadānaniratāḥ salilapradāścabhūmipradānikhilalokahitaiṣiṇaśca
yevṛttihīnajanatṛptikarāḥ praśāṃ tādūtānatekhalukadāpi cadaṇḍanīyāḥ
yejṣātipoṣaṇaratāḥ priyavādinaścayedambhakopamadamatsarahīnacittāḥ
yepāpadṛṣṭirahitāvijitendriyāścateṣāmahaṃ navidadhāmikadāpi carcām
vyāsa uvāca
viṣṇor nāmāniviprendrasarvadevādhikānivai
teṣāṃ madhyetutattvajṣārāmanāmavaraṃ smṛtam
yaduccāraṇamātreṇapāpīyātiparāṅgatim
maheśa evajānātinānyojānātijaimine
viṣṇor nāmasahasrāṇāṃ paṭhanāllabhatephalam
ahocitraṃ manuṣyāṇāṃ caritramidamucyate
rāmetimuktidaṃ nāmanasmaranti durāśayāḥ
tathāpi rāmarāmetinavadanti durāśayāḥ
tāvattiṣṭhanti pāpānideheṣudehināṃ vara
anyeṣvapi cakāryeṣuvaidikeṣuvicakṣaṇaḥ
ṣaḍakṣaraṃ japed yas tu sāyujyaṃ prāpyate hareḥ
